Our exclusive Cytopep Cellular Extracts, containing over 5,000 active proteins and peptides, are scientifically engineered to work in sync with the skin’s own physiology,  visibly rejuvenating, energising, and restoring long-term radiance.

We don’t formulate fast, we formulate right.
It takes an average of five years to bring a Cellcosmet product to life, with each formula undergoing at least seven independent instrumental tests that follow pharmaceutical-level protocols, far beyond traditional cosmetic norms.

We operate a full vertical model, from development and formulation to manufacturing, packaging, and global retailing, all under one roof in Châtel-St-Denis, Switzerland. This gives us complete control over quality, speed to market, and product integrity. Our production takes place in ISO 8-certified cleanrooms, ensuring pharmaceutical-grade environments for exceptional purity and safety.

Our commitment to excellence is backed by three international certifications:

• ISO 9001 (Quality Management)

• ISO 22716 (Cosmetic GMP)

• ISO 14001 (Environmental Management System)

We also adhere to one of the strictest formulation charters in the industry.
We exclude controversial ingredients such as silicones, parabens, volatile alcohols, and synthetic dyes, prioritising skin health, biocompatibility, and long-term performance over shortcuts.

We call our approach: Science. Craft. Precision. Experience. Safe.
Trusted by dermatologists, clinics, hotels and luxury retailers in over 30 countries, Cellcosmet delivers more than skincare. We deliver scientifically proven, sensorially refined, cellular-level results, built to perform, made to last.

Name: LimeLife by Alcone
Description: After selling makeup to professional makeup artists for over 60 years, Alcone developed its own makeup line for the direct sales market. This line is made specifically with the everyday woman in mind and incorporates the best makeup from around the world. If you want the makeup that pros really use on set, television, and the runway, then you have come to the right place. We seek to give every woman the chance to step into the LimeLight— either by experiencing the highest quality professional makeup and luxury, natural skin care from around the world or by building her own successful business selling these amazing products. Welcome to LimeLife by Alcone!

Name: Starbrands Group
Description: At Starbrands, we foster a respectful, inclusive, and collaborative workplace. We value integrity, diversity, and open communication, with zero tolerance for discrimination—empowering everyone to thrive and do their best work.

Name: Bask and Lather Co
Description: Bask & Lather Co. is a unique direct to consumer haircare brand on a mission to help women around the world grow and keep hair they love. We take pride in offering powerful, natural products at accessible prices—because healthy hair should never be out of reach.

Name: BYPHASSE
Description: Byphasse is an international beauty brand specialized in skincare and personal care including 170+ products, partially vegan, designated to facecare, bodycare, haircare, feetcare, handcare and babycare. Driven by their mission to provide a basic need everyone deserves to access, the collections are locally manufactured in the EU and consciously designed under a formula that offers XL formats at XS prices, highly containing natural origin ingredients and soft textures.

Name: BYOMA
Description:
Meet BYOMA – the world’s fastest growing skincare brand.

BYOMA has pioneered clinically proven science and innovation by demystifying and democratising skincare– empowering people to make smart, informed, educated choices when it comes to their skin and bringing the conversation around skin barrier health into the mainstream. 

BYOMA was built on four fundamental principles; Efficacy, Accessibility, Education, and Engagement and these inform, inspire and underpin everything the brand does. Not only are the formulas efficacious – but the dedication to accessibility and education has allowed the brand to become one of the most exciting and engaging skincare brands globally.

BYOMA is currently available in Sephora across UK, Europe and Middle East. Target and Ulta in North America, and in other key retailers worldwide such as Boots, Cult Beauty and Amazon

Join us as we build an inclusive community. Because let’s face it, barriers aren’t beneficial for anything other than your skin.

Name: BM Beauty
Description:
Fundada por Bruna Malheiros, maquiadora renomada que possui mais de 10 anos de trabalho e milhões de seguidores fieis nas redes sociais, BM Beauty nasceu do amor pelas pessoas, mudanças e transformações da vida.

BM Beauty é uma marca 100% independente, que nasceu e cresce a cada dia com recursos próprios. Nosso propósito é levar transformação com foco na autoestima e liberdade através da beleza, de forma humanizada e com produtos de alta qualidade e tecnologia.

Nos preocupamos em trazer emoção, visão, propósito, e principalmente o espelhamento da vida, da diversidade, do amor próprio. Para que cada um de vocês se veja, se ame e entenda a Beleza em Mudar

Name: Alqvimia
Description:
Alqvimia is more than a manufacturer and distributor of high quality, 100% natural cosmetics with organic ingredients; our products are made using the ancient art of alchemy by master perfumers, among the natural surroundings of La Garrotxa, Girona (Spain) at the feet of the Pyrenees. 

From these beautiful surroundings we make our cosmetic products with love, products which evoke a transformation of body, mind and soul; and from here we try to inspire and promote a new humanized economy, one which respects and cares for our planet and the well-being of all human beings.

Name: Sigma Beauty
Description:
Founded in 2009 by scientist Dr. Simone Xavier and engineer Rene Xavier, Sigma Beauty is a pioneer in clean, conscious, and innovative beauty solutions. With a mission to create high-quality products that solve real problems, Sigma has redefined the standards of performance, sustainability, and ethics in the cosmetics industry.

We are known for our award-winning makeup brushes, patented beauty tools, and trend-setting color cosmetics—all designed with purpose and backed by over 70 patents. Every Sigma product is cruelty-free, responsibly formulated, and engineered for performance, blending scientific precision with beauty artistry.

As a global beauty brand with a loyal following and retail presence in 70+ countries, Sigma is proud to lead the way in beauty innovation and sustainability, setting new benchmarks for what modern beauty should be.

Retail Partners receive discounts, premium shipping, endless supportive resources, and more! 
Contact sales@sigmabeauty.com to get started.

Name: Dari Mooch
Description: Dari Mooch is a one stop shop for all your grooming needs. We’re the best at what we do and we leave no man behind. We're on a mission to style and groom every Pakistani man to their best self. So, join us and become a part of the Dari Mooch Club!

Name: LuxaDerme
Description:
Premium Korean Skincare
Clean & Clinically Proven Formula
90% + Naturally Derived Ingredients
EWG Compliant- Green Grade Ingredients
PETA Certified Vegan
Plastic Negative Company
1% for the Planet

Name: Evo Commerce
Description:
Evolut Commerce is DTC brand builder, focusing on high quality supplements & hair products. We’re currently operating in 10 markets and our team members are based out of Singapore and Indonesia. 
 
Our hero product, BounceBack, is currently one of the fastest growing CPG brands in the world and is loved by bankers, traders, influencers and bartenders with a high efficacy rate against hangover post drinking. Our aim is to become the Redbull of hangover recovery, making hangover remedies accessible to drinkers worldwide. Other products within the group includes Stryv.co, getmantou.com, etc.

We’re big advocates of direct-to-consumer brands, and believe in the new world (Post-COVID), consumers buy directly from global brands through digital native storefront, bypassing distributors, wholesalers and retailers. This means commerce and information are more efficient, and the implication to the end customer is that product quality goes up and cost of goods are reduced drastically. We want to be the catalyst for this paradigm shift within the health and beauty industry.

We’re backed by global institutional investors which includes Bonjour Holding (Listing No. 0653.HK), SparkLab Ventures, Paragon Capital, Farquhar Ventures, East Ventures and super angels which includes founders and management teams from Grab, ShopBack, Carro, Prism+, Tiktok, Airbnb, Spenmo, Nasper, etc.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Esme Consumer
Description:
At Esme, we are committed to making highly innovative beauty and personal care products accessible and affordable to masses.

Our journey began in 2019 when SAMARA CAPITAL (a PE fund with a portfolio of 20+ companies) acquired two small Delhi based FMCG companies - Blue Heaven Cosmetics Pvt Ltd and Nature’s Essence Pvt Ltd with the objective of building a large scale personal care platform serving mass India (Bharat). 

Blue Heaven is one of the most loved Indian cosmetic brands with a rich legacy of close to 50 years. The brand is known for crafting superior quality, innovative colour cosmetic products and selling those at affordable prices. This has been made possible by keeping all manufacturing and product development in-house. 

Nature’s Essence started its journey more than 20 years back by educating small to mid-size salons about beauty treatments and manufacturing affordable personal care products for those treatments. Nature’s Essence is currently amongst the top brands in the Facial Kit and Bleach segments. The equity built in salons has enabled the company to expand to retail categories like Face wash, Scrubs, Masks, Gels and Lotions.

Name: LUXÉOL
Description:
Fondée en France, LUXEOL est une marque novatrice spécialisée dans les soins capillaires et la beauté. Depuis ses débuts, elle s’est imposée comme une référence incontournable en alliant expertise scientifique et naturalité. Grâce à une recherche constante d’innovation et à des formules rigoureusement développées, LUXEOL répond avec précision aux besoins de tous les types de cheveux : chute, pousse, brillance, densité, volume, nutrition, cheveux bouclés…

Sa gamme complète de compléments alimentaires, shampoings, sérums et soins ciblés est conçue en partenariat avec des laboratoires experts, dans le respect des normes de qualité les plus strictes. Chaque produit est fabriqué en France et testé (cliniquement, tests consommateurs), garantissant efficacité, tolérance et traçabilité. LUXEOL s’adresse à celles et ceux qui recherchent des solutions fiables, visibles et respectueuses pour la beauté des cheveux et de la peau.

Reconnue pour son engagement, sa transparence et ses résultats, LUXEOL est aujourd’hui la 2ᵉ marque capillaire la plus vendue en pharmacies et parapharmacies en France. Présente sur le marché national, elle séduit des millions de consommateurs à la recherche d’une beauté authentique, accessible et performante.

LUXEOL, c’est la rencontre entre innovation, expertise française et excellence au service de la beauté.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Comme Avant
Description: Nous fabriquons des produits bio, efficaces et écologiques en France près de Marseille. Nous éliminons ce qui est superflu pour se concentrer sur l’essentiel.

Name: LA MER
Description:
Our journey began when Dr. Max Huber suffered burns in a lab accident and was inspired to create his own destiny. Aerospace Physicist by day, star-gazer and dreamer by night, he hoped to unlock the legendary healing powers of the sea he held so dear.

6,000 experiments and 12 years of searching led to the epiphany of a lifetime – a fermentation process that transformed sea kelp and other pure ingredients into Miracle Broth. This cell-renewing elixir at the heart of Crème de la Mer would finally transform the look of his skin.
 
For more LA MER, visit…
https://www.cremedelamer.com/
https://www.instagram.com/lamer
https://www.facebook.com/LaMer
https://www.youtube.com/c/LaMerOfficial

Name: Ethique Beauty
Description:
No compromise beauty.

Crafted with sustainability at our core, every plastic-free Ethique bar reflects our commitment to ethical sourcing and sustainable practices. All while delivering stellar results. 

Our uniquely made, powerhouse formulas are backed by clinically proven results, rigorous testing, and over 50,000 five-star reviews.

Packed with a dream team of potent ingredients and clean actives, to elevate your beauty routine while honouring our planet. Adhering to strict EU standards (the strictest standards in the world) and beyond. 

Our bars have a 93% smaller footprint than liquid haircare, while being plastic-free, housed in home-compostable packaging, built with transparent supply chains. Alongside our 2% charity donation, top B Corp status and 41M bottles saved to date. 

Transform your daily ritual into a force for good.

Name: Grupo Leclair
Description:
Desde o início do nosso trabalho foi baseado na demanda incessante da excelência e resultados, que hoje se tornou uma tradição e é mantido em todos os produtos que levam o nome de Leclair, seja dos outros ou com a nossa marca.

Este mérito foi alcançado através da qualidade dos produtos desenvolvidos com cuidado e uma forte capacidade na prestação de produção de sabonetes, cosméticos, produtos de higiene e perfumaria.
Nascem em junho de 1998 para ser grande, porque nós servido com um pedido para a fabricação de produtos de alta qualidade.

Durante esse tempo, nós evoluímos e estamos lidando com múltiplos parceiros, não só fazer sabonetes, mas também cosméticos e perfumes, e auxilio e desenvolvimento de produtos, da embalagem para a fabricação do produto.

Com a nossa criatividade e experiência que desenvolvemos novos produtos para marcas reconhecidas no mercado nacional e internacional, abrindo o campo para o crescimento e sucesso que só pode com muito trabalho, amor e muita competência.

Name: Balmain Hair
Description:
The Balmain Hair journey began nearly 50 years ago with an emphasis on hair additions and wigs, in line with the trends and fashions of the early 1970s. 

Nowadays, Balmain Hair is the market leader in high fashion hair accessories. Years of experience in hair design have led to an impressive line of hair products, including the development of the luxury Care & Styling products and professional session tools. 

The Balmain Hair collections consist of a small but complete line of bare essentials, inspired by backstage session secrets to create the ultimate catwalk inspired look. Balmain Hair strives to source, select and process the best hair in the world for their extensions and additions. The key beliefs are innovation, high quality, education and inspiration; fulfilling the desire of creating dream hairstyles by adding color, volume and length.

Balmain Hair remains firmly at the forefront of creating hair couture for fashion shows, backstage artists, salons and consumers around the world, staying true to its origins whilst embracing continuous development and innovation.

Name: GreatLengthsS.p.A.|BCorp – ResponsibleBeauty
Description:
Great Lengths S.p.A Società Benefit, founded in Rome in 1992, is the world leader in the production of natural extensions Made in Italy.
Every Great Lengths' product is enclosed with the experience of Italian craftsmanship and the application of increasingly cutting-edge technology.
In 2022 Great Lengths joined the B Corp network to support ethical business, placing the individual, the community and the environment at the centre of its activities.

Name: Artisan Professionnel
Description: Renowed as Indonesia's best faux lashes maker. Worn by Celebrity Make Up Artist from Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippine, UK, and US.

Name: Radiant Life Hub
Description: Your destination for vibrant health and timeless beauty. Radiate confidence and embrace a balanced, beautiful life!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BLESS
Description:
The Story Behind Bless…
Bless started officially in 2017 after almost 10 years of hard work and preparation done behind the curtains to bring today’s products to the sunlight. Being bullied for having naturally curly hair was not an easy journey for our founder who then decided to keep straightening her hair all the time and ended up with dandruff and greasy hair, and that’s when she decided to solve her hair problems using her pharmaceutical education background in creating natural products at home.

Being natural is what your hair needs and straightening your curly hair all the time will eventually weaken it, and this is one of the reasons Bless came to life; to let you stay natural and feel strong in your own skin, use natural products to take care of your hair and skin, and shine like a diamond.

From being a home-created cream distributed among friends and family members, Bless became an official Egyptian brand with one product only before creating and introducing a diverse line of products that suit all types of hair and skin.

What We Aim for…
We want to provide men and women all around the world with the natural-made products of our Egyptian brand so they can take care of their hair and skin in a healthy way; we want Bless to be known everywhere.

What We Are Trying to Do…
We want you all to get our products! Yes, we work hard to make our natural, healthy products available and affordable for everyone; we want to help you take good care of your hair and skin and always look naturally beautiful.

Name: Suave Brands Company
Description:
At Suave Brands Company, our mission is to elevate the standard of beauty and personal care in North America. Together with Yellow Wood Partners, we are committed to making superior products accessible to all consumers. 

Suave's legacy, dating back to the 1930s, is to democratize salon-quality care. Our comprehensive range of hair and body care products, serving women, men, and kids, embody this mission.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BIO EXTRATUS COSMÉTIC NATURAL
Description: Bio Extratus is an environmental services company based out of Brazil.

Name: Momcozy
Description: As the Cozy Reformer, we always put moms first, delivering innovative solutions, comfort, and support to moms and their families worldwide.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BEAUTYISTANBUL Exhibition
Description:
Featuring 1295 exhibitors from 66 countries in 10 halls, BEAUTYISTANBUL is among the Top 5 largest cosmetics exhibitions worldwide and it is the most international cosmetics event with trade visitors from 167 countries.

BEAUTYISTANBUL 2026, the 7th International Exhibition for Cosmetics, Beauty, Hair, Cleaning, Private Label, Packaging and Ingredients will be held on 7-9 May 2026 at TUYAP Fair Center in Istanbul, Türkiye.

Name: Herrco Cosmetics
Description:
Herrco Cosmetics: Innovating Beauty and Personal Care

 Who We Are: 
Founded on a passion for innovation and quality, Herrco Cosmetics is a dynamic Full Service Beauty & Personal Care Manufacturer based in the UK. We blend art and science to create exceptional products that cater to an ever-evolving market.

 What We Offer:
New Product Development - Transform your ideas into market-ready products with our expert formulation team. We guide you every step of the way, from initial concept to final product, ensuring your vision comes to life with precision and flair.

 Fast Beauty Solutions - 
Launch in just 6 months with our ready-to-go formulas. Perfect for brands looking to make an immediate impact. 

 Who We Serve: 
From luxury and masstige to spa and health brands, our extensive experience spans across the industry. We're proud to support many startup and indie brands, helping them achieve significant growth and market presence.

 Why Choose Us?
Zero Development Fees: Dive into product development without the upfront costs. A true partnership from the start!

Award-Winning Formulations: Benefit from formulations that have garnered industry accolades. 

Scalability: Start small with MOQs at 3,000 units per SKU, with robust production infrastructure ready to scale up as your demand grows. 

Sustainability and Quality: Certified with ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001, ISO 22716. Proudly rated Ecovadis Gold, placing us among the top 3% of eco-conscious companies. 

 Our Commitment: 
At Herrco Cosmetics, we are committed to delivering excellence in every product. Our team continually pushes the boundaries of beauty and personal care to create products that are not only effective but also environmentally responsible.

 Connect With Us: We love to explore new opportunities and collaborations. Reach out to see how we can elevate your brand together!

Name: Industria Cosmética
Description:
INDUSTRIA COSMÉTICA is the technical magazine for suppliers to the cosmetics, dermo-cosmetics, perfumery, selfcare and beauty manufacturing industry.

In addition, it is also the disseminating body of Beauty Cluster Barcelona and the AEIC (for its acronym in Spanish, Spanish Association of Cosmetic Ingredients), two of the main associations of the sector in Spain.

Name: Tara
Description:
Combining Ancient Wisdom with Modern Science.

Inspired by nature, we set out to find time-tested ingredients known to address concerns – separating fact from myth to create formulas that do what they’re meant to do. Only the most effective ingredients find their way into our products.
 
We’ve been investing in research, building our laboratory from the ground up, to create (and test time and time again) our skin and hair solutions. By boosting natural ingredients and traditional methods with modern science, we make sure our formulas are backed by scientific evidence. 

From the first raw ingredient to the very last molecule, our formulas are all good. Safe beauty that is proven to work and simple to use.

Name: MESAUDA Beauty
Description:
Mesauda Beauty è un’azienda giovane e dinamica che ha come obiettivo primario quello di distinguersi per la professionalità e la capacità di fornire al cliente sempre e solo il meglio della ricerca e dell’innovazione nel campo dell’industria cosmetica ad un prezzo assolutamente competitivo. Un lavoro portato avanti quotidianamente con passione e dedizione, volto alla ricerca di una linea in grado di unire classe, eleganza e semplicità.

Per questo, Mesauda Milano ha fatto del processo produttivo la sua prerogativa principale. A tal fine l’azienda si rivolge, per ogni singolo prodotto, al laboratorio maggiormente specializzato mantenendo, quasi esclusivamente, la linea produttiva in Italia. Tutto ciò al solo scopo di garantire al consumatore finale un prodotto di un alto livello qualitativo, abbinato ad una scelta di formule e colori di tendenza ed un packaging unico e riconoscibile.

La filosofia di Mesauda risiede nel principio secondo il quale la bellezza rappresenta un diritto che deve saper combinare l’arte dell’estetica con la tutela della salute e il rispetto della diversità che contraddistingue i tratti, unici, di ognuno di noi.

Name: Ethique Beauty
Description:
No compromise beauty.

Crafted with sustainability at our core, every plastic-free Ethique bar reflects our commitment to ethical sourcing and sustainable practices. All while delivering stellar results. 

Our uniquely made, powerhouse formulas are backed by clinically proven results, rigorous testing, and over 50,000 five-star reviews.

Name: Lattafa Perfumes Industries
Description: LATTAFA, a premium company sense of style, essence and imminence, is the finest brand from Lattafa perfumes. LATTAFA defines lifestyle and caters through its best in class perfumes which not only pampers, but helps men and women cherish their life every day. Through a relentless peruse to satisfy many air taste and fashion, we offer unforgettable creations through elegant perfumes for all…

Name: Arabela
Description:
Arabela se define como una empresa vanguardista de Venta Directa que reúne a un gran grupo de mujeres emprendedoras, entusiastas y exitosas, donde cada una de ellas aprovecha las magníficas oportunidades que nuestra compañía les ofrece, traduciéndolas en grandes satisfacciones personales. 

El crecimiento de la compañía en México, ha permitido consolidar la expansión a Centroamérica, que inicio desde 2008, donde hemos logrado posicionar nuestros productos en la confianza de la gente de Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua y Costa Rica. En 2022 logramos iniciar operaciones en Panamá

Cada año, Arabela se enfoca en ofrecer productos innovadores que permitan satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes, lanzando al mercado más de 850 conceptos vanguardista bajo marcas consolidadas como Amourett, Natural Skin y Natural Pro Beauty.

Actualmente nuestro portafolio incluye 3,500 productos, bajo 12 categorías: Maquillaje, Perfumería, Arabela en Casa, Piel, Baño, Cabello, Lencería, Joyería, Salud, Estética, Niños y Juvenil.

Arabela es naturalmente... tu mejor compañía

Name: VIOKOX
Description:
We are a leading manufacturer of high value-added ‘niche’ cosmetic products at international level and are driven by our passion for improvement. All our production is centralised in a single plant in Spain, covering 14,000 m2 with a large production capacity and equipped with the most cutting-edge technology in the cosmetics industry, allowing us complete control of the process and to be able to offer our customers the highest standards of safety and quality. We are a strategic ally for our customers because we understand their specific needs and we create innovative, differential and top-quality cosmetics that make our products the best choice. Today we specialise in the skin care, hair removal, intimate hygiene and footcare categories. More than 30 years’ experience working with leading brands and retailers across the globe. The fruit of this is our presence in more than 50 countries, where we offer solutions adapted to our customers and consumers. VIOKOX is one big family that enjoys what they do each day, always working with maximum focus, speed, flexibility and efficiency. We are passionate and committed: we put our heart and soul into everything we do, striving to give the best of ourselves and to improve day by day. We act with honesty, integrity, transparency and the utmost respect for people, society and the environment. 

Find out more about us on our website: 

www.viokox.com

Name: The Rodial Group
Description:
The Rodial Group was founded by London-based entrepreneur, speaker and best-selling author Maria Hatzistefanis in 1999. She has been creating bestselling skincare for over 25 years for skincare sister brands Rodial and Nip+Fab.

Rodial, with its hi-tech, innovative and iconic skincare and complexion products, is loved and used by customers and high-profile names around the world, while Nip+Fab’s mission is simple: to provide customers with luxury, science-based skincare formulations at high-street prices and empower them with ingredient knowledge.

We are a female-led and founded independent group and live by our values. We champion each other and encourage ourselves and our customers to aim high through our products, events, engagements, publications and high-profile partnerships.

Today, both Rodial and Nip + Fab products are available worldwide in 30+ countries, in both  prestigious luxury department stores and multiple high-street retailers and pharmacies. 

www.rodial.com
www.nipandfab.com

Listen to Maria’s podcast, Overnight Success, on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/4cuKuLj8R5wnb4gml4F3C3?si=673b4ef85af04de4

Name: Kobo Products, Inc.
Description:
Kobo Products, The Powder & Dispersion Specialist : 

Since 1987 Kobo has provided innovative, technology-based raw materials to the cosmetic industry. The product range includes Surface Treated Pigments, Microspheres, Suncare and Color Dispersions, Silicone Fluids, Specialties, Natural Ingredients, Effect Pigments, Boron Nitride and Delivery Systems. Kobo has six locations, USA (Corporate Headquarters), Brazil, UK, France, Asia Pacific and Japan (Kobo Dispatek), and is represented globally by independent agents.

Name: Svish
Description:
Svish is an Innovative Personal Care Brand for millennials and Genz. It identifies untapped niche categories, Innovates, and creates Unique Products. 
#SvishKaroAageBadho

Name: laboratoires NIHEL
Description:
La société " Laboratoires NIHEL" est l'une des sociétés tunisiennes les plus importantes dans le domaine cosmétique qui développe une ligne de produits pour la SANTE et la BEAUTE du corps.
 Fondée en 1982, la société des Laboratoires NIHEL n’a pas cessé de consolider son expérience et son professionnalisme dans le domaine cosmétique.
 Aujourd’hui, après plus de 30 ans d’expérience et d’innovation, la marque NIHEL entame une nouvelle phase de croissance profitant de son excellente image et de son capital confiance.
  La production des Laboratoires NIHEL, toujours renouvelée, doit son succès à l’incessant travail de recherche et à une collaboration suivie avec les plus grands laboratoires européens.
 
  Soucieux d’améliorer en permanence les conditions de travail et les méthodes de fabrication et de contrôle, les « Laboratoires NIHEL » ont adhéré au Système de Mise à Niveau et ont consenti de lourds investissements, en formation, en bâtiments et en matériels sophistiqués.
 

  C’est ainsi que la société a obtenu en 1998 la certification ISO 9002 VERSION 1994, doublement attribuée à la fois par l’INNORPI et par l’organisme allemand TÜV.
En Octobre 2008, elle a obtenu la certification ISO 9001 VERSION 2000 attribuée par l’organisme DQS. Elle a été également parmi les premières à mettre en place, en juillet 2008, la nouvelle norme des Bonnes Pratiques de Fabrication (BPF).

Avec ces certifications et ces distinctions, se trouve renforcée la confiance de nos clients et partenaires dans la qualité de nos produits et dans nos procédés de fabrication. Pour notre entreprise, en effet, rien ne compte plus que la satisfaction de ses clients et de ses partenaires
 
Au niveau marketing, les « Laboratoires NIHEL » prévoient de développer leur stratégie sur le marché national et international en mettant l’accent sur la collaboration active de ses partenaires et sur sa capacité d’écoute et de réactivité aux besoins de ses clients.

Name: Dermalogica Canada
Description:
Whoever said beauty is only skin deep had the right idea, as far as Dermalogica is concerned. Founded by Jane Wurwand in 1986, Dermalogica continues to dominate the professional skin care industry with distribution in over 90 countries. 

From day one at Dermalogica, you’ll find a common purpose linking every employee: bringing respect and success to the professional skin therapist through top-quality education, innovative products and outstanding customer service. We focus on skin health and products that truly deliver, not false "beauty" claims or miracle cures.

Our industry is full of women entrepreneurs who choose only Dermalogica products to use professionally and sell in their business. They’re all trusting and partnering with you to help them reach the highest level of success in this industry.

Dermalogica is the leader of an industry that affords more women the opportunity to own their own businesses than any other, and we’ve seen first-hand the positive impact that women entrepreneurs have on their local economies, communities and families. In celebration of this, our FITE (Financial Independence Through Entrepreneurship) program invests in future women entrepreneurs through business up-skilling, microfinance and thought leadership around the world.

Name: RYSE
Description:
At RYSE, we’re not just keeping up with the industry, we’re creating new categories within it. From protein infused energy to innovative licensed flavor partnerships, every product is built with transparency, premium formulas, and a relentless focus on performance.

Our growth has been fueled by groundbreaking collaborations, disruptive marketing, and a community of athletes and everyday achievers who trust us to deliver more than just supplements, we deliver results.

Our mission is simple: to fuel your greatness. Whether you’re chasing peak performance, building consistency, or striving to become your best self, RYSE is here to power your journey.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Afnan Perfumes
Description:
Experiential perfumery since 2007
Made locally, loved internationally #craftedbyafnan

Name: TePe Oral Hygiene Products
Description:
"To bring healthy smiles for life by inspiring good oral health"

TePe is a privately held Swedish company founded by the Eklund family in 1965. It is our vision to bring healthy smiles for life by inspiring good oral health. Therefore, we aim to raise awareness of preventive dental care, interdental cleaning and the connection between oral and general health. 

At TePe, we are proud to develop products which promote long-term oral health and thus the quality of life for people worldwide. Our oral care range is appreciated and endorsed by dental professionals for its high quality, clinical application and unique qualities.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Forever Liss
Description:
A Forever Liss tem mais de uma década desenvolvendo produtos que apoiam todas as formas de beleza. Seu reconhecimento se deu principalmente graças ao sucesso de linhas como a Desmaia Cabelo, o Banho de Verniz e o Xô Frizz. 

E foi unindo o objetivo de simplificar os momentos de cuidado, com fórmulas rigorosamente desenvolvidas para garantir transformações desde a primeira aplicação, que entregamos tratamentos capilares com resultado de salão em casa.

Somos apaixonados por buscar cada vez mais inspirações para seguir inovando em um dos segmentos que mais cresce no país. Tudo isso por meio de lançamentos que atendem às diversas necessidades das consumidoras. 

Assim podemos transformar rituais de autocuidado e beleza, em experiências acessíveis, feitas para acompanhar as mulheres e suas rotinas plurais.

Name: Thérapi
Description:
Fundada em 2016, a Thérapi iniciou suas atividades com a produção dos legítimos Florais de Bach, estabelecendo-se rapidamente como a maior indústria desse segmento na América Latina e líder em vendas e distribuição no Brasil.

Com um parque fabril de 6.600 m² em Arroio do Meio – RS, operamos com os mesmos padrões de qualidade exigidos pelo mercado farmacêutico com a tecnologia mais avançada em purificação de água, garantindo a excelência dos nossos produtos.

Ao longo dos anos, expandimos nossa atuação para muito além dos Florais de Bach, oferecendo uma linha completa de produtos voltados para terapias integrativas, bem-estar e qualidade de vida. A expansão de nosso portfólio inclui óleos essenciais, medicamentos homeopáticos, cosméticos e suplementos alimentares, sempre com foco nas Práticas Integrativas e Complementares (PICS) do SUS.

Nosso propósito é claro: proporcionar saúde integrativa para toda a família.

Temos o olhar atento às mudanças no comportamento e hábitos de consumo, sempre em busca de inovação, evoluindo em tecnologias que nos coloquem à frente em saúde integrativa, com soluções que proporcionem bem-estar para o corpo e mente.

Para reforçar nossa presença no país e consolidar um atendimento eficaz, contamos com dois centros de distribuição estrategicamente localizados no Espírito Santo e no Rio Grande do Sul.

Atuamos com uma diversidade de clientes, no canal farma, verde, pet, e-commerce, loja própria e grandes redes, ampliando nossa presença em múltiplos setores e fortalecendo nossa atuação nacional.

Nossa Visão é Ser referência nacional em saúde integrativa, com soluções que proporcionem bem-estar para o corpo e mente.

Nossos Valores são:
- Fazer o certo sempre.
- Respeito e cuidado com as pessoas e o meio ambiente.
- Compromisso com a qualidade e agilidade no que fazemos.
- Inovação e melhoria contínua.
- Paixão em ser Thérapi.

Vem construir uma história de sucesso junto com a gente?
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products
Location: Arroio Do Meio, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: AXIS-Y
Description:
AXIS-Y is the first brand committed to the creation of climate-based skincare. We listen to the needs and concerns of our market in order to deliver skincare they will love. In 2020 alone, we’ve grown to become a beloved brand by the online skincare community. And we don’t have any intention to slow down as we develop even better products and expand globally.

AXIS-Y is also more than a Clean Beauty brand. We are on a mission to provide the most reliable and efficient services and products to cater to the needs of our customers and community and make our lives better and happier. 

At AXIS-Y, we ensure diverse and inclusive workplace where we learn from each other is core to AXIS-Y’s values. We welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives. We are committed to building a team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills for the benefit of our staff, our mission, and the communities we serve.

AXIS-Y has a positive, diverse, and supportive culture—we look for people who are passionate about beauty, fashion and work to be a little better every single day. In our work together we aim to be smart, humble, hardworking and fun, above all, collaborative.

Name: MAKUKU INDONESIA
Description: MAKUKU berkomitmen untuk membangun platform saluran ritel kelas menengah ke atas untuk wanita hamil, bayi, dan anak-anak. Kami memberikan hasil berkualitas tinggi, memberikan layanan dan pengetahuan profesional terkait bayi dari seluruh dunia ke Indonesia. Memberikan solusi ibu dan anak berkualitas tinggi untuk orang tua.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Personal Care Truth
Description:
Personal Care Truth is not about scare tactics, generalizations, fear mongering, or hopping aboard what’s considered trendy at the moment.

Personal Care Truth is about education, facts, questions, research, sharing knowledge, and empowering consumers to make the choice that’s right for their families. We welcome your questions and submissions; let’s combine our resources and share scientific based information on personal care products with the world.

We believe it is more powerful to provide information to educate and empower YOU as opposed to scaring you with information that has not been backed by science.

Name: DMujeres Beauty Market
Description: DMujeres Beauty Market es una cadena de tiendas de belleza con 20 años de experiencia.

Name: USK Under Skin
Description:
A USK Under Skin é uma empresa 100% brasileira criada em 2015, que traz a ciência por trás da beleza. Com foco em inovação, ousadia e dinamismo, desenvolve produtos dermocosméticos de alta performance para toda a rotina de saúde e beleza, medicamentos, cosméticos, nutracêuticos para terapias dermatológicas e uma linha inovadora de procedimentos estéticos para uso médico em consultório. Todos os produtos da empresa são desenvolvidos em parceria com o laboratório italiano Monteresearch, por mais de sete décadas autoridade mundial no tratamento biomolecular do envelhecimento.

Siga @usk no Instagram!

Name: Babaria
Description:
Babaria is a Spanish cosmetics brand owned by Berioska S.L. and is committed to caring for people’s health and beauty, following the highest quality control standards underpinned by the professionalism and enthusiasm of everyone who forms part of the Babaria team. We select effective, high quality and environmentally-friendly active ingredients to produce cosmetic products for the face, body and hair.

Since 1981 we have specialized in personal care affordable and environmentally-responsible with an extensive range of cosmetic products for the face, body and hair.

(R&D&I) Science, cosmetics and nature.

We are committed to the evident synergy between science, cosmetics and nature within a clear framework of sustainability. Our Research & Development department works constantly to move forward in the search for new active ingredients and methods of application, at all times adhering to the principles of nature and sustainability.

AROUND THE WORLD

Babaria’s products enjoy a strong global presence in more than 80 countries around the world.
The company’s expansion in these different worldwide markets is based on a firm independence from external economic interests and the constant reinvestment of profits.

Name: Maneuver Marketing
Description:
MANEUVER is one of Singapore’s fastest growing companies. We build, operate and scale hyper-growth health and wellness e-commerce brands. Our goal is to elevate quality of life with functional supplements. 

We aim to be a dominant force and make a dent in this industry in the coming years by disrupting the traditional ways health and wellness brands are built. We also plan to invest and offer advisory and consulting services in the space in the future to help other brands grow. 

In 2018 we started and bootstrapped a health e-commerce brand from zero and grew it to an annual revenue of over $100 million in just the first 4 years – more than doubling revenue every year. We have continued to grow at a rapid pace.

In 2023, The Straits Times and Statista ranked us as 4th among the Singapore's fastest growing companies and The Financial Times ranked us 12th among the Asia Pacific's High Growth Companies.

Maneuver is featured on Techinasia "Bootstrapped and profitable: Singapore’s 9-figure D2C secret" in July 2023.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Zymo Cosmetics
Description:
Zymo Cosmetics – Your Trusted Partner for Cosmetic Solutions
At Zymo Cosmetics, we go beyond manufacturing—we are brand supporters, helping businesses bring their beauty visions to life. With cutting-edge R&D, private-label partnerships, and custom manufacturing, we create high-quality Skincare, Haircare, Baby Care, and Personal Care products.

 Innovative Formulations – Our R&D experts craft breakthrough formulations that nourish and elevate beauty standards.
 Private Label & Custom Manufacturing – From concept to creation, we empower brands with tailored solutions that align with their unique vision.
 Quality & Integrity – We ensure international standards, ethical sourcing, and rigorous testing for every product.

Partner with Zymo Cosmetics and let’s create beauty solutions that inspire and succeed!

Name: Salon Services Pro
Description:
Salon Services & Supplies is a wholesale distributor of professional beauty salon products, serving the licensed stylist and salon professional in Washington, Oregon, Idaho, Montana, Wyoming, Colorado, New Mexico, Arizona and Utah.

Our goal is to be more than a distribution center or supply house, but to encourage personal mastery and be a valuable resource for salon and spa professionals, by building knowledge, creating opportunities and making a positive difference.

Name: Stanpa - Asociación Nacional de Perfumería y Cosmética
Description:
stanpa es la Asociación Nacional de Perfumería y Cosmética, e integra a las empresas que fabrican y distribuyen perfumes, cosméticos y productos de higiene y cuidado personal en nuestro país.

stanpa es una organización empresarial sin ánimo de lucro. Fue fundada en 1952 y actualmente integra cerca de 250 empresas voluntariamente incorporadas a la misma, representando un volumen de negocio superior al 90% del sector. Pueden ser socios de stanpa aquellas entidades cuya actividad o actividades – sean o no con carácter exclusivo- consistan en la fabricación, investigación, importación, distribución y/o venta de productos de perfumería, cosmética, peluquería, de higiene y cuidado personal y/o de productos cubiertos por la normativa de cosméticos española vigente en cada momento, así como materias primas simples o compuestas vinculadas al contenido de los mismos, esencias y aromas. 

La mayoría de las empresas asociadas son PYMES, empresas familiares, multinacionales, etc., cuyo perfil varía extraordinariamente tanto por su actividad, como por su estructura.

Name: FusionPKG
Description:
FusionPKG is a total solutions provider to the beauty industry. We offer a complete range of skincare and color cosmetics packaging, integrated turnkey solutions, and fully custom product and packaging capabilities. 

Through decades of experience redefining the standards for perfection in the industry, we are uniquely positioned to help beauty brands stay ahead of the curve in an increasingly fast-evolving industry. We combine design and engineering expertise, consumer trend insight, and an insider understanding of the relationship between product and package for solutions that innovate at all stages of beauty product development. 

Our attention to detail and commitment to excellence have made us an indispensable partner to leading beauty brands such as Estée Lauder, Mary Kay, Rodan + Fields, Murad, Tarte, Too Faced, and Urban Decay. 

Whether designing a custom package with unique functionality, integrating cutting-edge formulations with packaging for a faster speed-to-market, or bringing an entirely new type of product to market, we exceed the standards every time for award-winning beauty products that outshine and outperform.

Name: mGanik Group - PT Mganik Grup Mitra Indonesia
Description:
mGanik Group is the home of rapidly growing healthcare brands tailored to the Indonesian market, currently with our three brand units which are mGanik Nutritions, GOLO and mGanik Care. Established in 2020, with our first brand mGanik Nutritions, we have been on a journey of growth and expansion ever since.

mGanik Nutrition is the leading market in diabetes supplement, we focus on metabolic health with natural ingredient-based supplement products.

In 2022, we introduced GOLO, pushing boundaries by making significant strides in the male vitality health market with unique brand communication.

Building our success, we launched mGanik Care in 2023, the first diabetes and metabolic health center in Indonesia; further solidifying our commitment to comprehensive healthcare provision.

Our timeline is a testament to our determination to create innovative solutions and improve the health and life quality of Indonesian society.

At mGanik Group, our mission is to make a real impact in improving the health and life quality of the people in Indonesia. We aim to achieve this by developing innovative products and services that cater to their every need. With our strength in digital presence, along with transparency in marketing and education, we aspire to be the market leader in metabolic health.

By empowering individuals and enabling them to attain their optimal health, we are committed to transforming lives and contributing to a healthier Indonesia.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Arata
Description:
Each strand holds a tale; every curl and wave whispers a memory. We make these stories beautiful. As specialists in beauty and care for Indian hair, we work with dermatologists and skincare experts to craft scientifically advanced and sustainable products. Our commitment to excellence has been recognized on Shark Tank India Season 3, where our products earned the spotlight and won Sharks’ hearts. 

Embark on a journey to #BeautifulHairWithArata

Name: NEOVA SmartSkincare
Description:
We are a research and scientific-discovery brand dedicated to all conditions caused by photodamage and photoaging.

Our repairing solutions deliver care so complete that they have revolutionized the standard for the defense, protection, and alleviation of the visible evidence of photoaged skin. With attention focused on the preservation of healthy skin cells, NEOVA DNA repair enzymes, Copper Peptide Complexes, intense 
antioxidants and DNA repairing sunscreens eliminate inevitable damage before it becomes permanent.

Dedicated to breakthrough results and performance-centric findings, our clinical studies have been conducted with leading international universities and scientific institutions. We do no animal testing but are dermatologist and ophthalmologist tested.

We’re called smart for a reason. And the United States Patent Office agrees. For the first time, a brand “demonstrated it could treat, prevent and repair photodamaged skin”. And for that hard work and its novel applications, NEOVA SmartSkincare with DNA CoFactor and DNA Damage Control Sunscreens were 
awarded patent protection for its formulas in 2016.

Patented formulas. DNA repair and Copper Peptides as needed, when needed. Double the impact. It’s how NEOVA deals with the skin’s past so completely that it can change its future. 

No wonder it’s called breakthrough

Name: EUGENE PERMA PROFESSIONNEL
Description:
Eugène Perma Professionnel est un acteur majeur du secteur des cosmétiques avec plus de 100 ans d'excellence en soins capillaires et coloration à destination des professionnels de la coiffure.
Eugène Perma Professionnel est la filiale française du groupe de cosmétiques international ALFAPARF Milano, groupe présent dans 120 pays à travers le monde. C'est la première entreprise italienne de cosmétiques du secteur professionnel mondial avec plus de 40 années d'expertise et plus de 2800 collaborateurs.

Name: SJS International
Description: Established in 1988, SJS International is a leading retailer, importer, wholesaler, distributor, and manufacturer in the cosmetics and beauty industry, widely recognized for its exceptional product and brand range. With a strong foothold in Pakistan and UAE markets, we also have our own four distinguished brands: Rivaj, RIOS Retail, Amrij, and Belleza.

Name: TRADEOMATIC
Description:
Tradeomatic Limited, a Hong Kong–based company, is a global personal hygiene manufacturer specializing in OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) and ODM solutions. The company delivers customized manufacturing services across baby care, adult care, and pet care categories.

Catering to the mid-to-premium segments of the hygiene industry, Tradeomatic offers superior-quality products supported by a strong in-house R&D and marketing team. The company is committed to providing safe, comfortable, and innovative hygiene solutions tailored to the evolving needs of its clients worldwide.

Tradeomatic Limited is a bootstrapped organization, having grown organically through founder capital and reinvested earnings—without reliance on external venture capital or debt—while operating on a lean, self-funded business model.

The company’s extensive product portfolio includes maternity care products, baby diapers and wipes, adult diapers and pads, incontinence underpads, nursing breast pads, disposable underwear, sanitary napkins, tissue papers, wet wipes, underarm sweat pads, cotton swabs, and pet diapers and underpads, among others. Tradeomatic also owns and promotes two premium European in-house brands—TOKIBABY and TOKIHEALTH.

With a strong emphasis on quality control at every stage, from raw material sourcing to finished goods, Tradeomatic ensures consistent product excellence. Its European brands TOKIBABY and TOKIHEALTH have established a robust sales presence across Eastern Europe—including Russia, Norway, Ireland, Armenia, Georgia, Kazakhstan, and Belarus—as well as key global markets such as the United States, New Zealand, Dubai, Saudi Arabia, and India

Name: Maria Nila Stockholm
Description:
Maria Nila is not the usual hair care company. Our 100% vegan and animal-friendly-certified products are developed with love for our animal lovers, our nature and your hair. Animals fill our lives with joy and laughter, and should therefore never be part of a beauty product. 

By providing high quality vegan products, we make it easy for you to take a step towards a sustainable and friendlier world. When choosing Maria Nila, you choose animal-friendly and colour-preserving haircare products manufactured locally in Sweden. Our chemists always develop Maria Nila's products with the highest quality ingredients. The content should be nice to hair, animals and nature.

Maria Nila ABs core business is based within distribution, education and private label. 

www.marianila.com

Name: GK Hair
Description:
GKhair is an international product developer and manufacturer of hair care products. It is a brand with a promise. A promise of outstanding satisfaction; delivering beauty and confidence. Superior innovative products backed by industry experts, a trusted education, sales and customer service team.

GKhair began with our vision and our values. From the start we've been the leader in “the science of hair”. The concept is very simple; develop and deliver new and creative ideas to a global marketplace. GKhair invests heavily in research and development to advance the science of creating beautiful hair. GKhair is the first and only company to harness the beauty benefits of Juvexin; a protein blend optimized for restoring hair from the inside out, returning it to a more youthful state while protecting against future damage and environmental affects by creating a shield over each strand.

GKhair is a part of VTB (Ván Tibolli, Corp) company. To find out more about the company and products, visit us on www.gkhair.com.

Connect With Us: 
Facebook.com/GKhair
Youtube.com/GKhair
Instagram.com/GKhair 
Twitter.com/GKhair

Name: BHUMI
Description:
Since 2017, PT Riza Kreasi Naturalindo created a beautiful story named BHUMI.  Build with passion to open a new page of natural skincare, committed to discover timeless beauty that comes from the authenticity of nature.
BHUMI believes that it is possible to achieve a beautiful and healthier lifestyle simply by adding the goodness of nature to our daily commitment. This concept inspired BHUMI to embrace the benefits of the highest quality natural ingredient that are gracefully found in the land around us. From the beauty of earth, BHUMI rejuvenate the fascinating essential oil as the heart of the company.   
 
BHUMI’S VISION
 
BHUMI aims to become Indonesian visionary natural skincare company.  Highlighting on a luxurious range of skincare products that inspires a healthy beautiful lifestyle. As a form of dedication and highly esteemed appreciation to Indonesia’s natural beauty, BHUMI strives to achieve a noble cause and introduces BHUMI as Indonesian global brand.
 
BHUMI’S MISSION
-     Providing luxurious natural skincare with a fair price, because everyone deserves to indulge themselves with a high quality skincare.
-     To inspire people of the importance of healthy lifestyle and to start using natural product with minimal chemical ingredients.
-     Introducing BHUMI as an Indonesian genuine beauty product that inspires the world.
-     BHUMI as a benchmark of natural skincare product in Indonesia.

Name: Society Of Cosmetic Scientists
Description:
The Society of Cosmetic Scientists (SCS) is based in Luton and currently has 1000+ members, all highly qualified individuals with both academic and industrial experience in the field of cosmetics and its related sciences. The Society aims to support science education in schools, as well as research and collaboration that advance the science of cosmetics. It does this through activities that include publications, educational programmes and scientific meetings.

The Society of Cosmetic Scientists is affiliated to the International Federation of Societies of Cosmetic Chemists (IFSCC) 

As a not-for-profit organisation the SCS is governed by the SCS Council, the decision-making Board, which is made up of 9 ordinary members and 5 Officers of the Society, all of whom are elected by Full Members of the Society.

Name: Alpol Cosmetique
Description:
For almost 70 years now, ALPOL Cosmétique has prided itself on maintaining close working relationships with its clients, always keen to forge genuine partnerships. As experts in cosmetology, our teams see Innovation as their watchword. We support each of our clients, from the creation of the initial product concept through to the marketing stage. Our marketing, sales, R&D production, packing & packaging, logistics, regulatory, quality and administrative teams interact constantly with our clients to ensure that we serve your interests as effectively as possible at every stage.

Our scientific and sales teams work closely together to bring you the best products combining the latest market trends, innovative textures and effective product performance characteristics.

Closely tracking changing trends in the cosmetics sector and particularly new products and innovations where active ingredients and textures are concerned, we have close and solid relationships with our suppliers and other key contacts with the aim of meeting and surpassing your requirements.

As partners to numerous French and international cosmetic groups, ALPOL Cosmétique possesses comprehensive experience in the global cosmetics market. Operating for many years now in each of the distribution channels, we have shown ourselves able to adapt and to tailor our proposals to your needs and to the markets concerned.

We provide you with precise and accurate information to assist with your product launches.

True to our values and highly conscientious in all of our development work, we pride ourselves on providing our clients with total product traceability. Our ISO22716, ISO 13485 and ISO 9001 certifications are further guarantees of quality for our clients. Committed to continuous improvement, we are constantly improving our working methods and activities, correcting and modifying these whenever needed to be better able to meet your needs and requirements and to guarantee your total satisfaction.

Name: Beauty Cluster
Description:
Beauty Cluster es el clúster español de cosmética, perfumería y cuidado personal. Es una asociación privada, integrada por más de 240 empresas de la cadena de valor de la industria de la cosmética, perfumería y cuidado personal. Es uno de los principales interconectores nacionales e internacionales de la industria. Trabaja para convertirse en el mayor ecosistema del mundo de colaboración, desarrollo de negocio e innovación en cosmética, perfumería y cuidado personal. Es el principal clúster de referencia para la industria de todos los países de habla hispana.
Impulsa la colaboración en la industria de la belleza y acelerar sus procesos de cambio y crecimiento. Ayuda a las empresas a ser más sostenibles, a innovar, internacionalizarse, formarse y transformarse digitalmente. Es una herramienta fundamental de ayuda a las empresas con las diferentes problemáticas de su negocio, incluido el cambio estratégico y el apoyo a los emprendedores.
Beauty Cluster opera desde el dinamismo, la generosidad, la integridad y la transparencia.

Name: Labo Suisse International
Description:
We are the Italian subsidiary of the Swiss company Labo Cosprophar AG, leader in the pharmacies market with premium product lines such as Crescina for hair care (in particular androgenetic alopecia) and the newest Fillerina for face skincare. Labo is now present in more than 45 Countries mainly European, Latin America, Middle East, some of North Africa and Far East. In each country we have an exclusive distributor that has the responsibility of the sales results while the promotional marketing and advertising responsibility is taken by Labo itself through a proven and successful experience in newspapers advertising.

Since 1998 Crescina Re-Growth, which is the core business of Labo, has been the most important treatment in vials to help natural hair growth on thinned scalps, with a higher efficacy in comparison to standard anti-hair loss products: for such reasons, the brand has become a worldwide leader in the segment of specific hair care products.

The latest Fillerina, is the first generation of filling and plumping treatments: it works in such a way as to be presented as a cosmetic filling treatment for at-home use. Fillerina has already created a success story to be compared with the Crescina one.

Labo International is looking for partners having strong and well established structure, with experience and introduction in the pharmacy channel. We have already studied a business plan in terms of value and points of sale for each country as well as a plan of press advertising for the launch of the product in the territory.

Name: DECLEOR and CARITA
Description:
For more than 40 years, DECLÉOR continues to lead with its visionary approach to beauty, as the trusted expert and innovator in aromatherapy skincare.

Combining nature’s purest and most potent active ingredients, DECLÉOR scientifically selects and masterfully blends premium essential oils to deliver for each skin need, targeted and proven skincare solutions. Understanding that beauty and well-being are intrinsically linked, DECLÉOR offers a unique sensorial experience that visibly enhances the skin’s natural health and radiance.

Trusted by the world’s best beauty professionals, DECLÉOR offers specialist products and exclusive massage techniques and treatments to deliver the ultimate in skincare results and professional care.

Name: DKT South America
Description:
A DKT South America atua de forma efetiva para conscientizar a população sobre a importância do uso de métodos contraceptivos, com foco no Planejamento Familiar e a Prevenção de IST’s HIV/AIDS. Ao longo da sua atuação no Brasil e na América do Sul, a empresa é a marca líder no Planejamento Familiar e acredita que todos os casais têm a liberdade de escolher a quantidade de filhos, e quando é o melhor momento para construir uma família. 

Esse trabalho só se torna possível devido a retroalimentação das DKTs. Ou seja toda vez que um produto DKT é comprado ou adquirido contribuímos com o apoio a ONGs e projetos sociais que tem como objetivo levar o Planejamento Familiar e o Marketing Social a regiões mais vulneráveis e distantes. 

No portfólio, temos a mais completa linha de métodos contraceptivos do mercado, representados pelas marcas: Prudence, Sutra, Andalan e AMIU.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Le Mini Macaron
Description:
Le Mini Macaron is an independent beauty brand that launched in 2015. Originally famous for our mini gel manicure kit, the LMM brand today encompasses an assortment of creative nail, hand, and foot products that bring color and care to beauty lovers worldwide. We are a young, dynamic, and international company with team members from all over the world. Le Mini Macaron is sold globally in retailers like Sephora, ULTA, Target, ASOS, Zalando, Douglas, Primor and more. Our brand has been featured in such leading media as Elle, Marie Claire, Cosmopolitan, Glamour, Teen Vogue, Allure, and many others. 

With a head office located in Barcelona, our team operates across Europe, the US, and China. 

www.leminimacaron.com
www.leminimacaron.eu
IG @leminimacaron

Name: Laces and Hair
Description:
O Laces é um ecossistema de beleza natural. O grupo tem como missão levar saúde e beleza natural as pessoas em um momento de conexão e integração entre corpo, mente e alma. 

O Laces and Hair, hair spa comandado pela cosmetóloga Cris Dios, é pioneiro em tratamentos saudáveis para cabelos, desde 1987. Atualmente, com 7 unidades, o Hair Spa é focado em tratamentos naturais e procedimentos low chemical. Foi o primeiro salão no Brasil a oferecer opções mais sustentáveis como colorações naturais e opções low checmical, que agridem menos a saúde capilar, com preocupação e olhar apurado sobre o meio ambiente. São 5 unidades em SP, 01 em BH e 01 no RJ, todas com o mesmo DNA e entrega, que promovem experiências como meditação guiada, massagem de ombro e couro cabeludo, reflexologia nos pés, massagem facial. Um verdadeiro refúgio em meio a metrópole. Suas unidades são construídas pensando na eficiência energética de cada uma. Madeira de reflorestamento, plantas em jardins suspensos para reduzir a temperatura interna, Estação de Tratamento de Água, Tubo-Luz, PLacas Solares, são apenas alguns dos seus elementos.
O Laces também se utiliza da logística reversa (conjunto de ações, procedimentos e meios destinados a viabilizar a coleta e a restituição dos resíduos sólidos ao setor empresarial para reaproveitamento ou outra destinação final ambientalmente adequada), da compensação de carbono (carbon free) através da parceria firmada há 6 anos com a empresa Carbon Limited, equilibrando e compensando as emissões de gases de efeito estufa, com intuito de reduzir os tóxicos gerados no planeta, e do tratamento de esgoto para minimizar possíveis danos ao meio ambiente. 
Suas linhas são produzidas com plástico reciclado e reciclável, o que não estimula mais o consumo de plástico no mundo, além de ter um polímero que ajuda o mesmo a se decompor, caso não seja descartado da forma correta. Produzido em uma fábrica própria, em Curitiba, a primeira a receber certificação orgânica no Brasil.

Name: Movit Products Limited
Description:
Movit Products Limited is a cosmetics manufacturing company

Mission Statement:- Enhancing everyday living

Vision Statement:- The preferred choice of beauty, comfort & care products in every household

Name: MATIERE PREMIERE
Description:
MATIERE PREMIERE’s fragrances are built around one natural ingredient used in high dosage. We allow its texture to be perceived and uplift its most beautiful facets.


The emphasis is on excellence in perfume quality. We select the best raw materials worldwide, giving priority to organic and fair-trade productions. We grow our own roses and tuberoses in organic farming in the Grasse region. Our fragrances come in their natural color. We let them age until the final stages of bottling, to refine their character.

The promise is an unforgettable sillage, an emotional imprint that will never fade.

All our fragrances are created by Aurélien Guichard, co-Founder and Creative Perfumer at MATIERE PREMIERE.

Name: NEST NEW YORK
Description:
About NEST NEW YORK:
NEST NEW YORK is a fast-growing, leading fragrance lifestyle brand offering a full range of innovative and award-winning home, fine, personal care and fragrance technology products. Launched in 2008 by fragrance authority Laura Slatkin, NEST products have captured the hearts and households of so many people. The brand is known for its outstanding product quality, extraordinary fragrances and timeless, classic design.  The brand’s products are currently sold primarily in North America through leading specialty stores, luxury department stores, boutiques, Pureplay DTC accounts and the brand’s online hub NESTNEWYORK.com. The brand has recently expanded into the UK and the Middle East and will rollout global more extensively over the next several years. 

NEST NEW YORK is currently the #1 Prestige Home Fragrance brand in the US and is a top 10 Fine Fragrance brand at Sephora NA.

Name: MAISON 21G
Description:
MAISON 21G is on a mission to make the world of Personalised Perfumery accessible to all, with haute couture and sustainable ingredients.
We are the first collaborative perfumery house for the luxury-lifestyle generation, who wants to stand out from the everyday common scents.

Name: Niine Private Limited
Description:
With the launch of Niine Sanitary Napkins in May 2018, we embarked on a journey to serve and contribute towards improving female hygiene & sanitation conditions across India and to significantly grow the overall market.

with ongoing development, the use of sanitary napkins remains low, and India
continues to move toward becoming the world capital of poor feminine hygiene.
We began with a commitment to change this, with the launch of our sanitary
napkin brand, Niine, in May 2018. We embarked on a journey not only to make
sanitary napkins affordable and widely available across India but also to educate
both men and women about periods, encouraging India to accept menstruation
as a normal part of healthy living with #LetsTalkPeriods.
Following the success of sanitary napkins, we expanded Niine into Hygiene and
Personal Care with the baby care category. Our mission goes beyond just
providing products - we leverage research and technology to enhance
convenience and, ultimately, improve the lives of our consumers.
 
We constantly strive to provide solutions beyond just products, by leveraging research and technology to facilitate convenience and ultimately improve the lives of our consumers.
 
Our mission is to be a game-changer brand by providing superior quality and affordable products and solutions. Our aim is to turn around the health and well-being of our consumers by driving good sanitation practices across the world. 
 
Our vision is to be a game-changing brand bу providing superior-quality, affordable products and solutions. We aim to improve the health and well-being of our consumers by reducing gender inequality, promoting sanitation
practices worldwide, and actively supporting Swachh Bharat Abhiyan and The United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

Name: MAËLYS
Description:
MAЁLYS is a results-driven, body-focused brand redefining the rules of body care. Through a unique blend of product innovation, data, and marketing, we create cutting-edge, hyper-targeted solutions for specific body concerns. Our clinically tested, high-performance formulas deliver visible results, helping women visibly shape, tone, and tighten their way to the body they deserve. We inspire a global community to embrace the belief that looking and feeling their best should never mean making compromises.

To complement the DTC experience, MAËLYS is available in over 2,000 retail stores. Our products can be found at Ulta Beauty across the US & Shoppers Drug Mart in Canada.

Since launching in the US in 2019, MAËLYS has seen sustainable, consistent growth. Backed by strong investors and experienced management, MAËLYS strives to become the largest body care brand in the world, and this is just the beginning.

Life at MAËLYS:
We give all of our employees the power to be the captain of the ship. Our team is built from people who want to make impactful changes, who live, and love, to see results, and who innovate with passion (and a good sense of humor).

Check out our careers website: www.maelyscareers.com

Name: Fable and Mane

Name: LUSH Fresh Handmade Cosmetics Australia and Aotearoa
Description:
Since its establishment 30 years ago, Lush Cosmetics has been driven by innovation and its ethics. 
Creators of pioneering beauty products such as the bath bomb, shower jellies and solid shampoo bars, Lush places emphasis on fresh ingredients like organic fruits and vegetables. 
Lush operates a strict policy against animal testing and supports fair trade and community trade initiatives. Lush leads the cosmetics industry in combating over-packaging by running public awareness campaigns and developing products that can be sold ‘naked’ to the consumer without any packaging. There are 923 Lush shops in 52 countries worldwide. 
In Australia, we employ over 500 people from manufacturing staff, sales staff in store and online who serve our customers to the teams hand-making our products in the Sydney-based factory. In 2015, Lush received the Australian Retailer of the Year award.

Our Core Beliefs:

We believe in making effective products from fresh, organic fruit and vegetables, the finest essential oils and safe synthetics. 

We invent our own products and fragrances. We make them fresh by hand using little or no preservative or packaging, using only vegetarian ingredients, and tell you when they were made. 

We believe in buying ingredients only from companies that do not commission tests on animals and in testing our products on humans. 

We believe in happy people making happy soap, putting our faces on our products and making our mums proud. 

We believe in long candlelit baths, sharing showers, massage, filling the world with perfume and in the right to make mistakes, lose everything and start again. 

We believe our products are good value, that we should make a profit and that the customer is always right.

Description:
ANJAC Health & Beauty is a French family-owned industrial group, partnering beauty and well-being brands and healthcare laboratories. We create and manufacture, from raw materials to finished products. 

ANJAC comprises 16, expert and complementary companies, including 22 production sites and 16 R&D laboratories in France, Canada, California and Spain: Aircos, Apollo, APR Beauty, Chemineau, Cosmetix West, Eurowipes, Feltor, Innovi, LPEV, Pascual, Pillar5 Pharma, Roval, Shadeline, Sicaf and Stephid.

With innovation at the heart of its business model, the Group offers customized services and turnkey products to its customers.

Name: Scandinavian Cosmetics

Name: GFL Cosmetics
Description:
GFL Cosmetics manufacturers high quality cosmetics and customised contract solutions. We produce and distribute our product collections across multiple market channels, hotellerie, retail and private label.

Born in 1995, GFL Cosmetics is headquartered in Lugano Switzerland, with branch offices in Europe, North America and the Middle East and a a distribution network across Asia Pacific and Latin America regions.

Guided by principles of safety and sustainability, GFL Cosmetics innovative formulas are clinically tested to match the highest standards in the cosmetic industry and level of efficacy.

GREEN COMMITMENT 
We think green at every possible stage of product development, production, and supply to maximize consideration for the environment.

HOTEL AMENITIES AND PRIVATE LABELS
With more than 25 years of experience, we know how to design a unique guest journey. GFL has partnered with several global hotel chains as well as individual boutique and lifestyle properties to design, develop and manufacture exclusive collections of amenities and private labels including brand licenses.

CONTRACT MANUFACTURING
Thanks to our experience, vertically integrated production structure and high production capabilities, we are able to offer innovative customised contract solutions. 

RETAIL
Designed to satisfy different clusters needs, from selective perfumery shops to pharmacies and drugstores, our portfolio includes high quality brands such as Prija, Itinera, The Rerum Natura, Osmè Organic, Dadaumpa organic baby care and Anyah.

Name: Bond No. 9
Description:
Finally, Making Scents of New York

Perfumery has always been about head-turning. Now, perfumes have been turned on their head. For the first time in fragrance history, a major, full-blown fragrance collection was launched as an homage to a great city. The name of this fragrance collection is Bond No. 9 (which is also the address of its headquarters boutique at 9 Bond Street, in NoHo). The city it celebrates is none other than — could be no other than — New York.

The Bond No. 9 collection of women's, men's, and unisex eaux de parfum — has a dual mission: To restore artistry to perfumery, and to mark every New York neighborhood with a scent of its own. Each fragrance represents a specific downtown, midtown, or uptown locale or a city-wide sensibility. With new introductions in the coming seasons, Bond No. 9 infuses the island of Manhattan with scents.

Our business and our processes are designed to help you satisfy real consumer needs.

Name: Guardian Vietnam
Description:
Guardian Vietnam  is a member of the DFI Retail Group - a leading Asian retailer which operates multiple formats in 11 markets to satisfy different market segments and trades under well recognized brands.

We committed to bringing customers a wide variety of genuine and high quality products from leading manufacturers in Vietnam and around the world. Our main categories include facial care, cosmetics, skincare, personal care, health care and pharmacy products at selected stores. We are also famous for a wide range of private label products which are loved by millions of consumers in Asia. Our offer is tailor made to help you live a more healthy and beautiful life. In addition, our well-trained and friendly staff and modern store concept will enhance customers shopping experience to the next level.

Our first store in Viet Nam was opened in September 2011 and today, we have more than 120 stores in Ho Chi Minh City, Vung Tau, Bien Hoa, Danang and Ha Noi and via online shopping channels: Web and App of Guardian and other market places such as Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok, Grabmart distributing nationwide. 

We are continuously expanding our network in Vietnam to make it more convenient for customers.
