Name: The Prestige Cosmetics Group
Description:
Founded in 1971, Prestige Cosmetics Group (PCG) has been shaping South Africa’s prestige beauty landscape for over five decades. What began as a pioneering vision to bring global luxury to local shores has evolved into a powerhouse of partnerships — representing some of the world’s most iconic fragrance, beauty, and skincare brands.

As custodians of prestige, we do more than distribute. We build equity, drive awareness, and cultivate meaningful connections between global brands and South African consumers. Our portfolio reflects excellence — from timeless luxury houses to next-generation beauty innovators — all united by our commitment to authenticity, artistry, and growth.

Our people are the heartbeat of PCG. With over 200 passionate professionals and a national network of beauty consultants, we live our vision every day: Passionate People Building Brand Love. We invest in our team through ongoing development, dynamic leadership, and a culture of collaboration, because we believe people are the bridge between great brands and unforgettable experiences.

Our success is built on partnership — with our brands, our retailers, and our consumers. Through integrity, innovation, and purpose, we continue to deliver above-market growth and elevate the standard of prestige beauty in South Africa.

Today, PCG stands as The New Standard of Brand Partnership — where heritage meets innovation, and global beauty finds its South African home.

Name: Lamazuna
Description:
Avant-gardiste par nature !

Lamazuna est une marque de cosmétique zéro déchet, aux formules 100% d'origine naturelle.

Une gamme "écolonomique"

Les produits Lamazuna sont « écolonomiques ». Leur objectif : réduire au maximum les déchets de la salle de bain et permettre de faire de belles économies ! Que ce soit en utilisant l'Oriculi, ce drôle d'instrument qui remplace les cotons-tiges à vie, le shampoing solide pour éviter des flacons en plastique plein la poubelle ou bien la Cup féminine, qui permet de laisser au placard les tampons et serviettes hygiéniques, le quotidien est simplifié tout en réduisant considérablement les déchets de la salle de bain.

Des ingrédients véganes et bio !

Les ingrédients de notre gamme de cosmétiques solides sont 100% d'origine naturelle. Soit ils sont minéraux, soit végétaux, dans ce cas nous les choisissons labellisés bio. Nous avons également pris le parti depuis 2010 de ne proposer que des produits véganes. 
En réfléchissant chaque jour à des produits innovants et sans danger pour la santé et l'environnement, Lamazuna souhaite amorcer un changement dans le monde. 
Et c'est ça finalement être écolo, ce n'est pas être militant, c'est juste revenir au bon sens dans la conception des produits.

Name: Grupo Dana Cosméticos
Description:
A Dana foi fundada em 22 de agosto de 1932, em Barcelona, Espanha, pelo jovem perfumista Javier Serra. Menos de um ano depois, a colônia Tabu, obra prima de Serra, já fazia sucesso em diversos países da Europa.

O nome Dana foi escolhido por ser mitológico, de fácil pronúncia em diversos idiomas, e representa beleza, bem estar e pureza. No Egito, Dana é o adjetivo para jovens de beleza exuberante; no Afeganistão a palavra significa “um bonito despertar”; na mitologia Celta é a Deusa que segundo a lenda, era vista semeando flores na Costa do mar Mediterrâneo.

Com o sucesso da marca Tabu e de outras subsequentes, a empresa expandiu-se pelo mundo, tendo operações nos Estados Unidos, Inglaterra, Espanha, Canadá e Brasil. 

A empresa iniciou suas atividades no Brasil em 1956. Seguindo a trajetória espanhola, as vendas iniciaram-se com a marca Tabu, adquirindo, em seguida, outras marcas líderes em eficiência e resultados, como Herbíssimo, Tênis Sec e licenciado a marca Brut. 

A partir de 2005, com a conclusão do processo de cisão das subsidiárias pelo mundo, a Perfumes Dana do Brasil passou a seguir diretrizes próprias, conservando o contato com as demais filiais com o objetivo de manter a identidade e o padrão de qualidade das marcas internacionais.

Atualmente os produtos estão presentes em mais de 100 mil pontos de venda no Brasil e são vendidas mais de 2 milhões unidades por mês, o que torna a empresa a 5ª maior em volume do Mercado de Desodorantes (Nielsen/2016) e uma das líderes no segmento de cremes desodorantes, posição conquistada ao longo dos seus 60 anos de história.

Em 2017, uma nova história começa a ser construída, sendo o controle da empresa adquirido pela Pétalas, holding de investimentos de Jayme Garfinkel, acionista controlador da Porto Seguro. Agora reestruturada e com marcas consolidadas, inicia-se uma intensa fase de investimentos em produtos inovadores, modernos, e com ótimo custo-benefício aos consumidores.

Name: Eyüp Sabri Tuncer Kozmetik
Description:
1923’ten beri kendine ve sevdiklerine özen gösteren tüketicilerin tercih ettiği, Türkiye’nin köklü ve saygın koku duayeni Eyüp Sabri Tuncer, yaptığı yatırımlarla sürekli yenilediği üretim tesisinde başta kolonya olmak üzere, parfüm, ev bakımı, kişisel bakım ve tekstil-spa ürünlerini kapsayan 650’yi aşkın farklı ürünü kendi çatısındaki Gizli Bahçe, Perfume Jewels ve EST 1923 markaları ile satışa sunmaktadır. EST 1923, Eyüp Sabri Tuncer’in “natural creativity” konsepti çerçevesinde sunduğu bir markadır. Bir dünya markası olma hedefiyle yola çıkan EST 1923, Eyüp Sabri Tuncer’in 1923’den beri edindiği tecrübe, güven ve birikiminden güç alır. Her geçen gün yenilenen ileri üretim teknolojisi ve donanımlı uzman kadrosuyla doğal içerikli ürünler sunan EST 1923, ürünlerinin doğallığı ve sağlığı ön planda tutan geliştirme süreçlerinin yanı sıra üretim ve ambalaj kalitesiyle de öne çıkar. Marka; yurt içi, yurt dışı ve online satışların yanı sıra İstanbul Atatürk, Ankara Esenboğa, Antalya Gazipaşa, Bodrum ve Dalaman gibi Türkiye’nin dışa açılan kapıları olan hava limanlarının Duty Free alanlarında ve seyahatini deniz üzerinden yürütenler için Galataport ve BTA’larda da dünya markaları ile bir arada tüketicilerine ulaşmakta ve alışveriş keyfini yaşatmaktadır. 
Birbirinden özel ürün gamının yanı sıra sorumluluk bilinciyle de topluma ulaşan Eyüp Sabri Tuncer, 2011 yılından bugüne ürünlerinde Braille Alfabesi kullanmaktadır. Türkiye'nin "Vegan Sertifikalı" ilk kozmetik markası olan Eyüp Sabri Tuncer, hiçbir aşamada hayvanlar üzerinde test yapmamakta ayrıca veganların da güvenle kullanabilmesi adına ürünlerinde hayvanlardan elde edilen içerik kullanmamaktadır.

Name: The Ceel
Description:
The Ceel's skincare range is a testament to harnessing the power of nature. Specially designed to nourish and revitalize the skin, the product lineup is enriched with effective botanical extracts and renowned antioxidants known for their rejuvenating properties. The haircare collection offers solutions that nourish and strengthen hair, providing vitality and shine while prioritizing safety.

With its expansion in Turkey, The Ceel aims to stand out not only with product diversity but also with its ethical and sustainable production approach. The company is committed to minimizing environmental impacts at every stage of its products. Particularly, by focusing on educational projects and conservation programs for children, it aims to contribute to the education and welfare of younger generations. Additionally, by respecting and protecting animal rights, it strives to raise social awareness. These responsibilities support the brand's vision of being more than just a cosmetics manufacturer but also a socially and environmentally conscious company

Name: r.e.m. beauty by Ariana Grande
Description:
welcome to a world of vivid dreams and limitless possibilities. 
r.e.m. beauty was created to empower you with the tools you need to bring your most vivid, limitless and creative dreams to life.  our products blend otherworldly ideas with real world innovation to inspire you to explore what creativity means to you.

Name: Lume Deodorant
Description:
Founded in 2017, by Dr. Shannon Klingman, M.D., Lume is a transformative personal care brand on a mission to normalize body odor beyond pits and provide people with outrageously effective solutions so they don’t have to think twice about odor. We are pioneers of the whole body deodorant category, with a portfolio of odor-blocking products including anti-perspirants, aluminum-free deodorants, body washes, body creams, cleansing bars and laundry sprays. Lume products are OB/GYN developed, made with skin-safe ingredients that are gentle enough for the most sensitive parts and often referred to as “life-changing” by our customers. In late 2022, we launched a men’s line called Mando, bringing our expertise to the men’s personal care category. From whole body deodorants to body washes, our product offerings arm men with the confidence to show up as their best selves as they move about their busy day.

Lume and Mando are part of Mammoth Brands, the modern CPG company. Driven by a mission to “Create Things People Like More,” the company’s growing family of brands—Harry’s, Flamingo, Lume, Mando, and Coterie—offers exceptional products that speak to today’s consumer, and as a result have become an essential part of millions of people’s daily routines.

Name: Different Hair Pvt. Ltd
Description: Different Hair Pvt. Ltd (DHPL) is a leading player in the hair industry, offering top-quality products that are widely recognized and appreciated by customers across diverse segments. Our products are trusted and preferred by top hair salons, film and TV productions, opera and theatre stages, as well as hair replacement centers. We are committed to constantly improving and innovating our offerings through the application of advanced business techniques and dedicated R&D efforts. At DHPL, we believe in the power of growth and science and are constantly learning and evolving to stay ahead of the curve.

Name: CARE Natural Beauty
Description:
Somos uma marca brasileira, criada por mulheres e feita para todos. Evoluímos as nossas linhas de skincare e maquiagem usando biotecnologia, sem intoxicar a pele nem poluir o planeta. Não usamos ativos derivados de petróleo, chumbo nem outros metais pesados em nossas formulações para promover uma beleza mais pura, natural e duradoura. 

Nossas embalagens são recicláveis e utilizam o mínimo de plástico para minimizar o impacto ambiental. 

Só é beleza se for limpa e, para isso, a bioperformance é fundamental. Um produto que é limpo de verdade, ou seja, que não usa toxinas e não agride o planeta, tem uma performance que vai além da performance: a bioperformance, que promove a vida e que cuida de você. 

Só é beleza se for limpa. Só é limpa se for CARE.

Name: Vision Healthcare NV
Description:
Our company Culture, Values & People:

Vision Healthcare wants to revolutionize consumer healthcare with innovative solutions. We focus on having close direct relationships with our consumers and enhancing their lives by providing solutions that fit their needs. We expect our people to think outside the box and go the extra mile in order to find innovative solutions for our consumers’ needs. VHC stimulates its employees to learn from each other and to make an impact. Only then will we keep improving and delivering better results. 

Consumer centricity: 
Our people demonstrate a genuine consumer curiosity and co-create mindset, delivering everyday happy consumer experiences. Our agile and entrepreneurial spirit guarantees quick decision making, a crucial prerequisite in a sector that changes as quickly as the ecommerce business. 

Digital game changers: 
Vision Healthcare aims to be a front-runner that reinvents consumer healthcare with digital operating and business models. We look for entrepreneurial, agile people who think outside the box and can keep an eye on the bigger picture of improving consumer self care. We keep processes and structure to a minimum but when we do install them, we ask for rigor and discipline. 

Relentless ambition: dream big!
At Vision Healthcare, we set the bar high. We go the extra mile to make next level consumer self care possible. How do we do that? By learning from our mistakes, which often help us unlock new opportunities, and by never forgetting to celebrate successes and giving credit where credit is due. 

Make it happen: 
Vision Healthcare empowers its employees to make a clear impact. We have a clear no nonsense, common sense culture, keeping things simple and effective. Our message to our people: face the facts but focus on creative and pragmatic solutions.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Rebul Cosmetics
Description:
With its unique quality and 126 years of experience, Rebul Cosmetics is Turkey' s most prominent and prestigious eau de cologne, perfume, deodorant, roll-on, spa products manufacturer which is widely recognized by the global market for its quality products. 

Rebul Pharmacy was founded in 1895, by Jean Cesar Reboul at the last period of Ottoman Empire and this historic pharmacy carries on its existence today at the same place. Its recognition for being Turkey' s first producer of perfumes has effectively contributed to the trust of consumers.

Rebul Cosmetics attracts the attention of the international brands with 126 years of experience and produce private label products for the well-known textile and supermarket chains.

Today, Rebul with its history that has witnessed a century has successfully become a brand that values and claims it' s past and constantly renews itself.

Name: Victoria Beckham Beauty
Description:
Beauty In Motion

Victoria Beckham Beauty is founded on the idea that beauty should complement and empower the dynamic life you lead. 

When Victoria envisioned what she wanted Victoria Beckham Beauty to be, she asked herself - what would the most amazing luxury beauty brand look like in ten years? She concluded that the future of beauty would be super clean, perform at the highest luxury level, welcome everyone who loves beauty, help people fuel their lives inside and out, be sustainable, transparent, digital-first, cruelty-free, and created by women (naturally). This is the vision behind Victoria Beckham Beauty. We are a work in progress and a brand in motion.

Developed through Victoria Beckham’s unique perspective, these are the products she felt were missing from her makeup bag — cleanly formulated, high performance beauty solutions for the modern individual who lives life on-the-move and to the fullest.

Name: ZOEVA GmbH
Description:
Greek-born entrepreneur Zoe Boikou has transformed her personal journey of finding the perfect beauty product into a successful global cosmetics company: ZOEVA. The brand’s name is a fusion of the founder’s first name "Zoe" and "Eva", the German name for Eve, which stands for the first woman, and "Zoe" the Greek word for life.
ZOEVA is a fast growing company. Within a few years, Zoe transformed her eBay business into an international brand. 
ZOEVA is renowned for its brushes and has sold over 30 million of them! ZOEVA has expanded to offer a diverse range of vegan and cruelty-free products, including a comprehensive selection of color cosmetics, brushes, and brush sets!

Headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany, ZOEVA employs over 50 employees in fields ranging from product development, supply chain, brand communication, and sales.

Name: Cinq Mondes
Description:
Cinq Mondes est né il y a 20 ans d’une quête profonde : explorer et s’inspirer des rituels ancestraux des civilisations du monde entier. De s’initier aux secrets des peuples, des médecines traditionnelles et des plantes médicinales des cinq continents.

Fort de ces découvertes, Cinq Mondes propose aujourd’hui : Des soins
ancrés sur des protocoles de massage uniques, élaborés pour offrir un bien-être holistique intense. Chaque soin est conçu pour créer une expérience sensorielle complète, permettant à chacun de s’immerger dans des rituels authentiques et profonds.

Des produits aux actifs puissants, d’origine naturelle, issus des meilleures
plantes médicinales des pharmacopées du monde. Chacun invite au voyage entre tradition et modernité, pour offrir une parenthèse de relaxation exceptionnelle et régénérante.

Cinq Mondes was born 20 years ago with a profound purpose: To explore and draw inspiration from ancestral beauty rituals across global civilisations. To uncover the wisdom of diverse cultures, traditional healing practices, and medicinal plants from five continents.

Today, Cinq Mondes offers: Treatments based on unique massage protocols , thoughtfully crafted to provide a deeply holistic and immersive experience. Each ritual engages the senses, inviting guests to dive into authentic and transformative wellness traditions.

Products featuring powerful, natural active ingredients, sourced from the finest medicinal plants found in the world’s traditional pharmacopoeia. Each formula combines tradition and modernity, offering an exceptional moment of relaxation, rejuvenation, and renewal.

Name: Yon-Ka Paris
Description:
Pioneers in aromatherapy since 1954 and creators of the Yon-Ka brand, Laboratoires Multaler — a French, family-owned company — harness the power of Nature at the heart of expert, sensorial formulas with proven results.

Each Yon-Ka phyto-aromatic treatment offers a unique and personalized experience, promoting physical and emotional harmony at every stage of life.

This vision of holistic beauty is embodied in the Yon-Ka Quintessence — an exclusive synergy of five essential oils* that combines dermatological effectiveness with olfactory and aromachological benefits.
*lavender, geranium, rosemary, cypress, thyme

Today, over 6,000 professionals around the world have chosen to share the Yon-Ka Phyto-Aromatic Treatment Experience with a clientele seeking naturalness, authenticity, and results.

Name: Omorovicza Cosmetics
Description:
Omorovicza is a skincare brand unlike any other. Its story is one of healing, natural ingredients, cutting-edge scientific innovation and rich heritage.

At the turn of the millennium, Stephen de Heinrich de Omorovicza was living in Budapest when he first met US diplomat Margaret, Chief of Staff at the US Embassy in Hungary. Stephen took Margaret to the famous Rácz spa that his family built in the 19th century and she was amazed by the effects of the healing waters on her skin. There began Stephen and Margaret’s quest to harness their curative power. The couple enlisted the skills of a Nobel Prize-winning dermatology lab to incorporate them into a skincare range. With the lab’s expert help, they developed their patented Healing Concentrate to deliver therapeutic minerals to the deepest layers of the skin, resulting in a plumper, younger-looking complexion. The results are nothing short of extraordinary: firmer, suppler and younger-looking skin.

Fast forward to today, we are an award-winning luxury skincare brand with a global presence, spanning 5 continents in over 370 stores and 60 spas. Curiosity is at the heart of our work. We believe in forward momentum; that you should always seek to innovate, challenging norms, established methods, ideas and products. Every day we strive to capture the curative magic of Budapest’s healing waters in skincare and, in so doing, create a world where you can live beautifully!

Name: U BEAUTY
Description:
Award-winning, high-performance luxury skincare backed by science and driven by technology, featuring groundbreaking formulas that streamline your routine and amplify your skin.

U Beauty’s strategic and singular products replace excess with essence and provide real results, without the risk of irritation.

Enter proprietary SIREN Capsule Technology: Every formula features our patent-pending SIREN Capsules, which are engineered to interact with the skin as if they are actual skin molecules. The SIREN free radicals (which materialize as vulnerable, damaged areas) like a magnet, penetrating the Capsule’s membrane and then releasing its age-reversing actives on the free radicals, instead of all over your skin’s surface. By attracting only the compromised cells, healthy cells are preserved. So your skin gets visible repair and nothing but benefit. With continued use, U Beauty SIRENS deliver great skin for the long game.

Sustainability is as important as efficacy: With a zero-waste goal, we’ve been awarded The Butterfly Mark by Positive Luxury for our environmental efforts. Our bottles are made out of recycled plastic and are recyclable, and our formulas are always clean, non-GMO, gluten-free, non-toxic and free of fillers. All our products are manufactured in a CO2-free facility, and we keep the lights on with 100% green energy. We’re adamantly against animal testing and certified by Cruelty Free International. Finally, thanks to our initiative with One Tree Planted, for every unique order placed, we plant one tree.

Tina Craig is the founder of U Beauty and a true pioneer in the digital and beauty spaces. In 2005, she launched BagSnob, one of the first-ever fashion and lifestyle blogs, and helped define the art of content creation and the business of brand partnerships for a global audience of over 1.5 million followers. In 2019, Tina founded the award-winning sustainable luxury skincare line U Beauty.

Name: Groupe NOVI
Description:
Le Groupe NOVI est une aventure familiale à laquelle prennent part les partenaires franchisés, les salariés, les clients et les fournisseurs, dans une même dynamique et sur la base de valeurs fédératrices. 

Philippe et Christophe marchent sur les traces de leur mère, Nicole Georges, et font grandir les huit enseignes du groupe, les 5 marques exclusives et les activités B2B en mobilisant des acteurs et des experts métiers, dans un esprit entrepreneurial partagé. 

Grâce à l'enthousiasme qui irrigue l’ensemble des forces vives du groupe, le Groupe NOVI est devenu n°1 français de la Franchise sur le marché de la beauté et du bien-être, tout en conservant ses attaches familiales.


HISTORIQUE

1995
Ouverture de la première parfumerie Beauty Success à Périgueux.

2000
Philippe Georges devient Président de Beauty Success et inaugure son 100e point de vente.

2004
Inauguration du 1er point de vente à l'international (Maroc).

2005
Création de la plateforme logistique.

2007
Lancement de la marque enseigne Beauty Success.

2012
Création du concept de beauté globale.

2013
Lancement du concept L’Institut Beauty Success.

2016
Rachat d’Esthetic Center par Beauty Success qui devient Beauty Success Group en commercialisant 5 enseignes.
Création de la nouvelle plateforme logistique de groupe à Saint Astier (24).

2017
Création du concept Nicole - Maison Nicole Georges et ouverture du 1er point de vente à Périgueux. 
Une vingtaine de parfumeries Beauty Success à l’international.

2019
Le groupe devient actionnaire majoritaire de la société Beauty One Paris et propose désormais une offre remise en forme et minceur. 
Inauguration des points de vente Beauty Success en Géorgie et en Mongolie. 

2022
Intégration du réseau Citron Vert - instituts de beauté
Le groupe renforce son offre de produits et soins naturels avec l'intégration des marques Pur Eden (soins bio) et Les Senteurs Gourmandes (parfums naturels).  

Le groupe Beauty Success devient le Groupe NOVI.

Description:
Fundada em março de 1995 a, Associação Brasileira da Indústria de Higiene Pessoal, Perfumaria e Cosméticos (ABIHPEC), é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos com finalidade principal de congregar as indústrias nacionais do setor, instaladas em todo país e de todos os portes, promovendo e defendendo seus legítimos interesses, com vistas ao desenvolvimento econômico que representam.

Estruturada para realizar o acompanhamento estatístico do setor, com estudos em geral da indústria de HPPC, a ABIHPEC desenvolve um amplo trabalho de aprimoramento dos negócios, concretizados e divulgados por meio do relacionamento com grandes Institutos de Pesquisa e por publicações e ações que disseminam o panorama setorial, dados de mercado e as principais tendências do setor.

This groundbreaking initiative lets SeneGence reach all corners of the beauty market and share the love of our long-lasting color technology.

As our Distributors spread positivity to lift each other up, our corporate staff members help each other create opportunities for success.

Join our team today and build the career you’ve longed for.

Name: YOPE Sp. z o.o.
Description:
This story started with washing hands. Several times a day, dozens of times a week, hundreds of times a month. Have you ever wondered why your hands are clean after washing and sometimes a few moments later the skin on your hands becomes unpleasantly dry and tight? We have. You can blame poor quality of water (chlorine) or time of the year (cold, wind or heat). But most often this is the liquid sop to blame! How do we know that? Because we use it every day and we have collaborated with cosmetic and chemical companies for many years and we know what such products can contain. Liquid soap should be a simple cosmetic which consists mainly of vegetable washing, preserving and aroma substances. However, these days producers more and more often add artificial colourants, aromas, silicones, preservatives, detergents (e.g. SLS — Sodium Lauryl Sulfate) and foaming substances (e.g. SLES — Sodium Laureth Sulfate). Why? To make the soap look better, more durable, more aromatic as well as to improve its foamin propertie. Is it necessary? On the contrary, it is redundant. Those supplements most often cause dry and irritated hand skin and are source of allergy. 
When we discovered what damages our hands while washing and decided what liquid soaps we would like to use, we started searching for them in chemists. Buy soap — easy-peasy. Actually, not quite. There so many of them indeed.

But good and nice soaps are sparse and more expensive. Pay for a basic washing cosmetic as much as for a face cream? This is ridiculous! We said No and decided to set up a company to prove that it is possible to produce liquid soaps and washing agents which are:

Best quality
Gentle for the skin
Natural
Originally and nicely scented
Packed in specially designed modern packaging

Fragrance World started with the sole mission of providing a premium perfumery experience to every consumer irrespective of their economic and social strata.
Over the years the brand has not only drawn inspiration from the most celebrated heritage brands across the world but has also elevated its craft with new inventions and originality. But one thing that has always been constant throughout this journey is that it has always put quality, performance and accessible pricing at its forefront and has been successful in achieving the same. Result? Enormous customer satisfaction over 20 years across 125 + countries and 6 continents.

Name: Avroy Shlain Cosmetics
Description: Born as a skincare brand in 1973, Avroy Shlain provided the South African market a local range of high-quality products. The guiding principle of the brand's founders, Avroy & Beryl Shlain, was one of positivity and empowerment - uplifting & changing the lives of people. Over time, we have expanded the private label brand's product offering to include cosmetics, body care, hair care, fragrances & fashion - each aimed at enhancing natural beauty & building a positive self-image.

Name: Curaden MEA HUB
Description:
CURADEN is one of the fastest growing oral care companies. We are inspired to “Think further” and provide  “Better health for you” –- through oral care & education.

We are specialized in training dental professionals and manufacturing over 120 innovative products, which are gentle yet very effective and atraumatic. We are available in more than 60 countries. Dental professionals rely on CURADEN for its all-round service. 

Curaprox is developed in partnership with expert researchers, teachers and practitioners. Particularly the brand and its oral care education program iTOP enjoy excellent international reputation. In Czech Republic, Brasil, Germany and Slovakia for example, our CS 5460 ultra soft toothbrush reached cult status. 

Founded in 1954 by Hans Breitschmid and taken over by his son Ueli, the company remains a family-owned Swiss company.
Based near Lucerne, CURADEN AG employs 300+ staff across the world. In the last year it generated sales in excess of CHF 150 million and manufactured over 28 million toothbrushes.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PT Garland Cantik Indonesia (Dear Me Beauty)
Description:
We are the people-powered brand that believes in the everyday Indonesian women, who are passionate in continually bringing a better version of beauty and making it accessible for everyone. As a people driven brand we seek out to understand the needs of consumers with an open mind through developing and formulating products that instill integrity, quality, and one that supports the local Indonesian market. Our founders have always put the people ﬁrst in mind and listens intently from day one Dear Me Beauty began, to always raise the bar and strive in only providing the best for our market. 


Dear Me believes beauty is more than just skin deep, it is conﬁdence and a power to inspire change, one that starts with you and I, the people.

Name: Groupe Marcelle
Description:
Located in Montreal, Quebec, the Canadian company Groupe Marcelle is a leader in the cosmetics industry. With the highest standards of quality and excellence, Groupe Marcelle develops, manufactures, and distributes care and makeup products and accessories with a portfolio of four brands: Marcelle, Watier, Annabelle and CW Beggs and Sons.

At Groupe Marcelle we believe in an environment where passion can be expressed, creative minds lead to exceptional innovation, audacity and focus are a pillar of great success and acts of empowerment, collaboration and humanity are widely encouraged. Because our purpose is to “Cultivate beauty in the world”, we strive to care for you, people and the environment. We are looking for professionals who will exemplify these values and bring energy and commitment to results.

Join a company with more than 300 employees in the cosmetics field and play a key role in the organization.

Name: Markwins Beauty Brands
Description:
Since its inception, Markwins Beauty Brands has been setting itself apart from other brands in the cosmetics industry. Markwins was the first to introduce multi-palette compacts to U.S. market and is now a global leader in color cosmetics, cosmetic accessories, and beauty collections.  As the largest privately owned cosmetics company in the U.S., Markwins is recognized as a Top 20 purveyor in the global cosmetic industry.

Markwins has been continuously building a diverse collection of brands since 1984 to cater to and reach consumers of all ages, ethnicities, and skin tones. The Markwins brand portfolio includes wet n wild, Physicians Formula, The Color Workshop, The Color Institute, Black Radiance, POP, Bonne Belle and Lip Smacker, amongst many other internal brands and licensing deals. Markwins brands can be found in over 50,000 retail outlets including department, specialty, mass, drug, and food stores, and are available in more than 60 countries, spanning 6 continents.

Name: Idraet Group
Description:
Con raíces profundas en Buenos Aires, Argentina, Idraet nació en 2003 con la visión de enriquecer y destacarse en el fascinante mundo de la dermocosmética profesional.

Durante casi dos décadas, hemos conquistado la industria de la belleza en todo el territorio argentino y hemos cruzado fronteras, expandiendo nuestra presencia a lugares como Paraguay, Perú, Bolivia, Costa Rica, El Salvador, Guatemala y Estados Unidos.

Nuestra sólida trayectoria ha tejido una simbiosis única entre el ámbito comercial y la academia de la estética, destacándonos en la industria, por nuestro compromiso inquebrantable con la excelencia.

En Idraet, desarrollamos una extensa cartera de productos exclusivos diseñados tanto para profesionales como para el público en general. Nuestras fórmulas innovadoras marcan pauta en la industria, abarcando aplicaciones corporales, faciales, maquillaje profesional, manicuría profesional, suplementos nutricosméticos, productos capilares y mucho más.

Nuestros centros académicos Idraet Pro Institute brindamos herramientas que empoderan a personas apasionadas por la estética, formando así a profesionales con un alto nivel de excelencia.

En el corazón de Idraet, creemos que la belleza reside en la expresión auténtica de cada individuo. Nos esforzamos por ofrecer a cada persona la oportunidad de empoderarse a través de la cosmética, permitiendo que su esencia brille con luz propia.

Únete a nosotros en este viaje transformador, donde la belleza se encuentra en cada expresión auténtica.  #Idraet #CosméticaProfesional #TransformandoBellezas

Name: Vizzela Cosméticos
Description: Sou a Vizzela, uma marca de maquiagens 100% Vegana, brasileira e cheia de samba no pé, celebro a diversidade e a individualidade das pessoas. Essa é a minha motivação e inspiração para criar produtos de qualidade, preço justo e que atenda a todxs com uma make que respeita e represente a sua beleza.

Name: BRAÉ
Description:
Fundada em 2015 em Miami e sediada em São Paulo, a BRAÉ é uma marca de hair care multicultural, inovadora e de alta performance com linhas profissionais e de home care que, em pouco tempo, conquistou profissionais e consumidores pelo mundo.

Nosso time conta com mais de 150 profissionais distribuídos em backoffice, centro de distribuição, PDV e embaixadores da marca. Nossos produtos estão em mais de 10 países, com pontos de venda espalhados pelo país, entre salões,  perfumarias e online, além dos canais próprios da marca: pop-up stores e e-commerce.
Nosso principal valor é o amor ao que faz, como faz e para quem faz, somado ao nosso compromisso em cumprir com os resultados prometidos. 
 
Conheça mais sobre a marca nas nossas redes sociais @braehaircare

Name: NUDESTIX
Description:
Ally & Taylor

Sisters. Friends. Models.

In front of the camera, they wear many faces. In everyday life, they go for all-out natural, opting for that barely-there look with only a touch of color to accentuate their finest features. Having worked with some of today’s hottest makeup artists and photographers, they pooled their industry know-how with their no-makeup makeup lifestyle to create NUDESTIX. A simple collection of easy-to-use makeup crayons that cover all the bases and give you a fresh-faced, natural look that works for all faces, that you can apply in all places. Enriched with skin-saving vitamins, antioxidants and moisturizers, each multipurpose NUDESTIX is loaded with just enough color to #gonudebutbetter.

Mission

We believe a natural look is a perfect fit for any face. We’re all born with our 
own unique look, so why cover it up with tons of makeup? When it comes to beauty, a little color goes a long way. A touch of color here and there is enough to bring out our finest features, so out with the crazy big collection and in with four simple solutions for face, eyes, lips and even nails. We think doing our makeup should be easy, enjoyable and–above all–fun...

Name: PT. Luxury Cantika Indonesia (Luxcrime)
Description:
Luxcrime, one of Indonesia based cosmetics & skin care company that having both online and offline operations. we has been established since 2015, and provide beauty products ranging from skin care to makeup which always follow the trend beauty industry.

LUXCRIME has the tagline “ I, Makeup, Skin, Happy :) ” and we put to all of our campaigns and selling platform. This tagline has meaning that LUXCRIME provide a complete range of product from skin care to cosmetics and we hope our customer will get a fun and happy experience when they see, touch and use LUXCRIME’s products with high quality and attractive packaging and color. We also fight animal testing (free cruelty without performing experiments on animals) and avoid of harmful chemical.

Our Core Value
R :  RESPECTFUL and PURPOSEFUL
E :  EQUALITY
A : ALWAYS CUST 1ST
C : CURIOSITY and INNOVATIVE
T :  THINGKING GLOBALLY

Find us:
http://instagram.com/luxcrime_id

Name: Les Secrets de Loly
Description: Marque de cosmétiques capillaires naturels destinée à tous types de cheveux texturés : ondulés, bouclés, crépus et frisés.

Name: Mana Products
Description:
MANA brings together the passion, the process and the people to define and lead the future of beauty.  For over 40 years, MANA has developed groundbreaking formulas for some of the world’s most renowned beauty brands and globally recognized makeup artists. Our product development capabilities and marketing savvy have propelled brands from startups to record-breakers. Simply put, MANA brings ideas to life.

Combining industry wisdom with cutting-edge research and a client-centric approach, MANA delivers forward thinking, innovative ideas and revolutionary products across three core pillars:

     • Development & Manufacturing
     •	Brand Accelerator
     •	Private Label

MANA’s industry-leading team of chemists use the latest technologies and state-of-the-art facilities to create and curate the new, from concept to shelf. MANA is FDA and OTC-Certified. The company’s global reach serves a diverse domestic and international client base with expertise in:

     •	Research & Development
     •	Product Development
     •	Package Development & Sourcing
     •	Brand Development & Marketing
     •	Supply Chain Management & Manufacturing
     •	Distribution & Logistics
     •	Regulatory Assistance
     •  Quality Control

MANA is committed to our clients’ success every step of the way, empowering each customer with the knowledge, tools and technology to turn original ideas into finished products. This partnership is the hallmark of our business and essential to helping each client realize their creative vision that reflects their identity and ensures distinguished placement within the beauty industry.

Based in New York since 1975, all MANA products are proudly made in the USA.

Name: COSMAX Indonesia
Description:
COSMAX Group is the global no.1 research and innovation focused subcontract manufacturer developing and producing cosmetics and health & food supplements. Today, a quarter of the world's population possibly have used COSMAX made products. Across the globe, 600 beauty companies, including 15 of the world's top 20 beauty companies, are in a partnership with COSMAX.

Cosmax Indonesia serves customers from Indonesia and SE & South Asian countries, collaborating with its sister companies in Korea, China, United States, Australia, Indonesia, and Thailand.

Servicing OEM, ODM and OBM according to customers’ needs, PT. COSMAX Indonesia has been producing most types of beauty products, namely; Liquid, Semi Liquid, Cream, Gel, Solid and Powder, in compliance with the local regulations.

As a cGMP, Indonesian Halal, eve Vegan and COSMOS organic certified manufacturer, we are ready answer your beauty needs.

Name: Innovist
Description:
Innovist is synonymous to all things Clean, Transparent, and Scientific. A one-stop shop for products with proven efficacy!
When one shops at Innovist, they invest in genuinity. We are proud to own the entire process of Research & Development, Manufacturing and Clinical Trials, which equips us to serve every customer with Certified, Safe, and High Quality products across categories.
The triangle in Innovist symbolizes perfectness, unity, and importance. It is marked as the strongest unit that balances all the aspects of idealism. At Innovist, we balance science and art to deliver our promise: Clean | Transparent | Science

Name: Piramal Consumer Healthcare
Description:
Piramal Consumer Healthcare is a leading consumer care business division for Piramal Pharma Limited. PCH has strived for customer-centricity and solving routine disrupting problems. since 2009. As part of the over 38-year-old Piramal Group, we are proud to have a rich legacy founded on the values of Knowledge, Action, Care, and Impact, which are evident in how we operate as an organization. We live by our mission statement of "Doing Well and Doing Good." Piramal Consumer Healthcare has touched the lives of over 7 crore Indians.
PCH meets the needs of consumers in a variety of sectors, including Skin Care, Digestives, Women's Intimate Range, Kids Wellbeing & Baby Care, Pain Management, Oral Care, Gut Health, Respiratory Solutions, Multivitamins, and Food Supplements.
We now have one of the largest distribution networks in the consumer healthcare industry, with 1500+ towns, 2.8 lac+ outlets, 12000+ organized retail outlets, E-commerce, and a 1200+ strong field force.
PCH is one of the fastest growing businesses of Piramal Group. Our most popular brands are ranked first or second in their respective market segments. The company has consistently grown at a CAGR of 20%+ and ended FY 2021 with a top-line value of Rs.690 Cr. Our goal is to be the market leader in the Indian OTC market.
Our talented team is at the heart of it all. We take great pride in creating a workplace that caters to each and every individual's career needs. We go to great lengths to ensure that everyone on our teams is valued and recognized.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Perfumerías Primor
Description:
En Perfumerías Primor “Grandes marcas a pequeños precios” no es sólo nuestro lema, es nuestra misión. 

Somos una empresa familiar fundada en 1953 en Málaga que ha ido expandiéndose por toda España y dando el salto a Europa sin perder de vista nuestra esencia: ofrecer a nuestros clientes los mejores productos a precios asequibles. 

Porque la belleza y el cuidado deberían estar al alcance de todos, en Primor apostamos por la innovación y el talento. Una visión que nos ha llevado a ser un referente en el sector de la perfumería española y a cosechar distinciones como: 

-Mejor perfumería en el año 2008. 
-Mejor Perfumería en el año 2017.
-Mejor evolución en el año 2004.
-Reconocimientos indirectos por la OCU, como la perfumería con los mejores precios de España.
-3º de España en engagement en redes sociales en 1Q 2017. 
-Mejor perfumería selectiva en campaña Navidad 2016 por Google.
-Mejor Fórmula Comercial 2019. 
-TOP 1 Ecommerce de España en la categoría Perfumería & Beauty, desde 2016 hasta 2020. 
-Mejor Comercio y Mejor Comercio Online en la categoría de perfumerías 2023.

Pero nuestra misión no acaba aquí! Actualmente Perfumerías Primor consta de más de 200 tiendas ubicadas alrededor de toda la geografía española y llegando hasta Portugal, Italia y Francia. Un número que crece cada año junto con nuestra tienda online. 

Innovación, calidad y vanguardia para consolidar un legado positivo en el sector y la sociedad. Y tú, ¿nos conoces ya? Os esperamos primosoros!

Name: Cosmoprof North America
Description:
Cosmoprof North America is the leading B2B beauty trade show in the Americas, dedicated to all sectors of the industry—from skincare and makeup to fragrance, hair, and nails, while also representing the entire beauty supply chain.

NEXT UP!
Miami: January 21 - 23, 2025
Las Vegas: July 15 - 17, 2025

Name: Boots Retail USA, Inc.
Description:
We are No7 Beauty Company, a division of Walgreens Boots Alliance, a modern consumer goods company with purpose, that combines the best of traditional companies with the vibrancy and pace of a new digital-first business.

With operations in North America, Europe and Asia, we offer beauty products that consumers can trust wherever they are in the world.

Since No7 launched in 1935, our iconic brand has been joined by equally strong characters in Liz Earle Beauty, Soap & Glory, Botanics, Sleek and YourGoodSkin. All of our brands have a deep understanding of what customers want because we’re great at listening. 

As part of Walgreens Boots Alliance, we have the rich insight of our own retailers and thousands of beauty advisors across our stores so we can truly get to know our consumers and better meet their every skin need.

And we’re here to deliver more than just commercial results, we’re here to do the right thing. We know consumers choose brands that have a positive, sustainable impact on the world and we’ll deliver on our sustainability commitments through a CSR plan that’s fully rooted in our brand strategy.

Our combination of insight and innovation is brought to life by people – our team who are passionate about creating beauty and skincare products for all; products that deliver on their promise, at affordable prices.

Our team includes world-class Global Sourcing experts who are transforming our operations so we can continue to meet the growing needs of our customers on time, every time.

Supported and encouraged by inclusive leaders, the people that make up our global teams are the beating heart of No7 Beauty Company. They’re not just passionate about beauty; it’s their innate enthusiasm to innovate that sets them apart and drives them to deliver the very best for our customers.

Welcome to the next generation, welcome to No7 Beauty Company.

Name: Kopaş Kozmetik
Description:
1974 yılında kurulan Kopaş, kozmetik ve kişisel bakım ürünleri alanında lider markaları ile, insan sağlığına ve çevreye duyarlı olarak ürettiği 1300’den fazla ürün çeşidi ile Türkiye’nin ve dünyanın pek çok noktasında tüketici ile buluşmaktadır.

Ürünlerimiz, ARGE ve üretim aşamalarında uygulanan kapsamlı testler ve analizler ile uluslararası standartlarda ve etik değerlere uygun üretilmektedir. Bu nedenle, markalarımız tüketicilerin güven duyduğu markaların başında gelmektedir.

Odak noktamız olan kalite, yaptığımız her işte, ürettiğimiz her üründe ve sunduğumuz her hizmette en üst düzeydedir. İnsana, topluma ve doğaya saygılı, her yaştan, her kesimden tüketiciye hitap eden ürünlerimiz ile sektördeki yeniliklerin ve gelişmelerin öncüsü olarak, müşteri memnuniyetimizi de en üst noktaya taşımayı amaçlayarak başarımızı devam ettiriyoruz.

Name: REVOLUTION BEAUTY
Description:
Revolution serves to represent and champion a diverse set of customers. In an industry where beauty norms have only just begun to be challenged, Revolution Beauty has been breaking down these rules and standing for inclusivity since the day it was born.

Revolution’s commitment to inclusivity spans everything it does – from building consumer feedback into product development, to featuring our own employees, super fans and content creators in all brand communications, shunning unrealistic perfection and models in favour of real people, real beauty.

We believe everyone should celebrate diversity, embrace imperfection, respect self-expression and support beauty in its many shapes and forms. To us, an open mind is powerful, it’s beautiful, it’s strong for being able to see beyond the obvious and embrace the unfamiliar.

Being part of Team Revolution means living and breathing everything we stand for, uniting in our common goal. We ask our team to share ideals, to listen and respect different opinions, to support, learn and grow as one team.

We are the Revolution. We fight for quality, we fight for speed, we fight for diversity.

We rebel against elitism and exclusivity.

We believe in your voice, your needs, your wants.

YOU are the Revolution


OUR BRANDS
Makeup Revolution: Ageless. Unisex. Affordable. Yours
Revolution Skincare: Better Skincare. Better Makeup
Revolution Pro: Makeup that does more
XX Revolution: SKIN XX MAKEUP
I Heart Revolution: Making the ordinary extraordinary
Makeup Obsession: Meet your new makeup obsession

Name: Grupo Skala
Description:
Nossa trajetória começou em 1986 com o propósito de levar cosméticos de qualidade e preço justo ao mercado. Agindo com transparência e integridade, procuramos inovar construindo muito mais que uma grande marca, um jeito de fazer mais e melhor pela autoestima, pelas pessoas, pelo meio ambiente e pelo mundo.

Beleza para todos 
Ninguém precisa pagar caro para se cuidar. A beleza está em tudo e nós enxergamos isso desde sempre. A beleza vive e resiste no amor, no cuidado, na natureza e nos pequenos detalhes. Democratizar o que é belo foi o nosso maior desafio. Hoje é nosso diferencial e um dos nossos maiores legados.

Movidos pela inovação 
Quando disseram que produtos de qualidade são mais caros, provamos que não. Quando disseram que o caminho sustentável era mais difícil, superamos e fizemos acontecer. O desafio nos move constantemente e a inovação faz parte do nosso DNA. Nosso time está sempre em busca de lançar produtos com preços acessíveis e atitudes responsáveis com o planeta.

Somos uma marca 100% Vegana 
Celebre! Você encontrou a Skala Cosméticos e nós encontramos você. Somos 100% veganos e entendemos que ninguém precisa pagar mais caro para fazer a diferença no mundo.

Name: AlumierMD
Description: AlumierMD is a professionally dispensed skincare brand with a rapidly expanding global network of partner clinics. Our mission is to empower you to feel confident and powerful in your own skin. We achieve this by pushing the boundaries of skincare science and combining clinically proven ingredients with advanced technologies that deliver transformative results. Our goal is to connect you to our global community of trusted skincare professionals and unlock your skin's potential with a 360° approach to skin health.

Name: skinbetter science
Description:
In 2016, skinbetter science set out to create a new paradigm in skincare, not only for patients, but for the physicians, nurses, aestheticians and surgeons who help patients achieve beautiful skin. Our award-winning products are backed by decades of rigorous clinical research (in powerhouse products like Restylane and Dysport) and furthered by a continued commitment to the study of skincare science.

skinbetter products are purposefully developed and only available through authorized providers. This model supports physicians and consumers by establishing genuine patient-practice relationships. We’re not just another skincare company. We employ accomplished science to create genuine connections with our providers and real life results for their patients.
*Restylane and Dysport are registered trademarks of Galderma.

Name: MONAT Global
Description:
NATURALLY BASED PRODUCTS, A FUN AND REWARDING OPPORTUNITY, CULTURE OF FAMILY, SERVICE, AND GRATITUDE.

Our mission is to help people everywhere enjoy beautiful, healthy, fulfilling lives through our exceptional, naturally based products; a fun and rewarding business opportunity; and a culture of family, service, and gratitude.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: KEUNE Haircosmetics Brasil
Description:
A Keune Haircosmetics nasceu na Holanda em 1922 e hoje atua em mais de 80 países, conquistando a confiança de milhões de consumidores e profissionais cabeleireiros ao redor do mundo. Desde 1995 no Brasil, tem construído relacionamentos baseados no respeito e na confiança, buscando ser reconhecida como a melhor parceira de negócios dos profissionais cabeleireiros.   

Asseguramos que a autenticidade é a base de tudo o que fazemos, em meio a um mundo inconstante no qual a superficialidade parece ser a regra. A elegância e a verdadeira beleza são nossas fontes de inspirações diárias. Somos conduzidos pela paixão. Paixão em criar beleza todos os dias e em toda a parte do mundo.

Por sermos uma empresa familiar, além de trabalharmos com a razão, agimos principalmente com o coração. Acreditamos no diálogo aberto e honesto. Não estamos na bolsa de valores e por isso conseguimos trabalhar de maneira independente. Olhamos sempre no longo prazo: pensamos em gerações ao invés de trimestres. 

Estamos em uma missão pela busca da verdadeira beleza. Queremos ser reconhecidos como os melhores no segmento de cosméticos para cabelos. Porém, mais do que isto, queremos revelar o melhor das pessoas. 

Convidamos você para uma parceria legítima com o toque pessoal de uma empresa familiar, para que juntos possamos encontrar a verdadeira beleza.

Name: Biossance
Description:
Pioneering Sustainable Beauty Through Biotechnology 

Biossance is a clean beauty brand that uses biotechnology to create skincare products that are effective, sustainable and safe. We formulate with a No Compromise approach—proudly blacklisting over 2,000 potentially harmful ingredients. Only the most trustworthy and powerful make our final cut. 
 

Our Story
It all began inside our Berkeley labs in 2003, where through biology and modern technology a plant-derived cure for malaria was created. Since then, over 120 million royalty-free treatments have been given, saving lives and communities. Inspired to keep positively changing the world through biotech, we turned to the ingredients people use on their bodies every day. And we asked how we could do better. Drawing on our rich history of science and sustainability, we create skincare products that are incredibly effective and safe without harming the environment. Because our standards for clean beauty are high—and our standards for ourselves are even higher. 
 
Biossance products are available at Biossance.com and Sephora.

Name: Pranarôm
Description:
World reference in Scientific Aromatherapy for 30 years, Pranarôm is the expert in natural and effective solutions developed from 100% pure, integral and organic chemotyped essential oils.

Essential supplements or substitutes for drug treatments, Pranarôm synergies offer targeted responses in all areas of health and adapted for the whole family.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Marini SkinSolutions
Description:
Marini SkinSolutions is a leading manufacturer of medically validated skin care and aesthetic products for the professional marketplace.  This market principally includes Physicians, PA’s, RN’s and licensed estheticians.  Marini SkinSolutions employs a direct sales organization in the United States and its products are sold by independent distributors throughout the world.

Founded in 1994, Marini SkinSolutions is known for creating breakthrough product solutions and dramatic technological advancements. JMSR pioneered the use of Glycolic Acid in skin care and developed the first stable topical Vitamin C product (Ascorbyl Palmitate) years ahead of the commercial marketplace. In 2005, JMSR became the first company to market a cosmetic eyelash enhancement conditioner that has since revolutionized the industry and created an increasingly popular beauty category. Over the years, the company has established a portfolio of proprietary formulas that reflect its ongoing commitment to be the preeminent developer of skin care products that produce measureable clinical results and benefits.

Jan Marini, founder and Chairman of the Board of JMSR, has devoted more than three decades to research and development of the cutting-edge technologies used in our products. She has also formed associations with some of the world’s leading physicians and research scientists. As a respected international skin care authority, Jan Marini continues to lead JMSR – and the industry at large – to new heights.  Jan Marini has been a popular keynote speaker at many International Tradeshows and Medical Conferences principally focused on technological innovation in skin care.  In addition, Jan has appeared frequently as a featured industry expert on television, radio and in other media.

Name: SIALBÉ
Description:
At SIALBÉ, we believe in skincare that truly cares—for you. Certified by COSMOS EcoCert, our formulas combine cutting-edge science with the finest ingredients from around the world to deliver highly effective, 100% organic skincare solutions tailored to your needs.

Our commitment is to your skin’s health and well-being. That’s why we create unique, chemical-free formulas that provide real results, enhancing your natural beauty while respecting the environment.

Experience skincare that works for you—clean, powerful, and made with purpose.

Name: PT KOSMETIKA GLOBAL INDONESIA
Description: PT KOSMETIKA GLOBAL INDONESIA is a manufacturing company established in 2018 which engaged in cosmetics and skincare. It was founded and developed by experts and driven by enthusiastic young employees. KOSME continues to grow with reliable quality products, and it is supported by premium services for all customers. KOSME has fulfilled the standard production requirements and passed product verification test from BPOM with an international equivalent Operating Procedure Standart for the production process, packing up until the storage of production

Name: Wild
Description: Brilliantly bold personal care, that smells, feels and works a treat. No nasties, vegan and all without single-use plastic. Good for you, good for the planet. B Corp certified.

Name: Patrick Ta Beauty
Description: Everyone Deserves To Feel Confident & Beautiful Everyday. A beauty brand created by visionary co-founders, celebrity makeup artist Patrick Ta, established product specialist Rima Minasyan, and seasoned entrepreneur Avo Minasyan.

Name: The Man Company
Description:
The Man Company is your ultimate one-stop solution into becoming a gentleman: a man of refreshing candor who is known for his well-made scent statements.

The Man Company was conceived in honour of the modern men who look and feel their very best.

We believe that becoming a gentleman is a journey rather than a destination. And we’ve resolved to accompany all aspiring gentlemen to be their constant companion. 

Since our inception, we’ve been creating wonders by the grace of nature to offer the world with the best in age and class of grooming. With the intention of bringing nature’s magic to the world, we now boast of a celebrated range of grooming essentials, artistically formulated and exclusively curated to help the men of today take the world in their stride.

Entirely free of harmful chemicals and enthusiastically infused with premium essential oils, we’ve devised a product range that is meticulous about our customer’s aesthetic improvement. The core of our offerings lies in the quality and richness of handpicked natural ingredients. Free of SLS and Parabens, our products were formulated to make sure you got the harm-free royal treatment you deserve

Name: It Works! Global
Description: Welcome to IT WORKS! We’re a passionate, fast-growing, global team that rallies around a single mission: to help anyone, anywhere, change their life. Founded in 2001, we offer a growing list of weight loss, nutrition, active lifestyle, and beauty products. Over the years, we’ve expanded across the Americas, Europe, and Asia. We are a global company headquartered in Florida and we’re currently adding staff and expanding in Europe and the Americas.  What started as an idea to bring natural, results-driven products to market has become so much more - we are now the direct selling industry’s leading team-building company!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: VITAMASQUES
Description:
Welcome to Vitamasques, we make clean, cruelty-free k-beauty inspired skincare designed to make you look and feel good.

Why did we choose skincare?
Well, after working in the luxury spa sector for 10 years and travelling frequently to South Korea we noticed how different Korean skincare was compared to our Western beauty products. 
 
We began formulating products in South Korea to introduce to the UK, with three main focuses:

 Clean Formulas
 Free-From Cruelty
 Availability to Everyone

We want your skin to be your best asset, not to be hidden behind makeup, and for you wear your skin and wear it proud.

What are we doing to become more sustainable?
We've started to phase in new fully biodegradable mask sheets as well as packaging, and we are also proud to say that we're continuing our innovative nature by being one the first to adopt this new technology.

Additionally, we're continuing to become CO2 neutral with green initiatives such as, Tree-Nation and you can see the progress we're making to offset our usage.

We are working with printers who focus on eco-printing techniques, by utilising things such as vegan-ink, recycled paper and reduced carbon processes.

What are our future plans to become even more sustainable?
We're continuing our move in the right direction, and are looking at ways of removing plastic from our production chain where possible, and also offset our usage by working with partners to remove and re-process waste plastics out of our oceans.

Name: Matrix
Description:
We are curious and obsessive about developing meaningful brands and products that go above and beyond. We are creators, builders, and nurturers. We commercialise ideas, sparks, and visions to create amazing.

A certified B Corporation and founding patrons of the British Beauty Council. 

We work with brilliant client partners to deliver amazing brands and products, including British Airways, Space NK, Primark, Emirates, Aromatherapy Associates, The White Company, Bamford, Cathay Pacific, Kmart Australia, Qatar Airways and Singapore Airlines.

• Cultured Biomecare - Advanced Barrier + Biome Skincare with industry trailblazer, Rob Calcraft

Name: Groupe Sothys
Description:
Le Groupe SOTHYS développe des solutions cosmétiques personnalisées au travers de ses marques (SOTHYS et Bernard Cassière) pour révéler la beauté de chacun. Fortement ancrée à l’international, l’entreprise maîtrise toute la chaîne de valeurs (R&D, production, logistique, commercialisation).

Le Groupe fournit également des prestations sur mesure pour le développement et la fabrication de produits cosmétiques, répondant ainsi aux exigences les plus strictes.

Entité familiale indépendante à taille humaine, le Groupe permet à ses collaborateurs (470 dans le monde) de s’investir directement dans les projets de l’entreprise. Implantée en Corrèze, l’entreprise y réunit une grande diversité de métiers.

 Nos valeurs :
- Culture client
- Excellence
- Performance

 Notre ADN :
L’innovation est au cœur de l’entreprise. Le talent de nos équipes permet aux marques du Groupe de proposer des gammes de produits originaux, efficaces, des galéniques uniques, des actifs sécures et certains actifs bio-sourcés issus de la recherche avancée du Groupe.

 Le Groupe demain :
Résolument développement durable, nous investissons aujourd'hui pour la Beauté de demain.
Engagés dans une démarche d’amélioration continue au travers de notre feuille de route RSE, nous promouvons dans le cadre de nos activités pour nos marques ou dans le cadre de notre activité de C.D.M.O. (Contract Development Manufacturing Organisations) une beauté respectueuse de l'environnement et de la biodiversité.

 Envie de nous rejoindre ? Déposez votre candidature sur www.groupesothys.com

Name: Hilal Care
Description:
Since 1957, Hilal has been a household name in Pakistan synonymous with high quality food products. As one of the leading business groups Hilal is focused on continuous improvement and innovation. Millions of people across 20 countries enjoy Hilal products on a daily basis. With its focus on enhancing consumer lifestyles, Hilal Group established Hilal Care in 2016 with a vision to provide innovative Personal, Home & Healthcare related consumer products.

All Hilal Care products are manufactured according to strict international quality standards. Having the values of team work, innovation, respect, development, quality, integrity & people at the core of our business, Hilal Care aims at becoming a major player in local and international markets.

MISSION:
We aspire to make people live and feel better by providing innovative and high quality solutions for their home, personal and health care needs.

VISION:
To be the leading innovative national company by building inspiring brands in home, personal and health care segments with a vast global network
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Crabtree & Evelyn
Description:
Currently rebranding and on a mission of exploration and growth, Crabtree & Evelyn is moving in a fresh new direction as a socially-led, digitally-driven company.

Our beauty and lifestyle products are sold online around the world, and every collection has a story to tell. Featuring potent ingredients and sensorial textures, we create solution-focused formulas to elevate the every day, from skincare to scent. 

An exciting time to join us, we’re looking to the future while honouring our heritage. Inspired by our original founder Cy Harvey, a wanderlust enthusiast and world traveller, we’re working to make connections with people and places from around the globe. Bringing stories home and breathing life into beauty. Just like Cy. 

#BornCuriousGrownWild is our mantra, and we’re fuelled by adventure every day. From ecommerce to exploration, HR to UX, our teams span offices in New York, Boston, Hong Kong and London. We’re passionate about what we do and always on the lookout for like-minded people to join us.

Ready to join our community of explorers?

Name: Cholayil Private Limited
Description:
Cholayil Pvt Ltd (CPL) is one of the leading and fastest growing companies in India having a strong presence in the FMCG industry.

The company, rooted in tradition but modern in its thought and approach, is a pioneer in the field of Ayurveda and natural personal care products. CPL introduced the flagship brand ‘Medimix’ in 1969 which was followed by acquiring ‘Cuticura’ and ‘Krishna Thulasi’ brands in 2001 and 2011 respectively. It has implemented several strategic initiatives to become a dominant player with strong brand equity in the personal care industry. Cholayil Pvt.  Ltd. is also the parent company of Dr. Sidhan’s Ayur Mix, Sadayush, Sadhev and Jullaaha brands.

Today CPL has basket of brands which are popular not only in India but has global footprint in more than 35 countries across the world with prominent presence in Middle East, Far East, Europe and Asia Pacific among other markets. Cholayil has done a Joint Venture in Kenya to manufacture products for African region. The company has also started ecommerce website in India, USA, Singapore, Malaysia and soon to be launched in GCC also.

Cholayil Pvt. Ltd. is now a 700+ employee strong company with a Head Office in India. It has production plants in TADA (Andhra Pradesh) and Haridwar (Uttrakhand).

More details are available at our Websites:
www.cholayil.com
www.medimixayurveda.com

Description: Somos la cadena de perfumerías referente del mercado, orientados a satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes.

Name: Arcade Beauty
Description:
Arcade Beauty is a leading global manufacturer for the beauty and wellness industry. Our century of industry expertise, expansive product portfolio, and 12 strategically located manufacturing facilities across North America, Europe, South America,  and Asia allow us to deliver unparalleled end-to-end solutions on a global scale. 

This global presence, supported by regional sales organizations located in New York City, Paris, São Paulo, and Shanghai enables us to service our customers in any market worldwide including emerging markets such as the Middle East, Far East Asia, South America and beyond. 

Through this global network we offer our customers a broad range of capabilities spanning from bulk manufacturing for fragrance and personal care to sample and flexible packaging design and manufacturing, to filling and assembly for all product formats - from samples to full-size.

As the leader in our field, we are committed to continuous innovation while providing expert quality, value and service to deliver influential moments to our clients. Our combination of unique industry knowledge, global manufacturing capabilities and patented technologies allow us to deliver solutions that engage and drive results. 

We treat our clients’ goals and challenges as our own. 

ScentStrip, ScentSeal, DiscCover, LiquaTouch, ShadeSeal, BeautiPod, BeautiSeal, LipSeal, Mini spray, Spray Pen, Rollerball, Vial, Packette, Mini Tube, Blister, Fusion Pack, Mask, Mini Jar, Mini Mascara, Mini gloss, Non-woven / Towelette, Carestia blotter, Carestia scented paper, 3D Pouch, Ampoules.

Name: Dorskin
Description:
Established on 2021, Dorskin aims to be the top of mind brand in answering all of your skin problems especially acne prone and sensitive skin, while riding on the trends and make a new "thing" of our own.

With the love for society and community especially acne fighters that are represented by every product that Dorskin have, we hope to empower more people to be what they want and have the best version of themselves with various fun ways.

Name: Jan Marini Skin Research
Description:
Jan Marini Skin Research (JMSR) is a leading manufacturer of medically validated skin care and aesthetic products for the professional marketplace.  This market principally includes Physicians, PA’s, RN’s and licensed estheticians.  JMSR employs a direct sales organization in the United States and its products are sold by independent distributors throughout the world.

Founded in 1994, JMSR is known for creating breakthrough product solutions and dramatic technological advancements. JMSR pioneered the use of Glycolic Acid in skin care and developed the first stable topical Vitamin C product (Ascorbyl Palmitate) years ahead of the commercial marketplace. In 2005, JMSR became the first company to market a cosmetic eyelash enhancement conditioner that has since revolutionized the industry and created an increasingly popular beauty category. Over the years, the company has established a portfolio of proprietary formulas that reflect its ongoing commitment to be the preeminent developer of skin care products that produce measureable clinical results and benefits.

Jan Marini, founder and Chairman of the Board of JMSR, has devoted more than three decades to research and development of the cutting-edge technologies used in our products. She has also formed associations with some of the world’s leading physicians and research scientists. As a respected international skin care authority, Jan Marini continues to lead JMSR – and the industry at large – to new heights.  Jan Marini has been a popular keynote speaker at many International Tradeshows and Medical Conferences principally focused on technological innovation in skin care.  In addition, Jan has appeared frequently as a featured industry expert on television, radio and in other media.

Name: Neora
Description:
Hello we are Neora- where beauty meets wellness for holistic well-being.
We believe that all beauty & wellness should be clean + results-driven.

We use high concentrated amounts of multiple active CLEAN ingredients that have been studied and are proven to show significant results.
As part of our Clean Product Guarantee, we promise that you won’t find any potentially harmful ingredients in any of our products, ever.

Because our best-in-class products and ingredients are only available from Neora, we have a unique opportunity for people to become Brand Partners to share Neora’s products with others. We are a passionate, supportive group of positive innovators, game-changers and dream chasers who are dedicated  to Make People Better.

We are passionate about giving back to the communities we serve. Over $6 million has been raised by the Neora Ripple Foundation to help improve people’s lives worldwide through Big Brothers Big Sisters and World Vision.

Name: Cadiveu Professional
Description:
Cadiveu é um grupo atualmente formado pelas marcas de beleza Cadiveu Essentials e Cadiveu Professional cujo propósito é potencializar a auto estima das mulheres. 

Tudo começou em 2006, com uma apostila online, que ilustrava em suas páginas conhecimento técnico em cosméticos para educar profissionais de beleza (cabeleireiros). Com isso, surgiu a demanda por produtos, e foi aí que nasceu a Cadiveu Professional, com fórmulas extraordinárias para o cabeleireiro cuidar da auto estima da mulher com máxima performance.

Em 2019 nasceu a marca Cadiveu Essentials, dedicada a mulher que busca empoderamento, procura fazer parcerias com mulheres influencers que inspiram mulheres a se sentirem qualificadas a desempenhar o papel que desejarem na sociedade.  
 
Após uma década de história, é considerada a 3ª Maior Empresa Brasileira de Cosméticos Capilares Profissionais, segundo a Kline Group. As marcas hoje estão presentes em mais de 80 países, com destaque para Australia, Emirados Árabes, Italia, Coreia do Sul, entre outros.
 
Marca global e online, tem como objetivo principal antecipar as tendências do mercado de cosméticos mundial e disseminar a educação, que atravessa os quatro cantos do mundo, para transformar o mercado de beleza, com profissionais qualificados para ser Coach da mulher e apoiar sua auto estima, e através de conteúdo de valor, empedrar a mulher.
 
MISSÃO: 
Tornar possível, a cada mulher, ter os cabelos dos seus sonhos.
VISÃO: Ser a melhor empresa de cosméticos capilares no Brasil, com colaboradores comprometidos na busca contínua da satisfação do maior número de clientes e consumidores.
VALORES: Viva com disciplina; Nosso foco é o cliente; Somos todos um; Seja criativo, faça mais por menos; Simplifique, seja acessível.

Name: Recamier S.A.
Description:
Somos una compañía Colombiana con 76 años en el mercado. Nuestro propósito es continuar nuestra expansión y lograr a través de nuestro Talento Humano seguir contribuyendo a la satisfacción de nuestros consumidores, la protección del medio ambiente y salud del ser humano.

En Recamier nos inspira la Belleza, nos apasionan nuestros productos y trabajamos incansablemente por la calidad y la innovación continua; por esto queremos contar con Talento Humano comprometido con la excelencia y el desarrollo, apasionados por los clientes y el consumidor, personas creativas y líderes que buscan la mejora continua de nuestros procesos y productos.

Name: Lidherma
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina que desarrolla productos cosméticos con respaldo científico. Desde sus inicios, en 1989, se transformó en la mano derecha de los profesionales de la estética –dermatólogos, cirujanos, esteticistas, kinesiólogos, cosmiatras, cosmetólogos, centros de estética y spa–, acompañándolos en su crecimiento profesional.

Los productos Lidherma son desarrollados con activos innovadores y de probada eficacia, según las más altas exigencias de fabricación y calidad, bajo normas GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices) certificadas por la Organización Mundial de la Salud. Llegan al consumidor final merced a la indicación de profesionales de la estética quienes evalúan la necesidad del cliente y recomiendan el más adecuado para su tipo de piel y estilo de vida.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Asteri Beauty (B Corp)
Description:
Asteri is a B Corp, Saudi cosmetics brand that exists to empower all Arab women to shine their light in the world. With the innovation of A-Beauty, Asteri’s makeup products offer protective skincare properties and high-performance color, designed for extreme weather and a diverse range of skin types and colors.

Asteri products are vegan, microplastic-free and cruelty-free, with Asteri’s aim of wanting to be part of making the beauty industry a better place.

Name: Haskell Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada no ano 2000, a Haskell busca ser referência nacional em produtos capilares com ativos naturais. Para isso, investe em alta tecnologia e capacitação de pessoas, buscando sempre a inovação e a alta qualidade dos produtos criados.
Norteada por valores que compõem a sua essência, respeita o meio ambiente e trata a natureza como a maior fonte de riqueza e inspiração. De forma sustentável, a Haskell conquista o mercado brasileiro cada vez mais exigente e competitivo, trazendo resultados e realçando a beleza natural dos mais diversos tipos de cabelos.

Name: OPI
Description:
As the world leader in the professional nail care industry, OPI, a division of Wella Operations US LLC, is committed to providing high-quality products and services with a focus on industry safety and innovation. Known for its exceptional formula, fashionable colors and iconic names, OPI’s heavily-pigmented lacquers are super rich, long-lasting, and chip-resistant – offering an affordable luxury to consumers.

Currently, OPI is available in over 100 countries and offers a full line of professional items, including nail treatments, finishing products, lotions, manicure/pedicure products, files, tools and acrylics. OPI places a strong emphasis on corporate social responsibility by raising funds and awareness for numerous charities through retail partnerships and grassroots philanthropic initiatives.

Name: Molton Brown
Description:
Born on South Molton Street, London in 1971, Molton Brown is an icon of uniquely British style. 
Our Eaux de Parfum and Toilette, and Bath, Body, Hair and Home collections have been Made in England since day one – and we’re committed to this for our future. Sourcing only the best ingredients in exceptional fragrance concentrations, our quality has awarded us with a Royal Warrant from Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II. As part of our ever-evolving sustainable journey, we never have and never will test on animals, we run our own manufacturing facility in Elsenham and we champion beauty that’s kinder to the environment. Inspired by our progressive home, London, we work side-by-side with our eclectic set of perfumers to empower you with long-lasting, distinctive fragrances you’ll love.

We’re one of the leading global brands in the cosmetics portfolio of Japanese consumer goods company, Kao Corporation. Growing from small-scale artisans into the international fragrance brand we are today, our pioneering presence is felt in our stores and websites, travel retail, luxury department stores and the most esteemed hotels around the world.

Name: Druni
Description:
Somos una cadena de perfumerías especializadas en la venta de perfumes, cosmética, maquillaje y aseo personal.

Actualmente somos líderes en el sector gracias a las más de 350 tiendas que tenemos en todo el territorio español y los 2.000 profesionales que nos acompañan día a día a ser una de las cadenas de perfumería con más relevancia a nivel nacional.

By unlocking the antioxidant force of our exclusive Bio70+ technology and ditching the junk, we deliver unparalleled, visible results.
Juice In. Junk Out.

Name: Hero Cosmetics
Description:
We started Hero Cosmetics with one goal —  to create solutions-oriented products that can be a "hero" product when your skin is in a pinch. Our approach is simple — be mindful of the ingredients we use and avoid ingredients like parabens, alcohol and sulfates, be gentle on the skin (harsh ingredients are so 90's), and ensure quality with everything we develop. We are a NYC-based company and we invite you to share our entrepreneurial journey with us.

Hero Cosmetics is the maker of the Mighty Patch, which we call your blemish hero. We know that pimples and blemishes always show up at the worst time - before a date or an interview or just about any time you need to show your face in public. That's why we created MIGHTY PATCH, a new way to battle those pesky blemishes without harsh chemicals or drying formulas that can show results overnight.

La mer est source d’énergie vitale pour l’homme, capable de le régénérer physiquement et mentalement.
