Name: Pro Nova Cosméticos
Description:
A Pro Nova Cosméticos em 2001 comprou a marca Giovanna Baby e, no ano seguinte, a marca Phytoervas. Ambas cresceram em número de produtos e tamanho, sendo atualmente muito conhecidas e queridas por seus consumidores fiéis.

Com uma história de sucessos, a Pro Nova, acumula experiências com marcas reconhecidas no mercado, muitos projetos e uma excelente perspectiva de crescimentos para suas Marcas para os próximos anos.

Um pouco mais sobre nossas Marcas...

GIOVANNA BABY
Nasceu em 1974 com produtos infantis através da venda de roupas que mesclavam cores e o sentimento de aconchego do colo de mãe.
Com inspiração neste universo foram criadas fragrâncias que remetiam ao carinho. Primeiro, a Lavanda Rosa, que permanece na memória olfativa de muitas mulheres até hoje, e mais tarde tivemos o lançamento de novas fragrâncias.
Giovanna Baby leva aos consumidores de todas as idades colônias, desodorantes, hidratantes, além de outros produtos para o cuidado diário da pele. 
(https://www.giovannababy.com.br/)

PHYTOERVAS
Nasceu em 1986 com um conceito inovador, sendo a primeira marca de shampoo sem sal do Brasil. 
Phytoervas mantém as propriedades dos seus ingredientes naturais inteiramente preservados, com a cosmética integral, que é extração dos ativos na natureza em sua forma mais pura, sem nenhuma adição química, preservando seus nutrientes essenciais e potencializando seus efeitos.
(https://www.phytoervas.com.br/)

Venha fazer parte deste time: vagas.com.br/v1866210

Name: Apothékary
Description:
Apothékary started with our founder, Shizu Okusa, and her family’s traditional Japanese approach to healing — using nature as medicine instead of over-the-counter fixes. In many Eastern cultures, traditional medicine in the form of plants and herb has been used for centuries to address the root cause of common ailments.

That’s exactly what we strive to do here at Apothékary - we’re here to not just treat the symptom, but get to the root cause of your wellness woes.

The demands of our modern life disconnect us from our inherent state of being. At times, we can forget what it feels like to live in harmony with the natural world. Ancient healing traditions take cues from nature to holistically support our mind, body, and spirit. With daily practice, we’re reminded of what harmony feels like and we wonder how we ever lived without it.

Apothékary is on a mission to give ancient, plant-based healing traditions new life—so that you can live a more balanced one. All of our Signature Formulas are thoughtfully formulated by our in-house Clinical Herbalists, pulling from traditional medicine modalities like Japanese Kampo, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Ayurveda, and American herbalism. The result is simple yet effective herbal remedies with tradition and modern science in mind.

Each formula contains herbs from local and global farmers with ingredients that are non-GMO, gluten-free, and contain no added sugar, fillers, or additives. In essence, they’re nature’s best remedies—plain and simple. And the best part is, they actually work to address the root cause instead of masking the symptoms.

Come with us and reembark on your journey back to balance with Apothékary.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NuFACE
Description:
Since 2005, NuFACE has led the beauty industry with innovative microcurrent technology for use in the treatment room and at-home, so that professional aestheticians, skincare gurus and clients can shape their skin’s future. 
 
As the #1 prestige skincare facial device company, our FDA-Cleared Smart Microcurrent Skincare System goes where traditional skincare can’t—THE MUSCLES—to tone, lift, and contour in the current and over time.  
 
Female-founded. Created by aestheticians. Clinically proven.  
 
NuFACE is committed to bringing you the latest innovation in advanced microcurrent technology and effective microcurrent skincare-- giving you personalized tools and treatments to lift and tone your skin today for boosted confidence tomorrow.

Name: Medik8
Description:
Founded in 2009 by UK scientists, Medik8 is a British dermatological skincare brand, globally renowned for age-defying heroes that deliver results without compromise. 

We simplify the route to great skin through the highest quality, most efficacious and trusted dermatological skincare. Pioneering the simple but effective CSA Philosophy in 2009; vitamin C + sunscreen by day, vitamin A by night. The secret to glowing, youthful skin.

Every Medik8 product combines results-driven, scientific skincare for all skin types. Clinically proven via independent studies, robustly researched and rigorously tested. Recommended by experts, dermatologists and professional therapists around the world. 

We craft and manufacture virtually everything ourselves from our ISO-certified Innovation Centre, just outside London, UK. Harnessing the highest quality ingredients alongside patented technologies (many of which are unique to us), means every product meets consistent UK standards of excellence.

We are also proud to be 1 of only 66 beauty manufacturers worldwide to be B Corp certified. When you buy Medik8, you can be assured you’re not compromising on sustainability values like helping to reduce carbon and plastic waste or prioritising renewable energy.


Our core company values are;
We work with Integrity
We cherish our Community
We are passionate Experts
We are truly Innovative

Name: DOUGLAS ITALIA
Description:
Douglas è la destinazione premium omnicanale di bellezza n°1 in Europa. 

Douglas ispira i clienti a vivere la propria bellezza offrendo un ampio assortimento online e in circa 1.850 negozi, confermandosi come il partner di riferimento grazie a una selezione accurata di brand esclusivi e selettivi, oltre al proprio brand aziendale. 
L’ampio assortimento comprende fragranze, make-up, skin care, hair care, accessori e servizi di bellezza.

Nell'anno fiscale 2022/23, Douglas ha generato un fatturato di 4,1 miliardi di euro e ha impiegato circa 18.000 persone in tutta Europa.

In Italia, a novembre 2017, Douglas ha acquisito il Gruppo LLG Limoni La Gardenia dando così vita alla prima catena di profumerie con più di 300 punti vendita distribuiti su tutto il territorio nazionale, diventando il punto di riferimento per la bellezza ed il benessere di ogni persona.

Douglas ispira a vivere la propria unicità, rappresenta la diversità, le pari opportunità e l'inclusione sia all'interno che all'esterno della propria realtà aziendale. Ha ricevuto infatti la certificazione di diversity nell'ambito dell'iniziativa "BeyondGenderAgenda".

Name: Sculpted by Aimee
Description: Sculpted by Aimee is an Irish makeup brand founded in 2016 by makeup artist Aimee Connolly. After years of experience working within the industry Aimee felt passionate about creating products she felt were missing from the market all in line with her ethos of making makeup easier.

Name: Phyt’s - Laboratoires Jerodia
Description:
The story begins in 1972. Biologist and naturopath Jean Paul Llopart joined forces with beautician Rosanne Verlé to create Phytal, a natural cosmetics brand designed for beauticians.

They laid the foundations for Naturo-Esthétique, inspired by their revolutionary approach in which beauty is inseparable from overall health, linking ecology and a natural philosophy and thus becoming pioneers in the cosmetic industry. Over the years, they developed innovative and effective products and methods (professional treatments packaged in ampoule form, the Gommage Contact +, the anti-ageing Prelude 108, etc.) with no synthetic preservatives. Integrated into Laboratoires Jérodia in 2004, a group specialising in ‘natural beauty and health’, the brand took on a new lease of life and became Phyt’s.

Name: Kate Somerville Skincare
Description:
At Kate Somerville Skincare, our mission is to Impact Lives through California born, Hollywood endorsed, transformative skincare. Kate Somerville believes that everyone deserves beautiful skin and promises to guide you there. 

Kate has been caring for people’s skin for over 25 years. She opened her iconic skincare clinic in the heart of Hollywood glamour in Los Angeles, where you can find the most cutting-edge skin treatments while feeling right at home. 

She has bottled Hollywood’s best-kept secrets for you to use in your own home—her products are proven in her clinic and trusted by some of the most photographed faces in the world.

Kate can visibly change your skin through products that can be life-changing. Her products are Skin Changers that provide a visible skin transformation, formulated with highly-functional active ingredients at optimized levels for maximum efficacy, balanced with soothing botanicals to reduce any potential sensitivity concerns.

Whatever your skin concern, Kate can visibly change your skin and this can change your life.

Our culture is one of integrity and excellence where both emotional and functional elements of product performance permeates through all that we do. We embrace collaboration, drive creativity, enhance curiosity, accept mistakes and drive performance in a results oriented manner.

Name: Hygienic Research Institute (HRIPL)
Description:
Hygienic Research Institute Private Limited (HRIPL) is a prominent Indian beauty and personal care products’ company with its interests in hair care, skin care, and salon services’ products.

HRIPL’s beauty care portfolio includes two of the foremost hair colour and care brands in the category namely Vasmol and Streax. HRIPL also has sizeable presence in skin care segment with its first brand Florozone.

Cutting edge research, use of proven natural ingredients and technology tie-ups with world’s leading cosmetic and research companies has made HRIPL products deliver the best in class quality. An ISO 9001 : 2015 certificated company HRIPL products adhere to Indian BIS quality standards and FDA norms of many prominent countries worldwide. HRIPL products are highly popular in Middle East, SAARC and Far Eastern countries.

Its flagship brand Vasmol has 96% share in the Kesh Kala segment of the hair colouring format. The powder colours under Vasmol are market leaders in 6 Indian states.

Starting from a single manufacturing unit in Mumbai in the 1950s, HRIPL today has 6 functional production locations catering to the ever growing demand for its range of products.

https://www.youtube.com/

Name: Duty Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma empresa de cosméticos que nasceu em 2019 no Rio de Janeiro, com a missão de levar AUTOESTIMA, INCLUSÃO e FELICIDADE aos brasileiros em todo o país. Acreditamos que usar cosméticos vai além de um ato de autocuidado: é um meio de se EXPRESSAR, se EMPODERAR e se AMAR. Por isso, desenvolvemos os melhores cuidados e experiências de forma ÉTICA, SUSTENTÁVEL e ACESSÍVEL da fórmula às embalagens.

Nossas marcas, destinadas ao varejo, são: DaBelle, DutyColor e Eico. 

Nosso time está espalhado por todo o país e atualmente temos nossas sedes no Rio, SP e Recife. 

Valorizamos a nossa GENTE diariamente proporcionando um ambiente de trabalho pautado em nossos VALORES. Acreditamos que todos possuem um papel de extrema importância em nossa trajetória. RECONHECEMOS o esforço e dedicação do nosso time. Somos uma empresa, mas somos feitos de PESSOAS.

Desde 2022 somos certificados como uma excelente empresa para se trabalhar pela GPTW e em 2024 fomos ranqueados como a 39º Melhor Empresa para se Trabalhar no RJ (médio porte).
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Topicals
Description: Topicals is transforming the way you feel about skin through effective, science-backed skincare products and mental health advocacy.

Name: Cless Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma empresa brasileira que, desde 2004, completa a rotina de beleza e higiene dos nossos consumidores, com todos os nossos produtos. 
Respeitados e admirados no mercado brasileiro de cosméticos, nos tornamos referência em Qualidade e Inovação. 
Administramos as marcas Charming, Charming Men, Eu Amo Charming, Lightner, Care Liss, Bigen, Essenza e Bax. 
Em 2018 adquirimos a Opus, empresa do segmento de cosméticos e higiene pessoal com mais de 48 anos de história, ampliando nossa capacidade produtiva, ganhando escala de distribuição e aumentando o portfólio com as marcas Salon Opus, Toilet Íntima e Baby Poppy. 
Com a soma de Opus no grupo, agora atuamos nos nichos de bebê, higiene íntima, absorvente para seios e tratamento capilar com produtos de alta qualidade na formulação e com ótimo custo-benefício.

Name: Capsum
Description:
Our mission: Invent. Dare. Exceed. 
Capsum is a beauty contract manufacturer, innovating skincare, body care, makeup and water-based fragrances for the world’s top beauty brands. Capsum is the inventor and only supplier of microfluidics for beauty in Europe and the USA - a science enabling the creation of products with amazing skin-feels, beautiful visuals, and cosmetic efficacy.
Our R&D lab is located in Marseille, France, where our historical plant serves the European market. Our sustainable LEED Silver-certified production site in Austin (solar-powered, no hydric stress) serves the US market.
Capsum is "Entreprise à mission" and B CORP certified.

#wehackbeauty #BtoB #beautyindustry #sustainablemanufacturing #innovation #microfluidics #artisanscientifique #sustainablecosmetics #cleanbeauty #bespokecosmetics #BCORP

Notre mission : Inventer. Oser. Se dépasser.
Capsum est un sous-traitant innovant qui conçoit et fabrique pour les plus grandes marques des produits de beauté dans les domaines du Soin (Visage & Corps), du Maquillage, du Scalp & des Cheveux ou encore de la Parfumerie fine sans alcool. Capsum est l'inventeur - et seul fournisseur en Europe et aux États-Unis - de la microfluidique cosmétique. Cette technologie permet la création de produits combinant visuel étonnant, sensorialité unique et efficacité cosmétique.
Avec des installations de pointe et durables en France et aux États-Unis, Capsum fabrique des produits à forte valeur ajoutée, alimentant la créativité, l'image et les ventes des marques de produits de beauté.
Convaincu qu'une autre économie est possible, bénéfique à tous les humains et au vivant plutôt que dirigée vers le seul profit financier, Capsum fait partie de la communauté des entreprises certifiées B Corp.

Name: Bivien
Description: Te damos la bienvenida a Bivien, una familia de marcas en la que estar bien, puede estar al alcance de tus manos.

Name: Elida Beauty
Description:
Elida Beauty’s mission is to remix classic beauty brands for a new generation, making them even bigger beauty hits than they were the first time around. 

Our remixes democratize beauty; they are for the many, not the few, because we want everyone on the beauty dance floor.

Name: دليلك للكيتو
Description:
Founder – Daleelak for Keto | Digital Products & E-commerce (Health & Wellness)

Built a niche e-commerce brand focused on the ketogenic lifestyle, combining content creation, community building, and product sales.
I grew the brand’s Instagram account organically to over 26,000 followers, leveraging educational content and engaging visuals to establish trust and authority in the health & wellness space.

Key achievements:
	•	Launched and sold multiple digital books on keto and low-carb diets
	•	Offered subscription-based services and healthy keto product recommendations
	•	we sell a curated selection of healthy keto-friendly foods, including bread alternatives, oils, and low-carb snacks
	•	Created high-converting content and marketing funnels
	•	Helped thousands of people start or maintain their keto journey
	•	Managed store setup, customer experience, and product curation end-to-end

This project reflects my ability to grow a brand from scratch, build a loyal audience, and monetize through valuable digital offerings and health-based e-commerce
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: 111SKIN
Description:
Surgically-precise skincare for visible results.
Created by Dr Yannis Alexandrides, 30 years of surgical expertise and counting.
#111SKIN

Name: Laboratoires de Biarritz
Description: The company was born and grew up with the ocean in the backdrop. The ocean is a source of inspiration in the research, the formulas, in the commitments. A desire to create sun protections that respect marine life was the spark that brought Laboratoires de Biarritz to life.Laboratoires de Biarritz believes that selling a product as being safe for human health also implies being safe for our environment. The company was founded on the back of the development of certified Organic sunscreen products, made to protect skin and the environment with non-petrochemical, non-polluting, natural ingredients.We develop products and packaging with the smallest possible environmental impact: choosing recycled or renewable plastics, environmentally friendly inks, and more. Our research always stays up to date to improve performance and adapt to constant technological progress."Made in France" means supporting the local economy as 95% of the production takes place in our region of the Pyrénées Atlantiques.

Name: Lumene Group
Description:
Lumene Group is a Nordic beauty company specializing in the development and manufacturing of high-performing, sustainable skincare, makeup and haircare products. The Group is home to four Nordic beauty brands: LUMENE, CUTRIN, IDA WARG Beauty, and Promise. 

Our brands are present in 26 countries, and online stores serve consumers worldwide. Key markets include Finland, Scandinavia, the UK, Germany, and Poland.

Lumene Group is headquartered in Espoo, Finland, where most of our products are developed, designed, and manufactured. Lumene Group employs more than 330 talents internationally. The majority owner of Lumene Group is European private equity company Verdane.

We’re always looking for inspired people to join our unique beauty company. If you believe you have what it takes, and you share our passion for naturally luminous beauty, consider joining us.

Diversity and inclusion are an important part of everything we do at Lumene Group. We want to invest in diverse knowledge and wisdom because it adds
value to out community and business. We thrive on diversity and welcome applicants of all genders, ages, ethnicities, abilities, beliefs, orientations and backgrounds.

Click below to search for current vacancies or to send us your CV.
http://www.lumenegroup.com

Name: MÊME
Description:
MÊME est la première marque de dermo-cosmétique développée pour les peaux fragilisées par les traitements anticancéreux — sans compromis sur l’efficacité, la sécurité ou la sensorialité.

Lancée en 2017 par Judith et Juliette, deux amies qui ont traversé avec leurs proches l’épreuve du cancer, MÊME est née d’une conviction forte : le soin n’a rien de futile, surtout dans les moments les plus éprouvants de la vie.

Depuis, nous concevons des produits d’origine naturelle, sûrs, sensoriels et inclusifs, pensés pour les peaux et les ongles les plus sensibles et adaptés à toutes celles et ceux qui veulent prendre soin d’eux autrement.

Distribuée sur notre e-shop et dans plus de 5 000 pharmacies et parapharmacies, MÊME incarne une vision engagée, bienveillante et exigeante de la beauté.

Restez vous. Même.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Colorescience
Description:
We’re Colorescience, and we know healthy skin.
From sunlight, to pollution, to free radicals, we believe in going way beyond UV. We’re obsessively overprotective about preventing skin damage. And that’s exactly why physicians love us.

We know skincare innovation.
We believe skincare battles are best won before they are fought. Because investing in scientific innovation now, means we won’t have to pay the price for free radicals later.

We know sun protection.
When it comes to sunscreen, we believe it should be a purely physical relationship—not a chemical one. Because the best defense is a mineral suncare offense.

Name: Golden Pearl Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd.
Description:
Golden Pearl Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd. is an independent company in Pakistan, formulating, producing and manufacturing skin, hair and personal care products.

Since its inception in 1997, the company has persistently grown through the constant support of our loyal and valued customers. 

Today, Golden Pearl Cosmetics (Pvt) Ltd. is firmly established in the leadership position within its extensive range of portfolio that not only improves our consumers’ personality, but also creates a daily beauty regime.

Name: Racco Cosméticos
Description:
Em todos os lugares a Racco é conhecida por seu slogan “Você mais feliz hoje”. 

A indústria de cosméticos que mais se preocupa com o consumidor foi criada na década de 80, em 1987. 
A Racco é uma empresa voltada totalmente ao desenvolvimento humano e por isso mantém um canal efetivo de relacionamento com seus mais diversos públicos, seguindo os preceitos da beleza e da saúde que vão além das aparências. Estar satisfeito é estar feliz.

Formada por milhares de pessoas em todo o Brasil e com representações nos Estados Unidos, México, Bolívia e Paraguai, a Racco acredita que cada ser humano tem uma beleza própria. Por isso, quer oferecer às pessoas o prazer de desfrutar desta beleza, oferecendo-lhe suas melhores inovações científicas. Os produtos Racco são produzidos com a emoção à flor da pele, com o despertar dos sentidos, resultando na harmonia entre corpo, alma e espírito. 

A beleza Racco é baseada no “ser feliz hoje” de maneira vibrante, generosa e multifacetada.

Name: Kimirica Hunter International
Description:
Kimirica Hunter International is an Indo-Canadian joint venture and India's largest hotel amenities manufacturer, serving 10K+ hotels in 40+ countries. Our iconic collections are 100% vegan, parabean-free, and made from natural actives and pure essential oils. 
We offer India's largest largest portfolio of iconic global brands and luxury amenities that cater to the unique needs of hotels worldwide putting guests at the heart of everything we do.

Name: Tropic Skincare
Description:
We’re on a mission to do good beyond beauty, leading the charge with clinically tested formulas that are both ethical and effective. We believe that with an Infinite Purpose, real change happens.

All of our products are freshly made in the UK using the most innovative, effective ingredients that nature has to offer.

Name: COSMED
Description: Cosmed was introduced in 2009 as a Turkish dermocosmetical brand of Ege Technology Chemicals,  with regards to the 27 years experience of Deren Chemicals. Cosmed offers scientific cosmetics  - only available in pharmacies - for different skin concerns and treatments for men and women of all ages in order to obtain health and beauty such as; anti hair loss treatment, skin care and anti aging products, anti blemish solutions, acne treatments, hair reducing solutions, anti cellulite solutions, sun protection, hand and foot care.

Name: RNB
Description:
RNB is a pharmaceutical-based global cosmetic laboratory, specialized in creating comprehensive and tailored solutions in the beauty sector, based on excellence, knowledge, and creativity.

We believe in a unique way of working. Our model is to create unique proposals together with our clients, connecting with people, generating market impact with a long-term vision.

Name: AB Parfums
Description:
AB Parfums, part of Give Back Beauty group, is a company with headquarters in Milan that works in the selective perfume and skincare & sun care sectors.  
It creates, develops and distributes worldwide the perfume lines of Trussardi, Laura Biagiotti, Angel Schlesser, Mandarina Duck, and Armand Basi and also Anne Möller skincare & sun care products. 
Letting the consumer dream through the magic and uniqueness of its products, developing a sustainable and responsible business model, is the mission of AB Parfums.  
In constant respect of the identity and uniqueness of each brand, AB Parfums creates fragrances and products for the care and protection of the skin, also paying great attention to design and communication, collaborating with major international talents in the sector. 
 
The company has branches in strategic markets such as Italy, Germany, Belgium, the Netherlands, Luxembourg, Austria, Switzerland, Spain, and Portugal and is run by professionals in the sector that breathes and transmits excellence made in Italy.

Name: MANSCAPED
Description: Founded by Paul Tran in 2016, San Diego, California-based MANSCAPED is the global men’s lifestyle consumer brand and male grooming category creator trusted by over 13 million men worldwide. The product range includes a diversified line of premium tools, formulations, and accessories designed to introduce and elevate a whole new self-care routine for men. MANSCAPED’s collection is available internationally in 39 countries at MANSCAPED.com, Amazon in more than 100 countries worldwide and in major retailers including Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Macy’s, Walgreens, Men’s Wearhouse, Jos. A. Bank, Military Exchanges, Tesco, Boots, Hairhouse, Woolworths and many more internationally.

Name: MERIT
Description:
Founded in 2021, MERIT is a modern beauty brand that simplifies what it takes to get ready.

Born out of an industry crowded with fleeting trends and products that demanded expert-level skills, MERIT was created as the antidote — a considered collection designed to bring ease to your everyday.

With a timeless perspective on beauty and a commitment to uncompromising quality, we create beauty and lifestyle essentials that become signatures of your routine — products you’ll reach for daily and live with for years to come.

MERIT is a global brand with teams in New York, Los Angeles, Toronto, London, and Paris.

Name: FIXDERMA INDIA PVT LTD
Description:
Established in 2010, Fixderma is dedicated to promoting healthy, problem-free skin through pioneering scientific solutions. Trusted by over 5 million satisfied customers and recommended by more than 15,000 dermatologists, we specialize in addressing a wide spectrum of skin and hair-related concerns.

We commit to innovation with over 200+ formulations to date, Each product being a result of rigorous in-house research and development conducted & produced at our advanced manufacturing facility in Neemrana, Rajasthan, boasting a production capacity of 7 metric tonnes. Our global footprint extends to 35+ countries, reflecting our dedication to delivering quality skincare solutions worldwide.

Name: Bella Aurora Labs S.A.
Description:
Bella Aurora Labs S.A. is a Spanish company specialized in cosmetic brands that offers products and services to respond to specific skin concerns.
 
With a people-focused business management model, Bella Aurora Labs has become one of the benchmarks in the European cosmetics market. Our mission statement—“We put our heart into our work to make you feel good. By serving, we improve.”— is the engine that drives the 270+ people who make up our customer-centric company.
 
Our flagship brand is Bella Aurora, a specialist in skin pigmentation since 1890 that aims to improve the lives of all people around the world who suffer from skin pigmentation issues. Bella Aurora laboratories, at the cutting edge of innovation and experts in melanocyte behaviour and its alterations, have developed specific patented formulas for hyperpigmentation and hypopigmentation of the skin. Our most recent launch, Repigment12, has been distinguished with the "Most Innovative Technology" award at the Beauty Innovation Days Awards. 
 
Bella Aurora Labs has a solid presence in Europe, Asia and the Americas, where we have established three subsidiaries (USA, Mexico and Brazil).
 
Notable brands within our portfolio, in addition to Bella Aurora, include Lullage, Mavala, Goldwell, John Frieda and Naturderma.

Welcome to Bella Aurora Labs!

Privacy Policy: http://bella-aurora-labs.com/en/politica-de-privacidad/

Name: First Aid Beauty
Description:
Skin can be unpredictable: sensitive, dry, dull or breaking out at the
worst possible time. First Aid Beauty is your first call for SOS
moments and every day. Because we don’t just soothe problems —
we solve them. So you can stop stressing about your skin and put
first things first: you.

Name: Bio In Company
Description: Follow our official page : NAOS (Bioderma - Institut Esthederm - Etat Pur) official page on LinkedIn

Name: PT Good Sale Tech
Description: Good Sale Tech was founded in 2019 in Indonesia, focusing in beauty industry. We have developed 9 brands and developed business in Indonesia, China, Korea, Malaysia, Vietnam and Philipina.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BASE, Indonesia
Description: At BASE, we believe every individual is unique, just like their skin. Our mission is to empower everyone to achieve their best beauty experience and feel confident in their own skin. We create vegan beauty products using biotechnology and ECOCERT-certified ingredients, ensuring they are safe, effective, and 100% vegan. As a pioneer in the local vegan beauty industry, BASE resonates deeply with Gen Z and Millennials, elevating the beauty experience in Indonesia through our direct-to-consumer and omnichannel platform. Join us in revolutionizing beauty standards with sustainability and authenticity at our core.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Lush Cosmetics España
Description:
¿Qué es Lush?

Lush es una empresa que vende cosmética fresca y hecha a mano en 49 países del mundo. Esta sería una frase que describe de manera simple y general lo que somos, pero para poder llegar ahí, hay que ver que se esconde detrás de palabras como cosmética, fresca, hecha a mano….

En Lush creemos en muchas cosas pero las más importantes quedan resumidas así: 

Creemos en una cosmética rica en ingredientes de alta calidad procedentes de las más diversas fuentes alrededor del mundo. Estos ingredientes se cultivan y trabajan con amor, y a las personas y a la tierra se las trata con justicia. 

Creemos en la palabra frescura, porque confiamos plenamente en todos los beneficios que eso nos aporta. 

Creemos en el hecho a mano. Por eso encontraras en cada uno de nuestros productos quién lo ha hecho y cuando. 

Creemos en uno de nuestros principios básicos como empresa y es la de crear productos maravillosos que dañen lo mínimo al medio ambiente y no testen en animales. Para eso usamos la innovación, para crear productos con cero embalaje que convenzan a nuestros clientes de que una nueva cosmética desnuda es posible. Luchamos cada día para encontrar alternativas que demuestren que una cosmética libre de crueldad animal es posible. Tanto confiamos en esto que no trabajamos con ningún proveedor que si lo haga.

Cada producto Lush tiene una historia detrás, que empieza con el nombre del producto y acaba con la de nuestros clientes.

Si, somos un empresa que vende cosmética fresca y hecha a mano. Y eso es algo que nos encanta!

Name: Al Haramain Perfumes
Description:
THE COMPANY

Al Haramain Perfumes is a perfume manufacturing and retailing company based in the UAE. Founded in 1970, the company has grown to become an internationally acclaimed perfume brand with a large and growing network of exclusive retail stores for its exquisite range of brands.

PRODUCTS

Al Haramain boasts of a wide range of perfumes to meet every fragrance taste, from pure and concentrated fragrance oils and eau de parfum, to deodorant sprays, incense (bakhoor) and agarwood (oud). Al Haramain is proud to have some of the most precious perfumes in the world such as the Al Haramain 'Empress of Perfumes' collection, the Al Haramain 'Majestic collection' and the Al Haramain Exclusive Collection. Visit www.alharamainperfumes.com/products to view more of our products. 

CERTIFICATIONS

Al Haramain demonstrates its commitment to the highest global quality standards and to the best manufacturing practices. The company is ISO 9001:2008 (QMS) and ISO 22716:2007 (GMP) certified, and produces its exquisite range of fragrances from its 180,000 sq. ft. state-of-the-art manufacturing facility equipped with ultra-modern machinery in the UAE. With such a strong commitment and dedication to quality, and to its valued customers, Al Haramain will continue to grow and achieve its vision to be a world leader in fine perfumery. 

LOCATIONS

Al Haramain Perfumes has exclusive retail stores in Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Bahrain, Singapore, Malaysia, Bangladesh, the UK and the USA. Al Haramain also has a network of distributors in many other parts of the world. To view our locations, please visit www.alharamainperfumes.com/storelocator

Name: Thrive Causemetics Inc.
Description:
We’re Changing the Beauty Industry for Good.

Thrive Causemetics was born out of a friendship. Makeup artist and product developer, Karissa Bodnar, lost her dear friend Kristy to cancer at just 24 years old. Kristy’s compassionate and vivacious spirit inspired Karissa to establish Thrive Causemetics, a beauty brand and philosophy that goes beyond skin deep by empowering women.
Thrive Causemetics is Bigger Than Beauty: For every product you purchase, we donate to help a woman thrive. We believe changing the world starts with a single ingredient, and that’s why we create vegan, 100% cruelty-free formulas containing proven ingredients without the use of parabens or sulfates. All of our high-performance cosmetics are developed at Thrive Causemetics Lab—we control every step of the product development process, and a large part of it involves you.

Name: GAES
Description:
En GAES, una marca Amplifon, nos suena muy bien ayudar a las personas a redescubrir las emociones del sonido y transformar vidas en todo el mundo.

Lo hacemos posible cada día, amplificando su mundo... y también trabajamos para amplificar el de nuestro talento y el tuyo.  

¿Cómo lo logramos?
AMPLIFICANDO tus oportunidades de crecimiento, liderazgo y desarrollo internacional, dentro de una cultura basada en el respeto, el bienestar y la cercanía.

Con presencia en 26 países, más de 10.000 centros auditivos y un equipo global de más de 20.000 personas (2.000 en España), seguimos creciendo con un propósito claro: AMPLIFICAR la vida de las más de 700.000 personas que ya confían en GAES.

Y también seguimos AMPLIFICANDO nuestro compromiso con la inclusión y la diversidad. Damos la bienvenida a todas las personas por igual, independientemente de su género, edad, origen étnico, orientación sexoafectiva o capacidades. Queremos que nuestro equipo se sienta empoderado y aporte su visión única.

¿Quieres amplificar tu vida? ¿Quieres amplificar tu propósito?
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beautylish
Description:
Beautylish exists to find exceptional products, tell the inspiring stories behind them, and deliver them with thoughtfulness. We believe an amazing customer experience is driven by a personal relationship with our customers.
--
Beautylish was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to create a community where beauty lovers could share their collective beauty wisdom. People loved it, and our community grew to hundreds of thousands in a few short months.

Beautylish rapidly became a valuable resource for the discovery of beauty products, but the experience was incomplete because we weren't able to assist our members in purchasing the amazing products they loved. This led us to launch our own ecommerce presence in 2012. In the 10 years since, we've grown to partner with over 100 brands and ship to customers in over 50 countries around the world while continuing to launch service innovations.

We're still in the early part of our journey. There are so many more stories to tell and relationships to build. We hope that you join us as our story unfolds!

Name: Merci Handy
Description:
Merci Handy is an everyday cosmetic brand.

Our vision is to provide easy to use, lifestyle and disruptive cosmetics to the world. 
We have many ideas but a single mission : deliver the best, simplest & honest skin products ever.

Merci Handy propose des cosmétiques du quotidien, simples et sincères.

Notre vision est de présenter des produits beaux et exceptionnels au monde. 
Nos recettes sont simples. On y ajoute juste une pointe d'humour et beaucoup d'amour. 
Nous avons pleins d'idées mais une seule mission :

Offrir la meilleure expérience que vous n'ayez jamais eue.

We're hiring talents :

WE LOOK FOR: Crazily talented startup/business people looking to build a worldwide company
PROFILE: Strong curiosity and huge energy, from top executive to junior and intern
MISSION: Help us to boost revenue with the most advanced business strategies

Check out : http://bit.ly/2doQd4V

Apply @ Hello@mercihandy.fr

Name: Provital
Description:
At Provital, we believe that taking care is taking action.

We take care when we act. A caress, a smile, a simple gesture of kindness, the blooming of a flower.

Any small change for a better living. Taking care is the force that moves us forward.

It is also our commitment to people, communities and our planet. We care and take action for them.

We care by combining nature and science to capture the essence of the Earth on our high-quality products.

We care by partnering with our clients and co-creating with them to meet their needs.

We care by anticipating trends to create the latest formulations, working with agility and effectiveness.

We care by inspiring our clients and motivating our teams to keep growing together.

And because we take care, we create natural ingredients that spread positive emotions and allow every person to find their own way to express their beauty.

Provital.

Do Care.

Name: Avon Italy
Description:
Avon è molto più di un’azienda cosmetica – è una realtà globale che sostiene le donne.  

Per più di 130 anni Avon ha aiutato le donne di tutto il mondo, offrendo loro un’opportunità di indipendenza economica.  

Fondata nel 1886, molto prima che le donne avessero il diritto di voto negli Stati Uniti, da pionieri del women’s empowerment.  La mission di Avon oggi come allora è quella di promuove la realizzazione della donna. 

Come dipendente Avon avrai l’opportunità di rafforzare le tue abilità lavorando accanto ad un team di persone appassionate e talentuose. Farai parte di un'azienda che costantemente porta sul mercato prodotti innovativi e di successo, attraverso marchi amati come ANEW, Avon True, Avon Care, Skin-So-Soft e Advance Techniques. 

Sarai orgoglioso di fare parte di un’azienda cosmetica che pone l’attenzione su tematiche che sono di vitale importanza per le donne di tutto il mondo.  

La violenza di genere e la lotta contro il tumore al seno sono due temi per cui Avon si batte ogni giorno con l’obiettivo di migliorare la vita delle donne di tutto il mondo.  

Avon, anche grazie al supporto di 6 milioni di presentatrici nel mondo, è riuscita a sensibilizzare 30 milioni di persone sulla violenza domestica e 180 milioni di donne su sintomi e tecniche di prevenzione per combattere il tumore al seno offrendo 20 milioni di screening gratuiti. 

Grazie a 20 anni di Avon running, Avon Italia ha raccolto e donato più di 1 milione di euro.  

La sede italiana di Avon Cosmetics è arrivata in Italia nel 1966 e si è stabilita ad Olgiate Comasco (CO).  Oggi la sede commerciale è a Turate (CO), dal 2009 le funzioni logistiche hanno sede ad Anagni (FR). 

Se sei una persona che crede nella bellezza in ogni sua forma e nell’importanza dell’impegno sociale, unisciti a noi e diventa parte di un’azienda che crea valore e valori, facendo la differenza nella vita delle donne di tutto il mondo.

Name: Grupo Ei Beleza
Description:
Ei, beleza?

Somos o Grupo Ei Beleza responsável pela inovação no mercado de beleza! Desenvolvemos e produzimos os produtos das marcas Hidratei, Beleza Brasileira, Rizu, Limpatinha, Xô Bafinho e entre outros. 

Criamos cosméticos para solucionar dores reais, tudo isso com muita tecnologia, carinho e foco no cliente. Cosméticos são ótimos, mas melhor ainda é fazer o bem e se sentir linda, por isso nosso nome não é uma pergunta, mas sim uma afirmação. Ei, Beleza? Sim, e ela é toda sua!

Estamos no top 3 dos maiores e-commerces de beleza do país e nossa visão é ser uma das maiores empresas de cosméticos do mundo. 

Conheça nossas marcas e apaixone-se!

Name: Kiehl's Since 1851
Description: Kiehl's is an American cosmetics brand retailer that specializes in skin, hair, and body care products. It started as a single pharmacy in Manhattan at Third Avenue and East 13th Street in 1851. Kiehl's is distinguished for its unorthodox marketing approach, exceptionally large male clientele base, and its products' simple and straightforward packaging.

Name: SPLAT Global
Description:
We're a wellness company, developing natural oral care, home, hair, skin care and health supplemental products. Touching the lives of consumers in over 70 countries already, we aim to make 1 billion people around the world healthier and happier. 

What started as a global pioneer of natural, eco-friendly oral care in the year 2000, today is the leading oral brand in several Eastern European countries, and is one the most rapidly growing innovative oral care brands in EMEA and APAC regions impacting the lives of ~70 millions of customers.

If you're looking for a place, where you can live by bigger goals, make someone's life better every day, all while remaining yourself at work – we'd like to hear from you. Regardless of where you currently live, visit our career page, get in touch and we would be able to have a representative of our global HR team respond to your shortly.

Name: Barry M Beauty
Description:
Barry M was founded in 1982 and is now the UK's leading colour cosmetics brand. Based in Mill Hill, North London, Barry M is famous for creating collections that are affordable, innovative and on-trend. 

Barry M products are available throughout the UK in Boots, Superdrug and top online stores. Via BarryM.com, the company ships products to customers around the world.

Barry M is a supporter of 'Be Cruelty Free', has been a cruelty free company since its foundation and is now 100% Vegan.

For more information visit: www.Barrym.com.

Name: Beauty Success Group
Description:
Beauty Success Group is a family adventure in which franchise partners, employees, customers and suppliers take part in the same dynamics and on the basis of common values. 

Philippe and Christophe are following in the footsteps of their mother, Nicole Georges, and are developing the group's eight brands by mobilizing talents and expertise in a shared entrepreneurial spirit. 

Thanks to the enthusiasm of all the group's dynamic forces, Beauty Success Group has become the French leader in franchising in the beauty and well-being sector.


TIMELINE 

1995
Opening of the 1st Beauty Success perfumery in Périgueux.

2000
Philippe Georges becomes President of Beauty Success and opens its 100th store in France.

2004
Inauguration of the first international store (Morocco).

2005
Launch of the logistics platform.

2007
Launch of the Beauty Success corporate brand.

2012
Development of the "Global beauty" concept.

2013
Launch of the Beauty Success Institute concept.

2016
Takeover of Esthetic Center by Beauty Success, which becomes Beauty Success Group, marketing 5 brands.
Launch of the new group logistics platform in Saint Astier (24).

2017
Development of "Nicole - Maison Nicole Georges" concept and opening of the first boutique in Périgueux. 
Beauty Success opens its 20th store abroad. 

2019
The group becomes the majority shareholder of Beauty One Paris and provides a fitness and slimming program. 
Inauguration of Beauty Success outlets in Georgia and Mongolia. 

2022
Integration of the Citron Vert network (beauty salons).
The group strengthens its natural products and skincare line with the integration of the brands Pur Eden (organic skincare) and Les Senteurs Gourmandes (natural perfumes).

Name: avlon
Description:
Avlon is where the magic of science  meets the art of style , creating haircare products as unique as every individual. 

Avlon's portfolio boasts the revolutionary brands - As I Am, KeraCare, Uberliss, Affirm, FiberGuard, Texture Release, Ferm, and MoisturColor. 

Born from endless creativity and passion for innovation, these brands are changing the hair game one strand at a time. 

Avlon believes every hair strand deserves the royal treatment . Using a unique blend of high-tech science  and Mother Nature's best , Avlon ensures everyone's hair gets to shine its brightest. 

But Avlon isn't just about creating products; it's about revolutionizing haircare. With a mission to highlight the beauty in every curl, wave, and straight strand, Avlon empowers everyone to strut their stuff with confidence.

Name: BYROE
Description: BYROE is Upcycled Superfood Infused Skincare crafted with vegan and cruelty free ingredients.

Name: Laboratoires VENUS SAPECO
Description:
C’est en 1981 que l’entreprise est née, Laboratoires VENUS /SAPECO (société algérienne de produits d’entretiens) entreprise familiale fondée par Mr Mourad MOULA actuel président Directeur Général.
Présente depuis plus de 40 ans sur le marché Algérien, les laboratoires venus développent leur expertise autour d’une politique d’innovation et de mise à niveau permanente pour offrir aux consommateurs des produits de qualité au meilleur prix.
Avec leur expertise, Les Laboratoires Vénus œuvrent pour la satisfaction des consommateurs en les mettant au centre de ses intérêts et ce, grâce à un développement d’activité visant la préservation de l’environnement naturel, la santé et la sécurité de ses consommateurs mais aussi de son équipe.
La science de la mesure chez Laboratoires Venus
Il est nécessaire pour chaque entreprise, d'assurer une vérification permanente de ses équipements de mesure. C’est le cas des laboratoires Venus qui ont créé en 2014 un laboratoire métrologique offrant des services en interne ainsi qu’en externe. Ce dernier, fait appel à des références pour contrôler régulièrement les moyens et instruments de mesure.
En effet, l'utilisation d'instruments dont les indications sont erronées, fait courir à l'entreprise des risques importants.

Name: Life Beauty Corporation
Description:
Somos Life Beauty Corporation, una empresa peruana dedicada a la fabricación y comercialización de productos para el cuidado personal.

Con más de 35 años en el mercado nacional e internacional, Life comparte la belleza de estar siempre presentes en momento de la vida de nuestros clientes, a través de productos innovadores que cumplen altos estándares de calidad.

Tenemos en los más de 500 colaboradores nuestro principal activo, lo que los convierte en embajadores de nuestra marca.


* MISIÓN
Cuidar la belleza única de cada persona y en todo momento, a través de productos innovadores y de alta calidad.

* VISIÓN
Liderar el mercado latinoamericano de cuidado capilar y belleza a través de la innovación de productos.

*PROPÓSITO
Acompañar y cuidar los momentos más importantes en la vida de las personas.

Name: SARBEC COSMETICS
Description:
Sarbec Cosmetics is the largest independent, family-owned cosmetic group in France. 

For over 45 years it designs, manufactures and sells a wide range of cosmetics, perfumes and wipes. 
Our researchers have always developped products with the same goal: providing safe products using the latest innovations.

The group now gathers 550 employees and sells over 115 countries worldwide.


BRANDS: .......................................Corine de Farme, C. de Farme, Institut Phyto, Jacomo, Aseptonet
LICENCES: ....................................Disney, Marvel, Miss France
PRIVATE LABELS:.........................Monoprix, Carrefour, Leclerc, Auchan, ...
BtoB MANUFACTURING:.............Laboratoire Sarbec, Felt
EXCLUSIVE DISTRIBUTION:......Brumisateur Evian


Do not hesitate to visit our websites.

Name: UKLASH
Description:
UKLASH offers effective and affordable products for longer, thicker and healthier lashes, brows and hair. 

We've reimagined beauty, simplifying lash, brow and hair growth essentials so you can achieve more with less. Our range is infused with vitamins, peptides and strengthening extracts to nourish and strengthen your lashes, brows and hair from the root to the tip.

Welcome to a world where your natural beauty takes centre stage.

Name: KraveBeauty | Certified B Corp
Description:
KraveBeauty was founded by beauty influencer, Liah Yoo, to #PressReset on the way we think about skincare. KraveBeauty's mission is to humanize the beauty industry for the people and the planet to create a more sustainable and equitable world. KraveBeauty seeks to inspire the industry to press reset on every harmful industry norm and prioritize stakeholder capitalism over shareholder capitalism through its #SlowDownSkincare campaign and its venture studio, PressResetVentures.

KraveBeauty is a Certified B-Corp, Climate Neutral Certified, Plastic Neutral Certified, and members of 1% for the Planet and the U.S. Plastics Pact

Keep in touch:
https://kravebeauty.com/
https://www.instagram.com/kravebeauty/
https://www.tiktok.com/@kravebeauty
https://www.youtube.com/kravebeauty

General questions? hello@kravebeauty.com
Press? press@kravebeauty.com

Name: GMEELAN
Description: Aim to be the global founder and leader in repairing dull skin with natural plant extracts
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: GROUPE ARTHES
Description:
THE ARTHES GROUP
Established since 1978 in the heart of the Bois de Grasse, the Arthes group is creator of quality perfumes and cosmetics at competitive prices. All the products are made in the purest french tradition in partnership with the Master perfumers from Grasse. The Arthes group coordinates all the steps for the birth of a perfume : from the concept to the finished product, through the promotion and distribution of the products.
The Arthes group is one of the French leaders in the mass market sector with its 4 brands and has created its Private Label Division, offering turnkey perfumed products to brands.

OUR GOALS
• Convey the authentic values of a family business, who has been creating perfumes for over 40 years.
• Increase our innovation dynamic, which represents already more than 20 novelties per year.

OUR STRENGHTS
• Perfumes and cosmetics facilities in Grasse, the perfume world capital.
• Creativity, innovation and flexibility thanks to our unit of experts :
The R&D, the production, the marketing and design departments and the GMS France and export sales teams, are working together for the development of innovative perfumes and cosmetics of quality, all made in France.
• A Private Label Division created to propose made to measure cosmetics and perfumes.
• A competitive price positioning.
• An international presence.

Name: Algenist
Description: ALGENIST was born from biotechnology, the innovative green science respecting nature, to uncover the limitless potential of algae. Alguronic Acid, ALGENIST’s patented and exclusive star ingredient is naturally sourced and sustainably produced and used in every single ALGENIST formula to boost the performance and benefits. Alguronic Acid is the fuel in the power of our performance. We promise to deliver only innovative and efficacious formulas that are vegan and safe for measured and visible skin transformation in 10 days – no compromise.

Name: Jeffree Star Cosmetics
Description: Jeffree Star Cosmetics is a cosmetic company that manufactures and sells makeup, skincare, and nail color products. They also offer personal care product manufacturing services and provide online shopping for a variety of beauty and cosmetic items. The company focuses on a range of products including skincare bundles, makeup for eyes, face, and lips, as well as fashion accessories. Jeffree Star Cosmetics is known for its diverse product offerings in the beauty industry.

Name: Skinfix
Description:
Skinfix is a leading skincare brand founded by a beauty industry veteran, backed by Stride Consumer Partners, and supported by a Scientific Advisory Board of top dermatologists. We create clean, clinical formulas that target the root causes of stubborn—and often connected—skin concerns. Because we know skincare isn’t the only thing you think about, each product is designed to deliver high-impact results—so you can simplify your routine and still see powerful, visible improvements daily.

Launched in 2019 as the first brand at Sephora to prioritize barrier health, Skinfix has built a devoted following among both skincare pros and newcomers. We’re proud to be recognized year after year by the industry’s most trusted voices—with 10+ Allure Best of Beauty Awards and accolades from Byrdie, Cosmopolitan, Oprah Daily, WWD, ELLE, Women’s Health, BeautyMatter, and more.

Our formulas are built from the ground up with vetted actives, custom-developed textures, and zero shortcuts. We avoid ingredients known to irritate skin, clog pores, or harm the environment—and we meet top global standards, including those set by the EU and Canada. Start spending less time worrying about your skin, and more time living confidently in it.

Name: Dermalogica UK
Description:
Whoever said beauty is only skin deep had the right idea, as far as Dermalogica is concerned. Founded by Jane Wurwand in 1986, Dermalogica continues to dominate the professional skin care industry with distribution in over 90 countries. 

From day one at Dermalogica, you’ll find a common purpose linking every employee: bringing respect and success to the professional skin therapist through top-quality education, innovative products and outstanding customer service. We focus on skin health and products that truly deliver, not false "beauty" claims or miracle cures.

Our industry is full of women entrepreneurs who choose only Dermalogica products to use professionally and sell in their business. They’re all trusting and partnering with you to help them reach the highest level of success in this industry.

Dermalogica is the leader of an industry that affords more women the opportunity to own their own businesses than any other, and we’ve seen first-hand the positive impact that women entrepreneurs have on their local economies, communities and families. In celebration of this, our FITE (Financial Independence Through Entrepreneurship) program invests in future women entrepreneurs through business up-skilling, microfinance and thought leadership around the world.

Name: NOTE Cosmétique
Description:
Note Cosmetique is a global beauty brand which was launched in 2014 with the expertise of international professionals to make our consumers all around the world to feel good and confident in expressing their own unique beauty. 

As a global brand, we feature a full make-up range over 600 Sku’s, with the goal of catering to a wide range of skin types and tones. We have the same passion for quality and safety to offer you the best. Therefore, we apply high quality standards covering full control&checks on every step of product development process, from sourcing of raw material and packaging to production and storage at our factory. All our products are dermatologically and opthalmologically tested, GMP, ISO, HALAL, PETA cruelty-free certified and registered according to EU standards.

We believe that all ages, all genders, all cultures have their own unique beauty. We want our consumers to embrace their own beauty and notice all beauties surrounding them. 

#NoteThatBeauty

For more information about NOTE Cosmétique and its products, visit the brand’s website at https://www.notecosmetique.com/

Name: Skin Club - Cosmetic Doctors
Description: Skin Club’s clinical studio is located on chapel street, Melbourne. Our Doctors are able to perform non surgical procedures in a cosy environment.

Name: LESSONIA
Description:
Founded in 2002, LESSONIA is a French company specialized in the custom manufacture of ingredients and cosmetic product for brands and cosmetic  industry. Since 2002, LESSONIA is daily committed to create positive impact on its environment and ecosystem thanks to a CSR policy, rewarded serveral times. 

Thanks to its know-how, production capacity and products quality, LESSONIA became the European Leader for sheet masks manufaturing and a major player in the raw material manufacturing (exfoliant, micronized powder, extracts, natural and marine active ingredients...). Also, LESSONIA has acquired a true expertise in cosmetic in powder. 

As an OEM manufacturer, LESSONIA designs different cosmetic products for brands and cosmetic industrie : masks, peel-off, sheet masks, cleansing milk, lotions, serums, creams, gels, scrubs, wraps, massage oils and honeys, bath products...Thanks to a full-service offer, LESSONIA is able to support brands from the brief to their product's delivery. 

As an expert in ingredients manufacturing and as a raw materials supplier, LESSONIA designs exfoliants, decorative particles, micronised powder, active ingredients, extracts, marine actives ingredients

Description:

and everyday care essentials that make self-styling easy, accessible, and
empowering.

As 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮’𝘀 𝗡𝗼.𝟭 𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗛𝗮𝗶𝗿 𝗦𝘁𝘆𝗹𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗯𝘀, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗕𝗿𝘂𝘀𝗵𝗲𝘀, we serve all

 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗚𝗶𝗳𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗩𝗘𝗚𝗔
Looking for elegant and meaningful gifting solutions?
Choose VEGA’s curated product kits, the perfect blend of style, utility, and

Name: SEREKO
Description:
Indias 1st Psychodermatology Brand
Taking 'Beauty from within' a step forward with holistic & mind-first approach 
Patent-pending formula NeuroCalm
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoire Native Italia S.p.A
Description:
LABORATOIRE NATIVE è un polo cosmetico internazionale che riunisce i brand Lierac, Phyto e Roger&Gallet, marchi dall’offerta completa e complementare. “Native” perché per guardare al futuro dei brand bisogna sempre attingere dalle loro origini, dalle loro radici per dare loro ogni giorno una nuova vita in linea con le aspettative dei consumatori, senza mai negare il loro DNA. I nostri marchi nascono tutti da persone visionarie nella loro professione, sono stati tutti creati attingendo dal mondo vegetale con metodi di produzione che combinano naturalità ed efficacia. La nostra mission è quella di continuare a far RINASCERE ogni giorno questi savoir-faire. Patrick Alès creatore della fitoterapia e della tecnica di estrazione vegetale. Il Dottor Cariel, medico estetico, che ha sviluppato fin dall’origine i suoi prodotti a base di piante come l’iconico Phytolastil. Roger & Gallet che hanno creato i loro profumi distillando piante e soprattutto fiori.
 Per il gruppo, la formulazione di prodotti a base di piante non è un fine, ma l’unico mezzo per realizzare prodotti naturalmente efficaci. Una vera e propria NATURA ATTIVA.

Name: PT L'Essential
Description:
Berpengalaman lebih dari 15 tahun, PT L’Essential adalah produsen skincare dan kosmetik yang menyediakan jasa maklon berstandar BPOM dan bersertifikasi halal.

Dilengkapi dengan fasilitas pabrik yang bersih dan modern dengan teknologi terkini dan staff yang profesional, kami siap memberikan solusi sesuai kebutuhan bisnis kosmetik klien kami, mulai dari formulasi produk, supervisi proses produksi, hingga registrasi BPOM dengan sertifikasi halal dari MUI.

Name: Atelier Rebul
Description:
Founded 130 years ago in Beyoğlu as Turkey's first pharmacy, Rebul has been creating special products and formulas in its own laboratories to meet the health and beauty needs of millions of customers in the most vibrant area of Istanbul ever since.

Re-interpreted with more than 126 years of experience and heritage, Rebul, now with its ATELIER REBUL Stores, processes the purity of nature with an artist's sensitivity and brings together beauty and health with scientific expertise, through its knowledge and experience for generations.

ATELIER REBUL is pleased to offer you the purest solutions of the past, in the most modern and high-quality form, as it has been for 126 years...

Name: Perfumerias Rouge
Description:
Perfumerías Rouge es la cadena minorista de fragancias de lujo número 1 en Argentina. Tenemos más de 150 consultores de fragancias y cosméticos, enfocados en cumplir con los requisitos de las marcas y los objetivos de ventas, y 36 puntos de venta, todos ellos ubicados estratégicamente en nuestro país.

Si deseas saber más acerca de Rouge, podés visitar nuestro sitio web, donde podés encontrar toda la información sobre nuestros puntos de venta y comercio electrónico.

Name: Deborah Group
Description:
The leading name in Italian cosmetics, Deborah Group cherishes the belief that beauty should be a pleasure for all women. 
The Group's roots date back to the turn of the 20th century, acquiring extensive experience in the pharmaceutical and cosmetic sector. The brand's international popularity first blossomed in the 1930s, with Diadermine, the favourite beauty cream of the era's screen goddesses.

Relentless monitoring of fashion trends, rigorous research and the adoption of the most advanced technologies: this is the secret behind the company's steady stream of innovative, superior quality cosmetic products.

The versatility of Group’s range reveals itself in different cosmetic areas, moving deftly among make-up  and skin care:
Deborah Milano, since 1962 specializes in make-up and kits. Design, glamour and Made In Italy are the elements that characterize Deborah Milano.
Deborah Milano extension linea: Deborah Bioetyc, the skin care brand with totally natural formulas which guarantee scientifically tested results. Deborah Nailspace is the range of professional products for nails
Dermolab, the new face treatment line formulated with patented active ingredients that actually lower the biological age of skin.
Debby, the play&dream make-up range for today’s spunky and talented teens, and Rouge Baiser, the  historical make-up brand founded in 1927. René Gruau created the logo of the "Femme au Bandeau"  which continues to be the renowned symbol of the brand. This refined brand is aimed at sophisticated, elegant women.  
HC-High Tech Cosmetics  completes the Deborah Group portfolio, the brand unites high technology formulas with  extraordinary proved product  performances, in terms of visible results and in terms of time.

A family business from the start, now at the forth generation, the Group is now present in over 50 Countries and boasts a widespread distribution in Europe  running its own operations in Italy (Deborah Italia) and Spain (Deborah Iberica).

Name: Pearl West
Description:
PearlWest acquires, builds, and scales high-growth consumer brands.

We partner with brands at key inflection points—whether during founder transition, rapid scaling, or operational reset. Our portfolio includes both acquired brands and brands we’ve built from the ground up, all supported by our in house infrastructure and experienced team. 

We’re a lean, driven group of builders, operators, and brand obsessives with a shared passion for scaling what matters.

At the intersection of finance, creativity, product development, supply chain, consumer insight & channel expansion, our team combines analytical rigor with startup energy to grow a portfolio of high-performing CPG brands. 

Our leadership comes from diverse backgrounds—marketing, M&A, brand strategy, omnichannel growth united by one thing: an execution-first mindset.  Strategy is nothing without momentum, and we believe speed, testing, and relentless improvement are what set good brands apart from great ones.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MuscleBlaze
Description:
MuscleBlaze is India’s leading bodybuilding and sports nutrition supplement brand piloting the path of the fitness industry with a revolutionary dawn since 2012. With legendary authenticity, innovation and iconicity, the house of MuscleBlaze has now gained international fame and accolades from across the globe.  

Our LinkedIn company page is about bringing you all the exciting BTS, greatest influencer onboarding, awards that matter and employees that vouch for MuscleBlaze to be the most sporty, aspirational space to work at!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Elsie Santé
Description:
Elsie est une enseigne créée par et pour les pharmaciens (membre de la fédération du commerce associé - FCA)
C'est un tremplin pour les pharmaciens de plus de 5M€ qui ont la volonté de conserver leur autonomie tout en tirant profit de la force du réseau. 
Les pharmaciens s'impliquent et prennent des responsabilités, y mettent leurs idées, leurs compétences au service de tous.
Au sein d'Elsie, il existe une véritable culture de l'échange, de l'entraide, de la transparence et de la collaboration.
Rejoindre Elsie, c'est posséder un nom commercial, une marque, de nombreux outils et services...C'est bénéficier d'une politique d'enseigne, d'un concept commercial, d'un "repère mental" pour les patients/clients.

CHIFFRES CLES DE L'ENSEIGNE : 

#  235 Pharmacies
#  1100 clients par jour en moyenne par pharmacie

Name: Pierre Cattier SAS
Description:
A l'origine de la création de Cattier se trouve un ingrédient naturel extraordinaire aux multiples vertus : l'Argile. Dès 1968, un homme perçoit toutes les richesses et les bienfaits de cette "Terre de Beauté" et décide d'en faire profiter le plus grand nombre. 

Riche de ce précieux patrimoine, la marque renforce ensuite son expertise en matière de cosmétologie naturelle en développant toute une offre de produits naturels et, dès le début des années 2000, se positionne comme l'un des pionniers de la Cosmétique Bio.

Expert de la Beauté Naturelle depuis plus de 45 ans, Cattier est une marque incontournable du marché des cosmétiques bio. Faire profiter aux consommateurs des richesses et des bienfaits de la nature sans jamais lui nuire, c’est l’engagement que Cattier respecte au quotidien.

Plébiscités par les familles et régulièrement primés par les spécialistes de la cosmétique bio, les produits de soin et d’hygiène Cattier allient qualité, efficacité et plaisir d’utilisation.



At the origin of the creation of Cattier is an extraordinary natural ingredient with multiple virtues: Clay. In 1968, a man, Pierre Cattier, perceived all the richness and benefits of this "Earth of Beauty" and decided to allow the most people possible to benefit from this.

Rich in this precious heritage, the brand then reinforced its expertise in the area of natural cosmetology, by developing a whole range of natural products, and since the early 2000s, Cattier has positioned itself as one of the pioneers of organic cosmetics.

Natural Beauty expert for more than 45 years, Cattier is a key brand on the organic cosmetics market. Since 1968, Cattier has been committed to bringing consumers all the richness and benefits of nature, without harming it.

Combining quality and results, and a pleasure to use, Cattier care and hygiene products are trusted by families and regularly receive awards from organic cosmetics specialists.

Name: Hunca Cosmetics
Description:
HUNCA since 1957…

HUNCA Corporate Scent… Gives Meaning To Memories… Gives Us Inspiration… 
 
The start of the ‘scented’ journey was given by Adnan Hunca in 1957 and the knowledge was inherited from generation to generation which made HUNCA the expert on scents and provided the corporate identity it has today. HUNCA acts with the awareness of how important it is to have an individual presence, a unique style and scent of one’s own in the modern world. As a pioneer HUNCA represents this cultural heritage and through the long-established and successful brands such as Jagler, Caldion, Viva Cappio, She, Equal, Extory, Thorne, Moments and Promise&Irony it has given a magic touch in different stages of everybody’s lives.

The basic principle of HUNCA is to let the customer have the highest quality with best price and the kind of unique service that is rendered guarantees that. After 60 years of experience HUNCA Cosmetics has expanded aboard by means of making the most of modern technology. 

By keeping the product range wide and improving the contents all of the brands have the ability to affect. And HUNCA continues to give life to new brands which become the sources of the Turkish scent culture. 


HUNCA, with its new organizational structure and brands, wishes to increase its power further in domestic market and to move its experience and success to the export markets also.

www.hunca.com/en
www.facebook.com/HuncaCosmetic

Name: Mary Kay do Brasil
Description:
Mary Kay Ash fundou a sua marca de beleza dos sonhos no Texas, em 1963, com um objetivo: enriquecer a vida das mulheres. Esse sonho transformou-se numa empresa global com oportunidades ilimitadas para fazer algo bonito para as pessoas em todo o mundo, e dentro da nossa própria companhia não é diferente. 
Seguindo esse legado, há mais de 25 anos no Brasil e 60 anos no mundo, a Mary Kay tem se dedicado com sucesso a oferecer produtos irresistíveis e a oportunidade de um negócio independente para milhares de mulheres ao redor do mundo. A companhia, uma das maiores de vendas diretas do mundo e presente em cerca de 35 países, tem em seu portfólio: fragrâncias, produtos de cuidados com a pele desenvolvidos com a mais alta tecnologia e maquiagens inspiradoras.
O papel fundamental dos colaboradores da Mary Kay do Brasil é servir as necessidades de beleza dos nossos clientes e apoiar as necessidades dos membros da nossa querida e incrível Força de Vendas Independente, que trabalham com a Mary Kay como profissionais com carreira independente, vendendo os maravilhosos produtos Mary Kay diretamente aos seus clientes.
O sucesso a longo prazo da Mary Kay foi possível graças à nossa cultura corporativa única, orientada para as pessoas, e a um impulso contínuo para a inovação, por isso o time de colaboradores da Mary Kay do Brasil atuam com amor para enriquecer a vida das mulheres a cada dia.
Se você quer fazer parte de uma empresa com valores sólidos e na qual o empoderamento feminino é o principal pilar e com muitas oportunidades de desenvolvimento, acesse o link abaixo e nos ajude na missão de enriquecer a vida das mulheres você também.

Name: Association COSMED
Description:
REJOIGNEZ le 1er réseau d’entreprises de la filière cosmétique en France.

Créée en 2000, l’Association Professionnelle Cosmed est née de la volonté de TPE-PME d’être représentées et entendues par les autorités françaises et européennes en charge du secteur cosmétique.

adhérer à Cosmed, c’est :
- INTÉGRER UN RÉSEAU qui favorise les relations entre tous les acteurs de l’industrie cosmétique.
Cosmed fédère 1010 entreprises représentant l’ensemble des métiers du secteur cosmétique : marques propres, façonniers, fournisseurs d’ingrédients, laboratoires d’expertise et de tests, consultant, formation …
Composée à 80% de PME, Cosmed est un acteur incontournable du secteur cosmétique.

- ÊTRE SOUTENU ET REPRÉSENTÉ en France, en Europe et à l'international auprès des autorités en charge de la filière cosmétique.
Les contributions et prises de positions règlementaires et scientifiques de Cosmed sont reconnues internationalement contribuant ainsi à l’élaboration d’un cadre réglementaire permettant la mise sur le marché de produits cosmétiques sûrs et respectant l'environnement.

- BÉNÉFICIER D’UN ACCOMPAGNEMENT CONCRET, à coûts mutualisés, pour mieux développer votre entreprise.
* veille règlementaire cosmétique 120 pays,
* Soutien des entreprises à l’export par la délivrance de Certificats de Vente Libre, et l’accompagnement des entreprises sur des salons à l’international
* Organisation de formations en intra et inter entreprises, organisation de webinars
* Organisation de congrès et d’évènements nationaux et régionaux,
* Optimisation des achats grâce à un groupement d’acheteurs,
* Accompagnement des entreprises sur les questions environnementales.

Name: PharmaCare Laboratories
Description:
PharmaCare is one of the largest Australian-owned health, wellness and consumer goods companies in the country.  An Australian-born and built success story, PharmaCare is dedicated to enriching people’s lives through improved health and wellness. Despite its products being available globally, its soul is Australian, its quality is Australian, and its spirit of honesty, hard work and entrepreneurial drive is Australian.

PharmaCare’s trusted, household brands include Sambucol, Nature’s Way, Bioglan, Medi+, Ease-a-Cold, Skin Doctors, KP24, Brut, Norsca, Bounce and many more.  Our global wheelhouse of brands is available in 40 countries, over 5,200 pharmacies, 3,000 supermarkets, plus department and variety stores all over Australia, New Zealand, Asia, The America's and Europe.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dr Irena Eris S.A.
Description:
Dr Irena Eris is based on passion and the idea of aiming for perfection. Breakthrough scientific discoveries result in patent applications and prestigious awards, while unconventional thinking and the joy of creating are contained within a coherent vision, to always provide cosmetics of the highest standard. This enables women to be more beautiful and keep their looks attractive as long as possible. 

The world of this brand consists of cosmetics, professional individualized care personified by the Dr Irena Eris Skin Care Institutes and care for balanced relaxation in the form of luxury 5* Dr Irena Eris Spa Hotels. Dr Irena Eris Spa Hotels are exceptional spa resorts with their own concept of a harmonic combination of relaxation with biological renewal. Today they signify luxury, and the very idea of a spa. 

Behind the brand's global success there also stands the unique Dr Irena Eris Centre for Science and Research. 
 
Grupa Dr Irena Eris S.A. jest jednym z wiodących polskich producentów kosmetyków oraz właścicielem uznanych w Polsce i na świecie marek: Dr Irena Eris, Pharmaceris, Emotopic, Lirene i Under Twenty. 

Dr Irena Eris to marka oparta na pasji i dążeniu do doskonałości. Dzięki realizacji idei holistycznego piękna, prezentuje całościowe podejście do pielęgnacji ciała i ducha. Świat marki tworzą doskonałej jakości, innowacyjne, skuteczne i bezpieczne luksusowe kosmetyki, które pozwalają kobietom być piękniejszymi i jak najdłużej zachować  atrakcyjny wygląd oraz dopasowana do indywidualnych potrzeb profesjonalna pielęgnacja, którą uosabiają Kosmetyczne Instytuty Dr Irena Eris, a także zrównoważony wypoczynek w postaci 5* Hoteli SPA Dr Irena Eris na Wzgórzach Dylewskich, w Krynicy-Zdroju oraz Polanicy-Zdroju.  

Za światowym sukcesem marki stoi także unikatowa placówka naukowo-badawcza – Centrum Naukowo-Badawcze Dr Irena Eris. Przełomowe odkrycia naukowe owocują zgłoszeniami patentowymi i prestiżowymi nagrodami.

Name: Estée Lauder
Description:
The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. is one of the world’s leading manufacturers, marketers, and sellers of quality skin care, makeup, fragrance, and hair care products, and is a steward of outstanding luxury and prestige brands globally. The company’s products are sold in approximately 150 countries and territories under brand names including: Estée Lauder, Aramis, Clinique, Lab Series, Origins, M·A·C, La Mer, Bobbi Brown Cosmetics, Aveda, Jo Malone London, Bumble and bumble, Darphin Paris, TOM FORD, Smashbox, AERIN Beauty, Le Labo, Editions de Parfums Frédéric Malle, GLAMGLOW, KILIAN PARIS, Too Faced, Dr.Jart+, and the DECIEM family of brands, including The Ordinary and NIOD.

To explore our current job openings, go to www.elcompanies.com/

Name: Sinter
Description:
A Sinter é uma das maiores empresas de terceirização do Brasil, sendo especialista no desenvolvimento e produção de sabonetes e cosméticos. Atuando mais de 30 anos no mercado, tem no seu portfólio as principais marcas da categoria de higiene pessoal.
Está localizada na cidade de Monte Mor, região metropolitana de Campinas – SP, estando a apenas 120km da capital. Em 2014 foi inaugurada a filial em Ouro Fino - MG, para produzir Soap Noodles, sabonetes em barra e realizar a montagem de estojos.

Name: HMNS
Description:
HMNS (pronounced as “humans”) is a perfumery brand founded in 2019 on the day we found a perfumer who has been making perfume for two decades.
We had one big question at that time:
“Can we make a perfume that is affordable but also bringing the grandiose quality designer & niche perfume is all about?”
Then we found the answer. We have to start it online. To cut all the unimportant costs.
in June 2019, HMNS was born.
Since then, HMNS constantly making a perfume wholeheartedly with a tagline “made for humans”
we understand your taste and bringing you a highly curated fragrance that you will surely love. 
We put all our energy and passion into this brand, 
because we believe one thing
HMNS is here because of you.
Because you trusted us to grow and to learn to make mistakes
Join our journey in the making of the most lovable perfume brand, 
start to wear HMNS now.

Name: Versed
Description:
Performance for your skin, body and planet - hi, we're Versed  
Shop us in 6,600 stores globally and at VersedSkin.com.

Name: Fresh Line Cosmetics
Description:
Since 1992, Fresh Line blends Greek herbal wisdom with cutting-edge science to create natural face, body, and hair care products that elevate the senses and nurture the skin. 
We proudly operate our in-house R&D department and production plant in Koropi, Attica, ensuring the highest standards of quality and innovation. 
With a presence in 14 international markets and over 550 Points of Sale, Fresh Line is renowned for its exceptional product efficacy and commitment to natural beauty. In Greece, we have a diverse retail network encompassing mono shops, department store corners, and pharmacies. Our organizational structure is specifically designed to provide optimal support to our partners across all business aspects, fostering long-term success.

Name: ARKRAY Healthcare Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
ARKRAY Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. is a wholly owned subsidiary of ARKRAY Inc. Japan (Comprises of former IVD business undertaking of Span Diagnostics Limited).

ARKRAY started its Sales & Marketing Office in Mumbai in Dec 2007. It collaborated with PIRAMAL Healthcare, an Indian major in Healthcare business. An experienced and dedicated team of professionals was inherited from PIRAMAL Healthcare to form ARKRAY PIRAMAL Medical Pvt. Ltd. Within 3 years the company launched 5 of its state-of-art products, serving more than 1 lakh customers and more than 2000 Healthcare professionals & hospitals across India.

In Feb 2010, ARKRAY Piramal Medical Pvt. Ltd. was renamed as ARKRAY Healthcare Pvt. Ltd . The team has grown constantly over 4 years and has strengthened four-fold in the fields of Customer Support, Sales & Marketing. We have reached to all the states in India enabling Sales & Service support across the country and ensuring maximum customer satisfaction.

Our mission is to contribute towards the Health & well-being of people in India by providing our State-of- Art medical devices of Global standards .
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Future Beauty Brands (formerly PPI Beauty)
Description:
Future Beauty Brands is an entrepreneurial, privately held / private equity backed company that creates and distributes strong brands of makeup tools, body care accessories, and suncare products in over 70 countries.
