Home to Real Techniques and Eco Tools, global leaders in cosmetic and bath accessories, and Freeman Beauty, as well as Tanologist, Isle of Paradise, and Tan Luxe, leading innovation within spf and self-tanning. All brands are available from global retailer partners. 

WE ARE FUTURE BEAUTY BRANDS.
FACE THE WORLD CONFIDENTLY.

Name: Bays International
Description:
Bays International is the largest cosmetic retail company in Pakistan having its Head Office in Oxford, United Kingdom. Currently, our presence in Pakistan is more than 40 major retail outlets, covering a wide range of distributors in the country. Bays International has been operating in the beauty industry for more than 30 years and is proud to be considered one of the largest beauty products businesses in the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and across Asia. The company is established on the doctrine of luxury and service, bringing the best to beauty conscious customers and consumers with premium quality brands. Bays International is proud of the part we played in the development of the beauty industry in Pakistan by introducing well-researched, renowned, and established international beauty care brands.

Besides UK, Bays offices have been established in UAE & Pakistan; fulfilling the CEO’s vision of taking the brands to consumers all across the world.

Name: VIEVE
Description: Founded by expert makeup artist and digital content creator Jamie Genevieve, each VIEVE product is high-performance with expertly crafted formulas which are innovative and inclusive. VIEVE not only has the products, but the tips, tricks and techniques to achieve any look, from the everyday to the experimental.
0a

Name: Sarah Chapman London
Description:
Sarah Chapman

Super-facialist and founder of the Skinesis range, Sarah Chapman is widely regarded as a premier skincare authority and one of the industry’s most sought-after experts. Since 2015, her Skinesis Clinic has been the ultimate destination for luxurious, results-driven facial treatments, located on Pavilion Road in the heart of Chelsea, London.


Skinesis 

Known as much for her extensive knowledge of cosmetic science as for her passion for luxury beauty, Sarah has distilled over 20 years of knowledge and hands-on experience into her innovative and results-driven skincare line.

Every Skinesis product is inspired by real skin concerns Sarah sees every day in her treatment room. Combining potent actives with cutting-edge technology, luxurious textures and refined botanical oils, these performance-proven formulas enable clinical results at home, delivering healthy and rejuvenated skin with the coveted Skinesis glow.

Name: Native
Description: Native is on a mission to change the way people think about clean personal care products. Every product we make is thoughtfully formulated to keep you feeling and smelling fresh. Looking fresh? That’s all you.

Name: Wesfarmers Health
Description:
Wesfarmers Health is one of Australia’s leading health, beauty and wellness companies, operating in the retail, pharmaceutical wholesale, medical aesthetics and digital health industries. The portfolio of businesses includes well-known consumer and B2B brands including Priceline Pharmacy, API, SILK Laser Clinics, Clear Skincare, and InstantScripts.

Wesfarmers Health was formed as a division of Wesfarmers in 2022, with the acquisition of API and brands including Priceline Pharmacy and Clear Skincare. The business has expanded its footprint with further acquisitions in the digital health and medical aesthetics industries.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: WishCare
Description: A multi-functional personal care brand where you can discover effective SkinCare, HairCare, SunCare & BodyCare formulations based on biomimetic science that show effective real results. Recommended by dermatologists and skin experts.

Name: ZERO Makeup
Description:
ZERO Makeup is a company based in the UK with its reach spreading far and wide. We are based out of London with an operations office in Dubai, along with distributors in Pakistan and India.

Aside from our 90+ points of sale, through our e-commerce platform we are delivering orders to people worldwide.

All our products are designed to be intelligent & efficient. We work very hard on taking the guess-work out and making it easy for you. 

We go through extensive research and heavy testing in the lab and on ground. Our products are used by makeup professionals and refined with their input. 

We are a brand that believes in doing good. We have zero tolerance to unethical practices anywhere in our supply chain. Furthermore, we do not allow animal testing and we avoid using harmful ingredients wherever possible.

Name: 82°E
Description:
82°E is a modern Indian self-care brand that is on a mission to make the practice of self-care simple, joyful and effective part of your everyday.

Our Founder, global Indian icon, Deepika Padukone is passionate about building a trusted global platform that reflects her beliefs and inspires people to live authentic and well-balanced lives.

Led by scientists and backed by extensive research, 82°E offers high-quality and effective products with an Indian ethos. 

Launching in 2022 with skincare as our first category, we plan to expand to other categories that support our holistic self-care approach. By bringing together product performance, enriching content and a supportive community, we envision a platform that creates a wholesome experience for our consumers.

Behind the scenes, we are a passionate, hardworking and highly motivated team. 82°E believes in investing in diverse talent and empowering them to succeed. Our mission of prioritizing self-care and well-being translates into the way we support our talent by finding the right balance between work and play. At 82°E, we are committed to creating a work culture where we work hard, collaborate, celebrate small victories and help each other grow; personally and professionally.

Name: Moell
Description:
Moell is the answer to the problems of mothers who want to care for and maintain the health of their children's skin without having to worry.

Our company is dedicated to providing skincare products specifically designed to care for the health of children's sensitive skin. We understand the importance of maintaining the delicate balance of children's skin, which is why we have formulated our products with natural ingredients and without harsh chemicals like SLS (Sodium Lauryl Sulfate).

We believe that a child's skin deserves the gentlest care possible, which is why our products are free from irritating and potentially harmful ingredients. By using natural ingredients we aim to nurture and protect children's skin in the most gentle and effective way.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Plush
Description:
At Plush, our journey began in 2018 with a clear mission: to transform the personal care industry by reimagining comfort and meeting the unique needs of women. We wanted to create products that go beyond the ordinary—solutions that truly enhance everyday life and elevate the personal care experience.

Our focus is on delivering thoughtful, high-quality products that prioritize both performance and sustainability. With the trust of over 10 million women, we’re proud to be a brand that listens, understands, and responds to every woman's unique needs. We’re dedicated to reshaping the way personal care is approached—one that values comfort, wellbeing, and innovation. At Plush, we strive to create a world where every woman feels supported, confident, and celebrated in her daily routine.

Period Care | Hair Removal | Sexual Wellness
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Innersense Organic Beauty
Description:
Innersense Organic Beauty continues to push the boundaries of new product development by utilizing organic chemistry to raise the bar on clean, luxurious formulas with professional performance to care for your hair, health and planet. 

Dedicated to wellness through uplifting affirmations, self care and hair ceremonies, our mission is to inform, inspire and empower beauty professionals and consumers to make healthy choices with a brand that aligns with their personal values. Clean chemistry, radical transparency and a commitment to the environment are our promises to you. This means no parabens, silicones, sulfates, synthetic fragrances or questionable ingredients. It’s your health. It’s our planet.

Name: Slatkin + Co.
Description:
About Slatkin + Co

Founded by Harry Slatkin, universally acknowledged as the "King of Home Fragrance" by The New York Times, Slatkin + Co revolutionized the luxury home fragrance industry in the early 1990s. What began as a passionate venture between Harry and Laura Slatkin quickly evolved into the #1 home fragrance brand in luxury department stores worldwide.

Our legacy of excellence is built on masterful artistry in fragrance creation, with Harry Slatkin recognized as an acclaimed "nose" by the American Society of Perfumers. This expertise, combined with his Wall Street business acumen, transformed Slatkin +co into an industry powerhouse that caught the attention of retail giant Les Wexner in 2005.

The acquisition by Limited Brands marked a new chapter, with Slatkin +co becoming the exclusive home fragrance line at Bath & Body Works. Under Harry's leadership as President of Home Design, the division achieved unprecedented success, growing into a $1 billion business and establishing Bath & Body Works as the world's largest home fragrance company.

Our fragrance expertise has led to prestigious collaborations with luxury brands including Ralph Lauren, Christian Dior, Chopard, and Banana Republic. Today, the Slatkin legacy continues to shape the home fragrance and personal care  industry through innovative brands like such as Homeworx ScentWorx, Dwell, AromaHome, and Club92, while maintaining our commitment to creating sophisticated, memorable home fragrances that resonate with consumers worldwide.

Name: صيدليات انوفا - Innova Pharmacy
Description:
مجموعة صيدليات إنوفا هي إحدى سلاسل الصيدليات الرائدة في المملكة العربية السعودية، تأسست عام 1994، وتقدم خدمات دوائية ورعاية صحية متكاملة تلبي احتياجات الأسرة بجودة عالية ومعايير مهنية موثوقة.

نؤمن بأن الصحة أساس الحياة، ونسعى لأن نكون دائمًا صيدلية العائلة من خلال شبكة فروع تضم أكثر من 200 فرع منتشرة في 12 مدينة بمناطق الرياض، القصيم، حائل، ومكة المكرمة، مع خطط توسع مستمرة في مختلف أنحاء المملكة.

في إنوفا، نضع صحة عملائنا في مقدمة أولوياتنا، ونعمل على تقديم تجربة رعاية صحية شاملة تساهم في تحسين نمط الحياة وتحقيق صحة أفضل للمجتمع.

INNOVA Pharmacies is a leading pharmacy chain in Saudi Arabia, established in 1994, providing comprehensive pharmaceutical and healthcare services for the whole family.

With more than 200 branches across 12 cities in Riyadh, Qassim, Hail, and Makkah Al-Mukarramah, INNOVA is committed to quality, professionalism, and customer-centered care , proudly your Family Pharmacy.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Algabo
Description:
Somos Algabo. Somos PYME. Somos la fuerza productiva de Argentina

Con más de 36 años de trayectoria en la industria cosmética y de tocador, Algabo es el resultado de un crecimiento sostenido y un compromiso total con la calidad de nuestros productos. 
Contamos con una planta modelo de 13.000 m2, sobre un predio de 22.000 m2, con 40 líneas de producción continua, que nos permite satisfacer las demandas de nuestros clientes en todas las provincias de Argentina y en más de 25 países del mundo.

Name: Peace Out Skincare
Description:
Tired of the complicated routines and expensive treatments, Peace Out Skincare was created to make life simpler, but with a glow. Rather than covering our blemishes with makeup, we wanted to fight the problem at the root.

We offer 1-step solutions for the most common skincare concerns with effective ingredients that deliver visible results.

Name: DESIGNME HAIR
Description: DESIGNME is a performance and innovation-driven Indie Brand based in Canada. Our unique, vegan, cruelty-free formulations have become loved loved by hair stylists and all humans around the world. No harmful sulfates, no parabens, no gluten, ever.

Name: Astral Health & Beauty
Description:
From makeup to skincare to skin health, Astral’s family of brands makes every day a little bit easier—and better—for women and men around the globe. With innovative and transformative products, we redefine the face of beauty. We embrace diversity and develop products to meet the needs of a global marketplace. Our success is the result of entrepreneurial spirit, pushing the boundaries, and knowing that our commitment to the customer is more than skin deep.

GUIDING PRINCIPLES

• Allocate resources wisely, always asking, “Is the investment worth the return?”
• Hold ourselves accountable, realizing every employee has an impact
• Coach one another, helping team members find their fastball
• Think big; be an innovator and a creator
• Take chances; learn from your mistakes
• Agree to disagree, but never be disagreeable
• Treat every day as if it were opening day
• Never, ever give up
• We are four brands, but one family

PÜR, Aloette, COSMEDIX and butter LONDON

Name: Vedic Cosmeceuticals Pvt Ltd
Description:
Vedic Cosmeceuticals is India’s leading full-service contract manufacturer of high-quality personal care products in the skincare, haircare, baby care and intimate care categories. Personal wellness brands such as Nykaa, FabIndia, Bombay Shaving Company, Sirona and many more have made use of Vedic’s manufacturing expertise from concept to final product. Vedic builds from idea to shelf under one roof: from brainstorming to sourcing ingredients, and from formulation to dispatch-ready final products. 

Taking a conscious approach towards clean beauty, Vedic strives to pack each product it develops with safe and pure ingredients that have been sustainably and ethically sourced to protect the environment. Our R&D is 100% cruelty-free without animal testing. We work with the various government bodies and private players to ensure safe storage, handling and disposal of all bio-medical waste.

At Vedic, we consistently focus on your market goals. Being a one-stop service provider, we provide complete process expertise, including, but not limited to:
 Market understanding 
 Insights on pricing, packaging, sourcing and inventory 
 R&D (we have a massive bank of formulations) 
 Top-of-the-line production and packaging tech 
 Full quality checks at state-of-the-art lab
 Industry-best automated logistics solutions and warehouse operations

Name: NIVEA
Description: Ofrecemos los mejores consejos para tí con los productos de cuidado para la piel de NIVEA.

Name: L'Occitane Australia & New Zealand
Description:
L'OCCITANE is a Natural beauty brand that is renowned worldwide. Our effective beauty products which originate from Provence, South of France, are the result of bringing together tradition, nature and research.

We have developed skincare and fragrances that are natural, authentic, effective and deliciously appealing. 

It all began in the markets of Provence. With nothing but an alembic, a small truck and a solid knowledge of plants, a 23-year-old named Olivier Baussan began distilling rosemary essential oil to sell locally. He expanded his production from oils to soaps to creams, taking inspiration from the land he grew up on to bring natural beauty to homes across the world.

Since then, we have been committed to improving our products through our state-of-the-art research lab in the heart of Haute-Provence, in Manosque. A team of 100 researchers works in 11 laboratories, focused on topics from molecular biology to plant extraction to analytical chemistry so we can keep raising the bar.

L’OCCITANE is a socially responsible company with over 2200 stores worldwide. We try to limit our environmental impact of every aspect of our work, from the creation of our formulas to the development of our packaging, including the product and distribution on an international level. 

Ever since it was founded in 1976, L'OCCITANE has nurtured simple values: authenticity, respect, sensoriality and continual improvement.

Name: SUNSTAR GLOBAL
Description: Headquartered in Switzerland, Sunstar originated in Japan in 1932 and now spans the globe with operations in the Europe, the Americas and Asia. We operate in two business units – a Consumer business globally focused on oral care products, and an Industrial business - with a simple mission in mind: helping people live longer, healthier lives.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Castelbel
Description:
Castelbel is a company based in Oporto and internationally renowned for the quality of its 100% Portuguese-made products: soaps, scented candles, fragrance diffusers, air fresheners, perfumed papers and moisturising creams. 
With a total export volume of around 70%, Castelbel markets its luxury products in over twenty countries around the world - from Australia to Brazil, from South Africa to Norway - with particular emphasis on the United States, the United Kingdom, Spain and Germany.

Name: NUOO
Description:
Fondé en 2015, NUOO se positionne comme LE dénicheur de pépites beauté bio & naturelles. 

 Notre mission
Agir pour faire de la beauté bio et naturelle LA NORME, et développer l'accessibilité des produits sains au plus grand nombre.  

 Notre expertise
Notre e-shop recense + de 4500 références répondant à un cahier des charges strict, afin de garantir une expérience d’achat en toute confiance.

 Nos boutiques 
En 8 ans, 6 boutiques NUOO ont ouvert dans toute la France pour aller à la rencontre de notre public : Orléans, Clermont-Ferrand, Nantes, Angers, Rennes et Lyon.

 La team NUOO 
NUOO, c’est aussi 35 collaborateurs engagés et passionnés, qui partagent une vision commune. Esprit d’équipe, évolution, épanouissement… Autant de valeurs qui forgent la force de NUOO et nous permettent de grandir ensemble. 

L’aventure NUOO s’écrit chaque jour aux côtés de nos fondateurs, de nos collaborateurs, de nos partenaires et surtout de nos client·e·s. 


Pour nous rejoindre  https://www.nuoobox.com/blogs/lequipe-nuoo/recrutements

Envie de distribuer votre marque chez NUOO : https://form.typeform.com/to/tTexNqLL

Pour nous suivre sur les réseaux  @nuoobox

Name: Brand Agency London
Description:
Brand Agency London knows beauty

Over the past decade, our founder Charlotte Knight and the team have built 5 global brands across beauty and selfcare: Ciaté London, Lottie London, Skin Proud, Hair Proud and Body Proud. At the heart of each brand is a commitment to innovation and providing incredible, high-quality products - no matter the price point.
 
Our journey started in 2009 with the birth of Ciaté London followed by it's little sister Lottie London in 2015. I Am Proud catapulted into the industry in 2020 and in what was a huge year, 2023, we saw the rise of both Hair Proud and Body Proud.
 
All 5 brands have enjoyed a meteoric rise to new global heights within the beauty industry, collectively offering vegan cosmetics, new-to-market selfcare formulas and show stopping artistry in nail.
 
You may know us for launching new, incredible formulations to the industry. A few of our most known moments include the world’s first transforming liquid lipstick, Ciaté Glitter Flip and Ciaté's show-stopping collaborations with the likes of Iris Apfel, Christine Quinn and Miss Piggy. Meanwhile, Lottie London has created countless viral TikTok moments including their Super Fake mascara and Vampire Diaries Collection to name a few. I Am Proud has also had everyone talking with products such as Frozen Over from Skin Proud and Glass Hair from Body Proud.
 
We are proudly PETA certified, cruelty-free, and mostly vegan. As proud partners of Ecologi we want to pave the way for a more environmentally conscious future. We have already reduced 90 tonnes of CO2e and have also pledged to plant over 1,800 trees since partnering with Ecologi as of 25th October 2022.
 
Discover our brands at…
 
ciatelondon.com
 lottielondon.com
 iamproud.com

Name: Bourjois
Description:
Bourjois Paris, 

The French expert in Beauty and "joie de vivre" since 1863.

Bourjois was born  on the great boulevards of Paris in the theatre district. The actor Joseph-Albert Ponsin was the company's first creator; he created makeup and perfumes for actors and actresses in the comfort of his own home. 
In 1868, Ponsin entrusted his entire activity to Alexandre-Napoléon Bourjois who made the company blossomed internationally. 

Bourjois has, since then, spread its 'joie de vivre' and expertise all over the world with innovative formulas, pretty and practical packaging, quirky concepts and a new vision of beauty associated to pleasure and personality, and even to freedom...

Our mission is to constantly invent, create and design clever, feminine products that simplify beauty.

Name: Lider Kozmetik
Description:
Founded in Istanbul, Turkey in 1978, Lider Kozmetik is one of the largest producers of aerosol products in Turkey and Middle East. Operating in personal care, home care and auto care categories, the company is currently exporting to more than 115 countries touching lives of consumers in regions varying from Taiwan to Egypt, Nigeria to France and Russia to Pakistan. 

The diverse and constantly evolving product range of the company includes perfumes, deodorants, hair sprays, body mists and body lotions, shaving foam and shaving gel, hair mousse, air fresheners, furniture polish, home cleaning products, anti-dust lighter gas, and fire extinguisher sprays etcetera. Besides having its own range of brands such as Green World, Majix, Lady Bella,Aleda, Fawaris and Joker etc., Lider Kozmetik also has a dedicated Private Label division and manufactures private label products for renowned companies and retail groups all around the world as well as in Turkey. 

The company is head quartered in a 32.000 m2 integrated production facility in Dilovasi near Istanbul, that has a production capacity of 105 million units (1 shift regime) per year, and meets ISO 9001, TSE, SEDEX, BRC & IFS and GMP, and Halal quality standards.

Join us in our journey as we make the transition of being a leading aerosol company in the region to being one of the top players of the industry globally!  

info@liderkozmetik.com

Name: Preunic
Description:
Somos la marca que lleva belleza a todas las personas en Chile. 

Contamos con un maravilloso equipo de más de 2300 colaboradores, quienes a través de todos nuestros puntos de contacto; más de 100 tiendas en todo el territorio nacional y preunic.cl, acompañan a nuestros clientes a descubrir su propia belleza.

Estamos entre las empresas más atractivas para trabajar por nuestra cultura de trabajo, colaborativa, innovadora, inclusiva y diversa.

También trabajamos a través del Instituto de Belleza, hace más de 13 años, con el que realizamos talleres gratuitos en temas de belleza y emprendimiento, dirigidos a toda la comunidad.

Nuestra cadena es una de las filiales más importantes de Empresas SB, holding dedicado a hacer sentir bien a las personas, estén donde estén, entregando lo mejor en salud, belleza y bienestar.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Milagros Enterprise Group S.A.S
Description:
Somos famosos por los resultados,
El cabello que siempre soñaste
Solo como lo sabemos hacer en Milagros

Name: Personal Care Products Council
Description:
Based in Washington, D.C., the Personal Care Products Council (PCPC) is the leading national trade association representing the global cosmetic and personal care products industry. Founded in 1894, the Council represents more than 600 member companies that manufacture, distribute, and supply the vast majority of finished personal care products marketed in the U.S. As the makers of a diverse range of products millions of consumers rely on every day, from sunscreens, toothpaste and shampoo to moisturizer, makeup and fragrance, personal care products companies are global leaders committed to product safety, quality and innovation.

For more information on cosmetics and personal care products and their ingredients, visit www.cosmeticsinfo.org. For more information about PCPC and our services, visit www.personalcarecouncil.org. Current job openings are available at www.personalcarecouncil.org/about-us/pcpc-careers.

Name: Cosmetica Hub
Description:
Cosmetica Hub is a dynamic Italian cosmetic company operating with great success in the perfumery, professional beauty and pharmacy sectors both on national and international markets.

We are a team with one goal: create cutting-edge products.

Our values are: innovative formulas, product design, made in Italy.

We have an internal research and development department and all formulas are developed and tested in Italy. 

Our brands are: Diego dalla Palma Milano, Diego dalla Palma Professional, RVB LAB and Mulac. We want to bring beauty to all people so they can express their personalities.

Name: Bell International Laboratories
Description: Bell International Laboratories, Inc, is located in Eagan, Minnesota.  We specialize in Health, Beauty and Cosmetic Manufacturing.  Our expertise is in Sun Care, Skin Care, Hair Care,  OTC and Nutritional products.  We offer R&D services as well as product manufacturing.  Bell International Laboratories is fully certified and regulated by the FDA, and is ATF,EPA and Minnesota Department of Health registered.

Name: indē wild
Description: A conscious award-winning beauty ecosystem founded by @DiipaKhosla. Available in the US, UK, Canada & India, and Worldwide.

Name: Laboratórios Dermatológicos de Uriage Portugal
Description:
É no coração dos Alpes Franceses que a Água Termal de Uriage viaja durante 75 anos. Ao atravessar várias camadas rochosas, enriquece-se em sais minerais e oligoelementos e adquire as suas propriedades únicas. 
Desde 1992, os Laboratórios Dermatológicos de Uriage utilizam os benefícios da Água Termal de Uriage para cuidar da pele de toda a família. Com cuidados hipoalergénicos, indicados desde o bebé ao idoso, temos como ambição contribuir para o bem-estar diário de todos.

Entre em contacto connosco através do endereço: geral@uriage.pt

Name: Crown Laboratories (a Revance company)
Description:
We are pleased to announce that Crown Laboratories and Revance Therapeutics are now united as REVANCE. 

To learn more, please read the press release. 

https://www.revance.com/crown-revance-unite/

Name: CP Skin Health Group
Description:
Starting in 2018, Colgate Palmolive acquired Filorga, EltaMD and PCA SKIN brands to build a world-class global skin health organization of premium brands that are scientifically proven and professionally endorsed.

Our mission: We are a caring, inclusive, innovative growth company that transforms and protects skin health through professionally endorsed skincare that improves people's lives.

Our vision: To lead the prestige skincare industry with scientifically proven advanced skin health solutions which are recommended by professionals, recognized by the scientific community and chosen by consumers to transform the health and appearance of their skin.

Name: RSH Global
Description:
In 1988 RSH Global pvt Ltd. was founded by the promoters in Kolkata, materializing the strong vision - “By offering an ever-expanding range of innovative, high quality & affordable personal care solutions to people across the world, we at RSH Global want to empower as many people as possible to look better, feel better and do more”.

For three decades, our organisation has devoted itself solely to Personal Care business .We boast ourselves  of three brands, Joy and Karis and Orimii.

Our manufacturing excellence stems from the passion to create the best quality product. With two manufacturing units at Himachal Pradesh (Baddi) and one in Kolkata (West Bengal), we are capable of manufacturing high quality personal care product.

We provide our customers with the best quality product depending on consistent quality improvement at every step of product development through international tools like Consumer Safety, 4P, 5S, HACCP, TPM, etc.

Each and every product of ours is efficacy tested by international labs.

 The growing satisfaction of our consumers has been testified by the fact that we - a 1st generation Indian company from Kolkata – besides being counted in top five lists of Body lotion , Cream and Face Wash category in India, now have marked global presence in more than 25 countries including Africa, Middle-East and the SAARC countries. 

Three pillars form the basis of working culture in our organization. Over the years, we have built an organization which treats its all stakeholders with transparency, respect and in fair manner.

We at RSH Global believe in inclusive development of our stakeholders and encourage our people to have Entrepreneurial mindset and provide ample opportunities to learn & grow, keeping work- life balance.

Join us not as an employee but as a member on our quest to make people “look better, feel better and do more”.

Name: SFI Health
Description:
SFI Health are global leaders in developing & delivering human microbiome and cognitive natural health solutions that enable people to make informed health choices confidently.

We believe we have the responsibility to bring proven natural health solutions to people’s healthcare needs.

Our guiding principle is that our people act with integrity, courage and passion to:
•	Make a difference
•	Progress human quality of life
•	Act on learnings
•	Perform to promises made
•	Promote diversity
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BeautiControl
Description:
BeautiControl, a wholly owned subsidiary of Tupperware Brands, is a direct sales beauty company that specializes in innovative, premium skincare, anti-aging, bath & body and color cosmetics products, featured through an in-home Spa experience. 

For more than 30 years, the mission of BeautiControl has been to create beautiful lives filled with passion and opportunity. BeautiControl strives to empower women to live their beautiful lives, achieve gorgeous results and to share the opportunity with those around them.

To learn more about BeautiControl, visit www.beauticontrol.com.  You can also find us on Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest, Tumblr, Typepad, YouTube and Google+.  

For more information about Tupperware Brands Corporation, visit www.tupperwarebrands.com.

Name: CÉCRED
Description: No matter the hair type or texture, we all deserve products that are safe and effective. We place scientific innovation and product performance above all else to deliver what all hair craves: rich conditioners and fortifying protein, advanced science and fermentation, sensorial luxury and exceptional performance. We don’t just dress hair with cosmetic sheen. We combine our patent-pending technology with the wisdom and rituals passed down through generations to deliver high-performing formulas for visible strength, length retention, moisture, and shine. No matter how you wear your hair—natural, down, blown out, flat-ironed, braided, colored, weaves, wigs—it starts with a healthy foundation.

Name: The Skin Story
Description: Dive into The Skin Story, your destination for affordable skincare that works. Our journey started in 2019, tackling pigmentation struggles personally. Committed to straightforward solutions, our brand revolves around simplicity and effectiveness. At The Skin Story, it's not just about products; it's about sharing knowledge. Embrace your skin's uniqueness with us, and let simplicity define your path to healthier, happier skin.

Name: Osmosis
Description:
Osmosis Beauty is founded on medically developed, clinically validated and consumer-proven results that are patented, tested, and trusted. Each innovative product is designed and formulated to help create real, visible change in the skin. We do this by looking at skincare through a holistic lens. 

Rooted in the science of the skin-body connection, we go more than skin deep to target the source of common concerns. Osmosis combines the most effective detox strategies with medical-grade, non-toxic, topical formulas to achieve authentic transformations and overall well-being.

Name: Arcade Beauty Brasil
Description:
A Arcade Beauty foi fundada há mais de 60 anos no Brasil, com o nome de Mappel, para atender a indústria farmacêutica oferecendo a terceirização de prestação de serviços de embalagem primária e secundária, importação e exportação de produtos, nacionalização, serviços de laboratório de controle de qualidade, SAC (Serviço de Atendimento ao Cliente) e Farmacovigilância.
Em 2009 resolvemos complementar nosso portfólio e fundamos uma nova unidade fabril onde oferecemos a terceirização da fabricação e envase de dermocosméticos.
Possibilitamos aos nossos clientes o serviço de hospedagem do registro para indústria farmacêutica em medicamentos, alimentos e dermocosméticos.

Nas 2 unidades fabris atuamos sempre de acordo com as normas de Boas Práticas de Fabricação (BPF), com todas as certificações e licenças exigidas pela Anvisa.
A nossa equipe técnica é formada por profissionais experientes que estarão à disposição dos nossos clientes para desenvolver o melhor formato técnico/operacional para a terceirização dos seus produtos: farmacêuticos, alimentícios e dermocosméticos.

Name: Jo Loves
Description:
Jo Malone CBE has been described as an "English Scent Maverick" and the woman responsible for creating some of the world's most loved fragrances. Jo gained global cult status with the launch of eponymous brand, Jo Malone London. in 1999, Jo sold the business to Estée Lauder Companies and remained Creative Director until she left in 2006. 

Jo's passion for fragrance never subsided and in 2011 she was ready once again to take the world by storm, with her new brand Jo Loves, an innovative scent, bath, body and candle collection inspired by the memories and moments in life that she loves. 

Jo Loves bottles Jo's undeniable desire to create beautiful and unexpected fragrances. 

Jo's creative seal of integrity, symbolised by the red dot, is stamped across everything that bears the Jo Loves name. 

"Jo Loves is my fragrance library and each box is full of moments and memories, where imagination and creativity meet." Love, Jo x 





http://instagram.com/JoLovesOfficial
http://twitter.com/JoLovesOfficial
http://facebook.com/JoLovesOfficial

Name: Endro Cosmetiques
Description:
ENDRO (signifiant "nature" en breton) est une entreprise artisanale bretonne basée à Lannion (22). Fondée en 2019 par Marion et Boris, deux bretons engagés, la marque a pour mission de proposer des alternatives simples et naturelles aux produits de beauté et d'hygiène conventionnels, souvent nocifs pour la santé et l'environnement.

L'aventure a démarré avec une campagne de financement participative sur Ulule, dépassant de 729 % l’objectif initial. Depuis, ENDRO a connu une croissance impressionnante. Aujourd'hui, nos produits, sont disponibles dans plus de 2 500 points de vente à travers la France.

En cinq ans, l’équipe est passée de 3 à environ 70 personnes, et plus de 200 000 clients nous ont déjà fait confiance. Nos engagements restent clairs : proposer des produits sains, efficaces et respectueux de l'environnement, tout en mettant en avant la simplicité et l'efficacité.

Name: GdC Beauty Group
Description: GDC Beauty Group operates in the cosmetics industry in 80 countries with a portfolio of high-added value brands and a sustainable long-term strategy. We specialise in addressing skin care needs through different channels, with innovation at the heart of everything we do. We have our own laboratory and manufacturing premises. The Group's origins can be traced back to the creation of the Germaine de Capuccini Brand in 1964. Brand names: Germaine de Capuccini, Ainhoa Cosmetics.

Name: Apotheca Beauty
Description:
Welcome to Apotheca!

www.apothecabeauty.com
Facebook: www.facebook.com/apothecabeauty
Instagram: @apotheca_beauty

Apotheca was formed by three sisters, all of us equally fixated with finding the perfect solutions to our ever-changing beauty needs. We have been customers of these products ourselves, and have collectively experimented with nearly every treatment and regime.

Now, we are cherry-picking what we believe to be the most effective beauty solutions and sharing them with our customers

Hourglass, Anastasia Beverly Hills, Tatcha, Dr. Barbara Sturm, MALIN+GOETZ, ILIA Beauty, Oribe, Moon Juice, Dr. Lancer are just a few of the top-performing brands in our beauty cabinet with products that are as effective as they are beautifully and intelligently crafted.

We believe it is important to look and feel equally good sitting at home, natural and bare-faced, as you do dressed ready for work or play. Our hope is that our collection will inspire and empower you to not only look great, but feel great as well.

Name: House Of Sillage
Description:
House of Sillage is a California-based luxury fragrance and cosmetics brand, proudly celebrating 15 years of artistry, craftsmanship, and innovation. Renowned for its collectible creations, the brand fuses haute parfumerie with couture-level design—featuring hand-polished finishes, Swarovski crystal embellishments, and iconic collaborations with Disney, Warner Bros., and MGM.

Founded with a vision to redefine luxury through sensory storytelling, House of Sillage offers niche perfumes, cosmetics, and limited-edition collections that elevate self-expression and elegance.

Discover the world of House of Sillage—where fragrance becomes fashion, and every piece is a legacy.

Name: MS BEAUTiLAB
Description:
Specializing in skincare, color and powders, MS BEAUTiLAB provides innovative global beauty solutions that combine performance, experience and sensoriality, while ensuring European quality.

At MS BEAUTiLAB, we turn our clients’ ideas and inspirations into innovative products, whether ready-to-go or tailor-made. We offer full-service solutions, from vision to delivery.
As a partner, we are committed to help our clients gain a competitive advantage, while managing all complexities to ensure the best client experience.

EVERY BESTSELLER HAS A BEGINNING.

Name: Inolex
Description:
Inolex is a fiercely independent company that designs sustainable ingredients for health, beauty, and wellness. 

We don’t swim with the current; we create it. We envision and realize solutions to advance the needs of our customers. We challenge ourselves and the industry to think differently.

Honoring nature, we design emerging technologies that ensure the safe and optimum performance of leading brands in more than 85 countries.

Our designers are guided by the Principles of Green Chemistry, to invent the future of sustainable ingredient platforms. By balancing conscious science with nature and artistry, our imaginative approaches become the building blocks for exceptional products that care for people and our planet. 

We are Inolex. Thinkers, Designers, Creators, and Rebels.

Name: Bothanica Mineral
Description: A Bothanica Mineral foi fundada em 1999 e está presente no Brasil e Estados Unidos.

Name: laverana GmbH & Co. KG
Description: cosmetics

Name: Teal & Terra
Description:
Teal & Terra is an organic beauty and healthcare brand designed to provide natural and healthy skin and hair care products. All our products are completely safe and healthy for consumers and environmental friendly. We research and develop to produce the most innovative natural beauty products of premium quality natural ingredients and essential oils which promotes better health and well being.


With the use of high quality essential oils, aloe vera gel, and other naturally derived extracts and healthy ingredients, we strive to build these organic beauty products of highest quality for our customers which can help them get an everlasting healthy n beautiful hair and skin. We value spirit of health, wellness and community service as part of our business endeavour . With the knowledge that everything we put on our skin quickly gets absorbed into our bodies, we ethically source the finest and purest raw natural materials the earth and our environment has to offer. In addition to creating products that give you noticeable results, we create our products with the concept of personal rejuvenation and indulgence in mind.

Name: Totum Pharmaciens
Description:
Totum Pharmaciens est un réseau de 340 pharmacies qui associent excellence médicale et performance commerciale dans un modèle coopératif et associé. Membre du TOP 100 des enseignes en France, le réseau propose à ses pharmaciens associés une enseigne, des services intégrés et une offre commerciale sur-mesure.

Le réseau Totum se distingue par sa vision santé et son approche médicale, soutenues par une offre retail et commerciale très dynamique.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products
Location: Des centaines de pharmacies sur le territoire, France

Name: ICONIC LONDON
Description:
Get to know the GLOW...

Founded eight years ago, ICONIC London is now world-famous for our trend-led, innovative GLOW-giving products loved by professional MUAs, Celebrities and Influencers alike! We're proudly vegan & cruelty-free, too.

Inspired by a passion for makeup and the exciting, limitless energy of busy city life in vibrant London, our team at ICONIC London always knew we wanted to create on-the-glow products that make our customers feel as good as they look with instant, 'instagrammable' effects.

We don’t just want to be JUST pretty… we want to be ICONIC in every way! That’s why we say that ICONIC isn’t just our brand name, its an empowering energy – a self-affirming and fearless mood – that runs through everything that we do.

Name: LA PHOCÉENNE DE COSMÉTIQUE
Description:
PME française et indépendante depuis 1996 ! 
1ère PME secteur cosmétique GMS

Fondée en 1996 par Eric Renard & Xavier Padovani, La Phocéenne de Cosmétique a réussi à se développer en France et à l'international et est désormais distribuée dans plus de 60 pays. 
Notre entreprise s'est construite autour d'engagements profonds, de valeurs éthiques et sincères et s'est donnée pour mission de fabriquer des produits sensoriels, efficaces, respectueux de la peau tout en restant accessibles et fabriqués en France. Elle démontre ainsi qu'il est possible de "Faire toujours mieux pour la beauté et le bien-être"

Nos marques : Le Petit Olivier - Lovea - Laboratoires Vendôme - Tricosteril - Primage 

Dates clés : 

 1996 - Création du Groupe La Phocéenne de Cosmétique 
 2003 - Création et lancement de notre marque historique Le Petit Olivier 
 2010 - Acquisition du Moulin de Cante Perdrix - Domaine du Petit Olivier 
 2018 - Rachat de la marque Lovea 
 2023 - Rachat des marques Laboratoires Vendôme - Tricosteril & Prim’age

Name: Lisa Eldridge Beauty
Description:
As the world’s most trusted and sought-after makeup artist, Lisa Eldridge brings her unparalleled knowledge of makeup and skin to her eponymous brand. 
 
Born from a heartfelt desire to help elevate her community’s everyday artistry, Lisa provides the tools and confidence to experiment creatively and enhance your unique natural beauty. 
 
Since conception in 2019, each product has been thoughtfully developed with ease-of-use and efficacy in mind to help emulate her fresh-skin and effortless makeup style. Expect clever, skin-loving, versatile formulas and unexpected shades that have been heralded by beauty insiders as ‘un-dupable’. 
 
This is an embodiment of Lisa’s understanding for what people want and her insight into what genuinely works.
 
This is decades of beauty expertise, realised.

Name: Red Cactus Trading
Description:
Red Cactus is a beauty and wellness company established in 2021 and headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The company is rooted in the founder's own free spirit and her vision of creating a more open and inclusive society by redefining how we think about beauty.

For too long women have searched for beauty "in the eye of the beholder" and far too many times have been left out or let down. We, at Red Cactus, believe that beauty starts from within and that it can be fostered through self love and care.

Name: PT Sinar Alfa Omega
Description:
Founded in 2020, Sinar Alfa Omega (SAO) is a trusted partner for OEM/ODM cosmetic manufacturing.

With our "BRIGHT" company's values (Brilliant - Responsible - Innovative - Great Executions - Honesty - Teamwork), we believe we can grow together and achieve our vision to become a leader in cosmetics manufacturing.

Name: BabyOrgano | India's 1st Ayurvedic Wellness Brand for Kids
Description:
Incepted in 2020, BabyOrgano specializes in offering a diverse collection of Ayurvedic products for kids up to 0-15 years. We strive to blend the magic of natural ingredients and herbs into the routine life of our consumers. Each BabyOrgano product is a dedicated result of timeless Ayurveda and dedicated research of our health experts.

Explore our broad range of natural products, exclusively designed to cater to the holistic development of kids up to 0-15 years. Thanks to our top-notch and genuine products, we are GMP, ISO and FDCA approved and satisfy all the required Quality Assurance Standards too.  And yes, please note, we DO NOT Test on Animals, ensuring a Cruelty-free product range at your fingertips.

In a short span, we have received a humungous positive response from our users. Besides our offline market presence, we have been growing on online shopping platforms like our website at www.babyorgano.com, Amazon, Flipkart, Paytm and FirstCry in the same trend. To further ease things out for our customers, we are actively expanding our distribution network and delivery channels. Don't be surprised to find your favorite BabyOrgano products at your adjacent shop.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Itallian Hairtech
Description:
Com 29 anos no mercado, a Itallian Hairtech é uma empresa especializada no desenvolvimento de produtos de alta tecnologia e performance focada no público profissional cabeleireiro.

Com sede em São Paulo, a empresa é detentora das já conhecidas marcas: Itallian Color, Itallian Color Sopremo, Itallian Color Coloratto, Trivitt, Innovator, FastForm, Kerasoft, Professional Donna e Extreme Up.

São cerca de 200 itens, entre colorações permanentes e semipermanentes, itens de tratamento, hidratação e transformação, que chegam aos salões de todo o país por meio dos 300 distribuidores.

Para produzir e manter a qualidade de todos os produtos, a Itallian Hairtech possui uma unidade fabril com área de 10.000m² na cidade de Atibaia, a 50 km da capital paulista.

Além de toda essa estrutura, contamos ainda com a maior equipe técnica do Brasil, que, para a divulgação da qualidade e performance dos produtos, multiplica as informações por meio de cursos, feiras e eventos realizados por todo o país com o objetivo único de transmitir conhecimento e aperfeiçoamento ao profissional.

Name: Liane K General Trading
Description:
Liane K Officially began its operations early 2006 with a vision of providing Brand awareness and brand establishment through its professional channels with some well known luxury names such as Olivia Garden , Rejuvenol , Azzo

We operates quality focused business in beauty and cosmetic distribution ,Our comprehensive range of products is aimed towards upscale beauty salons, spas, medi-spas, nail bars and estheticians

Our mission is building brands that are innovative , unique and revolutionary in the region, by offering excellent service to our partners and unique experience to the beauty industry through our passionate teams.

Name: Miamo
Description:
Miamo, brand di cosmetici funzionali, nasce nel 2012 da due farmaciste, madre e figlia: Elena Aceto di Capriglia e Camilla D’Antonio.

La loro collaborazione ha permesso di coniugare tradizione e innovazione attraverso il dialogo tra due generazioni. La passione per la cosmetica è il trait d’union tra la storia e l'esperienza nei laboratori chimici italiani e le più moderne ricerche scientifiche americane.

Per rispondere in modo preciso alle esigenze della pelle accompagnandola in tutte le fasi della vita, i cosmetici funzionali Miamo utilizzano principi attivi accuratamente selezionati dalle migliori materie prime, capaci di svolgere azioni mirate e di provata efficacia. Non contengono sostanze allergizzanti comuni e ogni lotto viene testato per il contenuto di nichel, evitando il rischio di potenziali allergie o forme di intolleranza cutanea. 

Gli ingredienti e i prodotti Miamo sono sicuri e brevettati, sottoposti a test clinici, strumentali e dermatologici.

Name: BioLand
Description:
Líder regional en el diseño, fabricación y comercialización de productos cosméticos. 

Comprometida desde sus inicios con la salud del medioambiente y humana.

Name: Flimty
Description:
Flimty is an original Indonesian health brand that operates under the aegis of PT. Anugrah Inovasi Makmur Indonesia, Flimty is comitted to continuing to create international quality products at more affordable prices on the market. 

Founded in 2018, Flimty has produced 5 proud products whose benefits have been felt by the Indonesian people. Fiber (fiber drink), Flimeal (meal replacement), Flimbar (healthy snack bar), Flimburn (supplement to help reduce body fat) and Flimnoodle (healthy shirataki noodle). Flimty was successful in securing the 2021-2023 Top Brand Award by continually promoting a healthy lifestyle with high-quality products.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Color Street
Description:
Color Street is an innovative beauty brand that began over three decades ago when Founder & CEO, Fa Park, revolutionized the nail polish industry by creating the world’s first dry nail polish strips. Made of 100% real nail polish, Color Street nail strips gives a salon-quality manicure in just minutes with no dry time. In 2018, he introduced his revolutionary product to the direct sales world, bringing colorful opportunities to Independent Stylists nationwide. 

Available in a wide range of shades, glitters, shimmers and nail art with new limited edition sets introduced each month, Color Street nail polish strips are easy to wear and fun to sell. We invite you to reach out, learn more, and create your own personal path to success by becoming an Independent Stylist. 

For more information, visit colorstreet.com/home/enrollment.

Name: Promofarma
Description:
A PromoFarma iniciou suas atividades em 1964, quando seu fundador
Silvio Nakano, abriu as portas pela primeira vez em uma loja no
Lauzane Paulista, zona norte de São Paulo. 
Através de muito trabalho e dedicação, a PromoFarma foi crescendo com a liderança das suas filhas Nanci Nakano e Elisa Nakano, essa força feminina impulsionou um crescimento de mais de 85 lojas, 1 Centro de distribuição, Laboratório de Manipulação e E-commerce somando um time de mais de 1.600 funcionários. 
O nosso maior objetivo é servir com excelência os nossos clientes,
levando até eles os medicamentos que eles precisam, com os
melhores preços do mercado.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Unyva
Description:
Unyva | Raw African's Mother Company 
By the founders of Raw African & Bodiz | House of Brands
Based in Heliopolis | Innovating beauty, one brand at a time
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Leclair Cosméticos
Description:
O Grupo Leclair inaugurou sua Unidade Industrial em São José dos Pinhais/PR, em 1998, tendo como principal negócio a fabricação de sabonetes em barra de alta qualidade, hidroalcoólicos e semilíquidos em pequenos volumes.

Três anos depois, inaugurou a Unidade de Envase de hidroalcoólicos, passando a oferecer ao mercado o serviço de envase de miniaturas e de embalagens convencionais, tanto para produtos fabricados na própria indústria quanto de outros fabricantes. Nessa mesma área, inicialmente também eram montados kits e estojos promocionais, operação que em 2010 passou a ser feita em uma nova planta, a Unidade de Armazenagem & Serviços, equipada como operadora logística para atender a todas as necessidades de armazenagem, serviços, picking e distribuição para a indústria cosmética e também outros segmentos.

O Grupo Leclair conta ainda com o know how de fabricação e distribuição de produtos ao mercado hoteleiro - Leclair Amenities.

O fazer artesanal aliado a investimentos em alta tecnologia, levou o Grupo Leclair a conquistar grandes  clientes e tornar-se uma referência de qualidade e excelência no mercado.

As operações do Grupo Leclair se fortalecem e crescem com a segurança de uma organização que oferece garantia e satisfação a cada um de seus clientes.

Name: Sachal International Private Limited
Description:
Managed by highly competent and professional team serving more than 110 distributors across Pakistan. Sachal, in short span have developed very robust system of distribution to cover more than 25,000 FMCG/Cosmetics retail outlets including Key accounts like IMTIAZ, ChaseUp, Carrefour, CSD, Metro, Al-Fateh and many more regional chains of modern trade with the help of cutting edge secondary sales system.  We have also recently deployed world best ERP system "SAP" to strengthen further to achieve our Mission of achieving of 08 billion topline by 2028.

In 2022, Sachal took a pivot and shifted business model more toward developing premium quality personal-care  and home-care products under the company owned brands like GEON, SAGON, LOVEM, ZINGO and èllancé with the motto of providing international quality at affordable price to Pakistan customers as well as lowering the burden of Imports on our country.

Name: Scienza Cosmetica
Description:
Scienzacosmetica.com è formato da una rete di professionisti, specializzati in discipline differenti: medici, farmacisti, psicologi, naturopati, insegnanti e personal trainer; ci siamo uniti per dare vita a un portale nuovo, in cui trovare le risposte che cerchi, esposte con precisione ma soprattutto con passione! 

Nei nostri articoli troverai informazioni curiose e utili, ispirate dalle domande più comuni che ci vengono rivolte dai nostri pazienti e clienti nei colloqui privati. 

Da oggi le condivideremo anche con te.

Name: Argan Package
Description: متجر لبيع زيت الأرجان المغربي الأصلي الطبيعي 100 % والمنتجات التجميلية المغربية ذات الجودة العالية .

Name: CRB Cosmetics
Description:
For the past 30 years, CRB has embodied the attributes of beauty’s finest elements through skincare development and manifacturing. As a global leader in high performance skincare, CRB is the company behind some of the most prestigious brands across the world, providing them with Swiss quality and breathrough skincare innovations.
 
CRB has been part of the Intercos Group since 2006. Intercos is an extraordinary innovative global company which, for more than 40 years, has been successfully involved in the creation of colour cosmetic products for the leading international brand names in makeup. 

Together, CRB and Intercos are deeply involved in creating uniqueness for every brand.

CRB offers manufacture of skincare products in all categories and all segments of each market, from mass to prestige. Whether a client needs Bulk, Free Issue or Full service, we are the best partner to create a breakthrough on the market.  Besides our own creations, each customized development is focused on achieving the customer’s requirements.

Name: VI-JOHN Group
Description:
"What matters is not the idea a man holds, but the depth at which he holds it"
was rightly said by Ezra Pound and aptly suited to Late S.Suchet Singh Kochar when he laid the foundation of Vi-John in the year 1960. This ingenious gentleman was a man of wisdom, principles, and dynamic vision. It was a humble beginning with one small manufacturing unit catering to a segment of personal care products like Vaseline and Perfumed Hair Oil.

Over the years, with constant hard work, we feel proud that this multifaceted company ash spread its wings and is now one of the leading manufacturers of personal care, health care products & cosmetics under the brand name Vi-John. When it comes to quality personal care products Vi-John is on the fore. Our product portfolio includes a wide range of products across different categories like the World's Largest Selling Shaving Brand, Toiletries, Perfumes/Deo's, Talcum Powders, Skin Care (Winter), and Hair Care products. Our consistent quality has guaranteed our presence in the market for four decades as one of the leading FMCG companies in the country. It would not be out of place to mention here that "Our products are Vouch".

The prime reason behind Vi-John's credibility and trustworthiness is the excellent quality of the products.

Name: PharmaSpecial
Description:
Fundada em 1991, a PharmaSpecial, tornou-se umas das principais empresas do Brasil na distribuição de insumos químicos e farmacêuticos fracionados. É uma empresa familiar, com capital 100% nacional, e referência em qualidade e competência no mercado magistral e industrial.
Em sua trajetória, a PharmaSpecial tem feito parcerias exclusivas com grandes industrias de matérias primas, nacionais e internacionais, conquistando assim, a posição de destaque no mercado.

Name: Mary Kay
Description: I am a Mary Kay Independent Beauty Consultant

Name: SWATI Cosmetics
Description: The story of SWATI starts with two people falling in love. Vishal Nanda meets Swati Verma. Boom. Like all great love stories, it transcends borders. Vishal is an experienced Swedish entrepreneur, Swati a well-known Indian makeup artist. He’s struck by her appearance and how it changes with every mood and occasion. A natural beauty one day. Dressed to impress the next. Yet she always looks like herself. Confident. Stylish. Remarkably enough, even her eyes seem to change. From bright to dark and back again. He asks. “Cosmetic lenses,” she replies smiling. The rest is, as they say, history.

Name: COMPLIFE GROUP
Description:
Complife is an international group that provides consulting and testing services for cosmetics, nutraceuticals, medical devices & pharma.

We support our Clients to assess the safety, tolerability and efficacy of products, as well as their chemical and microbiological features and our Regulatory staff offers a total support for compliance: from R&D through production, distribution, up to market support.

Thanks to the distribution of subsidiaries and labs our experts can have a worldwide view regarding trends and regulatory issues, while our local laboratories ensure a focused and totally tailored reply to the clients.
 
From September 2025 Complife is part of the GBA Group, an international life science services company with over 3,500 employees in 13 countries and a wide range of analytical, logistical and specialist services, in complementary markets to those already addressed by Complife.

Name: Dr. Hauschka France
Description:
WALA France est la filiale française de WALA Heilmittel GmbH (Allemagne). 
Le groupe WALA s’est construit depuis 80 ans en s’appuyant sur des valeurs et des convictions très fortes.
Notre société, aujourd’hui présente dans 44 pays, poursuit un objectif : « Améliorer la santé et le bien-être de la femme et de l’homme en respectant l’environnement ». C’est ainsi que nos produits sont labellisés pour garantir une haute qualité de fabrication.
Notre marque, référente en matière de produits naturels et biologiques, est vendue en réseaux sélectifs (Grands Magasins, Magasins de produits naturels, Instituts, Pharmacie, Réseaux spécialisés) par des spécialistes formés et certifiés.

Dr. Hauschka (groupe WALA) est une marque pionnière en cosmétique biologique certifiée naturelle.  
Son Rituel de Soin s’articule en 3 étapes simples et hautement efficaces : nettoyer, stimuler et protéger, adapté à tous les aspects de peaux.  
Son concept de soin unique d’auto-correction de la peau et de soin de nuit non gras, s’inscrit dans une démarche profondément holistique. La peau est ainsi considérée comme un organe à part entière, pouvant prendre des aspects différents selon les influences intérieures et extérieures qu’elle subit. 

Dr. Hauschka propose des gammes complètes de Soins du Visage, de Soins du Corps et des Cheveux formulés à partir de plantes médicinales de qualité remarquable, cultivées en bio ou/et biodynamie. Pour la plupart, dans le jardin de plus de 150 variétés de plantes médicinales. Tous les produits Dr. Hauschka sont certifiés naturels par le label NATRUE. 

Des cosmétiques naturels, efficaces, 100% certifiés. Différents depuis 1967.

Name: ERNO LASZLO
Description:
Dr. Erno Laszlo was the pioneer of modern skincare, with a mission to optimize people’s inner and outer self through science-based regimes that restore skin health. His unique approach to enabling self-care and confidence through customized skin rituals is trusted by icons of the past and present. Erno Laszlo is recognized for delivering proven results through clean science, approaching the skin and mind as one entity, and addressing every client as an individual to deliver tailored solutions for every skincare need. 

Visit us at www.ErnoLaszlo.com

Name: Yes Hearing
Description:
Less than 25% of Americans with hearing loss actually own a hearing aid. This is largely down to two main factors: accessibility and price. 

At Yes Hearing our mission is to improve the access to hearing aids for all Americans whilst reducing the average price for a premium pair of hearing aids by up to $3000. 

Our network of expert audiologists and hearing specialists improve the accessibility to leading healthcare and hearing technologies through pioneering home visit treatment and remote care.

If you or a loved one are aware that you may suffer from hearing loss but have been dissuaded by the price, or the location of your local audiologist Yes Hearing is the ideal solution for you.

Visit https://www.yeshearing.com to buy your hearing aids and book your home consultation today.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Passion Beauté
Description:
Passion Beauté est le 1er groupement de parfumeurs indépendants. L'enseigne compte 90 parfumeries en France et dans les DOM-TOM.

Avec plus de 30 années d'expérience, Passion Beauté est avant tout un réseau regroupé autour d'une idée forte : concilier la compétence d'hommes de métier avec la dynamique de la distribution moderne.

Les magasins reposent sur l'alliance de deux espaces liés à la beauté :
- La parfumerie : un espace de vente et de conseil, de parfum, soin et maquillage.
- L'institut de beauté : un espace de bien-être animé par des professionnelles de l'esthétique.

Organisée en coopérative, Passion Beauté permet à chaque parfumeur d'être actionnaire, ce qui garantit la pérennité de l'enseigne.

Chaque associé est à la fois "Franchisé" lorsqu'il anime son magasin et "Franchiseur" lorsqu'il participe au développement de la Coopérative.

Name: HydroPeptide
Description:
HydroPeptide takes the most advanced, scientifically proven skin care elements and simplifies your beauty routine, age-proofing and restoring balance to all skin types. The HydroPeptide Collection includes an industry leading 62 different peptides, which are the building blocks of collagen and enable skin to look and act younger. HydroPeptide’s universal formulations fight signs of aging and address a range of skin care concerns in the fewest steps possible. HydroPeptide is Scientific Beauty Made Simple.

Powerful peptides instantly restore healthy skin structure and hydration. Carefully selected botanicals detoxify and rejuvenate. Every HydroPeptide treatment combats telltale signs of aging with the option to customize the treatment to address additional skin care concerns including – but not limited to – sensitivity, acne and hyperpigmentation.

Solar Defense: This non-greasy sunscreen self-adjusts to the color of your skin tone offering flawless coverage, while anti-aging elements hydrate, protect and help clarify the skin. 

Eye Authority: This four-dimensional eye cream immediately brightens dark circles while diminishing the look of expression lines, wrinkles and puffiness. 

Face Lift: Experience a visible face lift with this smart hydration cream that contains a mega-dose of multi-performance peptides that reinforce skin's defenses while thoroughly protecting against environmental stressors by restoring firmness and visibly improving the appearance of wrinkles and age spots. 

Shop best sellers: www.hydropeptide.com

Name: Savia Perfume Industry L.L.C
Description: Born in Dubai, UAE, in the year 2022, Savia Perfume Industry L.L.C is a premium manufacturer of fragrances. It offers multiple brands under its umbrella and caters to a wide range of consumers. To establish Savia as a household brand and carve out its niche, the company has partnered with renowned distributors and retailers globally, making its perfumes available worldwide. Every fragrance offers unique notes for every mood and occasion. Crafted with top-quality ingredients sourced globally and backed by innovative R&D, Savia creates long-lasting scents that deliver a rare and unique sensorial experience.

Name: The Detox Market
Description:
Since 2010, we’ve been obsessively curating the best of green beauty, combing through thousands of products so you can feel safe and confident in your choices. Whether you need help detoxing your beauty bag or finding a skincare regimen that works for you, we’re here to help—no matter what your journey looks like.

Everything we carry has been meticulously vetted by our team of experts—so instead of worrying about a product’s safety, you can enjoy what green beauty is all about: finding new ways to support your wellbeing, and having a great time along the way.

Name: Megababe
Description: A company making body care for real bodies. Taking the shame out of thigh chafe, boob sweat, B.O. and more! We make clean, effective, award-winning products to solve all sorts of normal body issues. Together we can tackle "taboo" body stuff to be more comfortable and confident.

Name: Beauty Garage Ltd
Description:
Beauty Garage stands for innovation, reliability, quality, trust, and competence. We are driven by a passion for creating beautiful hair, and this is reflected in each of our products.
Beauty Garage Professional exist for hairdressers,
they are at the heart of everything that we do. We offer innovative products, responsive support, expert education, accessible inspiration, and genuine celebration. Reinventing hair is our primary goal.
Our hair products are created with and for the hairdressers to give customer's, a cutting edge product with relevant services before anyone else. We bring you the latest hair trends
via our k9 series and digital influencers, global education and salon support programs,
tailored and delivered by truly passionate people.
We aim to provide hair care solutions to repair and restyle hair after damaging hair care treatments
An absolute passion for hair is what the brand is all about.

Name: Fix My Curls
Description:
We make curly hair products, specifically curated to care for naturally textured hair. Join our community today! 

Fix My Curls, started in 2019 by our Founder - Anshita Mehrotra at the age of 19, she was fresh out of college when she realised clean, affordable, and effective curly haircare brands didn't exist in India. She set out to create a niche yet necessary brand that had sulphate, silicone, and paraben free products that work for textured hair types, moreover she wanted to give consumers a community to come back to for anything related to their hair!

Today, Fix My Curls is available across 15 marketplaces in India, and 15 countries outside India, with a product range of 15 original formulations in various size, and bundle options for all textured hair.

Visit our website, or find us on your favourite marketplace, we're here to help you 'fix' your natural hair and bring them back to life.

Name: Faber-Castell Cosmetics
Description:
Faber-Castell Cosmetics is one of the leading private label manufacturers of cosmetic pencils and is working in partnership with the international cosmetics industry. Focusing on colour cosmetics and nail care, we design and develop state-of-the-art products as well as individual product developments. With nearly 800 employees world-wide, production sites in Germany, Brazil and the US and sales agents in 13 countries we are a truly global enterprise. 

Sustainability management and ecological responsibility have always been part of the Faber-Castell Group’s core value. As a member of the Group, Faber-Castell Cosmetics upholds these principles while responding to the demands of a dynamic cosmetics industry and is a pioneer in environmentally responsible cosmetics products. The company is audited and certified by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC).

CORE COMPETENCES
Best of Beauty
Colour cosmetics for the face, eyes and lips categories as well as nail care.
A balanced combination of colour and skin care. With our actives inside!-seal we guarantee a minimum amount of 20% active ingredients with their efficacy scientifically proven.

IT‘S OUR NATURE
From formula to packaging, natural cosmetics at its highest level: premium formulae based on carefully selected organic oils, combined with FSC certified wood and carrying internationally recognized labels.

Name: Eveline Cosmetics
Description:
We have been operating in the market since the early 1980s. With full dedication, we create cosmetics that meet the expectations of even the most demanding clients.

We follow trends and directions of development in the beauty industry. We share the knowledge and experience we have gained over several decades.

We are the largest Polish producer and exporter of cosmetics. Our products can be found in over 80 countries around the world.

Name: Regi Laboratories
Description:
Regi Laboratories is a global leading supplier in the color cosmetics and skincare industry with avant-garde R&D laboratories driving innovation in the beauty B2B  market.
 
Founded in Italy in 1994, Regi Laboratories comprises today production sites both in USA and India, backed up by the expertise, intuitive approach and highest quality standards of the Italian HQ.
 
Its one-of-a-kind  R&D and marketing team are driven by a passionate and constant research process, which fuels their ability to anticipate the market trends, to design, develop and finalize custom-made solutions, adjusting to the clients ever-evolving needs.
 
Creatively led, strategically driven, professionally skilled and quality obsessed, Regi Laboratories is a solid partner in innovation and product design.

Name: Caldera + Lab
Description:
At Caldera + Lab our mission is to enable men to experience the best versions of themselves through the potency of science backed, clean self care. Self care and self love are a catalyst for positive change in one’s life.

At Caldera + Lab, each team member plays an integral role in revolutionizing the realm of men’s care. As we embark on this journey together, remember that our collective mission transcends the boundaries of personal care, it’s about nurturing the well-being of every person who entrusts their skin to our care. Your dedication, creativity, and passion are the heartbeat of our brand, propelling us forward as industry pioneers. Together, let’s continue to set new standards, inspire confidence, and help men everywhere unlock the greatest versions of themselves. Welcome to the Caldera + Lab team, where every contribution is vital, and every milestone is a testament to our shared commitment to excellence.

Name: Nirvel Beauty Group
Description:
Nirvel Beauty Group, engloba nuestras marcas Nirvel Professional & LeviSsime, nuestras compañías Nirvel Cosmetics & Nirvel USA, y Nirvel Fundación. Con la visión de seguir ofreciendo lo mejor a todos: profesionales, clientes y empleados, porque Creemos en la belleza única de las personas.

Nirvel Beauty Group, nace para aglutinar todas las empresas y marcas del grupo, y lo hace con valores actualizados y con la misión de desarrollar y comercializar productos cosméticos profesionales de calidad por y para el bienestar de todos.

Name: Watier Cosmétiques
Description:
Watier is the leading Canadian prestige cosmetics brand, renowned for its trendsetting colour cosmetics, high-performance skin care and one-of-a-kind fragrances. Our products are distributed across Canada and in the United States. Part of the Groupe Marcelle family since 2016.
Interested in a position? We're always looking for new talent. Send sure to send your resume to rh@groupemarcelle.com. Please note that only retained candidates will be contacted.

Name: Mascavo
Description:
A Mascavo é uma marca de beleza fundada em 2024 pela empresária e influenciadora Mari Saad, com o propósito de tornar a relação com a beleza mais leve, acessível, consciente e conectada à identidade brasileira. Inspirada na beleza natural, a marca acredita que cuidar de si e sentir-se consigo mesma é a base para tudo na vida, por isso, queremos incentivar uma relação mais descomplicada com a beleza e a conexão com nossa própria essência. 

Seus produtos são desenvolvidos com alta performance e texturas que se adaptam a diferentes momentos e estilos. Guiada pelos pilares da naturalidade, energia e sensorialidade, a Mascavo incentiva o autocuidado e valoriza a liberdade de expressão, reforçando que cada um pode se sentir bem na própria pele.

Name: Kasha Global, Inc.
Description: Kasha is Africa's leading platform for access to health. A digital platform selling health products and household goods delivered to the last mile in multiple African countries, Kasha also works with manufacturers, global health organizations and governments offering a sustainable solution for market access in Africa for pharmaceuticals and fast moving consumer goods with end to end data visibility.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: THG LABS
Description:
YOUR PARTNERS IN BEAUTY
We’re the trusted UK-based product development and manufacturing partner for world-leading beauty brands - from big multi-nationals to ambitious indie start-ups. For 30+ years, our team of experts have been consistently creating award-winning skincare, haircare, bodycare, suncare and fragrance that stands out in the global market. 

MANUFACTURING MUCH-LOVED BEAUTY PRODUCTS
From bespoke concept right through to your beauty product landing on shelf, we support with seamless solutions when and where your brand needs them – whether it’s one, some or all of our services.
+ Innovation
+ Research & Development
+ Regulatory Compliance
+ Packaging
+ Artwork & Design
+ Quality Assurance
+ Process & Production
+ Warehousing

Name: FrontrowMD
Description:
At FrontrowMD, we’re on a mission to transform how people shop for healthcare related products and services. As a leader in the consumer-health movement, we empower individuals to discover trusted, affordable health products tailored to their unique needs—simplifying the journey toward better health and well-being.

Our vision is clear: make FrontrowMD the go-to source for reliable answers to health-related shopping questions. We address key consumer pain points like navigating complex health product markets, ensuring safety and efficacy, and accessing trustworthy recommendations.

Through cutting-edge features such as our trusted doctor badges, we’re building an ecosystem that delivers unmatched value for both consumers and brands. With a relentless focus on growth, innovation, and trust, we’re setting new standards for how people shop for health.

Join us in revolutionizing the future of healthcare shopping—because everyone deserves the front row to better health.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: philosophy
Description: philosophy's promise is to bring its customers products that inspire them to live a better life by being better to themselves. our products care for your skin and your overall well-being. we take a mind, body, spirit approach to personal care and believe only when you feel good can you truly look your best.

Name: Erborian
Description:
At Erborian, we’re reshaping the beauty game. We get it: the world constantly pushes us to compare and conform.
But for us, beauty means breaking the mold and owning who you are. Real self-esteem? It’s not given - it’s built through self-care that shows up on your skin and in the way you own your day.

We bring centuries of Korean beauty rituals and cutting-edge science together to help you step into your skin—unfiltered, and ready for anything.

Powered by Seoul, where ancient wisdom meets innovation, every Erborian product is loaded with high-powered Korean ingredients in supercharged formulas for real, visible results—without endless steps or harsh formulas. With and without color, it’s skincare in every form.

We’re done with fake beauty standards, retouching, and filters. Erborian champions bare skin and immediate results. With us, your skin reveals its full potential, supporting you through hustle, downtime, uptime and everything in between.

Our message? Look closer. Your skin has more to offer, and so do you.

And we don’t stop at skin. Through the “Erborian Self-Esteem Club” commitments program, we’re working on a broader mission: advocate and take concrete measures for causes closely linked to self-esteem: mental health, cyberbullying and professional reintegration. With 1%* of global sales going directly to our partners’ organizations, each Erborian product is more than skincare; it’s part of a commitment to reshape what it means to look and feel beautiful.

With Erborian, skincare is more than a ritual - it’s a booster for instant skin gratification and visible transformation.


*1 % of worldwide sales of ERBORIAN products recorded by the L’Occitane group over the previous fiscal year

Name: BioGroup HR
Description:
BioGroup has been founded as the 1st company specialized in Dermo-cosmetics field, Establishing & Stabilizing outstations (Alexandria, Delta, Canal & Upper Egypt), Establishing BioGroup Holding with Four companies; (Biolife, BioCosmetics, Biotech and Biotech Gulf). BioGroup (Egypt and KSA) Is ranked No.1 In the Middle East in Dermo-cosmetic Market.

BioGroup Partnership brands:

- Eucerin , Bionnex ,Dermactive ,Avene, Uriage, Mustela, Ducray, Nuxe, etc

Name: Zurko Research
Description:
ZURKO RESEARCH is a Contract Research Organization (Third Party Testing house) established in 2005. We offer a wide range of Clinical Safety & Efficacy studies for Cosmetics, Medical Devices/OTCs and Nutritional Supplements. Zurko Research is a privately held Spanish company with three testing sites in Spain: Madrid, Barcelona and Albacete and one site in New York, USA. With over 100 employees and more than 8,000 studies conducted each year we offer our services to clients in 47 countries worldwide, with a strong presence in Europe and North America.
Our primary area of expertise lies in Cosmetics testing, where we conduct studies in the following categories:
•	Skin Care,
•	Hair Care, 
•	Make-up, 
•	Deodorants and Anti-Perspirants, 
•	SPF (ISO and FDA)
•	Babies and Kids 
•	Safety Testing (including in vitro safety studies, as well as HRIPT, Patch tests and other Safety In Use studies)
•	Others

Additionally, our specialized Clinical Research team provides support to clients for studies requiring approval from an Independent Ethics Committee.
