This support includes protocol preparation and study monitoring for medical devices (instruments and aesthetic products), as well as for Nutritional supplements.

We firmly believe in our mission to ensure safe and efficacious products for consumers. A wide range of services and rapid turnaround time, combined with rigorous quality standards, makes us a partner of choice for the Personal Care Industry.

Name: Susanne Kaufmann
Description:
Proven skincare powered by nature. Made from the finest ingredients & leading sustainable innovations, we’re uncompromisingly natural & results-driven.

Created in 2003, SUSANNE KAUFMANN is natural, effective, and versatile. Founder Susanne Kaufmann’s vast experience, collected during the many years of practical work, goes into each product. Our products are produced with the greatest of care in the Bregenzer Forest and filled, sealed, and packaged by hand. 

Our philosophy is to support the skin’s natural functions so it can work at its best, allowing its vitality and beauty to shine. Our approach is holistic: we look at the whole picture and see skincare as a means of prevention so we can care for the skin’s specific needs with our tailored products and treatments.

The power of nature forms the cornerstone of our beauty, health and wellbeing philosophy - we bring together the beneficial properties of Alpine flora, locally sourced from the Bregenzerwald region in Austria, with proven skin science to develop our products and treatments. Our powerful natural formulas are created using only the finest plants and botanicals, carefully chosen for their efficacy and skin affinity, as well as pioneering sustainable manufacturing methods.

In order to fulfil our promise to offer natural, highly effective cosmetic products, we follow four ethical principles: quality, effectiveness, transparency, and sustainability. They guide all of our actions, clarifying our beliefs and what our products stand for.

www.susannekaufmann.com

Name: FAB BAG
Description:
At FAB BAG, we are beauty experts and addicts driven by our passion for high-quality beauty products and delightful service. We recognize that our members are beauty enthusiastic women looking for great products that would work for their specific beauty needs and tastes, but do not have enough time, access or resources to try out and experience all that is available. We work hard in association with brands to select 3 or more amazing products exclusively customized for each member and send them in a delightful bag to her doorstep every month so that she never has to make the expensive mistake of buying products that do not work for her! We also advise members on how to make the best use of these products and keep them abreast of the latest beauty and fashion trends.

We are growing our network of beauty addicts, experts and brands and would love to hear from you.

Name: Prosalon Distribuciones
Description:
We are the leaders in care and beauty in Colombia! We seek to reach different segments with our exclusive brands for all beauty categories (hair, makeup, nails, fragrances and skin care). 

Since 2012, we are passionate about carrying out beauty to the next level. We offer an avant-garde experience focused on the empowerment of our customers, through an exclusive portfolio. We currently have more than 100 stores in different business categories in the beauty industry: Blind Stores, Cromantic Stores, Beauty Channel and Modern Channel over the biggest retail stores in Colombia.

We want to motivate our clients to find the transforming power of their beauty, empowering them to feel free to discover, try and choose something that makes their routine a magical experience. 

Come and visit us!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: XMONDO HAIR
Description: At XMONDO Hair, we are at the forefront of innovation in the haircare industry. Founded by renowned hairstylist Brad Mondo, our brand is driven by technology and a progressive vision. We develop cutting-edge, high-performance haircare and color products designed to inspire confidence and self-expression.

Name: Ultraceuticals
Description:
ULTRACEUTICALS is the leading Australian Cosmeceutical skincare brand offering professional-grade products and in-clinic treatments, formulated to address major skin concerns such as ageing, pigmentation and acne to give you your best-ever skin.

Ultraceuticals was developed by cosmetic physician Dr Geoffrey Heber and is entirely Australian made and owned, these products and treatments offer doctor’s-office efficacy, without the prescription or the price tag. This Australian heritage gives the brand comprehensive understanding of how to protect and rejuvenate the skin under the harshest conditions in the world – the Australian sun.

Name: evident ingredients GmbH
Description:
Evident Ingredients is a specialty raw material supplier for the personal care industry based in Hamburg, Germany. We offer modern, natural and sustainable ingredients for all kinds of cosmetics. Our focus is set on modern and safe preservation with natural based preservatives, preservative boosters and multifunctionals. Our portfolio also covers vegetable based emulsifiers, emollients, thickeners and actives with anti-microbial or anti-oxidant activity. 

Along with our company’s philosophy of natural sourcing we are a science based company with chemists having more than 40 years background in Biochemistry and organic Chemistry and R&D in the cosmetic industry. We supply products as green as possible but with a clear priority on function and quality that satisfy the requirements of formulators.

Our Sales Team has a combined experience of more than 30 years in all major cosmetic markets all over the world. Knowing formulation and market trends, regulatory issues and logistics on every continent we are happy to serve our customers with every support needed. Working with excellent distribution partners in more than 50 countries around the world we are able to react quickly to your needs and support you in your projects with commitment and dedication.

If you are looking for modern specialty ingredients it is evident who you should contact.

Name: Mavive SpA
Description:
Mavive SpA is one of the leading Italian companies in the field of perfumery and offers a unique and wide range of products and marketing expertise.
Mavive SpA is widely present on the Italian market in the sectors of prestige and premium mass. Mavive SpA also distributes its famous brands in 90 countries all over the world.

Name: OREAN
Description:
An award-winning B Corp certified; cosmetic manufacturer with sites in both the UK and US. 

We offer product development and technical support to all our customers.
We have an innovative and creative technical team who work closely with our clients to produce bespoke products for hair, skin, body, and sun care. We are also specialists in developing efficacious natural products. Many of our formulations have won prestigious industry awards.

Our Commercial Team has a technical background and keeps abreast of new technologies developed by the raw material suppliers. They will work directly with you to ensure the end product meets your expectations and requirements.

Name: Hebe Beauty Philippines
Description: One of the fastest growing beauty company in the country.

Name: MULAC
Description:
Mulac is the product of Cindy’s creative genius, combined with the experience of highly qualified professionals in the production of natural-based cosmetics.

The project was launched in March 2013 with the aim of creating a beauty company that combined high quality natural raw materials with top performance, as required by makeup professionals. Our goal is to make professional cosmetics accessible to everyone, without sacrificing the well-being of the skin.

The uniqueness of Mulac products represents our idea of makeup, based on creativity and the art of transforming oneself. Everyone needs to feel appreciated and valued in their uniqueness every day, which is why Mulac has chosen to make unconventional cosmetics. If we were all the same, where would the fun be?

Name: QUINTAL Laboratório Dermatológico
Description:
Ciência regenerativa para sua pele.


Parte do ecoh, o Ecossistema de Negócios da Herbarium Laboratório Botânico, a QUINTAL resgata saberes ancestrais e os une à sustentabilidade e alta tecnologia. Nosso propósito é promover o cuidado com a pele como uma ferramenta de reconexão interior e resgate da autoestima, valorizando a beleza em sua forma mais autêntica: um estado de espírito.

Name: WWP Beauty
Description:
TOGETHER WE CREATE BEAUTY WITH PURPOSE 
WWP Beauty is committed to creating Beauty with Purpose by developing innovative sustainable, future-focused solutions for the global beauty industry through close collaboration, exceptional agility, and unparalleled scale. 
Through a worldwide team of beauty experts that spans North America, EMEA, and APAC, we offer our customers global support at the local level.                
Our company's full-service offering of mindful turnkey formulations, eco-smart packaging designs, and accessories paired with our in-house manufacturing, integrated network, and superior quality allows us to stand out as "The Partner for Beauty with Purpose."                                                                            

To learn more, visit our website at www.wwpbeauty.com

Name: Khadi Natural
Description:
Serving mankind with natural products since 1963, Khadi Natural needs no introduction. We are proud to be the oldest & trustworthy brand in the beauty & healthcare sectors. Affiliated with KVIC, ISO, WHO & GMP, we deliver products that are crafted using 100% Ayurvedic formulation. Free from paraben, sulfates & harmful chemicals, our products are enriched with the goodness of nature.
Our dedicated & hardworking team aims to maintain the brand image & top-notch position that has been retained through ages. The quality & purity we maintain while creating the products makes us stand out amongst the rest. Extracted from natural & herbal ingredients, our products are absolutely safe to use.
All the products under our brand name are clinically & dermatologically tested. Expert supervision assures the purity of the manufactured products. No animal testing is done & so can rest assure that true to our name we are a cruelty-free company. Furthermore, our exclusive ranges of healthcare & beauty products are free-from chemicals. This means that rather than causing more damage, they intend to repair it.  
We are a certified brand & therefore aim to deliver products without compromising with the quality & quantity. The love & support we have earned from our reputed clients & customers keeps us going. It, therefore, becomes our utmost priority to come up to their expectations & reach way beyond it. We also proudly brag about another star added to our profile i.e., the certification from the Ayush department.
Shop from a wide variety of skin, hair & body care, aromatherapy, gifts & combos, soaps & sun shield ranges. Order online from the comforts of your home or make an extra effort to visit our esteemed stores nearby you.
A leading manufacturer, exporter & supplier for natural & authentic products, Khadi Natural Healthcare boasts of covering the majority of India. Keeping in mind to promote the benefits of Indian Ayurveda & products derived from it, we happily export worldwide.

Name: ODEN
Description: ODEN est une marque de soins naturels issus de plantes cultivées en France.

Name: Tsu Cosméticos
Description:
Tsu Cosméticos es una marca argentina con más de 35 años en el mercado. Líder entre las compañías nacionales de venta directa, Tsu invierte en tecnología e investigación científica, aceptando el desafío de ser líder en un mundo en continua evolución. Cuenta con uno de los laboratorios más innovadores del país, por lo que desde 1975 comercializa productos de elaboración propia y ofrece una amplia variedad de cosméticos de excelente calidad, a un precio accesible.

Con el correr de los años, Tsu fue incorporando productos de otras marcas de renombre y artículos no cosméticos, como bijouterie, indumentaria, literatura y musicales. Además, sumó el catálogo de Hogar & Soluciones.

A través del servicio de venta directa, logró conformar una amplia red de revendedoras que cubre el territorio nacional y sigue creciendo día a día, con un potencial de 4 millones de clientes. A su vez, desde 1997, tiene presencia en Uruguay.

En Tsu trabajan más de 1100 personas de diversas profesiones, distribuidas en casi 50 áreas. La empresa brinda el apoyo y respaldo necesario para que todos sus empleados se desarrollen profesionalmente, valorizando y reconociendo el esfuerzo. El trabajo en equipos interdisciplinarios, el respeto y cuidado del personal son las claves de su política de RR.HH. 


Si estás interesado en formar parte de la compañía, podés enviarnos tu cv a empleos@tsucosmeticos.com.ar

Name: Unfabled
Description:
Unfabled is a consumer health platform transforming women’s wellbeing by providing curated & personalised solutions. 

Unfabled Labs is our consumer insights & research platform designed to accelerate innovation in the women’s health and wellbeing industry.

We're on a mission to close the gender health gap.

Raised $4M to-date from leading investors including Morgan Stanley, Sequoia Scout and Exceptional Ventures.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: VOYA
Description:
An Irish organic lifestyle brand that creates hand-harvested seaweed skincare, lifestyle products & spa treatments that are available globally in luxury outlets.

Brand Mission:
VOYA promotes an organic philosophy and provides high-quality, truly organic, seaweed-based wellness and beauty products and experiences. To continue the sustainable harvesting practices of our forefathers with the integrity of the seaweed bath tradition. To strive to make our impact as low as possible and be an example of environmental responsibility, not just in the world of beauty.

Company Overview:
VOYA began for us in 1912 when the first seaweed baths opened on the wild Atlantic coast of Strandhill, Co.Sligo, Ireland. Seaweed baths have been popular for over 300 years.

Name: Clean Beauty Collective Inc.
Description:
We are CLEAN BEAUTY COLLECTIVE. We’re proud to say that we’ve been setting the standard for world-class fragrances since 2003. We’ve always put our consumers' safety first. That’s why we always vet ingredients both natural and synthetic for safety—without sacrificing the complexity of our perfumes. And to ensure a healthy and happy planet for future generations, our packaging is eco-conscious. We work with partners that use green manufacturing practices, and our fragrances are infused with responsibly sourced, sustainable ingredients that give back. And we never test on animals.

We make the simple, trusted, and conscious choice every step of the way.

For more information, please visit our brand website: www.cleanbeauty.com.
To work with us, please send us an email: collaborations@cleanbeauty.com.

#CleanPerfume
#CleanBeauty
#CleanReserve

Name: SCENTEC Fragrances
Description:
Fragrance House founded in 1990, responsible for perfuming thousands of cosmetic, hygiene, cleaning, environment, brands, and products that delight its consumers creatively and safely.

Partnering with IFF for more than three decades allows us to access a global class olfactory palette both in its quality and exclusivity, as well as in its traceability and commitment to a better world.

Balancing art and technique in our daily lives, projects and decisions is what makes our collective of people a sensitive and collaborative force capable of taking us to places, challenges and dreams that can only be achieved together.

Our network is made up of more than 1,300 customers from the most different and unusual product categories and 5,000 olfactory projects developed annually.

Name: Alvadiem
Description:
Alvadiem est le pionnier de la Dermatologie Apicole, la contraction unique de la dermo-cosmétique ET de la naturalité, une offre qui place les actifs de la ruche comme des actifs de référence en dermatologie. 

Une prouesse possible grâce à un savoir-faire unique qui mêle expertise approfondie des mécanismes physiopathologiques de la peau, à la connaissance pointue du pouvoir des actifs de la ruche, le tout allié à une maitrise historique de la formulation au naturel.

Name: Godrej Argentina
Description:
Godrej es una compañía multinacional, de origen indio. Nació hace más de 120 años y actualmente factura  USD 5.200 millones al año. La sede del grupo está en Mumbai (India) y cuenta con gran diversidad de unidades de negocio: consumo masivo, soluciones de seguridad, electrodomésticos, ingeniería industrial, ingeniería aeroespacial, agro, petit markets y bienes raíces. Además de Latinoamérica, la compañia tiene presencia en Asia, África, US y Medio Oriente. 
En LATAM, somos alrededor de 550 empleados y contamos con equipos y dos plantas de producción en Argentina y Chile. Nuestra visión de largo plazo es democratizar el cuidado personal y actualmente lideramos la categoria de tinturas y Styling y estamos creciendo aceleradamente en cremas corporales, protectores solares, depilatorios y jabones. Nuestras marcas son: Issue, Ilicit, Villeneuve, Roby, 919, ColorPlex, L’Eau Vive, Issue Professional y Millefiori. 
Para más información, ingresar a www.godrejlatam.com.
Location: Buenos Aires City, Buenos Aires Autonomous City

Name: Hello Klean
Description:
Meet Hello Klean, the water experts revealing – and resolving- the beauty
issues associated with hard water.

Did you know the hidden source of dullness, dehydration, irritation, dryness that’s
compromising your skin and hair? Neither did we. Until we got wise to the fact that the issue isn’t any products...it’s our water.

Name: Organic Traveller
Description: Organic Traveller is the small but mighty force behind Pakistans most loved skincare products. A skin first progressive organisation serving the needs of its Pakistani consumer base through innovation, results and self acceptance. We provide you with results oriented skincare formulas that work. Cleanse, treat and protect your skin with Organic Traveller.

Name: Worldwide Distribution Center FZCO
Description:
Worldwide Distribution Center (WDC FZCO) is a leading Multi Product, Multi Activity distribution company located in the United Arab Emirates with global reach. Our company represents such well-known companies as L’Oréal, Colgate, Henkel & Schwarzkopf, Beiersdorf, Himalaya Herbals, Unilever, Imperial Dax, Namaste Laboratories, Luster Products, Dr. Miracle’s, Fruit of the Earth, WIPRO-UNZA, Strength of Nature Co., J. Strickland etc.
With the experience of high level sales professionals, we have been proved as a reliable business partner to the companies we represent. WDC FZCO distributes its line of products in the United Arab Emirates, Middle East, Africa and CIS countries. During the years of successful work and dynamic development, we have developed our own principles, based on constantly refined system of customer service, modern inventory management system, extensive dealer network, highly skilled staff and focus on product needs of our customers.

WDC FZCO has two main divisions:

- Multicultural, engaged in supplies and sales of ethnic products from leading manufacturers.
- General Market Products, engaged in supplies and sales of a wide range of every day products to the retailers.

With the head office in Dubai, UAE and the partnership offices in India (New Delhi, Mumbai), Uzbekistan (Tashkent), allows us to quickly respond to changing business environment and address operating issues as well as maintain the intensity of business development in strategic and important regions. 

WDC FZCO is among the fastest growing companies in its category and has earned the respect of its consumers, trade customers, principals and suppliers.

Name: ADA TINA Italy
Description:
ADA TINA Italy | A Vanguarda da Ciência Dermatológica

Quem Somos: Excelência e Alta Performance Desde 2007, a ADA TINA redefiniu o conceito de eficácia no mercado dermocosmético. Fundada pelo farmacêutico e especialista em cosmetologia Dr. Maurizio Pupo, unimos a sofisticação da tecnologia italiana à expertise no tratamento da pele brasileira.

Nossa missão não é apenas criar cosméticos, mas desenvolver soluções de Padrão Dermatológico Superior. Somos a referência absoluta no tratamento de Melasma Resistente e pioneiros em Fotoestabilidade, transformando a maneira como se encara a proteção solar no Brasil.

Nossos Pilares de Diferenciação: Não seguimos o mercado; nós o lideramos com ciência proprietária:

Tecnologia Solent 12hs: Estabelecemos um novo marco em fotoproteção. Enquanto o padrão convencional exige reaplicações, nós garantimos 12 horas de estabilidade e proteção integral.

Segurança Dermatológica (Life Concept): Nossa integridade formuladora é inegociável. Banimos mais de 10.500 ingredientes controversos. Somos Cruelty Free, Vegan, Mother-Friendly e formulamos para as peles mais exigentes.

A Escolha do Especialista: Somos a marca prescrita por dermatologistas que buscam resultados clínicos visíveis, não apenas promessas.

Reputação & Legado Nossa eficácia é validada pelos principais veículos de mídia (Vogue, Marie Claire, Elle) e pela confiança sólida do consumidor, certificada com excelência no Reclame Aqui.

Faça Parte da Evolução Na ADA TINA, inovação e ética caminham juntas. Se você busca uma trajetória profissional pautada pela ciência, pelo respeito e pela transformação real da autoestima, este é o seu lugar.

Conecte-se conosco:  Site: www.adatina.com  Instagram: @adatinaitaly  YouTube: @adatinavideos

Name: Primally Pure
Description: Primally Pure is a natural skincare company that inspires fresh perspectives on beauty through traditional practices. We believe that caring for your skin shouldn’t come at the expense of your health, and formulate products using fewer + better ingredients derived from nature for maximum purity and potency. We seek to improve the health, well-being and confidence of our community through powerful, non-toxic skincare products, life-changing clean living education and intentional human connection.

Name: SULT
Description: 2 friends trying to make a hydration company
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Description:
OUR COMPANY
- Master Distributor of fine fragrances and cosmetics for Travel Retail markets of the Americas
- Sales & Marketing Agent for Local Markets of Latin America
- Family Company Founded in 1988

OUR PHILOSOPHY
- Collaborate closely with our brands
- Follow our brands’ core values

- Maintain long-term partnerships

OUR ADDED VALUE
- Expertise in beauty distribution
- Highly qualified and talented teams
- Strong historical presence in the region

- Efficient logistics and warehouse management

Name: Rohto-Mentholatum (Việt Nam)
Description:
Rohto Mentholatum Viet Nam is a subsidiary company of Rohto Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., - one of Japan's leading Pharmaceutical Groups specializing in health care and beauty care products. 

With the spirit of “NEVER SAY NEVER”, showing a high determination to face all difficulties, continuously creating and pioneering to overcome limitations, during our 27 years of presence in the Vietnamese market, we have not focusing only on developing health care and beauty care products, but also expanding into new fields such as regenerative medicine, food science, etc. with market-leading brands such as V. Rohto, Hadalabo, Sunplay, Oxy, Acnes, Lipice… All for a healthier and more beautiful Vietnam, both mentally and physically!

Rohto-Mentholatum (Vietnam) is always interested in human resource development and training because we always understand that people are the decisive factor for the success and development of the Company.

Working at Rohto, you will experience many challenges but also many opportunities for career development. Even more interesting is that here, with the bottom-up spirit, we always encourage initiatives, create opportunities for innovation and empower young teams for optimal efficiency and productivity.

We are always pleased to welcome members to Rohto-Mentholatum (Vietnam) with talent, intelligence, moral qualities and passion for work.

If you have the same passion and direction as us, please join and experience it with us !
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Silgan Dispensing Brazil
Description: A Silgan Dispensing é líder mundial em beleza, cuidados pessoais, higiene bucal e embalagens farmacêuticas. Nosso grupo opera 38 instalações na Europa, Ásia e Américas.

Name: Farouk Systems
Description: Farouk Systems is a company of hairdressers for hairdressers. Based in Houston, Texas, USA, Farouk Systems manufactures products and tools under the brands CHI, BioSilk, CHI Man, CHI Pet and Sunglitz, for shipment to over 100 countries worldwide. Through Advanced American Technology, professionals and consumers are provided with the most sought after hair tools and products in the industry.

Name: YOUTH LAB.
Description:
YOUTH LAB. is an international skincare expert utilizing technologically advanced biocompatible / biomimetic ingredients with proven efficacy.

Its unique and enduring competitive advantage lays in the main promise, of enhancing and Activating Skin Metabolism.

Metabolic functions slow down over time, thus affecting skin cellular renewal.

YOUTH LAB.’s scientific team develops advanced formulas with biocompatible active ingredients, achieving high levels of bio absorption, aiming at intensifying cellular renewal as well as protecting skin from negative impact of external aggressors and diminishing the natural damage of time.

Technology and science will always push the boundaries for new active ingredients and advanced formulas, leading YOUTH LAB. to be a pioneering innovative brand.

Strong commitment to clean beauty is deeply embedded into YOUTH LAB. philosophy, as a core value and is in full alignment with our respect for skin and the planet.

International presence in more than 15 countries.

Name: gitti Conscious Beauty
Description:
We are here to revolutionize the beauty industry. Our mission is to make beauty conscious and sustainable. That's why we make innovative beauty products with sustainable packaging that are better for you and better for our planet.

We believe that conscious beauty is the future of beauty. It’s about clean ingredients, sustainable packaging and being comfortable in your skin.

Name: GOODIEBOX
Description: GOODIEBOX er en online virksomhed, hvis mission er at skabe relationer mellem skønheds- og kosmetikbrands og forbrugerne. Vi giver både store internationale brands og mindre nichebrands muligheden for at markedsføre deres produkter direkte til en specifik målgruppe, som er interesseret i deres produkter. Hver måned sender vi tusindvis af medlemmer en sampling af produkter i en GOODIEBOX, hvorefter medlemmerne tester, bedømmer og ofte genkøber de udvalgte produkter.

Name: Upper Canada Soap
Description: Partner with Upper Canada Soap to redefine trendiness and innovation in the retail landscape. Our globally acclaimed brands, including Danielle Creations, Yes Studio, The Vintage Cosmetic Company, and ERASE YOUR FACE, position us as leaders in Bath, Beauty, and Wellness. We offer a forward-thinking and diverse product range that sets new standards for excellence and style.

Name: LABOMAI
Description:
LABOMAI is a family company with +40 persons working on the entire production of its own brands: ACTIVILONG, MISS ANTILLE INT., MAITRISE PRO, CURLY-NICE, ASEBACTIL...
Created in 1983 by Yannick CHEFFRE, who's an expert hairdresser for textured hair since 1957 in the West Indies and in Paris, LABOMAI markets its products in supermarkets, in drugstores, on internet websites in France, and abroad. Its expertise has been reconized by his leadership position and with several awards (7 Beauty awards : Victoires de la Beauté).

Name: Hitech Formulations Private Limited
Description:
Hitech Formulations is a leader in Dermatology and Skincare Research and Manufacturing in India. HF is an ODM (Original Design Manufacturing) partner with many reputed Pharmaceutical and D2C Brands in India and Overseas. Some of its notable associates include Mankind, Cadila, Brinton, Mama Earth, Re'equil and Healthkart amongst many others. 

At Hitech, we are on a mission to deliver exceptional value through world-class research and manufacturing.

Name: BEAUTY SUCCESS
Description:
Beauty Success est un Réseau de 310 points de vente en France Métropolitaine et à l'international.
Depuis 25 ans, nous sommes le premier réseau de Parfumeries & Instituts en franchise et en succursale qui défend les valeurs de convivialité, de respect, de professionnalisme et de proximité.

Name: PÜR Beauty
Description:
Since the brand’s inception in 2002, PÜR has redefined clean beauty, offering PÜR Beauties good-for-you products that deliver both immediate and long-term results. From highly efficacious mineral-based makeup to transformative skincare solutions, PÜR believes that innovative, skincare-infused products are the only way to go! Each carefully created product is designed to accentuate your natural-born beauty by covering skin imperfections and correcting the skin’s overall appearance using clinically proven technology. 

Treat yourself—and your skin—to a line that formulates with Ü in mind. Enjoy our skin-enhancing complexion formulas and strikingly gorgeous color products that deliver the pigment you crave in highly blendable, buildable formulas. 

While our proprietary technology may be complex, our method is PÜR and simple! We believe that the ultimate luxury is indulging in high-performance complexion and color products that align with your lifestyle. Breathe easy knowing that we formulate cruelty-free products that never contain parabens, gluten, talc, petrolatum, mineral oil and SLS. 
For more information, visit www.purcosmetics.com.

Name: Bayport Laboratories
Description:
At Bayport, we live and breathe beauty! With a burning passion for cosmetics, an unwavering commitment to perfection and an innovative spirit, we bring our clients the finest formulations that the industry has to offer.

Our R&D Laboratory, production, filling, and assembly lines are fully automated and GMP compliant, so you can trust that every aspect of our manufacturing process is held to the highest standard. We also meet the requirements of ISO 22716 compliance, ensuring that our manufacturing facilities and processes are top-notch.

Name: Strands Hair Care
Description: Strands Hair Care helps people discover their true hair and scalp condition by using advanced analytical tests. We then design and deliver personalized shampoo and conditioner that is optimized for each person’s hair and scalp condition, texture, environment and lifestyle - ensuring each customer has the knowledge and products required to maintain hair health and beauty.

Name: Pacific World Corporation
Description:
Pacific World Corporation is a leading innovator and supplier of proprietary beauty care products to the food, drug, mass and value retail channels worldwide.  Our heritage brands include NailsInc., Holler, Trim, Dippity Do, Sensationail, and Nailtural.  

Pacific World markets over 4,000 products in more than 89,000 retail locations in over 80 countries worldwide.  The company is currently the fifth largest cosmetics company and the largest nail care company by units sold in food, drug, and mass retailers in the U.S.

For current career opportunities please visit our LinkedIn page.

Name: Softcare Kenya Company Ltd.
Description: Softcare Kenya is home to Kenya's Leading Hygienic Products- sanitary pads, baby diapers etc. We take pride in being at the forefront of menstrual health advocacy and FMCG industry propulsion.

Name: TEMPLESPA Skincare
Description:
Marrying clinically proven formulas with naturally rich botanicals, TEMPLESPA is beauty redefined. Merging the finest derma science with the warmth and vitality of the Mediterranean, our 100% British brand has a truly global appeal. 

Founded in 2000, TEMPLESPA is built on over 20 years of skincare breakthroughs and cutting-edge science. But our heart, well, that’s full of sunlight. 

With a deep respect for our awe-inspiring planet, our ethically conscious brand creates results-driven, science-led skincare that’s bathed in Mediterranean sunshine.

Name: Oligo Professionnel
Description: Oligo Professionnel, was founded almost 30 years ago in the heart of Montréal—so both dedication and savoir-faire just come naturally to us!  The complex and highly sophisticated technologies used in the Oligo Professionnel series have been tested and re-tested, delivering the kind of performance, reliability, consistency, and excellence only true dedication can provide! As such, we are committed to providing the best training, continuous technical support and of course, the salon-only Oligo Professionnel line.

Name: Melvita Official
Description:
Melvita est une marque de cosmétique française créée par Bernard Chevillat en Ardèche en 1983. Biologiste visionnaire, il était convaincu que le futur de la beauté résidait dans l’alliance entre science et nature.
 
Ainsi, depuis 40 ans, Melvita s’inspire de la nature pour créer des soins bio régénératifs. Nos formules rééquilibrent et renforcent les mécanismes naturels de régénération de la peau pour qu’elle retrouve sa vraie nature.  Elles s’inscrivent dans une démarche régénérative globale, en apportant à la planète plus qu’elles ne lui prennent. 
 
La mission de Melvita ? Proposer une beauté propre, consciente et équitable, sans compromis sur la qualité.

 Melvita c’est: 
 Une efficacité prouvée, brevetée et révolutionnaire : nos 200 soins vont bien au-delà de l’hydratation ou de la nutrition, ils régénèrent la peau. 
 Des formules ultra-clean et composées d’actifs 100 % naturels, développées et fabriquées dans notre laboratoire et usine éco-conçue de Lagorce.
 Des textures ultra-sensorielles sans aucun ingrédient controversé, une prouesse pour du bio.
 Une marque engagée depuis toujours : nous cherchons à prendre soin de tous les êtres vivants. Nous sommes certifiés B Corp et les premiers à avoir développé un pot universel rechargeable, compatible avec toutes nos gammes.
 
Aujourd’hui, notre vision continue de rayonner bien au-delà de l’Ardèche : nous sommes présents dans 35 pays, où nos soins sont proposés en pharmacie et en magasin bio.
Envie d’en savoir plus ? Retrouvez-nous sur melvita.com.

Name: Scarlett Indonesia
Description:
Welcome to the Official LinkedIn Page of Scarlett Indonesia!

As one of Indonesia’s fastest-growing local beauty companies, we are proud to redefine beauty standards through innovation and excellence.

Since our founding in 2017, Scarlett Indonesia has been committed to empowering individuals to #LevelUpYourBeauty with high-quality products spanning personal care, skincare, and hair care.

With a strong social media presence of over 5.2 million followers and a widespread reach across online and offline channels throughout Indonesia, we are making beauty accessible and inclusive for everyone.

Our ambition is to lead and inspire in the beauty industry, and we invite you to join us on this journey as part of our #STARlett.

Let’s create a brighter, more beautiful future together!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Oriflame Cosmetics
Description: We're a people-powered wellbeing and beauty community with an entrepreneurial spirit – a supportive cheer squad ready to empower your journey with the beauty of your wellbeing. Together, we'll help you carve out your unique path to wellbeing – so you can enjoy the ride.

Name: NARS Cosmetics
Description:
Makeup artist. Photographer. Iconoclast. 

Creative visionary François Nars launched NARS Cosmetics with 12 iconic lipsticks in 1994. Today, he continues to inspire self-expression and imaginative artistry through his rule-breaking philosophy of beauty. NARS’ boundary-pushing approach manifests from audacious products to daring stories and arresting campaigns—bringing high-fashion, high-style, and forward thinking to beauty. 

United by a shared passion for authenticity and excellence, the NARS team is dedicated to delivering innovation and inspiration. NARS offers a variety of employment opportunities—from marketing to artistry, and beyond. 
In 2000, NARS joined Shiseido Group, home to 16 prestige beauty and fragrance brands. NARS’ seductive lineup of products can be found at many stores in countries world-wide. 

“Empowerment and creativity is at the heart of everything we do at NARS, and we hope these ideas are embraced by women all over the world.” —François Nars, Founder and Creative Director of NARS Cosmetics 

To see our current openings visit our career site at jobs.shiseidoamericas.com

Name: Lush Fresh Handmade Cosmetics North America
Description:
Founded in 1995 by six co-founders—Mark and Mo Constantine, Rowena Bird, Helen Ambrosen, Liz Bennett, and Paul Greeves—Lush began as a small cosmetics shop in Poole, Dorset, UK. Since then we have been pioneers in the beauty industry, committed to creating fresh, handmade products that are as kind to the planet as they are to your skin. We pride ourselves on using ethically sourced ingredients and developing cruelty-free, innovative products that challenge the status quo. Our dedication to environmental sustainability and ethical practices is embedded in everything we do.

At Lush, we strive to leave the world lusher than we found it. This means actively working to reduce our environmental footprint through packaging-free products and supporting causes that matter. We fight for animal rights, promote fair trade, and push for real, meaningful change in the beauty industry. Our mission is about more than products—it’s about changing the way the world sees beauty.

As a 10% employee-owned company, Lush values the contributions of every individual. Our team is the driving force behind our creativity, innovation, and commitment to a better future. By empowering our people and staying true to our mission, we continue to lead the charge for a more ethical, sustainable, and inclusive beauty industry.

Name: ADCOS IND. E COM.
Description:
ADCOS Cosmética de Tratamento
Sua missão é incentivar e desenvolver a pesquisa em parceria com a comunidade científica, de modo a obter produtos e serviços inovadores, seguros e eficazes.

Desde sua fundação em 1993, a ADCOS consolidou-se como uma indústria com foco no desenvolvimento de cosméticos de tratamento. O maior objetivo da marca é unir a pesquisa e tecnologia para oferecer soluções de excelência em tratamentos dermocosméticos inovadores e com resultados comprovados.

SAC 0800 722 11 23 # Telenacional 0800 979 11 62 # www.adcos.com.br

Name: MARS Cosmetics
Description:
Beauty meets affordability, creativity, and kindness — because at Mars Cosmetics, makeup is for everyone.

Mars Cosmetics is a new-age Indian beauty brand redefining affordable makeup with professional performance. Designed for Indian skin tones, powered by global innovation, and rooted in inclusivity — every Mars product is made to inspire self-expression, not perfection.

With 600+ SKUs across Eyes, Lips, and Face — many of which are category leaders on marketplaces — Mars Cosmetics brings world-class formulas to your vanity without world-class prices.

What makes us different?

100% Vegetarian and Cruelty-Free products

Globally sourced from India, Germany, Taiwan & China

Optimized value chain that ensures high-quality without high cost

Available on marscosmetics.in
, Nykaa, Purplle, Tira, Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Meesho, Blinkit & Zepto.

Follow @reachedmars on Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube for a daily dose of color, creativity, and confidence.

Mars Cosmetics — Makeup for Everyone.

Name: Too Faced Cosmetics
Summer Fridays
Description: Busy lives require beauty solutions that can adapt to whatever you’re doing and wherever you’re going. Our collection of clean, vegan, cruelty-free products deliver highly efficacious results with a focus on simplicity for that Summer Fridays feeling every day.

Name: Tower 28 Beauty, Inc.
Description: Tower 28 Beauty is a skincare and makeup brand focused on creating safe and fun products for sensitive skin. Founded by Amy Liu, the company offers non-irritating, high-performance beauty products that are Derm Approved and Certified Clean at various retailers. Tower 28 emphasizes clean beauty with ingredients that are gentle yet effective, catering to all skin types, especially sensitive skin. Additionally, the company is committed to sustainability through initiatives like using PCR packaging and supporting ocean conservation efforts. Tower 28 also runs programs like Clean Beauty Summer School to empower BIPOC-founded beauty brands.

Name: Sunday Riley
Description: Sunday Riley is a results-driven skincare brand renowned for its innovative approach to beauty. By combining cutting-edge science with the power of nature, Sunday Riley delivers transformative products that balance high-tech ingredients with potent botanicals. Each formula is meticulously crafted to provide visible results while maintaining skin's harmony. With a commitment to innovation, effectiveness, and sustainability, Sunday Riley empowers confidence through skincare that works.

Name: Diptyque Paris
Description:
The diptyque story began in Paris at 34 boulevard Saint-Germain with, at its heart, three friends driven by the same creative passion. Christiane Gautrot was an interior designer, Desmond Knox-Leet, a painter, and Yves Coueslant, a theater director and set designer. The first two collaborated designing fabrics and wallpaper for Liberty and Sanderson. 

They were joined by the third in 1961 and opened a shop to display their designs. Yves became the administrator and consultant; Desmond and Christiane were the artistic soul. Bit by bit, with finely honed taste, the trio transformed the site into a one-of-a-kind setting, a kind of stylish bazaar where one found surprising articles unmatched in Paris, mined and conveyed home by the trio over the course of their travels.

Name: The Good Glamm Group
Description:
The Good Glamm Group is a Personal Care Company committed to Inclusive Beauty, Responsible Care & Serving its Community’s Aspirations. 

The Group’s brands include: 
- Wyn Beauty by Serena Williams, a clean, high performing, skin loving makeup designed for life and not just a photo finish
- MyGlamm, the world’s largest DTC Makeup brand for the South Asian skin tone
- The Moms Co, a toxin free & trusted Mom & Baby personal care brand and home to The Mompreneur Program, Asia’s largest platform for mom micro-entrepreneurs
- Sirona Hygiene, a personal hygiene brand which through its foundation is working to eradicate Period Poverty in India
- Organic Harvest, one of India’s largest 100% organic certified beauty & personal care brands committed to bringing farm to face products to all 
- St Botanica, which sources the best global ingredients to bring effective experiences & innovation to South Asian skin & hair care regimes.   

The Group’s brands are powered by a proprietary digital ecosystem of content, influencer & interest-based communities, integrated deeply through data & tech.

The Good Media Co is one of South Asia’s largest digital media companies comprising POPxo, ScoopWhoop, MissMalini & BabyChakra. 

The Good Creator Co is one of the world’s largest tech enabled influencer platforms partnering with 1.5 million influencers & creators. 

The Good Communities is one of the first initiatives by a beauty company to build large deep interest communities centered around inclusive beauty, parenting & sexuality. 

Established in 2021, The Good Glamm Group became South Asia’s first DTC beauty and personal care brand unicorn. Investors in the Group include leading American PE / VC firms Warburg Pincus, Bessemer Venture Partners and Accel along with global consumer internet leaders Amazon and Prosus (Naspers) and the French beauty conglomerate Groupe L’Occitane. Its operations now span Asia, North America & Middle East.

Name: Laboratoire SVR
Description:
Laboratoire de dermocosmétologie 
Depuis 50 ans, les Laboratoires SVR élaborent et fabriquent des soins dermo-cosmétiques innovants. Conseillés par les professionnels de santé, les produits des Laboratoires SVR sont aujourd'hui vendus dans plus de 50 pays

Name: Groupe Rocher
Description:
Le Groupe Rocher, entreprise française d'origine bretonne, possède des marques comme Yves Rocher, Arbonne, Petit Bateau, Stanhome, Kiotis, Docteur Pierre Ricaud, ID Parfums et SABON dans les domaines de la cosmétique, de l'habillement et de la maison. Avec plus de 16 000 employés, 50 millions de clientes et un chiffre d'affaires de plus de 2,4 milliards d'euros, il opère dans environ 114 pays et s'étend davantage à l'international sous la direction de Bris Rocher, Président du Groupe, et de Jean-David Schwartz, Directeur Général Exécutif depuis 2023.

Depuis sa création, notre groupe s’engage à reconnecter les femmes et les hommes à la nature car nous croyons à l’impact positif de la nature sur notre bien-être.
Pour aller plus loin, nous sommes devenus Entreprise à Mission et poursuivons l’ambition de développer un écosystème durable qui combine création de richesses et écologisme humaniste.

Mais rien de tout cela ne serait possible sans des collaborateurs engagés, respectueux, exigeants et passionnés. 

Vous aussi, rejoignez le Groupe Rocher en postulant sur notre site internet. 

---------------------------------------------------------

Groupe Rocher, a French company of Breton origin, owns brands such as Yves Rocher, Arbonne, Petit Bateau, Stanhome, Kiotis, Docteur Pierre Ricaud, ID Parfums and SABON in the cosmetics, clothing and home sectors. With more than 16,000 employees, 50 million customers and sales of over €2.4 billion, it operates in around 114 countries and is expanding further internationally under the leadership of Bris Rocher, Chairman of the Group, and Jean-David Schwartz, Chief Executive Officer since 2023.

Since its creation, our group is committed is to reconnect people to nature because we believe in the positive impact of nature on our well-being. To go further, we have become a mission-driven company and we are pursuing our ambition.

Join the Groupe Rocher by applying on our website.

Name: FLORMAR
Description:
A multicultural brand heritage: Flormar was born in the late 1950s in the world’s fashion capital Milan and flourished in the colorful and authentic lands of Türkiye, located at the confluence of Asia and Europe. The brand has since developed a rich makeup expertise thanks to its experiences with Türkiye’s multicultural structure, diverse skin types, and countless skin tones, passionately continuing its path to uplift the joy and happiness women derive from life with its vast range of colors and textures.
 
High-performance products & Professional services & Happy prices: As a brand, Flormar derives its strength from 70 years of makeup expertise and a portfolio of high-performance products that provide intense colors as well as its ability to rapidly adapt to trends. With products offered in all makeup categories ranging from face to eyes, lips to nails, the brand meets many critical needs such as coverage and long-stay for millions of women living in more than 70 countries. Furthermore, Flormar takes pride in being the destination that features premium products at happy prices with the professional service it offers at its sales points.
 
Today, Flormar is positioned as one of the most popular makeup brands in the world with nearly 60,000 sales points in more than 70 countries and more than 500 stores in 200 cities worldwide.
 
Believing both our planet and all living creatures that inhabit it deserve the best, Flormar is committed to using clean ingredients in its products and recycled materials in its packaging. In line with its sustainability vision, it prioritizes saving resources like water and energy at its production facilities. In addition to not engaging in any animal testing, it also does at the highest level everything necessary to be a responsible manufacturer by engaging in world-class production in line with its ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 22716:2007 GMP certifications.

Name: Paula's Choice Skincare
Description:
WE KNOW SKIN. All facts, no fluff. Since 1995.

We are Paula’s Choice Skincare, a global skin care company founded in the US (Seattle) in 1995. Paula’s Choice is an ambitious, fast-growing brand with an inspiring mission: We uncover the truth about skin care & deliver smart, safe products based on scientific research—without gimmicks & misleading claims. Part of Unilever Prestige since 2021, we are proud to present our core values & continue to grow together with our sister brands.
  
We are proud to consistently show high, double-digit growth. Our main business (75%) is direct-to-consumer via our e-commerce business, making us a fast-paced & profitable organization. 

Paula’s Choice is committed to diversity. We hire great people from a wide variety of backgrounds, not just because it’s the right thing to do, but because it makes our company stronger. If you share our values & our enthusiasm for empowering people to achieve their own definition of beautiful, Paula’s Choice could be the perfect fit for you.

Name: Laboratoires Dermatologiques d'Uriage
Description: Laboratoire Français de dermo-cosmétique, les produits Uriage sont vendus en pharmacies et parapharmacies en France et dans plus de 80 pays. En constant développement, Uriage est toujours à la recherche de nouveaux talents en France et à travers le monde. Les laboratoires dermatologiques d’Uriage font partie du pôle dermo-cosmétique du groupe Puig.
Location: NEUILLY SUR SEINE, Ile de France

Name: Pilgrim
Description: Pilgrim is an innovative and one of the fastest growing D2C (Direct-to-consumer) businesses in the beauty space. Founded by serial entrepreneurs from IIT Bombay and IIM Ahmedabad, it offers a dynamic, fast paced and fun culture to be a part of.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoires Filorga
Description:
Welcome to FILORGA – Where science meets beauty.

As the 1st French laboratory for aesthetic medicine, we have been at the forefront of innovation since 1978. Founded in the heart of Paris by Dr. Michel Tordjman, an aesthetic doctor with a passion for cell biology, FILORGA stands as a beacon of excellence in the pursuit of timeless beauty.

Our mission? To regain power over aging through innovative cosmetic products. At FILORGA, we believe that aging is not just a natural progression but a journey where science and beauty intersect.

 Efficacy in 7 days: our groundbreaking formulations boast unparalleled efficacy, revealing visible results in just 7 days. 

 NCEF – our exclusive technology: a unique complex inspired by meso-injections. NCEF serves as a cellular booster, addressing key skin quality factors like wrinkles, firmness, and radiance.

 Luxury sensoriality: our products indulge your senses with a touch of luxury. Immerse yourself in the world of FILORGA.

Name: Dermalogica
Description:
professional-grade skin care since 1986

Dermalogica was founded by a skin therapist, so we know how to create custom skincare solutions that work - not just for today, but for life. We offer professional-grade skincare education, products, and services to skin therapists and customers alike.

meet our founder: Jane Wurwand

As the co-founder and chief visionary of Dermalogica and The International Dermal Institute post-graduate training centers, Jane Wurwand is one of the most recognized and respected authorities in professional skin therapy. Under her leadership, Dermalogica has grown to be the leading professional skincare brand, used by more than 100,000 skin therapists in more than 100 countries around the world.

Order Jane's new book: https://www.dermalogica.com/pages/jane-wurwand

rooted in education

Our product line grew out of a desire to provide skin therapists with best-in-class skincare products and education. We provide skills-based training for a global community of skin therapists who have one common goal: to ensure healthy skin for all. Dermalogica is the number one choice of skincare professionals worldwide.

personalized skin care

We create highly customized regimens and services for every individual because we know that no two skin conditions are the same. Our products work best when they are recommended by a professional skin therapist for your unique skin. Whatever your lifestyle, background, or environment, rest assured that Dermalogica will work for you.

human touch

We believe in the power of human touch, which radiates through our hands, our voice, and our intentions. It’s how we connect with people and form a unique, lasting bond.

Name: Fresh
Description:
In 1991, our founders Lev Glazman and Alina Roytberg saw the need for beauty that was both effective and indulgent. Following their American dream, they opened a small store in Boston devoted to curating natural products from around the world and engaging a community. The original shopkeepers, they created a brand that touches people’s hearts as well as their skin—and quickly developed a cult following. 

fresh is a global skincare brand within the LVMH Group, headquartered in New York City. We emphasize the look, feel, and scent in every product, transforming skincare into an elevated, sensual experience. Our collection of skincare, lip care, bodycare, and fragrances are available in 16 countries, across our fresh boutiques and digital channels, specialty and department stores, and more. 

We are an organization of curious creators who embrace innovation, optimism, and always keep our customers at the forefront. With a pioneering spirit, we are empowered to challenge the status quo and use our authentic voice to do the right thing for our people, our brand, and the environment.

Here at fresh, we intentionally foster a spirit of belonging. We celebrate our diversity and support every employee to feel welcomed, valued, respected, and heard. By embracing curiosity and collaboration, we recognize that our differences strengthen us.

Name: Lola Cosmetics
Description: Pleasure, we are Lola.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Mammoth Brands
Description:
Mammoth Brands (formerly Harry’s Inc.) is the modern CPG company behind category-leading brands Harry’s, Flamingo, Lume, Mando, and Coterie. We’ve built a new model—and home—for brands, founders, and talent looking to solve unmet needs, improve peoples’ lives, and ultimately challenge the status quo.

Our mission is to “Create Things People Like More.” Simply put: everything we do should be better than what already exists. If it’s not, we don’t do it. This guides everything we do, from developing the best product experiences, to making Mammoth Brands a great place to work, to exploring innovative ways to give back to our community.

We got our start in 2013 when our co-founders created Harry's. They built the brand differently—online first, prioritizing direct relationships with customers—and in the process learned they’d created something bigger: a playbook and platform that could help other brands grow and scale to their full potential. 

Today, Mammoth Brands is a growing portfolio of brands built by dedicated, entrepreneurial teams that live and breathe their millions of customers every day. Even as we grow, we take extra care to maintain the small, scrappy, entrepreneurial culture that helped to get us where we are today: to create a company that people like more. That better serves its customers, employees, and community.

Name: Nua
Description:
For too long, women have had to choose between wellness and appearance, acceptance and understanding – between comfort and protection.

No longer.

At Nua, we innovate around women’s whole experience of wellness – not just the most obvious parts of it.

We pay attention to the little and big things, the spoken and unspoken frictions. And we stay curious – because no two people’s cycles are the same. 

We build safe spaces to lead conversations that transform women’s wellness from a shameful secret to a conscious part of everyone’s daily life.

Ultimately, we don’t compromise on care, so women don’t have to compromise on their wellness.

HOW WE GOT HERE

Nua launched in 2017 with a simple mission: make a pad with the features women actually need—using only the cleanest, completely toxic-free materials.

Or, in the words of our founder, 'A pad I’d want my daughter to use.'

So, we asked women: How can we make your period better? What do you really need? (Shockingly, no one had ever asked them before – *eye roll*)

That’s how our original Complete Comfort Pad was born – India’s first ultra-thin, super absorbent, feather-soft, 100% non-toxic pad that promises zero irritation – in co-creation with hundreds of women who had never before had a say in their own period care.

It’s now loved by 15+ lakh women and counting.

We kept listening, innovating – and changing the game. We expanded into caring for the full period experience. We launched care that eases teens into puberty and women into motherhood. 

We built a digital period tracker and an anonymous wellness chat, so women could better understand their bodies. We developed a digital period care assistant, because we realised so many women had inherited their period products, with no chance to learn which fit their needs. And we established school programs that have empowered 10,000+ girls to start their wellness journeys with support instead of shame.

Because at Nua, we get you – all of you – and we're here for it.

Name: Kendo Brands, Inc.
Description:
Kendo is the small but mighty force behind your favorite beauty products. A play on the words “can do,” Kendo is redefining the beauty industry through next-generation products, visionary campaigns and unforgettable retail presence. 


Kendo creates original founder brands, partnering with major faces from fashion and entertainment. The house of brands currently includes KVD Beauty, Fenty Beauty by Rihanna, Fenty Skin, Fenty Hair, Ole Henriksen Skincare, and Lip Lab. We tell their stories to bring to life the dream products you’ve always wanted, but have never been able to find.

Come grow with us! Since Kendo’s founding in 2010, we’ve experienced phenomenal growth and accelerated global expansion. We’re based in San Francisco, but we also operate headquarters in Toronto, London, Paris and Singapore, 
our products are in 27 countries and counting. And, we couldn’t grow without our people. We embrace entrepreneurial spirit, so the opportunities are endless. 

We believe in five values, our Kendo Kredo. Adhering to these in business, in our interactions with each other, our customers, and our recruitment process, we remain true to our culture and the foundation upon which the house was originally founded.

"Can Do” Spirit
Advocacy, Diversity, and Inclusion 
Storytelling 
Resilience
Product Excellence

Our Open Jobs.
https://www.kendobrands.com/careers/

Name: LA ROSÉE
Description:
Nous sommes deux pharmaciennes, Coline et Mahault, passionnées par la cosmétologie et la beauté naturelle.

Au comptoir de la pharmacie, nous avons rencontré des femmes et des hommes à la recherche d'une offre plus simple, plus vraie, plus responsable, sans superflu et sans promesses sophistiquées non tenues.

Nous avons eu alors envie de créer, pour eux comme pour nous, des produits jusqu’à 100 % d’origine naturelle, à l’efficacité cliniquement prouvée et aux packagins éco-conçus. Une marque engagée dans laquelle on peut avoir confiance les yeux fermés !

Rien n’a été facile dans cette quête de l’excellence : créer des formules hautement naturelles et biodégradables, réinventer la cosmétique solide, bannir les suremballages, trouver des alternatives au plastique issu de la pétrochimie, réduire notre impact environnemental au maximum, compenser notre empreinte carbone… tout en gardant des produits 100 % plaisir et à des prix justes.

Mais nous étions convaincues que tout était possible. Cet idéal, nous l’avons construit, jour après jour depuis 9 ans, en commençant par le plus important : vous !

Tous les produits sont élaborés et fabriqués en France.

 10 000 Pharmacies en France, une pharmacie sur deux
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sallve
Description:
dá pra fazer diferente?
a gente acredita que sim :)

oi! somos a sallve, uma startup brasileira de beleza obcecada pela experiência da nossa comunidade. por isso, nossa missão vai além de criar uma marca: estamos construindo um espaço que conecta pessoas, ideias e conteúdos sobre um novo mercado de beleza. por aqui, já tem um time incrível junto com a gente inspirado nessa missão, além do investimento dos principais fundos de venture capital brasileiros.

desde sempre, combinamos conversas sinceras, escolhas seguras e fórmulas incríveis. já ouvimos  milhares de pessoas nas redes sociais, nos reviews de produtos e na nossa comunidade - e vamos seguir assim, com um time multidisciplinar e diverso capaz de descobrir como cada conversa inspira algo novo, com soluções poderosas que vão muito além dos produtos.

1. nos inspiramos no mundo, fazemos do nosso jeito
2. nós crescemos rápido e fazendo o certo
3. temos orgulho de tudo que fazemos
4. acreditamos na beleza da verdade
5. somos nossos consumidores
6. beleza de dentro pra fora
7. do jeito mais simples

Name: Plum
Description:
Plum is one of India’s science-first, vegan, premium beauty brand with a strong portfolio of skincare and haircare products. By smartly combining research-backed actives with the chemistry of botanical ingredients, Plum creates formulas that truly resonate. At the heart of everything, Plum has a simple message: 'We have chemistry - with each other, with our product & especially with our customer.’

The brand is driven by a strong leadership and investor team, focused on building value for people, the planet, and profit-sharing participants.

Name: APIVITA SA
Description:
APIVITA, Great Place to Work certified company, is a pioneering Greek company that has been producing innovative natural cosmetics since 1979. APIVITA products provide safe and effective care protection and natural beauty solutions for the face, body, and hair, derived from bee products and the powerful Greek flora. APIVITA since 2017 is a member company of the PUIG Group and has a worldwide distribution and a presence in 54 other countries such as France, Taiwan, Russia, Hong Kong, Cyprus, Romania, Belgium, Portugal, Croatia, China, Thailand, South Africa, Ukraine, Bulgaria, Ireland, Malta, United Kingdom, Hungary, Italy, Norway, etc.

At APIVITA we share a vision for sustainable development, and we conduct our business with the utmost respect and love for nature and mankind. We, therefore, seek people with an outstanding ability to communicate the APIVITA brand philosophy and values and effectively promote and sell its products and services.

Follow the link to find out more information: www.apivita.com

APIVITA the brand to be(e) and be(e) all you can be(e)!

Bee on Board!

Name: Forest Essentials
Description:
Forest Essentials is an authentic, traditional skincare brand with its foundations in the ancient science of Ayurveda. Inspired by the timeless wisdom of Ayurveda, we have shaped a distinctive world of Luxurious Ayurveda. Where each creation is rooted in purity, crafted with care, and guided by centuries-old Indian beauty rituals, celebrating India’s botanical and cultural heritage, reimagined for the modern way of living.  
 
We are a truly global brand with over 175 stores across India and retails stores in the UK, Dubai, Kuwait, Qatar and shipping to over 150 +countries across the world through our website.

We deeply respect nature, and every product begins with this philosophy, guided by time-honored Ayurvedic wisdom. Crafted in eco-conscious, state-of-the-art facilities that meet pharmaceutical-grade standards, our green manufacturing practices seamlessly blend traditional artisanal expertise with modern technology. 

We believe true luxury is mindful, purposeful, and harmonious. From responsible sourcing and thoughtful packaging to giving back to nature and the communities we work with, sustainability and social responsibility are woven into every step of our journey. This commitment is further reflected through initiatives such as Project Pathashala, in partnership with SEF, under our One School–One Village program, which focuses on educating and empowering the youth. 

Our responsible sourcing program ensures that all ingredients meet the highest standards of health and safety, social responsibility, environmental stewardship, and business integrity. We have evaluated every aspect of our product life cycle to make something that consumers would love to use but also feel good about using!

Name: Respire
Description:
SKIN IS POWER.
Soins naturels inspirés de la peau
Impulsé par Justine Hutteau

Name: Groupe Lea Nature
Description:
LÉA NATURE, ça vous parle ? 
Vous connaissez sûrement nos marques phares comme Jardin BiO étic, SO'BiO étic, Eau Thermale Jonzac, Biovie...
 
Ce que vous allez trouver de différent chez nous ? 

•	Nous sommes une société à mission environnementale. Notre mission inscrite dans nos statuts est de proposer des produits naturels principalement certifiés bio contribuant à préserver la santé de l’Homme, en utilisant des ressources naturelles renouvelables sans porter atteinte à la biodiversité. 

•	Nous concevons, fabriquons et commercialisons 2500 références de produits bio et naturels.

•	Nous déclinons notre expertise des plantes dans les domaines de l'alimentation, la santé et la diététique, la cosmétique et l'entretien de la maison.

•	Nous distribuons nos produits dans différents réseaux : Grande et Moyenne Surface, magasins bio, pharmacies et parapharmacies, export, e-commerce, restauration hors domicile.

• Nos 18 marques bio sont membres du collectif mondial 1% for the Planet et à ce titre reversent chaque année 1% de leurs chiffres d'affaires est reversée à des associations et ONG environnementales agréées par le collectif.

Le petit plus : plus de 1700 collaborateurs engagés au sein d'une entreprise familiale et indépendante constamment en croissance. C'est même un gros plus, non ? 
 
Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Parce que travailler chez Léa Nature c'est choisir une entreprise engagée, donner du sens à sa carrière et agir pour un monde plus bio !

Name: Coty Brasil
Description:
Uma das principais empresas do setor de beleza no mundo, a centenária Coty - multinacional de origem francesa - trabalha no Brasil com vasto e icônico portfólio, oferecendo produtos nos segmentos de esmaltes, fragrâncias, cuidados capilares, corporais e masculinos, entre outras categorias. 

Temos como propósito democratizar a beleza e torná-la cada vez mais acessível à população, considerando nosso vasto portfólio de marcas de qualidade e excelente relação custo-benefício. Nesse contexto, temos os consumidores no centro de nosso negócio e de nossas atividades. O profundo conhecimento do consumidor brasileiro nos permite traduzir em produtos sua essência de diversidade, oferecendo itens de qualidade e alta tecnologia. 

Localmente, fabricamos e comercializamos milhões de produtos todos os anos, de nossas tradicionais marcas brasileiras - como Risqué, Monange, Bozzano, Paixão, Cenoura&Bronze e outras muito conhecidas pelos brasileiros. Além disso, também comercializamos nossas fragrâncias lifestyle, com marcas como Adidas UEFA, David Beckham, Gabriela Sabatini, Good.Kind.Pure., entre outras; fragrâncias premium internacionais, licenciadas de famosas marcas (Calvin Klein, Hugo Boss, Chloé, Burberry, Gucci, Tiffany, entre outras); adicionalmente a produtos de maquiagem e skincare, com Kylie Cosmetics e Kylie Skin.

As marcas locais da companhia há décadas encantam milhões de consumidores no Brasil, sempre se renovando em linha com tendências e oferecendo produtos que trazem constante inovação. Marcas e produtos reconhecidos pela excelente qualidade, expressando o real conceito de democratização da beleza, centro de nossa estratégia.

No país, o Grupo Coty opera com as empresas Coty e Savoy, empregando cerca de 2,4 mil funcionários e conta com unidades nos estados de São Paulo e Goiás.

Acompanhe também nosso Instagram: @cotybrasil!

Name: Davines Group | B Corp since 2016
Description:
The Davines Group begins its journey in Parma in 1983, with the Bollati family's idea of establishing a laboratory for the production of high end hair products.

After a decade of research and improvement the company decides to focus on its own brands by launching from scratch Davines and [comfort zone] brands, the first one dedicated to the professional hairdressing, the other one to the skin care spas and treatments market.

Today the Davines Group is present in 95 countries and employs a multicultural team spanning 34 different nationalities and in 2016 had become a member of the group of so-called B Corps, whose purpose, in addition to profit, is maximizing their positive impact by providing innovative solutions to environmental and social issues whilst respecting the highest standards of performance, transparency and accountability.

Besides the Parma headquarters, we have branches in New York, Paris, London, Mexico, Netherland, Hong Kong, Shanghai and Düsseldorf.

Davines Group is now a recognized leader in the formulation and manufacturing of high end skin and hair care products.

Davines style is a reflection of curiosity and openness to the world and of the Italian heritage of history, art, design and good taste.

Promoting and transforming an holistic, healthy and sustainable lifestyle concept into a beautiful reality is our mission. Creating beauty from the inside out is our passion.

Our purpose:
Do our best for the world, creating good life for all, through beauty, ethics and sustainability.

Name: Amplifon
Description:
As the global leader in the hearing care retail industry, we have been changing the lives of millions of customers across the globe since 1950. With stores and offices spanning across 26 countries and a team of 20,300 dedicated professionals, we take pride in setting the industry standard as we empower people to rediscover all the emotions of sound.
 
Amplifon operates in: Argentina, Australia, Belgium, Canada, Chile, China, Colombia, Ecuador, Egypt, France, Germany, Hungary, India, Israel, Italy, Mexico, New Zealand, Panama, Poland, Portugal, Spain, Switzerland, the Netherlands, UK, United States, and Uruguay.

Read our Netiquette and help us create an inclusive environment to interact within: https://corporate.amplifon.com/en/netiquette?formSearchPage=true
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sol de Janeiro
Description:
Inspired by the power and warmth of the Brazilian spirit, Sol de Janeiro stands for ultimate self-love and celebration. Embracing the authentic Brazilian beauty philosophy of loving and flaunting your body, Sol de Janeiro was founded in 2015. The brand’s award-winning collection of body care, fragrance, and hair care is
known for luscious textures, clinically proven formulations, and transportive fragrances. Beloved by multi-generational global consumers, Sol de Janeiro is available at premium global retailers
as well as on its own website.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Foxtale
Description:
Featured in: Forbes Asia's 100 To Watch

Check out Hula Hoop by Foxtale here- https://foxtale.in/hulahoop 

Before starting Foxtale, Romita Mazumdar spoke to 3000+ women to understand their concerns and expectations from skincare. Inspired by these tales of these women, Foxtale was founded in December 2021. 

Foxtale is a performance-first skincare brand that’s redefining what glow means.

Rooted in deep scientific research and real consumer insight, we design efficacious formulations for the confident woman of today to glow differently.

Name: Harry's
Description:
Harry’s is a men’s grooming brand that offers high quality shave, body, hair, and skin care products at an exceptional value. We launched in 2013 and helped redefine the shaving experience and pioneer the earliest era of direct to consumer in the process. Since then, Harry’s has become the #2 shave brand globally and expanded to offer products for every step in our customer’s routine. We’re also on a mission to ensure guys have access to quality mental health care. To date, Harry’s has helped connect over 2 million men to quality mental health resources.

Harry’s is part of Mammoth Brands, the modern CPG company. Driven by a mission to “Create Things People Like More,” the company’s growing family of brands—Harry’s, Flamingo, Lume, Mando, and Coterie—offers exceptional products that speak to today’s consumer, and as a result have become an essential part of millions of people’s daily routines.

Name: Glow Recipe
Description:
Glow Recipe is clean, fruit-forward, clinically effective skincare, created to bring out your healthiest, glowing skin yet. 
 
Glow Recipe's skin-care formulation philosophy pairs antioxidant-rich super fruits with clinically effective actives for efficacious, sensorial, gentle formulas that deliver results. All Glow Recipe products are vegan, cruelty-free and Leaping Bunny certified, and 100% of our packaging is recyclable either curbside or renewable through our partnership with Terracycle. 

At Glow Recipe, we want you to love the skin you're in, and that means setting realistic expectations around beauty. In April of 2021, we announced our pledge to never use the words poreless, perfect, ageless or flawless to describe skin. We promise to celebrate and showcase real, unretouched skin, because real skin is beautiful skin.

Glow Recipe is currently available at Sephora in North America, UK, South East Asia and Middle East and through other key retailers such as Mecca & Cult Beauty globally.

Name: Eudora
Description:
Eudora é a marca de cosméticos para a mulher que une beleza e atitude, que acredita que pode conquistar tudo o que quiser. As cores, as texturas e as fragrâncias dos produtos trazem ainda mais poder para a mulher feminina e, ao mesmo tempo, forte. Tudo isso aliando qualidade, tecnologia e sofisticação com valor acessível. 

A marca tem produtos para ativar cada intenção da mulher: Poder de Arrasar e estar deslumbrante; Poder de Ousar e deixar a sua marca; Poder de Impressionar e jamais passar despercebida; Poder de Seduzir e atrair mais olhares e desejos.

Eudora é a segunda unidade de negócio do Grupo Boticário e a primeira empresa brasileira do segmento a atuar, desde o nascimento, em 2011, com estratégia multicanal que inclui venda direta, comércio eletrônico e lojas próprias.

Name: Farmasi
Description:
75 Years of Beauty, Wellness & Empowerment 

FARMASI is a global beauty and personal care powerhouse, with over seven decades of experience in the industry. We are a proudly international manufacturer, retailer, and direct-selling company—offering innovative products across Beauty, Personal Care, Wellness, and Home Essentials.

Our story began in the 1950s with the visionary Dr. Cevdet Tuna, a pioneer in the health and beauty space. His commitment to quality, science, and empowerment laid the foundation for what FARMASI is today—one of the fastest-growing direct selling companies in the world, with a community of over 1 million Influencers.

Headquartered in Ömerli, Istanbul, surrounded by lush forests and nature, our vertically integrated production facility spans over 500,000 m². With five high-tech factories dedicated to personal care, makeup, fragrances, plastics, and laminated tubes, we proudly manufacture more than 1,000 high-quality products—all under one roof.

Our diverse portfolio includes everything from color cosmetics and fragrances to skincare, household products, and nutritional supplements. Beloved sub-brands include DR. C. TUNA for skincare and targeted treatments, Mr. Wipes for household care, and Nutriplus for wellness.

Every FARMASI product is developed to meet the highest international standards and is certified by leading global organizations including GMP, FDA, HALAL, and ISO 9001.

In 2010, we entered the world of direct selling with one mission in mind: to change lives. Chairman of the Board, Omer Hakan Tuna, believes that through our business model, anyone—regardless of background—can build their dream life. Today, FARMASI operates in more than 40 countries and continues to expand, empowering entrepreneurs around the world to write their own success stories.

Name: Boca Rosa Company
Description: Boca Rosa Company é a holding responsável pela marca de maquiagem Boca Rosa e pelas produções artísticas da Bianca Andrade.

Name: OLAPLEX
Description:
OLAPLEX, Inc. is a foundational health and beauty company inspired by professional stylists, empowered by innovation and a belief that beautiful hair starts from the inside out. From the moment OLAPLEX Complete Bond Technology transformed its first strand of hair, our products have proven that molecular-level science has the power to restore hair health and unlock new styling possibilities. With over 10 years of experience bringing groundbreaking products from the lab to the chair, we’ll never stop innovating to help pros, their clients, and all healthy hair seekers achieve great hair days today, tomorrow, and for years to come. 

Our mission is to create a culture that celebrates our bonds by embracing, elevating, and empowering individuals from all backgrounds.

Name: Kao EMEA & Americas
Description:
This is the official account of Kao in Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA) and the Americas region with our main hubs in London (UK), Darmstadt (Germany), Amersfoort (the Netherlands) and Cincinnati (USA). We focus on our Beauty Care business with premium brands in three business sectors: Consumer Care, Salon and Molton Brown.

Our Consumer Care business represents iconic skin and hair care brands that are recognized for their innovation and quality across the globe, including John Frieda, Guhl, Bioré, Bondi Sands, Curél and Jergens.

Our Salon Business is committed to unleashing the creativity of stylists, salons and consumers around the globe. With our brands Goldwell, Oribe, KMS Hair, Kerasilk and Varis, stylists have everything in their hands to create beautiful show-stopping hair representative of the individuality of their clients.

Our London-based luxury brand Molton Brown, offers fragrance, body and bath products found only in our exclusive Molton Brown stores, high-end department stores and travel retail, as well as five-star hotels around the world.

All three business sectors are driven by the same values and beliefs: We strive to create a Kirei life for people, society and the planet through creation and innovation that enables more sustainable lifestyles. The Japanese word kirei, meaning “clean, well-ordered, and beautiful,” reflects our purpose.

And because our people are our greatest asset, we foster an environment where everyone can grow, flourish and help us make life beautiful.

Globally, Kao has strived to deliver value to the life of people everywhere in the world since the company's founding in 1887.
