As a Japan-based manufacturer of personal care and household products, cosmetics, and specialty chemicals, Kao creates high-value-added products and services that provide care and enrichment for the life of all people and the planet.

Name: KORRES
Description:
KORRES is a Greek beauty brand, born out of Athens’ oldest homeopathic pharmacy in 1996. Founded by Greek Pharmacist Giorgos Korres that believes in the innate potency of natural ingredients and Chemical Engineer Lena Korres that believes that nature is the inspiration for scientific discovery. With Greece, Nature and Research being the driving forces, KORRES delivers safe, effective, clean plant-powered products globally. Following its conscience since the 90s, KORRES proudly owns the process From Seed to Skin and Back reflecting the brand’s Full Circle vision from the fair-trade network of local farmers and the sustainable cultivation of herbs and plants, the zero-waste herb extraction process, the primary and biological research to the natural formulations based on hundreds of efficacy + safety tests, the design of sustainable packaging solutions, and back to recycling and repurposing empties.

KORRES 
Greece. Nature. Research.

Name: Mili S/A
Description:
Somos uma das maiores fabricantes brasileiras no setor de higiene e limpeza. Nossos principais produtos – papéis higiênicos, toalhas de papel, guardanapos, fraldas descartáveis e absorventes – estão entre os líderes nacionais de mercado. Nossa linha de produtos ainda é composta por artigos de higiene infantil, feminina e por mais uma série de itens para cuidados com o lar, mantendo sempre o nível máximo de qualidade e segurança.

Hoje contamos com uma equipe de mais de dois mil colaboradores diretos, distribuídos por três unidades industriais no Brasil: em Três Barras (SC), Curitiba (PR) e Maceió (AL). Nessas duas últimas, estão as Centrais de Distribuição, que cuidam para que nossos produtos cheguem com rapidez e segurança a todo o Brasil e Mercosul.

Name: Edgewell Personal Care
Description:
We are a company of people—a global team of 6,800 visionaries, doers, and makers. With more than 25 brands in our portfolio, we bring joy to more than 50 countries, keeping a keen eye on efficiency and sustainability. We’re also passionate about maintaining a diverse, inclusive, and respectful environment where our teammates can thrive.
For more information about our careers, visit www.edgewell.com/careers/

Name: Hourglass Cosmetics
Description:
Hourglass Cosmetics is a vegan and cruelty-free beauty brand, redefining luxury cosmetics with high-performance products, innovative formulas, and award-winning franchises. Recognized by Forbes, Fast Company and Time Magazine as one of the most inventive beauty companies, Hourglass leads the industry with its breakthrough products and its commitment to animal welfare. Founded in 2004, Hourglass is globally available in 32 markets and nearly 3,000 doors including Sephora, Ulta, Neiman Marcus, Selfridges, Space NK and more. Hourglass became part of the Unilever Prestige division in 2017. Discover more about the Hourglass brand story and mission on our website hourglasscosmetics.com.

Hourglass Cosmetics will never request any form of payment or credit card details as part of the hiring process. We encourage prospective candidates to remain vigilant regarding fraudulent employment scams. Please be advised that any official communication from Hourglass Cosmetics regarding career opportunities will always originate from an email address ending in @hourglasscosmetics.com. Hourglass may occasionally partner with reputable external agencies for recruitment purposes.  Should you encounter any suspicious emails or individuals claiming to represent Hourglass recruiters or senior staff members, please disregard the message and report any concerns to careers@hourglasscosmetics.com or cs@hourglasscosmetics.com.

Name: Aveda
Description:
Founded in 1978, Aveda creates high performance, botanically-based products for beauty professionals and consumers—while continuously striving to conduct business in an environmentally sustainable manner. Headquartered in Blaine, Minnesota, Aveda manufactures innovative plant-based hair care, skin care, makeup and lifestyle products, available at retail in Aveda Experience Centers and more than 9,000 professional hair salons and spas in more than 30 countries, as well as at www.aveda.com. 

Our mission at Aveda is to care for the world we live in, from the products we make to the ways in which we give back to society. At Aveda, we strive to set an example for environmental leadership and responsibility, not just in the world of beauty but around the world.

Name: Space NK
Description:
Starting out as a single store in Covent Garden over 20 years ago, Space NK has become the ultimate destination for beauty discovery – home to over 80 stores across the UK and Ireland, as well as free-standing stores and boutiques at Bloomingdale’s and Nordstrom in the US. 

In our stores and online, you will find a finely honed edit of the most innovative products in the beauty world, including super-charged skincare, cutting-edge cosmetics and game-changing gadgets. This unique selection comprises over 70 brands, including Eve Lom, Drunk Elephant, Charlotte Tilbury, Nars and more.

Delivering a personal and bespoke service is of the utmost importance to us, and our team of highly trained makeup artists and skin and hair care specialists is devoted to offering well-informed, unbiased advice on the products and distinctive experiences tailored to your unique needs.

Name: Amend Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada em 1994, a Amend Cosméticos é uma empresa dedicada em desenvolver produtos cosméticos para os cuidados dos cabelos.

Com o DNA de inovação, presente desde o início de suas atividades, foi a primeira empresa no Brasil a lançar o Reparador de Pontas que rapidamente se tornou um ícone  de tratamento para as mulheres que buscavam proteger os fios e selar as pontas duplas. Desde então, é considerada referência em inovação e qualidade em produtos.

Hoje, com amplo portfólio, a Amend atende às diversas necessidades e desejos das mulheres em tratamento, coloração, transformação e finalização.  

A AMEND é uma empresa humanizada que desenvolve uma relação de confiança e proximidade com suas consumidoras, através de ‘expertise’ e tradição no segmento e de uma experiência emocional,  de diferenciação e bem-estar.  É uma empresa amiga do meio ambiente e que não realiza testes de produtos em animais.

Tamanha dedicação ao universo feminino, fez da Amend, uma das marcas preferidas dentro das perfumarias especializadas, estando presente em mais de 6 mil pontos de vendas, inclusive em países da Europa como: Espanha, Alemanha e Portugal.

Se você está interessado(a) em uma oportunidade de trabalho na Amend, a empresa busca profissionais apaixonados pelo que fazem e engajados em assumir este compromisso conosco, com atitudes inovadoras , coragem, criatividade, comprometimento e disposição para fazer a diferença. 

Acompanhe nosso perfil e saiba mais sobre vagas disponíveis para se candidatar.

Facebook: AmendCosmeticos
Instagram: amend_oficial
Youtube: AmendCosmeticos
Blog: blog.amend.com.br

Name: Nu Skin
Description:
Nu Skin Enterprises, Inc. (NYSE: NUS) is a leading beauty and wellness company, powered by a dynamic affiliate opportunity platform. The company helps people live, look and feel their best with products that combine the best of science, technology and nature. Backed by more than 35 years of scientific research, Nu Skin develops innovative products including Nu Skin personal care, Pharmanex nutrition and the ageLOC anti-aging brand which includes an award-winning line of beauty device systems. 

Nu Skin operates in nearly 50 markets worldwide in the Americas, Asia, Europe, Africa and the Pacific. Rhyz Inc. is the company’s strategic investment arm that includes a collection of technology and manufacturing companies to support growth in the core Nu Skin business. Nu Skin is committed to sustainability, including global initiatives such as transitioning to reduced and sustainable packaging for all products by 2030. The Nu Skin Force for Good Foundation also strives to improve children’s health, education and economic circumstances throughout the world. For more information, visit nuskin.com.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: REFY
Description:
REFY is all about simplifying beauty. We’re committed to creating products and a community that inspire you to be your most confident self. We develop only the essentials, products that are easy-to-use and multifunctional, that work for your on-the-go lifestyle, where simplicity and efficiency are key. Launching in 2020, our founders wanted to create a space that cut through an overwhelming market with 100’s of products, and gave our community the products they were looking for, simplified.

Bringing world-first formulas and products to market, we’re leading a new world of beauty; we’re always vegan, cruelty and fragrance free and proud to be Leaping Bunny certified. All our products have been developed to suit all skin tones and types, with added ingredients, such as Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide and Peptides, to give you even more out of your beauty.

At REFY we are more than a beauty brand. Our community are our biggest supporters, that’s why we are always listening and developing ways in which we can give our community more. We’re bringing you into our REFY lifestyle, where we believe in simplifying your routine so you have more time to live your life and do the things you love.

refybeauty.com / careers.refybeauty.com

Name: Pixi Inc.
Description:
Pixi is an international beauty brand renowned for its natural, skin-loving, youth-enhancing, multi-tasking colour and skincare products, including the iconic and award-winning Glow Tonic. 

Founded by makeup artist and beauty industry veteran, Petra Strand, the company launched over 20 years ago in its first flagship boutique in Soho, London. Petra sought to create easy-to-use products with beneficial botanicals, beautiful textures and flawless finishes. She wanted everyone to experience luxurious products at an accessible price point. Her mission today remains the same: simply to bring out the natural beauty in everyone – to make people look like themselves, only better. Flawless in a few fuss-free minutes – that's what Pixi is all about!

With offices in Los Angeles, London and Singapore, Pixi has grown to become an established and globally recognized beauty brand that is still independent and family-owned. The brand has two flagship boutiques in London and Los Angeles, and is currently available online and in select retail stores in over 50 countries.

Name: NYX Professional Makeup
Description: NYX Professional Makeup is a modern, digitally native makeup brand on the forefront of today's emerging beauty trends. A leader in the global color cosmetics industry, NYX Professional Makeup is an affordable professional makeup line with every shade, color and tool needed to create makeup artistry at every level. Rooted in a professional artistry heritage, NYX Professional Makeup boasts a successful multi-channel approach at the forefront of digital and retail. A social media pioneer, NYX Professional Makeup is one of the most influential and top-ranked brands, and is followed by top beauty vloggers, Instagram stars, and their millions of fans. While headquartered in the heart of Los Angeles, NYX Professional Makeup is a global brand available in more than 70 countries at thousands of retailers consisting of specialty beauty and fashion stores, freestanding shops and beauty supply stores, as well as on www.nyxcosmetics.com.

Name: Maesa
Description:
The next gen beauty company, Maesa is transforming the industry by incubating and growing meaningful, innovative brands and making prestige beauty accessible. 

Maesa believes beauty ignites inspiration, creativity, imagination, and connection, sparking new ideas and possibilities, and meeting unmet consumer needs. Through best-in-class design, formulation, brand creation and marketing capabilities, Maesa delivers new, better and different products with an unsurpassed speed to market. 

Maesa works with a variety of retailers to create and launch brands across beauty and wellness categories. 

The current portfolio includes Kristin Ess, Hairitage by Mindy McKnight, Fine'ry, Being Frenshe, and Niches & Nooks among other brands. 

For more information, visit www.maesa.com.

Name: MAISON D' AURAINE
Description:
Maison D’ Auraine is a conglomerate with a bouquet of the most revolutionary & premium brands in the hair, beauty & personal care. 

We commenced our journey in the year 2014, by buying out rights for the world’s biggest keratin based Hair Care Brand, GKHair - the only brand to harness the hidden treasure of patented ingredient Juvexin, and used by 80 countries worldwide.
With an outstanding growth trajectory and reach of over 500,000 satisfied customers, Maison D’ Auraine has already cemented its place as one of the leaders in the Industry with its detailed logistics footprint, automated business practices, round the clock service support, innovative marketing strategies and in-depth research. 
We aim to nurture hair & skin care business experts in the country and provide them world class education & services in collaboration with global trendsetters and artists, to constantly evolve the art of hairdressing and beauty practices. 
Moving aggressively in our mission, year 2015 marked an important milestone as we set up our own state of the art R&D centre, in the picturesque country of Ireland to formulate futuristic well researched products combining science with nature. 
With an exponential growth in merely 5 years of inception and to cater to Global business needs, Maison D’ Auraine is now introducing its own home grown revolutionary brands & products to the world thiand have already set up global infrastructure to support that with setting up branches in countries of Ireland, Dubai and Hong Kong. 
We are constantly evolving business processes that protect the environment, sourcing organic and natural ingredients in a responsible and sustainable manner, using materials that are energy efficient, creating a safe working environment for our employees, following transparent business practices with our buyers & suppliers to positively impact the socio-economic conditions of the global communities that we daily touch.

Name: Grupo DIPASO
Description: Propósito: Transformar vidas a través de la belleza.

Name: Opella
Description:
Opella is the self-care challenger with the purest and third-largest portfolio in the Over-The-Counter (OTC) & Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements (VMS) market globally.

Our mission is to bring health in people’s hands by making self-care as simple as it should be. For half a billion consumers worldwide – and counting.

At the core of this mission is our 100 loved brands, our 11,000-strong global team, our 13 best-in-class manufacturing sites and 4 specialized science and innovation development centers. 

Headquartered in France, Opella is the proud maker of many of the world’s most loved brands, including Allegra, Buscopan, Doliprane, Dulcolax, Enterogermina, Essentiale and Mucosolvan. 

As a globally certified B Corp company, we are active players in the journey towards healthier people and planet. 

Find out more about our mission on our website.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Salon Line Brasil
Description:
SOBRE A SALON LINE
Somos uma marca 100% brasileira que está presente no mercado de beleza e cosméticos capilares desde 1995. Temos mais de 400 produtos distribuídos em 16 linhas, com foco em recuperação, tratamento, coloração, transformação, progressivas e hidratação dos fios de cabelo, dos crespos aos lisos, sejam eles naturais ou com química. Fazem parte do nosso vasto portfólio as linhas #todecacho, MeuLiso, MariaNatureza, S.O.S Cachos e os elétricos Salon Line Pro e Universe, com secadores, pranchas, máquinas de corte, modeladores e escovas.

Porque existimos?
Existimos para encorajar o novo, a descoberta e a mudança. Ajudando cada pessoa a se transformar na melhor versão de si mesmo.

Como fazemos?
Através de inovação e relacionamento, buscando estar perto dos consumidores, entendendo o que querem e buscam na hora de se transformar na versão mais linda de si.

O que fazemos? 
Desenvolvemos produtos de qualidade e performance, entregando beleza acessível a todos e incentivando a originalidade pessoal. Ajudando cada um a encontrar sua essência mais profunda e verdadeira, pois sabemos que cada beleza é única. Permita-se e venha com a gente!

Name: PT Gondowangi
Description:
Berdedikasi dalam pengembangan dan pendayagunaan bahan-bahan alami menjadi efektif, kami percaya akan adanya sebuah ikatan yang menyatukan manusia dengan alam sehingga menjadi pedoman kami untuk menjadikan bahan alam sebagai bagian besar dari proses penciptaan inovasi produk perawatan tubuh yang berkualitas tinggi, terpercaya dan berbasis pada konsep â€œBack to Natur Alami Lebih Baikâ€.

Bermula dari sosok Mr. Liem Soedarno sebagai pendiri perusahaan yang mengungkapkan perhatiannya terhadap sejumlah produk perawatan dengan kandungan bahan kimia didalamnya. Mr. Liem Soedarno melakukan analisa mendalam pada pemanfaatan bahan-bahan alami. Mengawali bisnis budidaya rumput laut di tahun 1970 sebuah ide pun muncul untuk membuat inovasi produk kosmetik kulit melalui proses racik. Dengan kesuksesannya tersebut, beliau mengembangkan perjalanan bisnisnya di tahun 1972 pada problematika rambut dan kulit kepala. Proses penelitian dan observasi pun kemudian ditekuninya di sebuah klinik yang beliau dirikan. Impiannya pun terwujud ketika di tahun 2000, beliau mendirikan pabrik yang mengawali langkah produksi produk perawatan rambut yang berbasis pada bahan-bahan alami yang didukung dengan mesin- mesin berteknologi terdepan dan dibawah pengawasan ketat dari riset dan penelitian ilmiah.

Name: PT Mustika Ratu Tbk
Description:
Perusahaan ini dibangun pada tahun 1975, dimulai dari garasi rumah Hj. DR BRA Mooryati Soedibyo, SS., M.Hum. Pada tahun 1978, perusahaan mulai menjalankan bisnis secara komerisal dengan memproduksi jamu yang didistribusi di Jakarta, Semarang, Surabaya, Bandung dan Medan.

Dalam perkembangannya, permintaan konsumen meningkat sehingga di tahun 1980an perusahaan mulai mengembangkan bermacam jenis kosmetik tradisional.

Pada 8 April 1981, pabrik perusahaan dioperasikan secara resmi. Dengan tujuan untuk memperkuan struktur kapitalisasi juga untuk mengimplementasi visinya sebagai perusahaan kosmetik dan jamu alami dengan teknologi tinggi terbaik di Indonesia, perusahaan membuat penawaran publik dan merekam sahamnya di PT. Bursa Efek Jakarta pada tahun 1995. Perusahaan mulai menerapkan standar internasional ISO 9002 dalam sistem manajemen mutu dan ISO 14001 dalam sistem manajemen lingkungan sejak tahun 1996.

Ruang lingkup dari aktivitas perusahaan meliputi fabrikasi, perdagangan, distribusi jamu, kosmetik dan minuman kesehatan dan lain-lain yang berkaitan dengan aktivitas bisnis.

Perusahaan berdomisili di Jalan Gatot Subroto Kav. 74-74, Jakarta Selatan dan pabrik berlokasi di Jalan Raya Bogor KM 26,4, Ciracas, Jakarta Timur.

Name: Anastasia Beverly Hills
Description:
Anastasia Soare is widely referred to as the Beauty Innovator and The Definitive Brow and Eye Expert. Over the years she has achieved iconic status in the beauty industry for her unique way of shaping the eyebrows and enhancing the eye area. While working as an esthetician at several prestigious beauty salons in Beverly Hills, Anastasia developed her own specific Golden Ratio technique behind the science of shaping eyebrows and helping to enhance the overall eye area, in addition to her other skincare services. With her extremely loyal following and the growing buzz behind her brow shaping techniques, Anastasia opened her first full service salon on Bedford Drive in Beverly Hills, aptly named Anastasia Beverly Hills, in 1997. The success of her first salon led her to opening a second full service salon in Brentwood, CA in 2010.

Anastasia has also extended her reach with Anastasia Brow Studios at select Nordstrom, Sephora and International locations, and with the creation of her exclusive brow products and the first to market clinically and consumer tested makeup line.

Name: Lotus Herbals Pvt Ltd
Description:
Lotus Herbals is India’s leading natural cosmetics company. 

Based on 5000-year-old science of Ayurveda and combining it with 21st century's technology, we offer a well-researched and robust range of over 500 Skincare, Haircare, Suncare, and Make-up products for the retail and professional markets.

Name: LUSH
Description:
Since establishing in 1995 in Poole, Dorset, Lush has been driven by innovation and its ethics.
Creators of pioneering beauty products such as the fizzing bath bomb, shower jellies and solid shampoo bars, we place emphasis on fresh ingredients like organic fruits and vegetables, fight against animal testing and combat over-packaging by developing products that can be sold ‘naked’ to the customer without any packaging.

We currently operate in 52 countries with 928 global shops. Through our separate business divisions we invent, manufacture and sell our handmade products direct to our customers through our own shops and online. The fact that we make all our products by hand is something we are really rather proud of!

Lush is 10% Employee Owned since 2017 and our people are the heart and soul of our business. 

In the UK we currently have offices located in Poole, Dorset and Soho, London.

Name: ESQA
Description:
PT Keva Cosmetics International is an Indonesian Cosmetics Company established in 2016. Our brand is ESQA Cosmetics. 

ESQA is an affordable luxury. We’re an aspirational brand that offers a high-end beauty experience with international poise.

Our products meet the standard of luxury beauty, but are accessible to more thanks to drugstore prices. Every product is practical and designed to simplify the beauty routine of the modern woman.

Our company embodies 5 values; AGILE, EFFICIENCY, CUSTOMER FOCUS, INTEGRITY & INNOVATION.

Name: Stila Cosmetics
Description:
Celebrity makeup artist Jeanine Lobell founded Stila in 1994. The Company name is derived from the Italian word "stilare," which means "to pen". Stila believes that makeup should be as individual as each woman's own signature. 

Stila creates products for the eyes, cheeks, lips and face as well as for complexion perfection and multi-use. The Company also sells brushes and accessories. Stila’s modern, uniquely illustrated and inspiring packaging is made out of recycled materials that are durable as well as distinctive. Stila has also continually sought new ways to teach makeup techniques, either over the Internet or within the product container. 

Today, Stila is known for its modern, sophisticated, non-intimidating approach to beauty. The brand's innovative, multi-tasking formulas, eco-friendly packaging, and fashion-forward colors have cemented its place on must-have lists of top beauty editors around the world. The prestige color brand regularly appears on the pages of magazines like Allure and InStyle, and is also used by top designers during New York fashion week.

Name: Eka Jaya Group
Description:
Be part of the most people-oriented company in Indonesia.

Eka Jaya Internasional (EJI) is a leading company in the beauty industry that was established in December 2016. We believe in walking the talk and reaching targets through our company's values, IC-2 (integrity - Care - Innovation - Customer Satisfaction). Thus, we always exceed our target within a short period of time.

As we believe that quality is our priority, we own a private factory to ensure product quality, delivery time, and affordable prices.

These are category business units under the EJI Group:
Beauty & Skincare, Health & Personal Care, Beauty Clinic Services, and Retail

So, what are you waiting for? Join us as #EJINIAN NOW and upsize your career track with #LifeAtEJI

Name: Hebe Beauty Indonesia
Description:
Hebe Beauty Indonesia is a dynamic beauty retail company dedicated to bringing the best in beauty to consumers across Indonesia. With a passion for quality and customer satisfaction, we offer a diverse range of beauty and personal care products.


Committed to inspiring confidence and self-expression, we provide an engaging shopping experience both online and offline. As a trusted name in the beauty industry, we are committed to constant growth and innovation. We ensure that everyone can discover products that align with their personal beauty journey.

Name: Briogeo Hair Care
Description:
“Brio” means “full of life” and “geo” means “of the earth” — together they define who we are, what we do, and why we craft clean, high-performance haircare.  
 
In 2013, our founder, Nancy Twine, began blending natural ingredients in her kitchen to create effective haircare for every hair type. Those kitchen-born formulas pioneered a new approach to clean — proving there's no need to compromise between high-integrity ingredients and high performance.   
 
Since then, we’ve cultivated 50+ formulas that have powered hair transformations across 25 countries. From barrier-boosting scalp care to proven repair, hair-healthy stylers, everyday nourishment, and every need in between. You do the most for your hair, we do the most for its care.

Name: Cosmetic Valley
Description:
Beating heart of the world cosmetics industry

Recognized as a competitiveness cluster by the ministry in 2005, the role of Cosmetic Valley is to help fragrance and cosmetic industry in the sector, through:
- Commercial development by networking, supporting exports for SMEs,
- Improvement of their competitiveness : set-up of Research and Innovation projects.

The cluster opens up to the whole of France: Cosmetic Valley gathered all companies in fragrance and cosmetic industry at national level. All companies who want to join a dynamic collaboration and network are more than welcome.


Our actions and services:
- Promoting the brand of France,
- Connecting the know-how: sales development, pooling and collaboration,
- Dynamizing research and innovation,
- Professional support through dedicated platforms: COSMETOMICS, COSMETOSCIENCES
- Developing expertise: Congresses and trainings,
- International cooperation :
 Founder & coordinator of Global Cosmetics Cluster (GCC) - The first international clusters network dedicated to innovation in cosmetics
 Coordinator of Global Cosmetics Cluster Europe (GCC.EU) - The European body of the GCC.

- Supporting exports: international exhibitions,
- Discovering the beauty of tomorrow: COSMETIC 360 Trade-show,
- Cosmetic Valley’s membership,
- Strategic surveillance: COSMETOVEILLE platform.


Our key figures:

 1st WORLD NETWORK OF THE PERFUMES AND COSMETICS SECTOR:
- 3,200 companies including 80% SME,
- 250,000 jobs,
- 600 members,
- 45 billion € turnover,
- 1st global exporter of fragrance and cosmetics in 2019.

1st WORLD NETWORK FOR COSMETOLOGY RESEARCH:
-450 research projects worth 400 million €,
-22 Universities, CNRS, LNE, Synchrotron SOLEIL,
-26,000 searchers - 1,000 laboratories,
-200,000 students.

Name: Avril (cosmétique bio)
Description:
Créée en 2012 dans l’objectif de rendre la cosmétique bio accessible à tous, Avril est une marque française qui cultive 4 valeurs fortes : le bio, la qualité, l'accessibilité et la proximité.

Maquillage, soins du visage, du corps et des cheveux, accessoires… Avril couvre tous les besoins en terme de beauté. 

Le bio fait partie de notre ADN. Nos cosmétiques certifiés bio sont approuvés par des organismes indépendants qui garantissent que nos formules respectent le strict cahier des charges de la cosmétique bio, des matières premières aux produits finis.

Et parce que nous voulons faire plus :

- 98% de nos produits de soin sont fabriqués en France

- Nous réduisons tous les packagings superflus et nous engageons pour des emballages plus responsables. 10 tonnes de plastique sont ainsi économisés chaque année grâce à notre concept de maquillage rechargeable 

- Nous sommes membres du collectif 1% for the planet et reversons chaque année 1% de notre chiffre d'affaires pour l'environnement

- Nous nous engageons pour limiter notre impact énergétique en finançant l'implantation d'éoliennes et de panneaux photovoltaïques qui produisent de l'énergie verte 

- Nous avons planté 43 000 arbres pour compenser nos émissions de CO₂

- Nous sommes opposés aux tests sur les animaux, et adhérons à Peta

Née dans le Nord, c’est tout naturellement qu'Avril ouvre sa première boutique à Lille en 2016. Aujourd'hui, il existe plus de 50 boutiques Avril partout en France ainsi qu’en Belgique, pensées sur un concept architectural unique réalisé par un architecte local.

Name: TOM FORD BEAUTY
Description: TOM FORD IS A GLOBAL LUXURY HOUSE OFFERING EXCEPTIONAL WOMEN’S AND MEN’S FASHION, ACCESSORIES, EYEWEAR AND BEAUTY. FOUNDED IN 2005 BY TOM FORD, THE BRAND IS KNOWN FOR IMMACULATE TAILORING, MODERN SENSUALITY AND REFINED ELEGANCE. IN 2024, HAIDER ACKERMANN WAS APPOINTED CREATIVE DIRECTOR. TOM FORD BEAUTY IS DESIGNED TO AMPLIFY INDIVIDUAL BEAUTY WITH A COLLECTION OF SUMPTUOUS COSMETICS, EXTRAORDINARY FRAGRANCES AND ADVANCED SKINCARE.

Name: Jequiti Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma empresa fundada pelo Silvio Santos. É dele que vem o nosso encantamento, a vontade de empreender e fazer acontecer. 

Nossa identidade é pautada em cosmética, entretenimento e no propósito de incentivar o empreendedorismo. 

Temos um portfólio completo que abrange: perfumaria, maquiagem, cuidados diários, cabelos, linhas infantis e bebê. 

Além disso, já somamos mais de 128 milhões de reais em prêmios distribuídos no Roda a Roda Jequiti.

Name: La Roche-Posay Laboratoire Dermatologique
Description:
At La Roche-Posay, we know skin is a matter of life.  
While skin issues can scar our lives in more ways than one, healing skin has the power to change lives in more ways than one.
Everyday, we drive dermatology forward by joining forces with the medical community.
Together, we pioneer new ways to be at the service of people.
By bringing together radical efficacy and profound human understanding.
By revealing the life impact of skin issues, one study at a time, to broaden the scope of care.
By bringing the most advanced dermatological knowledge to each of our skincare solutions.
From newborns to cancer patients, from UV protection to repairing the severely-injured skin: we won’t stop until we bring a better life to all skin.

Name: Elizabeth Arden
Description:
Elizabeth Arden's fundamental belief was that beauty should not be a veneer of makeup, but an intelligent cooperation between science and nature in order to develop a woman's finest natural assets. She lived by her mantra, "To be beautiful is the birthright of every woman."

Miss Arden created skin care products that benefited, not masked, the skin. She not only promoted her concept of Total Beauty, including diligent skincare, nutrition and fitness, but lived it prudently as she persistently sought to bring a scientific approach to skincare formulations.

Miss Arden was uncompromising in her vision to create the new and absolute best products, packaging and services that women not only needed, but desired; whether it was the cult-classic Eight Hour Cream, her legendary Blue Grass fragrance, or a bold red lipstick to coordinate with the uniforms of the women serving in the armed forces during World War II.

Elizabeth Arden's list of beauty innovations is long. She was the first to introduce eye makeup to the women of America and pioneered the creation of the "makeover." With the launch of Ardena Skin Tonic, the company became the first to incorporate its founder's name into a product name. Miss Arden developed the first travel-size beauty products, and was the first in the cosmetics business to train and send out a team of traveling demonstrators and saleswomen.

By the 1930s, Miss Arden had opened Red Door salons in the majority of the fashion capitals around the globe, and proudly acknowledged her accomplishments by proclaiming that there were only three American names known in every corner of the globe: Singer Sewing Machines, Coca-Cola and Elizabeth Arden.

Through it all, Miss Arden created both an empire and a new industry. Her entrepreneurial spirit and commitment to innovation, quality and excellence remain the soul of the company today.

Name: TATCHA
Description:
Tatcha is a skincare brand rooted in timeless Japanese wisdom, offering transformative yet kind-to-skin formulas that marry Japanese botanicals with clinical ingredients. 

 Our formulation philosophy is informed by the Japanese concept hinou dokon, which means “skin-mind same root”—an acknowledgement of the powerful connection between the skin and the brain. Guided by the mission to care for people through their skin, Tatcha takes a holistic approach to skincare from concept to formulation to clinical evaluation, offering skincare rituals that benefit both skin and mind, while emphasizing the importance of mindfulness to skin health. 

Tatcha is grateful to support Room to Read’s mission of world change through education. Every purchase supports education equality through a partnership with the leading nonprofit for children's literacy and girls' education. As of October 2022, Tatcha has funded 7 million days of school for girls in Asia and Africa, and supported the printing and distribution of 155,000 inclusive books for underserved children in the US. 

In 2019, Tatcha was acquired by Unilever Prestige. A global company based in San Francisco and Tokyo, it is distributed in over 10 countries.

Name: DRUNK ELEPHANT
Description:
Skincare works better when done with intention.

All Drunk Elephant products are formulated without ingredients that can be at the root of common skin issues or may interfere with product effectiveness. Drunk Elephant products are designed to support skincare enthusiasts who approach skincare with intention and want to achieve long term skin health. The busy Drunk Elephant consumer can create a custom, effective routine that yields consistently luminous skin. Whether heading to the office, enjoying a night out or having a cozy self-care evening at home, Drunk Elephant empowers customers to make informed, intentional choices about their skin so they can feel their best wherever they are.

Name: Morphe
Description: Morphe was born in 2008 among the artists and influencers in Los Angeles.  Finally.  A beauty brand created for the creators.  For the dreamers.  For those looking for killer makeup without killing their wallet.  A place where our #MorpheBabe can let their passion and creativity for beauty fly high.  We're more than just a brand; we're a ride-or-die fam.

Name: Dermage
Description:
A Dermage é sinônimo de qualidade e cuidado. Cuidado ao cuidar da pele de verdade, com ativos de alta concentração. Cuidado ao pensar e desenvolver produtos para a pele brasileira, da qual nos orgulhamos de cuidar desde os anos 70, oferecendo produtos nas mais variadas texturas e para suas diversas necessidades.

Fundada pela farmacêutica bioquímica Lisabeth Braun, a Dermage começou com uma farmácia de manipulação, um negócio até então novo no Rio de Janeiro. Com seus produtos de excelência, construiu uma relação de confiança com a classe médica. A demanda era tanta que, em 1990, Lisa percebeu uma nova oportunidade: por que não industrializar suas fórmulas mais pedidas? Um novo começo, novos desafios.

Com criatividade, estudos e muitas pesquisas, a Dermage se tornou uma das marcas de dermocosméticos mais queridinhas das brasileiras. Seus produtos, desenvolvidos com ativos de alta eficácia e sem testes em animais, ganharam posição de destaque, com fórmulas premiadas e indicações de dermatologistas. 

De uma pequena sala em Copacabana e poucas fórmulas, para mais de 200 produtos no portfólio e 70 lojas no país, entre próprias e franquias, além da distribuição em farmácias e na gigante multimarcas Sephora. De Lisa para Ilana, sua filha e atual CEO da marca, a Dermage é mais do que um case de sucesso, é a demonstração do poder do empreendedorismo feminino.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Transformative Ventures
Description: Transformative Ventures owns and operates The Ayurveda Experience, a house of Ayurveda-inspired brands and one of the world’s largest Ayurveda-focused e-commerce platforms. The company is backed by leading investors including Jungle Ventures, Fireside Ventures, Anicut Capital, Sharrp Ventures, and Kalpavriksh Fund (an SIDBI initiative), among others, as well as several marquee angel investors from India, Singapore, and the US. It offers a curated, fully-owned portfolio of brands and products inspired by the ancient science of Ayurveda, adapted for modern consumers. The Ayurveda Experience serves over 1.75 million customers across more than 25 countries and receives over 20 million visits annually across its websites. Currently, the platform hosts three skincare brands and one supplements brand, each grounded in Ayurvedic principles and designed for global relevance.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Eminence Organic Skin Care
Description: An award-winning provider of the most effective, professional skin care products, Eminence Organic Skin Care is sold in leading spas in more than 60 countries around the world. Eminence Organics melds herbal craftsmanship, innovative skin rejuvenation techniques unique to Hungary and hand-picked ingredients to craft premium natural, organic and Biodynamic skin care that is good for the earth as well as good for the skin. Eminence Organic Skin Care is proud to be a Certified B Corporation, the leaders of the global movement using the power of business to solve social and environmental problems, held to rigorous standards of performance, accountability and transparency for our employees, our community and our customers. We plant a tree for every product sold! Visit www.eminenceorganics.com for more information.

Name: Interparfums
Description:
Interparfums has been imagining, designing, producing and distributing prestige fragrances for more than 30 years. Every year, driven by the passion of more than 250 employees in Europe, North America and Asia, Interparfums gives life to more than 30 million bottles, embarking on a journey across the globe to convey the spirit of our 11 brands: Boucheron, Coach, Jimmy Choo, Karl Lagerfeld, Kate Spade, Lacoste, Lanvin, Montblanc, Moncler, Rochas, Van Cleef & Arpels.
More information on: www.interparfums.fr

Name: Jo Malone London
Description: Understated style. Defined by a rather unconventional sense of sophistication. A British fragrance and lifestyle house, with a contemporary point of view. Timeless and elegant... but always infused with a charming dash of wit and whimsy. Acquired by The Estée Lauder Companies, Inc. in 1999, today the brand is available in 63 countries worldwide and continues to inspire a loyal following.

Name: Wellversed
Description:
Wellversed is committed to maximising human potential through authentic supplements crafted with scientific rigour. With a focus on efficacy and quality, each formulation is designed to get consumers one step closer to reaching their full potential and embark on a transformative journey.

Beyond exceptional products, Wellversed fosters a culture of excellence through continuous learning and rigorous training. Our vision extends to helping every team member achieve excellence to maximise their potential.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: La Prairie Switzerland
Description:
LA PRAIRIE -
The Luxury skincare house where audacious innovation has cultivated a pioneering approach to beauty. 
A place where heritage and creativity are infused with the values of care, passion, entrepreneurship and excellence.
A place where dedicated and diverse professionals each contribute to an inspiring and unique environment. 
A place for careers to grow and flourish and where our sustainable foundation nourishes talents and futures.

LA PRAIRIE. CREATE A BEAUTIFUL IMPACT.

The La Prairie Group headquarters are based in Zurich in Switzerland. More than 1500 employees worldwide continuously strive to deliver outstanding scientific innovations, as well as the ultimate in global luxury. 
If you are interested in La Prairie Group as an employer please visit www.laprairiegroup.ch.

Name: Youth To The People
Description:
Youth To The People was created with one simple mission in mind: What you put on your skin should be as whole, nutrient-rich, and clean as what you put in your body. Our precise, custom formulas feature 100 percent vegan ingredients, cold pressed extracts, gentle preservatives, and earth-friendly packaging. 

Born from a family knee-deep in the beauty industry, cousins Greg Gonzalez and Joe Cloyes spent their childhood learning how to create botanical skin care. They credit a modernized vision of their grandmother's passion for beautiful skin and a healthy lifestyle as the inspiration behind Youth To The People.

We are inspired by the people that create, push themselves, travel, wear many hats, question, live big, seek, trust the journey, and go get it.

Name: Saie
Description: Saie is a totally new kind of makeup where amazing products, sustainable packaging and formulas, and inspired design are just as important as clean, luxurious ingredients. At Saie, that cool, top-shelf kind of makeup means products that are good for our bodies, non-harmful to the planet, easy to use, and—of course—look great on.

Name: Freshly Cosmetics
Description:
Natural dermocosmetics that accompany you at every stage

Freshly Cosmetics is a brand of natural dermocosmetics, safe and clinically proven, created to enhance the natural properties of your skin and hair while respecting their functions and cycles at every stage of life. Freshly was born with the purpose of driving a conscious change in the way we care for our skin and the planet, inspiring a kind of beauty and self-care that goes beyond the physical, combining holistic health, healthy habits, and sustainability.

Our formulas:
99% ingredients of natural origin, vegan, and ocean-friendly
Innovative formulas developed in our own laboratory
Real, deep, and long-lasting results without compromising your skin’s health
Dermatologically tested on sensitive and atopic skin
Safe during childhood and pregnancy

Freshly has positioned itself as the leading natural dermocosmetics brand in Spain, with a strong presence in both national and international physical markets. Today, Freshly sells its products in 36 countries through its e-commerce and marketplaces, as well as physically in its 13 Freshly Stores across Spain and in more than 1,000 points of sale through retailers in Spain, Andorra, Italy, Portugal, and France. The Freshly community already brings together more than 2 million people.

Want to know more about Freshly and the team behind it? Follow us!

Name: Trinny London
Description:
Founded by Trinny Woodall from her kitchen table in 2017, Trinny London was founded with one purpose – to give everyone the tools they need to feel their best. Banishing overflowing makeup bags for good, we introduced a streamlined solution called the stack: cream-based, multitasking little pots of joy that click seamlessly together. Then we took on the world of skincare with our game-changing skincare collection. Today, we’re continuously creating innovative products to revolutionise beauty routines across the globe.

We have achieved tremendous growth since 2017 and we’re proud to be one of Europe’s fastest-growing beauty brands. We’re generating millions of sales by developing innovative products, acquiring hundreds of thousands of supporters and customers all over the world, and more importantly, building a talented and motivated team to support our fantastic growth.

Name: Johnson & Johnson Consumer Health
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: OSEA Malibu
Description:
Clinically proven skincare from the sea 
Clean Beauty Since 1996 • Vegan & Cruelty Free
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sesderma
Description:
In 1989, a group of dermatologists headed by Doctor Gabriel Serrano founded Sesderma (www.sesderma.com) with the strong desire to solve skin problems by using innovative methods and working closely with the patient.

We love the skin. We are dermatologists and we listen to people by listening to their skin. Since the beginning Sesderma's mission is to create quality products with the need for innovation in the field of dermatology.

It has spent 25 years promoting a holistic dermatology that is committed to the complete wellbeing of the skin, and integrating knowledge and clinical practice with active listening tools and processes.

We were the first brand to develop products with alpha and betahidroxiacids (like glycolic acid). The Acglicolic range continues to be one of Sesderma’s most renowned and is constantly updated; 

Sesderma is a pioneer in applying nanotechnology in the manufacture of dermocosmetic products, encapsulating and transporting active ingredients in the fastest and most selective way possible to the lowest, deepest layers of the skin. This allows the product to act on the root of the problem and respond to customers’ dermocosmetic requirements.


Sesderma is establised in USA, Mexico, Colombia, Italy, Portugal, Poland, India,  Puerto Rico, Dominicanan Rep., Taiwan, Peru, United Kingdom, along with a wide distribution network worldwide, divided into three areas: 

Area 1: Europe, North America  and  Canada.
Area 2: Asia, Oceania and middle east. 
Area 3: Central and South America and  Africa.

Name: izil Beauty
Description:
izil is a premium soul care brand that merges the sacred rituals of Moroccan beauty with the precision of modern science. Offering clean, clinically proven skincare and haircare rooted in culture, crafted for results.
We don’t ask women to choose between past and progress.
We honour both, with powerful rituals, pure ingredients, and real transformation.

Welcome to izil, 
Pure Moroccan Soul, Proven Beauty

Name: Kosas
Description: Welcome to next-level clean beauty that’s about revealing, expressing, and feeling comfy in your skin. It’s good makeup (not no makeup) that’s quick, easy, can’t mess it up.  And it’s clinically proven to actually make your skin better, even when it’s bare.  It's Clean Makeup for Skincare Freaks.

Name: BEYOUNG
Description:
Na Beyoung, acreditamos que a beleza não precisa ser performática e que cuidar da pele não deveria ser uma obrigação ou algo difícil. Estamos aqui para ajudar as pessoas a se libertarem de rotinas impostas e reencontrarem o que realmente importa: o cuidado com presença, intenção e verdade.

Nascemos digitais, mas somos profundamente humanos. Questionamos padrões, excessos e ruídos para criar produtos essenciais, com alta performance e sensorialidade. Tudo com simplicidade, clareza e responsabilidade.

Do laboratório ao atendimento, controlamos toda a cadeia de produção para garantir eficácia comprovada e experiências reais — não promessas vazias. Nosso portfólio aposta em multifuncionalidade, preço justo e tecnologia acessível para entregar dermocosméticos que fazem sentido para a pele e para a vida.

E essa mesma intenção guia também a forma como construímos nossa cultura interna: com autonomia, transparência e colaboração. Acreditamos em um ambiente horizontal, no qual há espaço para crescer, contribuir e ser ouvido. Pessoas reais, construindo um universo de beleza ainda mais real.

Beyoung. Na sua pele, no seu tempo.

Name: Melaleuca: The Wellness Company
Description:
Melaleuca: The Wellness Company enhances the lives of those we touch by helping people reach their goals.

Melaleuca manufactures and distributes nutritional, pharmaceutical, personal care, facial care, home hygiene, and other wellness products of superior quality, and distributes them directly to the consumer through a full-service catalog and internet shopping system. This convenient system is changing the way hundreds of thousands of people shop today by eliminating middlemen and reducing marketing and distribution costs. This enables the company to spend more on research and high-quality, ecologically sensible ingredients while maintaining reasonable prices.

We provide the opportunity to earn an additional income without large investment, sales or risk.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience
Description:
On ne se donne pas à fond depuis plus de 70 ans sans une bonne raison. Chez Expanscience, nous sommes une société à mission, et notre raison d’être est d’aider chacun à façonner son bien-être, de l’enfance à la séniorité. C’est ce qui fait avancer, chercher et innover nos 1300 collaborateurs, tous les jours ! Indépendants dans l’âme, nous sommes une entreprise française, 100% familiale, avec des produits (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) présents dans plus de 90 pays. Pour nous c’est clair : le bien-être des femmes et des hommes est indissociable de la santé de la planète, et se trouve entre nos mains, à tous. Pour que les parents n’aient plus à choisir entre un soin de qualité pour leurs enfants et une solution bonne pour le monde où ils grandissent, nous leur apportons des produits naturels, performants et sains. Pour que chacun construise son bien-être avec l’âge, nous aidons les individus à préserver leur confort articulaire, leur agilité physique et mentale le plus tôt possible. Nous développons des actifs cosmétiques et ingrédients sensoriels d’origine 100% naturelle, qui contribuent au bien-être du corps et de l’esprit. Notre impact positif sur la société et l’environnement est reconnu par la certification B Corp et, à travers notre programme de RSE « impACT », nous nous engageons à devenir une entreprise à impact positif et à visée régénératrice. 

Notre mission vaut en premier lieu pour nos équipes. Au quotidien, cela se traduit par renforcer la QVT et l’égalité professionnelle, accompagner les vulnérabilités et favoriser l’inclusion des plus fragiles, proposer une stratégie talents et compétences ambitieuse et favoriser l’équilibre des temps de vie et l’efficacité collective. Cela passe par des mesures ambitieuses qui adressent les grands défis sociétaux des entreprises du XXIe siècle. Et cela porte ses fruits : nous sommes fiers d’être certifiés Great Place to Work dans 100% de nos filiales pour la 2e année consécutive !
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: 3INA
Description:
Beauty is ALL THE COLORS  
Vegan Cruelty-free Made in Europe 
Oh, and it’s pronounced Mee-Nah! 
We are B Corp
Join #3INA

Name: Smashbox Cosmetics
Description:
WE GREW OUT OF AN ACCLAIMED LA PHOTO STUDIO. LED BY FOUNDER AND PHOTOGRAPHER DAVIS FACTOR, THE ENERGY ON SET SHOWED NO SIGNS OF SLOWING DOWN — BUT TOUCHUPS ALWAYS KILLED THE VIBE — AND THE ORIGINAL SMOOTH & BLUR PRIMER WAS BORN.

TODAY, WE'RE THE #1 CRUELTY-FREE PRIMER BRAND IN THE US, AND WE GO BEYOND THE STUDIO TO CREATE LONG-LASTING, ALWAYS CRUELTY-FREE, PRIMER-POWERED FORMULAS, WHICH ARE DEVELOPED, TESTED, AND VETTED BY OUR HARD-WORKING CREW TO KEEP UP WITH YOU ALL DAY.

“EVERYTHING CARRIES OUT OF THE STUDIO INTO REALITY.” – DAVIS FACTOR, FOUNDER

Name: Haus Labs
Description: At Sephora & hauslabs.com

Name: Yves Rocher Türkiye
Description:
Markamız 1959 yılında Fransa’nın Bretagne bölgesinde, Fransız kimyager Yves Rocher tarafından kuruldu. 

Bugün hala ürünlerimizi Bretagne’daki üretim tesislerimizde üretiyor ve ürünlerimizin aktif bileşenini oluşturan bitkilerin büyük bölümünü yine Bretagne’daki organik tarım sahalarımızda yetiştiriyoruz.

Kimyager, biyolog, dermatolog ve etnobotanik araştırmacılardan oluşan 150 kişilik araştırma & geliştirme kadromuz 60 yılı aşkın süredir üzerinde çalıştığımız bitki dünyasından 1100 ayrı bitkisel içerik ve 50’den fazla markamıza patentli formül elde etmiştir. 

Yetiştirici, üretici ve dağıtıcı kimliğimiz ile kurulduğumuz günden beri doğaya zarar vermeden, yüksek performanslı, yenilikçi ve keyif veren güzellik ürünleri sunuyoruz. 

Başarıyla yürüttüğümüz bu misyonla bugün 90 ülkede 4000 satış noktasında, yılda 300 milyonu aşan ürünü tüm dünya kadınlarına ulaştırıyoruz. Markamızın doğum yeri Fransa’da ise kozmetik pazarının 1 numaralı markası olmayı sürdürüyoruz.

Bugün Türkiye'nin 55 şehrinde 250'den fazla satış noktası bulunuyor. Türkiye'de 3 milyondan fazla kadın Yves Rocher ürünleri kullanıyor.

Bazı rakamlar;

İnsana ve doğaya saygılı 250 TARIM ALANI.

LA GACILLY: Markamızın anavatanı. 1 Botanik Bahçe, 1 Ekolojik Spa Otel

1.100 KORUNMAYA ALINMIŞ BİTKİ

55 HEKTAR ORGANİK TARIM ALANI

ÜRÜNLERDE %100 Geri Dönüşümlü Cam Ambalaj

Laboratuvarlarda 150 Botanik Uzman

50 Yıllık Bitkisel Uzmanlık Dehası

25 Yıldır ana destekçisi / sponsoru olduğumuz YVES ROCHER VAKFI

%100 Doğada Çözünen Banyo Ürünleri

120 Milyon Web Sitesi Ziyaretçisi

Name: Océane
Description:
Somos uma nova forma de comprar, consumir e pensar a beleza.

Nascemos há mais de quinze anos para trazer uma beleza espontânea, descomplicada, acessível e, claro, smart. 
Smart porque inovação faz parte do nosso DNA

Nosso primeiro produto, os lenços removedores de esmalte, foram inéditos no mercado. De lá para cá, as inovações não pararam. Estamos sempre de olho nas pesquisas e no que existe de mais inovador no universo da beleza. Assim, a cada mês apresentamos uma novidade. 

Do skincare produzido na Coréia do Sul, passando por acessórios para seu momento de bem-estar e autocuidado, além da maquiagem, o objetivo da Océane é propor produtos para uma rotina prática e leve.

Da pesquisa à compra, até o produto e seus rituais ... a gente acredita que toda experiência de beleza pode (e deve!) ser mais smart.

Name: Taif Al Emarat | طيف الإمارات
Description:
Taif Al Emarat is a leading brand in the design and manufacturing of luxury fragrances inspired by our Arabic rich culture and Gulf values and traditions with modern touches which changed the Arabic Perfumes Concept. 

Fragrance that travels as far as your imagination:
We have story to tell, one of pure passion for the art of creating premium perfume. Delicately and lovingly balancing notes to craft a flawless impression and a complex trail that travels as far as your imagination

The company was launched in the United Arab Emirates in 2006 and we expanded our businesses to reach all GGC as a step to reach the global market. Our aim was always to provide our distinctive products to our customers. We put all of our experience in place for our customers’ satisfaction and happiness plus providing the highest international quality standard services and healthy systems.

Our journey began from the selection of the natural and Rarest Oud, amber and essential oils; to the design, manufacturing and packaging which is anaged by a group of specialised and highly qualified teams. Our product is our ambassador to your heart.

The production process covers the full range of research and development, sourcing, fragrance formulating and creation. 

Vision: To be a global leader Capturing Sensations with our fragrances and deliver an exotic and unique experience to our clients.

Mission: To Continue enhancing our position as a leading provider of the most sophisticated Oriental Perfumes and Non-Alcoholic Fragrances throughout the GCC and Worldwide.

Values: Integrity is our absolute principle and our first rule in commitment toward our customers, our community and our environment throughout using quality natural ingredients in our fragrances. Excel in the journey of success was the beginning of a journey we shared with our customers.

Name: RENÉE Cosmetics
Description:
Timelessly inspired, endlessly enhanced- RENÉE Cosmetics is an Indian makeup brand that’s redefining beauty with its range of high quality, 100%  cruelty-free, innovative range of products. RENÉE believes in empowering women to own and enjoy their bold, ambitious persona and let their glam do the talking. Founded by Aashka Goradia Goble, the famed actress and her brand both believe that the art of cosmetics is a true liberator and a beautiful form of expressing oneself in hues, tones and shades.
Explore RENÉE Cosmetics range of products at www.reneecosmetics.in

Name: Vult
Description:
A Vult Cosmética é uma marca brasileira que nasceu em 2004 com um grande desejo: oferecer ao universo feminino a possibilidade de ter produtos cosméticos sofisticados, inovadores e acessíveis.

Entendemos que isso resulta da comunicação aberta e integrada entre a empresa, o mercado, os consumidores e os profissionais da área. Acreditamos que somente com um diálogo livre de preconceitos e barreiras podemos identificar e criar produtos que atendam às expectativas de um público consumidor ávido pela qualidade e excelência.

Partindo do princípio "beleza por inteiro", hoje participamos no mercado com produtos que vão desde as linhas completas de maquiagens, até produtos específicos para o cuidado com cabelo e corpo – todos eles elaborados sob os mais altos padrões de qualidade e normas regulamentares de segurança.

Com sede em Mogi das Cruzes (SP), estamos estrategicamente localizados para atender com agilidade todo o mercado nacional, cujas vendas são realizadas através de distribuidores regionais especializados no atendimento ao varejo.

Transformação. É ela que impulsiona a todos – colaboradores, parceiros e distribuidores - a entender, respeitar e valorizar a beleza que existe em você.

Name: Murad
Description:
We’re the #1 dermatologist-founded brand* that approaches skin differently.

Since 1989, we’ve been developing clinically proven products that are supported by Dr. Murad’s industry-first research as a board-certified dermatologist and pharmacist. Our formulas don’t just consider one symptom or concern—they address total skin health, utilizing proprietary active ingredients and the latest clinical-grade technologies for unmatched efficacy and proven results.

Want to be a part of shaping Murad’s future? You can learn more about our job openings at murad.com/murad-careers/ and more about Murad's commitments at murad.com/wellness-for-people-wellness-for-planet/.

*Based on first half 2023 prestige skincare sales data, not including professional brands

Name: Farmacy Beauty
Davene
Description:
Somos a Davene, uma marca de cosméticos brasileira com mais de 45 anos de história. 

Desde 1977, nossa missão é levar inovação, qualidade e bem-estar para o seu dia a dia. Especialistas em cuidados pessoais, perfumaria e linha infantil, criamos produtos que nutrem sua pele e sua vida.

Name: Laboratoire Garancia
Description:
Savéria Coste, Docteur en Pharmacie et Fondatrice du Laboratoire Garancia, développe des soins cosmétiques révolutionnaires tellement efficaces qu’ils en deviennent magiques ! Mais il n’y a pas de Magie sans Science… 
Notre créatrice travaille en collaboration avec des chercheurs du monde entier et allie dans ses formules des extraits botaniques traditionnels à des actifs high-tech issus des dernières avancées en recherche cosmétologique. De cette alchimie naissent des soins innovants qui vous enveloppent dans des textures étonnantes évocatrices de rêves et d'émotions…

« Mon histoire, c’est l’histoire familiale de quatre générations de pharmaciens et d’une longue tradition pour la passion de la dermo-cosmétique. De par mes origines corses, je suis très attachée aux traditions et au respect de la nature, à l’image de mes formulations. En tant que pharmacien, je me suis engagée pour une cosmétique clean et hyper efficace, respectueuse de notre peau et donc de notre santé. » 
Savéria Coste

Name: Vichy Laboratoires
Description:
Health is vital. Start with your skin.
Recommended by 80,000 dermatologists worldwide, VICHY Laboratoires offer dermatological solutions to boost your skin and scalp & hair health.

Name: WOW Skin Science
Description: A customer-centric personal care brand, WOW Skin Science curates the best of natural ingredients in its products. Our products are free from sulphates, silicones, mineral oils, parabens, and artificial colours. The ingredients used are inspired by nature & dermatologically tested for your safety. We’re committed to serving our customers in the best way possible while also making sure that we give back to nature through our WOW Green Hands Initiative. Our innovative products are a data-driven result of constant customer feedback and our efforts for a greener tomorrow through sustainable business practices.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PECTIV
Description: PECTIV is a premium feminine care brand developed by a pharmacist to solve the most common problems women face during their period—irritation, odor, and discomfort. PECTIV infused with advanced Anion Technology that naturally prevents bacterial growth. We go beyond just absorption—PECTIV offers protection, comfort, and confidence for women with sensitive skin, heavy flow, or who simply want better, safer period care. Trusted by thousands of women across the GCC and beyond.

Name: AVO Innovation Technology
Description:
PT AVO INNOVATION TECHNOLOGY is a holding company which has main focus on beauty industry. AVO Innovation Technology was established  in 2014 with brand of Avoskin, we have the mission to be one of the greatest beauty company in Indonesia that empower every person to be confident and bolder. Besides, we aim to be the SEA’s most iconic, democratic, fast-growing beauty brands with strong commitment in Sustainability

Currently, AVO Innovation & Technology is on mission to provide high efficacy with no waste skincare by providing green and blue beauty concept, obviously we will always implement the fair trade, ethical buying, no waste materials, naked packaging, and fight against animal testing! Besides, AVO also work collaboratively with NGO to do real actions to save environment and planet.

AVO is not only about us, but also about you, millions youth and Indonesia woman who will transform beauty industry into the next stage. The group is talented, tight-knit, super nimble, always curious but serious bunch who get things done and love to have fun while making impact along the way.  So here's our call,

To the Bolds, the Challengers, the Go-Getters,  who want contribute yourself for bigger thing than you, and ready to help, encourage a CHANGE through the real actions.

Name: Maison Francis Kurkdjian
Description:
Maison Francis Kurkdjian is a luxury fragrance house co-founded by Francis Kurkdjian and Marc Chaya in 2009. Together, they fulfilled their desire for a sensual, generous and multi-facetted landscape of free expression, creating a new emblem of French perfumery know-how and lifestyle.

Maison Francis Kurkdjian is an LVMH Group company and a member of Comité Colbert.

Name: Rituals Cosmetics France
Description: Rituals est la première marque au monde à avoir associé cosmétiques et produits pour la maison. Chaque collection s’inspire d’une tradition ancestrale et invite à transformer les routines du quotidien en un moment riche de sens. Né à Amsterdam en 2000, Rituals est présent dans 36 pays avec plus de 900 boutiques, 3000 corners en parfumeries, grands magasins et aéroports, ainsi que 5 spas. Installée en France depuis 2015, la marque comptera bientôt plus de 100 boutiques en propre, et est déjà présente dans plus de 300 points de vente chez des partenaires comme Sephora, Galeries Lafayette, Printemps ou encore Nocibé. Entreprise certifiée B Corp, Rituals est engagée dans une démarche de progrès pour poursuivre son développement en faveurs d’un bien-être durable. Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous en boutique, sur Rituals.com ou sur l’application Rituals.

Name: Bombay Shaving Company
Description:
At Bombay Shaving Company, we are always dedicated towards providing you the ultimate grooming experience, powered by superfoods, without any compromises. Our varied range of products target everyday grooming problems and help you put your best look forward, every day.

Our beard kit regimens aim to enhance the growth and styling of facial hair while our curated shaving product range focuses upon absolute precision and smoothness. We have also taken care of your showering needs with our extensive bath range while our skincare products help you in building a healthy and blissful routine.

With the recent launch of our hair care range, started off by 4 superfoods-enriched hair oil blends, we guarantee you a complete, wholesome experience from head to toe. Step into the world of Bombay Shaving Company, where all your grooming needs get answered.

Name: BinSina Pharmacy
Description:
Established in 1965, BinSina has solidified its position as a premier pharmacy in the UAE and is now expanding its reach to Oman. With a heritage of over 60 years, we have built a reputation for promoting health and wellness through our expansive network of over 150 stores.
BinSina provides a diverse range of products, from beauty and cosmetics to health supplements and skincare, ensuring convenience and variety for our community. 

For us, "Healthy inside, beautiful outside" stays true as we strive to be your trusted partner in all things health and beauty.

Please stop by our pharmacies for product assistance, or a friendly chat, or visit our website to learn more about BinSina.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Chantecaille
Description:
Chantecaille’s mission is to create luxurious botanical beauty with impact. For the past 25 years, the brand has been at the cutting-edge of some of the industry’s most exciting innovations in skincare and cosmetics, creating iconic products that are beloved worldwide. Founded by the mother-daughter team of Sylvie and Olivia Chantecaille in 1998, the brand is known around the world for its pioneering use of naturals in both skincare and makeup, as well as its give-back philanthropy program that supports conservation groups worldwide. Always cruelty-free, the products crafted by Chantecaille are the epitome of forward-thinking and created with a sustainable approach.

A Beiersdorf prestige brand, Chantecaille’s global teams include some of the beauty industry’s best-in-class talent, from product formulation to creative direction, marketing and more. The culture of the workplace is collaborative, exciting, and inclusive.

Name: Supergoop!
Description: SPF is the #1 thing you can do for your skin, and Holly Thaggard founded our brand in 2005 to make it fun and easy to wear, every single day. We add sunscreen to your favorite skincare and beauty essentials, and make sure each one is highly personalized to work with your skin and your life.  Each formula is clean, reef-safe and feels amazing, so you can live bright and let us take care of the rest.

Name: Oh My Cream !
Description:
Oh My Cream est le concept store de la beauté alternative qui prend soin de vous et de votre peau.

Notre promesse ? Permettre à tou(te)s d’accéder à une beauté alternative : plus clean, plus experte, plus inspirante. 

Nous sélectionnons les marques de beauté les plus pointues et avons à coeur de proposer à nos client(e)s une expérience unique, aussi bien sur notre e-shop (à travers de nombreux contenus éditoriaux et fonctionnalités innovantes) que dans nos boutiques (France, Uk et Belgique)

Oh My Cream is the alternative beauty concept store which takes care of you and of your skin.

Our philosophy ? Transparency in everything we say and do.

We believe in a cleaner, more expert, more inspiring beauty. We hand-pick each and every brand that we distribute. Last but not least, we have at heart to propose a unique experience, both on our website through exclusive editorial content and innovative features, and in-store.

Name: Tentang Anak
Description:
Tentang Anak | Empowering Indonesia’s 80 Million Children

Tentang Anak is a mission-driven company transforming child care and parenting in Indonesia. In less than a year:
1. Expert Care: Top 5 children’s skincare brand online, trusted for treating eczema and rashes.
2. Expert Boost: #1 children’s vitamin brand online, prioritizing child health.
3. Educational Tools: #1 choice for parents, driving learning and growth.
4. Pregnancy & Parenting App: Supporting families with expert guidance from pregnancy through early childhood.

Backed by experts in pediatrics, psychology, and early childhood development, we’re building innovative, science-backed solutions that support children’s well-being from morning routines to bedtime. With partnerships spanning the Ministry of Health and Education, we’ve impacted 3 million children and counting.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Malaberg
Description:
We’re a team of over 100 passionate brand-builders, with one simple mission:

Make category-leading products and build thriving communities around them.

We do this through a unique combination of people, technology, and content. 

Specialising in health, nutrition, and wellness brands, Malaberg has become one of the fastest-growing D2C companies worldwide.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PT Mandom Indonesia Tbk
Description:
History of the Company was initially started as a distributor of Tancho Pomade product in 1969. Perceiving  positive growth in Indonesia market at that time, the Company committed to fully provide a comfortable lifestyle supported by health and beauty for Indonesian people, by establishing commercial production in 1971.

In 1993, the Company officially listed its shares on the Indonesia Stock Exchange. Through the listing, the Company became the 167th company and the 11th Japanese joint venture company who listed its shares. At the moment, the Company’s number of share is 201,066,667 shares with nominal value Rp500/share.

The Company currently has two factories which both located in MM 2100 Industrial Town. Factory 1 is functioned to produce cosmetic products and Factory 2 is functioned to produce plastic packaging and also serves as the logistic center. 

At this time, the Company offers several brands in the market whereas three of them are the Company’s main brands namely GATSBY, PIXY and PUCELLE. Through these brands, the Company also produces other products under the brand Lucido-L, Tancho, Mandom, Spalding, Lovillea, Miratone and also several other brands including those produced specially for exports.

Besides Indonesian market, the Company also serves for Export market. Several export destination countries including United Arab Emirates (UAE), Japan, India, Malaysia, Thailand, and others. Through UAE, the Company’s products are re-exported to other countries in Middle East, Africa and also Eastern Europe.

Name: Weleda AG
Description:
Weleda ist die weltweit führende Herstellerin von zertifizierter Naturkosmetik und anthroposophischen Arzneimitteln. Zum Produktportfolio gehören weltweit etwa 1000 Arzneimittel sowie 120 Naturkosmetika. Sie werden nach einem einzigartigen Menschen- und Naturverständnis entwickelt. 
Weleda Produkte sind in über 50 Ländern erhältlich. Für deren Entwicklung, Produktion und Vermarktung engagieren sich international ca. 2320 Mitarbeitende. Der Hauptsitz der Schweizer Aktiengesellschaft befindet sich in Arlesheim (Schweiz). Dazu gehören die grösste Niederlassung in Schwäbisch Gmünd (Deutschland) und 28 Gesellschaften in 22 Ländern. 
Aus dem von der Anthroposophie inspirierten Menschenbild und Naturverständnis leitet sich der Unternehmenszweck von Weleda ab: Entfalten von Gesundheit und Schönheit im Einklang mit Mensch und Natur. Und das seit über 100 Jahren. 

Unter https://www.weleda.de/ gibt es mehr Informationen zu Weleda.
 
Unsere Datenschutzbestimmungen finden Sie unter https://www.weleda.de/rechtliches/datenschutz

Name: Martha Tilaar Group
Description:
We are one of leading beauty companies in Indonesia, founded by Dr. (H.C) Martha Tilaar in 1970. Employing over 4,000 employees, our company divided into three business classifications, manufacturing and Marketing, Distribution, and Service. Our teams are creating innovation and best quality in beauty product based on herbal and natural ingredients of Indonesia and its supporting services like spa, hair and beauty salon, beauty shop, advertising agency, beauty school, and wedding and indonesian culture magazine.

Click here for more details about career :
http://www.marthatilaargroup.com/id/karir

Martha Tilaar Group is a grand umbrella of luxury and consumer brands : Sariayu, PAC, Dewi Sri Spa, Biokos, Solusi Organic, Caring Colours, Belia, Rudy Hadysuwarno Cosmetics, Mirabella Cosmetics, and Cempaka Cosmetics. In its 44th of existence, Martha Tilaar’s products are already expanded through South Asia like Singapore, Malaysia, Brunei Darussalam, and Philippines.

Name: Dr. Bronner's
Description:
Dr. Bronner's is a family business committed to making socially and environmentally responsible products of the highest quality, while dedicating our profits to help make a better world. Check out our All-One Report here: https://www.drbronner.net/a1r2025

In all we do, let us be generous, fair & loving to Spaceship Earth & all its inhabitants. For We're All-One or None!

Name: Chefaa
Description:
Chefaa, a patient-centric pharmacy benefits platform, and a vision-driven tech-enabled company leading the safe digital transformation of healthcare and supply chain in Africa and the Middle East, designed to empower patients to live healthier and happier lives by providing compelling and comprehensive essential healthcare solutions for both individuals and entities, aiming to be the first one-stop-health solution for an end-to-end healthcare experience.

We enhance the quality of life of our users by allowing them to easily order, schedule, and refill recurring non-insured and insured prescriptions. Additionally, Chefaa offers various services for all healthcare stakeholders.
Awarded Women in Tech 2023 by Falak Hub, Vivatech first Africa-health tech award 2022, Cartier Impact award 2022, Cartier Women’s Initiative {CWI} fellow 2020, and more.

Chefaa connects monthly +1.5M users with +1,500 pharmacies across Egypt and has +800 mobile app downloads.

Founded in 2017 by Dr. Doaa Aref and Dr. Rasha Rady.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Embelleze
Description:
MANIFESTO DO CÓDIGO EMBELLEZE

1 DECLARAÇÃO:
Nós, colaboradores Embelleze, solenemente declaramos que todas as mulheres tem o direito de realizar seus sonhos, e eles são fundamentais para o desenvolvimento da humanidade.

2 COMPROMISSO:
Nós, na Embelleze, estamos totalmente comprometidos na realização da nossa declaração e faremos tudo que estiver ao nosso alcance, para transformar a vida das mulheres através da beleza.

3 PROPÓSITO MAIOR:
Nosso propósito maior é o desenvolvimento da humanidade através da beleza da mulher.

4 VISÃO:
Nós temos um sonho, que todos enxerguem o mundo com um olhar feminino.

5 MISSÃO:
Em 5 anos queremos ajudar a transformar a vida de 1 milhão de mulheres no Brasil.

6 VALORES:
Conhecimento da diversidade da beleza da mulher brasileira.
° Beleza é Paixão pela Vida
° Movimento - “Melhorzinho” - Passo à Passo
° Transparência
° Transformação
° Indo para Cima - UP, Crescimento
° Espiral - Transformação - Você aprende com os seus erros e dificuldades

7 CAUSA:
Nossa causa é participar da realização do sonho das mulheres.

8 ATITUDE:
° Otimista – Realista – Audaciosa
° Apaixonados pela Vida
° Mulher guerreira - Nunca desistir
° Sempre tentar de novo

9 O CHAMADO:
Queremos conclamar todas as pessoas que se identificam com a nossa causa a se unirem a nós e assinarem o Manifesto da Embelleze.

Acompanhe a Embelleze nas Redes Sociais:

Instagram: instagram.com/embelleze
Twitter: twitter.com/embelleze
Facebook: facebook.com/embelleze
Youtube: youtube.com/oficialembelleze

Name: Clensta
Description:
Every journey is determined by choices. Each choice we make leads us down a different path. At Clensta, we aim to break the norm of taking the path well-travelled and strive to carve out our own. Backed by science and innovation we aim to be value creators providing unique propositions to solve the unsolved. 

Extending across multiple categories of skincare, haircare, bodycare, wellness, fragrance and more, we aim to penetrate households across the globe by providing better choices for our consumers. 

At Clensta, we believe that the better way is the only way. For every unique need, we endeavour to create equally unique solutions; Solutions that not only ensure better care, better results & a better experience, but a better outlook towards the environment as well. 

Join us in our journey of constantly seeking the better way!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Medterra
Description:
Founded in 2017, Medterra started as a company specializing in CBD products and has since transformed into a leading botanical wellness company. 

Medterra’s mission is to empower people to maximize the potential of their mental and physical well-being by combining emerging natural ingredients with scientific advancements to deliver superior solutions that anyone can access with results that everyone will feel. 

The brand’s extensive range of products includes tinctures, oils, creams, lotions, roll-ons, sprays, functional supplements, gummies, chewing gum, gel capsules, Pets applications, drink enhancements, chocolates, treats, moistures, wrinkle cream, and soaking bath salts.

Medterra's portfolio also includes the brands Vena and five. Read below or visit the affiliated LinkedIn pages to learn more about each of these brands. 

Vena | www.linkedin.com/company/vena-cbd/
Co-founded by Tamra Judge in 2019, Vena is a women’s wellness brand that focuses on providing simple solutions that have big impacts on well-being. 

Through purposeful innovation, Vena utilizes unique elements of both nature and science to deliver products that will empower its customers to take control of their mental and physical vitality so they can lead happier and healthier lives. 

five | www.linkedin.com/company/fivecbd/
Founded in 2020, five was an early pioneer in recreational CBD and THC products designed to elevate adults to a state of happiness and enjoyment. 

five is focused on delivering reliable relief, chill vibes, and moments of joy through products that have enjoyable formats and highly effective formulas.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beardo
Description:
Have you ever wondered why greatness comes so naturally to the bearded? Why every kickass, creative, awesome man you know sports some form of a beard or the other? Or why history's most awesome personalities were bearded? We did too. Then we decided to sprout our own. While we went through the motions of growing our beards, we tried looking for products that would help us maintain and groom our beards.

Beardo was born out of the lack of options for the discerning urban male, who likes to grow and maintain his beard, but has no alternative other than using ordinary oils or incompatible products. At Beardo we use the choicest ingredients and quality controlled manufacturing processes to give the bearded man, the products he needs to ensure that his face mane, is pampered, soft, shiny and smells impeccable.

Name: Gently
