Description:
Gently is a personal care brand for babies and kids that brings gentle formula, good efficacy, and promotes a health-conscious lifestyle. Gently's mission is to help mothers to take care of their loved ones with the best solutions so that they can build healthy and happy families.

Our Vision

Become a leading consumer goods company that accompanies people in becoming their best selves to build happy lives and healthy families with our innovative products

Name: MiiN Korean Cosmetics
Description:
For more than a decade, MiiN Cosmetics has championed self-care and skin health by bringing the best of Korea to Europe: high-quality original products with innovative formulas providing a unique sensory experience to enjoy the daily skincare moment.  

We are experts in designing personalised and effective skincare routines. We distribute and retail the finest selection of Korean beauty brands in addition to two own brands expertly created in-house. MiiN empowers people to better understand their skin, encouraging them to indulge themselves through tailored skincare rituals.   

Through our localised sites, our expanding physical stores network and our B2B distribution arm, our goal is to ensure a first-in-class shopping experience and content platform for anyone interested in levelling up their skincare.   

For Wholesale enquiries you can visit miintrade.com. Explore MiiN’s universe at miin-cosmetics.com 
__ 

Durante más de una década, MiiN Cosmetics ha abanderado el concepto de autocuidado y ha apostado por la salud de la piel trayendo lo mejor de Corea a Europa: productos originales de calidad, con fórmulas innovadoras y una experiencia sensorial única para celebrar el momento skincare diario.  

Nos posicionamos como expertos en el diseño de rutinas personalizadas. Somos distribuidores y retailers oficiales de la mejor selección de cosmética coreana, además de dos marcas propias formuladas por nuestros expertos in-house. MiiN se ha convertido en referente de cosmética, facilitando las herramientas para que conozcamos mejor nuestra piel y convirtiendo el skincare en un ritual.  

A través de nuestras páginas web localizadas, nuestra red de tiendas físicas y nuestro papel como distribuidor, nuestra misión es asegurar una experiencia de compra inigualable y una plataforma de contenido accesible a quien quiera elevar su rutina de cuidado.  

Para consultas y compras B2B, nos puedes encontrar en miintrade.com. Descubre el universo MiiN en miin-cosmetics.com

Name: Karo Healthcare
Description:
Karo Healthcare delivers smart choices for everyday healthcare. 

We own and commercialise branded, original over-the-counter products and prescription medicines across a range of everyday categories, including intimate health; skin health; digestive health, foot health; pain, cough and cold; wellness; and specialty products. 

Our products are available in more than 90 countries and sold through pharmacies, retailers and via healthcare providers. We have our own sales organisation in more than 10 European countries, with the Nordic region as our core market. 

Karo Healthcare is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, and owned by KKR since 2025.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Quem Disse, Berenice?
Description:
Quem disse que não podemos? Somos livres! Somos Beauty + Care: a liberdade de criar a beleza que você quiser, unindo tratamento e make numa só pele. Vem com a gente!

Selo PETA Cruelty Free.

Name: ARMRA
Description:
ARMRA is the creator of the consumer colostrum category.

Modern living breaks down your barrier. 
ARMRA Colostrum is the bioactive food that builds it back.

We’re rebuilding health from the inside out. At ARMRA, we use patent-pending Cold-Chain BioPotent Technology, and leverage immune intelligence, to protect, restore, and enhance whole body health and cellular performance. Harnessing the power of colostrum and its 400+ bioactive nutrients, we bring together technology and superfood science, empowering you to face the modern world head on.

We're ARMRA. The revival of health.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ollie
Description:
Ollie é Ollie.

Aliamos proteção à skincare e maquiagem e criamos uma nova forma de se relacionar com o sol; mais livre, leve, autêntica.  

Demos vida a produtos práticos e multifuncionais feitos sob medida para as pessoas que, assim como nós, amam o sol.  

Muito prazer, somos a proteção com a cara do brasileiro.  Sunfriendly como nosso país manda e sua pele Merece.

Vem descobrir seu sol com a gente! ;)

Name: bareMinerals
Description:
The Power of Good

We believe every little choice we make has the power to create a big difference. As the creators of clean, natural makeup, we're here to help you take care of your skin, your beauty, and your sense of wellbeing through the little choices you make every day. To bring you make up that's full of what's good, and free of what harms. We also want to share a bigger sense of purpose that goes beyond makeup. A purpose that believes that the world is full of opportunity and free of limitations. That’s why we’re on a mission to help you, your community and the world around you feel the power of good.

Name: The Face Shop India Official
Description:
The Face Shop, #1 Korean Skincare Brand, is a subsidiary of LG Household & Health Care of LG Corporation, with 930 stores in 24 countries.
In India, The Face Shop K-beauty products are official distributed by Holistique Pvt. Ltd. through top ecommerce platforms like Nykaa, Amazon, Myntra and Purplle.

Inspired by Nature, we source over 600 natural ingredients from across 25 countries of the world and combine it with Korean technology to give customers nothing but the best.
It is a one stop solution for every skin type, concern and pocket that retails only 100% authentic and genuine products from Korea.
Our core value is naturalism, variety and value that is packed in each bottle.
Our vision and mission is to make everyone love and be comfortable in their skin with countless skincare choices.

Name: NPURE - PT. Penta Natural Kosmetindo
Description:
Are you ready for a new skin journey with NPURE?

Born in 2017, NPURE is a local skincare brand that aims to achieve a generation of healthy skin. Formulated with only the finest natural organic ingredients and advanced formula, we provide the best quality skincare that suits Indonesian type the most. As we’ve helped millions of people to achieve the best version of their skin, we keep on improving our products by ensuring that they’re halal, dermatologically tested, made from non-toxic ingredient and BPOM certified. So, are you ready to be a part of NPURE #GenerasiKulitSehat?

Your voice matters. Simply tag & mention us about your story with NPURE.

@npureofficial #NPURE #GenerasiKulitSehat

Name: nooro
Description:
At nooro, our unwavering dedication revolves around providing you with a better way. We are not only committed to improving your health but also ensuring it's done more safely and affordably. You are at the heart of our endeavor, and your well-being is our ultimate priority.


Our journey thus far has been promising, but our mission is far from complete. Together, we will continue to innovate, support, and transform the lives of millions. Thank you for being an integral part of our mission to make health and quality of life accessible to all.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dr. Squatch
Description:
Dr. Squatch is raising the bar on personal care with our handmade bar soaps and high-quality natural products.  

We're hiring - join our team in Southern California!

See the video with over 100 Million Views!
http://drsquatch.com

Name: Prebel S.A
Description:
Somos un integrador de conocimiento y tecnologías, apalancado en un sistema de capacidades para la economía del cuidado personal y belleza. 

Llevamos más de 80 años en la industria cosmética y de cuidado personal. Actualmente, fabricamos productos cosméticos y de cuidado personal para grandes compañías a nivel mundial, además comercializamos productos de empresas multinacionales. Toda nuestra experiencia nos permite desarrollar relaciones duraderas y rentables, entendiendo las necesidades de nuestros clientes, para entregarles soluciones que los sorprendan y excedan sus expectativas. 

¨Embellecemos vidas” es el propósito superior que nos inspira para acompañar con nuestro conocimiento y experiencia, nos impulsa a co-crear un espacio laboral humano e incluyente en el que la calidad de vida y el desarrollo de nuestros empleados son protagonistas. También, nos motiva para empoderar a hombres y mujeres que con nuestros productos y servicios honran su autoestima y su bienestar. Es un propósito que nos compromete con mejorar el mundo que compartimos.

Name: MartiDerm
Description:
MartiDerm, specialists in formulas for the care, health and well-being of your skin. Since 1958.

MartiDerm has grown exponentially since its foundation in a Barcelona pharmacy which continues to be a reference point today. The key: the magistral formulas it has improved and developed to gain the absolute loyalty of thousands of customers the world over. And the recognition of the medical and pharmaceutical sector. 

We have 70-plus dedicated products for skin and hair treatment and health. Our products are sold in over 30 countries. And we are still growing.

Distribution
Our products are sold in over 30 countries.

Specialists
Skin health and beauty. Pioneers in the creation and sale of the ampoule format, a unique combination of proteoglycans and vitamin C. Specialists in Smart Aging, a lifestyle based on care as a universal concept.

Name: Sodalis Group
Description:
We are the group committed to create Wellbeing through the quality, research and innovation of our brands in the Health & Beauty, Personal & Home Care world.

Always driven by an innate passion for what we do and a deep desire for constant improvement, today we are the Italian leader in the Cosmetics and Nutraceuticals market and represent a multi-brand and multi-channel, dynamic and international entrepreneurial reality, in continuous expansion.

We win over millions of consumers every day thanks to our vast portfolio of highly attractive and recognized proprietary brands, with strong positions in pharmacies, large-scale retail trade, e-commerce and perfumery, including: BioNike, Esi, Goovi, Tesori d’Oriente, Vidal, Deborah Milano, L’Arbre Vert, CD, Natural Honey, Lycia, Fresh & Clean, Biopoint, Leocrema.

Active for 30 years and always Italian family-owned, our Group has developed rapidly through the organic growth of owned brands and acquisitions of new brands. What we are is the result of the ability to effectively integrate new businesses within the Group but above all to develop them substantially, thus achieving continuous growth.

Today we are the home of over 20 strategic brands, we are a team of 1165 people and in our group we have 4 research laboratories and 4 cutting-edge production sites, located in Italy and France.

We are headquartered in Italy, we have subsidiaries in France, Germany, Portugal and Spain and we distribute our branded produc products in 40+ countries around the world through a wide network of international partnerships. 

Our vision: Create Wellbeing through brands capable of taking care of people and the planet.

Name: No7 Beauty Company
Description:
We are No7 Beauty Company a modern consumer goods company with purpose, that combines the best of traditional companies with the vibrancy and pace of a new digital-first business.

With operations in North America, Europe and Asia, we offer beauty products that consumers can trust wherever they are in the world.

Since No7 launched in 1935, our iconic brand has been joined by equally strong characters in Liz Earle Beauty Company, Soap & Glory, Botanics, Sleek MakeUP and YourGoodSkin. 

We’re here to deliver more than just commercial results, we’re here to do the right thing. We know consumers choose brands that have a positive, sustainable impact on the world and we’ll deliver on our sustainability commitments through a CSR plan that’s fully rooted in our brand strategy.

Our combination of insight and innovation is brought to life by people – our team who are passionate about creating beauty and skincare products for all; products that deliver on their promise, at affordable prices.

Supported and encouraged by inclusive leaders, the people that make up our global teams are the beating heart of No7 Beauty Company. They’re not just passionate about beauty; it’s their innate enthusiasm to innovate that sets them apart and drives them to deliver the very best for our customers.

Welcome to the next generation, welcome to No7 Beauty Company.

Name: Alfaparf Milano
Description:
Alfaparf Milano is an Italian multinational company dedicated to Beauty, covering both Haircare and Skincare, leveraging its expertise through in-house research, product development, advanced technology, and manufacturing across seven production facilities.

With over 40 years of experience in professional cosmetics, we are the leading Italian beauty company in the professional sector, with a strong presence across Europe, North and South America, and more than 120 countries worldwide.

Our commitment to innovation and market trends is evident in our brands and the international beauty leaders who rely on our expertise to develop high-quality hair and body care products.

Our haircare brands (Alfaparf Milano Professional, Yellow Professional, Il Salone Milano, and Alta Moda) and skincare brands (DIBI Milano, Becos, Olos, and Ten Science) are recognized for their industry excellence, offering high-performance solutions for both beauty professionals and end consumers.

We are The Italian House of Beauty.

Name: Westman Atelier
Description:
Founded in 2018 by professional makeup artist Gucci Westman. For Westman, there are three vital signs of modern beauty: luxury, efficacy, and clean, consciously-crafted ingredients. For her first makeup line, she combines supremely buttery, rich textures with the best plant-based active ingredients. The ultimate naturally beautiful complexion — now available to everyone.

We are creating a new standard in luxury that we like to call consciously crafted beauty. Consciously crafted beauty means a transparent and thoughtful approach to innovation that recognizes modern needs, balancing ethical beauty standards with science, technology and product performance. It means we are always evolving and learning. And it means we are passionately committed to products formulated with integrity.

We believe makeup should do more than enhance — it should calm, nourish and balance. Westman Atelier ingredients are thoroughly and thoughtfully curated by both artist and chemist so you can enjoy skin-benefiting, non-toxic makeup that performs at the highest possible standard. 

Our commitment is to constantly review, research and reassess our ingredients as fresh information comes to light — in the meantime, we’ll always be completely transparent about our formulations, which meet the European Union’s rigorous standards for clean beauty. And we promise never to use, parabens, PEGs, phthalates and many other harmful chemicals. Feel good about your skin from the inside out.

Name: IT Cosmetics
Description:
Innovative Technology is IT. 

Developed with leading plastic surgeons, IT Cosmetics creates clinically-proven, innovative problem-solving makeup and skin care products that harness cutting edge, anti-aging technologies and high-performance, skin-loving ingredients to provide you with serious beauty solutions that help you look and feel your most beautiful!

Our mission is to empower you through confidence in your skin, your makeup and your own beauty.

IT’s your beauty, but better!

Name: Josie Maran
Description:
Good for you. Good for the planet. Josie Maran is the pioneer of clean, Argan Oil-powered beauty. Our juicy body butters, sustainably-sourced oils, and scents are made with Earth-first ingredients to deliver beautiful, radiant skin to all. 

Company Culture:

Come along for the ride; you’ll love it here. We are a community of visionaries dedicated to making a positive impact on the world. We are passionate and hungry to help people beautify themselves with clean, ethically-sourced formulas. We do it all in a positive atmosphere where kindness is championed, and excellence is endless.

Our Deepest Reasons For Being in Business 
-To inspire all to enhance their well-being and sense of harmony with both themselves and with nature. 
-To create products that delight all the senses enabling all women and men to experience optimal aliveness. 
-To accelerate the evolution of humanity and maintain the viability of Planet Earth as a life support system so that all our children can enjoy its beauty and bounty long into the future. 
 

The People We Most Love to Work With 

1. They are passionate and hungry to make the world better. 

2. They want to realize their full potential as a human being. 

3. They aspire to excellence in everything they do. 

4. They are creative and out of the box thinkers. 

5. They see the glass half full and the opportunity in every experience in life. 

6. They know how to play well on a team and build esprit de corps. 

7. They believe anything is possible and will always find a way.

Name: PCA SKIN
Description:
PCA SKIN was founded in 1990 by an aesthetician and developed by a dermatologist. Our company is grounded on three core pillars: product innovation, excellence in education and unparalleled customer support.

PCA SKIN is the innovator of the modified and enhanced Jessner’s peel and over the past decades our line of blended chemical peels has expanded to include treatment options for all skin types, ethnicities and conditions. Over one million PCA SKIN peels are performed globally each year.

The PCA SKIN R&D, product development and quality assurance processes are above and beyond industry standards. Our formulas are researched, designed and executed by our in-house PhD chemist. We address each skin condition holistically, with products combining the newest and most efficacious ingredients paired with proven, tried and true ingredients to create unparalleled, visible results. We have a solution to address a wide variety of skin types and conditions.

For our more than 25-year history, we have been the leader in skin health education. We teach clinicians globally in the physiology of the skin and the safe and effective application of chemical peels.

Our customer support team is made up of licensed aestheticians who are always ready to help you with any skin health, product or business questions. We work diligently to consistently deliver on our promises and exceed expectations.

Name: Interparfums, Inc.
Description:
Founded in 1982, Interparfums, Inc. develops, manufactures, and distributes prestige fragrances as an exclusive worldwide licensee. Through its global distribution network, Interparfums’ products are sold in over 120 countries. The company operates through two segments: United States-based operations and European-based operations.

The United States-based portfolio includes Abercrombie & Fitch, Anna Sui, Donna Karan, DKNY, Ferragamo, Graff, GUESS, Hollister, MCM, Oscar de la Renta, Roberto Cavalli, and Ungaro.

The European-based portfolio includes Boucheron, Coach, Goutal, Jimmy Choo, Karl Lagerfeld, Kate Spade, Lacoste, Lanvin, Longchamp, Montblanc, Moncler, Off-White, Rochas, and Van Cleef & Arpels.

Name: Pangaea
Description: Pangaea creates and grows digitally native brands on a global scale. Our first two brands are Lumin and Meridian, both in the personal care space. Our goal is to create iconic, disruptive, and culture impacting brands that attract communities of brand lovers across borders. Since our launch in 2018, we’ve sold our products in 50 different countries. We have grown to over 50 employees and contractors across several locations in the world. We secured Series B funding in 2021 from Eurazeo Brands.

Name: Orveon Global
Description: We are embarking on a powerful shift: To change the way the world thinks about beauty. Orveon Global is a collective of premium and prestige beauty brands committed to stark honesty, co-creation and making a sustainable cultural impact. Our collective consists of the following leading beauty brands: bareMinerals, BUXOM, and Laura Mercier. #FaceForwardTogether and change beauty for the better with us.

Name: Dr. Dennis Gross Skincare
Description: Dr. Dennis Gross Skincare was established in 2000 as a line of multi-tasking products that help skin meet its most beautiful potential – providing dramatic results within days and a long-term transformation with continued use. Inspired by his loyal following, Dr. Gross formulates every product himself, combining a blend of the best natural antioxidants, vitamins, and botanicals with the most scientifically advanced delivery systems.

Name: Facetology
Description:
Facetology is a local startup dedicated to advancing Indonesia’s beauty and personal care industry. Our mission is to inspire individuals to embrace their natural beauty and strengthen their self-confidence, while continuously developing innovative products that position us at the forefront of the industry. We believe our people are the foundation of this transformation. 

At Facetology, creativity, expertise, and passion come together to meet the diverse needs of consumers nationwide. With an unwavering dedication to quality and innovation, we aim to set new standards and shape the future of beauty and personal care in Indonesia. 

Innovating beauty, together with Facetology 

#BeoneofourFaces

Name: Living Proof, Inc.
Description:
In 2005, an unlikely combination of biotech scientists and renowned hair stylists came together to pioneer a first-of-its-kind haircare philosophy based in science. Our mission was to create inventive solutions designed to solve real-world hair problems, not conceal them. 156 global patents,450+ formulas, 44products,100+awards, and 16 years later, we continue to put research at the forefront of our formulations.  

Today, Living Proof isScience in Action - utilizing in-house scientific discovery and invention to develop the latest innovations in haircare that deliver game-changing results for all hair types and textures. 

We are the science. You are the Living Proof.

Name: PATYKA
Description:
In 2002, the French Beauty House PATYKA (from the Greek “APOTEKE” meaning “Pharmacy”) is created. PATYKA becomes the first certified organic brand in the world (Ecocert). As a pioneer, PATYKA creates skincare that is effective, sensorial, and ethical, formulated from rigorously selected botanical ingredients. Its first product, the Huile Absolue, is a precious blend of 12 essential and plant oils to nourish and regenerate face, body, and hair.

PATYKA focuses on Science to create a new generation of organic cosmetics: biological and technological skincare, ultra-concentrated in green-technological active ingredients obtained through Green Chemistry and Biotechnology, with clinically proven efficacy. Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin C, plant-based Retinol-like – the House's Laboratory develops cutting-edge formulas, inspired by pharmacy and aesthetic medicine, and creates cult products such as the Advanced Plumping Serum and the Pro-Collagen Lift Mask.

As a Mission-driven Company and certified B-Corp, PATYKA is more committed than ever to Skin, People, and Biodiversity. The House continuously strives to strengthen its scientific expertise by developing exclusive active ingredients and patents for its formulas and establishing research partnerships with the medical community. Its high-performance skincare offers proven, visible an long lasting results on the skin, while respecting the health of humans and the planet.

Name: Le Labo Fragrances
Description:
We believe that there are too many bottles of perfume and not enough soulful fragrances
We believe the soul of a fragrance comes from the intention with which it is created and the attention with which it is prepared
We believe fine perfumery must create a shock - the shock of the new, combined with the shock of the intimately familiar
We believe that fine perfumery must be irreverent
We believe it is more humane to test cosmetics on New Yorkers than on animals
We believe celebrities should pay full price
We believe the future of luxury (hence of perfumery) lies in craftsmanship
We believe in the soulful power of thoughtful hands: hand-picked roses, hand-poured candles, hand-formulated perfumes and handshake agreements
We believe in the passionate souls who work close to us
We believe in Hafiz's take on life : "Act great, dear. Always act great”
We believe New York made us this way, with a dose of Wabi-Sabi and a few lines from Thoreau
We believe we/you should put away our modern tools and take the time to smell the roses along the way
We believe that we are only young once, but we can be immature forever 
And we believe that explanation kills art. Therefore, forget about all of this !

Name: TULA Skincare
Description: TULA is the leading probiotic skincare and wellness brand, offering innovative products powered by probiotics extracts and superfoods that are both clean & clinically effective. As a digitally native and social first brand, we engage our customers at every touchpoint to help them feel confident in their skin and make it easier to achieve a healthy balance, inside and out. Alongside TULA.com we retail in North America with ULTA Beauty, Sephora, Nordstrom, and Amazon as well as internationally with Mecca in AUS & NZ, SpaceNK in the UK, and TMall in China.  We raised a Series A led by L Catterton, the largest consumer-focused private equity group in the world, and now operate independently within Procter & Gamble's Specialty Beauty division.  Our team has experience in some of the top consumer startups and beauty companies, and our team is fully remote.

Name: PT. Nose Herbal Indo
Description:
Providing trusted customization cosmetic service (OEM & ODM)

VISION
Being a trusted company that provides the best quality and safe cosmetic products.

MISSION
1.	Provides the best and quality service to our customers.
2.	Improve competency and integrity of our human resources as the main asset of the company.
3.	Maintaining excellence in the research and technology so we able to provide products that meet customer needs.
4.	Help customers obtain the BPOM licenses, patent rights, and certificates.

OUR VALUES
1.	Professionalism
2.	Speed and teamwork
3.	Innovation
4.	Quality
5.	Customer-oriented
6.	End to end solution

FACILITIES
-	Production
-	Research and Development
-	Quality Control
-	High-tech Equipment

PT. Nose Herbalindo adalah perusahaan maklon kosmetik yang melayani jasa pembuatan kosmetik dengan nama brand Anda, yang dibangun sebagai bentuk urgensi dari industri kosmetik Indonesia yang membutuhkan banyak produk lokal yang dapat bersaing secara global.

Kami juga melayani perizinan produk kosmetik BPOM dan pengakuan HAKI. Lewat tenaga ahli apoteker dan research & development (R&D), kami membuat produk kosmetik berkualitas sesuai yang Anda inginkan.

Kami melayani proses manufaktur kosmetik dari hulu hingga hilir, mulai dari research & development, formulasi bahan baku, quality control, pengemasan, hingga pengantaran produk ke warehouse Anda.

Perusahaan kami dilengkapi dengan fasilitas produksi canggih dan memadai sehingga mutu kosmetik anda dijamin Halal, aman, dan tidak berbahaya bagi kesehatan.

Kami memiliki profesionalisme terpercaya di bidang manufaktur produk jasa maklon kosmetik. Perusahaan kami telah tersertifikasi OHSAS, GMP, BPOM, ISO 9001, dan Halal dari MUI.

Pelayanan area jasa maklon kosmetik kami sangat luas, mencakup dari Jakarta, Surabaya, Bandung, Semarang, Makasar dan seluruh Indonesia bahkan Korea, Jepang, China, Hong Kong, Malaysia, dan Rusia.

Name: Glad2Glow
Description:
"Glad2Glow" emerged in 2022 under the auspices of PT Suntone Wisdom Indonesia, positioning itself as a prominent beauty brand based in Indonesia. The brand swiftly gained recognition through its strategic online presence, introducing standout products which have proven for their effective use of natural ingredients and formulations tailored for sensitive skin.

At the heart of Glad2Glow's mission is a commitment to celebrating natural beauty with innovative skincare solutions. By integrating advanced technology with gentle, natural components, the brand offers a range of products designed to promote a radiant and youthful complexion. Glad2Glow is dedicated to providing accessibility to affordable options without compromising on quality.

Name: INOAR
Description:
A INOAR foi registrada, oficialmente, em outubro de 2008. Mas, Inocência Manoel e Alexandre Nascimento já trabalhavam no mercado de cosméticos.

Inocência Manoel, trabalhou por anos como cabeleireira e depois abriu seu próprio salão de beleza. Desde muito nova dedicava boa parte do seu tempo na busca de novos produtos, formulando ela mesma, tratamentos que tivessem o maior grau de eficácia. 

Alexandre Nascimento cursou Medicina, mas sempre esteve ligado à área de vendas, representando marcas de cosméticos internacionais. Essa experiência colaborou para abrir portas entre os profissionais da área até que, no início de 2007, Alexandre e Inocencia abriram a marca . 

Juntos entendiam o mercado como ninguém. Mas não havia ainda um produto que os representasse. Mais suave e com um novo protocolo, a nova fórmula oferecia movimento aos fios e melhor performance na redução de volume, oferecendo segurança aos cabeleireiros e clientes. 

Com o grande sucesso da marca, hoje a Inoar cria e produz linhas para o tratamento de todos os tipos de cabelos. Conta com o talento e a criação de Inocência Manoel, que é responsável pelo Marketing, Direção de Arte, Comunicação e Inovação. 

Já Alexandre Nascimento responde pela Gestão Empresarial, Comercial , Exportação, Logística, Financeiro , Contabil o Desenvolvimento de Produtos e a Base Estrutural da empresa.

A INOAR exporta para mais de 40 países e tem escritórios em mais de 30 cidades ao redor do mundo. A marca tem um portfólio que é sinônimo de diversidade, com mais de 300 produtos entre tratamentos, redutores de volumes, valorização de cachos e muito mais.

Além disso, a INOAR tem orgulho de ser uma marca com produtos botânicos, cruelty-free e veganos com respeito aos animais, meio ambiente e indivíduos.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Inoarbrasil/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/inoarbrasil/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/inoarbrasil
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/inoarpro

Name: Chromavis Fareva
Description:
Leading the way of responsible and disruptive makeup creation. 
We are visionaries with a clear mission: to redefine the future of the Beauty Industry by nurturing talent and crafting unique, sustainable solutions for our valued partners. 
Our DNA is rooted in the fundamental values of Clarity, Challenge, Community and Commitment, which ignite our journey with purpose to shape and deliver the needs of tomorrow. 
Leveraging a strong foundation in research, design, and environmental responsibility, we merge art and technology to deliver breakthrough makeup and nailcare innovations. 
Our business combines decades of scientific endeavour and creative dedication to elevate color cosmetics and reinvent its ever-evolving frontiers. 
Join us in this creative quest driven by future.

Name: NEOM Wellbeing
Description:
WE ARE NEOM WELLBEING - expertly blending 100% natural fragrances to boost your wellbeing. We are here to help you on your wellbeing journey to better sleep, less stress, more energy and a boosted mood through small steps that make a big difference.
Whether it’s a deeply relaxing bath that prepares you for BETTER SLEEP, or candle that creates a calm zone and LESS STRESS in your busy family home, a shower cleanser that helps you have MORE ENERGY, or the pure essential oil blend with the power to BOOST YOUR MOOD.

NEOM WELLBEING: 100% NATURAL FRAGRANCES,
SCENT TO BOOST YOUR WELLBEING

Name: Group Alyne Cosméticos
Description: We are a genuinely Ceará company, operating since 1986 in the personal care and cosmetics market. With a presence in 16 states in Brazil, our brands Alyne Cosmeticos, Aseplyne, Delicaderm, Sunpass, Repele Mais and Pure, wherever acquired, aim to achieve our mission as a business, which is: Produce Beauty and Well-Being. For this, we operate with excellence in our production process, honesty, respect, engagement, commitment and love for our business. Throughout our history, we have expanded and diversified our product mix. Today, we have more than 200 items, including: hair care line for personal and professional use, line for nail care, intimate soap, exfoliants, antiseptic gel, antibacterial soaps, repellent, suntan lotion, hydrogen peroxide, ammonia and others. We operate in a highly competitive market and, therefore, we are proud to market our cosmetics throughout the North and Northeast of Brazil, side by side with major multinational brands. This increase in sales has driven us to expand the industrial park to 14,707m² of built-up area. With state-of-the-art machinery, we currently have a production capacity of over 15 million liters per year and over 50 million units per year. We constantly invest in research on raw materials, machinery, employee training, market research, always attentive to market needs and trends.

Name: Keune Haircosmetics | B Corp
Description:
We are Keune Haircosmetics, the premium haircare brand founded in 1922 in Amsterdam by scientist Jan Keune.

We’re still an independent family-owned company with a long-term vision and science is at the heart of everything we do. 

B Corp certified, producing sustainably & cruelty-free.

We are driven by high quality standards, a strong moral compass, and our utmost loyalty to hair pros around the world.

Name: Savoy Indústria de Cosméticos SA
Description:
Sobre nós
A Savoy é uma empresa voltada a desempenhar atividades de pesquisa, inovação, desenvolvimento, fabricação e industrialização de cosméticos, produtos de perfumaria e higiene pessoal para o mercado brasileiro e exportação para América Latina. 

A Savoy atua com conhecidas marcas, como Risqué, Monange, Paixão, Bozzano, Koleston, Wella, entre outras. A empresa, pertencente ao Grupo Coty Inc. no Brasil, conta com unidades em Barueri (Grande SP) e Senador Canedo (GO). 

Sobre o Grupo Coty Inc. 
O grupo é uma das maiores multinacionais de beleza no mundo. Presente no mercado desde 1904, a companhia foi criada por François Coty, na França, com o intuito de revolucionar a indústria de perfumes da época. No mundo, a companhia tem hoje aproximadamente 20 mil colaboradores e está presente em cerca de 46 países, atuando no Brasil com as empresas Savoy e Coty. 

Atualmente, o Grupo Coty Inc. é globalmente #1 em fragrâncias, #2 no mercado de produtos profissionais para styling e coloração de cabelos, e #3 empresa do setor quando o assunto é "color cosmetics" (maquiagens e esmaltes). Globalmente, a companhia opera com três divisões de negócios: 
• Luxury: segmento de fragrâncias premium e de produtos voltados a cuidados com a pele, como Calvin Klein, Marc Jacobs, Chloé, Hugo Boss , philosophy etc. 
• Professional Beauty: ampla linha de marcas e produtos de uso profissional (cabelos e unhas), como Wella Professionals, Sebastian Professional etc.  
• Consumer Beauty: produtos de varejo nas categorias corporal, capilar e maquiagem, com marcas como COVERGIRL, Max Factor, Rimmel, Adidas entre outras. Queremos influenciar positivamente a indústria da beleza, com os melhores talentos e profissionais do mercado. Acreditamos que a beleza reside na individualidade das pessoas e é melhor quando autêntica!

Name: L'Erbolario
Description:
““E” come Erbolario. “E” come Equilibrio: é questo il punto di arrivo della nostra ricerca, costantemente volta a progettare e realizzare un equilibrio perfetto tra la più evoluta scienza cosmetologica e la più autentica tradizione erboristica. Il nostro obiettivo è infatti creare prodotti fitocosmetici sicuri ed efficaci, concepiti nel rispetto della Natura e dell’Uomo. Il rigore scientifico dei controlli effettuati in ogni fase di vita del prodotto ed i severi test clinici – che comprendono anche la fondamentale attività di sperimentazione della prestigiosa Università degli Studi di Pavia – assicurano un altissimo livello qualitativo, nonché la migliore compatibilità ambientale. 

Un impegno che L’Erbolario rinnova ogni giorno, per premiare con la sicurezza e la trasparenza di formulazioni efficaci e sicure i trenta anni di fedeltà di un pubblico attento e sensibile.

adopt’, c’est 130 fragrances uniques, auxquelles s’ajoutent chaque mois 1 à 2 nouveautés, afin de suivre au plus près les tendances de la mode et de vous permettre de changer au gré de vos envies.

Nos parfums sont élaborés à Grasse, capitale du parfum et sont ensuite fabriqués dans notre atelier au cœur de la région bordelaise.

Leurs formats nomades accompagnent avec originalité le quotidien des femmes d’aujourd’hui.
Passionnée de mode et à l’affut des tendances, adopt’ propose également une large gamme de cosmétiques et d’accessoires de mode abordables et de qualité.

Afin de rester au plus près des tendances, nous vous proposons 16 collections par an, pour un style perpétuellement renouvelé !

Her proprietary, handcrafted formulas are powered by the world's most advanced natural skincare technology and include ingredients from all over the world, as well as fresh herbs and botanicals grown on her own Vermont farm. 

Each Tata Harper Skincare product is handcrafted from start to finish in the company headquarters in Vermont. Nothing in the production processed is outsourced, allowing us to ensure absolute quality, freshness and potency. Name: Mario Badescu Skin Care, Inc.
Description:
Mario Badescu had a singular vision: he wanted to introduce to New York City his European-style facials (mastered back in his native Romania) based on classic, Old World techniques. To Badescu, beauty and skin care were unequivocally intertwined. He understood the  uniqueness of skin, and thus came to design a line of handmade products to suit clients’ individual skin types and needs.

It was in 1967, out of his Manhattan home, when the renowned salon was born. 

Word of mouth alone earned him a loyal following, and within a few years, Mario Badescu gained recognition as a touchstone of quality skin care. 

Today, his legacy is carried on by the Cabasso family, which continues to uphold our founder’s belief in using fresh botanical and natural ingredients. For nearly half a century we’ve been the name that transcends generations and spans the entire life-cycle of skin: from powerful acne solutions to potent anti-aging treatments, we customize entire regimens for every skin type and concern imaginable.

Simple, gentle, effective skin care is our philosophy—and for that, we’ve earned the reputation of being an editor darling and celebrity go-to worldwide.

Name: Belora Cosmetics
Description:
Belora produces clean, high-performance, vegan makeup & skincare - free from toxins and harmful ingredients. The company’s mission is to create makeup which doubles up as skincare, so that women can wear products which are not only dermatologically tested, but also good for their skin.

With thousands of products available on the market today, consumers can often end up buying makeup high on toxins. On the other hand, completely natural makeup can often under deliver on performance and pigmentation. 

Belora packs in the benefits of skincare into their makeup, with their current product line of lipsticks, moisturisers, kajals and eyeshadows infused with naturally derived formulations. Additionally, their high-performance colours create rich tones that last longer on the skin. 

The company is also launching skincare that is high performance & deep indulgence. 

The team at Belora have been working on R&D for the last two years, focusing on finding ingredients that follow strict European and Australian certifications for makeup - the highest standards in the world today.  Belora is now the first MADE SAFE certified makeup brand across Europe and Asia. The team also has a BS (Bad Stuff) list of over 2000 harmful ingredients that they commit to never using. 

Belora was founded in Feb 2019 by Ainara and Akaljyot. Ainara has held leadership roles with Myntra, Ameriprise Financial, Yes Bank and MSL Publicis. Akaljyot has over a decade of experience advising leaders on process eﬃciencies and operational implementation. She has held key roles in organisations such as MetLife, Allstate and American Express.

Recently raised Pre Series A round with Surge Sequoia, DSG Ventures & key angel investors. Looking at hiring across marketing, operations, finance, HR & tech roles. If interested pls email to contact@beloracosmetics.com

Name: Peoplecareplanetcare
Description:
We create game-changing skin, home, hair and body care by amplifying the natural world and pioneering biodesign in our packaging solutions.

We are driven by trying to solve the waste problem by using natural waste resources in our products, or presenting packaging solutions to our community that are fully recyclable or compostable.

We use seaweed as the base for all of our products. That seaweed is picked by hand in Margate, UK. Why seaweed? Seaweed hydrates; it’s rich with valuable vitamins, minerals and amino acids; it’s anti-bacterial, skin rebuilding and anti-inflammatory; it’s all natural, and all around us. Under licence, we harvest it by hand from the beach steps away from our shop.

What drives us forward is doing things differently and always evolving. What started in Margate is now sold the world over. We’re afraid to stand still. Everything we do has to have a reason to exist whilst honouring our ocean-first philosophy.

Our team is composed of creative caregivers who provide solutions for “age appropriate” skin health. We believe the needs of the medical aesthetics consumer have evolved beyond the industry landscape. We are thought leaders who understand the status quo must be challenged to remain vibrant. We believe excellence is achieved through attention to detail. We are honest and transparent. We give back.

Welcome to OVME.

Name: Flormar MA
Description: Nous mettons la couleur au cœur de nos vies. Nous nous dévouons pour explorer les meilleures couleurs correspondantes à la beauté des femmes.

Name: Estée Lauder Companies South Africa
Description:
Welcome to the Estée Lauder Companies South Africa LinkedIn Page.

We invite you to get to know our Company by exploring our portfolio of brands and our heritage.

"The guiding vision of The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. is “Bringing the best to everyone we touch”.  

By “The Best”, we mean the best products, the best people and the best ideas. These three pillars have been the hallmarks of our Company since it was founded by Mrs. Estée Lauder in 1946.  They remain the foundation upon which we continue to build our success today". 
 
Mrs Estée Lauder invented the high touch philosophy, and since the beginning of the company it has been an integral part of everything we do. High touch means no matter who you are in our company you connect with your customers in an intensely personal way exceeding standards and expectations. High Touch is at the forefront of our thinking; as are our customers.

Over the years, we’ve insisted on being the foremost innovators, seeking out and nurturing the very best concepts for our consumers.  Everything we do reflects the input and influence of our global teams.  This applies not only to our products themselves, but to every area related to our business – including research & development, packaging, marketing, advertising, customer service and operations.

Find us at www.elccareers.co.za and on Instagram at @elc_southafrica

Name: Khimji Ramdas India Private Limited
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Khimji Ramdas India Private Limited!
A leading distribution and sales services company operating in Gujarat.
Our legacy dates back to 1870 when the KR group was established by the two sons of Khimji Ramdas, Gokaldas Khimji, and Mathradas Khimji. Today, we are one of the most trusted and respected business conglomerates in Oman and have expanded our operations to India since 2009.
We take pride in our partnerships with several world-renowned companies and consumer brands such as P&G, Britannia, Kellogg's, Jockey, Rolex Retail, Wingreens World, Saucery, ID Fresh Foods, 4700BC, and McVitie’s. Our success is driven by our commitment to delivering quality products and services, and our focus on empowering the brands we partner with to expand their reach in the market.
At Khimji Ramdas India, we have a dynamic team of experts who lead our operations in India. The company works tirelessly to ensure that our operations run seamlessly and that our clients receive the best possible service.
Join us on this journey of growth and excellence as we continue to expand our reach and bring the best products and services to the people of Gujarat.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Delia Cosmetics
Description:
JESTEŚMY polską firmą kosmetyczną z ponad 25-letnim doświadczeniem, posiadającą ugruntowaną pozycję nie tylko w Polsce, ale również w ponad 70 krajach na całym świecie.

TWORZYMY produkty do pielęgnacji twarzy i ciała, makijażu oraz lakiery do paznokci. Nasza marka Cameleo oferuje produkty do koloryzacji i pielęgnacji włosów. 

DZIAŁAMY łącząc rodzinne wartości, wysoką jakość i troskę o piękno, a do tych fundamentalnych składników dodajemy całą resztę - starannie dobierane we własnych laboratoriach komponenty, z których powstają bezpieczne i niezawodne receptury.

Name: Sunway Multicare Pharmacy
Description:
Established in Year 2000 at Cheras, from a lone pharmacy store to being one of the leading community pharmacies that fulfills demands in both healthcare services and medication field. We believe in prioritizing medication safety & quality, patient-centered and outcome-oriented practice in Multicare Pharmacy.

Our commitment is to maintain the true essence of healthcare towards our society, contributing to the communities by giving complete access to their health potential, empower people in accomplishing life goal in employment, family and personal wellbeing.

Supported by comprehensive product range with substantial management team that well equipped with knowledge & experience, Multicare Pharmacy has prospered and budding our presence beyond 70 locations nationwide.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BRAU.
Description:
A premier brow, lash, semi-permanent makeup, and face studio that seamlessly synthesizes art with beauty. Pioneers in this field, we offer specialized treatments, curated from world-class beauty innovations and customized for an individualized approach.

Our team of experts come from a wide variety of backgrounds to provide unrivalled insight and knowledge. We pride ourselves on the highest technical and clinical skills in the industry.

Name: VIOLETTE_FR
Description:
VIOLETTE_FR was founded by makeup and beauty artist Violette, with the mission of celebrating individuality and infusing the French mentality of celebrating imperfection. A multi-category line from skincare, hair, to makeup created with safe and effective ingredients that are vegan and cruelty-free, VIOLETTE_FR was born for everyone to use beauty to celebrate, and not to disguise who we are. 


VIOLETTE_FR is available online in the US, France, United Kingdom and Canada and will be open in select French pharmacies in 2021.

Name: Najafi Cosmetics
Description:
Based in the Dubai, UAE, Najafi is a privately held firm committed to the distribution and retail of skincare and beauty products throughout the Middle East and North Africa.

What started as a single shop in 1997 has now grown into a chain of stores across the UAE. The family firm has expanded through continual investment, now including six wholesale stores in Dubai with sales and marketing teams targeting the international market. Our dedication to mutually beneficial partnerships with international suppliers means we are able to provide a diverse portfolio of products to our customers, encompassing a wide range of brands, including our own.

Name: Kemon S.p.A.
Description:
Azienda 100% italiana, guidata tuttora dalla famiglia Nocentini che la fondò nel 1959. Kemon da oltre 60 anni crea, produce e distribuisce prodotti, formazione e immagini destinati esclusivamente al mercato professionale dell’acconciatura. 
Un moderno laboratorio di ricerca che sviluppa continuamente nuovi prodotti destinati a soddisfare i bisogni dei professionisti di tutto il mondo, la produzione centralizzata e guidata dalle norme della certificazione di qualità ISO 9001:2008 e di quella ambientale ISO 14001:2004, il marketing impegnato nelle attività più efficaci di promozione e comunicazione, e un settore formazione in continua evoluzione: questa la realtà di Kemon, una delle prime aziende nel mercato professionale italiano. 

Ma non è solo il mercato italiano nei progetti di espansione dell’azienda, che opera infatti in contesti internazionali fin dagli anni ’80 ed è presente ad oggi in più di 40 paesi nel mondo. 
Una presenza in continua crescita e in fase di consolidamento, che esprime l’aspirazione ad essere ambasciatrice della qualità e dello stile italiano. All’altissima qualità dei prodotti e dei servizi offerti, Kemon unisce la flessibilità e dinamicità di una struttura agile, l’efficienza dei sistemi e soprattutto una organizzazione a misura umana, in cui i rapporti personali sono preminenti e la cura del cliente un obiettivo perseguito ad ogni livello organizzativo.

Name: Beauty and Luxury
Description:
Beauty and Luxury is the leading distributor of selective cosmetics in the Italian market thanks to the trust and believe of our clients and partners in the long standing professionalism and experience of our people.

Founded in 2013, Beauty & Luxury has a prestigious portfolio of some of the world's most desired luxury brands, divided into two divisions. One division for selective brands and one division, called B&L Alta Profumeria, for niche brands.

We are brand builders by passion and aim to create long lasting success for the brands we represent: 
Burberry, Montblanc, Elizabeth Arden, Jimmy Choo, Coach, Abercrombie & Fitch, Christian Louboutin, Min New York, Van Cleef & Arpels amongst others.

We have a marketing-driven culture and transform every brand’s international strategy into a local success story by focusing on image, visibility and returning customers.
We are experts in creating the ideal and most suitable distribution for every brand and we pay maximum attention to business building door by door. 

Our employees are the heart of our business and our work ethics are based on respect, transparency and positive motivation in a highly dynamic and international environment.
More than 90 dedicated and experienced people in our offices and in the field take great pride and joy to represent our passion and have a strong experience in all sectors of the selective beauty market, from fragrances to skincare and make-up.

Name: Shefaa Al-Dawaa Company
Description: Where Health & Beauty Are Born

Name: RO Medical
Description:
Dejanos tu CV en: https://romedicalart.com/pages/trabaja-con-nosotros

Cadena de clínicas de medicina estética & wellness. Múltiples sucursales

Nos esforzamos por estar a la vanguardia en tecnología vinculada a la medicina estética, rejuvenecimiento, nutrición y salud. Buscamos capacitarnos de manera continua para mantenernos siempre actualizados acerca de las últimas técnicas, novedades, tendencias y prácticas a nivel global. 

Estamos orgullosos de contar con los equipos de medicina estética no quirúrgica más avanzados de la industria. Apostamos a ofrecer la aparatología que brinde los mejores resultados y que esté respaldada por los organismos nacionales e internacionales de salud.

Name: The Upcycled Beauty Company
Description:
B Corp Certified.

In 2017, we made it our mission to not only help beauty and personal care brands reduce waste, but to reuse it too. We’re out to prove that the beauty industry can thrive solely using upcycled materials – from ingredients to packaging.

It's no secret that the overconsumption of the earth’s finite resources, and the amount of waste produced, is having a harmful effect on our planet. We empower beauty and personal care brands to reduce and reuse waste by growing the upcycled beauty movement.

What we do:
WE INFORM: Raising awareness and growing the demand for upcycled beauty.
WE INSPIRE: Helping brands make more sustainable choices.
WE ENABLE: Making upcycled cosmetic ingredients more accessible.

Together, we can shape the next generation of sustainable beauty.

Name: Julep Beauty
Description:
Julep originally launched in 2007 as a chain of Seattle-area nail salons, before expanding to e-commerce and subscription services in following years. Today, the brand focuses primarily on practical beauty and skincare, all thoughtfully designed to simplify your everyday life.

The brand is part of the AS Beauty portfolio, a group focused on developing global beauty brands that deliver real-world solutions to a diverse consumer base. What sets AS Beauty apart is its dedication to female-founded brands that tell a unique story while making the latest innovations accessible to all. Please go to AS Beauty page for career opportunities and additional information.

Name: 1-800 Contacts
Description:
We put our people first. Before our customers. Before the business. Unconventional? You bet it is. Our cofounders understood if we take care of our people, the rest takes care of itself. Here, that means frontline empowerment, parental bonding time, free mental health resources, development opportunities, and more.  
  
We’re a company that aims big, fails fast, and cheers on one another. 100% guarantee? We live by our Gajillion Percent Promise. We’ve fulfilled more than 87 million orders, and last Deidra and her team checked, we have 86 million contacts in stock – ready to ship to our contact lens wearing friends.  
  
As workstyle needs have changed, we’ve listened and adapted. We’re recognized as a great place to work by companies like Forbes and Fortune 100 and attribute this to our people, culture, and the work we are doing. 

With our newly formed parent company, SeekWell, we can expand our ability to make vision care simple, affordable, and accessible beyond contact lenses: Luna for B2B vision care solutions and The Framery at 1-800 Contacts for the best online glasses-buying experience. 

Looking to join a team that’s passionate about pursuing a better way in vision care? Join us: https://www.1800contacts.com/careers
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratorios Victoria SAIC
Description:
En 1949, un Químico Suizo dedicado al desarrollo y producción de esmaltes para uñas y productos cosméticos funda en Buenos Aires - Argentina, una pequeña empresa familiar que desarrollaba sus formulaciones según el gusto y las exigencias de la mujer.

Laboratorios Victoria SAIC comenzó sus actividades en 1966, como continuadora de Armando E. Zancaner SCA. Posee sus plantas de elaboración y oficinas ubicadas en  Av. Forest 836 y Av. Triunvirato 2875 de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires.

Hoy, el reconocimiento por la calidad, servicio e innovación, y nuestra trayectoria en el mercado global de cosméticos nos permiten satisfacer, con nuestros productos, las necesidades de grandes Compañías Multinacionales que confían en nosotros. 

Laboratorios Victoria SAIC valora la compenetración de los empleados con los objetivos de la Compañía, y los esfuerzos que realizan para lograr su superación constante. Los empleados de Laboratorios Victoria SAIC son el eje fundamental del éxito de la empresa.

Laboratorios Victoria SAIC fomenta la intervención de sus empleados en Asociaciones Profesionales, Cámaras de la Industria, actividades sociales, brindando servicios  y promoviendo la ética en los negocios, el cuidado del medio ambiente y el mejoramiento de la sociedad.

Uñas: Esmalte para Uñas - Nail Care - Quitaesmaltes - Esmaltes Semipermanentes.
Makeup: Labiales- Lip Gloss - Correctores - Mascaras - Delineadores - Iluminadores - Base de maquillaje - Rubores - Sombras.
Skincare: Serums - Cremas - Cremas corporales
Personal Care: Alcohol en Gel - Sanitizantes - Crema Antibacterial para manos

Name: Isha LIFE
Description:
Envisioned as a space for cultural exuberance by Sadhguru, Isha Life draws you into the enchanting world of Indian tradition. It celebrates and offers India’s profound knowledge and rich history of Yoga, cuisine and craftsmanship in a manner relevant to our times.

From eco-friendly products such as woodwork, bags and baskets made from intricately woven natural fibres to an extensive collection of metal art, health and wellness products, from all-natural vegetable oil soaps and shampoos to powerfully energized objects for spiritual growth, Isha Life aims to bring the wisdom of the Yogic sciences to everyone.

You can also explore products like yoga mats & accessories, copper drinkware, Sadhguru’s books & DVDs, Ayurveda and Siddha medicines & supplements and much more.

One of the key endeavours at Isha Life is to promote traditional craftsmanship and maximize its potential. The store has also adopted the Save the Weave movement initiated by Isha Foundation to raise awareness globally and in India, about the need to shift to natural fibres. Isha Life also helps support Isha Yoga practitioners and meditators with Sadhana supports and offerings for everyday wellness.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: puroBIO
Description:
We want to eliminate the differences between the performances of synthetic products and biological products, so as to guarantee everyone the possibility to use beauty products that do not harm the health of the skin.
OUR CERTIFICATIONS: CCPB, AIAB, VEGAN OK, NICKEL TESTED and CRUELTY FREE

Name: Period Pack
Description:
Our mission is to address a global issue that impacts 300 million individuals every day: ensuring that menstruation does not hinder their daily lives. 

We are dedicated to changing the world, creating a future where no one’s everyday life is affected by menstruation.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: GOODIER
Description:
Centrally located in Dallas, Texas, Goodier is the preferred CDMO delivering cutting-edge business solutions that provide a turnkey experience for clinically efficacious performance skincare brands.  

At Goodier, we work hand-in-hand with our brand partners to create that go beyond the product to deliver differentiation and leadership in the market.

At Goodier, we believe innovation is the catalyst for growth for our partners and their businesses. 

At Goodier, we commit to excellence, agility, and quality to deliver sustainable competitive advantage to our brand partners.

At Goodier, we invest in our people, processes, and technology to ensure we are pacesetters in the performance skincare industry.

At Goodier, we know transparency, ethics, and integrity are essential ingredients to producing clinically eﬃcacious performance skincare.

Name: Skin Script Professional Skin Care
Description:
Skin Script Professional Skin Care has always been—and always will be—committed to the success of licensed skin care professionals.

At Skin Script, we are passionate about beautiful skin. Our collection of professional masks, enzymes, peels, and retail products is carefully designed to deliver visible results. Crafted to suit all skin types and Fitzpatrick classifications, our products offer a versatile approach to skin care that addresses diverse needs while focusing on correction and effectiveness.

New products and offerings, shaped significantly by the invaluable feedback from our aestheticians, are crafted with intention. Our commitment to maintaining the highest quality formulas remains unchanged, with a continued focus on surpassing FDA regulations, adhering to global regulatory standards, and preparing for MOCRA compliance. We conduct comprehensive regulatory ingredient reviews in collaboration with our manufacturing partner, resulting in more detailed ingredient listings on our product labels. We are proud to announce our ongoing efforts to eliminate all dyes from our products, irrespective of their FDA determination of safety for cosmetic use.

As a 100% employee-owned company, our team members literally have skin in the game! Our success is due to our inspired and invested team that is committed to shared values and customer first focus. Skin Script has been dedicated to empowering aestheticians since 2007 and welcomes you to join us in your professional journey!

Name: BEAUTYNOVA
Description:
Beautynova is a group of selected companies operating in the professional haircare industry, created for the development and consolidation of successful brands distributed worldwide.

The journey of Beautynova started in 2012 and the Group was formed in 2020 through an acquisition and consolidation process of some of the most innovative professional hair care brands, becoming one of the largest global independent platforms in the industry.

Beautynova is a leading developer of professional haircare products, with over 18.000 owned formulations. Today the Group generates 75% of revenues outside of Italy, its home market, and exports to more than 70 countries.

The Group owns a premium portfolio of brands:
- Beautynova Elite
- Medavita
- z.one concept
- milk_shake
- simply zen
- DEPOT
- NO INHIBITION
- URBAN TRIBE
- Hair Company
- ING

We have a successful track record in the development of the companies we have acquired, respecting their history, supporting their brands, empowering their people and management, building on their distribution network, strengthening the existing partnerships.
We offered them the support of world class management, systems and tools, as well as the financial resources to back the making of their visions.

“Hair with Care” is our Group philosophy, we take care of every customer and, at the same time, pursue social and environmental sustainability goals. 
Our care becomes responsibility towards all stakeholders, the planet and people inside and outside the company.

Name: Maila Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada em 2001, a Maila Cosméticos é uma empresa de Terceirização de Cosméticos e Produtos para Saúde, especializada em Oral Care, Skin Care, Hair Care e Personal Care. Localizada em Salto/SP, há mais de duas décadas, atendendo grandes clientes nacionais e multinacionais.

A MAILA conta com uma excelente estrutura de produção, proporcionada por equipamentos modernos com diferentes capacidades o que nos permite, com flexibilidade, oferecer aos nossos clientes uma ampla gama de produtos de altíssima qualidade.

Priorizamos o comprometimento na relação com nossos clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores, pois são os propulsores do nosso crescimento que é sustentado pelo o desenvolvimento das pessoas. Respeitamos as diferenças e valorizamos o ser humano como nosso principal diferencial, cuidando do planeta e dos animais, mantendo o foco no alto padrão de qualidade e cumprimento das Boas Práticas de Fabricação através de investimentos constantes.

Name: LATHER
Description:
Since 1999, LATHER has inspired others to lead a healthier, more radiant life. We create top quality products for the body, face, hair and home. Drawing upon the benefits of aromatherapy, our products are made from unique, natural ingredients and pure essential oils.

LATHER's hydrating body crèmes, luxurious soaps and advanced hair and skin care products are offered in distinctive hotel properties, resorts and spas worldwide. LATHER is also available at our retail stores in Pasadena, CA; Long Beach, CA; Phoenix, AZ; Atlanta, GA; and Fairfax, VA.

Based in Pasadena, California, LATHER can be found at www.lather.com and on:

Facebook: Facebook.com/latherskincare 
Twitter: Twitter.com/lather
Instagram: Instagram.com/lather
Pinterest: Pinterest.com/latherskincare 

To learn more, email us at info@lather.com.

Name: ONOSONIC
Description:
Onosonic: Revolutionizing Oral Care with High-End Products

Onosonic is a cutting-edge company headquartered in Dubai, passionately committed to designing and manufacturing premium oral care products. With a focus on innovation and advanced technology, we specialize in creating electric sonic toothbrushes and water flossers that elevate the dental hygiene experience to unprecedented levels of effectiveness and luxury.

At Onosonic, we understand the vital role oral care plays in maintaining overall health and well-being. With this in mind, we have made it our mission to develop superior oral care solutions that combine efficiency, comfort, and style. Our products are meticulously crafted to deliver exceptional performance, ensuring optimal oral health for our discerning customers.

The cornerstone of our product lineup is our electric sonic toothbrushes. Harnessing the power of sonic technology, these toothbrushes offer a gentle yet highly efficient cleaning action that removes plaque, reduces gum inflammation, and promotes a brighter smile. Our toothbrushes feature intelligent sensors and multiple brushing modes, allowing users to personalize their brushing experience according to their specific needs and preferences. The sleek and ergonomic designs make our toothbrushes a delight to use, combining functionality with elegance.

In addition to our electric sonic toothbrushes, Onosonic also offers state-of-the-art water flossers. Designed to complement brushing and enhance oral hygiene, our water flossers utilize a pulsating stream of water to reach deep between teeth and below the gumline, effectively eliminating debris and bacteria. With adjustable pressure settings and a variety of nozzle options, our water flossers cater to individual requirements, ensuring a thorough and comfortable flossing experience.

What sets Onosonic apart is our unwavering commitment to quality and innovation.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: AKT London
Description: AKT pr.‘act’ | The Personal Performance Company. Award-winning body care range inc. The Deodorant Balm, that works hard— like you. Natural. Gender-free. Fine fragrance. Created onstage, adored offstage. #BornToPerform

Trazendo inovação e tecnologia para os médicos no Brasil
Maiores importadores do Butterfly IQ. Trabalhamos com diversos equipamentos médicos com tecnologia integrada para trazer mais  modernidade para os seus atendimentos. Fale agora com nossa equipe de vendas ou acesse nosso site.
