Description: Unbottled est LA nouvelle marque de cosmétiques solides. Notre mission : libérer votre salle de bain du plastique et votre corps des produits chimiques!

Name: The Makeup Show, A Beauty Experience
Description:
The Makeup Show is embracing the international beauty & fashion cand deliver the largest PRO ONLY driven beauty event.  Join us at The Makeup Show as the top international industry artists and pro-driven worldwide companies present the newest products, seminars, forums and hands-on workshops.  Fill your two days with inspiration, education and community. Learn about the newest lines and product launches. Explore makeup workshops and discover school programs.  Network with your peers. Develop new relationships with the companies that have a growing prominence throughout the professional beauty industry.
The Makeup Show is coming to NYC,  Chicago, LA, Florida this year.

Name: 2San
Description:
2San is a global diagnostics company who are transforming the future of healthcare by delivering innovative home-testing, diagnostic solutions, that empower individuals to take control of their health and wellness, when and where they choose.

We believe easy-to-use home diagnostic tests are a critical part of enabling consumers to take control of their health and help inform next steps towards treatment.

Our key areas of focus are Infection, Drugs of Abuse, Health and Wellness and Family Planning. This complimentary range of testing products make us a single-source solution to meet a broad range of health tests across the population at any stage of life.

We identify exceptional inventions and work closely with manufacturers to ensure that the testing solutions solve for the health concerns of today.
Our experienced Quality and Regulatory teams ensure that all safety, efficacy, compliance, and regulatory requirements are met for each solution.

Welcome to 2San, we invite you to join us as we continue to drive meaningful innovation in the world of healthcare and enable our goal of self-testing for all.


Visit www.2san.com to learn more.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Cosmétosciences
Description:
CosmétoSciences est un programme "Ambition Recherche et Développement" financé par la Région Centre-Val de Loire.
Son objectif est la valorisation de la filière cosmétique sur notre territoire, en termes de recherche (académique et industrielle), de formation universitaire, de communication et d'entrepreneuriat.

Name: La Puissânce
Description:
En La Puissânce, creemos que el cabello no se trata solo de hebras y estilos; lleva consigo una conexión profunda con la identidad, historia y expresión personal. Entendemos la importancia del cabello en la vida de las personas y el impacto que puede tener en su energía y confianza.

Nuestra misión es crear una experiencia de cuidado capilar tan única y especial como cada individuo que nos elige. Estamos dedicados a nutrir no solo tu cabello, sino también a vos misma. Nuestros productos están cuidadosamente elaborados para realzar y celebrar la belleza y diversidad de cada tipo de cabello, y de cada historia.

Con La Puissânce, podés confiar en que priorizamos tu bienestar y nos esforzamos por brindarte productos de la más alta calidad y una experiencia que te empodere para abrazar el máximo potencial de tu cabello. Tu energía y confianza son el corazón de todo lo que hacemos.

Name: Primor Cosmetics
Description:
Primőr Cosmetics Group is a regional cosmetics and beauty company, consisting of two separate entities: Primőr Cosmetics and Primőr International. With over 30 years of experience, Primőr Cosmetics is the leading Hungarian distributor, while Primőr International is a rapidly growing distributor in various European regions, including Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Italy, Slovenia, and Croatia. 

Our expertise lies in local brand building and sales management while keeping the uniqueness and purpose of our brands in mind. With decades of experience, we have become experts in providing exquisite brand services, extending to all business levels, from public relations, Marketing, Social Media Support to Beauty Advisory training and merchandising. Our business model is to serve as an affiliate to our suppliers and a strategic ally to our customers. Thanks to our dedicated key account management teams, we give undivided attention to each of our customers so that we can strategize on how to address their shoppers needs. 

Our founder, Mr. Zsolt Kiss, established the company with a unique vision of making luxury cosmetics and beauty available to everyone. We believe that beauty and cosmetics give people a unique sense of happiness and self-confidence, and hence, we work tirelessly to broaden our reach so that everyone can enjoy this pleasure.

We have a constantly expanding brand portfolio, divided into 5 divisions: Prestige Fragrances, Lifestyle Fragrances, Skincare, Haircare, and Makeup.We are proud to represent some of the world’s most prestigious manufacturers, such as Coty, Puig, Cosnova and Mavive.Our 40+ international brands include Gucci, Burberry, St. Tropez, and many more. 

But enough about us… What about you? Are you ambitious, curious to learn and up for a challenge? Are you a beauty enthusiast looking to join a dynamic team, where you can take ownership from day one? If so, the next opportunity is only a click away: https://primorcosmetics.com/work-with-us

Name: Yon-Ka Paris USA
Description:
As pioneers in aromatherapy since 1954 and founders of the Yon-Ka brand, the Multaler Laboratories, French family-owned company, encapsulate the power of Nature within sensorial, results-driven expert formulas.

Each Yon-Ka phyto-aromatic treatment is a unique, personalized experience which contributes to the physical and mental harmony for every person, at every stage of life.

Today, over 6,000 beauty professionals worldwide have chosen to offer Yon-Ka's Phyto-Aromatic Skincare experience to their clients who seek natural, authentic, and effective skincare solutions.

Name: PELHAM
Description:
Combining innovative R&D capabilities with small scale manufacturing, we’ve enabled some of the UK’s biggest retailers to respond to the latest trends and supported exciting new companies with fast up-scaling. Discover how Pelham could open up a world of possibility for your cosmetics brand.

We work with many of Europe’s most loved premium, niche and cult beauty brands offering bespoke brand development & production from our state of the art manufacturing facility in Hampshire.

As well as speed and technical ability, our in-house manufacturing process lives by Pelham's green policy, focusing on sourcing local ingredients, keeping water usage low and ensuring our carbon footprint is minimal. 

Pelham also has the expertise to offer an end-to-end service, working with our partners to create bespoke labelling, branding and packaging. Our excellent reputation means we have been able to cultivate relationships with the best branding experts and designers in the industry, who can offer our partners the best prices across all areas of the business. 

Pelham is here to help you launch your brand to your target audience, whether you are looking for product creation, or the full end-to-end service. 

Learn more about our story at https://pelhamgroup.com/about-us/

Name: Bite - Because It’s The Earth
Description:
At Bite, we’re all about cleaning up personal care one daily routine at a time -- by developing our products with the highest standards of clean chemistry and sustainable innovation. We’re setting the standard for what’s better for the planet, and you.

We’re proud to be:
Certified B Corp
Certified Carbon Neutral
Certified Cruelty Free and Vegan
Certified Palm Oil Free
Woman Owned
Plastic Free, Always

Name: allter
Description:
Allter is a conscious mission started by parents Surbhi and Arnav, who wanted to keep their parenting as natural as possible for their little bundle of joy. In search of an alternative to regular diapers, which are made up of all sorts of nasties that are not supposed to be near babies' sensitive skin, they took the task upon themselves and started Allter, India's first sustainable and certified rash-free diaper brand. Allter is altering the notion that parents have to choose between what's good for their baby and the planet, promoting gentle baby care, and a beautiful planet to thrive on. We believe all babies deserve the best, which means all parents need access to consciously curated baby care designed to perform.

With Allter, we aim to simplify parenting with mindfully curated baby care products that are easy on the planet and good for babies' skin. Your baby can have it all with Allter!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: THE BARE BAR
Description: At The Bare Bar, we believe that less is more than enough. Our mission is to craft natural, fresh skincare products using ethically sourced ingredients, all packaged sustainably. We eliminate the unnecessary and focus on the pure essentials to create products that are free from chemicals and nasties.

Name: Laboratorios Klein Cosmética, s.l. - Grupo Klein
Description:
Empresa orientada a la formulación y fabricación de productos cosméticos a terceros. Servicios integrales desde el desarrollo del producto a diseño del packaging.
Servicio de importación de cosméticos a la Unión Europea.

Company oriented to the formulation and manufacture of cosmetic products "Private Label". Comprehensive services from product development to packaging design.
Authorized importers of cosmetics to the EU for third parties.

Name: O3+ Skincare Solution
Description: O3+ is proud to be India’s No.1 Professional Skin Care Company since 2005, catering to professional beauty salons, stylists dermatologists and cosmetic surgeons. The company not only deals in professional range of treatments and products but also gives hands on training and education for the same. The purpose of the company is to offer the best quality of ingredients available in the international market. Visage has acquired the highest share in the Indian Professional Skin Care Industry and is founded by Md Vineet Kapur who is a renowned skin care specialist with an international experience of over 2 decades in the industry. The brand belongs to Visage Beauty & Health Care Pvt Ltd.

Name: Jafra Querétaro (DCJ)
Description:
Somos la planta de producción de los productos cosméticos y de cuidado de la piel Jafra que se exportan a nivel mundial con los más altos estándares de calidad.

NUESTRA VISIÓN: Ser un socio de negocio de clase mundial, para todos los mercados de Jafra.

NUESTRA MISIÓN: Alcanzar consistentemente las expectativas del mercado en calidad, servicio, costo y capital de trabajo, a través de la mejora continua y con los más altos estándares de operación que lleven a la satisfacción de colaboradores, consultoras y consumidores.

NUESTROS VALORES: Pasión, Liderazgo, Integridad, Inspiración y Honestidad

Name: Ffern
Description:
Ffern is a natural perfume maker founded upon the belief that fine fragrance should be a natural craft product; a liquid alive with the stories of the plants and the processes that go into it.

Our fragrances are blended and barrel-aged in England. We use the finest natural ingredients, sourced responsibly and extracted using pioneering techniques.

Name: Vimergy
Description:
When an Australian woman needed to improve her health, she started to systematically avoid problem foods while introducing pure, targeted supplementation. This simple yet transformative approach helped restore her well-being.  
 
Her husband also went through his own remarkable health journey, shedding 200 pounds as he worked to strengthen his mental resilience. Supplementation played a vital role in his recovery too. But almost all the supplements they found used questionable ingredients, being full of fillers, additives and other unwanted extras. 
 
Purity is of the utmost importance to our founders. So, they set out to source and refine the essentials their bodies needed - in the simplest of formulations. It wasn’t long before they found their vim and energy starting to return, so it made perfect sense to form a company—Vimergy—dedicated to sharing the best of all the carefully formulated supplements they'd found with the people who would appreciate them most. 
 
People like them who may have been ignored and frustrated by established healthcare. People who believe in making intentional choices about their own well-being.  
 
People who understand the life-changing potential the right nutritional support can bring. 

We can save ourselves.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MZ SKIN
Description:
Known as “The Eye Doctor”, Dr Maryam Zamani has a global reputation for her meticulous attention to detail and sought-after surgical and non-surgical techniques in advanced cosmetic facial treatments, guaranteed to deliver the most natural of results. 

With over 20 years of clinical experience, Dr Zamani created her own high-performance skincare range based on her three-step philosophy of Reveal, Enhance and Protect. 

This award-winning and science-backed collection maximises visible results. Each product is expertly formulated with pioneering ingredients and is clinically trialled for beautiful skin, the ultimate at-home hybrid between Dr Zamani’s clinic and skin enhancing treatments.

Name: Alix Avien
Description: Alix Avien Paris founded in 1997 and registered in Paris is a cosmetics brand based in Turkey. Alix Avien Paris which has been operating in various markets for many years, continues its rapid rise with its new management in 2020 and aims to introduce make up lovers to its products in many parts of the world.

Name: PURESEOUL • The Home of K-Beauty
Description:
PURESEOUL is the largest and leading Korean cosmetic specialist in the United Kingdom. We offer an extensive range of over 2,000 Korean skincare, makeup, and hair care products from over 60 direct partner brands. Since 2019, we have been the go-to destination for UK K-Beauty enthusiasts both online and offline, with 10,000 + 5-star reviews.

Our 10+ offline stores are located across the UK in key cities such as London, Cardiff and Manchester (just to name a few!). Our stores offer customers a chance to experience the best of K-beauty in person for a full omnichannel experience.  

Our dedicated team provide expert advice to both new and established brands, offering import support and personalised marketing strategies to introduce your products to our customers and the wider UK market.

Instagram: @pureseouluk
TikTok: @pureseoul
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: COSMOGEN
Description:
To innovate responsibly for safe and sustainable beauty with respect for the people and the environment.

As a ‘’company with a mission’’*, Cosmogen is the global expert in innovative, patented and responsible application solutions for cosmetic and pharmaceutical brands. Its expertise is recognized in four complementary categories: packaging with built-in applicators, brushes, accessories and dispensing intended for skin care, make-up, fragrance, scalp, hair and OTC.
 
Its ID “Innovation & Development” department detects and anticipates market trends to design innovative and patented products, focused on expert application of cosmetic formulas to create a new consumer experience and improve efficiency and use.

In line with its CSR approach, 100% of COSMOGEN's innovations comply with 3Rs: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle. Specifically, this results in packs and applicators that can be dismantled, recycled and / or refillable, and made of recycled material. Furthermore, The team has been trained in eco-design and in CSR requirements in innovation. COSMOGEN has developed an internal software to evaluate the life cycle analysis of its products.
 
COSMOGEN is present in Europe, North America, Latin America, and Asia to inspire its clients and support their projects.
 
*In 2022, COSMOGEN has adopted the French legal status of "Société à mission": to innovate responsibly for safe and sustainable beauty with respect for the people and the environment.

Name: PIERRE FABRE DERMO-COSMETIQUE
Description: PIERRE FABRE DERMO-COSMETIQUE is a cosmetics company based out of 45 PLACE ABEL GANCE, BOULOGNE BILLANCOURT, France.

Name: Kharesiya Brands
Description: Kharesiya Brands Pvt ltd (Formarly Known as Baby & mom Retail Pvt Ltd) is House of Brands into multiple categories of Baby & beauty, Pet, Home furnishings Products

Name: Arcaea
Description: Arcaea (Ar-kay-uh). We're on a mission to build a new foundation for the beauty industry where biology as the creative tool for self-expression. We're growing new ingredients and product experiences for beauty through technology that includes DNA sequencing, biological engineering, fermentation and more.  By culturing industry-leading, safe, and sustainable ingredients, we intend to create a new supply chain for the industry that does not rely on petrochemicals or on harvesting and depleting natural resources while making products that can deliver new functionality and performance across skincare, bodycare, haircare, and aesthetics. Arcaea was incubated on the Ginkgo Bioworks platform under the working title Kalo.

Name: Alpha-H
Description:
Alpha-H creates the best in acid packed, science backed skincare. With over 27 years of clinical experience and award-winning results, today Alpha-H is a global leader in exfoliating acids.

Our acid formulas combine an optimal acid concentration and low pH for maximum bioavailability and efficacy. Our iconic, award-winning Liquid Gold Exfoliating Treatment has become a cult-favourite around the world. 

Today we offer a complete range of products that harness the combined benefits of clinically-proven actives and antioxidant-rich Australian botanicals, whilst complementing our acid formulas. We offer corrective and preventative solutions for the full spectrum of skin concerns: from breakouts and pigmentation, to dullness and premature signs of ageing. 

Our formulas are all cruelty free and we do not formulate with any potentially toxic ingredients. We’re committed to reducing our environmental impact via green energy, eco-friendly packaging, innovate waste solutions and our partnership with 1% For the Planet.

Alpha-H’s products are sold globally via alpha-h.com and leading retailers including Sephora (USA, SEA and Australia), Mecca, Farfetch, Adore Beauty, Cult Beauty, Nordstrom, Selfridges, ASOS, DermStore, Cloud10 and Marks & Spencer.

Name: Rivona Naturals
Description:
Rivona Naturals brings to you beauty and skincare products straight from nature’s heart to refresh, rejuvenate and relax your body. We provide a range of grooming products for subtle and gentle cleansing & conditioning - maintaining a harmonious relationship between natural ingredients and our body. 

Our aim is to provide you best of products with the pure essence of nature and least of chemicals to keep your body and inner self healthy and happy. We derive our roots from earthy soil and the forest greens and bring you the touch of Mother Nature in the form of you products. 

Information about our products can be found at 
www.rivona.in

Name: McKenna Labs, Inc.
Description: McKenna Labs is located in Fullerton, California.  We are a full-service personal care contract manufacturer capable of turning an idea into a finished product.   Our team is 100% committed to delivering the product our customer wants right when they need it.

Name: DAME | B Corp
Description:
We're DAME and we’re on a mission to make periods positive for people and the planet. 
Tampons were invented in 1933. Lots of things have changed since then, but the period industry? Not so much. It’s still full of plastic, chemicals and stigma. 
DAME is here to change that. Everyone who bleeds deserves to feel comfortable and confident on their period. That’s why we’ve reimagined period products from the ground up. We’ve created comfortable, sustainable alternatives. They’re chemical-free, carbon negative, and with stylish packaging that you’ll happily keep in plain sight. Now the best choice for your body is the best choice for your planet. It’s about bloody time.

Name: Olim Naturals
Description: Skincare is self-care. Treat yourself to the best. Your skin is unique. Let us help you find the perfect skincare routine for you.

Name: Ziaja Ltd
Description:
Ziaja is a Polish producer of pharmaceuticals and high-quality cosmetics for face, body and hair care. 
The company was established in 1989 by two pharmacists, Aleksandra and Zenon Ziaja. The aim was to create medicinal preparations and body care cosmetics with simple but effective formulas based on pharmaceutical experience and inspired by the coastal climate.
Today Ziaja is a brand which encompasses a wide range of modern products, designed to help all skin types and problems as well as to provide comprehensive personal care for the whole family. Ziaja's great success comes from hard work, above-average commitment, constant enthusiasm and creativity.
The focus on continuous development defines the company as an innovative and future-oriented.

Ziaja to polski producent farmaceutyków oraz wysokiej jakości kosmetyków do pielęgnacji twarzy, ciała i włosów.
Firma została założona w 1989 roku przez dwóch farmaceutów, Aleksandrę i Zenona Ziaja. Celem było stworzenie preparatów leczniczych i kosmetyków do pielęgnacji ciała o prostych i skutecznych formułach, opartych na doświadczeniu farmaceutycznym i inspirowanych nadmorskim klimatem.
Dziś Ziaja to marka, która obejmuje szeroki zakres nowoczesnych produktów, przeznaczonych do pielęgnacji wszystkich typów skóry oraz rozwiązywania jej różnych problemów. Zapewnia kompleksową pielęgnację dla całej rodziny.  Ogromny sukces Ziaja wynika z ciężkiej pracy, ponadprzeciętnego zaangażowania, nieustannego entuzjazmu i kreatywności, a skoncentrowanie się na ciągłym rozwoju definiuje firmę jako innowacyjną i ukierunkowaną na przyszłość.

Name: CORANIA
Description:
CORANIA, A STORY OF YOUTH, SINCE 1934!

It all began in Marseille, in the heart of Provence!

In 1934, Fernand Cohen was 21 years old and what we call a “nose", able to identify thousands of fragrances and use talent and creativity to combine essences.
Fernand Cohen was also a born entrepreneur and founded the company Parfums CORANIA based on a clear vision: to shake up codes in order to be different.
His first innovations and successes were “alcohol-free” perfumes! Fernand Cohen went on to invent fragrances that went against the tide throughout his career.

This passion for perfume and the originality of his approach are our heritage, and we've been writing this family story every day since 1934. This passion is rooted in our DNA and has been driving us to re-invent ourselves at every key moment of our existence, for over 80 years, to give everybody quality and original cosmetic products made in France.

TO CREATE A FRAGRANCE, YOU NEED FLAIR!

Corania, trendy perfumes that we can all identify with

We are creators, we invent unique fragrances which tell stories, stir emotions and reveal personalities.

Our perfumes are resolutely contemporary and meet the demands and trends of today’s generations.

THE VALUES THAT DRIVE US!

Creating to be different
Our products are surprising, unexpected, sometimes against the tide, and they offer the people who wear them a real olfactory identity. Innovation is in our DNA.

The desire to be entrepreneurial
Dynamism is what fuels us! It helps us to stay creative and agile every day on our market, in our profession, to always serve our customers better.

A family business!
Family is above all our state of mind. It ensures we are “good together” and it is what encourages us each day to maintain the quality of our products with the know-how of yesteryear. Today, the third generation of the Cohen family is perpetuating and developing the company with this spirit.

Name: Lilio Health
Description:
Lilio: Das smarte Armband für dein Baby. 

Das Lilio Armband gibt dir Rückmeldungen zum Wohlbefinden deines Babys. Das Lilio Band ist ein sehr kleines, intelligentes Armband, das tagsüber und nachts wichtige Vitaldaten deines Babys erfasst und auf die App überträgt. Lilio funktioniert sowohl zuhause (WLAN) als auch unterwegs (Bluetooth). 


Eltern wissen selbst, was das Beste für ihr Kind ist. Die Lilio App unterstützt euch dabei, eurer natürlichen Intuition zu vertrauen. 
Und wenn die Indikatoren für das Wohlbefinden mal außerhalb des voreingestellten Bereichs sind, erhältst du direkt eine Benachrichtigung (Notification).

Und, die Lilio Basisstation hat auch eine Babyphone-Funktion. 
Von Eltern, für Eltern entwickelt:

Das Lilio Band wurde von Eltern, Ärzten und Hebammen in Deutschland entwickelt. Unsere Mission ist es, Eltern dabei zu unterstützen für das Wohlbefinden ihres Babys zu sorgen.

Das Lilio Armband ist "designed, engineered and made in Germany"
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: GlyMed Plus
Description:
For over 30 years, GlyMed Plus has been a renowned leader in the skincare industry, offering a complete range of Professional Only products, combining technologically advanced ingredients with certified botanicals to produce amazing results. We are committed to the aesthetics industry. For this reason, GlyMed Plus has remained "Purely Professional," sold only through licensed professionals. 

Putting the licensed professional first, GlyMed Plus offers The Institute of Skin Science for aesthetics higher learning. Since its establishment, it has taught hundreds of classes to thousands of licensed professionals. Not only is The Institute of Skin Science the first to offer higher education, but it is the first to provide moderate to advanced education courses.

Dedicated to the support and growth of the skincare professional, GlyMed Plus has revolutionized the industry with its award-winning products, education, and first of its kind technology—REGEN Retail. REGEN Retail is a free platform that connects the licensed professional with their retail clients, offering a modern eCommerce shopping experience. It generates additional revenue and improves working capital and cash flow for the esthetician. Visit www.glymedplus.com for more information.

Name: Konjac Skinfood Cosmetics
Description:
Essential Konjac Skin Food mission is to elevate, enable, approve, and eventually assemble confidence in ladies around the globe through astounding items that empower both inward and external beauty and otherworldly edification while additionally giving chances to self-improvement and budgetary reward.

Your skin is valuable. That is the reason at Essential Konjac Skin Food, we trust that putting resources into excellent skin health management items and adopting a comprehensive and proactive strategy to magnificence is the initial step to a lifetime of sound skin.

Your hair products are the first and most important step to achieving a desired look or hairstyle. With the correct hair care products, you can believe in your beauty.

Name: SAGMA Corp Middle East - Asia Pacific
Description:
Discover the essence of luxury with Sagma Corp, the premier provider of exclusive hotel guest amenities and niche perfumes. 

Established in 2009, we have become a leading independent master distributor in the Middle East, Near East, and Eurasia markets, with our headquarters in Dubai. We bring the finest of top luxury brands, including Hermès, Bulgari, Lanvin, Ferragamo, Nayassia, Oscar de la Renta, and Graff, to hotels and resorts across the GCC region. 

In Jan 2023, we have opened our regional office in Hong Kong to cover Asia - Pacific region with Graff, Oscar De La Renta and Nayassia Luxury Amenities.

At Sagma Corp, we understand the importance of creating a luxurious and comfortable atmosphere for guests, and that is why we are dedicated to offering only the best in luxury amenities. As a company, we are also committed to sustainability and environmental preservation, making it a top priority to source products and operate in a way that minimizes our impact on the environment.

Thank you for considering us as your partner in luxury. We are eager to help you elevate your guests’ experience.”

Name: NATRUE - The International Natural and Organic Cosmetics Association
Description:
NATRUE is the International Natural and Organic Cosmetics Association. Since 2007, we provide a home to all true friends of natural and organic cosmetics. At NATRUE, we are united by a common goal: to protect and promote natural and organic cosmetics to the benefit of consumers worldwide.

NATRUE’s mission is based on two pillars which have consumer’s interest at heart:
- Contribute to regulatory decision-making to ensure the availability of premium natural & organic cosmetic ingredients;
- Promote and develop a strict regulatory definition of natural and organic ingredients and finished cosmetics products.

Based on a strict set of criteria, the NATRUE Label has developed, grown and expanded across Europe and worldwide since its creation in 2007, consolidating its position in the NOC sector as an international benchmark for authentic natural and organic cosmetic products. The NATRUE label is a guarantee of transparency and reliability for consumers as it helps them to easily identify true natural and organic cosmetic products, contributing to keeping greenwashing off the shelves.

Name: Biomátika Indústria
Description:
A Biomátika é uma indústria de cosméticos especializada em cuidados com a pele, com foco em qualidade, bem-estar e resultados visíveis. Com 19 anos de experiência no mercado, desenvolvemos soluções dermatologicamente testadas e eficazes, ideais para o cuidado diário da pele de todos os tipos.

 Procurando parcerias, representantes ou deseja revender nossos produtos? Entre em contato com nosso time comercial através do e-mail: comercial@biomatika.com.br

 Dos biomas brasileiros para o seu cuidado |  B2B e distribuição

 Instagram: @biomatikasa
 Site: biomatika.com.br
 Contato: contato@biomatika.com.br

Tampons were invented in 1933. Lots of things have changed since then, but the period industry? Not so much. It’s still full of plastic, chemicals and stigma. 
DAME is here to change that. Everyone who bleeds deserves to feel comfortable and confident on their period. That’s why we’ve reimagined period products from the ground up. Name: Grupo DRV Phytolab
Description:
Somos una empresa de referencia en el sector de la estética y la belleza profesional. 

Contamos con sedes propias en Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Santiago de Compostela y Palma de Mallorca, cada una equipada con salas de formación y exposición de nuestros productos. Disponemos, asimismo, de 34 centros de formación repartidos por todo el país con más de 30 expertos a disposición del cliente. 

La distribución de nuestros productos se realiza a través de las Centrales de Compra y una red compuesta por más de 150 comerciales. 

Ésta incorpora cuatro líneas de cosmética (cosmética, dermacéutica, alta cosmética y cosmética regenerativa); la línea de depilación de cera más vendida en el mundo con todos los sistemas disponibles; productos y tratamientos de alta gama para manicura, pedicura y cuidado del pie; una serie completa de productos y soluciones para la mirada; mobiliario de belleza y spa; aparatología de estética amplia y todos los complementos necesarios para cualquier centro de estética. 

Vendemos más de 8000 referencias para los centros de belleza.

Somos la empresa española de estética profesional con mayor presencia a nivel mundial. El grupo DRV está presente en 94 países, con sedes propias en Miami, Santiago de Chile, Hong Kong y Guangzhou.

Name: Meroda Cosmetics
Description:
Meroda Cosmetics is the European premium beauty brand built for real, everyday life.

We simplify beauty routines by creating skin-first, multifunctional products that combine makeup and skincare into essential, easy-to-use steps. Our formulas are designed to work together, delivering natural confidence and effortless results in minutes.

Meroda believes beauty should feel intuitive, never complicated. By removing unnecessary steps and products, we help women look confident and natural, even on their busiest days.

Powered by a strong direct-to-consumer presence and an engaged community of over one million customers, Meroda continues to scale across Europe through an omnichannel ecosystem that includes select retail and professional partners. With Romee Strijd as the face of the brand, rapid year-on-year growth, and strong product momentum (including one foundation sold every 10 seconds), Meroda is building a modern beauty brand rooted in trust, simplicity, and real-life relevance.

Name: SOCIEDAD DE QUÍMICOS COSMETÓLOGOS DE MÉXICO A.C.
Description:
La Sociedad de Químicos Cosmetólogos de México A.C. (SQCM) es una asociación que agrupa a los técnicos científicos, investigadores y profesionales que realizan actividades relacionadas con la ciencia cosmética.

La SQCM brinda servicios de formación continua a través de la organización de eventos científicos, exposiciones comerciales, publicaciones, cursos de capacitación y eventos culturales. Nuestros asociados cuentan con descuentos especiales encursos y eventos, servicio de biblioteca, soporte técnico, búsqueda de información especializada, entre otros beneficios.

Actualmente, la SQCM tiene como metas convertirse en una sociedad que se mantenga a la vanguardia, adaptada al cambio y brindando productos de alto valor agregado a sus socios.
Location: Gral Pedro María Anaya, Ciudad de México

Name: PureBorn
Description:
At PureBorn, we're on a mission to redefine baby care by offering eco-friendly, premium products that prioritise the well-being of both little ones and the planet. From vegan, cruelty-free products to dermatologist-approved essentials, we are committed to sustainability and are your partner in transparent and joyful parenting.  

From our roots in 2017, we have evolved into a brand with a significant global presence – reaching families in 25+ countries and over 65 million happy bottoms.

Join us on our global journey to build a brand that is nurturing the next generation while embracing a greener, healthier future.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ludovico Martelli S.p.A.
Description:
Nata a Firenze nel 1908, la Ludovico Martelli S.p.A. è un’azienda familiare italiana di quarta generazione specializzata nel settore cosmesi e toiletries. Vanta 13 brand con posizionamenti di valore, apprezzati in Italia e all'estero, al servizio della beauty routine delle persone. Tra questi: Proraso, leader nel mercato della rasatura e riferimento per i barbieri e gli appassionati di tutto il mondo; Marvis, che con la sua iconicità ha rivoluzionato il concetto di dentifricio trasformando l'igiene orale in un gesto quotidiano di puro piacere; Valobra, lo storico brand di saponette fondato a Genova nel 1903; Floïd, il dopobarba fedele compagno dell’uomo di ogni tempo, l’ultimo arrivato in azienda. Ma anche Kaloderma, con i suoi prodotti dedicati alla cura quotidiana del corpo, Schultz, lo specialista dei capelli chiari, Oxy, che offre i trattamenti di bellezza di un vero centro estetico ed altri brand per l'igiene della personale e la cura dei capelli.

L’azienda, dal marketing alla produzione, concepisce e sviluppa presso i laboratori R&D e gli stabilimenti interni prodotti funzionali e innovativi. Ha la sede principale a Fiesole (Fi), vanta un impianto produttivo a Genova e uffici commerciali a Milano e Hong Kong, a testimonianza del percorso di crescita costante in atto che la vede sempre più orientata a diffondere l'identità del Made in Italy oltreconfine.

Name: Amakha Paris
Description:
A Amakha Paris é uma das maiores marcas de beleza e bem-estar do Brasil, oferecendo produtos de alta qualidade e incentivando o empreendedorismo social. 

Há 7 anos no mercado, levamos nosso portfólio aos nossos clientes por meio da Venda Direta e do e-commerce.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Aster Pharmacy (India)
Description:
Aster Pharmacy is one of the largest retail pharmacy groups in the Middle East and is now present in India. We opened India's 1st friendly neighbourhood pharmacy in February 2021 and are rapidly expanding.

With 3 decades of experience in the health care industry, we are proud to bring a friendly and experienced approach to your neighbourhood and are working to be the pharmacy that cares for your community. We care for you and promise you with friendly and trained pharmacists, pleasant ambience, genuine medicines, exhaustive range of products, medicine refill reminders and free home delivery. Your wellness is our priority. We welcome you to experience your Friendly Neighbourhood Pharmacy.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Be Girl
Description:
Lack of access to menstrual materials, accurate information about menstruation, and safe, private spaces to manage menstruation is a human rights issue. Poor menstrual health impacts people’s mobility, confidence, and understanding of their bodies, too often inhibiting their equitable participation in society and acting as a barrier to gender equality.

Since our official founding in 2014, our mission at Be Girl is to help bridge the access gap in Menstrual Health and Hygiene (MHH), so that our high-quality products and menstruation education reach those who need it the most. We collaborate with NGOs, UN agencies, and governments in their MHM efforts by providing high-quality reusable period products like our PeriodPanty and menstruation education with our SmartCycle methodology, enabling partners to achieve their global impact goals in health, education, gender equality, and more.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ar Kağıt Kozmetik
Description:
Our story began in 1994 with a simple mission: to provide affordable and effective hygiene products for families worldwide. Today, our products are sold more than 80 countries, including tissue paper, wet wipes, personal, and home care cleaning FCMG products. Our global presence and experience enable us to maintain high standards through continuous innovation and customer commitment.

At our dedicated factory in Istanbul, we manufacture all Papilion products under Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) conditions. Moving forward, we aim to provide one-stop-shop solutions globally, ensuring affordable hygiene products for everyone. Our mission of innovation and care drives us to keep evolving.

For more information > global.papilion.com

Name: MIRIAM QUEVEDO SL
Description:
Barcelona luxury award-winning  cosmetic brand is dedicated to elaborate functional anti-aging cosmetics using the highest concentrations of the most precious,  high-quality, rare, natural active ingredients fused with cutting-edge scientific innovation.

Luxurious intensive  and high performing repairing products, anti-aging, that protect and revitalize giving an infusion to the skin, the hair or the scalp of nutrients and energy that are necessary so that look radiant. 

Pioneers in creating intensive anti-aging haircare collections, elaborated with the same sophisticated anti-aging technologies we use in the skincare for exceptional results. 
                                                                                                                   
With our own Facilities, we elaborate the ultimate in advanced skincare, haircare, lavish Spa Rituals. The art of luxury advanced care, a world of renewal, transformation and rejuvenation.

Name: Plantifique
Description: Plantifique transforms nutritious superfoods into revolutionary skincare products that feed your skin and deeply nourish your natural beauty. Name: FarmHouse Fresh skincare
Description:
FarmHouse Fresh is an award-winning natural skincare brand, delivering rapid results to complexions through organic botanical extracts grown fresh daily on their Texas farm. For 20 years, FHF's potent formulas have been trusted & served in holistic spa treatments through hotels, resorts and day spas – from Dallas to Dubai. Voted by professionals for over 12 years through American Spa Magazine among their favorite U.S. Spa brands for skincare, bodycare, CBD and natural lines, as well as a favorite provider of Spa Education in the industry.
In 2023, FarmHouse Fresh was placed among the world’s most culturally relevant, socially impactful, and authentic companies through FastCompany’s Brands That Matter List and Inc. Magazine’s Best in Business Award. Putting purpose before profit, the FarmHouse Fresh team believes in providing rescue for 2: complexions and animals in need. Their philanthropic mission of ‘skincare that saves animals’ uses profits from every product sale to rescue and rehabilitate neglected animals – many of whom come to live at FHF's nonprofit Farm Animal Sanctuary & Headquarters, as featured in People Magazine. Customers become part of the wellness journey, by tracking each product’s unique batch code on the company’s website to see the animal rescue initiatives they’ve helped fund coast to coast.

It began with 1 product in 2005, when founder Shannon McLinden discovered a way to keep cracked heels at bay by combining fine grain sea salt and rice bran oil into sea salt foot polishes. Oprah selected this kit for her O-list proclaiming "Here's a trio of foot scrubs that smell so good, I want to serve them over berries!" Today, with over 50 Beauty Editor picks, celebrity favorites and hundreds of thousands of 5-star reviews across all skin type solutions, discerning customers consistently mention FarmHouse Fresh among their top-selling product lines and favorite farm-to treatment wellness experiences.

Name: Farma Acquisition Holding - Farmacie Boots
Description:
Farma Acquisition Holding - Farmacie Boots è un Retailer Farmaceutico che gestisce più di 90 Farmacie di proprietà su tutto il territorio nazionale e presenti in più di 10 regioni italiane.

La nostra storia nasce in Italia negli anni '70 con la creazione di una rete di vendita all’ingrosso di farmaci: Alleanza Farmaceutica, diventata negli anni uno dei maggiori player a livello mondiale, Alliance Healthcare. Forte dell’esperienza maturata nel campo della distribuzione, il Gruppo ha intrapreso un nuovo percorso nella gestione diretta di Farmacie.

Le nostre Farmacie sono concepite per accogliere al meglio i nostri Clienti e aiutarli a sentirsi bene grazie ad un ampio assortimento di prodotti per la salute e la cura della persona. Proponiamo un ampio panel di servizi sia di prima istanza che specializzati di telemedicina e servizi infermieristici.
Il nostro obiettivo è quello di ampliare sempre più la nostra offerta, ascoltando le esigenze dei nostri Clienti, per garantire un'assistenza di qualità e contribuire ad una corretta attività di prevenzione, soprattutto grazie alla dedizione e alla professionalità dei nostri Farmacisti.

With further brands in development, each one of our perfumes is uniquely dreamt up and formulated in Italy with some of the world’s most passionate experts. Our perfume bottles are lovingly created using a marriage of centuries old craftsmanship and cutting-edge technologies.

Our distinctive pop-up and retail concepts continue the garden theme ensuring our Jardin de Parfums fragrance experts are on hand to help you navigate the world of scent and discover how to blend and layer our creations to design a bespoke scent, especially for you.

Jardin de Parfums disrupts the retail experience by presenting our ‘flowers’ in a fresh way for the culturally curious and innovatively inclined. Jardin de Parfums is a garden you will never want to leave.

This is your story. 

Which flower will you pick first?

Name: CODAGE Paris
Description:
Behind CODAGE, a brother and a sister. A contemporary tale.

Fascinated by health and beauty since early childhood, Amandine and Julien Azencott grew up full of admiration for their family, already immersed in the field of medicine and the world of the French pharmacy.

Confronted with an ever-expanding range of cosmetic supplies, and convinced that each skin is unique and thereby deserves its own particular treatment, the creators of CODAGE decided to revive the time-old tradition of service and reinstate it into the heart of cosmetology.

Bringing into play the top talents on the current French and international cosmetic scenes, they revived with CODAGE the dialogue practiced by the apothecaries of yore, when anyone could walk-in and discuss their way of life, needs and desires with an expert and in return be provided with an specifically tailored formula.
The excellence of these formulas rests in the innate understanding of individual skin and the knowledge of all the ingredients’ active properties as well as the precision of their dosage.

Thus CODAGE was born. Its know-how focusing on a nutritive vision of beauty that goes beyond the aesthetic, to encompass health and well-being.

Name: International Federation of Societies of Cosmetic Chemists
Description:
The International Federation of Societies of Cosmetic Chemists (IFSCC) is the only global organization devoted to cosmetic science. 

Its 14,000+ Members work as cosmetic chemists, academics, raw material suppliers, and finished good producers. Founded in 1959 the IFSCC now has 50 Societies in 80 Countries. Its goal is to promote the global exchange of information, and to foster the development of professional relationships, among individuals working in cosmetic chemistry.

In even years the IFSCC holds an international Congress which generally draw 1,500 attendees and 300 exhibitors.  A Conference in held in odd years, focused on cutting-edge science.  Conferences generally have 400 attendees and 100 exhibitors.

Anyone who is a Member of their Country's Society of Cosmetic Chemists is automatically a Member of the IFSCC, provided that their Society belongs to the IFSCC.  Any IFSCC Member can gain access to its quarterly on-line magazine and scientific papers of note via the Members' Zone by registering at www.ifscc.org.

Description:
SoPharma is a Moroccan pharmaceutical laboratory founded in 2022 by two entrepreneurs, whose mission is to make the most innovative healthcare solutions available to as many people as possible.

The experience, values and network of its founders have enabled SoPharma to forge various types of partnerships with leading international companies for import, manufacturing and distribution of healthcare solutions.

Since its creation, SoPharma has focused on 2 Business Units in the Africa/MENA region: 
- "Health and Comfort" dedicated to food supplements; 
- Skincare By SoPharma", dedicated to cosmetics and dermocosmetics. 

The group's current strategy is to distribute exclusively under license products from international laboratories, as well as its own ranges.

In addition, SoPharma has undertaken the construction of a drug manufacturing plant in the Casablanca region. In Phase 1, this unit will be dedicated to the following 3 therapeutic areas: Central Nervous System, Oncology and Cardiometabolism. 

The Group's ambition is to become a major player in healthcare innovation from Morocco to Africa, the Middle East and Europe.

I laboratori Rougj formulano cosmetici all’avanguardia e hi-tech, sottoposti a rigorosi test d’efficacia presso rinomati Istituti e Università italiane. Sono diretti a un target femminile attento ed esigente e propongono linee cosmetiche differenziate, orientate al trattamento di ogni specifica necessità della pelle.

Il successo di Rougj è determinato da un binomio vincente che vede protagonisti prodotti di altissima qualità, affidati all’esperienza e alla professionalità della Consulente di Bellezza, che orienta le consumatrici nella scelta dei prodotti più idonei e mirati alle diverse esigenze.

Name: Laboratorio LACA
Description:
Laboratorio LACA es una empresa argentina fundada en 1956 dedicada al servicio integral de la belleza profesional. Tiene una completísima línea de productos para el cuidado facial, corporal y maquillajes elaborados con principios activos dermatocosméticos innovadores.

Estos productos se comercializan a través de profesionales de la belleza (cosmetólogas, esteticistas, maquilladores, manicuras, depiladoras, etc.), centros de estética y spas.

Hace ya varios años el laboratorio ha logrado la certificación ISO 9001 de su Sistema de Gestión de Calidad que abarca el desarrollo, la fabricación, el envasado y el despacho de todos los productos cosméticos que se producen en la empresa.

Los productos son avalados por normas GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice o Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura). Esto es una garantía de calidad que asegura que los productos se fabriquen en forma uniforme y controlada, de acuerdo con las normas adecuadas al uso que se pretende dar a los productos y conforme con las condiciones exigidas para su comercialización.

Todos los perfumes que se utilizan en las formulaciones son libres de alérgenos, esto reduce considerablemente las posibilidades de que un producto produzca una reacción.

LACA ofrece actualización y capacitación permanente en Cosmetología, Cosmiatría, Estética corporal, Maquillaje Social/Profesional, Maquillaje Artístico, Manicuría y Pedicuría.

Cuenta con una importantísima red de sucursales en Argentina y en el exterior.

LACA, tu belleza por profesionales.

At Signutra, we believe the right nutrition is like a signature.

Name: Napoleon Perdis Cosmetics

Description:
ABOUT US

IsaDora is Sweden’s no.1 make up brand and since 1983 we have brought honest makeup to the many. Guided by Swedish timeless values, our no-nonsense approach means that our premium products that do what they say, are safe in every way and accessible to everyone, no matter the amount of time at hand or size of wallet. Our Swedish roots are the moral compass that helps us stay inclusive, transparent, and responsible in everything we do. With IsaDora you don’t have to compromise on being you. Name: Conatural
Description:
Conatural is committed to providing you the highest quality Organic solutions for luxurious and affordable skin and hair care. Conatural harvests the power of nature by combining certified organic carrier oils, with a multitude of natural phytonutrients and antioxidants, and rare plant botanicals and organic essential oils that are literally pure gifts of nature. The result? Healthy products that protect, nourish and enrich the skin.

Conatural is proud to be an ISO 22716 certified company. We implement the strictest international standards of Good Manufacturing Practices.

Our products are as close to natural, organic where possible and will always be FREE from toxic chemicals such as Parabens, Triclosans, Artificial Musks, Phthalates, SLS, PPD, Petroleum Jelly, and Silicones.

Our product formulas are a mix of exotic essences, Ayurvedic and modern aromatherapy. Our ingredients are vegetarian, non-toxic, gentle, safe, and never tested on animals. 

We believe in providing the finest, natural and organic ingredients for your daily skin and hair care regime. The best skin and hair care products are made from minimally processed botanicals: organic or responsibly wildcrafted, pure, raw, live, unrefined, and handled carefully not to diminish their potency.

Our mission is to change the way women and men buy skin and hair care products forever. We want to help eliminate people's exposure to toxic chemicals in cosmetics and help educate them on the benefits of natural and organic ingredients.

Name: Winsome Glow Global
Description:
Winsome Glow is a growth-driven company that strives to give you the best skin care products possible. Winsome Glow focuses on finding viable solutions and combining research and technology, to provide top of the world’s most demanding skin care products. Our worldwide business philosophy is focused on loyalty to the latest marketing strategy. In order to create a fresh and untapped market, Winsome Glow cosmetics utilizes its knowledge in ethical marketing products. To this end, the company now presents its products in the global market according to its trends.

Winsome Glow is one of the fastest growing brands in the world. Already have presence in 25 countries with strong distribution networks and full digital and regional marketing support which includes Native Advertising, Popular Regional fashion magazines, Local T.V Networks, F.M Radio Campaigns and above all winsome glow is present on all social media platforms with huge following. Winsome Glow is also involved in other traditional means of marketing such as Bill Boards, Hoarding boards, Poster advertising and Roadshows etc.

Winsome Glow Global business model is one of the unique models in the world. Company doesn’t offer products in the open market. For each country winsome Glow Global assigns, a country distributor within the country. Which means company makes sure that it offers reasonable retail price to the users. Any skin care product in the world is considered as a luxury product but winsome Glow Global determines its product range that it should be available on the household product price. Winsome Glow Global as a head office gives the latest market research to its distributors around the world. This is one of the reasons, from distributors to retailers, price cannot be manipulated.

Name: Widi Care
Description:
Surgimos do propósito de ser referência em qualidade, tecnologia e resultados de alto impacto capilar. Para isso, Simone Braga viajou pelo mundo em busca dos mais refinados ativos e parceiros que agregassem nessa entrega de performance ao mercado, e conseguiu! Após dois anos de muito estudo e aperfeiçoamento, no dia 07/06/2009 fomos oficialmente lançados na feira Fibel, no Rio de Janeiro, e seus primeiros anos foram totalmente dedicados à área profissional, atingindo satisfatoriamente o mercado (inter)nacional.

Em 2016 finalmente chegamos à casa das nossas consumidoras, com nossa linha home care destinada a todos os tipos de fios, sejam eles lisos, ondulados, cacheados ou crespos, afinal, acreditamos que toda beleza importa.

Atualmente, contamos com mais de 130 produtos em linha e de fabricação própria. Em nosso portfólio é possível encontrar diversos tratamentos para todos os segmentos do mercado, todas com forte apelo visual e características marcantes, como fragrâncias refinadas, texturas únicas e resultados singulares.

Somos apaixonados pelo que fazemos e estamos sempre em busca do novo. Por isso mesmo, após um longo período de pesquisas, inauguramos nosso centro de desenvolvimento e de fabricação exclusivo, para garantir máxima inovação e qualidade, no nível que nossos consumidores merecem!

Todo o cuidado desenvolvido pela Widi Care tem como propósito promover a beleza de forma inteligente e sustentável. Sempre fomos contra testes em animais, por isso temos orgulho em dizer que somos cruelty free e veganos.

Além disso, somos associados a iniciativas como a "Eu Reciclo" que, através da logística reversa, retira do meio ambiente 100% do plástico que produzimos. Desta forma, podemos colaborar com a reciclagem de plástico no mundo.

Somos uma marca de bem-estar que acredita que TODA BELEZA IMPORTA. Somos plurais e apoiamos a democratização do cuidado capilar, pois não há nada mais encantador que belezas libertas e assumidas com ORGULHO!

Description:
Founded in 2016, MICHE Beauty is on a mission to simplify haircare for individuals of all hair types. With a deep understanding of the complexities associated with hair care, our goal is to provide simple, clean, and effective solutions that cater to the diverse needs of our customers.

Our Philosophy

At MICHE Beauty, we believe that hair care should be straightforward and enjoyable. Our products are designed to eliminate the confusion often associated with hair care routines. We focus on clean ingredients that are safe, effective, and nourishing, ensuring that everyone can find a solution that works for their unique hair needs. 

We take pride in our commitment to inclusivity. Our formulations are tailored to support the various textures and types of hair, allowing everyone to embrace their natural beauty. We celebrate diversity and empower our customers to express themselves through their hair

Our product line includes a range of high-quality hair care solutions, from shampoos and conditioners to styling creams and treatments. Each product is meticulously crafted to ensure it meets our stringent standards for quality and effectiveness. Our formulations are free from harmful chemicals and are designed to hydrate, define, and enhance natural curls while promoting overall hair health.

As we look to the future, MICHE Beauty is excited to continue innovating and expanding our product offerings to meet the evolving needs of our customers. We invite you to join us on this journey toward simplified, inclusive hair care that celebrates the beauty of diversity.

At MICHE Beauty, we are more than just a hair care brand; we are a movement dedicated to celebrating and nurturing the beauty of all hair types.

Name: Hygie31
Description:
With a combined turnover of €3.3 billion and over 1,400 pharmacies represented, Hygie31 is a major player in the healthcare sector, with expertise centred around three key areas:
- Management of the French brands Pharmacie Lafayette (316 pharmacies), Parapharmacie Lafayette, Optique Lafayette (57 stores) and Médical Lafayette (52 stores), as well as the Spanish brand Ecoceutics (134 pharmacies).
- Support for regional groups of traditional pharmacies: Pharmacorp (580 pharmacies), Pharmacyal (155 pharmacies in the Hauts-de-France region), Magdaléon (106 pharmacies in the Grand Est region) and Quartz (115 pharmacies).
- E-commerce, encompassing its B2C sites cocooncenter.com, parapharmacielafayette.com, and Pascal Coste Shopping, as well as its B2B platform Distrimed, one of France’s leading online distributors of medical devices for healthcare professionals.
Hygie31 aims to make healthcare accessible to as many people as possible, and to strengthen the role of pharmacies as the primary point of contact for healthcare in Europe. 
The strength and consistency of its networks, along with its strong online presence, make it the leading player in pharmacy and wellness in France.
With the backing of its financial shareholders, Latour Capital and BPI France, Hygie31 aims to pursue external growth operations in France and internationally, with the goal of developing a truly European healthcare ecosystem.

Name: Rahua Beauty
Description:
CEW Mission Based Brand Award Winner 2020 

For centuries in the Amazon, women from the Quechua-Shuar tribes traveled deep into the Amazon rainforest to follow a beauty ritual and prepare a highly potent, restorative oil they call Rahua (ra-wa) – believing it to be the secret to their thick, flowing and lustrously shiny hair.

 In the 1990’s these women shared Rahua’s power with renowned New York stylist and colorist Fabian Lliguin, a native Ecuadorian of Quechua descent.

 Intrigued, Lliguin studied Rahua’s revitalizing effects on his own clients’ hair. Dry, damaged strands sprang to life with renewed, bouncy elasticity. Hair color remained vibrantly true and shiny. Long hair became super healthy and irritated scalps were calmed under Rahua’s soothing care.

Based in New York City, Lliguin and his partner Anna Ayers founded Amazon Beauty Inc. and Rahua its premier hair and body care brand.

The key to Rahua’s outstanding performance is its molecular structure. Unlike other botanical oils that simply coat strands, the extraordinarily small Rahua oil molecule rich with omega-9 deeply penetrates the hair’s cortex – bonding and repairing it – while simultaneously smoothing the hair’s cuticle.
