PLUS VRAI.
Le Petit Olivier prend racine dans une Provence vraie et a à cœur de respecter la Nature et l’Humain.
Nos produits sont créés à Salon de Provence et fabriqués en France. Notre moulin à huile d’olive, situé dans le Sud de la France à Saint-Bonnet-du- Gard, nous permet d’intégrer notre propre huile d’olive dans les produits de notre gamme olive.

PLUS NATUREL.
Les formules Le Petit Olivier sont les plus naturelles possible et intègrent un fort pourcentage d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle.
Ils répondent à une charte de formulation exigeante, disponible en toute transparence sur notre site internet www.lepetitolivier.fr

PLUS SENSORIEL.
Nous sélectionnons des ingrédients d’origine naturelle et travaillons nos textures avec soin pour toujours plus de plaisir.
Des parfums rémanents issus de la région de la Grasse. Nos formules sont réalisées avec précision pour allier sensation de bien-être et efficacité du résultat.

PLUS ÉTHIQUE.
Le Petit Olivier s’est depuis toujours positionné contre les tests sur les animaux. Ainsi, la marque est labellisée One Voice depuis 2001.
Attaché à son origine, Le Petit Olivier s’engage pour la sauvegarde et la restauration du patrimoine naturel Provençal à travers un partenariat avec l’ONF.

Name: DE RUY
Description:
De Ruy es una compañía familiar española altamente especializada en el desarrollo, fabricación y distribución de proyectos integrales de perfumería, cosmética, higiene personal y ambientación de hogar, que ha logrado consolidarse en la última década como una de las empresas del sector con mejor trayectoria y crecimiento internacional.

De Ruy fabrica y distribuye una gran variedad de productos cosméticos y es líder en la fabricación de perfumería fina, aplicando los estándares de calidad más restrictivos de su sector y cumpliendo con todas las normas que los regulan. Sus marcas y los proyectos que desarrolla para terceros hacen que sus productos estén presentes en más de 150 países.

La firma cuenta con reconocidas marcas propias y licenciadas. Las principales que se comercializan en España son Gisèle Denis, Nike, Brummel, Titto Bluni, Zinnia, Sportman, Impacto, Anouk, 1916, Spagnolo, Coronel Tapiocca, Javier Larrainzar, Elio Berhanyer, Farala, Giovanna De Ruy o Privata, entre otras.

Name: Memo Paris
Description: "The Journey is the destination" is Memo's motto: the time of the journey is an integral part of the experience, it is essential for the encounter with beauty to occur. Creating a perfume is part of the same movement; it is also a matter of patience and high standards in order to achieve the desired olfactory landscape. It is faithful to this vision of beauty that Memo redraws the map of a sensitive world rich in emotions, by creating a unique olfactory world map.

Name: DEREX
Description:
EXPERTOS EN DERMOFARMACIA

Somos un laboratorio de formulación cosmética y fabricación a terceros que, desde el año 1982, ha desarrollado una amplia y reconocida trayectoria en el área de la dermofarmacia y cosmética especializada.

Nuestra filosofía es avanzar en la dirección que necesiten nuestros clientes para crecer y maximizar su valor, ayudándoles a lograr sus objetivos de negocio y a convertirse en las compañías que quieran ser, transmitiendo el entusiasmo, la alegría y la pasión que sentimos por lo que hacemos.

Contamos con los más altos estándares de I+D que nos impulsan a conseguir la máxima calidad en todos nuestros procesos, apostando por la innovación como concepto clave para generar negocio, nuevos conceptos, formulaciones y productos novedosos. Todo ello gracias a nuestro equipo multidisciplinar, conformado por experimentados farmacéuticos, biólogos y químicos, factor clave y diferenciador en el logro de una cosmética de resultados dentro de un marco de máxima calidad, eficacia y seguridad.

Nuestra infraestructura y nuestro equipamiento están en constante desarrollo y ampliación, dotándonos de una amplia capacidad y flexibilidad productiva.

Ofrecemos propuestas de valor basadas en la escucha y en el diálogo, desarrollando los productos bajo estricto rigor farmacéutico, adaptados a las necesidades de la piel, y con fórmulas eficaces e innovadoras, siguiendo las tendencias del mercado.

Name: Nimbarka
Description:
Nimbarka is an eco-friendly cosmetic brand that blends nature and skincare. We get our beautiful name from the words; ‘Neem’ - a medicinal ayurvedic plant and ‘Arka’ refers to the sun. Doesn't that beautifully sum up our brand as a whole? 
If you like to indulge in cosmetics that are cruelty-free, naturally extracted, and chemical-free, you’ve come to the right place. The consistency of Neem in every Nimbarka product makes our range of products the best choice for your skin care needs - because consistency is key! 
Join the Nimbarka family today! Here’s to a better lifestyle.

Name: Unifarco España
Description:
Unifarco es una comunidad científica farmacéutica formada por más de 6.400 farmacias independientes en Europa que apuestan por un proyecto de marca propia y comparten valores farmacéuticos que implican trabajar por y para la calidad de vida de las personas.

Desde su nacimiento en las Dolomitas de Belluno (Italia) en 1982, Unifarco se caracteriza por la unión de la tradición galénica y la innovación científica. Inspirados por los recursos de la naturaleza y movidos por el espíritu innovador de la investigación, Unifarco cuenta con una gama de más de 250 productos de dermocosmética, complementos alimenticios y productos sanitarios que formula y fabrica de forma exclusiva para sus farmacias seleccionadas en Italia, España, Francia, Alemania, Austria, Bélgica y Suiza. 

Sostenibilidad, ética, eficacia y seguridad son palabras que representan la filosofía de Unifarco y que, junto a su pasión por la investigación científica, permiten que la compañía ofrezca productos que cumplen con los estándares de calidad más exigentes (GMP, Calidad ISO 9001, Gestión Ambiental ISO 14001, Salud y Seguridad en el trabajo OHSAS 18001).

En Unifarco defendemos los valores farmacéuticos y la importancia del consejo profesional y personalizado propio del canal farmacia. El consejo farmacéutico, unido a fórmulas eficaces y seguras, es el camino para promover el bienestar, la salud y la belleza.

Name: KORA Organics
Description:
At KORA Organics, we believe everything we use can be powerful, gentle, and effective without compromising your health or our planet.
 
Our mission it to harness the very best of nature to deliver immediate and visibly glowing results using the highest quality certified organic ingredients. We are good for the Earth, healthy for your body, and uplifting for your senses.
 
A letter from our Founder and CEO, Miranda Kerr:
“When I was 16, my mother was diagnosed with cancer, and I started to take a closer look at what I was putting in and on my body. This sparked my lifelong passion for organic ingredients and holistic health.
 
Over the years, I found there wasn’t anyone creating certified organic and effective skincare and in 2009, I decided to make my own. After three years of partnering with some of the best chemists in the natural space, I launched a range of skincare that followed both the strictest global standards of safety and the highest levels of clinical performance for healthy, glowing skin.
 
Today we’re in 30 countries and growing—using sustainable organic harvesting practices that result in less waste for the planet, without toxins on your skin and up to 60% more antioxidants.
 
I’m so proud of what we’ve created and for uou to experience the power of organics.”

Name: SKINDERMA - Medical Cosmetics
Description:
Marmelant SL is a experienced company in the aesthetic sector, specialized in the manufacture of mesotherapy and virtual mesotherapy treatments and equipment and also several other aesthetic medical products such as peeling solutions and homecare lotions. We are the owners, shareholders and producers of SKINDERMA Medical Cosmetics which has in it’s portfolio a wide range of products that add medical value to the different aesthetic treatments. 
All our products are based on pharmaceutical developments, and we use high standard up to date ingredients. Innovation, quality, and safety of all our products are our differentiation in the worldwide aesthetic and medical market. The products are manufactured only according to the pharmaceutical GMP standards and requirements for sterile products.

SKINDERMA Medical Cosmetics is positioned internationally as a benchmark brand that provides cutting edge aesthetic portfolio, and medical value-added products with high quality and high safety profile.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MATIS PARIS
Description: Matis marque de cosmétiques 100% française. Spécialiste en soins professionnels et Beauty Expert depuis 1936.

Name: ERKUL KOZMETİK SAN. VE TİC A.Ş
Description:
Erkul Kozmetik kurulduğu 1983 yılından beri kaliteli üretim ve uygun fiyat ilkesiyle dünya kozmetik sektörünün önemli kuruluşları arasındadır. 30 yıllık deneyimi ile sektörün öncü kuruluşu olan Erkul Kozmetik; Golden Rose, Classics, Miss Selene ve Emily markaları ile oje, ruj, maskara, far, allık, fondöten ve lipgloss gibi renkli kozmetik ürünlerinin üretimi konusunda faaliyet gösteren yüzde yüz Türk sermayeli bir şirkettir.

Oje üretiminde dünyanın 5 büyük üreticisinden biri olan Erkul Kozmetik, Avrupa, BDT ülkeleri, Balkanlar, Ortadoğu, Kuzey Afrika ve Amerika olmak üzere 5 Kıtada 90'dan fazla ülkeye ihracat yaparak başarısını sınır ötesine taşımıştır.

Dört yıldır Türkiye'de kozmetik ihracatında birinci sırada yer alarak büyük başarıya imza atan Erkul Kozmetik bu başarısı ile ülke ekonomisine de destek sağlamaktadır.

Erkul Kozmetik Türkiye genelinde GR ve Emily markalarıyla parfümeri, eczane ve zincir marketlerden oluşan 7500'ü aşkın satış noktasıyla ve Golden Rose markasıyla 25 seçkin AVM'de yer alan kendi mağazalarıyla yaygın bir satış ağına sahiptir.

Erkul Kozmetik toplamda 70.000 m2'yi bulan entegre üretim tesislerinde kozmetik, plastik ambalaj ve parfüm üretimlerini gerçekleştirmektedir.

Kozmetik üretimi, İstanbul'da 36.000 m2'lik kapalı alanda, sahip olduğu ISO 22716:2007 Cosmetic-GMP, HELAL/HALAL (MS 1500:2009) ve ISO 9001:2008 Kalite Yönetim Sistemleri doğrultusunda, hijyen koşulları altında, üretim teknolojisindeki çağdaş yaklaşımla ileri teknoloji kullanılarak yapılmaktadır.

Erkul Kozmetik konusunda uzman ve deneyimli bir ekiple sürdürdüğü AR-GE çalışmalarını tüketiciye sunmadan önce EU Direktifleri doğrultusunda akredite laboratuarlarda test ettirmektedir ve satışa sunulan her bir ürünün Ürün Güvenlik dosyasına sahiptir. Erkul Kozmetik 30 yıllık deneyiminin gücüyle kaliteyi hedefleyerek sürekli gelişmekte ve güzellikler dünyasındaki yolculuğuna devam etmektedir.

Name: HouseOfMakeup.com
Description:
PERFORMANCE-FIRST, 100% CLEAN MAKEUP. NO COMPROMISES.

At House Of Makeup we have one mission: To make premium-quality makeup accessible to all. We believe makeup should be harm-free, high in performance, and affordable. All three together. No excuses, no compromises.

All House OF Makeup products are 100% clean, vegan, and free from animal cruelty. 

We’re India’s first brand to follow the heavily regulated EU Cosmetic Directive that bans over 1300+ toxic ingredients in makeup formulations.

The House Of Makeup Journey:

•	2019: Launched with x SKUs in retail outlets by Harlin Sachdeva (ex-Nykaa, 
 ex-Sugar Cosmetics, ex-Unilever)

•	2019: Was, and still is, India’s first clean makeup brand to follow the EU Cosmetic Directive that bans 1300+ toxic ingredients

•	2020: Opened our online store during the Covid-19 pandemic

•	2020 – 2022: Stayed cash positive through the pandemic with 70% of sales coming through our proprietary website

•	2022: Closed our first pre-series A funding round

•	2023: Relaunched with an expanded portfolio of products

This is just the beginning—we're committed to doing more and better. Stay tuned.

Name: PAT McGRATH LABS
Description:
Pat McGrath DBE is the world’s most influential and sought-after makeup artist whose vision and creative power has transformed the beauty industry on a global scale. Founded in 2015, PAT McGRATH LABS, unlocks the history of her illustrious career - exploring her artistry and revealing the must-have formulations she developed and perfected behind the scenes during 30 years of working with the most prestigious fashion designers and media outlets.

Born from McGrath’s obsession with technology and innovation, PAT McGRATH LABS focuses on developing products that are truly transformative. Using the highest-quality pigments and ingredients, McGrath is proud to create visually-stunning, versatile products that perform exceptionally on everyone, anywhere.

PAT McGRATH LABS aims to revolutionise the industry and empower people all over the globe to push the boundaries of  beauty. To help makeup lovers of all skill levels fuel their fantasies and express their individuality through makeup. And, most importantly, to encourage them to USE WITHOUT CAUTION.

Name: RIVAGE - Natural Dead Sea Minerals
Description: Rivage  discovered a mysterious and calming place known for it’s unique concentration of mineral rich water and mud. The Dead Sea is a wonder filled with infinite benefits for the skin and hair. At Rivage Laboratories, we researched the effect of minerals on the skin’s natural renewal, and optimized the effectiveness of the active minerals with a selection of 60 world plants. The blend of nature helps balance skin moisture, delay signs of ageing and revitalize the skin naturally. With continuous research, we created an efficient line of facial, body and hair care products that give miraculous results. Skin naturally becomes softer, replenished and radiant.

Name: VEDIC LAB
Description:
We all live in a world filled with much more stress than we can process. The excess cortisol released is a leading cause of accelerated aging, negatively impacting our skin, hair and wellbeing. 

Ayurveda is a spectacular natural health system that knows how to deal with this issue. At VEDIC LAB, we power up Ayurveda’s 5000 years of natural wisdom with advanced Swiss biotechnology to create products that delivered results in just 1 month. We call this natural, holistic approach: Ayurvedic Dermatology. 

Our solutions are unique, compromise free and truly effective.
 Best in industry clinical results.
 95% - 100% natural ingredients that don’t stress our bodies more.
 95%+ plastic free, 100% recyclable packaging that don’t stress our planet more.

With our purposeful approach and multiple patent-filed solutions, there’s no compromise between natural ingredients & breakthrough clinical results.

We are based in Switzerland with global team and supporters, and are always on the lookout for passionate members to join our journey. Follow us on LinkedIn for regular updates.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: IL Cosmetics
Description:
Established in 1984, headquartered in Luxembourg, IL COSMETICS GROUP is a leading company in the B2B NAIL POLISH and MAKE-UP industry.

With 650 employees, production unit in Luxembourg and filling units in Poland and Bulgaria, we’re a leading manufacturer of NAIL POLISH, GEL POLISH, MASCARA, LIQUID LIPSTICK, LIP GLOSS AND EYELINER. We work with clients all around the world offering FULL SERVICE SOLUTIONS, BULK AND COMPONENTS.

For 40 years, we have gathered valuable product expertise and market know-how which promote ourselves to be a responsible and reliable supplier. As a globally recognized manufacturer, IL Cosmetics Group adheres and complies with strict European regulations.

We are a growing company in constant innovation and love to give the opportunity for talents who are passionate about beauty. Feel free to follow and join us!

We make a difference from within!

Name: BÖRLIND
Description: Wir sind ein erfolgreiches, mittelständisches Familienunternehmen mit Sitz im Nordschwarzwald, das eine breite Palette von hochwertigen kosmetischen Produkten unter den bekannten Markennamen ANNEMARIE BÖRLIND – Natural Beauty und DADO SENS DERMACOSMETICS herstellt und weltweit im selektiven Fachhandel und in autorisierten Online Kanälen vertreibt. Unser kontinuierliches Wachstum verdanken wir unseren über 200 Mitarbeitern, die durch ihren Einsatz jeden Tag ein Stück an unserer 60-jährigen Börlind-Erfolgsgeschichte mitwirken.

Name: Naïf Good Care (B Corp)
Description:
Naïf is on a mission to help all parents take good care without worries. That means personal care products that are safe, soft, good for the (baby) skin while minimizing our impact on the environment.

We believe in a world where personal care can be good care. A world where only the best ingredients are used for your baby’s skin, and where microplastics are not found in your care products. A world where your UV filter does not damage the coral reefs and where good care entails more than taking care of your kids; it’s taking care of the environment and the world they grow up in.

We worry about the ingredients and the environment, so you don’t have to. And we can promise you one thing: we will never sell anything we wouldn’t use on our own kids.

Name: InglotCosmetics
Description:
INGLOT Company was established over 25 years ago by Wojtek Inglot, a young chemist working at that time in R&D department in pharmaceutical company.

His principal objective was to produce high quality products at fair and reasonable prices, using only the best possible ingredients and raw materials from the most reputable suppliers.
Wojtek Inglot is still directly involved in the formulation and design process of all new Inglot products.
All Inglot cosmetics are produced within the European Union and 95% of them are manufactured in our own state of the art production facilities.

We work with make-up artists and colour consultants to bring the latest trends in colour, texture and form to the market. We are constantly developing new products and have just launched the world’s first ever Breathable Nail Enamel ensuring better health care for nails whilst enhancing their beauty.

Our unique Freedom System allows customers to experiment with countless shades and colour combinations of different face products, giving them the opportunity to create their own customized colour palette.
We are present in 280 retail locations worldwide.

Name: INULA
Description: The Inula Group was born from the union of Pranarôm and HerbalGem, two pioneering laboratories in the field of natural therapies founded respectively in 1985 and 1986 in Belgium. Inula is now a key international player in growing herbal remedies market. The group specializes in the most promising sub-segments of natural therapies such as aromatherapy, gemmotherapy and Bach flowers, through its three brands: Pranarôm, HerbalGem and Biofloral. Driven by the strength of its recognized scientific positioning and the quality of its products, the group has grown exceptionally during the past 15 years and is now present in more than 25 countries, with leading positions in France, Belgium, Spain, Italy and the United States.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Pure Skincare Cosmecéutica
Description:
PURE Skincare es una distribuidora de cosmecéuticos. Actualmente somos los distribuidores oficiales por España para las marcas: Medik8, Perricone MD, RevitaLash Advanced, ReGenesis, Skinrölla, Magnfibres y Lycogel.

Somos una empresa joven, dinámica, con una filosofía de trabajo clara y consolidada, formada por un equipo de personas con inquietudes, una gran experiencia en el sector y con un único objetivo, compartir con el mercado profesional de la estética y medicina estética la mayor innovación cosmecéutica actual.

Fruto de la insistencia y perseverancia en la búsqueda de una cosmética diferenciada, que no solo se distinga en el marketing e inversiones publicitarias millonarias, PURE Skincare Cosmecéutica ha conseguido traer a España dos de las marcas de cosmecéutica más innovadoras, Medik8 Skincare Biotechnology y Perricone MD. Los tratamientos y principios activos de estas dos marcas ofrecen resultados únicos, contrastados y duraderos. Más de 200 patentes se unen en una única empresa PURE Skincare Cosmecéutica para ofrecer a nuestros clientes la tecnología cosmética más puntera y avanzada.

Name: MyOrigines
Description:
Parfum, soin, maquillage, capillaire, parapharmacie.
Chez MyOrigines, on réunit les marques iconiques et les pépites confidentielles.
Plus de 2 millions de clients partagent notre passion pour une beauté experte, à prix juste, toute l’année.

Fragrance, skincare, makeup, haircare, parapharmacy.
At MyOrigines, we bring together iconic brands and rare gems.
Over 2 million customers share our passion for expert beauty at a fair price, all year round.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MS GLOW Beauty
Description: MS GLOW Official

Name: Anna Pegova
Description:
ANNA PEGOVA - UMA VIDA DEDICADA À BELEZA
Como preservar a beleza e a juventude. Esta sempre foi a principal preocupação de ANNA PEGOVA. A resposta a esta dúvida chegou cedo e a menina nascida na Rússia no ano de 1896 consagrou a sua vida à estética, se dedicando principalmente a criar novos conceitos e métodos de beleza.

Name: Sun Theory
Description: Sun Theory is a wellness-focused consumer brand platform built on disciplined capital allocation. We look for long-term macro trends such as evolving consumer behaviors, rising health priorities, and shifting regulatory landscapes that we believe will fundamentally strengthen the industries we target. Our approach is straightforward—partner with exceptional management teams, focus on markets with clear rules and attractive economics, and invest in businesses with structural advantages that strengthen over time.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NOBILIS GROUP
Description:
NOBILIS GROUP GmbH is the leading beauty distributor in the German-speaking region and has been operating successfully in the beauty market for over 30 years.

Due to our comprehensive expertise and deep understanding of the market, we recognize, cultivate and continuously expand the potential of each individual brand. Visions meet experience, professionalism meets impulses, competence meets current trends: this combination is the NOBILIS Group's recipe for success.

Our mission statement "For the love of perfume..." underlines our deep passion for the beauty industry and the high standards of the art of perfumery.

Name: LAO Care
Description:
L'Audace que vos cheveux méritent.

LAO Care est né d'une compréhension unique de la physiologie du cuir chevelu et du cheveu. 
C'est une marque experte et spécialisée qui développe ses propres technologies brevetées de protection et de régénération de la fibre capillaire et les intègre dans des formules précises à l'efficacité prouvée : 100% d'origine naturelle, vegan, bio et fabriquées en france.

Name: GIGOT Cosméticos
Description:
Somos una Empresa de cosmética 100% Argentina ,fundada en el año 1980. Comercializamos nuestros productos a través del sistema de venta directa y contamos con una amplia red de Revendedoras a lo largo de todo el país.

Con una sólida trayectoria en el mercado nacional podemos asegurar que nuestra experiencia nos ayuda a brindar un servicio cada día mejor sin perder la calidez de nuestro origen familiar.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: NATURIUM
Description: NATURIUM is a skincare brand that offers a suite of biocompatible skincare products. NATURIUM offers elegant, high-tech formulas at a price that can fit most budgets. Body wash and lotion, cleansers, moisturizers, serums, face oil, lip balm, and eye cream are among its skincare and body care products.

Name: Origins
Description: Origins is a skincare and body care company that offers nature-infused products. They provide a range of skincare products categorized by type, concern, and collection, including moisturizers, serums, cleansers, masks, and more. Origins also offers bath and body products with mesmerizing aromas. The company focuses on natural ingredients and skincare routines, providing tips and guides for customers. Additionally, Origins features stories and articles on skincare tips, how-to's, and natural ingredients.

Name: Coterie
Description:
We’re Coterie—we engineer clean, high-performing diapering essentials to make your journey into parenthood a little easier.

Coterie is part of Mammoth Brands, the modern CPG company.

Name: Ajmal Perfumes India
Description:
A connoisseur in the art of perfumery, Ajmal is a fragrance which has lingered on for 72 years.
#AjmalPerfumesIN

Name: Purity Cosmetics (100% PURE)
Description:
Purity Cosmetics is a fast growing prestige cosmetic company managing and launching brands including our flagship brand, 100% Pure. Inspired by her garden, product developer Susie Wang created 100% Pure Cosmetics to complement her healthy lifestyle. Made with pigments from fruits and vegetables along with nature's best resources, 100% Pure marries all-natural ingredients with high-end cosmetic formulas to create beauty in a class of its own.

We sell through multiple channels of distribution including specialty beauty retailers, spas and salons, our company owned boutiques and online shopping. We are a small company that is growing very rapidly. Every year we launch 30-50 new products across our brands in color cosmetics, hair care, skin care, and bath & body. Our company is founded by innovators and formulators that allow us to create the absolute best cosmetic products in the world!

Name: Athenas Indústria e Terceirização de Cosméticos
Description:
Com mais de 20 anos no mercado de Cosméticos, a Athenas desenvolve produtos para cada necessidade de seus clientes. Transformando ideias em realidade. https://www.instagram.com/athenasterceirizacao/



 Com qualidade reconhecida, atualmente fabrica de forma terceirizada para inúmeras empresas do mercado, entendendo as necessidades de seus clientes, e primando pela qualidade e atendimento.

PRODUZIMOS:
Ceras, 
Condicionador, 
Cremes 
Perfumaria, 
Pomadas, 
Álcool em gel, 
Sabonete líquido
Produtos bifásicos
Linha oral care.

Nossa fabrica encontra-se sediada na cidade de Caieiras.

Name: Alban Muller
Description: This account is no longer active. Find us at our new home, Croda Beauty, where we look forward to sharing our updates with you.

Name: Esthetic Insights
Description:
Esthetic Insights is an established cosmeceutical company that customizes esthetic solutions for dermatologists & cosmetologists to deliver sustainable results to their clients. We offer professional customization with research-driven & efficacy focused solutions. Backed by dynamic research & innovation, we have built the world's first secured online platform called PRO’CES exclusively for established & emerging skin & hair care professionals.
 
Esthetic Insights evolved from the genesis of PRO’CES that empowers dermatologists & cosmetologists to customize products based on their insights from their professional experiences. Our R&D pioneers in advanced cosmeceutical formulations. Esthetic Insights’ in-house R&D coupled with state of the art manufacturing facility aims at a holistic approach in beauty & wellness.

Our forte for our clients’ is end to end support with

+Insightful Market Research 
+In-house R&D
+State of the art Manufacturing 
+Regulatory Licensing 
+Unique Branding 
+Distinguished Packaging
+Epitome Product Quality
+Robust Supply Chain.

Name: SKINTIFIC Malaysia
Description:
SKINTIFIC | Precise Skincare Formulation for Healthy Skin

At SKINTIFIC, we believe that everyone deserves healthier skin, starting with a strong and resilient skin barrier. Our mission is to revolutionize skincare with smart formulations, pure active ingredients, and advanced technology, making high-performance skincare accessible to all.

Backed by years of research and development, our products are powered by TTE Technology (Trilogy Triangle Effect)—a unique formulation approach that ensures fast, effective results while keeping your skin’s long-term health in mind. No more compromising on safety—our skincare solutions are designed to be effective yet gentle, even for sensitive skin.

Join us on a journey to smarter skincare—where innovation meets skin health for the best results, every time.

#SKINTIFIC #HealthySkin #SmartSkincare #SkinBarrierCare
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Boy Smells
Description: Welcome to the world of Boy Smells filled with scents for every side of you. Sniff, mix, and remix your fragrances to match your energy—your scent, your story.

Name: Salerm Cosmetics
Description: Salerm Cosmetics se posiciona, una vez más, en el mercado como la marca líder de los profesionales de peluquería más exigentes. Salerm Cosmetics, con más de cincuenta años de experiencia, es referente mundial en coloración. En la actualidad, con un nivel de conocimiento del 89% entre los profesionales del cabello, cuenta con una amplia gama de productos, tanto de acabado como de tratamiento, para satisfacer las necesidades no sólo del profesional estilista sino también del cliente final.

Name: Dessange International
Description:
DESSANGE International est le premier réseau d’excellence en beauté globale dans le monde. 
Chaque jour, plus de 120 000 femmes franchissent la porte d’un des salons de beauté du réseau. 

DESSANGE International s’organise autour de 3 pôles d’activités : les services, les produits & la distribution et les licences.
Dans plus de 50 pays, les salons s’appuient sur trois marques complémentaires qui procurent au groupe une couverture parfaite du marché de la coiffure :
- DESSANGE : marque de luxe positionnée sur la beauté globale 
- CAMILLE Albane : coiffeur, coloriste, maquilleur, positionnée haut de gamme.

Name: CTPA - Cosmetic, Toiletry and Perfumery Association
Description:
The Cosmetic, Toiletry & Perfumery Association (CTPA) represents all types of company involved in the UK cosmetics industry.  With the support of its members, the CTPA has cemented its role as the industry’s authoritative, public voice and its commentary is widely regarded as credible by government, European and international stakeholders and the media alike.

The CTPA seeks to develop strong working relationships with a wide range of stakeholders especially on those issues where our expertise can provide added value.  With products that range from daily essentials to those that impart a sense of well-being, the CTPA works with members to promote best practice and understanding of legislative requirements.   The CTPA members’ intranet holds a wealth of information to help busy regulatory and technical departments find the latest news on an issue or reference document.  The public website www.ctpa.org.uk also holds information about the industry and its regulatory framework.

Communicating the safety and efficacy of the industry’s diverse, and growing, range of products is a foundation stone of the CTPA’s work and providing factual information to consumers and the media through a dedicated consumer website, www.thefactsabout.co.uk, is an essential part of this.

L’entreprise Lush a été imaginée avec la volonté d’offrir une alternative responsable aux cosmétiques traditionnels, en proposant des produits de beauté innovants et performants, basés sur un concept unique : une confection à la main et l’utilisation d’ingrédients frais 100% végétariens tels que des fruits et légumes, ainsi que des herbes, des fleurs et des huiles essentielles sourcés de manière éthique.

Name: Lazartigue Paris
Description:
LA BEAUTÉ NATURELLE, DEPUIS LES PREMIERS JOURS

 A l'origine, un nom

Une histoire qui tient à celle d’un homme et son intuition. Coiffeur visionnaire des années 60, Jean-François Lazartigue est l’un des premiers à percevoir les bienfaits des ingrédients botaniques sur la santé du cheveu et à proposer des soins personnalisés. En esquissant les premiers contours d’une beauté saine sur-mesure, Lazartigue posait sans le savoir les fondations de sa maison éponyme. Aujourd’hui, si nous portons toujours son nom c’est qu’il nous tient à cœur de continuer à incarner sa passion et ses valeurs. Son intuition, devenue notre force, façonne depuis plus de quarante ans le succès de chacune de nos formules. Plus qu’une référence, ce nom est l’écho de notre histoire d’hier et de demain. Il est notre promesse, à vous, d’une expertise, d’un respect et d’une naturalité invariables.

Une vision
La nature, tout simplement

En 1963, alors que la mode est aux formulations complexes concentrées en actifs chimiques, Jean-François Lazartigue insuffle au monde de la beauté un nouvel élan à la croisée de l’expertise scientifique et de la connaissance de la nature. Souhaitant créer des formules propres non agressives, il met au point un service de lissage inédit, sans soude et enrichi en beurres naturels, avant de lancer une ligne complète de soins en 1976. Garder l’essentiel, retirer le superflu. Ce premier choix continue de nous inspirer au quotidien. Toutes nos gammes sont formulées à partir de 85% d’actifs d’origine naturelle au moins et contiennent 35% d’ingrédients en moins que les soins conventionnels disponibles sur le marché.

MISSION :
The company's mission statement is to be environmentally friendly, produce only natural and safe products and contribute to community needs. Our practices include a creative achievement of Combining Shea Butter-making techniques and natural herbs from Africa and using traditional African packaging methods with modern techniques. 
 
All Pure Nature And The Environment.

We must all do our bit to preserve the planet by implementing Eco-friendly practices at every opportunity. Meaningful materials that are safe and known for its recyclability, are areas where the company chooses, in order to promote the highest level of environmental responsibility.We do not use any animal content in our products nor do we do any testing on animals. Variations in the color and shape of products are an integral part of the artistic handmade process.

The result is a product made with pure essence, also handmade and fresh. A product line that is pure, unique, natural, ecologically friendly and safe to use.

Name: ECOOKING A/S
Description:
When Tina Søgaard started mixing her own skincare, she wasn't aware that it would eventually turn into a skincare brand. At the time, she had just gone through a difficult divorce, which affected her skin, making it tired and dull. With her many years of experience in the personal care industry, she knew which ingredients would give her skin a much-needed boost. Thus, she began making creams, serums, and oils in her own kitchen.

It did not take long before Tina’s family and friends noticed that her skin had improved significantly. They also wanted to try the products. Helping family and friends with their skin problems became therapeutic for Tina – and even though it was never her intention to sell the products, beauty therapists and stores soon heard about their effect. They became interested in including the skincare products in their assortment.

From then on, things moved quickly, and this is how ECOOKING came about: a Danish skincare brand designed to be, first and foremost, effective, then as natural and organic as possible.

“The basis for healthy skin is to cleanse and moisturise. If you only have time for two steps in your skincare routine, prioritise these two.”
— Tina Søgaard, founder & owner.

Our vision? Make skincare more human. Our mission? Help you achieve more with less through an ethos we call "Supercharged Clinical:” clinically proven actives formulated at maximum concentrations through our own cutting-edge engineering. Multiple benefits in one step for boundary-breaking, long-lasting results – restoring your confidence to lean in, experience life, and be seen.

LÍNEA JÚLIA. Perfumeria Júlia ha apostado por su línea propia, basando su formulación en exhaustivos procesos de selección de los principios activos e ingredientes más novedosos y eficaces, que confieren a la marca un posicionamiento premium.

A flavorous kids toothpaste range is also available, much to the relief of parents who find it easier to coax their children to brush their teeth twice daily.

Bentodent's USP lies in its 100% natural ideology which gives its thinktank the thrust to innovate and come out with unique and ground-breaking solutions. Bentodent is formed by a group of visionary dentists who are all out to change the way the world looks at oral care.

Our products are skin-friendly, free of harsh chemicals, and rooted in natural ingredients. We are proud to be 100% Vegan-Friendly. Our products are available in 30 countries worldwide, and our research team partners with leading research institutions.

GLAMGLOW is based on the STARS WALK OF FAME in HOLLYWOOD with distribution centers in Los Angeles, USA & Paris, France. With chic packaging & highly efficacious ingredients, our MULTI-AWARD WINNING super mask products use patent pending TEAOXI technology for instant visible results & Super-Sexy Super Radiant Skin. 

GLAMGLOW is also available in the following leading hotel properties: W Hotels Worldwide, Wynn, Encore, Four Seasons, Emirates Tower, Grosvenor House, Cosmopolitan, MGM, Bellagio, The Venetian, Caesars Palace, ARIA, Shutters & many more.

GLAMGLOW is a 2012 & 2013 Sephora 'HOT NOW' brand & our new SUPERMUD has fast become a best seller. 

Welcome to GLAMLAND & the World of GLAMGLOW

Name: Keratin Complex
Description:
Our Company
Since the launch of our signature Smoothing Therapy in 2007, Keratin Complex has become the market leader in the smoothing category and has revolutionized the color industry with Color Therapy, a complete keratin-enhanced hair color collection. We continue to develop breakthroughs in keratin technology with the expansion of our professional and retail collections, along with new programs and services that build brand partnerships, enhance stylists’ knowledge and skills, and boost salon business. 

Our Mission
We strive for product innovation, educational support and superior results to enhance the craft of cosmetology for the benefit of the salon industry, salon professionals and consumers.

Our Principles
Offer breakthrough technology for superior results
Enhance cosmetologist skills
Develop new services that create value and enhance salon business
Create an inspirational partnership with salon professionals
Assist in elevating the unique culture and business atmosphere of the beauty industry

SMOOTH. REDEFINED. 
 
Keratin Complex’s award-winning Smoothing Therapy continues to be the leader in the professional smoothing category.
 
THE CONCEPT
A revolutionary approach to smoothing. 
 
THE SIGNATURE
Advanced keratin formulations that repair, rejuvenate and protect the hair from further damage. With each treatment, keratin is replenished, leaving the hair smoother, shinier and virtually maintenance-free.
 
THE SCIENCE
Keratin Complex’s innovative technology drives keratin deep into the hair shaft and then seals it in, effectively blocking humidity from penetrating the hair and thus, locking out frizz.

The more the hair is treated with our signature keratin, the healthier-looking it becomes.

Name: Emirates Pride Perfumes
Description:
Emirates Pride Perfumes is a homegrown fragrance house born in the UAE, inspired by the region’s rich heritage and deep appreciation for fine perfumery. Built on authenticity, craftsmanship, and innovation, we create timeless scents that reflect individuality and modern elegance.

With an expanding network of flagship stores and retail outlets across the GCC, Emirates Pride continues to grow as a trusted name in luxury perfumery. Our official website – www.emiratespride.ae
 – extends this experience globally, offering effortless access to our exclusive perfume collections and signature creations.

Every fragrance we craft tells a story — one of passion, heritage, and pride — blending tradition with a contemporary vision of excellence.

Emirates Pride Perfumes — Where authenticity meets aspiration.

Name: Alkemilla Eco Bio Cosmetic
Description:
ALKEMILLA Eco Bio Cosmetic è un’azienda Italiana impegnata nella produzione di cosmetici biologici con l'obiettivo di offrire un prodotto sicuro e garantito, rispettoso dell’ambiente e degli animali.
ALKEMILLA Eco Bio Cosmetic unisce nelle sue formulazioni le più innovative tecnologie cosmetiche unite alla preziosa saggezza della natura.
I nostri cosmetici oggi rapprentano la massima garanzia nella cosmesi biologica vantando  certificazioni come  QC CERTIFICAZIONI, AIAB, LAV, QUALITA' VEGANA oltre ad essere testati su Nickel, Cromo e Cobalto con una presenza di metalli pesanti pari allo 0,0001%.
Negli ultimi anni Alkemill ha raggiunto traguardi importanti come:
• Vincere il Premio Sana per l’Innovazione nel Biologico
• Essere nominati Ambasciatori del Biologico all’Ambassador Day
• Entrare nella classifica delle aziende in forte crescita secondo il Sole 24 Ore
• Apparire su Vogue, AdnKronos, DiLei , GreenMe,Donna Moderna ecc..

ALKEMILLA Eco Bio Cosmetic is an Italian company for the production of organic cosmetics with the aim of offering a safe and guaranteed product, respectful of the environment and animals.
Within the ALKEMILLA Eco Bio Cosmetic formulas, cutting-edge cosmetics technology and the precious wisdom of nature are united.
Today, our cosmetics represent the highest level of guarantee offered by organic cosmetics, boasting certification such as QC CERTIFICATIONS, AIAB, LAV and VEGAN QUALITY as well as being tested for Nickel, Chrome and Cobalt with a presence of heavy metals equal to 0.0001%.
We believe that the dedication, constancy and commitment that inspired us to create such a unique product is worth more than a million words…
Alkemilla es una marca italiana de cosméticos y maquillaje con productos naturales y orgánicos certificados de alta calidad e innovadores

Name: Panier des Sens en Provence
Description:
Panier des Sens, Essential by Nature 

Inspired by Mediterranean ingredients and expertise, our skin care line is formulated with natural, simple and authentic active substances and ingredients. By combining research and nature, we use the best that Provence has to offer to develop products with a soft texture and elegant fragrances.

Panier Des Sens deliberately choose the majority of its partners on-site to support local economic development. The brand nurtures sincere relationships with local producers who contribute to the preservation of land, heritage and also local growth.

In the cradle of the high French perfumery, in Grasse, a collective of perfumers recreates a universe of evocative scents from the region, specially formulated for Panier des Sens.

Our creations are rich in active substances and essential oils. In light of our commitment to developing products that are both effective and environmentally friendly, we use highly beneficial natural ingredients instead of synthetic ingredients. We can therefore guarantee that Panier des Sens products are free from:

                            Ø   Parabens
                            Ø   Phenoxyethanol
                            Ø   Silicone
                            Ø   Aluminum

Panier des Sens products are not tested on animals.

Name: L:A BRUKET
Description:
Natural skincare made in Sweden with a simple philosophy: Innovation driven by nature.

Wind, mud, salt, rock, ice, sand, water and sun in a tangle of continuous change: Swedish nature isn’t something you visit, it comes to you whenever you step outside. Under these harsh coastal conditions our skin and hair get weathered, however rather than hide from nature, we turn to it for inspiration and answers.

Since 2008 we have been developing natural formulas to protect and nurture skin and hair, with the understanding that if our products are effective despite the unforgiving conditions, they’ll be of a quality more than capable to meet the demands of any situation and any place.

Our visionary product development work is backed with a well-established knowledge of natural skincare. We are uncompromising when it comes to the purity of our formulas, because to protect and restore your skin, you must nurture it with only the natural molecules it can absorb and utilize to perform better.

Name: Valmari Dermocosméticos
Description:
A Valmari Dermocosméticos iniciou suas atividades em 1980, com o objetivo inicial de manipular fórmulas magistrais dermatológicas. Logo concentrou-se na demanda de consumidores finais e profissionais com uma linha de produtos dedicada ao tratamento estético corporal e facial. Devidos à sua cosmética de vanguarda e produtos inovadores, a Valmari consolidou-se como uma das marcas de maior renome em dermocosméticos."

Missão
Ser agente de transformação na vida de nossas clientestrazendo felicidade e beleza por meio da cosmética de resultado, com produtos inovadores e de alta eficácia.

Visão
Ser a marca referência no mercado de estética, reconhecida pela excelência em seus produtos e pela paixão no desenvolvimento e capacitação de seus clientes internos e externos.

Valores
CLIENTE: mantemos parcerias e compromissos duradouros.
RESPEITO: valorizamos ao máximo as relações e o potencial humano.
ETICA: somos corretos e honrados com os valores essenciais para a sociedade.
SOLIDEZ: promovemos o crescimento sustentável baseado na excelência operacional.
CREDIBILIDADE: acreditamos na transparência em nossas relações.
EQUIPE: sabemos que pertencemos a um todo, buscando uma meta em comum.
RESULTADO: garantimos resultados crescentes gerando valor para clientes, acionistas e colaboradores.

Name: Ursa Major Skincare
Description:
We’re a small, fast-growing company in Vermont crafting awesome natural skin care products for folks who want to live simply, but well. 

Our business is cranking along because we have a clear vision, great products, crazy loyal customers and a team that loves to serve them. We have an ambitious mission and we’re always looking for kind, motivated, smart people to join our growing team. 

Tired of the big city life? Love the idea of working for a small, thriving company with the Green Mountains right out the back door? Give us a holler—we made the move and never looked back.

Name: Skin Rocks
Description:
Skin is the foundation.

Founded by Caroline Hirons, Skin Rocks is the destination for knowledge that’s vast, guidance that’s clear and products that work. With a lifetime of skincare knowledge, Caroline is known for sharing her honest insights and products that cut straight to the result — Skin Rocks is an extension of that. We make skincare make sense, putting you at the heart of everything we do and empowering you to look after your skin. 
 
An edit and a shortcut, an education and a guide, a community and a movement, we work with scientists, formulators, brand owners and clinicians that make the most effective products on the market. We’ll only recommend what’s right for your skin type. We’ll make sure we explain everything clearly. We’ll tell you when you don’t need something. And we’ll never promise that a product will do something it doesn’t do. Knowledge is power, after all.

Name: Perfume Holding
Description:
Perfume Holding is an international player in the fragrance and cosmetic industry. 
The Group takes its origin from Morris Profumi, founded in 1946 in Parma by Giuseppe Borri and has a track record of more than 60 years in the perfumes industry.
Perfume Holding is one of the few medium size companies in the world that can offer a complete integration from creation and production up to full distribution and direct operations in the most important areas of the world.
With a well balanced mix of Italian and French culture, Perfume Holding can compete with big players offering:
- Creation: based in Parma, the cradle of the best noses and perfume designers in the world;
- Manufacturing: based in Parma, one of the state-of-the-art district worldwide for perfume manufacturing;
- Distribution: excellent partners and direct subsidiary in key countries.
Our portfolio brands includes: Atkinsons1799, Ferrari, Liu Jo, I Coloniali, Iceberg, Sergio Tacchini and, starting 2016, Bikkembergs.
Perfume Holding is controlled by Investindustrial, an investment company led by Andrea Bonomi, and the Orlando fund, which is headed in Italy by Enrico Ceccato, who is also chairman of Perfume Holding.

Name: Setu Nutrition
Description:
Setu is a new age brand of nutrition supplements to address challenges and solve problems, which are a consequence of our modern lifestyle. 
Setu’s advanced solutions are crafted to strengthen body functions to solve and check conditions induced by present-day lifestyles. With four decades of global experience in manufacturing the most optimal natural ingredients, we make nature more efficacious through modern technology and nutritional science. Setu is bringing together its strengths in ingredient technology and years of consumer understanding to the digital industry with an intention to democratise choices for consumers by building the most imperative tool - knowledge.

OmniActive, our parent company, is an ingredient supplier of trust and choice to innovators across the dietary supplement and functional food sphere globally. Our lineage began with Bombay Oil Industries Limited, an agro-commodities trading house that has spawned successful agro-based businesses including Marico, Kancor Ingredients, OmniActive Health Technologies, Keya Foods and Eternis Fine Chemicals.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Simply Organic Beauty
Description:
At Simply Organic Beauty, we are a company of passionate individuals driven by our mission to change salons for the better, for our world. 

We curate, create and distribute an exclusive collection of professional, plant-based beauty and wellness products from around the world. 

Simply Organic and our family of prestigious brands have become synonymous with safety, quality, and luxury, and we are excited to continue to service the growing demand for clean beauty products that promote the health of people, the planet and beauty professionals.

Name: MONDAY Haircare
Description:
MONDAY is making every day a good hair day with our award-winning, accessible haircare. With praise from Vogue, Vanity Fair, Forbes, WWD, Allure, ELLE, Glamour and Refinery29—and as the #1 most-loved haircare brand on TikTok—ours is cult haircare without the cult price tag. 

‘Exclusive’ has long been a buzzword in beauty, but by definition that means someone is always left out. We're part of a more democratic beauty movement, breaking down price barriers to make premium haircare with modern values accessible to more people.

Our Leaping Bunny-approved range can be found in 33 countries and more than 50,000 doors with over 100 of the world's biggest retailers, including Amazon, Walmart, Costco, Target, Tesco, Ulta Beauty, ASOS and H&M. Our offices span Sydney, Auckland, Los Angeles, Shanghai, Shenzhen, Ho Chi Minh City, Hong Kong, Copenhagen, Chicago and Ontario.

Called “a cult favourite”, “global phenomenon” and “a coup in the beauty industry”, MONDAY has garnered over eight billion media impressions and received several accolades including coveted beauty awards from Cosmo, Glamour and InStyle.

Our instantly recognisable pink bottles are proudly made using recycled plastic and are fully recyclable, to minimise our carbon footprint and reduce landfill. But we’re more than what’s in our bottles. We’re building a community of like-minded women led by our MONDAY Muses—including entrepreneur Meena Harris and celebrity hairstylist Jenna Perry.

Want to join us in our mission? We’d love to hear from you: hello@mondayhaircare.com

Name: Avatim
Description: Somos uma marca brasileira que traz, em seu nome e essência,a relação com o que temos de mais importante: a natureza e as nossas raízes. Nos inspiramos em toda riqueza da biodiversidade brasileira para desenvolver os mais de 400 produtos em nosso portfólio. Pioneiros no mercado de aromatização de ambientes, criamos produtos para cuidados pessoais e para a casa. Aqui não fazemos testes em animais, não usamos parabenos nos produtos e garantimos a neutralização anual das emissões de carbono. Atualmente, temos mais de 300 lojas em 26 estados do Brasil, além de uma rede com mais de 3 mil revendedores e distribuidores. Em 2023, concretizamos a nossa internacionalização, com lojas em Lisboa, Portugal.

Description: PT Brighty was founded in 2020 and continues to grow to this day, becoming the top selling brand in Indonesia's Shopee with the "Best Selling Underarm Whitening" category.

Name: PHARMAZON
Description:
Pharmazon, entreprise créée à Orléans (Loiret) en 2015, négocie, achète et stocke pour le compte de pharmacies plus de 15 000 références - soit un peu plus de 250 fournisseurs - de médicaments non remboursables, produits de parapharmacie, hygiène et beauté, compléments alimentaires, dispositifs médicaux et produits vétérinaires. Pharmazon a été créé par Audrey Lecoq avec une idée simple qui a révolutionné le circuit de distribution des pharmacies : gérer les approvisionnements des officines via un site Internet réservé à ses membres pharmaciens.
L’entrée à son capital en 2019 de Cegedim, acteur majeur dans le domaine de la santé, permet à Pharmazon de poursuivre sa croissance en accompagnant ses adhérents dans le développement de la vente en ligne en ouvrant sa plateforme au grand public via le site pharmazon.fr. Un site 100% solidaire et engagé où 100% des ventes sont au bénéfice des pharmaciens.
Enfin, pour améliorer le pouvoir d’achat des Français et leur accès aux soins, Pharmazon est en train de passer des accords avec les Comités sociaux et économiques (ex-CE) d’entreprises. www.pharmazon.fr
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Voluspa
Description:
Voluspa began as a passion project in a California kitchen, driven by a deep love for scent and the way it connects each other to the world around us. What started as a small, handcrafted collection quickly grew into a global celebration of fragrance, designed to inspire and transport.

At the heart of every Voluspa creation is a belief that fragrance has the power to take us on a journey. Whether evoking a moment in time, a place, or a vivid daydream, each scent is meticulously crafted to spark the senses and expand the mind.

Crafted in Irvine, California, our candles and fragrances are designed with impeccable attention to detail. From sourcing the finest ingredients to perfecting every note, we ensure each collection is an experience of luxury, artistry, and elegance.

Driven by a dedicated team with a wealth of expertise, Voluspa continues to grow while staying true to our roots. Our mission is to bring beauty and inspiration into your home, illuminating your space and enhancing your everyday moments.

Name: Rituals Cosmetics DACH (B Corp)
Description:
Rituals Cosmetics ist eine Marke, die sich für nachhaltiges und persönliches Wohlbefinden in der Luxuskosmetikbranche einsetzt. Als einer der führenden Begründer der Integration von Bad-, Home- und Körperpflege in einem einzigen Portfolio, verkörpern wir den Lebensstil, tägliche Routinen in bedeutungsvollere Momente zu verwandeln und Glück in den kleinsten Dingen zu finden.

Rituals wurde im Jahr 2000 in Amsterdam gegründet und hat sich seitdem als globaler Branchenexperte mit mehr als 10.000 Mitarbeitenden in über 33 Ländern; mit mehr als 1.100 Shops, über 3.900 Shop-in-Shops, Body Spas und der weltweit ersten Mind Oasis etabliert.

Geleitet von unserer Philosophie, The Art of Soulful Living, ist es unsere Leidenschaft, Menschen auf ihrer Reise zu persönlichem Wohlbefinden zu begleiten. Wir werden von dem Wunsch angetrieben, uns um dich, unsere Kollegen, unsere Kunden und die Welt um uns herum zu kümmern. "Work with heart & soul" bedeutet, unsere Aufgaben mit Leidenschaft, Energie, Zusammengehörigkeit und Spaß zu erfüllen.

Gemeinsam gehen wir die Extrameile. Für die Menschen und den Planeten. Wir setzen dies mit zahlreichen Initiativen um, wie z. B. unserem Net-Zero Commitment und unserem B Corp-Status - was bedeutet, dass wir eine der angesehensten Zertifizierungen im Bereich Nachhaltigkeit und Impact erreicht haben. Weitere Informationen findest du unter https://www.rituals.com/de-de/sustainability-efforts.html

All dies mag nach intensiver Arbeit klingen, aber es lohnt sich. Work with heart & soul bringt Sinn, Neugierde und Empathie in dein tägliches Leben. Es schafft eine unbeschreibliche Verbindung zwischen uns allen und bietet einen Raum, in dem sich jeder entfalten und wachsen kann.

Wie siehst du das? Bist du einfühlsam, ehrgeizig und bereit, mit uns etwas zu bewirken?

Bring your talent, your heart & soul und werde ein Teil von uns. Deine Karriere bei Rituals ist nur einen Klick entfernt - entdecke hier alle Karrieremöglichkeiten: careers.rituals.com

Description:
Vanesa is amongst the oldest and leading aerosol manufacturing companies in India. A Private Label Industry whose objective is to offer the best quality products and services to its customers. With over 60 years of experience in the Aerosol industry, the organization is empowered with a team of 400 skilled manpower. Vanesa provides turnkey solutions, ranging from product development to production, packaging and logistics solution for transportation to your warehouse.
We believe in providing a refreshing environment to our team members, in order to help them with better concentration and focus. Based on the principles of warmness and altruism, we offer a unique workspace so that the employees can complete their work with utter dedication and commitment.

Name: Goa Organics
Description:
A brand for dirty hair and clean consciences.

Yes. Everyone’s hair gets dirty. Some people’s hair frizzes, some breaks… it happened to us too. That’s why we know what everyone needs, but more importantly, what they don’t. Because every big change starts in your head.

Goa Organics, for example, started in ours. A head with undefined, frizzy, fragile, and brittle curly hair. Let’s just say we had a hairy relationship. You probably know what we’re talking about. But we also had a clear idea: to create products that wouldn’t damage our hair or our planet. It seemed impossible, but what change doesn’t seem that way?

After 15 years dedicated to hair cosmetics, working with top chemists, testing and studying, we hadn’t found any product that adapted to our hair. Let alone our ideals! That’s why we decided to create our own products. To help others feel comfortable with their hair. To help them feel confident.

 Less is more: Everything we add to our formulas is as important as everything we exclude. That’s why our products are free from sulfates, parabens, silicones, petrolatum, paraffin, palm oil, mineral oil, aluminum, formaldehyde and its derivatives, DEA, TEA, MEA… 

Care for your hair without harming others: Our products are vegan. This means they haven’t been tested on animals and none of their components come from animals. So you can wash your hair without getting your hands dirty.

 Unravel with care: We like to have fun but we are responsible. That’s why our packaging is made from sugarcane. This way, we avoid using conventional plastics so our products can be recycled and have a second life.

Description:
SAEVE   est la 1ère marque de cosmétiques transmettant à la peau les pouvoirs exceptionnels brevetés anti-oxydants et réparateurs de la Sève fraîche de Bouleau bio  et du Chaga bio , le « champignon de l’immortalité ». Retrouvez-nous en pharmacies et sur www.saeve.com

"Passionnée par la beauté, j’ai développé et inventé pendant 15 ans des crèmes pour les plus jolies marques françaises. J’ai eu envie, au fil des années, d’aborder la beauté autrement, je rêvais d’une beauté végétale mais ultra-performante, de plantes « simples » qui nous entourent mais titrées, de formules naturelles mais très sensorielles, de sérieux mais sans se prendre au sérieux !
Au cœur de chaque soin : la Sève fraîche de Bouleau bio et le Chaga bio (un champignon presque magique qui pousse naturellement sur le bouleau), récoltés en France, notamment dans les forêts d’Auvergne de mon enfance.
Le résultat ? Un brevet exceptionnel pour protéger cette découverte botanique incroyable qui stimule les défenses immunitaires cutanées, protège l’ADN cellulaire et préserve la jeunesse de la peau.
S[æ]ve, ce sont des soins extraordinaires aux plantes (pas si) ordinaires pour rendre la peau plus belle naturellement, quel que soit son âge. A vous de la découvrir, Have fun, have S[æ]ve and S[æ]ve your skin !"

Pauline Bony,
Fondatrice de S[æ]ve.

RoC has been revolutionizing skincare through science-backed innovation since we were founded in France more than 65 years ago. Inspiring a history of firsts has always been our philosophy; we've pioneered breakthrough solutions that have become industry standards:

This commitment has fueled our success – we’re proud to have doubled revenue in five years and secured our position as America's #1 Retinol brand with 20 consecutive quarters of share growth.

Name: Parfums Molinard
Description:
Créé en 1849, Molinard est l’un des plus anciens parfumeurs de l’histoire. Maison Française indépendante, elle est ancrée à Grasse depuis ses origines, capitale mondiale des parfums. La Maison Molinard possède un savoir-faire rare et ancestral, artisanal et industriel, qui se perpétue depuis cinq générations. 

Précurseur dans l’âme, Molinard révolutionne les codes en créant en 1921 Habanita, le premier oriental féminin de l’histoire. Encore aujourd’hui, la Maison se démarque par sa forte créativité olfactive, la sophistication de ses parfums, enrichis des plus belles matières. 

Son patrimoine chargé d’histoire met en lumière ses collections de flacons signés des grands maîtres verriers, Lalique, Baccarat, Viard, ... Sa bastide pleine de charme, à l’architecture provençale du 19e siècle, abrite un distilloir dont la charpente en métal a été conçue par le célèbre Gustave Eiffel. 

Label Qualité Tourisme

Molinard is a French perfume company, established in 1849 in Grasse, on the French Riviera. Molinard ranks among the few genuine French perfumer brands (EPV, official living heritage company). Molinard is known for the strong identity and sophistication of its fragrances and artistic design of its bottles, inspired by leading glass makers such as Lalique, Baccarat or Viard. Among its leading products Habanita, the first Oriental feminine perfume (1921), is a landmark in French perfumery.

Our preparations are optimized for the physiology of the skin ensuring maximum functionality for visible and concrete beauty results, respecting the health of the skin and that of nature.
The value of our company is the meticulous attention in all stages of the formulation of our products thanks to the application of the most avant-garde technologies that guarantee their real cosmetic effects.
Our territory is the inspiration and the resource from which the long history of LeLang is born.

Name: Anisa International, Inc.
Description:
Anisa International is the most trusted leader in cosmetic brush design and manufacturing. We make premium cosmetic brushes, skincare tools, storage, and brush cleaners, all designed to enhance your consumer's experience.

Over three decades, Anisa International has become an industry leader pioneering premium beauty tool innovation, design, and manufacturing. Since day one, we have been committed to quality without compromise. Our passion and focus have always been to create purposeful cosmetic brushes for both makeup and skincare. We invest in inspired innovation and foster a culture of creativity, craftsmanship, and care to achieve our ongoing success and longevity. The products we produce, the ideas we encourage, and the people we align with truly set us apart.

As the industry's beauty and skincare brush authority, our partners embrace our visionary thinking, our truly collaborative spirit, and our full commitment to every last detail.

Name: Mary Kay de México
Description:
Por más de 35 años, en Mary Kay México, Nuestra Misión ha sido Enriquecer la Vida de las Mujeres de nuestro país. A través del legado de nuestra fundadora Mary Kay Ash, nuestra Empresa ofrece la mejor Oportunidad de Negocio dedicada al Cuidado de la Piel, Maquillaje, Fragancias y Nutricionales; y brinda las herramientas necesarias basadas en principios y valores enfocados al trabajo en equipo, el respeto a la individualidad, la honestidad y transparencia en nuestras relaciones.

Mary Kay Ash creía firmemente en hacer de su Empresa una compañía que se distinguiera de las demás por sus valores y principios que son los siguientes:

1. Espíritu de Entrega: Lo que aportas a la vida de otros se regresará a la tuya. Da en forma entusiasta, con buena voluntad y más allá de lo que se te está dando y te sorprenderás de todo lo que recibirás.
2. Hazme Sentir Importante: Imagina a cada persona que conozcas con un letrero colgado al cuello que diga “Hazme sentir Importante”, es algo muy sencillo, pero causa un gran impacto.
3. Regla de Oro: Trata a los demás como te gustaría ser tratado.
4. Balance de Prioridades: Reconoce la importancia de vivir una vida con prioridades en balance; primero la Fe, segundo la Familia, tercero la Carrera; así como siempre hacer lo que es correcto, honorable y ético con empeño y valor.

Al caminar por los pasillos de Mary Kay vivirás la experiencia de un ambiente de trabajo en equipo y respeto donde las relaciones interpersonales están basadas en la confianza, honestidad y amabilidad. Todos somos una parte de la familia Mary Kay!

Name: P Louise
Description: Owned and founded by CEO Paige Louise, we are a UK based cosmetics company creating inclusive, innovative & diverse personal care products.

Name: Yves Rocher Franchises
Description:
Aujourd’hui fort de 16 000 collaborateurs, le groupe Yves Rocher est resté fidèle à la vision de ses origines : de la culture des plantes à la commercialisation des produits, tout se fait chez nous, dans nos champs, nos laboratoires, sur nos sites industriels et dans nos magasins. Cette démarche engagée est la clé de notre réussite commerciale et de celle de nos partenaires.

Passionné(e) par l’univers de la beauté et le commerce de proximité, vous avez envie d’entreprendre et vous partagez les valeurs de notre marque ?
Yves Rocher vous offre l’opportunité de devenir un véritable chef d’entreprise et de mener votre propre magasin vers la réussite commerciale.

En fonction de votre budget et de vos attentes, nous vous proposons 2 statuts aux atouts distincts :
La franchise : votre société, propriétaire du fonds de commerce, vous pilotez votre point de vente en toute autonomie. En choisissant la franchise, vous constituez également un capital rassurant pour votre avenir

La Location Gérance : Grâce à un investissement initial limité, votre société exploite un magasin «clé en main» en toute autonomie mais dont le fonds de commerce appartient à Yves Rocher.

Quel que soit votre choix, vous bénéficiez de tout le savoir-faire d’Yves Rocher, de notre innovation produits et technologique, de notre notoriété, de l’efficacité de notre
 marketing direct et d’animations sur votre point de vente : l’accompagnement d’une marque forte, la clé de votre réussite !

L'enseigne compte aujourd'hui 686 magasins en France (dont 446 en location gérance et 200 en franchise) et souhaite poursuivre son développement sur le territoire.

Entreprenez en Beauté, Devenez Partenaires !

Name: LoveChild by Masaba
Description:
Curated and attested by Masaba Gupta, LoveChild is an honest, embracive, and playfully‑vibrant beauty brand, made with empathy at its core. The brand offers an extensive range of high‑performing makeup, skin & wellness products for all ages, skin colours & cultures. Enabling a unique expression of self-love, LoveChild celebrates You!

While the brand is aspirational, LoveChild is also accessible for young millennials who wish to get their hands on the signature Masaba aesthetics. It is our promise that each of our products is vegan, cruelty-free, sulfate-free and paraben-free. Another endeavour for the brand is to reduce the barriers and social hesitations that may come with approaching beauty and wellness for first-time enthusiasts. And our answer to this, is the Cosmo-wellness Journal (the blog section of the website.) This journal contains tips, hacks, and recommendations by Masaba that are easy to adopt in your daily routine.

“LoveChild as a term has been woven into my destiny ever since I was born; and now it’s time to weave that destiny into a brand. For many years I’ve looked at this as a negative, so I thought it was time to make it a positive with a new range that would resonate with individuals who have been labeled all their lives too. Being a woman of colour and belonging to two different ethnicities, it was really difficult for me to find cosmetics that would suit my skin colour and type.
Also, dealing with acne and sensitive skin for over 15 years, I grew up loving all my mum’s makeup but disliking what it did to my skin. This is where LoveChild fits in; to overcome these consumer need-gaps. I also think that skin troubles arise from an overburdened mind and stressors of various kinds. If you are not feeling your best, it will show on your skin. This is why we are here!" - Masaba

Name: Ceremonia
Description:
Meet Ceremonia

Ceremonia is a clean hair care brand, for all hair types, rooted in Latinx heritage.

Ceremonia is on a mission to empower a confident natural that feels as good as it looks. We’re manifesting modern day rituals, stemming from rich culture, that feed your hair from the roots and beyond, because hair wellness is the key to unlocking the best hair days. Our hair ritual celebrates the longevity of healthier hair through unparalleled formulas that make a real impact.

Name: UNION S.R.L.
Description: Somos una compañia dedicada a la elboración y comercialización de productos de comética y cuidado personal, con mas de 40 años en el mercado, lider en sus categorías y con presencia en cada vez mas países de la región

Name: Alès Group, USA
Description:
Alès Group USA is a wholly owned subsidiary of the Alès Groupe, France. Alès Group creates, formulates, manufactures and sells across the world prestige skincare, hair care, fragrances, and professional color, under the brands LIERAC, PHYTO, PHYTO SPECIFIC, CARON, and SUBTIL.

True to the philosophy of its founder, the Alès Group, still family-owned and independently operated, has its own Research and Development laboratories and prioritizes the use of natural ingredients derived from the plant world.

Name: DRMTLGY
Description: We are a leader in technology-based skin care products focused on efficacy and safety. Focused on creating skin care products for all skin types, tones and concerns.

Name: TOSLA Nutricosmetics
Description:
TOSLA Nutricosmetics is a B Corp certified company specialized in researching, developing, and manufacturing high-performing liquid nutricosmetics products tailored for premium beauty and wellness brands.

We are blurring the lines between the nutrition and cosmetics industries, where consumers are no longer faced with multiple different products before their bathroom mirror; instead, a portion finds its place in their kitchen.

At the heart of our philosophy are three essential pillars: Palatability, Simplicity, and Validation. 
 
Nutricosmetics is a field where consumer skepticism often runs high. That's why our commitment to efficacy remains unwavering. Conducting and sharing the results of clinical studies showcases product effectiveness and it reflects our commitment to transparency, building trust. You can find the proven benefits of our formulations in the Journal of Functional Foods.

In our bustling lives, convenience is a new luxury, and it's clear that the focus has shifted towards creating solutions that not only cater to their wellbeing but also fit seamlessly into their busy schedules. That's where simplicity comes in. We prioritize ready-to-drink formats, ensuring convenience, versatility, quality, and the valuable asset you will never get back - time. 

Lastly, we believe that the best product is the one your customers are happy to take every day. With palatability, our goal is to transform the daily routine from a chore into a pleasurable experience. With that in mind, we've developed our own VELIOUS Flavor Technology. This innovation transforms the taste of primary raw materials, such as collagen, ensuring a delightful experience.

In these superficial times, we can use science, technology, and transparency to move us beyond the surface to a more genuine and healthier world. And our B Corp certification is a tangible testament to our commitment!

Name: GOSH COPENHAGEN
Description:
GOSH COPENHAGEN is a Danish-based hip and trendy colour cosmetics company. Founded in 1945 by Mr. Einer Tjellesen, as a pharmaceutical company, but quickly moved into the cosmetics industry. Our products are sold in over 80 countries and territories. 

The GOSH COPENHAGEN brand offers a large selection of products from different products categories: Cosmetics, Fragrances, Hair Care, Face Care and Body Care. We also produce Private Labels such as Pudderdåserne, Isabell Kristensen, Joan Ørting and TESSA Beauty. 

Our head office is in Denmark where all the product development, production and distribution takes place. We see no better way than overseeing all the steps ourselves. This way we ensure that all the products under the brand GOSH Copenhagen correspond with our identity and values.

We are dedicated to providing our customers fashionable and high quality products at affordable prices.

Name: Neftis Laboratorios
Description:
NEFTIS LABORATORIOS is a Contract Manufacturer born in 2005 from cosmetic and pharmaceutical activities developed for pharmaceutics from 1994.

All these years of experience have helped us develop, formulate and manufacture professional cosmetics and Medical Device as well as providing the corresponding technical and documental support according to the latest regulations from each country.

Equipped with the latest up-to-date facilities and equipment, we are ready to provide the latest formulations under GMP regulation, either for standard formulations as well as bespoke preparations when required.

Our qualified staff are continuously improving and updating their knowledge to attend to the constant advances in the sector.

With all these qualities, Neftis Laboratorios is the ideal partner for companies searching for quality, security and improvement in their product development and manufacturing.

Name: Atelier Cologne
Description:
Atelier Cologne is « Scented Art, Crafted from Nature ». A philosophy of a perfumery that evokes emotions inspired by nature and nurtures the soul.

Artistic, expert, emotional, Atelier Cologne elevates nature to the level of art, and masters a unique fragrance expertise inherited from the legacy of cologne. 

The spirit of the atelier infuses our craft. From the luxurious bottle design inspired by the Art Nouveau movement to boutique experience, Atelier Cologne partners with a collective of artists to deliver the very essence of French savoir-faire and artistic expression.

Name: UNICSKIN
Description:
1. Selective beauty brand with the latest technology. Our pillars: ingredients, efficiency and technology applied to skin.

2. We are pioneers in creating cross-selling between techno-beauty and dermocosmetics, applying innovation together with the best active ingredients. We take the beauty center to your home.

3. We are world leaders in techno-beauty, where LED light technology created and developed by NASA, is a type of light that improves internally exposed skin by emitting different colors of light. According to the color it has different treatments being able to deal comprehensively with all skin common problems: wrinkles, sagging, blemishes, acne, etc.

4. More than eight times we were nationally and internationally recognized for our innovation and LED technology applied to skin.

5. Our products are 100% functional, free of alcohol, dyes, paraffins, comedogenic ingredients and 100% environmentally friendly, using recyclable, sustainable and of course safe elements for health. Our technology is 0% invasive.

6. We believe in digitization and in the experiences of each and every one of our users, that is why it is important that you share your favorite products using the hashtag #UNICSKINERS.

Name: ORLY International
Description:
About ORLY: It all starts with innovation. From the conception of the timeless nail looks such as the Original French Manicure, cutting-edge color, treatments, textures and design, to what’s new and next in nails; it’s all been created by the brains and beauty lovers at ORLY. Whether it's ORLY Color Labs, the first platform for nail polish lovers to make one-of-a-kind nail colors or ORLY Color Pass a subscription delivering on trend seasonal nail collections to your doorstep, ORLY is all about helping our customers love their nails.

Family-owned since 1975, ORLY products are made with love at their headquarters in Los Angeles. ORLY prides itself in products made without harmful ingredients, and being vegan across all of it's product lines. ORLY is also cruelty-free and Leaping Bunny certified. For more, visit https://www.orlybeauty.com.

Name: D'AVEIA
Description:
D'AVEIA é uma marca portuguesa de cuidados com a pele, desenvolvida com ingredientes naturais como aveia coloidal, arroz e milho, indicada para todos os tipos de pele e para toda a família. 

A nossa gama inclui quatro categorias principais:
 Dermatologia: Para proteção e cuidado diário e específico.
 Anti-Envelhecimento: Soluções específicas para uma pele jovem.
 Cuidado Íntimo: Fórmulas suaves para conforto e bem-estar.
 Cuidado do Bebé: Cuidados delicados para os mais pequenos.

Compra diretamente em www.daveia.pt ou encontra os nossos produtos em Farmácias e Parafarmácias em todo o país.
----
D'AVEIA is a Portuguese skincare brand crafted with natural ingredients like colloidal oat, rice, and corn, designed for all skin types and for the whole family. 

Our range includes four key categories:
 Skincare: For daily and specific care and protection.
 Anti-Aging: Targeted solutions for youthful skin.
 Intimate Care: Gentle formulas for comfort and well-being.
 Baby Skincare: Delicate care for the little ones.

Shop directly at www.daveia.pt or find us at Pharmacies and Parapharmacies across Portugal.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DIFFUPAR S.A.
Description:
Diffupar S.A. es una empresa familiar argentina fundada en 1982 por los hermanos Bordoni; con el objetivo de representar marcas internacionales de cosmética y fragancias en el mercado argentino.


Como representantes de marcas y distribuidores, nos comprometemos a ofrecer soluciones creativas, calidad e innovación. Nuestro objetivo es superar cualquier expectativa y alcanzar juntos los objetivos establecidos.
Sabemos que la creatividad y el desarrollo de productos son de importancia fundamental para nuestra actividad, por esta razón nos esforzamos por cumplir con las expectativas de cada proyecto que se nos confía de manera profesional y personalizada.
