Nuestra filosofía se basa en un servicio rápido, confiable y de alta calidad, así como en una atención personal insuperable.

Name: Cosmetica Italia Servizi srl
Description:
Cosmetica Italia Servizi è la società di servizi di Cosmetica Italia - associazione nazionale imprese cosmetiche. Da 30 anni offre servizi professionali specialistici in grado di coprire a 360° le esigenze delle imprese del settore cosmetico. 
Consulenze in ambito tecnico-regolatorio, test su prodotti e corsi di formazione sono solo i tre temi principali di una attività in cui la competenza e la profonda conoscenza del settore, accumulate in più di 50 anni di vita associativa, consentono di affiancare le imprese nella crescita e nello
sviluppo del loro business, aiutandole a trovare sempre la migliore soluzione alle loro esigenze.

Name: Lifeaz
Description:
Depuis 10 ans, notre mission chez Lifeaz est de permettre à tous les citoyens et à toutes les entreprises d’être capables de sauver une vie. Pour cela, nous avons développé Clark, le défibrillateur français pensé pour tous (dispositif médical disposant du marquage CE) 

Notre solution est basée sur 3 piliers pour que vous n’ayez à vous soucier de rien : Clark, un défibrillateur ultra simple à utiliser ; un suivi et une maintenance simplifiés grâce à la connectivité de l'appareil ; la sensibilisation aux gestes qui sauvent accessible à tous.

Chaque année en France, 50 000 personnes meurent d'un arrêt cardiaque et nous sommes tous concerné(e)s. Le taux de survie est de 5% car il faut agir dans les 4 premières minutes alors que les secours mettent 15 minutes pour venir. Il faut agir avant leur arrivée... 80% des arrêts cardiaques ont lieu à domicile ou sur le lieu de travail, et dans 70% des cas, un témoin est présent et peut changer les choses avec un défibrillateur et des gestes simples 

À ce jour, plus de 20 000 familles et entreprises sont équipées de notre défibrillateur et plus de 90 vies ont pu être sauvées, d’une petite fille de 3 ans à une femme de 96 ans. Ce n'est que le tout début... Ensemble, sauvons des milliers de vies 

Pour plus d’informations, abonnez-vous à notre page Lifeaz !

Et si vous souhaitez rejoindre l'équipe, rendez-vous sur : https://www.welcometothejungle.com/fr/companies/lifeaz
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: RedLocker
Description:
RedLocker is a global movement that advocates access to free menstrual care products. We help millions of people across Europe and our thousands of customers operate globally. Through our red dispensers for free menstrual care products, we make everyday life equal for people with periods. 

The best part? We're only just getting started. 
Read more at www.redlocker.eu
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Farmakonsuma
Description:
Nos encontramos presentes en Perú desde hace más de 20 años, en donde de manera progresiva hemos venido posicionándonos. Disponemos de una amplia línea de productos de prescripción y libre venta, en donde contamos con diversas áreas terapéuticas como: cardiometabólica, gastrointestinal, dolor, ginecológicos, antibióticos, osteoporosis, resfriado, suplementos vitamínicos, urogenital, hierros y múltiples opciones terapéuticas más.

Aquí estaremos #CuidándoteMuyDeCerca y ofreciendo productos de la más alta calidad para la salud de todos los peruanos.

Name: New Directions Aromatics
Description:
Established in 1998, New Directions Aromatics (NDA) entered the Essential Oils market with a clear purpose: to redefine quality and reliability. From our roots in Toronto, Canada, we began by wholesaling essential oils and packaging materials, forging strong partnerships with select distilleries. Over time, we expanded our product line to include cosmetic bases, fragrances, and botanical extracts.  
  
Today, NDA is the defining ingredient company for the products you create. As a global leader in ethically sourced essential oils and natural raw materials, we have built a vast network of trusted suppliers worldwide. This allows us to offer highly competitive wholesale prices. With our strong reputation, we’re able to secure high-volume contracts with global partners, guaranteeing the best rates for our clients and special pricing for bulk orders.

Name: BeautyMix & MyCosmetik
Description:
Elu Produit de l'Année 2021
 Qui veut être mon associé - saison 2 - M6
2023 : BeautyMix devient MyCosmetik

BeautyMix est une marque française qui propose un labo miniature pour faire ses cosmétiques naturels à la maison.

BeautyMix c’est : un robot automatique connecté, une sélection d’ingrédients cosmétiques naturels de qualité et une application mobile qui vous guide pas à pas.

Créé par une passionnée de cosmétiques maison, elle a pour ambition de se distinguer par son robot innovant ainsi que par la qualité, la simplicité et la transparence de ses produits. 

BeautyMix veut offrir à chacun la possibilité de contrôler lui-même, ce qu’il met sur sa peau. Il s'agit de la première solution complète permettant d’éliminer tous les intermédiaires et de créer ses produits de beauté naturels, sans connaissance préalable. 

Afin d’offrir la qualité au meilleur prix, BeautyMix attache une attention toute particulière au choix de ses fournisseurs et partenaires. Chaque ingrédient est sélectionné et testé afin de garantir sa parfaite efficacité.

Name: about-face beauty
Description: Make-u(p) without rules. Made for the many versions of you, about-face is multidimensional makeup for everyone, everywhere created by Halsey and built on the truth that no one is just one thing and humans are weird, complex and imperfectly beautiful beings. Everyone has their own messy, mad, and personal method to becoming their greatest version of themselves, so we make products that are hardworking over hype, designed to celebrate the journey to become every version of us - the ones we end up being, and all of the experimental versions along the way.

Name: Glo Skin Beauty
Description:
Delivering on the promise of healthy, beautiful skin is what drives us every day at Glo Skin Beauty. Our innovative skincare and nourishing mineral makeup collections work together seamlessly to reveal your authentic best. Whether you begin with our skincare or makeup collection – you will experience the distinction of our proprietary formulas and the confidence that comes with transformative skincare results. At Glo Skin Beauty, we believe makeup is an extension of skincare and when paired together our skincare and makeup solutions are most powerful. This is what inspired the creation of Glo Skin Beauty.

Glo Skin Beauty provides professional treatments combined with homecare products to deliver transformative results for skincare professionals and their clients. Researched and developed with innovative, active ingredients, our professional products complement our retail products seamlessly, delivering your personalized prescription for healthy, beautiful skin.

Our award winning, skin nourishing, mineral makeup formulations enhance and protect even the most sensitive skin. With a variety of formula and finish options and an exceptional shade gallery to promote every beauty ideal, Glo Skin Beauty delivers customized complexion perfection.

Name: ALES Groupe (est devenu Laboratoire Native)
Description:
Alès Groupe a été racheté pour Laboratoire Native en 2020.
Pour suivre les marques Lierac, Phyto et Jowaé, nous vous invitons à aller sur la page linkedin https://www.linkedin.com/company/laboratoire-native

Name: Dr. Barbara Sturm
Description:
Dr. Barbara Sturm is a German aesthetics doctor, world-recognized for non-surgical anti-aging treatments and rejuvenation of the skin matrix. Inspired by her daily work, Dr. Sturm has formulated her skincare range for those who have always wanted an uncomplicated yet highly effective skincare regime that hydrates, protects, and regenerates the skin.

The line is a synergy of unique and innovative active ingredients combined with potent natural extracts. The skincare line deploys the anti-aging ingredient Purslane, also called the "fountain of youth drug."  The best from aesthetic medicine and nature, made in Germany.

- Free from synthetic fragrances, parabens, and mineral oils
- Suitable for all skin types
- Infused with cutting edge ingredients
- Revives stressed skin and restores youth glow

Name: Cosmetic Solutions Innovation Labs
Description: Cosmetic Solutions Innovation Labs is a globally recognized innovator, formulator, and manufacturer of scientifically proven, naturally-effective personal care products. Our focus is on developing exceptional products and building exceptional brands. With expertise in skin care, body care, specialty hair care, OTC, and professional use formulations, we create innovative, high-quality, cost-effective products for the global beauty market.

Name: DIBS Beauty
Description: We're about beauty that puts our customer first by pairing and elevating combinations, functions and beautiful textures. Launched in 2021, DIBS became one of the fastest growing makeup brands in the U.S. Within 6 months of its debut in Ulta, DIBS now has a presence in all 1400+ stores nationwide. DIBS is backed by L Catterton, the LVMH partnership recognized as the world's leading consumer goods growth equity fund.

Name: Milani Cosmetics
Description:
We founded Milani over 20 years ago, with the passionate belief that everyone should have the opportunity to own & enjoy luxury beauty.

To this day, we continue to innovate for and with our diverse community and relentlessly test the  limits of what’s available  at affordable prices.

We deliver high-end yet accessible luxury while championing inclusivity, self-expression and experimentation through makeup.

We are Milani Cosmetics.
Luxury that’s born inclusive, not exclusive.

Name: Autobrush
Description:
autobrush is passionate about helping kids (and adults!) brush their teeth better. We’ve built the industry-leading u-shape toothbrush, backed by clinical studies proving our brush removes up to 5.1x more plaque than a manual toothbrush.

We’re obsessed with innovation and the idea that just because something has always been done one way, doesn’t mean there’s not something better. Our mission is to bring effective, accessible dental care into every home and leave the world of toothbrushing 5.1X better than the way we found it.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Juicy Chemistry
Description:
Juicy Chemistry is an Indian ECOCERT-Certified Organic personal care brand. It was founded in 2014 with an aim to formulate efficacious skincare products that are powered by the goodness of nature and backed by the dynamics of science. At Juicy Chemistry, what you see is what you get: fresh, potent, and tested products that are good for you and the environment.

In our endeavour to make our organic goodness easily accessible domestically as well as internationally, we have partnered with some of the finest marketplaces and distributors pan-India and around the world.

Name: Rasasi Perfumes Industry
Description:
Rasasi Perfumes Industry LLC is a family owned business in Dubai, founded in 1979 by visionary Mr.Abdul Razzak Kalsekar, who is also the company’s Chairman. 

His vision is now been carried forward by his 6 sons, each dedicated to their specialized tasks, and together achieving the core objective of Brand Growth. 

Over the last three decades, the company has built a solid foundation of pioneering entrepreneurial vigor, creating some of the best and most exclusive fragrances, which have established a worldwide reputation for quality, luxury and elegance. Today, Rasasi is Dubai's foremost company in the fragrance industry with a Global Vision. It has both Oriental and Occidental lines catering to customer’s needs. 

Another unprecedented milestone was the insurmountable success of its maiden label 'Blue Lady' – the flag bearer of the Rasasi spirit in the Occidental range of perfumes. 

Quality, competitiveness and innovation are synonymous with Rasasi.  

Rasasi operates over 115 elegantly-designed and unique showrooms in leading malls and prime market locations across the GCC (UAE, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain, and Qatar). Products are exported to more than 50 countries across the globe through a strong distribution network, supported by a 16,000 sqmstate-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Jebel Ali Free Zone, Dubai.An additional 5000 square metres has been created in Jebel Ali for Occidental fragrances and deodorant lines.

Name: POINT M
Description:
Un espace de choix, de conseil et de nouveautés dans l’univers de la Beauté ! Depuis sa création en 2001, notre chaine de 13 Magasins s’est imposée comme un véritable temple dédié aux cosmétiques et à la Parfumerie sélective. Un espace rempli d’idées cadeaux, de nouveautés, d’exclusivités et d’incontournables produits et services Beauté ! Nos conseillers et conseillères en Beauté sont toujours à votre disposition pour sélectionner avec soin tous les produits cosmétiques phares dont vous avez besoin au quotidien, pour faire illuminer votre Beauté Fatale !
Parfums Femmes, Parfums Hommes, Parfums Enfants, vous allez certainement craquer pour votre fragrance préférée, en eau de parfum ou eau de toilette …
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Rituals UK & Ireland (B Corp)
Description: As a proud B Corp, Rituals embraces The Art of Soulful Living. Founded in 2000 in Amsterdam, we were the first luxury brand to combine home & body products. Today, we invite people to join us on the path to sustainable wellbeing, with collections that are good for you and good for the planet. Our products are designed to promote your personal wellbeing, using ingredients of natural origin that help you transform daily routines into meaningful moments. But we're not just about products: we aim to be your compass for all things wellness. Our insightful articles, yoga videos, delicious healthy recipes and guided meditations can be found across our social channels, online magazine and our app. Want to step into the World of Rituals? Visit one of our 625+ stores spanning the globe, or check out our flagship House of Rituals store in Amsterdam.

Name: BABOR BEAUTY GROUP
Description:
BABOR BEAUTY GROUP is a family-owned German company, a global player in the cosmetics industry, and home to some of the most sought-after international beauty brands. With more than 65 years of expertise, BABOR BEAUTY GROUP develops individual skincare products for all skin needs. With its own labs and production facilities at its headquarters in Germany, BABOR BEAUTY GROUP stands for quality made in Germany. 

BABOR BEAUTY GROUP's flagship brand, BABOR, stands for "Expert Skincare. Made in Germany." The brand's traditional distribution channel via premium cosmetic institutes is combined with a symbiotic multichannel strategy that focuses on SPAs, retail partnerships, and e-commerce. 

BABOR BEAUTY GROUP's portfolio also includes private labels and develops brands for dermatologists, partners from related industries, celebrities, and leading retail partners.

The third generation of the owner family has been heading the company since 2014 – Dr. Martin Grablowitz and Isabel Bonacker lead the Supervisory Board.

BABOR BEAUTY GROUP employs more than 1000 people worldwide. The brands are represented in 70 countries by distributors or subsidiaries.  

Imprint; https://de.babor.com/service/babor/imprint

Name: Seed Beauty/ColourPop
Description:
With a unique combination of insight and foresight into the new world beauty landscape, we are the premier destination for acceleration in the beauty industry, bringing brands and products to consumers faster than anyone else in the world. SEED is reinventing how beauty brands interact with customers and are focused on turning beauty enthusiasts’ dreams into reality through continuous disruption. 
 
With over 65+ years of industry expertise, SEED Beauty’s fully verticalized business model allows its portfolio of brands to ideate, formulate, develop, test, manufacture, launch and ship products all under the same roof. SEED’s campus, located in Southern California, spans 15 warehouse-sized buildings, and houses all corporate teams and manufacturing operations. 
 
As a verticalized business, SEED Beauty’s talented team is comprised of chemists, product developers, designers, creatives, marketers, manufacturing professionals, and engineers.  The diversity of SEED’s functional expertise, paired with its manufacturing capabilities, sets it apart from the rest in the industry. 
 
SEED Beauty’s portfolio consists of three award-winning brands: 

•	ColourPop redefines luxury by creating high-quality, luxury makeup products at accessible prices. ColourPop prides itself on being cruelty-free, price accessible, and keeping their customers at the center of everything they do. 

•	Fourth Ray Beauty believes in efficacious, highly concentrated, affordable skincare. Fourth Ray Beauty is committed to developing progressive, efficacious skincare formulas that are 100% cruelty-free, vegan and formulated with high-performing active ingredients and botanicals to deliver optimal results. 

•	SOL Body believes in giving everyone the ability to feel themselves through glowy, bronzey, shimmery body makeup and oils. SOL’s body-loving products help everyone glow-get-it by highlighting their highlights. All SOL formulas are 100% vegan and cruelty-free.

Name: Ouji
Description: Ouji, a leading player in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) industry and proud brand owner of Dynamo, Fab, and Walch. Our commitment lies in delivering high-quality products that enhance consumers' everyday lives. With a strong global presence across Southeast Asia and Oceania, we offer an extensive range of laundry, household, and hygiene care solutions that promote healthier and more beautiful living, every day.

Name: Prose
Description:
At Prose, we know one size fits none. So we re-thought the entire model of mass beauty to create one-of-a-kind haircare and skincare. It’s a radically custom approach: We create products that fit you (and only you), combining lab innovation, natural ingredients, and patent-pending AI — for truly custom care and always-improving results.
Prose is a Certified B Corporation, a Public Benefit Corporation, and a Carbon Neutral company, because good business is always sustainable.

Name: MOP Beauty
Description:
At MOP Beauty, we thrive on relentless breakthrough beauty innovation. Guided by a clear sense of purpose, we infuse creativity and cutting-edge ideas into every stage of our product development process. Our passion for pushing boundaries drives us to pioneer a new era of beauty solutions where science and artistry intertwine harmoniously.

We are purposefully committed to delivering the highest quality products through our relentless pursuit of innovation. This unwavering dedication ensures our customers receive exceptional, sought-after cosmetic products that not only meet but surpass expectations. Each creation is meticulously formulated and rigorously tested, reflecting our pride in going the extra mile for your utmost satisfaction.

Join us on our journey to redefine beauty and experience the MOP Beauty transformation.

Name: DALEA KREASI NADISANTI
Description:
Urban beauty, personal care, and lifestyle brands. 
Rollover reaction & Alchemist fragrance.

We pride ourselves in building award winning brands that touches heart and emotion. 
We offer high quality products that all are wrapped in aesthetic fashion to fit modern way of life.
We put care into innovative experience and compelling narrative in the way we communicate. 
All values combined allow us to differ, ahead, and sustain our presence in the industry

Name: Frezyderm
Description: FREZYDERM is a Greek leading company that develops, manufactures and trades dermoceutical products and medical devices, owning one of the most valued R&D Departments and a cutting-edge technology factory. Since 1986 when established, FREZYDERM provided strong cooperation with doctors and Universities, innovations and revolutionary formulations, close relationship with pharmacists and a continuously, fast growing process, thus becoming one of the leaders in Pharmaceutical market. Nowadays FREZYDERM is committed to provide its business partners effective and high quality dermoceuticals that help to improve skin health and thus a higher quality of life, along with successful B2B strategy, sales and marketing support.

Name: Baidyanath
Description:
Rooted in the year 1917, Baidyanath has shaped the course of Ayurvedic healthcare in India and beyond for over a century. Founded by the visionary  Pt. Ram Dayal Joshi, Baidyanath has now evolved into one of India’s most trusted and respected names in Ayurvedic healthcare.

Today, Baidyanath formulates and manufactures over 1000 time-tested Ayurvedic products across 14 GMP-certified manufacturing plants nationwide. Our operations are rooted in tradition, yet powered by scientific precision, ensuring consistent quality and safety in every product.

Baidyanath’s reach extends far beyond India. With exports to 35+ countries worldwide, we are proud to represent the global voice of authentic Ayurveda. Our commitment to excellence has been recognized with the ‘Best Quality Ayurvedic Medicine’ Award by the President of India, a testament to the trust we’ve earned over generations.

Baidyanath is deeply committed to the future of Ayurveda. Through scholarship programs and collaborations with educational initiatives, we support the journey of Ayurvedic students who will become the healers of tomorrow—ensuring this ancient science thrives for generations to come.

Beyond our products, Baidyanath is deeply involved in community wellness. We conduct monthly CSR initiatives offering free doctor consultations and medicines, helping us stay connected with real healthcare needs across communities. These efforts not only bring Ayurveda closer to people—but also help us grow better and go farther.

To meet the evolving needs of modern consumers, Goodcare Pharma—our contemporary wellness division—offers authentic, modern wellness effective products for everyday health concerns, crafted with the same Ayurvedic integrity.

For over 107 years, Baidyanath has stood for purity, tradition, and care. As we continue to grow, our mission remains the same: to bring natural, holistic wellness to every home—through the enduring power of Ayurveda.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Samsol International (Pvt.) Ltd.
Description: It was founded as a family business in 1962 by a seasoned entrepreneur; taking a debut from the hair care category. The success story has many milestones in the corporate life of Samsol, through which a humble business was transformed into a major national brand. Since its inception the company stands amongst leaders in the hair and skin care industry of Pakistan.

Name: Expressions Parfumées
Description:
Expressions Parfumées is a French leading company designing & manufacturing fragrance coumpounds. 
We bring Perfume to life through innovation and creativity.
Join Expressions Parfumées, a sister company of the Givaudan Group, and give meaning to your passion: recrutement@EPparfums.com

Name: Doveriye
Description:
How is our work culture different? 
* We are open to hiring people of any age (16 to 70), sexualities and physical disabilities (our office is wheelchair friendly and free from unnecessary sympathy) as long as they have a growth mindset. Everyone is treated equally, irrespective of position and hierarchy. 
* The leadership positions are taken on a rotational basis daily within each team, so everyone gets to be on both sides of the table. We are only willing to hire people with similar attitudes who teach and learn together regardless of age and other qualifications and are open to criticism and improvement. 
* We have one day a week for learning and growth, where we exchange information, sit together, debate, discuss, and grow our knowledge. We focus on the overall development of everyone working with us rather than just getting our work done. 
* We organise classes on personal development, mental health management, free gym access, personal finance management, investment classes, and so much more. Employees can access learning portals like udemy and masterclass for their learning endeavours and interests. 

What do we do? 
We are a Personal Care brand that aims to make self-care products for people struggling with special skin conditions. We currently make skin, hair and body care products for men and women struggling with skin conditions.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: إبراق | IBRAQ
Description:
إبراق—نرسم بصمتنا في عالم العطور بتراثٍ أصيل ورؤية متجددة. انطلقت مسيرتنا باسم إبراهيم القرشي، ونواصل رحلتنا اليوم بروحٍ مبتكرة تعكس شغفنا بالفخامة والتفرّد. نستلهم من الماضي، لنبدع للمستقبل.
IBRAQ—crafting a legacy of fragrance with authenticity and innovation. Our journey began as Ibrahim Al Qurashi, and today, we continue with a renewed spirit, redefining luxury and uniqueness. Inspired by the past, creating for the future.

Name: COSMOTEC INTERNATIONAL
Description:
Founded in 1987, Cosmotec International is specialized in providing innovative products to the cosmetic market. The partnerships with companies from Europe, USA and Japan makes Cosmotec known as a company that offers the most complete line of products to its clients, constantly bringing alternatives and high-quality solutions to the market. Flexibility, agility and warranty of regular supply of raw materials are also Cosmotec's expressive characteristics.
In 2013, Cosmotec took another significant step for the consolidation of its businesses: the company made a joint venture with Sumitomo Corporation. The company is a part of Sumitomo Group, one of the lead trading companies in Japan.

Name: RAS Luxury Skincare
Description: RAS (pronounced ‘ruh-us’ which means essence & happiness in Sanskrit) is transforming the premium beauty and skincare industry in India with its high-quality natural ingredients and potent scientific formulations that are manufactured at the company’s proprietary vertically-integrated research facility & farms in Raipur, Chhattisgarh. Through its products, RAS aims to champion and leverage India’s vast bounty of natural ingredients and rich history of nature-based beauty products. RAS Luxury Oils started out with a simple philosophy - to create a skincare brand that was transparent, pure and responsible.

Name: Younique Products
Description:
We believe that women everywhere should feel beautiful inside and out. Our mission is to uplift, empower, validate, and ultimately build self-esteem in women around the world through high-quality products that encourage both inner and outer beauty and spiritual enlightenment; while also providing opportunities of personal growth and financial reward. 

This belief is at the core of why we started this company and why we named our company - Younique.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Contém1g make-up
Description:
A Contém1g é uma marca feminina e inspiradora presente no segmento de maquiagem há mais de 10 anos. Com o conceito de "fábrica boutique", a produção de seus produtos é feita em máquinas alemãs, suíças, italianas, americanas e inglesas de última geração. 

Para a empresa, a  maquiagem é uma experiência única no dia a dia da mulher. Afinal, realçar a beleza aumenta a sua autoestima e muda a forma dela relacionar-se com o mundo.
 
O desejo, o comportamento e as atitudes da mulher atual junto à tecnologia da matéria-prima, a inovação em beleza, o design da embalagem e as tendências da moda formam as diretrizes decisivas para a criação de cada item das nossas linhas de make-up.
 
Atualmente, a empresa conta com quase 200 pontos de vendas espalhados pelo Brasil. E busca sempre em suas novidades trazer mais felicidade e autoestima para todas as suas consumidoras.

Name: RMS Beauty
Description: Masterfully made.  Beautifully clean.

Name: Jane Iredale (Iredale Cosmetics)
Description:
At Jane Iredale, we believe that the most beautiful cosmetic you can wear is a healthy skin.  This inspires us to offer a makeup line that enhances the lives of women through its effectiveness, simplicity and beauty, enriches the client experience and that aligns with your professional philosophy.  A responsible extension of skin care, each product is subjected to rigorous sensitivity and safety tests to ensure it is as good for the skin as it is beautiful to wear. 
 
Based in the beautiful Berkshires in Massachusetts, Jane Iredale is offered through fine spas and salons, resorts, apothecaries and medical offices in more than 40 countries.

Name: Fuller México
Description:
A lo largo de más de 100 años, Fuller ha permanecido en el mundo de la belleza y se ha constituido como una empresa de éxito en venta directa. La atención personalizada y calidez que nuestra compañía ha ofrecido a lo largo de estos años es una de las razones de nuestro éxito en México y América del Sur.
 
La comercialización de cosméticos, fragancias, y artículos del hogar que Fuller desarrolla con máxima calidad, innovación y tecnología de punta, ofrece a miles de mujeres la invaluable oportunidad de convertirse en Fullerettes y crear su propio negocio.
 
Nuestros productos se realizan con fórmulas avaladas y tecnología de punta, cuidando siempre los estándares de calidad, originalidad, y vanguardia que impone la moda internacional.
 
Nuestro éxito es el resultado de una visión estratégica que en cada paso estudia, evalúa y responde efectivamente a las dinámicas del mercado, siempre pendientes de las ventajas competitivas.
 
* Fuller no está afiliada con Fuller Brush Company en Estados Unidos.

Name: FarmaValue
Description:
Established in Honduras in 2002, FarmaValue is a pharmacy chain in Central America and the Caribbean.

With a workforce of over 5000 employees and a network of 300 points of service across Mexico, Guatemala, Honduras, El Salvador, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama, and the Dominican Republic, it is renowned for its adherence to product quality, patient safety, and its four-fold pledge:  

+ We always have the best price possible. 
+ We always have the product available. 
+ We are experts in our trade. 
+ We put our client's interests first. 

Mission
To offer everyone access to high-quality medicines at the most affordable price in the market, with a complete range of pharmaceutical and general use products in a friendly and highly professional environment that exceeds service expectations, in order to achieve customer satisfaction in terms of reliabilty, quality, and service.

Vision
The No.1 pharmacy in Central America and the Caribbean in terms of service and distribution of medical products.

Farma Value belongs to the 3C Group (Central American Consulting & Capital), whose portfolio is dominated by companies dedicated to the health sector: Análisis Clínicos del Ahorro, Value Laboratorios, Clínicas del Ahorro, Farmacias Regis, FarmaClínicas de la Comunidad, Apomedix, Médica Hogar and, of course, Farmacias del Ahorro, the brand under which we operate in Honduras.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: RINGANA
Description:
𝐒𝐨 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥!
Vom bescheidenen Labor in der Steiermark zur globalen Bühne – RINGANA wächst und gedeiht. Heute sind wir ein Team von über 800 starken Persönlichkeiten an 10 Standorten.
 
𝐖𝐚𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐫 𝐭𝐮𝐧!
Wir entwickeln und produzieren Frischekosmetik und Supplements aus natürlichen Inhaltsstoffen. Dabei setzen wir auf wirkstarke und antioxidative Inhaltsstoffe aus der Natur. Synthetische Konservierungsstoffe? Für uns ein klares No-Go! Jedes RINGANA Produkt entsteht in liebevoller Handarbeit direkt in der Steiermark, genauer gesagt in St. Johann in der Haide. Und von dort werden sie in die ganze Welt versandt.

𝐖𝐢𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐫 𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐮𝐧!
Bei uns vereinen sich die Werte eines Familienunternehmens mit den Strukturen eines Konzerns. Das schafft viele spannende Bereiche, in denen du dich verwirklichen kannst. Unser dynamisches Wachstum und eine internationale Ausrichtung sorgen ständig für neue Aufgaben. Prozesse und Strukturen werden kontinuierlich weiterentwickelt. Das schafft Raum für Kreativität und Innovation. Bei uns geht es getreu dem Motto zu: Gestalten statt verwalten – und das hands-on, empathisch und immer als Team.
Location: St. Johann in der Haide, Steiermark

Name: ADA Cosmetics
Description:
ADA Cosmetics has been developing and producing high-end cosmetics and dispensing systems for hotels, cruise ships, and airlines for over four decades. The company serves more than 30,000 customers worldwide with its own manufacturing facilities in Europe and APAC. ADA Cosmetics offers bespoke cosmetics solutions and more than twenty brands, from luxury, boutique-style, and international designer names, to certified natural cosmetics lines. In addition, ADA Cosmetics is an innovator and market leader in hygienic dispenser systems. 

The entire value chain of the ISO 14001 certified company is geared towards eco-friendly, sustainable business practices. ADA Cosmetics is the only Cradle to Cradle Silver certified amenities manufacturer globally. Europe’s leading supplier of branded hotel cosmetics is headquartered in Kehl, Germany, and employs almost 700 staff in over 50 countries across Europe, the Middle East, Asia, and the USA.

Visit our corporate website: ada-cosmetics.com

ada-cosmetics.com/en/legal-notice/

Name: Alliance Pharmaceuticals Limited
Description:
At Alliance Pharma, we are a growing consumer healthcare company. Our purpose is to empower people to make a positive difference to their health and wellbeing by making our trusted and proven brands available around the world.

We deliver organic growth through investing in our priority brands and channels, in related innovation, and through selective geographic expansion to increase the reach of our brands. We have previously enhanced our organic growth through selective, complementary acquisitions.
Headquartered in Chippenham, UK, we employ around 290 people based in locations across Europe, North America, and the Asia Pacific region. By outsourcing our manufacturing and logistics we remain asset-light and focused on maximising the value we can bring, both to our stakeholders and to our brands. 

Over the last year, Alliance has sharpened its purpose, vision and strategy to align with the stated move towards a predominantly consumer healthcare company, to better position the company for the future, and in response to changing underlying market dynamics. In line with this new strategy, Alliance will focus on the global priority categories of helping damaged skin and supporting healthy aging.  

Our vision is to be a high performing consumer healthcare company, built on a portfolio of leading, trusted and proven brands. Consumer health products currently deliver 75% of our revenue sales and this continues to be an area of focus going forward.

For more information, please visit our website:  www.alliancepharmaceuticals.com  


Adverse Event Reporting
Adverse events should be reported. Reporting forms and information can be found at www.mhra.gov.uk/yellowcard.
Adverse events should also be reported to Pharmacovigilance at Alliance Pharmaceuticals (tel: 01249 466966, email: pharmacovigilance@alliancepharma.co.uk)
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: cosnova
Description:
As a global family business we are the sixth-largest company for decorative cosmetics worldwide with offices in Germany (headquarters), USA, Italy, France, Brasil, South Africa and China. Since our founding over 20 years ago, we have grown rapidly: More than 900 talented people at various locations around the world are working on our success story. With dedication and diverse talents, we work together to fulfill our mission of making the world more beautiful  . With an ideal price performance ratio, we let everyone celebrate their own beauty and individuality. Our focus is not only the needs of our consumers, but also the needs of our planet with numerous sustainable and social initiatives for a respectful approach to the environment and our fellow human beings. 

Within our open and trusting culture we promote and demand ensuring a good balance of your career and your private life. Whether you are a creative mind, a passionate numbers person or a tech expert: we offer a wide range of areas in which you can contribute your strengths and develop your talents.

Data Protection Policy: https://www.cosnova.com/en/linkedin-data-protection.

Name: Ved Sanjeevani
Description:
Ved Sanjeevani, where nature meets care. We are proud manufacturers and retailers of herbal hair oil and herbal nabhi oil, crafted with the finest natural ingredients to promote wellness and nourishment. Our products are rooted in the timeless wisdom of Ayurveda, blended with modern techniques to bring you effective and authentic herbal solutions for your health and beauty needs.

Our mission is simple: to provide pure, effective, and chemical-free products that rejuvenate and revitalize naturally. We believe in holistic well-being, focusing on delivering the best of what nature has to offer. Our oils are carefully formulated to nourish, strengthen, and heal—helping you achieve healthy hair and balanced wellness in the most natural way possible.

Join us on our journey towards natural wellness, and let us help you reconnect with the power of nature for a healthier, happier you.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DESIGNER PARFUMS
Description:
Designer Parfums is a dynamic and fast-growing global fragrance house, shaping the perfume and cosmetics industry with its innovative approach. Headquartered in London, UK, we proudly operate in over 80 markets worldwide, driven by international ambition and an unwavering commitment to quality and excellence.

As a family-owned business, we are dedicated to creating, developing, and distributing a diverse portfolio of brands. From heritage classics to celebrity-inspired and lifestyle fragrances, we manage some of the world's most renowned names, including Jennifer Lopez, Playboy, Cerruti, Ghost, Hawaiian Tropic, and Jean Louis Scherrer. Additionally, we are privileged to distribute the fragrances of Ariana Grande, Gant, Aigner, Guy Laroche, and Paloma Picasso.

Our success is rooted in the dedication of our talented team, who bring our vision to life with creativity, passion, and expertise. At Designer Parfums, we cultivate a vibrant work environment that reflects our core family values while offering employees a platform for personal and professional growth. We embrace innovation, delivering high-impact solutions and ensuring speed to market across all our ventures.

Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. From utilizing post-consumer recycled materials to prioritizing renewable energy, we are committed to reducing our environmental impact. Through rigorous Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), we continuously measure our progress, ensuring that we uphold the highest sustainability standards as we lead the fragrance industry into a greener future.

At Designer Parfums, we welcome new opportunities and collaborations that will help us continue to redefine the fragrance landscape. Get in touch with us to explore how we can work together in this exciting, ever-evolving industry.

Name: Bliss
Description:
Bliss was founded originally as a spa in New York’s Soho neighborhood in 1996 and quickly became a sensation for its fun, judgement-free approach to skincare. It soon transitioned into a full-fledged retail line providing innovative and transformative products that celebrate self-care and promote real, observable results. The brand is known for clean ingredients and thoughtful formulas, all marketed with a healthy dose of fun.

The brand is part of the AS Beauty portfolio, a group focused on developing global beauty brands that deliver real-world solutions to a diverse consumer base. What sets AS Beauty apart is its dedication to female-founded brands that tell a unique story while making the latest innovations accessible to all. Please go to AS Beauty page for career opportunities and additional information.

Name: Violetta Cosméticos
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina, con más de 40 años en el universo de la cosmética y la venta por catálogo. Nuestra marca tiene origen en el sueño de nuestra fundadora, Violeta Montero, quien a sus 50 años se atrevió a asumir el desafío de cambiar el rumbo de su vida y dedicarse a concretar su proyecto. 
Ella invirtió perseverancia, esfuerzo, trabajo continuo, compromiso, empatía con la gente. Esos valores siguen firmes en nosotros formando parte de nuestra esencia.

Creemos en nuestra gente porque es el pilar de nuestra empresa. Nos apasiona trabajar en equipo y fomentar un sentimiento grupal, lazos genuinos y relaciones duraderas. Por eso sostenemos que el crecimiento de cada uno de nuestros colaboradores, tanto dentro del ámbito laboral como del personal, es enriquecedor para todos.  Respaldar a quienes forman parte de nuestra organización, para que nunca dejen de tener objetivos superadores, es parte del legado de nuestra fundadora.

La mejora continua en nuestros procesos, la actualización y la incorporación de innovaciones ha sido y es una constante a la que acompañamos con el cuidado por mantener la calidez de nuestro origen familiar, nuestras tradiciones y nuestros valores esenciales. 

Hoy, más de 4 décadas después de aquel sueño fundacional de Violeta Montero, miles de mujeres en todo el país difunden nuestra marca y crecen con sus propios emprendimientos independientes dedicados a la belleza, al hogar y a la familia. Con el respaldo de ellas, millones de clientes nos eligen reconociéndonos como una empresa con la que se identifican porque interpreta sus deseos y responde ofreciendo productos novedosos en los que la ecuación precio-calidad es siempre muy buena.

Nuestro compromiso es seguir honrando el nombre de nuestra fundadora y promoviendo los valores de su esencia: inspiración, compromiso, confianza, perseverancia, transparencia y cercanía.

Name: SEMAK For Cosmetics
Description:
- SEMAK established  the principle that ( beauty is a right guaranteed to all) , So SEMAK will help you to identify  your beauty secrets by discovering the secrets of nature and its components to gain  the positive energy and to take advantages of all its secrets and components

- Beauty is the simplest of your rights, therefore we send out all our thinking and our efforts to establish the principle that( beauty is a right guaranteed to all).

- Every day with SEMAK, you will recognize the latest news about the natural  masks, recipes and mixtures to reach the summit of your beauty.

- Beauty has a lot of meanings ,it  may be ,  your confidence in yourself, or  the splendor of your first date, or   love at the first sight, or  your chance  for new life, or even it may be your sense in permanent youth.
- With SEMAK you will find  new meanings of your beauty , you will never feel it,  except with SEMAK.

Name: Clinikally (YC S22)
Description:
Clinikally: Your Personal Dermatologist, Anytime, Anywhere.

Need expert skin or hair advice? Clinikally connects you with top dermatologists in minutes. Get personalized treatment plans and prescription-grade products delivered to your doorstep. Join millions of satisfied customers and experience the future of skincare and haircare today.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beautyworld Middle East
Description:
Beautyworld Middle East is the region’s largest trade fair for beauty, hair, fragrance and well-being. As one of the most influential and visited beauty trade shows in the world, the event offers over 65,000 trade visitors a convenient and engaging platform to meet with over 1,800 exhibitors from  across 60 countries for three days of unrivalled business networking, sourcing and inspiration.                                                   

Next edition:
Date:       06 – 08 October 2026
Time:      10 AM to 6 PM
Venue:    Dubai World Trade Centre, UAE

For more information, please visit our website. www.beautyworldME.com

Name: Carex Sweden
Description: Carex Sweden is a fast growing Dermocosmetic and FMCG company, marketing leading clean cosmetic and dermocosmetic brands primarily in selected European Countries ( Sweden, Germany ,Turkey, Netherlands, Algeria ) , Middle East and CIS countries. Carex Sweden is headquartered in Malmö, with branch offices in Turkey, Algeria, Netherlands and Germany. Carex Sweden is the leader in clean cosmetic and skin care segment with flagship brand Celenes by Sweden, and dermocosmetic brand Bionnex Dermo Organic Laboratories. Carex Sweden manufactures the majority of its products in its GMP licensed manufacturing facility specialized in the production of  shampoos, gel, cream, and serum.

Name: Jurlique
Description: For 40 years Jurlique has evolved what’s possible with pure, natural-based, botanical ingredients.  At our biodynamic farm in the unspoiled Adelaide Hills in South Australia, each ingredient is intimately considered and harvested in its most powerful state, then combined with our unique natural formulas. Harnessing Nature’s power from seed to skin. Defying expectations about what is possible from natural skin care.

Name: MPlus Cosmetics
Description:
MPlus Cosmetics is a contract manufacturer based in Inzago (Milan), specialized in the creation, development and manufacturing of color cosmetics. 

Born as Mascara Plus, the company was founded in 2002 by David Chant, whose expertise in mascara formulation combined with the in-house production of fiber brushes guaranteed rapid growth, exceeding customer’s need to thrive in the competitive cosmetic industry.

For more than 20 years, the company has been building strategic relationships with the greatest partners in the beauty world over the entire supplying chain, offering customers a 360° full service. 

Achieving growth since its creation, MPlus Cosmetics is continuously evolving, enriching the exclusive know-how in finding the perfect synergy between formula and packaging also in face, eye and lip categories, searching for creativity, high quality and speed to market.

Name: The Earthling Co.
Description:
We’re all looking for safe and sustainable products for our families and homes, but knowing where to start is confusing. How do I know these products are actually safe and sustainable? How do I know they work? Why should I trust this company? 

Not only that, but how do I know I actually need this product? Every day, we’re constantly being pushed to mindlessly overconsume, and it has created huge problems – for the Earth, for our wallets, and for our happiness. 

Being a thoughtful, ethical consumer is difficult, and these endless questions can feel exhausting. 

So, we set out to do something about that. We figured, what better way to address our wasteful consumption patterns than with the products that shape our habits every day?

At The Earthling Co., we create thoughtfully designed products that nurture earth-friendly habits and routines.

We’re a passionate team whose mission is to simplify eco-conscious living, and to create a positive impact on our routines and the future of our planet. 

We believe that creating safe, sustainable routines shouldn’t be confusing, nor should they add to the growing waste problem the world already has.

We’d love to show you how we’re Intentional by Nature.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Physician's Choice
Description:
Physician's Choice manufacturers professional-grade supplements and nutritional products. Our founder, Logan Chierotti, almost lost his hearing as a teenager. When modern medicine couldn't help, natural supplements restored his hearing. This life-changing moment inspired Logan to establish Physician's Choice in 2017. After 5 years of extraordinary sales growth, Physicians Choice is the # 1 probiotic brand on Amazon and has Brick and Mortar distribution in Walmart, Target, CVS, SAMs Club and over 70,000 retail touch points. 
Our mission is to empower every body to make confident wellness choices, guided by physician expertise and validated by real results. We do this by collaborating with leading physicians to develop straightforward, accessible probiotic supplements that deliver on promises.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Fièra Cosmetics
Description:
For too long, beauty has been tied to youth — overlooking the needs of women over 40. At Fièra Cosmetics, we’re changing that.

Founded in 2020, Fièra creates high-performance makeup and skincare designed specifically for mature skin. Our mission is to help women feel confident and beautiful at every age — because aging isn’t something to hide, it’s something to celebrate.

We proudly showcase real women in our campaigns and formulate our products with care. Every formula is paraben-free, non-GMO, fragrance-free, cruelty-free, and made in the USA. Because beauty isn’t about age — it’s about feeling your best, always

Name: TTK HEALTHCARE LIMITED
Description:
As a truly modern and diversified conglomerate, we have a wide range of products in FMCG, Animal Welfare , Ortho & Food Industries.
We at TTK Healthcare have significantly contributed to the advancement of the healthcare system in India over the last six decades through the development and commercialization of innovative products.
India’s first indigenous heart value prosthesis – the tilting disc, TTK Chitra Heart Valve, manufactured by TTK Healthcare, the only Indian company and amongst a few in the world with this capability.
Consumer Products Division markets and distributes products that transcend categories; baby care (Woodward’s Gripe Water), personal care (Eva), home care (Good Home) and sexual wellness (Skore).
TTK group has been in the condom business since 1950 and went on to establish the first condom manufacturing factory in the country. Our businesses are built on trust, transparency, knowledge, and relationships, which has won us some of our esteemed clients across the globe.
Our Animal Welfare Division caters to the health and well-being of wide range of animals such as cows and buffaloes, sheep and goats, poultry, dogs and cats, fish and shrimp. This division is dedicated to providing our customers with innovative solutions and improving health and productivity of their animals.
With 30 years of rich experience, TTK’s Food Division is India’s first and largest manufacturer of extruded products (papad), under the brand name Fryums. We pride ourselves on our ability to develop customized products based on our customers’ needs.
The Ortho Division is engaged in the manufacturing of quality orthopedic implants and instruments, in partnership with world-renowned Orthopaedic surgeon Frederick F. Buechel and a renowned expert in advance design, late Michael J. Pappas. The core focus is on bringing a high level of precision into the orthopedic manufacturing process and thus contribute significantly to the advancement of India’s orthopedics implant segment.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: SO.F.I.A Cosmetiques
Description:
SO.F.I.A COSMETIQUES Laboratories (French Society for Applied Engineering Industry) were created in 1989 in Mougins, by Dr. Alexander DINGAS (D.Sc) and a team of engineer, aiming to make a breakthrough in the field of dermo-cosmetics and white cosmetic by exploiting the assets of the extraordinary biodiversity of this region. 
              
Specialized in the creation, development, contract manufacturing and filling, SO.FIA COSMETIQUES Laboratories produce on demand gels, creams, milks, lotions and all products for cosmetic or health care for the face and the body, hair care products and sun care. SO.FIA COSMETIQUES Laboratories offers the creation of products from bulk to full-service through the semi-finished products. Known for its quality realization, SO.FIA COSMETIQUES Laboratories are one of the major players in the outsourcing in cosmetology in the South of France.
               
The passion of profession, professional ethics and dynamism drive men and women of SO.FIA COSMETIQUES, has enabled the company to double its business volume in four years. With turnover increasing steadily, SO.FIA COSMETIQUES generates more than 60% of it with foreign customers. The major part of Senior Engineers, Scientists and technicians in key areas of research, manufacturing and quality, enables the company to offer its customers a commercial reactivity and experience informed by analysis, advice , research and development but also in industrial production and range maagement, in a spirit of global service.

CERTIFICATIONS
-ISO 9001 – version 2015
-ISO 22716 (GMP) 
-COSMOS COMMITTED
-ISO 22600 COMMITTED


COMMITMENT & AWARDS
-Best Manufacturing Practise (category medium size companies) from France QUALITE
-Efficient and clean Energie – (water system) from ADEME
-Social responsability from NICE MATIN

Name: AX Beauty Brands
Description:
INSPIRED BY COMMUNITY, DRIVEN BY INSIGHTS. At the intersection of art, innovation, and data science, AX Beauty is a product development leader fueled by industry knowledge and data -driven insights.

WE ARE EXPERTS at our craft, empowering our team to create.

WE ARE TREND RIGHT with data that backs what we do.

WE ARE PARTNERS who value working alongside our retailers.

WE ARE SOLUTION ORIENTED creating brands & products that serve a real purpose.

WE ARE AX BEAUTY BRANDS! From concept to execution, our team of industry experts are ready to partner with you to achieve your goals.

Name: MAMIBA
Description:
Mamiba is the leader in designing, manufacturing, and distributing solutions for hotel rooms, bathrooms, and spas across the Middle East and Africa. For over ten years, we have maintained the highest quality standards for all our products, earning the trust of hospitality industry giants such as Marriott, Starwood, Fairmont, Hilton, and IHG, among others. Our services also extend to many four-star and boutique hotels, as well as hospitals in the region and beyond.

What sets Mamiba apart is our innovative approach to business. We have a deep understanding of the hospitality industry and adopt a youthful, personalized approach with each client. We consider our clients as partners, to whom we listen attentively and respond to their specific needs. Our flexibility and technical expertise allow us to continuously innovate and find individual solutions for each property we work with, effectively adapting to diverse market demands.

Our robust supply chain system includes logistic centers in several hubs across four continents to ensure access to local, in-stock supplies, thereby enhancing the efficiency and responsiveness of our services.

Name: Identiscents
Description:
Identiscents is a Fragrance and Primary Packaging trading company, founded by a French entrepreneur and based in the UAE since 1997. 
We’ve been serving the fast-paced world of beauty and perfumery with a simple mindset, be reliable, naturally built strong relationship that last, listen and observe the market needs to always think forward.
We collaborate closely with Europe’s best manufacturers to offer high-quality products and large-scale capacity, combining the craftmanship of our partners with the flexibility our clients need to grow.  
Creativity drives our approach. Through IDZ, our in-house packaging creative lab, we imagine, test, and refine new ideas to help our clients stand out.

Name: PT Nayue Kosmetik Indonesia
Description:
PT. Nayue Kosmetik Indonesia is an OEM/ODM cosmetics supply company, starting in 2017 and based in Jakarta. Our main factory currently is Shanghai Ayara Cosmetics Co., LTD in Shanghai, China and PT. Ayara Beauty Indonesia, located in Bogor, Indonesia.

Our vision: 
Becoming highly valued company by providing good image of products and work ethic. 

Our mission:
To keep creating innovative cosmetic products that meet customers' need as well as maintaining good service and experience with customers during the process.

Name: Art Cosmetics
Description:
We are the company that turned its passion for beauty into true art. We have always been recognized among the best Italian cosmetic companies, manufacturing cosmetics for third parties in the make-up and skincare sectors. We made innovation the key to create today the products of tomorrow.
We have always been able to innovate and we are ready to take on a new challenge. We welcome your ideas and make them real. This is our art. This is Art Cosmetics.

Name: Earth Rhythm
Description: Earth Rhythm is not just another skin care company. We are on a mission to make our customers healthier and our Earth a little greener. We are committed to healthy skin, healthy people and a healthy planet. Earth Rhythm is a commitment to producing the purest, healthiest skincare and educating everyone on why being “Earth Friendly” is so important. We strive to live with compassion, kindness and empathy; to be environmentally sustainable and to improve the lives of 6 billion people and animals while also being charitable and giving back to our global community.

Name: Selen Kozmetik
Description:
Selen Kozmetik, established in order to make the innovative personal care products meet the Turkish consumers and to offer the quality products based on the consumers’ needs in the market where it operates in 1997, aims to add the value to the sector with its importer identity in Turkey and to represent the Turkish cosmetic sector successfully in the international arena.

Selen Kozmetik, having the transparent and democratic structure, targets the continuous change and development as the institutional policy and always aims to be one step ahead from its competitors. Selen Kozmetik grows with all its employees and earns together with its suppliers, business partners and customers in cooperation with them and is helpful for the society, economy and environment, and proceeds on its way in this direction. Selen Kozmetik, commencing its production and branding works as of 2013, targets to become a brand which competes with the world’s leading brands carrying out the regular market researches through different and innovative product and marketing activities with its brand, URBAN Care.

It aims to become a family targeting to maintain the customer satisfaction which is the critical factor in the company’s achievements, to become responsible against the society and to attach importance to the ethical values and always to gain by creating a working environment that the employees are excited and proud of it, and is sincere and has the open communication. It assumes the mission to become the company which is the most preferred by the customers, partners and employees through a management mentality making investment to the skills, capacities and qualifications of its employees and revealing their potentials.

As Selen Kozmetik offers the different beauty and care opportunities, it aims to create the conscious consumers on health and life. Selen Kozmetik has supported the works on raising the awareness on breast cancer in Turkey since 2005.

Name: Yves Rocher Italia
Description:
MARCA N°1 NEI TRATTAMENTI VISO IN FRANCIA* 
Fondatore della Cosmétique Végétale nel 1959, Yves Rocher ha creato un nuovo concetto di bellezza, basata su valori fondanti: l’esperienza e l’expertise botanica, un approccio scientifico incentrato sulla conoscenza delle piante e delle loro eccezionali capacità, unito a una precisa competenza nei meccanismi della pelle, che consente di sviluppare prodotti efficaci, di qualità, innovativi e più sostenibili. Un binomio scienza-natura, chiamato Dermocosmesi botanica, per rendere il meglio della natura accessibile a tutti. È a La Gacilly, nel cuore delle Bretagna, e nelle oltre 250 filiere nel mondo certificate per l’approvvigionamento responsabile, che nascono prodotti in grado di soddisfare tutti i desideri di bellezza: dal viso, al corpo e capelli, make-up e profumi. Con prodotti e packaging eco-concepiti e il sostegno ai progetti della Fondazione Yves Rocher, la Marca porta avanti la sua mission: rivelare, proteggere e trasmettere il potere delle piante. Nel 2019 il Gruppo Rocher è diventato Mission-driven Company: l’azienda ha formalizzato la sua mission e la volontà di avere un impatto positivo su Ambiente, Persone e Comunità.
 
YVES ROCHER IN ITALIA
In Italia, siamo presenti dal 1987 con due canali distributivi.
Social Selling: un sistema di vendita che permette un contatto privilegiato e di fiducia con ogni cliente.  Ad oggi, sono più di 100.000 i Consulenti di Bellezza che operano su tutto il territorio nazionale.
Negozi esclusivi Yves Rocher: sono 109 i punti vendita dove il personale, altamente qualificato, è a disposizione per consigli di bellezza personalizzati.
Dal 13 Aprile 2021, sull’onda della strada intrapresa dal Gruppo Rocher, Yves Rocher Italia è diventata Società Benefit: lo scopo generale dell'azienda non sarà più solo la crescita economica ma anche importanti finalità di beneficio comune.

*Fonte: Kantar Worldpanel. Total women purchases. Anno 2023 (aggiornato al 24/12/2023)

Name: SASC Official
Description:
OUR STORY

Founded in June 2017, SASC, the Socially Aware Sexy Cosmetics is a company founded by three women who believe that beauty is not only skin deep.By looking beautiful and feeling good about themselves, women are empowered to make changes in the world and help those in need.

Together they create a brand that are professionally formulated and are extremely wearable basics for everyday look. Makeup is the most basic thing a woman would put on whatever the occasion. SASC wants to promote confidence, intelligence and outspokenness in women through our high quality, yet affordable cosmetics. Some proceeds from each of our sales are donated yearly to charitable foundations across Indonesia. We hope to empower women in Indonesia through beauty and giving back to the local communities.

Name: Fragrance World
Description:
Fragrance World started with the sole mission of providing a premium perfumery experience to every consumer irrespective of their economic and social strata.
Over the years the brand has not only drawn inspiration from the most celebrated heritage brands across the world but has also elevated its craft with new inventions and originality. But one thing that has always been constant throughout this journey is that it has always put quality, performance and accessible pricing at its forefront and has been successful in achieving the same. Result? Enormous customer satisfaction over 20 years across 150 + countries and 6 continents

Name: Scents N Stories
Description: We manufacture EDP perfumes which are affordable and of high quality. This had lead to Scents'n Stories being the leading perfume manufacturer in Pakistan.

Name: Valmont Group
Description:
Heir to the Swiss medical tradition, Valmont has been working its magic for 40 years from the shores of Lake Geneva.
At the service of singular, assertive and radiant beauty, Valmont perpetuates its quest for excellence and efficiency, celebrating women and men through three prestigious brands and exclusive spa experiences:
- VALMONT: The unique expertise of cellular cosmetics draws upon Swiss nature in a concentration of highly effective anti-aging treatments.
- L’ELIXIR DES GLACIERS: Science takes the natural elements of Switzerland to new heights of exceptional skincare; efficacious formulas, delightful to the touch. 
- STORIE VENEZIANE BY VALMONT: The epitome of creativity in unique olfactory collections. 

Valmont is a family group built on strong values. Excellence, exclusivity, creativity, family and effectiveness drive a passionate community of more than 600 employees. 
A community promoting beauty all around the world. 
A community guided by an inspiring manifesto: from passion comes excellence, from family unity, a deep inspiration, from contrasts, a total harmony. Enter a world of magic… where beauty is reinvented in art, where Swiss nature combines with science, where elegance is a perpetual quest of the senses. To reveal one’s singular harmony, principal source of audacious and radiant beauty.

Enter the world of Valmont… a world of magic.

Name: PharmaBest, réseau pharmacies
Description:
PharmaBest est l’un des premiers réseaux de pharmacies organisées en France, et une enseigne de distribution de référence, classée 59ᵉ au Top 100 LSA.
Au 1ᵉʳ avril 2025, le groupement rassemble 135 pharmacies d’envergure (surface moyenne de 800 m²), réparties sur l’ensemble du territoire national, en Corse, en Outre-mer… et désormais en Espagne .

Avec un chiffre d’affaires de 1,4 milliard d’euros en 2024 et 3 600 collaborateurs, dont 900 pharmaciens inscrits à l’Ordre, PharmaBest s’impose comme un acteur majeur de la santé de proximité.
Notre ambition : transformer la pharmacie traditionnelle en un véritable pôle de santé, de beauté et de bien-être.

Notre modèle repose sur trois piliers :
• Une offre très large en libre accès, accompagnée de conseils personnalisés
• Des services de santé intégrés : vaccination, dépistage, bilans thérapeutiques, orthopédie…
• Une stratégie de marques propres (PharmaScience, PharmaBaby, Pureté), avec 200 références, majoritairement éco-conçues et fabriquées en France

Depuis 2022, nous investissons également dans la formation continue avec le programme PharmaBest Academy, conçu pour accompagner la montée en compétences des équipes de nos officines.

 En avril 2025, PharmaBest a franchi une nouvelle étape dans le déploiement de son modèle, avec son implantation en Espagne.
La pharmacie Aluche 24h à Madrid a rejoint le groupement, devenant la première vitrine internationale de notre vision : un espace de 500 m² ouvert 24h/24, conçu comme un pôle de santé moderne, digitalisé et performant.

Fidèle à notre singularité, PharmaBest Espagne est un réseau détenu par des pharmaciens entrepreneurs.

 PharmaBest a pour Président le Dr David Abenhaim, pharmacien associé de la pharmacie PharmaBest Prado-Mermoz à Marseille, et pour Directeur Général, Alain Styl.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Peter Thomas Roth Clinical Skin Care
Description:
The Peter Thomas Roth brand philosophy is simple; Breakthrough formulas. Astonishing results. As the CEO, founder and product formulator, Peter leads all research and development efforts to deliver progressive, cutting-edge products in his own lab and production facility. He scours the earth for the best and most powerful ingredients to deliver state of the art quality at effective concentrations.
 
Peter’s passion for skin care is derived from his quest to find effective products to treat his own personal skin care concerns. Initially his primary issue was acne and as time went on anti-aging issues as well. His interests eventually grew into a desire to find the best tools to combat acne, the many signs of aging, as well as protecting the skin from sun damage. His mission: to combine effective and potent ingredients with advanced technology. The product line currently consists of a comprehensive range of over 100 products sold world-wide. The Peter Thomas Roth line was created to be customized to an individual’s skin care needs, covers all skin types and addresses all skin care concerns from head to toe.

Name: Laura Mercier Cosmetics
Description:
Laura Mercier, the pioneer of the “Flawless Face”, is a world-renowned makeup artist and creator of Laura Mercier Cosmetics, Skincare, Body & Bath and Fragrance.  Laura is the innovative force behind the brand’s iconic products, French aesthetic and artistry techniques.   She continues to teach and inspire through her philosophy; “What makes you unique makes you beautiful.”

In 1996, Laura Mercier Cosmetics was launched, grounded in Laura’s philosophy to create a naturally flawless complexion. The line is designed to benefit women of all ages and skin types. Through her artisan lens, she personally creates the colours and products to satisfy the global needs of women today. The collection is now available in in 27 countries.

The Laura Mercier collection has received numerous accolades from customers and magazine editors. Her Tinted Moisturizer is repeatedly named in magazine ‘Best of Awards’ - InStyle 2016/2015 Best Beauty Buys included Tinted Moisturizer - Oil Free Foundation and Secret Camouflage.  Silk Crème Moisturizing Photo Edition Foundation won the May 2016 CEW Beauty Insider Award. Caviar Stick Eye Colour in Tuxedo won the 2016, Allure, Best of Beauty Award. The iconic Translucent Loose Setting Powder won the Designer Buys 2016 Glamour Beauty Awards and the InStyle 2015 Best Beauty Buys. Laura’s Secret Camouflage Brush won the Allure, Best of Beauty 2016: Tools.

Name: Wella
Description: Wella AG is a major German hair care company headquartered in Geneva, Switzerland.

Name: INGLOT Cosmetics
Description:
At INGLOT, we believe that beauty is an intentional expression of individuality, and a thoughtful meticulous process beyond-stereotypes of creating products within the scientific realm with the greatest attention to detail. We operate in specialized laboratories where we conduct advanced research, creating formulas that blend technology, colors, and industry trends. As a fundamental principle of our brand, we offer makeup that not only enhances beauty but also cares for the skin.

INGLOT's product portfolio includes makeup, accessories, and skincare products available in three lines: Core, Playinn, and InglotLab 1983. We are pioneers in the concept of personalized makeup palettes known as the Freedom System, the unique product Duraline, and the famous AMC gel eyeliner, one of the most popular worldwide.
We are committed to creating diverse products that celebrate and respect everyone's uniqueness. Our broad and diverse range, designed for everyone, allows the freedom of expression in a unique style. Makeup and skincare enthusiasts can find us in 90 countries, with over 2000+ locations and on more than 250+ e-commerce platforms. We are dedicated to expanding our sales channels both online and offline.

As a cruelty-free brand listed on PETA, we do not test our products on animals. Over 70% of our portfolio consists of products with certified vegan formulas, and most are also halal certified. Since 2011, we have adhered to Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) principles, ensuring excellent production conditions and the highest quality ingredients.

Consistently, we advocate for local production, with 95% of our products manufactured in specialized laboratories and production facilities in Przemyśl (Poland, EU).

Name: Dalla
Description:
Missão: Garantir que todas as pessoas possam se amar através da sua própria beleza. Criar os melhores e mais conhecidos produtos de maquiagem do Brasil.

Visão: Democratizar o acesso à cosméticos de qualidade. Ser a marca de maquiagens mais conhecida do Brasil. 

Valores: Liberdade, Honestidade, Inovação, Sensibilidade e Paixão.

Name: Rituals Cosmetics España (B Corp)
Description:
Fundada en el año 2000 en Ámsterdam (Países Bajos), Rituals fue la primera marca en combinar productos para el hogar y el cuerpo. A día de hoy, contamos con más de 1.000 tiendas en 36 países que se han convertido en un auténtico destino para el bienestar. Nuestra filosofía The Art Of Soulful Living  (El arte de vivir con alma) nos motiva a ayudar a las personas en su viaje hacia el bienestar personal, mediante consejos, inspiración y lujosos productos que permiten reconectar el cuerpo, la mente y el alma.
 
Como empresa certificada B Corp, creemos en el bienestar personal, creando colecciones que son beneficiosas para las personas y para el planeta, y basadas en tres pilares: Limpios, Conscientes y Comprometidos. Limpios: el 79 % de nuestros productos de cuidado personal contienen >90 % de ingredientes de origen natural, y para 2023 todas nuestras fórmulas habrán cumplido esta norma. Conscientes: escogemos opciones sostenibles; cada colección cuenta con opciones de recarga, y plantamos, protegemos o recuperamos un árbol por cada recarga vendida. Comprometidos: nos enorgullece apoyar iniciativas sociales, como Tiny Miracles, una fundación pionera que ayuda a romper el ciclo de la pobreza facilitando trabajo transformador en comunidades marginadas en Bombay, en la India.
 
Esta filosofía de bienestar sostenible está integrada en nuestra cultura empresarial. Nuestros equipos están formados por personas de mentalidad abierta, energéticas y focalizadas en priorizar a los consumidores. Si quieres saber más, no te pierdas nuestras vacantes. Esperamos que te unas a nosotros, en nuestras oficinas o en las tiendas.

Name: Emami Bangladesh Limited
Description:
Emami Bangladesh Limited is a subsidiary of Emami Limited, a well-known international FMCG conglomerate that operates in the personal care and healthcare sectors across the world.

 Here are some key details about Emami Bangladesh Limited:

Business Overview: Emami Bangladesh Limited focuses on marketing and distributing personal care and healthcare products. The company caters to diverse consumer needs and preferences across 70 countries. It has dedicated manufacturing units in India and abroad to develop products suited for different markets.

Products: Emami offers a range of popular brands in Bangladesh. Some of these include:

7 Oils: It is formulated with a blend of seven different oils, each contributing unique benefits. The product is non-sticky, making it comfortable to use and provides nourishment, conditioning, and protection. The brand has recently introduced a new extension in the shampoo category.

Navratna: Known for its cooling properties, Navratna is a widely used hair oil.

BoroPlus: A trusted brand for skincare, BoroPlus offers creams and lotions.

Zandu: Zandu products include balms and ayurvedic healthcare items.

Kesh King: Kesh King specializes in hair care.

Fair and Handsome: A major player in fairness cream products for men.

Cream 21: Emami Limited acquired the German skincare brand Creme 21 in January 2019. It offers Moisturizing Cream, Lotion & Soap with Vitamin E.

Name: Beiersdorf Polska
Description:
CARE CHANGES EVERYTHING- to hasło, które na co dzień przyświeca nam w naszych działaniach!

Jesteśmy Beiersdorf –  jedną z wiodących na świecie firm zajmujących się pielęgnacją skóry. Siłą napędową naszego sukcesu są wspaniałe marki, takie jak NIVEA, światowy numer 1 na rynku masowym, Eucerin w branży farmaceutycznej oraz nasz lokalny skarb – Bambino.

Obecnie działając w ramach trzech spółek: NIVEA Polska, Beiersdorf Manufacturing Poznań oraz Beiersdorf Shared Services Poland zatrudniamy około 1000 pracowników.

Naszą filozofię możemy streścić w 4 punktach:
CARE BEYOND SKIN
PEOPLE BEYOND EMPLOYEES
TOGETHERNESS BEYOND TEAMS
BRANDS BEYOND PRODUCTS

Dołącz do nas i przekonaj się, że #CARECHANGESEVERYTHING.

Name: GOTHA COSMETICS
Description:
The Beauty Accelerator. 

Gotha Cosmetics is one of the most dynamic B2B contract manufacturers of color cosmetics. Grown rapidly since its foundation in 2005, Gotha is the partner of choice of the most innovative, fast growing Beauty brands worldwide, which search for creativity, high quality and speed to market. 

Gotha Cosmetics inspires its clients with innovative, disruptive Make-up products, through which they can engage, delight and surprise the final consumers. 

The company’s value system is built around customer centricity, agility and service excellence, allowing to create long-term partnerships with its clients.

Gotha Cosmetics is based close to Milan and has additional sales and marketing office in Paris, New York, Los Angeles, Seoul and Shanghai.

Name: Fragonard Parfumeur
Description:
C’est une belle histoire de parfums et de famille... 
Une histoire qui commence à Grasse en 1926, lorsque Eugène Fuchs ouvre une parfumerie à l’enseigne de Fragonard en hommage au célèbre peintre grassois. De père en fils et de fils en petit-fils, les familles Fuchs et Costa développent l’entreprise. La fabrique de l’époque est désormais devenue une usine et s’étend sur trois sites différents qui restent toujours ouverts au public, où les visiteurs découvrent les secrets de fabrication de nos parfums, ainsi que l’histoire de la parfumerie. Dans cette saga familiale, viennent ensuite les femmes de la famille : Anne, Agnès et Françoise, qui ont rejoint très jeunes leur père aux commandes de l’entreprise pour assurer la relève et conduire la Maison vers d’autres horizons : mode, art de vivre et de la table, cadeaux exclusifs. 

Aujourd'hui, la Parfumerie Fragonard possède trois usines de production sur la Côte d'Azur (à Grasse et Eze), trois Musées du Parfum à Paris dans le quartier de l'Opéra et une vingtaine de boutiques.

Name: StriVectin Operating Company
Description: StriVectin is a line of science-powered, award-winning skincare products with serious clinical credentials that deliver real, visible results. Our products are formulated with integrity for every skin type, tone and age, and solve the most frustrating skincare concerns as skin ages and changes. StriVectin products are sold online and through department stores and specialty retailers in North America, Europe, the Middle East and Asia. For more information, visit www.strivectin.com.

Name: APRIUM PHARMACIE
Description: Aprium Pharmacie est une enseigne de pharmacies présente partout en France avec plus de 515 pharmacies. Nos équipes officinales sont à l'écoute pour accompagner les patients et répondre aux questions santé du quotidien, garantir les meilleurs prix sur tous les produits de parapharmacie et faciliter la vie des patients avec de multiples services.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Bioage Skincare
Description:
Há 25 anos, a Bioage Skincare é referência no segmento de cuidados estéticos profissionais e dermocosméticos. Nossos produtos de alta performance, garantem resultados excepcionais tanto nos tratamentos realizados em consultórios quanto no seu cuidado diário em casa. Com um portfólio de mais de 250 produtos, atendemos a todas as necessidades da pele, desde cuidados essenciais até tratamentos específicos como redução de medidas, celulite, pró-aging, acne e clareamento.

Presente em mais de 24 estados do Brasil, a Bioage também leva toda sua expertise para  15 países diferentes, consolidando-se como uma das maiores e mais diversificadas empresas do segmento. Em 2021, a marca foi adquirida pela Hypera Pharma, um dos maiores grupos farmacêuticos do Brasil, fortalecendo ainda mais nosso compromisso com qualidade e inovação.

Neste ano, celebramos com muito orgulho 25 anos de história, uma trajetória construída com dedicação, inovação e, acima de tudo, o carinho e confiança dos profissionais de estética e suas pacientes. Cada passo dado, cada conquista alcançada, nos lembra da importância de cuidar e transformar a pele de tantas pessoas, não apenas com nossos produtos, mas com o compromisso de estar ao lado de cada um em sua jornada de autocuidado. Estamos muito felizes por poder continuar esse caminho, oferecendo excelência e inovação a cada tratamento, dentro e fora dos consultórios.

Acompanhe a Bioage nas redes sociais para ficar por dentro das últimas novidades, lançamentos e dicas de cuidados com a pele:
