Name: Bolton - Collistar
Description:
Collistar page will no longer be active and will be closed permanently on December 31st, 2024.

As we continue to evolve and strive for better ways to serve our community, we are making a significant change. Our current LinkedIn page will be transitioning to a new home! Following this, all historical content on this page will become inaccessible, and the page will not be monitored.

For the latest updates, insides, and discussions around all aspects of Collistar, we warmly invite you to join us at our new LinkedIn page: Bolton. 

We are incredibly grateful for the support and engagement you have shown us over the years. 
Your enthusiasm and feedback have been instrumental in our journey, and we're excited to continue this power you on our new page.

Name: Nutrifactor Laboratories Pvt Ltd.
Description:
Nutrifactor has been manufacturing food supplements, vitamins, minerals and other natural health care products for more than 10 years. Our 30+ years of expertise in family-owned pharmaceutical business has enabled us to identify industry trends far ahead of the competition. Nutrifactor has invested heavily in extensive manufacturing, well equipped laboratory, modern instruments, efficient distribution and warehousing capabilities that position us for future growth and allow us to serve better both domestically and internationally.
We are specialized in the formulation, development, manufacturing and marketing of a wide range of affordable, safe, effective and high-quality supplements. Additionally, our manufacturing facility is certified and approved by Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan (DRAP).
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Coferly Cosmética
Description:
Atuando no mercado de cosméticos desde 1936, a Coferly Cosmética é a pioneira e a maior empresa de terceirização em coloração e descoloração capilar da América do Sul.

Uma empresa 100% brasileira, instalada em uma área de 12.000 m² em Cotia (SP), com laboratórios próprios e uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados. Oferece um centro técnico permanente à disposição dos clientes e possui certificações emitidas por todos os órgãos competentes.

A busca constante por inovação e a melhoria contínua de seus produtos tornam seus projetos únicos e exclusivos.

Atenta aos movimentos do mercado, a Coferly também se destaca pelo lançamento de tendências em coloração e descoloração capilar, oferecendo aos seus clientes soluções atualizadas que antecipam as demandas dos consumidores.

Sempre comprometida em estar à frente, investe fortemente em pesquisa, desenvolvimento e tecnologia aplicada à produção. Utiliza matérias-primas de procedência garantida, fornecidas pelos melhores parceiros globais, o que lhe rendeu o reconhecimento das principais marcas de coloração profissional no Brasil.

Nossa missão é produzir cosméticos capilares que atendam às necessidades de cada cliente.

Nossos valores são: Pessoas, Respeito, Responsabilidade, Resiliência e Inovação.

Name: GROUPE BERDOUES Parfums et Cosmétiques
Description:
GROUPE BERDOUES imagine, design, develop and distribute perfumes and cosmetics since 1902.

With its know-how and the dynamism of its teams, GROUPE BERDOUES is present in more than 40 countries with its brands:
• Consumer brands: Blondépil, Les Petits Plaisirs and Gorgée de Soleil
• Selective brands: Berdoues and Molyneux

Groupe Berdoues also acts as a subcontractor for many cosmetic and pharmaceutical companies. Its integrated production tool enables the company to maintain its level of quality, ensure product traceability, reduce risks and optimize the industrial tool. R&D teams are dedicated and integrated; the production and packaging tool, internalized.

More information on www.groupe-berdoues.com

Name: Tru Fragrance & Beauty
Description:
We design, produce, and market fragrance & beauty brands that intimately connect with consumers.

We continually deliver fresh insights and operational excellence, earning our position as partner of choice for world-class retailers and brands.

WHAT WE DO
For over 47 years, Tru has partnered with retailers and brands to capitalize on the enormous category potential of fragrance and beauty. By offering creative and nimble design, sourcing and financing, we’ve helped transform retailers into lifestyle destinations with must-have beauty offerings. The result is delighted, dedicated consumers - and highly profitable, recurring cash flows.

Our tailored approach allows for a unique client list spanning from iconic global retailers to innovative upstarts.

Seamless global inventory management and distribution has made us an optimal partner for large-scale retailers, while our flexibility offers the reactivity and speed-to-market needed in today’s fast-paced fashion world.

Our offices in New York and Chicago house design, marketing, finance, quality and distribution resources. Satellite offices in Los Angeles, Dallas, Denver and Boston offer convenience for our clients and a deeper connection to national market trends.

Our long-term sourcing and manufacturing partners are located in the U.S., Canada, India, and China.

CAPABILITIES
We craft and globally distribute iconic fragrance and beauty brands that intimately connect with consumers.
 
CULTURE
Our talented team are your partners in category management and growth. Our knowledge, transparency, curiosity and passion is leveraged every day by brand and retail teams who consider us an extension of their corporate family.

Name: Oway
Description:
OWAY creates professional agricosmetic treatments for hair, face and body.
Having set out on its journey in quality cosmetics back in 1948 in Bologna, OWAY today has a presence in hair salons in over 70 countries worldwide, online, in single-brand boutiques and in selected concepts stores. 
Based on the biodynamic, zero-mile, organic, and fair trade ingredients, we create agricosmetic treatments and rituals combining extraordinary performance with healthful formulations which have a high concentration of botanical ingredients.
We have a profound belief in respect for the environment and for promoting waste reduction. Each and every formulation, packaging, material, individual article or tool is designed to have a minimal environmental impact and to be long-lasting or reusable and composted or transformed into a new resource. 
Our products' high concentration of botanical active ingredients and their incredible effectiveness when applied in the right amount make them perfect for a wide variety of uses. 
We have reduced the quantity of the plastic we use in our salons in by 99%.
We package our formulations in glass bottles and jars and aluminium tubes which are completely and infinitely reusable and recyclable. We avoid using unnecessary packaging and wrapping materials. All our tools, items and articles are made of wood, glass, aluminium, organic regenerated cotton, recycled paper and many other natural ecological materials.
We have built two special cutting-edge, zero-mile workshops right next to our main production plant: ORTOFFICINA, our farm estate where we grow officinal plants using biodynamic methods, and ARTIGIANO, our wood laboratory where we design and manufacture packaging, furniture and objects following the principles of circular design. 
At OWAY, we are pragmatic dreamers, tireless creatives, design fanatics, and indefatigable researchers into the innovation that can help us make our present more and more sustainable.

Name: HYPHEN
Description: The journey of Hyphen began when we discovered the challenges individuals face with the ever-growing options for addressing any skin concern, each helmed with different ingredients. Here, we hyphenate multiple ingredients to craft result-driven solutions catering to every Indian's skin concern. Nature's power and the potency of science come together in each bottle, offering an array of benefits and a touch of magic that elevates your skincare to a whole new level. Hyphen is fueled by our passion for skincare and a vision to build a brand that empowers you to HAVE IT ALL.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Kryolan Professional Make-up
Description:
At Kryolan, we make make-up. But not like anybody else. Because unlike everybody else, we actually make our make-up. As one of the first cosmetics brands in the world, we use our own formulas and recipes to manufacture our own products. We think of them. We create them. Formulate them and love them into existence. We’ve been doing this over 75 years. And we’re still doing it today.

There is only one real professional make-up maker. There is only one Kryolan. 

• Never tested on animals and uses food-grade quality ingredients whenever available.
• Meets and exceeds all standards; FDA, EU, GMP and KRYOLAN PROFESSIONAL MAKE-UP is now the first range of color make-up products to receive the Seal of Quality Approval from the European Centre for Allergy Research Foundation (ECARF).

Name: ONE/SIZE
Description: Inspired by our founder and digital icon, Patrick Starrr, ONE/SIZE is redefining beauty by elevating the voices of the unheard. ONE/SIZE is a beauty brand driving kindness and individuality through meaningful connection, profound storytelling, and innovative artistry. We make space for everyone to belong in our movement for radical expression. ONE/SIZE is committed to delivering extraordinary products and larger than life performances. Makeup is a ONE/SIZE fits all!

Name: Kiss Products, Inc.
Description:
We’re KISS Group, the innovative global leader in beauty care. For over 30 years, our company has been committed to making professional-quality, trend-forward beauty products and treatments that are accessible to all. Today, our products are sold in over 100 countries worldwide. Together, we’re bringing more beauty and confidence into the world. 

At KISS, our people are the talent behind beauty innovation. Ours is a story of growth and inspiration. Ours is a culture of passion and commitment. Our fast-paced days are filled with food and friendships. And, as we power forward, our success will build our confidence, and our experiences will advance our careers.

As we are committed to investing in our employees and supporting their work/life balance through hybrid work schedules and much more, we invite you to explore all the benefits of building a career with KISS. We offer countless ways to grow and gain career-building experiences, while bringing life-changing beauty breakthroughs to the global market. Bring your passion and appetite for learning, and better our company and your career. Reimagine a better, more beautiful future. Join our team: www.kissusa.com/careers

Name: TOPICREM - Laboratoire Dermatologique
Description:
TOPICREM est la marque dermatologique des laboratoires pharmaceutiques Mayoly Spindler, acteur de santé français familial et indépendant depuis 1909. La marque développe une approche unique du soin de la peau, qui associe l’efficacité dermatologique au plaisir d’application, la Dermatologie Bien-être.
Au cœur de cette approche, l’équipe R&D TOPICREM basée à Dammarie-Les-Lys (77) sélectionne rigoureusement des actifs de référence de la plus haute pureté, d’origine naturelle ou physiologique, associée à une exigence d’efficacité et de tolérance qui va au-delà des standards cosmétiques. TOPICREM propose ainsi une gamme de soins qui s’adresse à tous les problèmes des peaux sensibles, quels que soient leur âge, leur couleur ou leur style de vie.
La marque est N°1 des laits hydratants en France. Elle est désormais commercialisée dans 71 pays à travers le monde.

TOPICREM is the dermatological brand of the pharmaceutical laboratories Mayoly Spindler, French family and independent health actor since 1909. The brand has developed a unique approach to skin care, which combines dermatological efficacy with the pleasure of application, Feel-Good Dermatology .
At the heart of this approach, the TOPICREM R&D team based in Dammarie-Les-Lys (77) rigorously selects benchmark active ingredients of the highest purity, of natural or physiological origin, associated with a requirement for efficacy and tolerance. which goes beyond cosmetic standards. TOPICREM offers a range of care that addresses all the problems of sensitive skin, whatever their age, color or lifestyle.
The brand is Number 1 for moisturizing milks in France. It is now marketed in 71 countries around the world.

Name: Professional Medical Expertise Co,. (ProMedEx)
Description:
ProMedEx is a medical devices distributor based in the Saudi Arabian market, selecting representation of manufacturers of innovative state of the art medical technologies.

Professionally staffed and well financed with an aggressive marketing strategy, Promedex offers you the key to market penetration & expansion in market share from the Gulf market.

We are inspired by the needs of these patients and health care providers who treat them. The company also plays an active part in developing the skills of leading medical practitioners.
There is a fundamental that serves the foundation of our company:

We provide solutions
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Coral Perfumes Industry LLC
Description:
Coral Perfume Industry LLC Incorporated is well known name in the ever flourishing industry in Dubai, UAE established for the purpose of producing and cater the board variety of fragrances to clients that are both domestic and foreign in nature. Asides our products, we offers Private label manufacturing for Malls and Corporate etc.

Our vision which is to be the leading perfume and fragrance industry in Middle East as well as Globally, will be achieved as we have put together the best strategies to ensure that these goals and missions are achieved.

Name: Re'equil India Private Limited
Description: When the equilibrium of anything in life is disrupted, the healthy balance is lost. The idea for Re’equil is to retain the lost equilibrium of skin, hair, expectations, and results. Re’equil as a brand is formed on the ideology of offering effective formulations and bridging the gap between delivering what we claim while setting the right expectations. We are committed to offering personal care products that are clinically tested and proven to yield results. Healthy skin and hair care begin with choosing products that promise efficacy and are made for you. We are dedicated to offering effective, honest, and efficacy driven solutions that are clinically tested to suit every unique skin type.

Name: NOVÉAL-L'Oréal Groupe
Description:
Novéal develops and guarantees exclusive, high performance ingredients to satisfy the beauty needs of consumers around the world.
At Novéal we deliver innovative solutions using green chemistry and green-tech thanks to our 3 expertises :
. SUSTAINABLE CHEMISTRY:
We are committed to a sustainable, environmentally-friendly approach to design high-performance production processes.
. BIOTECHNOLOGIES :
We are continually developing new, active, natural ingredients by enzymatic catalysis, plant cell culture technology and fermentation.
. INNOVATIVE TECHNOLOGIES :
We have access to the cutting-edge technologies including eco-friendly plant extraction, technical blends and reactive extrusion, all dedicated to serving your ingredients.

.OUR STRENGTHS
•	An understanding of the challenges of formulations, and a close partnership with R&I
•	Exclusivity and intellectual property of ingredients
•	A firm commitment on SBWA and TRUST
•	Proven experience for innovative technologies and processes
•	The guarantee of continuity in the supply and quality of ingredients

Together we are breaking new ground, transforming and innovating to create the beauty of the future: a more responsible, sustainable and technological beauty to meet the beauty expectations of consumers around the world.

#biotechnology #sustanaiblechemistry #ingredients #rawmaterials #greentech #greenchemistry #innovativetechnologies #highperformance #innovation #renewable #beauty #cleanbeauty #process #ecofriendly #natural #biomimecry

Name: LABORATORIOS MAVERICK S.L.U
Description: LABORATORIOS MAVERICK SL is a Cosmetic Research company located in Calle Paris 4 (Pg. Ind Vall De Pins), Ulldecona, Catalonia, Spain.

Name: PETTENON COSMETICS
Description:
For almost 80 years, Pettenon Cosmetics S.p.A S.B. Group has stood out as an international leader in the professional hair care sector, promoting beauty in an ethical and sustainable way through high-quality cosmetic products. Recognized worldwide as a symbol of excellence by industry professionals, Pettenon Cosmetics offers a wide multi-brand range entirely Made in Italy and a comprehensive Private Label service, which represents a fundamental component of its offering.

With three production facilities located in San Martino di Lupari (PD), Cartigliano (VI), and San Sepolcro (AR), it is among the few companies in the industry that boast a comprehensive production cycle, complete with in-house Research and Development laboratories, microbiology, quality control, and professional training academies. 

Pettenon Cosmetics SpA SB has been a Benefit Company since 2021. The company is actively implementing tangible sustainability measures to safeguard the environment and provide ongoing assistance to the local community.

Name: PLUMARI S.A.
Description:
Desde 1964 somos especialistas en el  desarrollo y la producción de cosmética capilar.
Somos una empresa de triple impacto comprometida con el medio ambiente, la responsabilidad social y la sostenibilidad económica.
Nuestra misión es impulsar el crecimiento de nuestro negocio de manera sostenible y sustentable, mediante el desarrollo de productos de calidad, cuidando la salud de las personas y el medio ambiente en cada paso de nuestros procesos; buscando a la vez inspirar a otros a hacer lo mismo.  
Desarrollamos y fabricamos nuestras  propias marcas (EstereoColor, Bonmetique, Nougat, Strategy , entre otras)-orientadas al retail y al uso profesional. Además, acompañamos a terceros en el desarrollo de sus marcas,  trabajando en  conjunto desde la gestación del proyecto hasta la entrega del producto terminado, orientados a contribuir al éxito y a la rentabilidad de nuestros clientes.
Exportamos hace más de 30  años, a países como, Estados Unidos, Chile, España, Francia, Arabia  ,Brasil entre otros.
Todas nuestras fórmulas son desarrolladas bajo las reglamentaciones internacionales del FDA y la Unión Europea. 
Somos Plumari,  belleza sostenible.

Name: VITACEEL
Description: İçeriği Güçlü Lezzetli Ürünlerimiz ile Sağlığına Tatlı Bir Dokunuş Yap... Cilt Vitamini, Saç&Tırnak Vitamini, Uyku Vitamini, Magnezyum ve daha fazlası...
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PyD
Description:
Founded in Spain in 1998, PyD has led the creation, development, marketing, and distribution of luxury perfumery and cosmetics since its inception.
Throughout its journey, it has launched fragrances for exclusive brands such as TOUS, HALLOWEEN, SCALPERS, EL GANSO, and Nightology, recently adding OTEYZA and BIMBA Y LOLA to its portfolio.
In addition, it distributes a wide variety of brands including Juliette Has a Gun, Versace, Moschino, Michael Kors, and TUMI, among others, through its various subsidiaries, with a presence in over 85 countries.
PyD is a member of ADEFAM, STANPA, and the CRE100DO Foundation. Its President, Pedro Trolez Martínez, has been part of the Círculo de Empresarios since 2022.

Name: Skincare Pakistan
Description:
Skincare is one of the growing FMCG companies in Pakistan serving in the category of cosmetic and toiletries products. Launched in 2005, Skincare has taken a lead in the market with some of its unique products positioned very differently from competitors' products. Our portfolio includes creams, lotions, soaps, powders, face washes and men's care products. 

Through its well equipped R & D facilities, Skincare has been able to establish itself as an innovative organization. The research team of Skincare consists of chemists and scientists and their focus is on product development using natural ingredients. In addition to product research, Skincare strongly believes in market research as well. All the product development is done based on consumer insights. Our products are well experimented and full of ingredients like goat milk, haldi and neem which provide the best care for skin. The power brand of the company is Skin White. Fairmenz is the pioneer in the fairness cream for men segment in Pakistan. 


We strive for excellence in everything that we do in the area of our products and our people. We are continuously working to provide our beauty conscious customers with the excellent quality products accompanied by the long lasting effects. 

Vision 

We aim to become the best cosmetic and toiletries manufacturing company in Pakistan. We want people to look good and feel more confident by using our different brands which are there to spread beauty everywhere. 

SkinCare currently exports its quality beauty and personal care products to the following countries: 

Dubai 
Afghanistan 
Iraq 
Sri Lanka 
Sudan 
Mauritius 
South Africa 
Yemen 
Malaysia 

SkinCare has also exhibited its portfolio in the Annual International Trade Exhibition Beauty World Middle East Dubai, in May 2013 and in May 2014.

Name: Farlabo
Description:
Desde 1947, en Farlabo trabajamos con un propósito claro: acercar la belleza, la innovación y la excelencia de las mejores marcas internacionales de lujo al mercado español. Somos especialistas en la distribución de perfumeria selectiva, cosmética de lujo y maquillaje, y lo hacemos desde un enfoque personalizado, estratégico y profundamente conectado con el valor de cada marca que representamos.

Nuestro portfolio incluye marcas reconocidas como Dolce & Gabbana, Rochas, Montblanc, Jimmy Choo, Helena Rubinstein o Juvena, entre muchas otras. Cada una es única, y nuestra misión es ser el puente que las conecta con el cliente final, con autenticidad, precisión y pasión.

Pero detrás de cada éxito, campaña o colaboración hay algo aún más valioso: nuestro equipo.

¿Por qué unirte a Farlabo?
 
Porque aquí no solo representamos marcas, representamos valores:
La elegancia de lo bien hecho.
La pasión por el detalle.
La agilidad de un equipo joven que sabe adaptarse y liderar.
La profesionalidad de quienes entienden el lujo como una experiencia.

En Farlabo creemos en las personas que sienten afinidad por el universo de la belleza, el cuidado y la excelencia. Personas curiosas, comprometidas y con visión. Nuestro entorno de trabajo es transversal, colaborativo y en constante evolución, donde cada voz cuenta y cada talento suma.
 
Te invitamos a explorar nuestras vacantes y a conocer un poco más sobre nosotros.

Porque si tú también crees en el poder de las marcas que emocionan, este puede ser tu lugar.

Name: PARLUX LTD.
Description: PARLUX LTD. is a leading global beauty manufacturer that designs, markets, and distributes prestige designer, lifestyle, and celebrity fragrances and personal care products for brands including Billie Eilish, Jason Wu, Kenneth Cole, Paris Hilton, Better World Fragrance House, The Shop Men’s Grooming Line, Steve Madden, Tommy Bahama, Vince Camuto and more.

Name: Great Africa Group South Africa
Description:
The Great Africa Hair Company was established to introduce the best-of-breed expertise from the World
,known and respected as the leader in hair care innovation as well as Personal care products, and further develop it in Southern Africa, all whilst importing some of those major brand’s products and making them available locally. Also Guide Smaller brands with potential in their Retail journey at every step from listings to Merchandising to in stores activations. 

Since its inception in 2020, the Great Africa Group, under the guidance of founder and Managing Director, Salil Dhingra, continues to blaze a trail that’s internationally informed yet rooted on the continent with Personal care product lines that respond to the wants and needs of its African clientele.

With more than 20 years of experience and success in the Personal care market, Salil is well versed and qualified in all aspects of this highly specialised market.

 The company is also heavily invested in creating bespoke localised product lines for the African consumer. Without compromising on quality and with shared IP that responds to international and local trends – the objective is to deliver great products cost-effectively and which are highly appealing.

Empowering and growing the South African market is another of the Company's goals by facilitating and supporting this ever-growing economic sector.

The third component of the business is in assisting, through partnerships, of local independent brands, utilising its well-established and respected network and, from a logistics and distribution perspective, getting their lines racked and sold in major retailers across the country. The Great Africa Group, in essence, takes their hands and ensures each realises their fair market share. The Company today represents over 40 Major FMCG Brands and has establish strong market share in categories like Hair care, Skin Care , Bath and Body , Confectionery , Packaged food , OTC health care, Sexual Wellnes etc
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Rivaj
Description: Rivaj Cosmetic’s makeup range is super comfortable and long-lasting. You don’t need to worry about those touchups again in these long, hot days!

Name: Plush Natural
Description:
Plush Natural is one of the leading organic skin and hair care brand of Pakistan.

The idea of “Plush Natural” struck entrepreneurs  when they found themselves stuck in a struggle of finding a skin and hair care product line, made with natural and organic ingredients, and free from harmful chemicals. Their struggle revealed that majority of the products found in the market were laden with toxic and poor-quality ingredients, which could prove to be damaging for the human body.

They then decided to launch a skin and hair care product line, handmade with premium, natural, and high-quality ingredients, free of toxic and nasty chemicals, which would benefit the customers, as well as the society as a whole.

All our products are:

Handmade
Natural
Organic
Paraben Free
Tested on International Level Parameters
Cruelty Free

Name: WAAM
Description:
Créée en 2016, WAAM est une entreprise française adepte du fait-maison et du DIY. WAAM vous propose des produits 100% naturels pouvant être utilisés seuls ou personnalisés au gré de vos envies, afin de répondre au mieux à aux attentes et besoins de la peau et des cheveux. 

WAAM est une marque éthique et responsable, attachée au respect de l’homme, de la nature et de l’environnement en général. Nos produits sont 100% purs et naturels, cruelty free et vegan.

Name: Typsy Beauty
Description:
Typsy Beauty is a homegrown Indian brand that is a perfect blend of makeup that’s both quality and fun. 

We’re a conceptual brand, with the mission to transform your daily makeup routine into a dreamatic one. Our makeup is as much brains as it is beauty. Our high performance formulas are backed by research and innovation, while also being adorable and super exciting. 

Adding a touch of glam to your beauty experience, bold or natural – your choice, your way.

Be the beauty you want to be, do your make-up the way you think is right and be your your unapologetic self all day, all night.

Typsy Beauty is experimental, versatile, and mega fun. Whether your day is Everyday or Extra, whether you’re looking for utility or indulgence – Typsy is a beauty experience that always make you feel special.

Name: PAC Cosmetics
Description: Circa 2006, We, as PAC began our journey in beauty and makeup and soon emerged as a trailblazer in the industry, committed to innovation and quality! Our diverse range includes premium cosmetics, skincare, and beauty tools and accessories, blending science with artistry. We empower self-expression through confidence-boosting brushes, radiant highlighters, and empowering lipsticks. Fueled by the conviction that makeup is a universal language, we inspire, embolden, and motivate individuals to embrace their true selves fearlessly. PAC stands tall as more than a brand, we are an expression of You! Redefine beauty standards with PAC, where excellence is not just a standard; it's a commitment!

Name: GEKA GmbH
Description:
GEKA GmbH, founded in 1925, is one of the world`s leading manufacturer, supplier and wholesaler for high precision beauty application solutions including mascara, lip gloss, concealer, micro brushes and beauty tools. 
In addition, GEKA is offering Fully Finished service. 

We work with the most iconic names in beauty as well as those launching their first beauty brand. We are the partner both for those looking for turnkey solutions and for those seeking innovation and responsible, honest packaging.  

GEKA`s product expertise, constant flow of innovations and countless patents mark us out as the application specialists. 

Since 2021, GEKA is part of the Swiss company medmix. 

With the German headquarters, sales offices in Sao Paulo, Paris, New York City as well as additional manufacturing sites in Elgin, USA, Sao Paulo, Brazil, and Shanghai, China, the company demonstrates an established global footprint. 800 committed employees around the globe achieve the difference.

Name: Mintree Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Mintree was founded in Jan 2018 with a vision to innovate and elevate Indian beauty standards by fusing them with path-breaking international beauty trends.
 Consequently, our mission is to end up on the shelves of every 5th consumer worldwide by providing them with high-standard beauty and skincare products.  
 
We are manufacturers of premium body & skin care products.In less than two years, we have made our way to the shelves and hearts of over 3000 leading salons and spa’s in India. We have developed a pan-India distribution for professional channels consisting of Salons & Spa network which covers about 75% of the top urban agglomerations.
  
We’ve brought together the goodness of nature and technology of science to create our products. Our extracts are pure, our methods are clean and our intentions are clear - To make the beauty industry environmentally accountable.

This steadfast philosophy makes every Mintree creation Vegan, Natural, Sulphate Free, Paraben Free, Silicone Free, Formaldehyde Free, Cruelty Free and hence, Burden Free.
Aside from employing eco-friendly methods, we also believe in fostering socially progressive ideologies. We take pride in being a women centric company with 80% female workforce.
As we move ahead, we endeavor to  bring an affordable modern Ayurveda skin and body care range alive by April 2021. 
We aspire to steadily grow while still holding onto the hallmarks of our current philosophy, providing innovative beauty solutions to our users in ethical ways.

Name: Then I Met You
Description: I used to rush, Then I Met You. A premium skin care line focused on meaningful experiences.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Blue Heaven Cosmetics
Description:
For the past four decades, Blue Heaven is making beauty accessible to every Indian woman.We adapt global trends as per Indian skin tones & taste and bring them to you at the most affordable prices. A 100% cruelty free brand, our aim is to provide a platform to every Indian woman to express her individuality, whether it’s a full blown look or the minimal no makeup make up look. 
Founded in 1974 by Mr. Charanjit Singh and Mr. Gurnam Singh, Blue Heaven Cosmetics is now a Samara Capital company. Samara Capital is an entrepreneurially run India focused private equity firm established in 2006, Samara invests in Emerging Indian Companies (EICs), and Samara's investee companies include Nature's Essence, Flemingo Duty-Free, MORE Retail Ltd., TVC Sky Shopping, Ganga Kaveri Seeds, Oaknet Technologies, Asian Oilfield, SMS manpower services, Sahajanand Medical Technologies, Monte Carlo Fashions, Guardian GNC, Paradise Foods and Sapphire Foods.

Name: AG Care
Description:
Advanced Goodness since 1989

CLEAN IS IN OUR NATURE We combine science and nature, selecting the highest quality ingredients to develop formulas that deliver purposeful results. Driven by care, the entire collection is sulfate-free, vegan and cruelty-free.

RESPONSIBLE IMPACT We believe how we create our products is meaningful — from end to end. It’s how we make our products, how we treat our people and how we treat our planet.

WE GIVE BACK Giving back is the reward for our success
and we are committed to making a difference on a local and global level. Each year, we donate product, food and financial support to organizations across our community. Since 2008, we have partnered with One Girl Can helping girls in Kenya harness their power to create gender parity and meaningful change.

Name: Intrinsic
Description: We buy and build consumer brands that put women’s health first.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Lush Italia
Description:
La rivoluzione cosmetica nasce a Poole, nel Dorset inglese, nel 1995, quando un gruppo di sei persone animate da una forte passione verso la cosmesi green decide di fondare Lush. 
Spirito innovativo e approccio anticonvenzionale: fin dagli esordi il brand si distingue per la produzione di cosmetici freschi e fatti a mano, realizzati nel pieno rispetto dell’ambiente, spesso solidi e privi di confezione o dotati di un imballaggio riciclato al 100% e totalmente cruelty free.

Nel 2010 dà il via al pionieristico progetto Sustainable Lush Fund a supporto delle comunità che producono gli ingredienti dei prodotti Lush; questo progetto evolve nel 2018 nel progetto Re:Fund, un fondo di £1,5 milioni all’anno (circa €1,75 milioni) per sostenere a livello mondiale la rigenerazione nelle aree colpite da calamità e spostamenti di popolazioni, per la permacultura e l’agroecologia, e per la rinaturalizzazione e la biodiversità. Nel 2012, a testimonianza dell’impegno e della dura lotta contro la sperimentazione animale, Lush lancia il Lush Prize in collaborazione con Ethical Consumer: un fondo di £250.000 volto a premiare chiunque riesca a dare un contributo significativo a trovare alternative e porre fine ai test sugli animali. Nel 2017 lancia il Lush Spring Prize, sempre in collaborazione con Ethical Consumer: un fondo di £200.000 volto a premiare progetti di rigenerazione sociale ed ambientale. Lush è un’azienda attiva nella promozione di campagne nei suoi 931 negozi, in 49 paesi, a supporto di piccoli gruppi o organizzazioni a difesa dei diritti animali, umani e a protezione dell’ambiente. L’obiettivo è dare una voce a coloro che si battono per essere ascoltati.

L’approccio Lush è fortemente legato a un sistema di valori, a un credo che è al contempo un’ancora, che saldamente ricorda le origini, e una bussola, per navigare nella giusta direzione. Tutte le storie su it.lush.com

Safe and remove the earwax made in the outer ear canal 

Ears 360 provide a pure 360° ear cleanse and avoid reaching your eardrum.
- Reusable and Washable
- Easy to carry

Dangers of Using Cotton Swabs
 
When people use cotton swabs they frequently clean out some of the wax, but also push some of it back deeper.

Water can also be trapped behind these self-created wax dams and you may hear the water moving around in the ear.

The eardrum is very delicate, so you can puncture it with a cotton swab.
So, if you tap on the eardrum, you’re sending shock waves into the inner ear and can cause problems with your hearing and balance.

Description:
Nuestra historia: 38 años creando belleza y oportunidades.
Desde 1987, en Bagués desarrollamos productos de belleza, cuidado personal y bienestar, combinando calidad, innovación y un profundo compromiso con el desarrollo local. Pero Bagués es mucho más que una marca de cosmética: también es una oportunidad para emprender. A lo largo de los años, creamos una red de personas que, a través de la venta directa, encontraron una forma de crecer, conectar y generar ingresos compartiendo productos en los que creen.Nuestra propuesta es integral: acompañamos tanto el cuidado personal como el desarrollo de quienes eligen convertir su pasión por la belleza en un negocio propio.

Name: Sesh Products
Description: Sesh was created to find solutions for a world without cigarettes or vapes. We were tired of trying other alternatives that either didn't work or were dissatisfying. We constantly strive for new, harm reducing alternatives that improve adult tobacco and vape users lives. We are confident that tobacco and vape-free alternatives will become a key focus worldwide and Sesh is committed to guiding the industry forward.

Name: CERINI
Description:
Empresa dedicada al servicio de peluquería. Cuenta con 8 salones y un exclusivo club de caballeros distribuidos entre la Ciudad de Buenos Aires y Zona Norte de la Provincia de Buenos Aires. Desde sus inicios en 1985 hasta la fecha se ha consolidado como marca de lujo en el rubro belleza. Cuenta también con una escuela de formación y capacitación profesional interna-externa y perfumerías. 

"Nos renovamos constantemente, seguimos las tendencias, las creamos pero también sabemos adaptarlas al estilo de cada clienta" 

El curriculum de la peluquería, dirigida desde siempre por el fundador Claudio Cerini, incluye algunos de los cambios de looks más icónicos de la moda argentina.

Name: Ordinary Skincare Co
Description: Ordinary Skincare Co created a range of highly quality medically tested skin care products suitable for everyone - and that simply work. Nothing is tested on animals. Everything is sustainably sourced, and completely recyclable. The company has won awards for the excellence of its products, and the supporting environmental credentials. The products are made in Cape Town, South Africa and sold around the world. Customers purchase online or through a range of select retailers.

Name: CLOUD NINE
Description:
Cloud Nine maintains your hair’s unique strength with kindness.

No other hairstyling tools adapt to your hair's specific needs to promote strength, glossiness and long-lasting health. From straighteners with 11 heat settings and pressure-reducing Revive Mode to hairbrushes that minimise breakage, Cloud Nine puts your hair type, your style, and your needs first. 

Still independent, still based in Harrogate, and still a family business spanning three generations, Cloud Nine remains guided by the belief that the kinder we are to our hair, the stronger it becomes.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BasicLab Dermocosmetics
Description:
BasicLab. W związku z pielęgnacją.

BasicLab to efekt naszej relacji, która z koleżeńskiej przerodziła się w siostrzaną, a z czasem zaowocowała biznesowym związkiem opartym na partnerstwie, zaangażowaniu i szczerości. Udana więź wymaga ciągłej pielęgnacji. W podobny sposób myślimy o skórze, z którą jesteśmy związane całe życie.

 
Dobra relacja to solidne fundamenty.

Po latach zbierania doświadczeń dostrzegłyśmy, że skuteczna pielęgnacja opiera się na 5 działaniach, które określiliśmy jako 5 podstaw związku z pielęgnacją BasicLab.

 
Dotrzymujemy obietnic.

Dzięki doświadczeniu zdobytemu w branży farmaceutycznej oraz naukowej wiedzy, stworzyłyśmy markę, która pozwala poczuć się lepiej we własnej skórze. Wiemy, jak skóra "działa" i jakich składników pielęgnacyjnych potrzebuje. Dostarczamy Klientom niezbędnych narzędzi  do stworzenia satysfakcjonującej relacji ze skórą w postaci naszych kosmetyków.

Podstawą naszej działalności jest transparentność.

Jasno komunikujemy stężenia składników aktywnych i wyjaśniamy przeznaczenie każdego produktu. Otaczamy opieką nasze Klientki i Klientów na każdym etapie. Towarzyszymy im w budowaniu skutecznego schematu pielęgnacji. Odpowiadamy na pytania, edukujemy i doradzamy. Chcemy, żeby zobaczyli efekt świadomej i dopasowanej do potrzeb skóry pielęgnacji.
W komunikacji reklamowej pokazujemy prawdziwą skórę modelek. Bez retuszu. 

Stawiamy na bezkompromisową jakość.

Do produkcji wykorzystujemy zaawansowaną technologię i najlepsze surowce. Nasze kosmetyki są poddawane badaniom na każdym etapie. Testujemy je zarówno w naszym laboratorium, jak i w niezależnych placówkach badawczych, ale także na własnej skórze. Dzięki temu jesteśmy pewne skuteczności BasicLab.

Naszym priorytetem jest efektywność i bezpieczeństwo.

Formuły kosmetyków zostały stworzone w taki sposób, aby zminimalizować ryzyko wystąpienia reakcji alergicznych i odpowiedzieć na potrzeby nawet najbardziej wymagających rodzajów skóry.

Si Si La Paillette is a French brand of eco-friendly and shiny make-up products, to make everyday brighter while respecting your skin and the environment.

Name: Durance
Description:
Née à Grignan au cœur de la Provence, notre maison familiale conjugue le meilleur de la nature pour vous offrir des collections raffinées de parfums d'intérieur, parfums pour soi et cosmétiques d'origine naturelle.

Depuis plus de 20 ans, notre amour de la nature et des belles matières a conduit notre marque à une identité propre et affirmée construite autour de 4 piliers fondamentaux :

FABRIQUÉ EN PROVENCE
Chez Durance, nous sommes très fiers de proposer une fabrication française issue de nos ateliers en Drôme Provençale et de collaborer, autant que possible, avec des partenaires locaux qui partagent nos valeurs humaines et environnementales.

NATURALITÉ 
La nature a toujours été notre première source d’inspiration. Nous apportons la plus grande attention à la composition de nos produits en privilégiant les ingrédients d’origine naturelle et le meilleur des matières premières.
Nous nous attachons à restituer des senteurs authentiques conçues à Grasse par nos Maîtres parfumeurs pour partager avec vous de purs instants d'émotions.

EXIGENCE QUALITÉ 
Nos collaborateurs concentrent toutes leurs compétences et leur passion pour vous offrir des produits de grande qualité.

ENGAGEMENT
Nous accordons un réel intérêt au respect de l'environnement et de l'humain depuis notre création. 
Nous participons, à notre échelle, à la construction d'un monde plus responsable en nous engageant auprès d'associations locales. Notre objectif : contribuer à la protection de notre belle Provence et soutenir l'insertion professionnelle. 

Grâce à nos engagements au quotidien, notre marque est reconnue et distribuée dans toute la France ainsi que dans 58 pays à travers le monde.

Name: European Perfume Works Co. LLC
Description:
European Perfumes Works Co. LLC is the manufacturing arm of Scion International LLC.

Please visit our main page for more information about the group;

https://www.linkedin.com/company/scion-international 

We produce a wide range of perfumes, color cosmetics and personal care products, with stringent quality checks through the production process to ensure that our outputs are of the highest quality.

Scion International LLC, our parent company, is a well-established, global group of companies, with their corporate headquarters in Sharjah, United Arab Emirates. 

Established in 1974, the group today comprises of 14 companies worldwide, involved primarily in the development, manufacturing, distribution and marketing of perfumes, color cosmetics and personal care products. 

Our products are sold in over 75 countries across the world, either through group company distribution and manufacturing companies or through independent distribution set-ups. 

Our group's state-of-the-art manufacturing units are located in the U.A.E, South Africa & India. In these, we manufacture products to the highest internationally recognized standards, across a huge range of different categories. 

People are one of our most valuable assets. We employ over 900 people worldwide, from more than 20 different nationalities. 

Partners in progress, we work as one, with an enduring commitment to deliver competitive advantages to our clients and superior value to our customers.

Name: ORGATRE
Description:
Overview
Orgatre – A skincare brand that truly believes in inspiring people to appreciate their inner self and embrace the god gifted unique personality. The sole motive of our brand is to provide a noteworthy beauty platform, prioritize your health and wellbeing ahead of the industry norm. We are an upcoming Leading manufacturer of purely organic skincare and haircare cosmetic products
We thrive for delivering excellence to our customers through are high-grade products that are completely toxin-free. Orgatre has infused ancient Vedic alchemy practices with modern cosmetologically techniques while designing unique skin formulations.
The ingredients used in our products are grown in one of the best organic farms of the Indian mainland under careful supervision and utmost care.
The quality of our products has been verified after careful observation and surpassing clearance from various Indian testing standards as BIS standards for Cosmetics, ISI, the FDA, Global Quality Certification, Pollution Control Board, Risk Management and Waste Management.
Our products are manufactured in a GMP certified facility in the Himalayan foothills of Haridwar (Uttarakhand) ensuring that the value and strength of the active components remains intact. The manufacturing process doesn’t involve even the slightest experimentation on animals.
The CONCEPT OF VITAmils:
Orgatre has collaborated with esteemed researchers in the field of nanotechnology and created a novel concept of combining 5 essential vitamins with 5 organic oils termed ‘VITAmils’. The resultant lipid nano-particles in our beauty products are thus stable and exhibit excellent skin hydration and rejuvenation properties.
Orgatre repairs - purely organic, purely natural skincare at your doorstep...!!
Website - 
http://www.orgatre.com

Name: Paramount Cosmetics India Limited
Description:
Paramount Cosmetics: Grooming India since 1985!
Paramount Cosmetics India Limited (PCIL) has come to be the epitome of Indian beauty and grooming. It's an image that has taken over two decades in the making. Since 1985, the company with its flagship brand Shilpa, has consistently scaled greater heights to be India's leading manufacturer of Bindis.

Expanding its portfolio of products under the brand Shilpa, today Paramount Cosmetics caters to every aspect of Indian women's beauty from Sticker Bindi's, Liquid kumkum's, Kajal and Sindoor to Skin Care, Hair Care, Personal Care products. Further, Paramount Cosmetics has also made its presence felt in the men's grooming market with the brand Instinct that's studded with a range of offerings starting from Deodorants, After Shave Moisturising Gels, Hair Creams, Skin Exfoliating Revival Gel.

Having said that, what has actually helped Paramount Cosmetics in scaling greater heights in the cosmetics industry is its never-relenting quest for safe, hygienic and best of quality products. Well thought, thoroughly researched and developed Paramount maintains the highest quality standards to come up with products that bolster its consumers' image and self-esteem.

En étroite collaboration avec le monde de la dermatologie, nous avons initié de nombreux projets de recherche qui ont abouti au dépôt de plusieurs brevets et nous permettent d’apporter avec justesse des réponses ciblées et efficaces afin de restaurer une peau saine et des cheveux sains.

Name: feito brasil
Description:
Em um mundo onde a rapidez dos processos de fabricação é levada às últimas conseqüências em nome da lucratividade por si só, nos orgulhamos em fazer pequenas e valiosas obras de arte, retratadas em cosméticos naturais sustentáveis.

Faz parte da natureza de todos a busca por uma força inspiradora para realizar cada desejo e assim, sentir-se completo. A feito brasil começou com grandes sonhos e dando pequenos passos, fazendo sabonetes artesanais, que passaram a ser admirados por muitos.

Com isso, logo vimos que estávamos encontrando mais do que clientes, eram pessoas especiais que se identificavam com nosso sonho em fazer a diferença!

Assim surgiram novas linhas e produtos cada vez mais encantadores e únicos. Hoje cultivamos uma inquietude saudável em buscar o novo e oferecer em nossos cosméticos artesanais o que a natureza e o Brasil têm de melhor, mantendo sempre viva nossa filosofia.

Somos simples na essência, mas autênticos nas atitudes.

Name: PT. Vitapharm (Viva Cosmetics)
Description: Menjadi perusahaan kosmetik tropis terkemuka yang produknya dipercaya oleh masyarakat global.

Name: Dulcie
Description:
We create game-changing skin, home, hair and body care by amplifying the natural world and pioneering biodesign in our packaging solutions.

We are driven by trying to solve the waste problem by using natural waste resources in our products, or presenting packaging solutions to our community that are fully recyclable or compostable.

We use seaweed as the base for all of our products. That seaweed is picked by hand in Margate, UK. Why seaweed? Seaweed hydrates; it’s rich with valuable vitamins, minerals and amino acids; it’s anti-bacterial, skin rebuilding and anti-inflammatory; it’s all natural, and all around us. Under licence, we harvest it by hand from the beach steps away from our shop.

What drives us forward is doing things differently and always evolving. What started in Margate is now sold the world over. We’re afraid to stand still. Everything we do has to have a reason to exist whilst honouring our ocean-first philosophy.

B CORP - VEGAN - CRUELTY-FREE - LIVING WAGE EMPLOYER - 1% FOR THE PLANET

Name: Akten Cosmetics
Description:
Bir aile şirketi olan Akten Kozmetik’in öyküsü, doğayı seven ve saygı duyan; gücünü doğadan, bilgiden, gelenekten, aileden alan; bunları teknolojiyle ve inovasyonla harmanlayan; kendini iyiliğe ve insanlığa adayan; kaliteyi savunan ve daha iyi bir dünya için çalışan bir şirketin öyküsüdür. Bu tutku dolu öykünün 58 yıllık bir geçmişi var.  

İKİNCİ KUŞAK İŞ BAŞINDA
Doğaya olan tutkularını kariyerlerinde edindikleri deneyimle perçinleyen, teknolojinin ve inovasyonun gücüne kalpten inanan ikinci kuşak aile üyeleri, Akten Kozmetik’te üretim ve markalaşma adına yepyeni bir atılım başlattılar. Akten Kozmetik’i kısa bir sürede global kozmetik devleriyle rekabet edebilen bir şirket haline getirdiler.Gökhan Kara, genel müdür olduktan sonra Thalia Natural Beauty markasının ürün çeşitliliğini artırdı, ürün formülasyonlarında farklılık yarattı,yeni ürünlere ve makine parkurlarına yatırım yaptı, ürün ambalajlarını geliştirdi… Ayrıca üniversite-sanayi iş birliğine önem verdi ve ürünlerin gelişimiyle ilgili bilgi desteği sağladı. Bununla da yetinmeyerek AR-GE’ye verdiği büyük önemi, 2011 yılında kurulan NGS Biyoteknoloji şirketinin kurucu ortağı olarak bir kez daha kanıtlamış oldu. Gökhan Kara, markaların ihtiyacına göre ürün yapan Özel Üretim-Private Label bandında da atak yaptı. Bu şekilde Akten Kozmetik, kısa sürede kozmetik ve perakende zincirlerinden ev tekstili sektörüne uzanan geniş bir yelpazede pek çok markanın üreticisi konumuna geldi.Kendi tutkusunu çalışanlarına aktarmak, doğal ve sağlıklı ürün kullanımıyla ilgili olarak tüketicilerini bilinçlendirmek, sürdürülebilir kaynak kullanımına önem vermek bu aile şirketinin her zaman ön planda tuttuğu unsurlar oldu.

Name: Streamline Beauty India Pvt Ltd
Description:
Because Beauty is for Everyone...
And we aspire to become the preferred Beauty Solution Provider in India by making available Globally acclaimed Beauty Brands, Products, Equipment, Services and Solutions to leading Salons & Spas  

A Third Generation Family run Business where the definition of family extends to include all our employees, customers as well as all our partners. We take care of our own and we are proud to call ourselves a family. 

At Streamline, we are devoted to bring the best in the world of beauty to our customers, from east to west and from head to toe. Our understanding of beauty is peerless and it's evident from the vast array of global and private label brands we provide access to. Our drive to satisfy our clients is matched only by our deep desire to innovate; perhaps that is why we have successfully remained the leaders of the salon professional segment in India for decades now.

Name: Ohria Ayurveda
Description: Ohria Ayurveda offers luxury gifting options that celebrate Indian traditions. Our curated gift range includes skincare and haircare essentials for any occasion. We also provide corporate gifting solutions to pamper valued clients and employees. Choose Ohria Ayurveda for high-quality, natural products and a unique gifting experience.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Gisada Switzerland
Description:
At Gisada, we believe that fragrance is more than just a scent; it is an expression of elegance, sensuality, and timeless quality. Rooted in the heart of Switzerland, our mission is to redefine the world of perfumery with a commitment to innovation and uncompromising standards.

Gisada is not just a brand; it is a manifestation of Swiss ingenuity and craftsmanship. Switzerland has always been synonymous with high-tech precision and exceptional expertise, and we take pride in upholding that legacy. Our fragrances are a testament to the world-class quality that is quintessentially Swiss.

We embarked on a journey to create fragrances that capture the essence of sophistication and allure. Our vision led us to develop distinct yet equally enchanting fragrances. These fragrances are crafted with an exquisite blend of sensual, delicate, and noble notes, celebrating the qualities that leave an unforgettable impression wherever they are worn.

Achieving perfection is a journey. We have dedicated a significant amount of time to meticulously test and refine our fragrances with a diverse group of individuals.

Our fragrances emerged as crowd favorites in a blind comparison with 50 well-known perfumes, demonstrating our commitment to Swiss precision and high standards.

 Explore our world at www.gisada.com
 Connect with us to discover the art of Swiss perfumery.

Name: Bon Parfumeur
Description:
‘Where some people choose photos to immortalise moments, I've decided to put my trust in fragrances.’

In 2017, Ludovic Bonneton returned from Colombia, where he lived in the heart of tropical scents: cocoa, coffee, fragrant flowers... Determined to share his emotions and his passion for high-end perfumery, he teamed up with the greatest French noses to create a collection of emotions using rare ingredients. 

The creations reflect and share pieces of life, emotions and memories caught up, images and moments recalled, destinations visited.  

Each composition is built around a strong olfactory contrast, thanks to which Ludovic provokes surprise and reinvents Haute Parfumerie. All the contrasts are faceted using precious ingredients. 

Three boutiques in Paris, four in China, and a presence in the world's finest retailers.

Name: Iba Cosmetics
Description:
Iba is India’s first Halal Certified as well as PETA Certified Vegan & Cruelty Free beauty brand. All Iba products are free of alcohol, pig fat, other animal derived ingredients and harsh chemicals such as sulfates, parabens, ammonia, and bleaching agents.

The word ‘Iba’ is of Arabic origin. It means self-respect and pride in oneself. In that context, Iba’s vision is to offer ethical beauty solutions, thereby enabling ethical lifestyle choices and giving users a sense of self-respect and pride.

We are here to help users experience a new range of beauty products using potent natural actives and purest ingredients that offer pure beauty with assured efficacy.

Name: MEDSPA Srl
Description: MEDSPA è un’azienda nata unendo tradizione e innovazione di due generazioni, in una famiglia da sempre impegnata nel campo farmaceutico, con i più moderni studi internazionali dedicati allo skin care e alla nutraceutica. La missione di MEDSPA è garantire a chiunque il benessere e la possibilità di vivere a lungo nella migliore condizione fisica, dove la bellezza è diretta conseguenza di uno stato di salute ottimale. L’espressione "Live long, live healthy” riassume i valori e i capisaldi su cui MEDSPA affronta ogni giorno nuove sfide. Per concretizzare la sua mission, l’azienda ha sviluppato due brand: Miamo e Nutraiuvens.

Name: JOELLE GROUP
Description:
Joelle Group is a leading beauty business in the Arab world, a successful multi conglomerate with businesses in clinical and cosmetic beauty through Maison de Joelle, Clinica Joelle and Joelle Paris. 

Joelle Group are businesses with talented and creative individuals who are devoted to serve our customers with utmost care and service excellence. We take pride in our people as a form of potent force behind our success, due to which the group has evolved to become a premier luxury brand in the world of beauty business with a reach across the MENA region. 

Joelle Group is a devotion to a well defined business: Beauty. bringing together positive and inspiring work force with a can-do attitude consequently providing more value for our customers. Our aim is to exist as the ultimate destination that serves every beauty desire of an Arab woman by facilitating advanced procedures, latest trends and expert advise to give every woman the right to feel beautiful and comfortable in her own skin.

We have constantly challenged the beauty industry with bringing in innovations and the most modern in what the industry has to offer. This has led to Joelle Group collaborating with carefully selected major beauty brands, hence providing bespoke solutions for every beauty need.  We aim to excel in everything we do, our goal always remains to help woman find her inner beauty and confidence.

Name: Miild
Description:
Miild is a beauty brand that expresses pioneering innovation. Miild is founded, created by, Tine and Tanja, two enthusiastic women out of the desire to unite creativity, sustainability and consumer confidence within the universe of beauty.
The mission for the Miild team is; With our community and partners, we will keep pushing the boundaries for well-being and sustainability within beauty.


Miild’s product line consists of makeup and skincare products, which can be used on a daily basis without the risk of allergic reactions. Miild strives to enhance the level of comfort and luxury in your daily life through its lightweight wear and pure ingredients. The product line is carefully designed and developed with the aim of achieving optimal quality, long lasting effects and a natural finish. We are professional makeup artists, who have personal experiences with allergy and share a strong passion for the possibilities of makeup.

Miild’s makeup products are formulated with organic ingredients which help enhance your natural beauty, and leave your skin with a light natural glow without irritating your skin. Safety and beauty go hand in hand in Miild’s universe.

The vision of Gowoonsesang is 'Health skin, Happy skin' and mission is 'We make the world healthy and beautiful with Dermatology'. We always keep in mind our vision and mission, so we develop the best products with empathy because we believe everyone deserves healty and beautiful skin.
