Description:
Somos lideres Mayoristas de Envases para los sectores Cosmético, Aseo, Alimentos y Farmacéutico. Tenemos presencia directa en Colombia, Ecuador y México. Exportamos a Centro y Sur América. 

Nuestro principal objetivo es brindarle a nuestros clientes un amplio portafolio de productos, tiempos de respuesta oportunos y precios competitivos. Durante años hemos estudiado y seleccionado cuidadosamente nuestros proveedores para garantizarle la mejor calidad.

Name: Project 1945
Description:
Melalui karya kami, kami menceritakan cerita masa lalu, masa kini, dan masa depan Indonesia, menggabungkan keanekaragaman yang kaya dengan inovasi untuk menginspirasi koneksi yang melampaui batas dan generasi.

Project 1945, rilis pertama kali di tahun 2021 dengan meluncurkan 3 varian eau de parfum dengan berbagai karakter dan scent yang berbeda dan membawakan konsep kisah dan cerita tentang Indonesia. Hingga saat ini, Project 1945 memiliki 7 varian produk dan akan terus berkembang dalam menyuguhkan wewangian yang mewakilkan kisah dan cerita bagi para penikmatnya.

Melalui Project 1945, kami berharap untuk terus menjadi bagian penting dari setiap selebrasi dan bagian kecil dari kisah-kisah kehidupan mereka, para pengguna, seperti yang dilakukan tahun 1945 untuk Indonesia.

Name: Men Deserve
Description: Men Deserve encompasses The Modern Men - The Men that aren’t afraid to take care of themselves, and are not even afraid to show it to the world. We encourage men for freedom of getting a good appearance by offering our quality grooming products that are free from all the harmful chemicals like sulphate, paraben and mineral oil. Also, we are spreading a message of Brotherhood and Self-Motivation through our brand ethos.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Flushing Cosmetics
Description:
Flushing Cosmetics es una empresa regional de Venta Directa con más de 37 años de trayectoria, dedicada a impulsar el emprendimiento femenino a través de un modelo de negocio sólido, innovador y sostenible.

Producimos y distribuimos mediante venta directa, productos de belleza, cuidado personal, bienestar y del hogar, para que te sientas bella y saludable.

Operamos en Centroamérica, desarrollando y comercializando productos de belleza, cuidado personal y del hogar, combinando calidad, accesibilidad e innovación constante, siempre con un enfoque cercano a las personas.

Nuestro modelo de Venta Directa ha evolucionado de la mano de la transformación digital, la profesionalización de nuestra red de consejeras y una visión estratégica de largo plazo que nos permite adaptarnos a un entorno dinámico y competitivo.

En 2025, Flushing Cosmetics fue reconocida como Empresa Admirada en Estrategia e Innovación del Negocio por Revista Estrategia & Negocios, un reconocimiento que reafirma nuestro compromiso con la excelencia empresarial y la evolución constante de nuestro modelo.

Hoy avanzamos con paso firme hacia nuestro Plan de Transformación 2030, enfocados en:
- fortalecer el emprendimiento femenino,
- consolidar nuestra presencia regional,
- digitalizar y optimizar nuestros procesos, 
- y seguir construyendo una empresa confiable, ética y orientada al futuro.

Flushing Cosmetics: emprendimiento, innovación y estrategia al servicio de las personas.

Name: Osh Wellness
Description:
Osh Wellness (prev Freshly Moms), is a US-based supplement brand that is on a mission to improve everyday lives of people through science-backed Ayurvedic supplements that work. Our expert created blends are made in the USA in certified GMP facilities and rigorously tested for heavy metals and impurities.

Osh Wellness deeply cares for the environment and believes in giving back more than we take. We use 100% bio-degradable jars for all our products. The labels are made with 80% post-consumer industrial waste. And we plant 1 tree for every order we receive.

If you want to join us on our mission, please drop us a message.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: The Kind Brand Company
Description:
At The Kind Brand Company, we make ethical products for all of TanKind. As pioneers in beauty, we recognise the magnitude of the industry’s plastic problem, this is why we will remove 1lb of plastic from the earths oceans for every bottle we sell. 

The Kind Brand Co. portfolio is currently composed of TanOrganic & VeganTan. Both brands offer a range of self-tan & skincare products to not only make you look good, but to make you feel good too.

TanOrganic is a skincare, luxury premium brand made from the highest quality of organic and active ingredients. For anyone investing in their skin and anti-aging TanOrganic is the brand for them. 

VeganTan is a natural, ethical alternative brand targeted to a younger demographic. It’s for those who prefer a darker colour guide and lower price point while still doing something good for their planet.

So, what makes us different to all other self-tan brands?
1. Ethical – All of our products are made to be as ethical as possible from supply chain to shelf.
2. Certified – We back up all of our claims with certifications so our customer knows they can trust us.
3. Impactful – through various initiatives we give back to the planet with every product we make.

We strive for first-class quality for all of our brands. We are grateful for our past and continued success. Our mission is to make a real impact by spreading kindness and giving back to the planet with every product we make. We aim to be the world leader in safe sunless tanning, with international self-tan brands recommended by dermatologists and distributed in retail outlets worldwide, including, pharmacies, drugstores, e-retailers and our online stores. 

As a business with sustainability at its core, The Kind Brand Co. will continue to fight for healthy, nourished skin and a happy planet. People and the planet will continue to come before profit, and our team is dedicated to delivering a little bit of sunshine in every bottle every step of the way.

Name: Vitago - Hep İyi Hisset!
Description:
Hep iyi hissetmeniz için varız!

“Hep İyi Hisset” sloganı ile tüketicilerin sağlıklı gıda takviyesi ihtiyacına yönelik olarak, güvenilir ve yenilikçi ürünleri erişilebilir şekilde sunmak için yola çıktık. Bu alanda dünyayı izleyerek, gelişen ihtiyaçlara çözüm üretirken; insan, çevre ve toplum sağlığını odağa koyan, sürdürülebilir bir anlayış benimsedik.

Vitago Kids markamızla çocuklara yönelik doğal balık yağları ve multivitamin şuruplar başta olmak üzere çeşitli gıda takviyeleri ile onların gelişimine katkı sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz. Çocukların vitaminleri daha eğlenceli ve kolay tüketmesini sağlayan çiğnenebilir formlarda özel ürünler üretiyoruz. Bunları yine çocuklarımızın çok sevdiği karakterlerden olan TRT Çocuk Rafadan Tayfa ve Pırıl karakterlerinin arkadaşlığı ile sunuyoruz. TRT Çocuk kanalının gıda takviyesi alanındaki tek lisanslı üreticisiyiz. 

Efervesan ürün gruplarında koruyucu, şeker, gluten ve laktoz içermeyen ürünleri tüketiciyle buluşturmaktayız. Titanyum dioksit içermeyen tablet ve kapsül formlarıyla minimize gıda katkı içerikleriyle kendine özgün yeni konseptler sunuyoruz. Öte yandan liken bitkisinden elde edilen dünyadaki ilk onaylı D3 vitaminiyle Türkiye’de tamamen bitkisel ve koruyucu içermeden üretilmiş D3+K2 vitamin ürününe sahibiz. Türkiye'de üretilen ilk organik çocuk D vitaminine ve yetişkinler için çeşitli vegan sertifikalı ürünlere sahibiz. 

Sağlık Bilimleri Üniversitesi ile yaptığımız iş birliği çerçevesinde uzman akademisyenlerle birlikte yeni ürünler geliştiriyoruz. GMP İyi Üretim Uygulamaları Sertifikası, Organik Üretim Müteşebbis Sertifikası, ISO 9001:2015 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Sertifikası, HACCP 22000:2005 Gıda Güvenliği Sistemi Sertifikası, Helal Üretim Sertifikası, Etik Uygunluk Sertifikası ve FDA Amerikan Gıda Komisyonu Uygunluk Sertifikası ve VEGAN sertifikasına sahibiz. 

Ürünlerimize anlaşmalı Eczaneler, Migros, GetirBüyük, File, Gratis, İstegelsin, Eveshop, E-bebek ve Trendyol’daki resmi mağazamızdan ulaşabilirsiniz.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Broadcast Beauty Consultancy
Description:
Broadcast Beauty Consultancy incubates and consults beauty, personal, and wellness brands. We help in the creation and launch of homegrown brands and help with the entry of international brands into India.
We are a highly focused independent consultancy (NOT an agency!) leveraging the expertise of our in-house talent and experts from various fields to build lasting brands.

Name: SVR
Description: teste
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: 7th Heaven
Description:
We're 7th Heaven, your trusted skincare and beauty experts since 1985...

As a family-owned UK-based brand, we’ve been at the forefront of skincare for nearly four decades - delivering high-quality face masks and beauty products to over 90 countries worldwide. Many first beauty memories were made with our face mask sachets and we know we hold a special place in the hearts of millions across the globe.

Our mission is simple: to provide glowing results for every beauty lover, no matter your skin type or needs, and to be there with you at every stage of your journey. Whether you’re tackling blemishes, hydrating, detoxing, or simply indulging, we’ve got the perfect product for you.

We believe skincare should be more than just a routine; it should be a celebration. Our products are designed to make every 'me-time' moment a joyful experience, whether it's a refreshing mid-week pick-me-up or a Friday night sleepover with girlfriends. We don’t just make face masks; we provide moments to unwind, connect and glow together - turning skincare into the self-care ritual it was always meant to be.

Since the start we've been pioneers of cruelty-free beauty, proudly partnering with organisations like the Vegetarian Society, Cruelty-Free International and PETA. Being good and doing good has been at the heart of everything we do, as we believe you don't have to sacrifice ethics for great results.

We add a touch of fun, a dash of the unexpected, and a sprinkle of good humor to everything we do - and we hope you'll join us!

“We might make small-sized masks, but since the 80s we’ve had big dreams to make the world a happier, healthier home to both humans and animals. Our promise as veggie herbalists is to provide ethical, vegan and vegetarian formulations, inspired by nature’s treasures - with no hidden nasties.” Gregory Butcher OBE, Montagne Jeunesse Founder

Name: Bargello Perfume
Description:
1950 yılında kurulmuş, döneminin ünlü kolonya markası Gonca Kolonyalarının satın alınmasıyla faaliyetlerine başlayan Bargello, zaman içerisinde büyüyerek dünyanın pek çok noktasında tercih edilen bir markadır. İnsana ve doğaya saygılı olma misyonuyla yola çıkan markamız kaliteden ödün vermeden mutlu tüketici bilinciyle büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Kozmetik sektöründe öne çıkan yenilikçi yaklaşımı ve geniş üretim ağı ile markamız; parfüm, vücut spreyi, duş jeli, kolonya, deodorant, roll on, antiperspirant, ortam kokusu, araç kokusu gibi birbirinden farklı ürünlerle üretim hayatını sürdürmektedir. Kalite standartlarına uygun olarak hassasiyetle üretilen 300’den fazla ürünü ile global pazardaki yerini korumaya devam eden Bargello müşteri memnuniyetini benimseyerek faaliyet göstermektedir.

1950 yılından bu yana üretime devam eden Bargello; tesislerinde ISO 9001 ve ISO 22716 (GMP) kalite standartları, aynı zamanda IFRA standartlarında üretim yapmaktadır. Kurumsal kokulandırma cihazından kişisel bakım ürünlerine kadar geniş bir skalada ürünleri yüksek kalite güvencesiyle üretip kullanıcıların beğenisine sunmaktadır.

Name: RiseWell
Description:
RiseWell was founded on the idea that toothpaste doesn't have to contain harsh chemicals to be effective.  We have spent years researching oral care around the world and have developed what we think is the only effective 100% natural toothpaste.  We believe our line of oral care products is as effective as their chemical alternatives, and we are constantly researching to improve these products for you.

At RiseWell we believe that small improvements to daily habits lead to meaningful change.  Why not start with the first thing you do in the morning?

Name: Maternatura
Description:
MATERNATURA IS AN ITALIAN FAMILY RUN BUSINESS, FOUNDED ON THE FAMILY’S OVER TWENTY YEARS OF EXPERIENCE IN THE COSMETIC SECTOR AND ON ITS PASSION FOR THE ENVIRONMENT. MATERNATURA’S MISSION IS TO OFFER FLOWERY COSMETICS IN HARMONY WITH NATURE.
My name is Francesca and my family produces Organic Cosmetics since 1989 distributed only in the professional cosmetic sector.

We own a laboratory which over 15 years produces our Organic cosmetics with a great care and respect for Mother Nature and the environment.

In 2014, was born Maternatura and since than it is present in over 10 countries abroad such as Moscow, Munich, London and Taipei.

Maternatura is the First Organic brand, specialized in hair care ranges that guarantees the same silicon’s silky effect, BUT with NO silicon and with a pure performance up to 24h!

We managed to achieve this result on the hair of our customers through continuous internal research and development of inedited and forefront formulations.

Our aim is to bring innovation with Organic certified and specialized cosmetics.

We favour the use of plants from biodynamic and organic cultivations and wild plants, as this type of cultivation respects the natural growth of plants allowing them to develop the vitality and properties necessary to carry out their functions.

Name: Mosachi
Description:
We're passionate about creating food that can have a positive impact on both people and the planet by engineering scientifically researched sustainable food solutions for all and ensuring an abundant future for our planet.

Our mission is to empower talented and motivated people to build businesses that matter.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: ISAK Fragrances
Description:
Isak Fragrances offers a modern take on Indian heritage in our diverse range of perfumes. Our fragrances appeal to a global audience with a fusion of tradition and innovation, with the use of naturally derived notes and rare ingredients. We are a pioneering manufacturer of fragrances with over 170 years of expertise. We were a part of Shark Tank India Season 1 and have partnered with Lenskart Ceo Mr. Peyush Bansal.

We deal in a wide collection of fine fragrances in the form of perfumes, attars and home fragrances and we are available offline in Lucknow, Bangalore, Goa, Vadodara, Ahmedabad, Jaipur and Mumbai.
We also ship across the world through our website www.isakfragrances.com

We won the Craft Brand of the Year at The International Craft Awards and were recognised as one of the Top 25 Fastest Growing Brands in India in 2023 by Nykaa.

Name: Kreyol Essence
Description:
Kreyol Essence (KE) is the premier portal for organic and authentic products from Haiti. Kreyol Essence is dedicated to introducing premium Haitian goods to the U.S. market and offers an extensive array of wellness-based beauty, body and health care commodities.

Our products are not only luxurious, organic and therapeutic, but they are "natural with a purpose." When you purchase KE products, you are investing in yourself and the people of Haiti who were severely impacted by the earthquake. Support the beautiful women and men who hand make these products and celebrate social and beauty innovation.

Name: 52 Sundaze Skincare
Description: 52 Sundaze is the home of skin-loving, high performance SPF designed to make sunscreen a want, not a chore. Pioneering formulations and hands-free delivery redefine sun care. Join us in transforming the sunscreen game!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Trilogy Natural Products Ltd
Description:
www.trilogyproducts.com @trilogyproducts
Trilogy was founded in 2002 by New Zealand sisters following their discovery of the skin-loving properties of rosehip oil. After several months of trials and research, they decided they had a future cosmetic star on their hands and so launched Trilogy with Certified Organic Rosehip Oil and four other skincare products, each formulated with our hero super ingredient – rosehip oil.
Today, we are a global brand that is sold in over 25 countries in 6,000 stores and have an innovative range of 40 New Zealand made clean, natural beauty products loved by customers and celebrities throughout the world.

Name: Alix Avien Paris
Description: Alix Avien Paris founded in 1997 and registered in Paris is a cosmetics brand based in Turkey. Alix Avien Paris which has been operating in various markets for many years, continues its rapid rise with its new management in 2020 and aims to introduce make up lovers to its products in many parts of the world.

Name: Style Korean Indonesia
Description: Style Korean Indonesia is the online shopping mall to sell a wide range of Korean cosmetic products to countries worldwide. Style Korean Indonesia keeps an eye on Korean market trend to catch up latest Korean style and brings it to our worldwide customers as fast as possible. Any customers who are interested in Korean cosmetics, foods, fashion are always welcomed and experience Korean way, your taste and enjoy yourself. Being trustworthy shoping mall platform to experience Korean trendy products, Style Korean Indonesia gives our commitment to satisfy our customers needs.

Name: Wishcompany Inc. 위시컴퍼니
Description:
Wishcompany creates beauty brands and content. With a motto of trust, growth, and harmony, Wishcompany has seen sales more than double each year as a robustly growing beauty brand/content development company. After its establishment in 2010, the company has successfully launched brands such as Klairs, By Wishtrend, and elmt. Our representative brand ‘Klairs(dear,klairs)’ has become a brand sought after by customers all over the globe; it is the number 1 selling brand in its category at global retailers such as Amazon and iHerb, and is also a 3 time consecutive Glow Pick award winner.

Wishcompany is distinguishing itself in the beauty content creation field as a company achieving unheard-of-results. Wishcompany operates media channels on YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram, and it is a very proud achievement as it is exceptionally rare for a Korean company to obtain such know-how about foreign audience-aimed content creation and to have created media with such impact.
Our representative media channel is ‘Wishtrend TV’ which has reached over 1.7 million subscribers and achieved the Gold Play Button on YouTube.

Wishcompany dreams of a world where all living beings are respected and discrimination doesn’t exist, and we will do anything to help create such a world. Klairs is a cruelty-free, vegan, and eco-friendly brand that is serious about working to create an even better society.

Name: Gungnir of Norway
Description:
We are a Norwegian innovation company that is revolutionizing the fitness industry with our patented SlideLock technology for barbells, already used by several of the world's largest and most prestigious gym chains. The built-in locking mechanism eliminates the need for external locks and secures weight plates in a simple and effective manner. This makes gyms safer, more user-friendly and tidier.

Our products are already sold worldwide, and now we are expanding both our product portfolio and our customer base. With our innovative barbells, we have proven that we can outperform established players. We are now taking another step towards our goal of dominating the global market for free weight equipment in gyms chains, with a Norwegian patent as our spearhead.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoire Phytema
Description:
Implanté depuis 20 ans entre montagnes des Alpes et lac du Bourget, le laboratoire Phytema est né de la rencontre entre des équipes de naturopathes formulateurs en cosmétique bio, et une team de repreneurs issues de l'industrie médicales.
Ses équipes de recherche/développement et de production puisent leur inspiration dans cet écrin de verdure pour imaginer et produire des produits innovants, respectueux de l'environnement.
Chaque utilisation devient alors une source de plaisir intense accompagnée d'un véritable voyage sensoriel.

Name: Winx Health
Description:
Winx Health is the sexual and vaginal health hub that offers the education, intel, and problem-solving products you need to make confident health decisions.

Their cult-favorite product line includes innovative at-home test-and-treat solutions for UTIs and yeast infections, as well as sexual health essentials like pregnancy tests and morning-after pills.

Co-founded by Forbes 30 Under 30 and AdAge Breakout Brand Leader, Jamie Norwood, and Well + Good changemaker honoree, Cynthia Plotch, Winx Health answers every “TMI” question with their educational resource, Real Talk.

Winx Health's work to support women’s health has been awarded TIME Best Inventions and covered by The New York Times, Wall Street Journal, Forbes, and Harper’s Bazaar.

Winx Health is formerly known as Stix. The company rebranded in June 2024.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DNA Vital Group
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à DNA Vital Group, um conglomerado líder no setor da terapia capilar, composto por um conjunto de empresas especializadas. 
Nosso propósito é transformar a vida das pessoas, oferecendo soluções inovadoras para atender às suas necessidades capilares. 

Com uma abordagem pioneira e uma visão inspiradora, estamos redefinindo os padrões de excelência no mercado. Graças ao nosso compromisso e à qualidade incomparável, nos tornamos uma referência em terapia capilar. 

Permita-nos apresentar a DNA Vital Group em toda a sua grandiosidade, que engloba o DNA Lab, líder em pesquisa e desenvolvimento de produtos capilares de última geração, as Clínicas DNA Vital, um grupo de clínicas especializadas que oferece tratamentos personalizados e de alto padrão em todo o país, e a DNA Academy, uma instituição de ensino renomada que capacita profissionais no campo da terapia capilar.

Somos muito mais do que um grupo de empresas. Somos pessoas. Somos uma família. Somos a DNA Vital Group.

Name: Divita_Skincare
Description:
Divita means Divine Power.
Power to change for the better and to choose clean and healthy skin care without compromising on quality and results.
Our products support skin integrity, enhance its appearance, and relieve skin conditions.
Our range of skincare products has everything you need. They will become an essential part of your daily skincare habits and take you through different seasons and life stages, fulfilling all your skincare needs.
 
Powered by clinically proven ingredients ,supported by science.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MaxiConfortOficial
Description: Fundada em 2001, a MaxiConfort é uma referência na fabricação de produtos de higiene pessoal. Com uma planta industrial de mais de 7.000 m² e uma equipe dedicada de mais de 100 colaboradores, estamos comprometidos em oferecer produtos de alta qualidade que promovem conforto e bem-estar.

Name: Vòlia Cosméticos
Description:
A Vólia é a nova indústria de Cosméticos que, através da união de pesquisas e laboratórios de ponta, traz ao mercado produtos inovadores, acessíveis, com respaldos técnicos de qualidade e que tornam mais prática a vida de todos – tanto a de quem usa, quanto a de quem aplica. Especializada nos segmentos de unhas e de henna para sobrancelhas, possui uma linha completa de produtos para despertar o melhor do profissional contemporâneo.

A Vòlia acredita que a beleza não está apenas no SER, mas também no FAZER, e por isso oferece produtos seguros, modernos e de credibilidade atestada, que prezam pela saúde e bem estar das pessoas e do ambiente ao redor.

Name: Jupiter
Description:
Jupiter is scalp repair that finally gets you—and your scalp—with an 100% Flake-Free Guarantee.

Our dermatologist-approved, salon-quality Anti-Dandruff and Dry Scalp Care systems don’t just work—they shatter stigma and misconceptions around scalp health with science-backed education, undeniable efficacy and a luxurious experience that empowers from root to tip.

Whether managing dandruff, addressing a dry scalp, or simply leveling up your hair care, our products go beyond the surface, nurturing overall well-being. With ingredients you recognize and trust, we deliver results you never thought possible. 

Featured in Vogue, NYMag, Allure and more for our commitment to innovation and efficacy in the beauty and wellness space.

Name: John Masters Organics
Description:
At John Masters Organics, we harness the power of nature to create safe, effective, and sustainable solutions that prioritize the well-being of our customers and the world we live in.

In 1994, leading New York City stylist John Masters applied his own passion for healthy, holistic living into a pursuit of a gentler and more nourishing personal care routine. From humble beginnings in his Manhattan apartment, the John Masters brand grew from a few handmade products into a global line of hair care, skincare, body care, and aromatherapy.

As John Masters Organics stands today, our identity is defined by an ongoing commitment to redefine standards, nurture beauty with integrity, and inspire our global community. By choosing our products in your everyday life, you become part of a movement that celebrates mindful indulgence, where each purchase signifies your support for a cleaner future.

Name: Emotion Master
Description: The European Master in Translational Cosmetic and Dermatological Sciences (EMOTION) is a two-year 120 ECTS, English-taught, joint program, which focuses on Research & Development (R&D) and heavily includes transversal and transferrable skills. The first intake will be in the academic year 2019/2020 and the deadline for applications will be on February 15th.

Name: FarmaSave
Description:
Farmasave è una farmacia online che prende vita dalla visione innovatrice di tre generazioni di farmacisti esperti nel settore. 
La mission aziendale è sfruttare e applicare online l'expertise maturata in store, supportando e guidando gli utenti web nell'acquisto del giusto prodotto, proprio come in farmacia. 
L’ampio catalogo online presenta una selezione di prodotti che spazia dal generico farmaco da banco agli alimenti per esigenze particolari ed è presente uno spazio dedicato agli integratori alimentari. 

Con un catalogo di oltre 50.000 prodotti, Farmasave è pronta a rispondere a qualsiasi tipo di bisogno, offrendo una selezione di articoli a prezzi scontati. Grazie ad innumerevoli offerte e promozioni puoi acquistare farmaci da banco online comodamente da casa tua sfruttando tutti i vantaggi della nostra farmacia online. Pochi e semplici passaggi ti consentiranno di effettuare acquisti in modo rapido e sicuro.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BEMA COSMETICI
Description: BEMA COSMETICI S.r.l. is Italian Company manufacturing a wide range of natural and organic certified skin care products for women, men, children; phyto-therapeutical products and products for beauty salons and SPA. All high quality products: with extracts from organic agriculture, paraben-free, colouring agents free, dermatologically tested and tested against Nickel, Chromium and Cobalt to avoid any risk of skin allergies. 100% Organic Certified Products.

Name: Kozmoklinik
Description:
Kozmoklinik Grup Şirketleri, güzellik ve yaşam sektöründe faaliyet gösteren, çok markalı ve çok kanallı bir distribütör ve marka geliştirici gruptur. 30 yılı aşkın süredir Murad, Blistex, Burt’s Bees, Alpecin gibi global lider markaların Türkiye distribütörlüğünü başarıyla yürütmektedir. Aynı zamanda, S.O.S. ve PUMPOO gibi kendi kategorilerinde lider konumda olan yerli markaların da kurucusudur.

Grup, dijitalleşme odağında geliştirdiği güzellikburada.com pazaryeri ile birçok güzellik markasını tüketiciyle buluşturarak e-ticaret alanında da büyümektedir. Yaşam tarzı deneyimlerine odaklanan yatırımlarıyla La Plage restoranı ve lüks tekne kiralama hizmetiyle sektörde farklılaşmakta, güzellik ve iyi yaşamı bütüncül bir yaklaşımla yeniden tanımlamaktadır.

Name: Nuggela & Sulé S.L.
Description:
Nuggela & Sulé is the most innovative capillary brand in the healthcare sector worldwide.

Nuggela & Sulé stands out in the cosmetic industry for recovering natural remedies together with the latest technology.

HIGHLIGHTS:
• Nuggela & Sulé is a company specialized in premium hair care treatments. 
 • The first laboratory in the world that has clinically proven hair growth acceleration.
 • Our most successful product is the Premium Nº1 Shampoo with red onion extract and its still the best selling shampoo, for the third consecutive year, on Amazon Spain.


DISTRIBUTION:
 • Our main distribution channels are pharmacies, drugstores and parapharmacy section in departments stores.
 • Strong international presence in marketplaces like Amazon Europe, Tmall in Asia or Boutiqaat in Middle East.

Do you want to be our distributor?
Contact us at info@nuggelasule.com

Name: Natura Siberica
Description:
Siberia is a unique region of Russia, where wildlife has remained unchanged for centuries. In order to survive in such harsh climatic conditions, Siberian herbs and plants synthesize protective active substances and possess strong anti-oxidant properties. Nowadays the company Natura Siberica uses these amazing properties of Siberian herbs and plants to transmit all their power to save the youth and beauty of the skin and hair. All the herbs, which are used in our cosmetics, are growing in our the largest organic farm in Europe in Khakassia, which has a certificate of the European bio-standard EU 834/0, and also handpicked in wild Siberica forests. In the laboratory we study their unique properties, in order to achieve the maximum effect. The creators of Natura Siberica cosmetics conduct research expeditions in search of the best ingredients for skin care.

Our products meet European standards of quality organic cosmetics, it is confirmed by numerous prestigious certificates (ICEA, ECOCERT, COSMOS STANDARD, BDIH). Natura Siberica is not just natural cosmetics and not just cosmetics based on herbs. This is the first Russian certified organic cosmetics. And it really works.
Natura Siberica stores are opened in 4 Russian cities and also in Tokyo, Hong Kong, Copenhagen. Our products are very popular in England, Germany, France, China, Greece, Australia and many other countries.
Natura Siberica has a number of international awards, among them:
• Best green cosmetics, Cosmoprof 2012 in Bologna, Italy
• Best organic products for mothers and babies 2013, London, UK, Natural & Organic products Europe
• Best Product of 2013, 2014 and 2015,  according to Allure Russia, 2013, 2014, 2015
• Winner in the category «Best face care product» awarded by Beauty Challenger Awards at the exhibition Beyond Beauty, Paris.

Name: Lattafa
Description: Luxury perfume brand

Name: Green People UK
Description:
Established in 1997 by Charlotte Vøhtz to help combat her daughter’s skin allergies, Green People has been instrumental in pioneering the organic cosmetics industry. Green People offers over 160 award-winning natural and organic skin care products across ranges for women, men, babies and children, and is suitable for those with sensitive skin. Our products are gentle on all skin types, even those prone to eczema and psoriasis.

Based in West Sussex, the business retails throughout the UK in independent health food stores, selected pharmacies, online, and in supermarkets including Ocado. In October 2021, Green People’s flagship store opened in Horsham, West Sussex. 

Green People is proud to use fairly traded organic ingredients, which are never tested on animals, throughout its product range. Clinically proven plant actives are used across the product range to effectively target a variety of skin concerns, such as mature, sensitive skin and spots. 

Supporting charitable causes is at the heart of Green People’s ethos with the business donating over 10% of net profits annually to charities such as Ehlers-Danlos Support UK, Marine Conservation Society, Knepp Wildland Foundation and the World Land Trust.

Name: KIN Cosmetics
Description:
Desde 1932, creando belleza junto a los profesionales de la peluquería.

KIN Cosmetics es la marca de cosmética profesional con más trayectoria del país. Más de 90 años de experiencia nos avalan, con un know-how técnico que se traduce en fórmulas eficaces, innovadoras y de alta calidad para los salones más exigentes.

Arraigados en Sant Feliu de Guíxols, en plena Costa Brava, diseñamos, desarrollamos y fabricamos cada producto en nuestras propias instalaciones. Desde allí, hacemos llegar la esencia mediterránea de KIN a más de 40 países de todo el mundo.

Nuestra misión es clara: inspirar, acompañar y empoderar a los profesionales de la peluquería. Porque creemos firmemente que ejercen la profesión más bella del mundo.

#KINCosmetics #WeLoveHair #MadeInCostaBrava

Name: MATH SCIENTIFIC
Description:
We bring science closer to people in the form of scientific beauty products. 
We merge scientific research, clean ingredients, data-backed effectiveness proof, and a minimalist mindset into our formulas.

Our mission is to reveal our skin and body cells’ potential through unique scientific solutions that target cell DNA and enhance well-being & well-aging.

Name: Ekologie Forte Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Ekologie Forte’s range of products is organically farmed produce, processed under hygienic conditions without any chemicals and marketed with compliance to organic certification standards. The brand is built on a socially inclusive model of business and meant contribute to the well being of the consumers, to the benefit of the marginalized and to restore nature. Our product brings to you not just healthy options but also the best quality products in the organic food space.

The Vision
To be a successful global organic food and cosmetic ingredient company where our farming partners, associates and consumers are confident and assured that they are cared, valued and cherished by us in the conduct of our business.

Name: Fast Job Ads
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: endota
Description:
As a purpose-led brand, endota exists to help care for your wellbeing. We understand that caring for your wellbeing means nurturing every part of who you are. As the Australasian leaders in wellness, we're here to guide you in nourishing and nurturing your mind, body, and skin through every phase of life.

Guided by our values of intent, connect, truth, and balance, endota has become Australia’s largest day spa network, with over 110 locations across Australia, New Zealand and Thailand. Performing more than 850,000 treatments annually, we’ve expanded globally, offering results-driven endota skincare and wellness products. Our 220 skus are distributed through spas, travel retail and departments across 8 countries.

Our giftcard offering has become a cornerstone of the brand's success, reflecting our commitment to wellness experiences. We manufacture 98% of products in Australia, using natural, uniquely Australian ingredients. Our Organics range is COSMOS certified organic or natural by ACO. Our New Age range is a revolutionary skincare approach clinically tested to deliver age-defying results.

Our commitment to excellence is reflected in the recognition we've received. We've been named the Best Luxury Spa Group in Australia for 2023 & 2024 (Luxury Lifestyle) and celebrated as winners of the 2021 Global Beauty & Wellness Awards. Our Peptide 8 Hyaluronic Serum earned the title of Best Star Anti-Aging Serum at the 2022 ELLE Beauty Star Awards, and we were the 2022 World Spa & Wellness Spa Group of the Year runner-up. We’ve also been honored as the prix de marie clare Best Australian Beauty Brand in 2018, 2019, and 2020.

We are dedicated to wellbeing in the workplace, our wellness division provides services to help employees integrate wellbeing practices into their lives. We're proud to educate the next generation of beauty and remedial massage therapists through our certified endota wellness college and to empower individuals with self-care tools via endota retreat.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PINK CHEEKS
Description:
Foi a partir da dificuldade em encontrar produtos de beleza que atendessem às necessidades que tinham antes, durante e depois dos treinos de corrida que as amigas (e hoje sócias) Corina Godoy Cunha, Renata Chaim e Gisele Violin resolveram criar a própria marca de cosméticos para esportistas.

“Corina tinha melasma e queria um filtro que durasse na pele e não escorresse nem ardesse os olhos. Gisele sofria com bolhas nos pés, e eu tinha muitas assaduras. Não conseguíamos ficar satisfeitas com os itens que encontrávamos aqui e trazíamos muita coisa de fora”, diz Renata.

Foram pelo menos três anos de protótipos, erros e testes entre amigos e família até o lançamento da primeira linha da Pink Cheeks, em 2013, que contava com filtro solar, bastão antiassaduras, creme relaxante para pernas, lenços umedecidos e fluido que não deixa o cabelo embaraçar.

As redes sociais e a postagem de um dos produtos por uma influenciadora respeitada no meio da corrida fez o estoque esgotar no mesmo dia.

Daí, o trio ganhou fôlego para se estruturar de acordo com a profissão que cada uma exercia na época: Corina, farmacêutica, ficou responsável pelo desenvolvimento dos produtos; Renata, publicitária, pelo marketing; e Gisele, administradora, pelas áreas comercial e administrativa.

As vendas, inicialmente pelo e-commerce próprio e participação com estande em alguns eventos de corrida, ganhou reforço de cerca de 300 consultoras. Cinco anos depois, os produtos também estão em megastores como Decathlon e Centauro, além de lojas esportivas de nicho, redes de farmácias e lojas online de beleza.

O portfólio aumentou: são 60 itens, incluindo a linha de maquiagem Sport, lançada em 2017. A empresa ganhou o prêmio Abihpec duas vezes consecutivas (2017 e 2018), na categoria melhor filtro solar (Pink Stick e Shine), além de ter recebido o prêmio BIA, na In-Cosmetics Global Paris, como melhor "indie color cosmetic" (2019).

Atualmente, as sócias participam da classe Winning Women, da EY Brasil.

Name: Bushbalm Skincare
Description:
Bushbalm is a leader in bikini line skincare, providing effective solutions for the common challenges associated with hair removal. We’re on a mission to boost confidence with our results-driven formulations, crafted to nourish, soothe, and restore your skin—helping you feel comfortable and confident, from your bikini line and beyond.

Founded in Ottawa, Canada, Bushbalm has rapidly evolved from a bold idea into one of the country's fastest-growing skincare brands. After securing a deal on Dragons’ Den, we scaled our eCommerce-first model and have expanded into 6,500+ professional waxing salons and all Ulta Beauty locations nationwide. Recognized by BeautyMatter’s FUTURE50, Bushbalm is not just redefining personal care—it’s helping shape the future of the beauty industry.

Name: LABORATOIRE USPALLA
Description:
Au Laboratoire Uspalla, nous vous accompagnons dans votre projet cosmétique de A à Z (de l’idée au conditionnement, en passant par la R&D, le sourcing pack et la rédaction de documents réglementaires).

 Nous avons choisi de nous engager pour une cosmétique responsable et certifiée. Nous nous appuyons sur nos fournisseurs de confiance pour vous proposer des cosmétiques de qualité en formulation bio, naturelle et écologique, en marque blanche ou à façon. Notre site de fabrication et conditionnement est certifié ECOCERT.

 Notre savoir-faire de plus de 10 ans fait de nous des experts en développement de produits à l’image de nos donneurs d’ordre, selon leur cahier des charges "clean & green".

 Notre structure à taille humaine nous permet de vous offrir réactivité, disponibilité et écoute. Un interlocuteur unique vous suit tout au long du projet (et même après votre lancement produit !)

 Un projet de développement produit ou un besoin de sous-traitance en production ? Interrogez-nous !

Name: Repechage
Description:
Repêchage (re-pe-shaj) is French for “second chance,” a second chance for beautiful skin. Since 1980, Repêchage has helped people achieve beautiful skin with our seaweed-based skincare products that are featured at top spas and salons globally. Repêchage Founder Lydia Sarfati, and her husband and Co-founder, David Sarfati have been committed to creating the highest quality and most efficacious professional and at-home products available.  To do this, Repêchage combines the pure, healthy benefits of sustainably harvested seaweed from the coast of Maine and France, and other important ingredients derived from nature with the most advanced technological research to create the very best skin care from earth and sea.  

Lydia Sarfati is a master esthetician, an international industry leader and the developer of the world-renowned Repêchage Four-Layer Facial, what Cosmopolitan UK has called "the best facial of the century." Today, the Sarfatis oversee a 50,000 square foot, ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing, research, development and training facility in Secaucus, NJ.  Pioneering seaweed-based skincare treatments and cosmetics in the U.S., Repêchage now has over 20 skin care regimens for every skin type and concern and over 100 products for the professional and consumer, manufactured in the United States, and is sold in over 45 countries worldwide.  Using seaweed filtrate derived by a proprietary method, Repêchage continues to develop products that are paraben-free, not tested on animals and made with a multitude of natural and organic ingredients.  Lydia Sarfati appears nationally and internationally at esthetic trade shows and attends and conducts international conferences through-out the year.  Repêchage is proud to be available at luxury spas and destination resorts, professional skin care centers and medical centers as well as through repechage.com.

Name: Dream Cosmetics
Description:
Chez DREAM Cosmetics, le pouvoir est au cœur de la beauté. 
Nous voulons donner aux femmes et aux hommes le pouvoir sur leur beauté afin que chacune et chacun puisse se réaliser tel qu’il s’est toujours rêvé.
Grâce à notre laboratoire de recherche intégré, nous offrons le meilleur de la cosmétique, toujours à la pointe de l’innovation, pour répondre aux besoins de tous nos consommateurs, même les plus exigeants.
Les peaux noires et métissées reçoivent l’excellence cosmétique avec des soins innovants et ultra-performants, qui répondent aux besoin spécifiques des femmes, des hommes, des enfants & des bébés.
DREAM Cosmetics c’est plus de 40 marques présentes dans plus de 30 pays ! 
La science est notre force. DREAM est votre pouvoir.

Name: Alliance World Manufacturing Limited
Description:
Alliance World Manufacturing Ltd. (f.k.a. Alliance India) is the FMCG division of Alliance Group, manufacturing customized products for leading multinationals. AWML is the No.1 and the largest TPM in India for bathing soaps.  In terms of quality systems, automated processes, GMP standards and experience of the team behind, AWML is in a class of its own. 

AWML currently manufactures some of the finest brands of personal care products for Unilever India like Dove, Lux, Pears, Lifebuoy, Hamam and Ayush, to name a few.  The company  has a production capacity of 125,000 MTPA, with its 17 automatic and semi-automatic lines for both opaque and transparent soap bars.

Besides the two world class manufacturing plants in Baddi, Himachal Pradesh and Guwahati, Assam, the company is expanding further in India and abroad.  The state-of-the-art 35 acre green field facility in Patna, Bihar is scheduled to be operational by Q4 2022. The modern plant in Medan, Indonesia is expected to roll out various personal care products by Q2 2022.

AWML is a part of the Alliance Group, which was started as RMGR (Ramditta Mal Ganga Ram) - a multi-functional group in Gojra nine decades ago in the year 1929. Alliance World came into existence  in 2003 to further diversify its portfolio into pharmaceuticals, FMCG, agriculture, cement, engineering tech, farming and value added logistics.

As one of India’s most geographically diversified groups, Alliance Group operates world-class manufacturing facilities in Himachal Pradesh, Punjab, Haryana, Assam, Maharashtra and Chandigarh. Driven by a culture of dedicated performance, the Alliance World Group is driven by aspirational targets and is committed to continuous improvement, transparency, social responsibility and well being of all its stakeholders.

Name: Special Cosmetics BV
Description:
Special Cosmetics BV produces and distributes a number of own cosmetic brands, third party brands, supplements and cosmetic supplies.

In the 1980's Special Cosmetics was founded by a small group of make-up specialists lead by make-up artist Wil van het Hek in Amsterdam. Special Cosmetics BV distributes its own brands Make-up Studio and TYRO Cosmetics in more than 65 countries and has more than 20.000 points of sale (POS). The POS consist of mono brand stores, shop-in-shop and displays in retail chains, salons,beauty centers, wellness centers, hairdressers, webshops and online platforms such as Amazon, Bol.com and Douglas.

The head office of Special Cosmetics is based in Wormerveer, The Netherlands, which is about 30 minutes from Amsterdam. The distribution, warehouse, administration, sales, marketing and training facilities are all located under one roof in Wormerveer.

Name: CUT BY FRED
Description:
Fondée en 2018 par Frédéric Birault, coiffeur visionnaire depuis plus de 20 ans, CUT BY FRED est une marque pionnière en soins capillaires experts, clean, vegan et Made in France. 

Notre mission ? Révéler la beauté naturelle de tous les cheveux, qu’ils soient bouclés, ondulés, raides, crépus, fins ou secs grâce à des formules professionnelles ultra-sensorielles composées de 97% d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle minimum.

  Engagement clean & éco-responsable : Des formules éthiques aux ingrédients naturels, des emballages rechargeables et recyclables pour un impact environnemental réduit. 
  L’expertise coiffeur au cœur de la formulation : Des produits développés avec un haut niveau d’exigence pour répondre aux besoins de toutes les chevelures.
  Expérience sensorielle : Des textures enveloppantes et parfums addictifs, qui transforment la routine capillaire en un véritable rituel de bien-être

Name: Christine Valmy
Description:
75 years ago, in her native Romania, Christine Valmy began creating natural skin care products with ingredients from her garden. In 1961, she moved to the U.S. and pioneered the country's esthetics profession, opening its first school in 1965. For decades, Ms. Valmy worked with her daughter, Marina, to fine-tune treatment techniques and product formulas based on a deep knowledge of how skin functions. Together, they advanced the beauty industry through education and product innovation. 

Today, Marina Valmy leads the organization, staying on the cutting edge of new trends and technologies to shape the next generation of beauty professionals, while remaining forever true to her mother's original vision of all-natural, effective skin care. 

The Christine Valmy organization has remained steadfast in the traditions of excellence and expertise. We offer courses across a range of exciting and engaging beauty disciplines, all of which deliver a top-quality learning experience that passes on our industry-leading knowledge to our students. As a result, Christine Valmy alumni are highly sought after in the vibrant beauty industry. Employers know that graduates who hold a Christine Valmy diploma will be fully prepared to transition into a professional environment, because they know we provide a superior education. 

The expertise we deliver comes from our long-standing industry leadership, our renowned certified instructors, and decades of research and development of organic, cruelty-free products for consumers and professionals. 

Our original formulas – invented and produced in our own laboratory and factory – utilize nature's best ingredients, combining ancient Chinese and Ayurvedic traditions and modern scientific techniques to produce products that improve the long-term health and look of skin. 

It continues to be, as it has always been, the company’s mission to deliver the highest quality across across the spectrum of skin care education, treatment, and product.

Un brand dalla forte vocazione innovativa, nato nel 2017 dalla tradizione di ricerca e qualità delle professionalità che lo compongono per un nuovo approccio alla cura della pelle cruelty free, vegan friendly, parabens free e Made in Italy.


ZAGO MILANO

A beauty brand Made in Italy, con Amore. ZAGO Milano’s approach to beauty is that glam can be natural and, at the same time, all of us are naturally glam. ZAGO’s products are designed to answer your skin needs and prepare it for any situation.

Guided by our Italian heritage, our goal is to create innovative beauty products that uphold the values of Italian craftsmanship and quality. 

30 YEARS OF INTERNATIONAL EXPERIENCE

ZAGO is the young expression of profound know-how in the cosmetics industry. A brand with a strong innovative approach, launched in 2017 out of the tradition of high-quality research and professionalism. ZAGO embodies a new approach to skincare that is  cruelty free, vegan friendly, parabens free e Made in Italy.

Name: Avon Polska
Description:
Avon to coś więcej niż firma kosmetyczna, to realne wsparcie dla kobiet.

Nasza strategia CSR? Nie tworzymy jej – żyjemy nią na co dzień. Wsparcie kobiet wpisane jest w DNA naszej organizacji już 135 lat. To właśnie wtedy daliśmy kobietom możliwość zarabiania na własnych warunkach zanim jeszcze otrzymały prawo głosu w wyborach. W samej Polsce co 8 kobieta była lub jest związana z Avon.

Każdego dnia wspieramy kobiety w ich przedsiębiorczości i rozwoju. Dzięki naszym programom Avon Kontra Rak Piersi i Avon Kontra Przemoc dbamy również o ich zdrowie i bezpieczeństwo.

Należymy do rodziny Natura &Co. Wspólnie z The Body Shop, Natura, Aesop tworzymy 4 grupę kosmetyczną na świecie, a naszą misją jest bycie najlepszą grupą kosmetyczną DLA świata. Razem docieramy do ponad 200 000 000 konsumentów globalnie. Jesteśmy liderem sprzedaży bezpośredniej. 

Kontakt do biura prasowego Avon Cosmetics Polska: avon.media@gardenofwords.pl

Name: SYLVECO
Description:
ABOUT OUR COMPANY

Sylveco is a family-owned and managed natural skincare company specializing in products that combine top-quality dermocosmetic agents with traditional Polish-grown herbal ingredients.

Fast-growing since 2008, we now offer three distinctive personal care brands that suit the needs of modern consumers, both eco-minded and mainstream. Each of our products features real plant extracts in a hypoallergenic, paraben-free formula. In addition to gentle everyday products for all skin types, we offer numerous specialty solutions created to tackle specific skin- and hair-care challenges.





AWARD-WINNING BUSINESS WITH GLOBAL POTENTIAL

At Sylveco we conduct our own research, development and rigorous testing, maintaining on-site ingredient processing and the highest production standards in the industry. We are proud advocates of green business practices, including a commitment to zero toxic waste pollution and no animal testing, ever.

Our products have been marketed via multiple channels, including national drugstore/chemist chains, pharmacies, herbal shops, organic markets and various online retail schemes. Our marketing strategy is non-invasive and largely based upon the excellent reviews, numerous awards and enviably good word of mouth our products have garnered among both experts in skincare and end users themselves.

We are currently prepared to support mid- to large-scale export production. Our ingredients are approved for use in Poland and the EU and our manufacturing and distribution plants adhere to the strictest standards governing the cosmetics category in Poland. We are happy to make our facilities available for official inspection by interested parties.

We look forward to bringing the best in Poland’s plant-based personal care to consumers in other markets.

Name: Z Guard
Description:
ZGuard is a 100% natural and herbal mosquito repellent body spray developed by Kyoshi Innovations. Designed for daily use, ZGuard offers a safe, effective, and non-toxic alternative to chemical repellents, making it suitable for both children and adults.

Key Highlights:
• Natural Ingredients: Powered by herbal actives like citronella, lemongrass, eucalyptus, and neem, ZGuard is free from DEET, parabens, and harmful chemicals.
• Safe for All Ages: Gentle on skin, safe for infants, toddlers, pregnant women, and people with sensitive skin.
• Long-Lasting Protection: Provides up to 8 hours of protection against mosquitoes and insect bites.
• Skin-Friendly Formulation: Non-sticky, quick-absorbing formula that leaves the skin feeling fresh and lightly fragrant.
• On-the-Go Convenience: Comes in compact, travel-friendly packaging for easy reapplication outdoors or indoors.

Brand Vision:
ZGuard is more than a repellent—it's a protection partner for families that prioritizes health, safety, and sustainability. With an emphasis on herbal science and eco-conscious living, ZGuard reflects Kyoshi Innovations' mission to blend nature and innovation for everyday wellness.

Name: MaxGroup Oficial
Description:

Venha você também fazer parte dessa família e ajudar a tornar a Max um lugar ainda mais incrível para se trabalhar. Desperte seu lado Max dentro de você!

Name: LA CRÈME LIBRE
Description:
Fini les formulations obscures, les appellations superflues, les routines complexes. Prouvons ensemble que beauté peut rimer avec santé, recentrons nous sur l’essentiel.

Depuis 2019, La Crème Libre bouscule les habitudes pour éveiller les sens avec une envie de tout concilier : la sécurité, la performance et la sensorialité pour tous et pour toujours.

Des soins naturels et performants adaptés aux peaux les plus exigeantes, même sensibles. Un équilibre harmonieux entre biotechnologie, naturalité et plaisir.

Des produits essentiels et universels pour rééquilibrer les épidermes stressés avec des formules ultra concentrées, sûres et expertes.

Name: CLEARSTEM
Description:
Founded by Danielle "The Acne Guru" Gronich and Integrative Healthcare Practitioner Kayleigh Christina, CLEARSTEM is the first acne brand that connects internal and external skincare through supplements and topicals with no-pore clogging ingredients, ever. Beyond these key offerings, our mission is to empower our community through education—Because Clear Skin Changes Everything.

"We've battled breakouts caused by pore-clogging ingredients and know it affects everyone's skin at all stages of life. That’s why we created CLEARSTEM—prestige, anti-aging skincare without the breakouts. Enjoy the confidence of truly clear skin."

Be Clear + Age Well,
Kayleigh + Danielle "The Acne Guru"Co-Founders of CLEARSTEM

Name: Clochee sp. z o. o.
Description:
CLOCHEE – simply organic it’s a brand of fully natural cosmetics for face & body care. Our products are made from natural raw materials of vegetable origin. We choose only certified ingredients. Cosmetics also are ecologically packed. 

Our aim is to produce the perfect beauty product, thoroughly natural, safe and healthy. We use the power of plants and minerals and stay true to nature. Our products do not contain allergy inducing substances (parabens and other preservatives,  mineral oil and oil substances, silicones, alcohol, propylene glycol, synthetic dyes, ethoxylated PEG and SLES).

We are an integral part of nature continuously using its renewable resources. However, exploitation can lead to degeneration and damage. We want to show you that it is possible to live in harmony with nature. 

Most of us dream of having a fascinating and enjoyable job. This was dream too and we pursued it by founding Clochee. We now do what we love, what we are interested in and what we are good at. We want to share it with you.

Name: AMODIL COSMETICOS
Description: NATUREL S.A. es la empresa de Venta Directa de mayor prestigio y antigüedad en el mercado. La productora y distribuidora de productos cosméticos Amodil hace más de 45 años que llega a la puerta de cada hogar argentino, de Ushuaia a la Quiaca, brindando belleza y excelente calidad en cada uno de sus productos. Amodil es el origen de la independencia económica y la libertad espiritual, es la herramienta para convertirse en una auténtica mujer de negocios. Posee tres plantas elaboradoras: dos en Villa Mercedes, San Luis, y la tercera en la Provincia de Buenos Aires. Su infraestructura cuenta con laboratorios que rigen las estrictas normas de calidad, con maquinarias de última generación y con profesionales altamente capacitados. La calidad está supervisada por un doble control: el propio de la empresa y el realizado por el Ente Regulador ANMAT (Administración Nacional de Medicamentos, Alimentos y tecnología Médica), que habilita la comercialización de cada uno de ellos. El compromiso con el crecimiento de la mujer, la utilización de las tecnologías más avanzadas y la constante búsqueda de tendencias internacionales, permiten llegar a cada hogar con un servicio de excelencia, afirmando el éxito Amodil.

Description:
Benamôr is an historical cosmetic brand founded in Lisbon in 1925.

Its handmade skin recipes were based on natural ingredients and packaged in adorable art deco tubes. It was an instant hit! Adopted by all Lisbon Belles throughout the 20th century, including Queen Amélie herself who maintained her devotion to the brand her entire life, Benamôr remains today one of Portugal’s most beloved beauty brand.

Discover the beauty recipes of Benamôr!

Name: TOTM
Description:
The Bold, Bright Future of Period Care  

At TOTM, we’re inspiring better, sustainable ways to manage periods. Our ethical range is designed to care for periods and the planet naturally, including 100% certified organic cotton tampons, pads, liners, and zero-waste menstrual cups. We take pride in using high-quality, responsibly sourced ingredients in our period care to offer effective protection and comfort without harsh chemicals or irritants.

Stocked nationwide by leading retailers, we’re a force for period-positive change in a stigmatised industry. As part of our pioneering movement, we’re championing menstrual comfort, wellbeing, and dignity in workplaces everywhere.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Zotos Professional
Description:
Zotos Professional has been making hair dreams happen at home since 1929, and we’re still bringing your visions to life with salon-quality products nearly a century later.
 
Every product is formulated by our team of scientists at our state-of-the-art lab and tested with professional stylists at our on-site salon. And behind each one is the belief that the power to create great hair days is in everyone’s hands, no matter your hair type, goals, or budget. That’s why we keep our products accessibly priced and offer perks like free unlimited access to ZP Professional Stylists.
 
As your partner in hair, we give you the expert support and inspiration to achieve salon-worthy results at home, on your time and your terms—for hair that makes you feel unstoppable.

Name: Skin Virtue
Description:
Bioactive Cosmeceuticals for Sensitive and Ageing Skin.

Skin Virtue is an Australian brand meticulously developed to address sensitised and ageing skin concerns. In a world where our skin faces an ongoing barrage of aggressive treatments, pollutants and irritants, the necessity for a skincare brand tailored to sensitive skin is irrefutable. Skin Virtue stands as a guiding light in this domain, committed to creating premium multi-tasking formulations that not only provide relief for sensitive skin but also adeptly target the challenges posed by ageing skin, formulated to restore and rejuvenate.

We manufacture cosmeceutical, anti-allergen, problem-prone, and anti-ageing skincare products that focus on clinical results and safety for both the consumer and the environment.

Formulated to help strengthen the skin barrier function, support skin stem cell longevity, and address age-related concerns. Supporting the skin's basic functionality and providing essential building blocks for healthy skin with a proprietary blend of skin-identical active biotechnological ingredients, plant-derived molecules, marine enzymes, stem cells, vitamins, and gentle skin-identical emulsifiers. Leveraging multifunctional active ingredients and formulating smarter ingredient synergies to provide perfect skin affinity for optimal skin restoration and protection.

Our powerful formulations are designed to work in synergy with the skin to trigger intercellular matrix molecules which activate skin regeneration and repair.

By utilising active liposome and ionosome delivery systems, composed of naturally derived phospholipids, which are the same material as a cell membrane, we are able to enhance the efficacy and administration of active ingredients.

Formulated to be gentle, non-comedogenic, and anti-irritating without nasties because we care.

This professional range is available to skincare clinicians with some selected products available for pre and post-treatment home care use.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Maxima Solutions
Description:
Born from Aero Pharma in 2007, for over four decades, Maxima Solutions has evolved into one of India’s most trusted ODM/OEM partners for global colour cosmetics and personal care brands. 

From concept to creation, we deliver end-to-end manufacturing across makeup, skin, hair, grooming, bath and body—backed by cutting-edge R&D, 3 advanced facilities in India, and a deep commitment to innovation, agility, and uncompromising quality. We blend scale with speed, science with creativity, and partnership with trust, ensuring your vision is protected, perfected, and ready for the world. Trusted by global leaders & emerging disruptors alike.

On our 40th Anniversary, we present to you our new Zoom To Market (ZTM) service. With ZTM, we go beyond manufacturing—offering product expertise combined with ideation and market insights to deliver a ready to launch range of products. Whether you want to expand your portfolio or launch a completely new brand with its own trademark, ZTM gives you everything you need to hit the market faster, smarter, and stronger.

At The Home of Maxima, we don’t just make products—we help build beauty brands that inspire.

Name: The Chemist Look
Description: Nacida en Uruguay, en 2015, basándose de la mirada científica y creativa de su fundadora, Florencia Jinchuk, The Chemist Look es una marca de cosmética enfocada en productos dedicados al cuidado de la piel, todos elaborados bajo el concepto de la empresa, la 'Formulación Consciente'. Sus fórmulas consiguen el justo equilibrio entre la calidad y eficacia de sus activos, priorizando la biocompatibilidad con la piel. Todos los productos son veganos, cruelty free, probados dermatológicamente y no contienen fragancias, alcohol o otros activos con  potencial de causar alergias o irritación. El portafolio de beauty tech, presente en Uruguay, Argentina y Chile, incluye boosters, exfoliantes, emulsión limpiadora facial y humectantes. Para obtener más información, visite nuestra web www.thechemistlook.com y también nuestro perfil de Instagram @thechemistlook_uy

Name: L'Armoire à Beauté
Description:
L’Armoire à Beauté c’est l’opportunité de développer son officine grâce à une sélection de marques renouvelée tous les 6 mois. Les dernières marques dont tout le monde parle : naturelles, bio ou vegan et principalement made in France, réunies dans un joli corner. 
Une gondole  pleine de nouveautés pour attirer et fidéliser vos clients en quête de marques tendances !


 UNE SÉLECTION MINUTIEUSE
Chaque marque choisie est soumise à un examen approfondi : formulation clean, provenance, originalité du concept, nos experts font le tri. Et pour vous faciliter le conseil, les gammes présentées sont complémentaires les unes des autres !


 UN CORNER CLEF EN MAIN
On sélectionne pour vous les meilleures marques et on vous les livre accompagnées de leur meuble en moins de 2 semaines !


 EN PERMANENCE DES NOUVEAUTÉS
Tous les 6 mois, la sélection change pour laisser sa place aux nouveautés. Vous nous renvoyez ce que vous ne voulez pas garder. On reprend vos invendus et on vous envoie la nouvelle collection. 


BIEN PLUS QU’UNE ARMOIRE
Animations, formations, challenges : nos 27 commerciaux et 20 animatrices s’occupent de vous et de vos clients aux 4 coins de la France !


4 POINTS QUI FONT LA DIFFÉRENCE

Name: Rosental Organics GmbH
Description:
What does it mean to produce organic cosmetic?

Easier to answer: What does it not mean?
We see ourselves as a natural cosmetics manufacturer. For us, this means not "greenwashing" our products or luring them with false advertising promises.

We are only satisfied and convinced of ourselves when our customers are happy as well.

For this reason, we want to ensure more transparency within the beauty scene and produce products where consumers know all the ingredients.

 Our vision: 
We don't have to write which effect which product has. The customers experience the added value themselves.

Transparency is also an important factor within our working methods. We are fans of open communication and want our employees to grow with us as well as beyond themselves.

For this reason, we take great interest in the satisfaction of our employees and value their work.

For even more authentic insights, visit our founders' LinkedIn profile.

Name: SNOTbv
Description:
SNOTbv is the creator and distributor of 3 artistic perfumery brands: NASOMATTO, ORTO PARISI and MARIA L, founded by Alessandro Gualtieri. The company thrives to position its creations outside of the perfume bottle, in order to create a cross-cultural dialogue by asking questions and making statements.

All the products are created and developed in-house, where every process is carefully supervised. The Nose behind each scent is Alessandro Gualtieri. Besides organising art installations, performances and presentations, SNOTbv takes care of the logistics of the orders and develops all offline and online materials. The creations can be found online and worldwide in some of the world’s finest department stores and leading concept stores. 

SNOTbv is constantly looking for compatible partners all over the world to carry and represent their brands.

Name: Medrock Pharmacy
Description: Medrock Pharmacy is an independantly owned compounding pharmacy with locations in Tampa, FL and Chattanooga, TN. We specialize in dermatology with expansion plans in the future. We accept all patients and insurance types.

Name: Bask Suncare
Description: Bask is a celebration of feeling good: in the sun, in your skin, and with your people. Sunshine has always helped us do that. But sunscreen hasn’t. So, we created great-feeling SPF formulas that are lightweight, non-oily, easy to apply, and better for you and the world.

Name: Concepta LLC
Description:
Who We Are
Concepta is a global brand accelerator with headquarters in Serbia, an office in Miami, and a remote-friendly team of international experts.
We focus on building and scaling beauty and lifestyle brands for the U.S. market and beyond. Our team operates across hybrid, remote, and in-office setups, reflecting the flexible and dynamic nature of our work.

Our Vision
We believe the next generation of consumer brands will be more meaningful, more human, and more connected to people’s values.
Our vision is to build those brands. Brands that deliver lasting value, trust, and a better quality of life.

Our Strategy
We combine creative thinking, operational excellence, and data- driven brand building to turn promising ideas into powerful consumer products.
From incubation to acquisition, we move fast, blending market insight, speed, and structured growth to bring great brands to life.

Our Mission
We create and grow beauty and lifestyle brands that are scalable, relevant, and emotionally resonant. Products that become part of people’s daily lives.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Biotanie
Description:
Biotanie naît en 2018, grâce à Cécile Plekhoff, alors gendarme, et son compagnon Anthony Martin, directeur artistique.

À l’époque, Anthony souffre de psoriasis, une maladie inflammatoire de la peau, et les différents dermatologues qu’il consulte l’inondent de mille et une prescriptions sans effet durable.

Cécile concocte alors une solution naturelle à base d’huile de chanvre qui améliore considérablement l'état de la peau d’Anthony. Ils développent donc un intérêt particulier pour une vie saine autour de solutions au naturel.

Le projet de couple Biotanie, avec sa première gamme Hydrapaise - pour hydrater et apaiser les peaux les plus exigeantes - voit le jour.

Biotanie développe et fabrique ses formules 100 % naturelles, ultra bio et végétales dans son propre laBiOratoire. 

Marque éco-engagée, pour de vrai ! #stopgreenwashing

Name: SunKiss Suncare Lifestyle & Amenities
Description:
SunKiss offers a unique variety of suncare products which have all been designed with Sustainability and CSR in mind and have proudly been created and tested in the UAE.

REDUCING CARBON FOOTPRINT ; Having a short supply chain, we reduce carbon footprint and offer shorter lead times with smaller minimum order quantities on core ranges than imported items

SUSTAINABILITY & CIRCULAR ECONOMY ; Products are sustainably produced to reduce plastic by +90%.  SunKiss is presented in aluminum vessels and a variety of product options enables you to reuse, refill and recycle

ENVIRONMENTAL; Our sun protection range is created to be Reef-Friendly.  Formulations are alcohol-free, paraben-free and vegan, making them safe and suitable for use across all guest profiles.

HOSPITALITY AMENITIES ; our collections are used by some of the world’s leading hospitality brands within Spa & Recreation, Housekeeping and In-Room Turndown as well as inspired gifts for VIPs and valued guests.

LUXURIOUS COLLECTIONS; elegantly packaged in a variety textures and SPF levels for sun protection, tanning, aftersun care for the body, face and lips

Name: Angel Cosmetics
Description:
Chez ANGEL Cosmetics, le pouvoir est au cœur de la beauté. 

Nous voulons donner aux femmes et aux hommes le pouvoir sur leur beauté afin que chacune et chacun puisse se réaliser tel qu’il s’est toujours rêvé.

Grâce à notre laboratoire de recherche intégré, nous offrons le meilleur de la cosmétique, toujours à la pointe de l’innovation, pour répondre aux besoins de tous nos consommateurs, même les plus exigeants.

Les peaux noires et métissées reçoivent l’excellence cosmétique avec des soins innovants et ultra-performants, qui répondent aux besoin spécifiques des femmes, des hommes, des enfants & des bébés.

ANGEL Cosmetics c’est plus de 40 marques présentes dans plus de 30 pays ! 

La science est notre force. ANGEL est votre pouvoir.

Name: Suganda Skincare
Description:
At Suganda, our story began from a personal quest for skincare solutions that cater to the most sensitive skin, including that of a four-month-old baby and a mother battling eczema. Our founder's journey, filled with challenges and discoveries, led to the creation of our first product – a beacon of hope for many facing similar skin concerns.

Today, we stand as a testament to the power of uniting science with nature's purity. Each of our products is crafted not just to care for the skin but to enhance overall well-being – body, mind, and soul. Our mission is to redefine skincare by debunking myths and eliminating fear-based marketing, instead empowering our customers with knowledge and confidence.

As we continue to innovate and grow, our core remains rooted in the belief that effective skincare should be accessible, nurturing, and honest. We invite you to join our journey, to experience skincare that's not only about looking good but feeling great in your skin.

 Suganda Skincare– Redefining Beauty with Science, Nature, and Heart

Name: Carpe
Description:
Carpe was founded with one mission: to help those suffering with embarrassing, uncomfortable sweat. We are reimagining everything that antiperspirants and sweat control can be.

We grew up with sweaty palms, hesitating to hold a hand or reach for that handshake. We spent a year developing over 60 prototypes until we created a product that worked for us.

After launching in 2014, we heard from countless customers for whom nothing else had worked asking us to expand our sweat solution line. We have grown into a full suite of products designed to help no matter where, no matter why, and no matter how much you sweat.

Description:
Founded in 1983 near Milan, Biokosmes is a Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization specialized in cosmetics and medical devices. With over 40 years of experience, the company offers a full-service approach — from product concept and formulation to packaging — supporting healthcare brands worldwide.

Biokosmes is part of The Healthea Group, an international network of leading CDMOs established in 2025, offering one of the most comprehensive portfolios of ready-to-market products, especially medical devices, across more than 14 therapeutic areas.

Biokosmes operates through advanced facilities in Italy, with:
13 filling lines
In-house microbiological analysis
Production of creams, ointments, gels, sprays, lotions, serums, foams, and other topical forms

Over the years, Biokosmes has earned several national and international certifications, including ISO 13485, ISO 22716 – GMPs, and approvals from FDA, TGA, Anvisa, among others — confirming its dedication to quality and regulatory excellence.

Biokosmes supports both:
Tailor-made development projects
Ready-to-market solutions

Name: JOY GROUP 橘宜集团
Description:
WHO WE ARE

JOY GROUP is Asia's leading multi-brand beauty company on a mission to "Create a world of beauty that brings joy to everyone.”

Since its founding, JOY GROUP has achieved strong growth across multiple beauty categories. In makeup, JOY is now the No. 1 domestic company by market share in China.

With a direct-to-consumer approach, we have built a robust omnichannel presence—operating flagship stores across major e-commerce platforms and over 100 mono-brand boutiques offline. Through strategic collaborations with key retail partners, our global footprint has expanded to 21,000+ points of sale.

We are backed by renowned global and local investors, including General Atlantic, Tencent, and Shunwei Capital (Xiaomi).

Since 2020, JOY GROUP has actively expanded its reach into overseas markets, reaching 50+ countries via both e-commerce and retail.

OUR BRANDS

- JUDYDOLL: Makeup Simplified, Fun Amplified. The No. 1 makeup brand by sales volume in China, now gaining strong global momentum.

- JOOCYEE: Simple yet chic. Ranked No.1 in China’s domestic lipstick category. 

- René Furterer: A prestigious French haircare brand founded in 1957 and France’s No.1 anti-hair loss brand for 20+ years. Since January 2024, JOY GROUP has been responsible for managing René Furterer's brand operations in China.

- Biophyto genesis: A "Clinically Rooted, Dermatological Skincare” brand founded in 2012.

-  Foltène: A dermatological hair-care brand from Italy, established in 1944. JOY GROUP acquired the brand in 2025.

OUR SUPPLY CHAIN CAPABILITY

We have developed an integrated, agile, and fast-reacting end-to-end supply chain, spanning R&D, manufacturing, marketing, and sales. By combining our in-house R&D labs, factory, e-commerce operations, retail stores, and marketing hubs, JOY GROUP is uniquely positioned to stay responsive and competitive in the rapidly evolving beauty industry.

Description:
La Canopée - We are a 100% natural cosmetics brand. We want to offer effectiveness through our products by using only the strenght of the nature.

We are vegan: no raw material comes from animal or animal work and of of course no development of the brand where it allowed to do animal testing. 

And we are a made in France brand:  In order to have the control we decided to manage our own factory. We are developing all the formulation part with our own R&D Lab and and we produce by ourselves each product in Grasse, south of France in our factory. 

We are specialized in face care but we developped a body care range too to be complete on our offer.

Co-founded by the two sisters Juliette & Cécile the family brand comes from more than 3 years of work before the launch. They both bring all their expertise in their respective domains in order to create La Canopée. Cécile is a chemical formulation engineer who is taking care of all the product development and Juliette who is graduated in Design is developing all the Marketing and Communication part of the brand and each products.

Name: RainPharma
Description:
RainPharma products are based on no-nonsense, premium formulas that promote glowing skin, a healthy weight and a strong body. A multi-disciplinary team of dedicated experts develops and creates all of our products in Belgium. We have no need for hocus-pocus ingredients or exaggerated claims, but strive to make 100% honest products of exceptional quality and maximum efficiency, for everyone. No unnecessary or unhealthy ingredients, but precious formulas that will immediately win your heart. A lot of passion goes into our products and we sincerely hope that you will take as much pleasure in using them as we do in making them.

RainPharma is made in Belgium. We maken no-nonsense premium producten voor een stralende huid, een gezond gewicht en een sterk lichaam. Zowel de ontwikkeling als de productie gebeurt in België door een multidisciplinair team van topexperten. Hocus pocus-ingrediënten of overdreven claims zijn niets voor ons. We gaan 100% voor eerlijke producten die voor iedereen toegankelijk zijn, van uitzonderlijke kwaliteit en met maximale efficiëntie. Geen overbodige of ongezonde ingrediënten, maar kostbare formules die meteen je hart zullen veroveren. We maken onze producten met heel veel passie en hopen oprecht dat je evenveel plezier beleeft aan het gebruiken ervan.

RainPharma est une marque belge qui propose des produits de qualité sans chichis, pour une peau rayonnante, une mine éclatante et un corps plein de vitalité. La conception et la production se déroulent en Belgique sous la supervision d’une équipe d’experts multidisciplinaire. Pas d’ingrédients miracles ni de revendications abusives chez nous. Nous ne jurons que par des produits 100 % équitables et accessibles à tous, qui font rimer qualité et efficacité ; pas d’ingrédients nocifs ou superflus, mais des formules précieuses qui séduisent instantanément. Nous concevons nos produits avec passion et espérons sincèrement que vous prenez autant de plaisir à les utiliser.
