Name: Frends Beauty
Description:
Frends Beauty Supply was founded in 1940 by the original owner Sig Frends.  Sig was a pioneer in the cosmetic industry.  He recognized the fact that Hollywood had a high demand for film quality make up, hair, and special FX make up.  Frends’ goal then, as it remains today, is to supply the entertainment industry with a wide range of high quality products, giving make up and hair stylists all the necessary tools to complete any job.  Today, the store is stocked with over 24,000 different products ranging from wig making supplies to special FX make up to skin care and everything in between.  It really is the only true in house “one stop shop” for professional make up artists and hair stylists.  Frends staff is dedicated to making the lives of their customers more convenient.  We go “the extra mile” to make sure that a particular artist/stylist has the exact products they are looking for with ample time before their job.  Our philosophy is: “the customer means everything to our business,” and that is how we go about treating our customers.

Shop with us at www.frendsbeauty.com. Connect with us at www.facebook.com/frendsbeauty and www.twitter.com/frendsbeauty today!

Somos uma empresa flexível capaz de se ajustar às necessidades de cada cliente. 
Cada produto que fazemos é único.
Todos os produtos que saem da nossa empresa fazem parte de nós.

Name: FASTEN Packaging - part of the Innovative Beauty Group
Description:
At FASTEN, packaging is our passion. By combining innovation and creativity with technical finesse and out-of-the-box design, we’re able to create unique packaging concepts. 

We are represented worldwide. We have headquarters in Europe, North America and Asia. Our global production facilities and manufacturing partners make it possible to offer the full spectrum of packaging solutions. 

In a constantly changing industry, we are looking for packaging lovers, entrepreneurial organizers, and the ‘out of the box’ designers, who share our enthusiasm for everything beauty.

FASTEN – Powered by the Innovative Beauty Group

Name: Yoni
Description:
We make organic period products free from plastics, chemicals and shame. Our products are sustainable, ethical and comfortable. It’s our mission to bring people with periods better care. We don't beat around the bush or waste time with taboos. We say it like it is - even when it sucks - because people with periods deserve better.

Love,
Yoni

Name: Canway (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Wipro Canway is a marketing and manufacturing company based in Durban, South Africa. Canway was established in 2001 and has extensive experience and footprint in the personal care market in South Africa. The Canway team has a passion for building sustainable brands.  Consistently keeping the consumer in mind, Canway takes great care to understand the market and consumer mindset.  This ensures that the correct marketing strategies are in place to build strong, well-loved brands that can successfully compete against multinationals in the market place. Innovation and speed to market is at the core of the company’s strength. This flexibility is driven by having broad based capabilities in-house, from concept creation, graphic design and product development, to supply chain and manufacturing at our own accredited production facility.  Canway is conveniently positioned close to the largest shipping terminal in sub-Saharan Africa.

Canway’s flagship brand, Oh So Heavenly, boasts strong customer loyalty evident in being voted by consumers as the Most Loved Brand in Clicks for over 10 years.  This is in addition to other numerous accolades that the brand has been awarded.  With a vast gifting portfolio, Canway offers a range of over 130 gift sets at a variety of price points, each packed with special attention to detail.  Gifting has played a critical role in in the company’s success as receiving an Oh So Heavenly gift has been the entry point into the brand for many customers. 

Canway Cares:
•	Uplifting local communities through employment
•	Providing aid to a local underprivileged school
•	Making a difference in the lives of our consumers
•	Caring for the environment and a focus on sustainability

Name: Blanka
Description:
Blanka helps anyone start a makeup or skincare line in under 5 minutes. Choose from hundreds of high-quality cruelty-free beauty and skincare products to personalize and dropship online.

With zero minimum order quantity, anyone can start their brand with confidence! We also offer dropshipping services so you can focus on marketing and sales.

In our app, you can choose products, order samples, and use our logo visualizer to see your brand come to life in one click.

Name: Bonaiyu Health
Description:
Bonaiyu health is revolutionizing the way health-care and lifestyle products are consumed. Our vision is to make a positive difference in the lives of consumers through the development of a novel, innovative, bio-degradable proprietary delivery platform for health supplements and cosmetic applications. Our technology platform can be extensively utilised for oral delivery of herbal, nutraceutical actives and food supplements. 

Our thin film platform offers higher active loading (up to 400 mg), greater bioavailability, improved taste masking, and reduced calorie content, thereby overcoming several formulation and process limitation of current marketed Oral Dispersible Films (ODF’s). Our trans dermal patches provide quick and comprehensive penetration of the actives through stratum corneum. The base is non-volatile, non-irritant, an emollient, non-staining and washable.

BonAiyu’s proprietary platform is delivered through an environmental friendly continuous and non-solvent based manufacturing process.

“One platform, multiple applications” for oral films, oral care films and trans dermal patches.  

Experience #TheStripTrip with BonAiyu health
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Magic Romania
Description:
Din 2007 ,Magic România a redefinit industria beauty evoluând într-un ecosistem complet cu 22 de locații și linii diverse: Magic Salon, Magic Man, Magic Tattoo și Magic Academy. Magic nu e doar un lanț de saloane , este un hub de inovație și creativitate. 

Magic Hub, un spațiu de peste 1000 mp, aduce la un loc echipele noastre complexe, academii de formare și un lifestyle space gândit pentru evenimente cool și întâlniri creative. Aici se naște viitorul în beauty, unde inovația întâlnește excelența iar profesioniștii își dezvoltă abilitățile.

De la parteneriate B2B cu Magic Oriunde până la noi concepte de beauty și lifestyle, la Magic România experimentăm, creștem și setăm trendurile. Hai să creăm viitorul împreună!

Name: Avenir Ingredients
Description:
Avenir Ingredients was founded in 2013 by Sharon Morse and Paul Castles. Our philosophy has been to offer the highest quality ingredients from ethical and sustainable sources and to be able to service manufacturers and brands with our expertise in our ingredients.

Our team are highly qualified in chemistry and cosmetic science to assist our customers with their ingredient choices. 

Since our inception, our range has expanded and we can now offer a complete spectrum of ingredients that are used in most personal care products. We have actives that are cutting edge and award winners, all with full clinical data to support their claims. We source our ingredients from Suppliers known and trusted around the world for their quality and consistency. We lead the way with concepts and trends that we can share with our brand customers to formulate innovative products.

We have partnered with market leading suppliers whose focus is innovation, sustainability, quality and technical service, which means we are able to offer into the Australian and NZ market a comprehensive range of actives and functional ingredients with a vision to providing exceptional customer service and technical focus.

You can contact Avenir directly on Linkedin, call us or use our online form: https://www.aveniringredients.com.au/contact

We look forward to collaborating with you.

Name: TMC Nordic
Description:
TMC Nordic is a distributor of international fragrance, cosmetics, hair- and skincare brands in the Nordics. 

Our 21 international brands include NUXE, REN CLEAN SKINCARE, Dr. Hauschka, HERMÉS, OPI, Jurlique, The Organic Pharamcy, Embryolisse, CoSTUME NATIONAL, NAILS. INC, PHILIP KINGSLEY, Perricone MD, PARFUMS de MARLY, INITIO, MONTBLANC, Paul Smith, Van Cleef & Arpels, LANVIN, AMOUAGE, HISTOIRES de PARFUMS, THALGO and AHAVA.

As a distributor and partner, we offer strong concepts and strategic business development to our Brand owners and our partners in The Nordics. 

Our ambition is to provide the best service in the business and deliver on our promise to honor the expectations of the consumer and the market today. 

Our headquarter is located in Soeborg, Denmark. Our headquarter houses our training facilities and warehouse. From here, specialised departments work closely with our Sales Managers in Sweden and Norway.

TMC Nordic markets its products in Denmark, Sweden, and Norway. 
Heidi Behrens own TMC Nordic A/S which consists of these subsidiaries: 
TMC Nordic AB in Sweden 
TMC Nordic AS in Norway 

Follow us on Instagram @tmcnordic 
#NordicMarketExpertise 
#EffectiveStrategy 
#ExpertsInBeautyBrands

Name: Cherish
Description: Cherish develops intelligent radar-based sensor platforms that revolutionize health and safety monitoring wherever people live, work, play, or receive care. Our patented spatial computing technology works ambiently (through the air) without changing how people live or work and by prioritizing their privacy. We detect emergencies and risks to people’s health and well-being and bring timely help. We help make wherever people live the safest place on Earth, and we help protect care providers and the people they serve.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratorios Ferrini
Description:
Empresa líder en cosmética que funciona desde 1896.
A más de 100 años del inicio de su actividad hoy continúa con su producto tradicional que la hizo famosa, SAPOLAN FERRINI. Su liderazgo y vigencia en el mercado argentino le ha permitido desarrollar nuevos productos acorde a las necesidades del consumidor. Esto se logra a partir de la superación de la química cosmética, en la honestidad de sus propuestas, de la permanencia de su formulación con una selección de materias primas de primera calidad, siempre controladas, siempre naturales y puras.

Name: nuud | highly effective, totally innocent
Description:
nuud is a 100% natural, vegan deodorant that stays effective for days at a time. Our super effective formula is based on our love of fresh armpits and the body’s natural microbiome. 

We stand for freshness without aluminium, fragrances, parabens, salt, or propellants.

The nuud deodorants keep over 4 million armpits happy in 100+ countries. 

Fresh armpits worldwide

Name: Slate Brands
Description: At Slate Brands, we’re redefining how beauty brands are built. As a modern brand incubator and accelerator, we specialize in identifying white space in high-growth categories blending strategic partnerships and an omnichannel approach to drive scalable, cross-channel growth. Our portfolio is composed of talent-led, white label and in-house brands.

Name: Cosmetics Alliance Canada
Description:
Cosmetics Alliance Canada (formerly the Canadian Cosmetic, Toiletry, and Fragrance Association) is the leading Canadian trade association representing the cosmetics and personal care products industry. Founded in 1928, we represent more than 150 member companies who manufacture, distribute, and supply personal care products marketed in Canada. These products are essential to living better, healthier lives and include everything from soap, shampoo, and toothpaste to moisturizer, lipstick, and sunscreen. As the makers of such a diverse range of products millions of consumers use every day, our members are committed to product safety, quality and innovation.

Cosmetics Alliance Canada acts as the principal voice of the industry with government and media, representing our members on a wide range of issues and interests.

We shape legislation, regulation and policy to enhance the ability of member companies to conduct business effectively in Canada and to promote global competitiveness. We also communicate with media and other groups to mitigate issues and encourage trust and confidence in the industry and in the safety of our products.

Cosmetics Alliance Canada offers members and the public valuable services such as our Beauty Specialist Certification Program which equips beauty advisors with important information on ingredient/product safety and our Export Certificates Program which facilitates international trade for Canadian business.

We also operate Cosmetics Magazine and its associated event-based properties – the Cosmetics Outstanding Service Awards and the Canadian Beauty & Fragrance Awards. These industry-based properties provide Cosmetics Alliance Canada with an effective vehicle to reach beauty professionals and educate consumers.

Name: Leite de Rosas
Description: A Leite de Rosas está no mercado desde 1929, quando sr. Francisco Olympio fazia artesanalmente, com sua esposa, as fórmulas em sua casa. Dos caixotes ainda pegados à mão aos cartazes colados na surdina, a empresa segue cultivando a beleza e saúde brasileira.

Name: Sterling Naturals
Description:
For over 30 years, Sterling Naturals has been a name synonymous with luxury and trust in the world of personal care. With three decades of dedication to crafting high-performance products, we have perfected the art of blending nature’s finest ingredients with cutting-edge science.
Our superior formulations transform everyday routines into indulgent rituals, delivering results that speak for themselves. Whether it’s your skin, hair, or overall well-being, Sterling Naturals is committed to ensuring that every product you use is as effective as it is luxurious. We have been nurturing beauty and confidence for 30 years—and we are just getting started.

Name: Аптека "Подорожник"
Description:
Мережа аптек “Подорожник” – це понад 2000 аптек, які розташовані у малих селах і великих містах України. Ми працюємо на фармацевтичному ринку держави понад 25 років. 

Подорожник забезпечує робочими місцями більше 12 тисяч працівників. Продовжуємо зростати та розвиватися.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Better Not Younger
Description: Better Not Younger is the 1st brand designed to address the needs of hair that's seen a decade (or five) for women who believe beauty is not defined by age.

Name: Revlon Argentina
Description: Revlon Argentina

Name: AGOrganica
Description:
We have an in-house R&D team, and we help clients by formulating new products for their brands. There is the time duration and the cost involved, which depend on the product, ingredients and characteristics. 

We are a leading name in the industry when it comes to manufacturing natural hair care product, skin care product, face care product, baby care product, men grooming product, hygiene product & personal care cosmetic products.

Brands come to us because of our best-in-class manufacturing Infrastructure, skilled workforce, latest equipment & machinery to manufacture natural personal care cosmetic products by following high quality and safety standards.

With a wide range of products and services, A. G. Organica Pvt Ltd. is a leading personal care cosmetics manufacturer that has carved a niche for itself globally. From custom formulations and private label manufacturing services to the production of natural essential oils to cosmetics grade butters, our services span a diverse spectrum. Bring us your requirements and we’ll handle the rest with customized manufacturing and packaging services just the way you need them.

Name: Enhance Skincare
Description:
Welcome to Enhance! Where beauty meets transparency!

Our story began with a mission to revolutionise the beauty industry by providing products that are not only effective but also completely transparent, honest, and safe. We believe that you deserve to know exactly what you're putting on your skin, and we are committed to delivering that knowledge to you.

We source only the best ingredients from around the world to ensure that the products we create are not only effective but also safe, cruelty-free and kind to nature.

At Enhance, we're all about making products that solve your daily concerns. We want to hear from you about what you need, so we can create products that fulfill those needs. Our products are designed with you in mind, to give you the best possible results.

We know that beauty is not just about looking good, but also feeling good, and we want to make sure that every step of your journey is a fun and enjoyable one, and that at the end of a long day you look forward to winding down with Enhance.

We know that the beauty industry can be overwhelming, with so many incorrect claims and advice being made by brands. That's why we're committed to delivering straightforward and honest products that do what they claim to do. We want to empower our customers to make informed decisions about their skincare routine and dispel the misconceptions that are so prevalent in the industry.

At Enhance, we stand for a vision that's more than just marketing gimmicks. We want our customers to choose us because they love what we create and the values that we stand for, and we can't wait to help you Enhance your beauty routine!

Come! Join the journey.

Name: BICOSOME
Description:
#BicosomeConcept

 Bicosome Technology is biomimetic, natural and intelligent.

Learn about the characteristics that make Bicosome the best ally for your skin 


- TECHNOLOGY
Our patented technology is a double encapsulation delivery system entirely made with natural non-GMO lipids that stabilize actives and penetrate the skin.  

- INTELLIGENCE
Our structures interact and respond to the different skin environments in order to target deliver the actives in the right skin layers, where they should work.

- BIOLOGICAL PROCESS
Our patented technology interacts with the skin through an innovative mechanism that imitates the skin’s biological processes. The technology becomes part of the skin after releasing the actives, improving the skin barrier function. 

- EFFECTIVENESS
Our active ingredients are highly efficient as the technology stabilize the actives and releases them directly where they should perform. 

- REDUCTION OF IRRITATION
All our products reinforce the skin matrix, soothing the skin and reducing irritations, being suitable for sensitive skins. 

-NATURALNESS AND SUSTAINABILITY
 Our products come from natural origins and are environmentally friendly. They are also apt for vegans. 

Moreover, BICOSOME has been granted with the #Gold Medal of Ecovadis rating for its sustainability practices! 

Bicosome, where technology understands biology. The driving force of the biomimetic design is always our natural skin biological processes. 

Order your sample
https://www.bicosome.com/find-us/

info@bicosome.com

Name: Barnet Products
Description:
Barnet Products supplies specialty ingredients and selected commodity products to cosmetic, personal care and pharmaceutical companies (consumer products divisions). The company was established in 1987 with a commitment to finding, developing, and presenting new concepts, ingredients and systems to our customers.

The company’s main focus is on conceptual active ingredients tested in vivo or in vitro. These ingredients are presented in the context of Fashion Concepts designed to highlight both the efficacy and the marketing of the ingredient. 

Barnet also offers a line of innovative “System Formers” from Japan. These products demonstrate unique properties that focus on Japanese textures. As with all of our materials, the System Formers provide new marketing opportunities with many having properties supported by in vivo testing.

Name: Ashpveda
Description:
More than just a range of Ayurvedic Wellness and Beauty products based on Prachin Charaka Samhita, Ashpveda is a promise of delivering authentic and ancient ayurvedic formulations for achieving a holistic wellness regimen in the modern-day context. To make the idea a living reality, the highly skilled team of Ayurveda experts put every possible effort to offer an impeccable blend of knowledge and expertise in each product. The core team of Ashpveda boasts a rich exposure to all aspects of Ayurveda and its implications in today's life. With their passion to transfer the learnings to all parts of the world, team Ashpveda strives hard to come up with products that are unique and offer purity with a promise.

We don't use extracts, artificial colors, harmful chemicals, artificial fragrance & paraben in any form. All our products are natural, we use sun-dried herbs from the lands of Uttarakhand, Jammu & Kashmir, Madhya Pradesh, Himachal Pradesh, Rajasthan in India according to their origins. We use only high-quality glass bottles for wellness and Immunity Care products and each bottle goes through a sterilizing process. Our products are not tested on animals. To keep the potency of each formulation intact, Ashpveda boasts an all in-house fully-equipped processing facility. All Ashpveda products contain the finest quality herbs and essential oils across the range.  The Ashpveda philosophy believes in supporting contract farming which led the company to open its manufacturing facility in Rajasthan. Essentially Ashpveda is a way of living where nature nourishes and enriches the elements of human existence.

Name: Glutaweiss
Description:
Glutaweiss is the world's first Swiss Luxury skincare brand that's #PoweredByGlutathione. The journey to radiance was formed over eight years of collaboration with an award-winning Swiss Laboratory, R&D Centres, Biochemists, Scientists, Doctors and Cosmetic Engineers, culminating in products that combine master antioxidant Glutathione with cutting-edge natural ingredients that deliver visible results in lightweight, high-performing Swiss Engineered formulations. 

The Glutaweis Glutathione Radiance Range is a concurrence of science + nature that's clinically tested to deliver visible results in 21 days or less. The Radiance Range enhances cellular metabolism and skin immunity, revolutionising skin inside-out. The Range includes the Glutathione Radiance Cleanser, the Glutathione Radiance Serum and the Glutathione Radiance Cream. This holistic 3-step routine regenerates, reengineers and rejuvenates your skin with 72-hours of hydration, visibly reducing the appearance of pigmentation, dark spots and scars, while increasing skin elasticity, firmness and overall Skin Health + Radiance. 

Safe, light and powerful, our formulations are clinically and dermatologically tested, vegan, free of harmful bleaches, acids, parabens, sulphates. Our products are cruelty-free and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

Name: Santa Clara Manufatura e Cosméticos
Description:
Envio de currículos: recrutamento@santaclara.ind.br

Desde 1987, a Santa Clara ajuda a impulsionar a riqueza da beleza brasileira.
Uma empresa que nasce da convicção de que se cuidar não deveria ser
complicado nem caro. Por isso, criamos e produzimos acessórios que
simplificam a rotina de cuidados pessoais que fazem a diferença na
autoestima, seja no espelho de casa ou no salão, pelas mãos dos
profissionais.
Nossos produtos ganham vida aqui mesmo, no Brasil. Cada item é pensado
para funcionar de verdade no dia a dia da nossa gente. Sabemos que cada
pessoa tem seu estilo, seu corpo, suas preferências,, e nossos produtos
respeitam essa individualidade.
O que nos move é ver todo mundo valorizando seu brilho único com
soluções de qualidade, que cabem na sua rotina e no seu orçamento. Nossa
história nos ensinou que o melhor produto é aquele que se adapta ao seu
jeito, sem complicação.
Acreditamos que a beleza pode ser mais diversa e acessível. Por isso,
seguimos apaixonados por criar novas possibilidades de fazer isso
acontecer todos os dias.
Santa Clara - Sua beleza pode mais com a gente

Name: Toy Box Brands
Description:
Founded by Jerrod Blandino and Jeremy Johnson, the cosmetics industry legends behind Too Faced Cosmetics; Toy Box Brands is their new umbrella company of fabulously disruptive, consciously creative, and glamorously rebellious brands redefining the definition of beauty in all categories. Toy Box launched its first two brands in 2023; Diamond Drunk, a non-toxic, luxury jewelry cleaner and Polite Society, a brand of clean and cruelty free cosmetics. Keep following for updates, opportunities and all the buzz! 
 
“Jeremy and I love building brands with an amazing team, being creative and putting things out into the world that will hopefully make you feel the best versions of yourself. That’s why we are doing it again! We love it and we love you!!” – Jerrod Blandino co-founder Toy Box Brands

Name: Weleda Italia
Description:
Weleda vuol dire comprensione unica e profonda dell'uomo e della natura, in ogni singola manifestazione. I nostri prodotti per la cura della persona racchiudono esperienza, competenza e valori e sono formulati con materie prime provenienti da agricoltura biologia, biodinamica e/o raccolta spontanea certificata. 

Attraverso i nostri prodotti vogliamo promuovere la bellezza, sostenere il benessere dell'intero organismo e farvi riscoprire il profondo legame che c'è tra voi e la Natura.

Name: Rituals Cosmetics Italia (B Corp)
Description:
Rituals è un invito a riscoprire la bellezza dei piccoli momenti che rendono speciale la nostra vita. Ogni giorno ci sono attimi che sfuggono facilmente, ma che, se colti, possono trasformare la quotidianità un’esperienza ricca di significato. Crediamo che la consapevolezza di questi istanti sia la chiave per una vita più equilibrata e armoniosa.

Fondata nel 2000 ad Amsterdam, Rituals è stata la prima a unire il lusso dei prodotti per la casa e il corpo, ispirandosi alle antiche tradizioni orientali per creare rituali che nutrono corpo, mente e spirito. Da allora, il nostro impegno è rimasto quello di trasformare ogni gesto quotidiano in un'esperienza di benessere profondo.

Come marchio certificato B Corp, ci impegniamo a ridurre l’impatto ambientale e a promuovere il benessere sostenibile. Ogni scelta che facciamo è pensata per fare la differenza, dalla cura di sé al rispetto del pianeta.

Scegliere Rituals significa entrare in un mondo che celebra l’equilibrio tra corpo, mente e spirito, dove il lusso non è solo estetica, ma una vera forma di cura e consapevolezza.

Name: Seed to Skin Tuscany
Description:
Seed to Skin Tuscany goes beyond the trend of purely natural skincare, combining the power of nature’s curative properties with the results-driven efficiency of advanced science. 

Five years ago, our founder and naturalist, Jeanette Thottrup, set out on a path to create truly effective skincare with nature at heart. Combining her expertise with the scientific know-how of leading cosmetologist, Dr. Anna Buonocore, she developed a line of products based on a targeted molecular delivery system we call green molecular science. Using cutting-edge technology, we extract the most active ingredients from potent botanicals and then rigorously select the right-sized molecules to penetrate the deepest layers of the skin. Clinically proven to work below the surface, our formulas go exactly where they’re needed to fully regenerate and hydrate the skin from the inside out. 

Our Conscious Beauty promise means we only use ethically sourced organic ingredients grown on our estate in Tuscany, or wild-foraged from land and sea by sustainable micro-farmers. Plus, all of our products are developed, produced and packaged onsite in our Seed to Skin laboratory, guaranteeing unparalleled quality control and traceability. 

The new benchmark in skincare, Seed to Skin works deep down to rejuvenate the skin with visible results: supple, plumped, ultra-moisturised skin that radiates from within.

Name: Kenneth Green Associates
Description:
At Kenneth Green Associates we offer our clients a total package of services to put together the perfect brand strategy. Incorporating sales, distribution, marketing and PR, we can help you create a lasting impact on the UK’s prestige beauty market.

Exception Experience
What sets us apart is how well we understand our brands. We immerse ourselves in your creative vision, culture and way of operating. We really listen to what our brands want within the British market, then use all our exceptional experience of retail, media and sales expertise to deliver – and exceed – those expectations.

Marketing & PR
We offer the full marketing mix from retail strategy and pricing to media planning, public relations and training. But we also understand that each brand is unique, which is why our dedicated specialists work seamlessly with our clients to create bespoke packages that perfectly reflect the brand’s vision.

Sales & Distribution
Distribution of our fragrance brands is through premium beauty retailers including all major department stores, and specialised retail chains where industry experience is essential. And we’re proud of the fact that we employ some 220 beauty advisors directly, meaning our education and training – as well as our understanding of retail trends on the ground – is unrivalled.

Brand Specialist
We pride ourselves on putting a dedicated team of specialists onto each brand to ensure absolute focus and insight in every decision we make.  Our vision encompasses everything from the bigger picture to the finer details – and we use our decades of expertise in the beauty industry to bring your brand’s international strategy to life in the all-important UK market.

Name: WELEDA UK
Description:
How can you be sure that your skin care products are truly as natural and organic as you expect?

At Weleda, we place very high demands on the ingredients in our products and are proudly NATRUE certified, the first internationally recognised quality seal for organic and natural beauty products.

What started in 1921 as a pharmaceutical laboratory, with its own medicinal plant garden, is today a world-leading manufacturer of holistic natural cosmetics as well as pharmaceuticals for anthroposophical therapy.

Since it was established, Weleda has followed aims which sprang from its founding principles. Our products are intended to support people in their personal development, in maintaining, promoting and restoring their health and in their efforts to achieve physical well-being and a balanced lifestyle. This company philosophy determines Weleda's economic approach and will remain the guiding principle for our future.

Today, Weleda is represented in over 50 countries on all five continents. The three main sites are still where Weleda’s history began: in Arlesheim, near Basel in Switzerland; in Schwäbisch Gmünd near Stuttgart in Germany and in the French city of Huningue, Alsace. From these bases – and from our company branches the world over – Weleda produces hundreds of natural cosmetics and thousands of pharmaceuticals, still partly produced from medicinal plants of our own gardens.

Responsible dealings with both nature and people have always formed part of our business, ever since Rudolf Steiner articulated his vision of a company completely at the service of human beings and the world as a whole. Whether it’s through fair trade, biodynamic cultivation or the supportive development of our employees – sustainability is part of our roots.

Name: The Formularx
Description:
The Formularx Dermocosmetics is India’s first expert-led skincare brand dedicated to sensitive and barrier-compromised skin. Founded by scientists, we pioneered the country’s first barrier care range of ceramide-based moisturizers and continue to innovate with clinically backed formulations that combine chemistry, dermatology, and skin pharmacology. Every product is designed to be gentle yet effective — free from unnecessary irritants, powered by evidence-based actives, and trusted by dermatologists. 

At The Formularx, our mission is simple: to bring science, safety, and transparency to everyday skincare, helping people build healthier skin.

Name: Asociación Argentina de Químicos Cosméticos
Description: La Asociación Argentina de Químicos Cosméticos es una entidad civil sin fines de lucro, fundada el 20 de marzo de 1971, con el objeto de promover el adelanto de los conocimientos científicos y tecnológicos relacionados con la investigación y la producción de productos cosméticos.
Location: Ciudad de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: ESSENTIAL PARFUMS
Description:
At Essential Parfums, we grew from a simple approach: giving perfumers carte blanche to create, with no constraints or limits. We partner with the best master and senior perfumers in the world, carefully sourcing the finest sustainable ingredients whenever possible, to be transformed into olfactory masterpieces. The result is a place to buy uniquely luxurious scents at an accessible price — all wrapped in eco-friendly packaging. We created this brand to share a true passion for the art of scent — therefore, our priority will always be the fragrance itself, rather than the trappings that surround it (like fancy bottles, advertising costs, and licensing fees that tend to muddle the essence of perfumery). As for the ingredients themselves, the costliness and complexity of working with naturals makes them a far rarer find in the fragrance world, but we know that they are well worth the effort to produce perfumes that do justice to each note within. Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication, which is why we focus on a precious handful of natural ingredients over a cacophony of synthetics. 
A signature scent should speak for itself.

Name: Capello Point
Description:
Capello Point è la prima catena italiana di prodotti professionali per capelli ed estetica. 
 
Oggi Capello Point conta più di 70 punti vendita Diretti e in Franchising situati nei più importanti centri commerciali e nelle principali città italiane. I negozi Capello Point sono il punto di riferimento per chi cerca prodotti e servizi di alta qualità, grazie ad un assortimento sempre in linea con le ultime tendenze di mercato in grado di soddisfare le richieste più specifiche.
  
Capello Point nasce a Milano, più di 20 anni fa, con una Mission ben chiara: offrire al consumatore finale e ai professionisti del settore strumenti e trattamenti professionali grazie ai quali ottenere direttamente a casa gli stessi risultati ottenuti in salone o nel centro estetico.
 
Capello Point è anche E-Commerce con uno store perfettamente integrato con il gestionale in Store. Tramite Amazon i prodotti Capello Point sono distribuiti anche in Francia, UK, Spagna e Germania.
 
Nel 2021 Capello Point lancia il suo Network di Incaricati alla vendita con un set di prodotti unici in questo specifico canale di vendita. 
La vendita tramite Network sfrutta la piattaforma e-commerce, dando la possibilità di gestire le vendite nel modo più tradizionale dei “Party” face to face o tramite Referral Link.
 
I Consulenti di Bellezza Capello Point, sia Network che in Store,   offrono alla clientela un rapporto unico e personalizzato, fatto di dialogo e ascolto, consiglio e spiegazione per capire e scegliere i prodotti giusti che donino i risultati attesi.
La selezione di professionisti e professioniste attente e appassionate è la base del successo di questa filosofia, assieme alla formazione continua tramite e-learning o sessioni di training.
 
Presenza sul territorio Omnicanale, consulenza, velocità, innovazione e tecnologia sono alla base del successo di Capello Point e il punto di partenza imprescindibile per la crescita ed espansione futura.

Charlotte Bio , c’est l’histoire de plusieurs rencontres, c’est surtout une histoire d’envies, de convictions et d’intuitions.

Aujourd’hui, Stéphane, le président fondateur, dénicheur de tendances, passionné de design, d’art contemporain et d’architecture et Marjorie, son associée, experte en cosmétique depuis plus de 15 ans, amoureuse de la nature et collectionneuse de petits bonheurs s’efforcent chaque jour de repousser les limites pour offrir un éventail de produits sans compromis.

Nous ne laissons rien au hasard : le choix de nos ingrédients, la tolérance et la performance de nos formules, nos packs eco-friendly, le parfum et notre design si singulier que vous aimez tant .

Nous travaillons avec un souci de justesse permanent, et toujours dans une logique de sincérité, de bon sens et de transparence.

Nous créons des produits de soin et de maquillage responsables, bio, 100% naturels et vegan au gré de nos envies, de nos inspirations et, de vos besoins avec toujours la même volonté d’offrir le meilleur au meilleur prix.

Desde hace más de 40 años nuestra misión es la de "Enriquecer la vida de las mujeres" en Argentina. Mary Kay Ash creía firmemente en hacer de su Empresa una compañía que se distinguiera de las demás por sus valores y principios, los cuales son:
1) Espíritu de entrega: Lo que aportas a la vida de otros se regresará a la tuya. Da en forma entusiasta, con buena voluntad  y más allá de lo que se te está dando y te sorprenderás de lo que vas a recibir.
2) Hazme sentir importante: Imaginá a cada persona que conozcas con un letrero que diga "Hazme Sentir Importante", es algo muy sencillo, pero causa un gran impacto.
3) Regla de Oro: Trata a los demás como te gustaría ser tratado.
4) Balance de Prioridades: Reconoce la importancia de vivir una vida con prioridades saludables.

Al caminar por la experiencia de lo que significa trabajar en Mary Kay vas a encontrar un lugar de respeto, de trabajo en equipo, honestidad y amabilidad. Todos somos una parte de la familia Mary Kay!

Name: Great Lengths International
Description:
Great Lengths' birthplace is London, one of the world's greatest fashion centres. David Gold, founder of Great Lengths, had set himself the goal to develop a hair extension system as simple to use as cutting or drying. When in 1991 he had developed and patented the Great Lengths principle he had simultaneously discovered the first method of thickening thin and fine hair in a very simple way.

This invention set off a revolution in 1991. For the first time David Gold could offer hair extensions and hair thickening in one system. Great Lengths has become a sign of our times: men - and particularly women - have started preferring non aggressive technical solutions and natural products.

In this context Great Lengths has also been one step ahead from the start: so far no other system has developed a similarly non compromising technique of attaching additional strands to the customer's own hair. It goes without saying that only 100% natural human hair of the highest quality is used.

It is ,therefore, no wonder that Great Lengths should have established itself on the worldwide market within a few years. Today top hairdressers in Great Britain, Italy, France, Austria, Germany, Scandinavia, Holland, Belgium, Greece, Spain, Portugal, Switzerland, Luxembourg, the U. S. A., Canada, Brazil, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Hong Kong, the United Arab Emirates, South Africa, the Caribbean, Japan, Mexico, Thailand and many more countries are offering Great Lengths with increasing success.

Name: Miyoshi Europe
Description:
We are the first company that created and launched silicone treated cosmetic pigments to the market, which led to the development of the epoch-making two-way cake powders which can be applied to the face by either a wet or dry sponge.

From then, we continuously developed, with our original know-how and technology, various surface treatment processes, such as Amino Acid treatment, Lecithin treatment, and Ester Treatment.

The combination of the said technologies and high-quality fillers (sericite, mica, talc, etc.), which are essential for the cosmetic formulation, or functional powders (ultrafine powders, silica beads, pearl, etc.) enabled us to develop a broad range of unique products and to contribute to the development of innovative cosmetics.

We have four operation sites globally, Miyoshi Kasei, Inc. in Japan, Miyoshi America, Inc. in the United States (Connecticut), Miyoshi Europe SAS in France (Lyon), and Miyoshi Suzhou, CO., LTD. in China (Suzhou), and have been providing high quality products to customers all over the world.

Name: Carbon Theory
Description:
Carbon Theory is the UK's most in-demand medicated skincare brand as featured in the Daily Mail, Evening Standard, Forbes, Women's Health, Nylon, and Glamour Magazine.

At Carbon Theory, we believe in the power of science-backed, high-performance skincare that delivers real results. Born in London in 2018, with handful of ingredients, our founder Phil’s kitchen sink, and a bold vision to reinvent spot-fighting skincare, our brand was created to disrupt the traditional skincare industry with a straightforward mission: to create powerful, clinically proven formulas that keep skin clear, healthy, and balanced—without the premium price tag.

Fast forward a few years, we’ve sold over 1 million products. What started with our now-iconic Charcoal & Tea Tree Cleansing Bar quickly evolved into a full lineup of over 35 products that are dermatologist-approved products across 6 ranges, designed to target breakouts, support skin health, and build confidence.

Our commitment to innovation and authenticity has fuelled rapid growth, taking Carbon Theory from a breakout indie brand to a global skincare powerhouse. Today, we’re stocked in major retailers across the UK, US, Europe, and beyond, making effective skincare accessible to more people than ever.

We cut through the noise with formulations that work, backed by real science, real people, and real results. No over complication. No empty promises. Just skincare that does what it says.

Our lab-formulated products contain premium natural ingredients, are manufactured in the UK, are Vegan Friendly and Cruelty-Free.

Carbon Theory is a member of the RSPO (Roundtable for Sustainable Palm Oil).

São 35 mil m² de área, com capacidade produtiva de até 500 toneladas de produtos de beleza por dia, tendo uma gama de produtos enorme; entre esmaltes, shampoos, condicionadores, hidratantes, colorações e géis.

É trabalhando com esse compromisso e seriedade que a Kanechom consegue todos os dias promover o bem-estar e exaltar a beleza de cada uma de suas clientes.

Name: Bregaglio S.r.l.
Description:
“Bellezza è verità, verità è bellezza”

i versi di Keats ci rappresentano perfettamente e risuonano in noi anche presi alla lettera. In Bregaglio lavoriamo per rendere tutti più belli studiando e trattando al meglio le migliori materie prime disponibili: verità e bellezza, scienza e cosmetica.

Ogni giorno mettiamo la scienza al servizio della cosmetica per migliorare le vite – l’aspetto, il benessere, la serenità – dei nostri clienti. E non solo dei nostri clienti diretti, cioè delle aziende che comprano le materie prime che distribuiamo: il nostro impegno è di lavorare con loro per migliorare le vite dei clienti finali, cioè di tutti noi.

Il nostro ruolo è di selezionare, acquistare e distribuire le migliori materie prime possibili: ci sentiamo un sarto che taglia una stoffa, o, ancora meglio, un personal stylist che sceglie gli ingredienti perfetti per creare le formulazioni migliori. Viviamo nel mondo della bellezza, della moda e del benessere, visto e realizzato dall’interno di un laboratorio. Bellezza e verità, con un occhio al mercato di oggi e un occhio ai trend di domani.

Lavoriamo così da oltre trent’anni, mettendo al servizio dell’industria cosmetica e farmaceutica la nostra sensibilità ed esperienza. Siamo una società parte di 2M Group of Companies

La nostra lunga esperienza ci ha insegnato a stimolare la curiosità dei nostri interlocutori con progetti all’avanguardia, perché vogliamo aiutare i nostri clienti a sperimentare il futuro della bellezza ogni giorno, prima degli altri.

Name: INdermal
Description:
INdermal is a Spanish biotechnology company specializing in advanced encapsulation technology, specifically designed for the cosmetic industry. It is the cosmetic division of Nanovex Biotechnologies and focuses on developing cutting-edge drug delivery systems for skin and hair care. Their innovative products utilize nanovesicles such as liposomes and exosomes to encapsulate active ingredients, enhancing their delivery and effectiveness.

By adapting medical drug delivery systems to cosmetics, INdermal ensures that active ingredients reach specific targets within the skin and hair, such as the deep epidermis or hair follicles, improving product efficiency. This technology also increases the stability and bioavailability of the ingredients, providing high-quality, effective cosmetic formulations. INdermal's systems are designed to be highly stable and compatible with a wide range of cosmetic formulations, including hair care treatments, skin care products, and more.

The company offers custom encapsulation services, allowing brands to tailor delivery systems for specific active ingredients, addressing needs like better penetration, protection from oxidation, and enhanced stability.

	•	e4m D2C Awards 3.0: Awarded Best D2C Gamechanger Brand in Childcare - Silver.
	•	Cosmetics Ingredients Expo: Winner of the Innovation Award in the Finished Products Segment - Silver.

 Our Mission:
To redefine personal care for kids and teens by creating safe, effective, and sustainable solutions that nurture their health and celebrate their individuality. Trusted by thousands of parents across India, we’re committed to transparency, trust, and ethical practices for a healthier tomorrow.

Name: D'ORSAY Parfums
Description:
Born from a heartbeat, the D’ORSAY fragrances were created when in 1830 Alfred d’Orsay crystallised in a perfume his unconventional love story with Lady Marguerite Blessington. In 2015, Amélie Huynh discovered D’ORSAY, as one finds a Sleeping Beauty.
Convinced that great stories are made to last, she decided to give it almost 200 years later a new lease of life.
Lulled by fragrances since childhood, she was touched by the story of Alfred and Marguerite, Amélie continues the story of D’ORSAY and its original love story by exploring the state of love through to carnal desire, speaking of feelings and intimacy.
She is redesigning the olfactory line while respecting the House’s heritage, working with independent noses such as Olivia Giacobetti, Mark Buxton, Karine Chevallier, Bertrand Duchaufour, Fanny Bal, Amélie Bourgeois, Anne-Sophie Behaghel, Vincent Ricord, etc.
Today, D’ORSAY continues to promote French craftsmanship by using local artisans, whether they be glassmakers, waxmakers or jewellers.
Perfumes created by the aesthetes for the aesthetes.

Name: Fast Escova
Description:
A Fast Escova é uma franquia de salões de beleza com atendimentos sem hora marcada e que teve a sua primeira unidade inaugurada em outubro de 2018, em Goiânia. A franquia tem como objetivo oferecer atendimento rápido e descomplicado a mulheres que precisam de agilidade e qualidade. Destaca-se pela proposta ideal para quem vive em uma rotina repleta de compromissos, prioriza o autocuidado e deseja estar bem consigo mesma, sem perder tempo.

Nem todo mundo quer ou pode passar horas no salão. Mas toda mulher merece sair se sentindo pronta para o dia ou para um evento especial. E a Fast Escova é sobre isso: valorizar o tempo da mulher, dar mais independência e liberdade para todas. Sem precisar marcar horário, sem ficar horas aguardando e sem surpresas na hora de pagar a conta. Mas com cabelos escovados, make, tratamentos e unhas feitas em tempo recorde.

Com sua linha de produtos próprios, utilizados pelos profissionais nas unidades desde o início da franquia, no final de 2021 a marca estendeu essa linha para uma marca independente. Agora, além de produtos de uso profissional, também oferece versões que as clientes podem levar para casa, prolongando os cuidados com os cabelos. Os produtos estão disponíveis nas unidades franqueadas e em plataformas de vendas online.

Hoje a Fast Escova conta com 235 unidades comercializadas e mais 80 em implantação, consolidando-se como a maior rede de escovaria da América Latina. Em apenas cinco anos, tornou-se uma das redes de franquias que mais cresceu no Brasil. Com valores focados no tempo e na beleza das mulheres, a Fast Escova também é um projeto que gera empregos, fomenta o empreendedorismo e transforma vidas por meio do franchising.

A Fast Escova é um projeto ousado que alia os melhores produtos, serviços e profissionais especialistas para provar que a beleza pode ser descomplicada, rápida e com preço justo. Porque toda mulher merece ser linda todos os dias, e não só em ocasiões especiais!

Name: FCL Internasional Indonesia
Description: PT FCL Internasional Indonesia, headquartered in Grogol, West Jakarta, is a beauty company behind the brands Focallure, Pinkflash, and Focalskin. Guided by the belief that "Beauty is not luxury,” we are committed to creating affordable, high-quality beauty products that inspire confidence, creativity, and self-expression for everyone.

Name: Athena's srl
Description:
Sviluppo, innovazione, continua ricerca erboristica e oltre 50 anni di esperienza sono le basi della nostra azienda.

Da sempre Athena's crea prodotti che coniugano naturalità, sicurezza, efficacia e qualità certificata nel rispetto dell'ambiente.

L'etica di Athena's:
- Qualità consapevole: siamo ciò che raccontiamo. I nostri prodotti non contengono ingredienti di origine animale, derivati petrolchimici, tensioattivi aggressivi e siliconi. 
- Attenzione e Garanzia verso i nostri consumatori: la promessa di una cosmetica di qualità con un'altissima concentrazione di attivi biologici e naturali in tutte le nostre formulazioni.

Name: Glohe Group
Description:
Glohe presents you with an entirely natural lifestyle that cares for people and nature...

Glohe is a pioneer institution caring for people and nature and combining an entirely natural lifestyle with scientific innovations. Glohe uses unique formulas with its belief in the power of nature, its competent staff, its innovative inventions created in laboratories, and its green production technology.

_______

Doğanın gücünü bilimsel yeniliklerle birleştirerek %100 doğal ürünler üretmek amacıyla kurulan Glohe, flora dostu cilt bakım ürünlerini, kişisel bakım ürünlerini, ev bakım & temizlik ürünlerini ve bebek ürünlerini Tuzla’da yer alan fabrikasında üretiyor.

Glohe, AR-GE çalışmalarını ise üç yıldır BioArge laboratuvarları ile birlikte yapıyor ve kullanılan hammaddelerin doğallığından başlamak üzere tüm üretim süreçlerini testlere tabi tutarak insana ve doğaya özen gösteren ürünlerin geliştirilmesini sağlıyor. Aynı zamanda Glohe, Yeditepe Üniversitesi Eczacılık Fakültesi ve Kozmetik Üretim ve Araştırma Birimi laboratuvarlarında yapılan testlerle de ürünlerini kontrol ediyor.

Name: Simply Nam Beauty
Description:
Launched in 2020, Simply Nam is new & innovative Indian beauty brand that combines the best of science and nature - to create safe, effective and long-lasting products with guaranteed results. The brand is built on a personal journey and over 20 years of experience & insights from the brand's founder, makeup and beauty professional Namrata Soni.
The products are made with the Indian woman, climate and lifestyle in mind. In the words of Namrata herself, your every day routine should not be expensive or complicated - it needs to be practical, affordable, convenient, clean and hygienic. Simply Nam is a collection of effective tools and ingredients - professionally tested with proven results.

Name: Grupo Bio Instinto
Description:
Desde os primórdios da civilização já haviam relatos da utilização de substâncias para finalidade cosmética. No entanto, atualmente, a arte de produzir cosméticos requer muito mais do que a busca pela beleza, requer principalmente a busca pelo bem-estar.

Para atender às expectativas de consumidores cada vez mais exigentes, a Bio Instinto conta com profissionais especializados em todas as suas áreas industriais e administrativas. A empresa investe em tecnologia, tanto para o maquinário fabril, quanto para o controle de qualidade, garantindo assim, um acompanhamento rigoroso e efetivo, antes, durante e após a fabricação.

Cada produto cosmético é desenvolvido após meses de pesquisas, e suas formulações são previamente testadas por profissionais do ramo da beleza, estética, bem como áreas da medicina dermatológica e/ou ginecológica, alcançando sua segurança e eficácia.

Name: Orlane
Description:
Orlane, Paris is responsible for some of the most beautiful skins in the world. Created by a group of biochemists with collaborations with dermatologists and even psychologists, Orlane is the leader in anti-aging skin care promising immediate and long-term results.
Orlane, Paris comes from a deep sense of French tradition and commitment to skin care. For over sixty years, Orlane has been caring for generations of French skin and is known for its elegance, grace and flawless performance. It offers women all over the world a broad spectrum of products to care for every skin type at any age and under any circumstances - biological to environmental.

Name: Eurus Sp. z o.o. - kosmetyczne innowacje z całego świata
Description:
Jesteśmy jednym z wiodących importerów i dystrybutorów kosmetyków na rynku polskim. Wyszukujemy innowacji kosmetycznych na świecie i dostarczamy polskim konsumentom to co najciekawsze w pielęgnacji  twarzy, ciała i włosów.

Specjalizujemy się w dystrybucji kosmetyków koreańskich. Produkty z naszej oferty pochodzą również z Europy (Łotwa, Estonia,  Wielka Brytania, Hiszpania, Niemcy, Grecja, Chorwacja) jak i innych kontynentów (Turcja, Chiny, Kanada, Stany Zjednoczone).

Jesteśmy także właścicielem marek kosmetycznych takich jak: Kimoco Beauty, Neboa, Revoss Professional, Mevelle Professional i Receptury Zielarki.
Z sukcesem wprowadzamy marki na rynek sieciowy, tradycyjny i e-commerce.
W ramach dystrybucji na wyłączność zapewniamy kompleksową obsługę, logistyczną, dystrybucyjną i marketingową, zwiększającą sprzedaż i świadomość marki.

W biznesie cenimy: partnerstwo, jakość, rzetelność, elastyczność i działanie zgodnie z trendami w każdym obszarze.

Name: Emma Lewisham
Description:
Established in 2019 in Auckland, New Zealand, our purpose is grounded in providing natural skincare without compromise and forging a thoughtful future of beauty. Our formulations and business model embody a genuinely revolutionary approach to skincare that unites luxurious, high-performance, and natural products with pioneering progress in sustainability.  

Formulated by industry-leading physiologists and biochemists we formulate fundamentally differently - taking a skin physiology-first, rather than ingredient-led approach. At the forefront of scientific innovation, our formulations represent the next generation of natural skincare. Through uniting cutting-edge natural ingredients, proven to drive change in the skin, with our pioneering formulating philosophy that honours the natural laws of the skin we have discovered a new era of efficacy in skincare, with results uniquely validated by world-leading independent biomedical testing. 

Aligned with the intelligence of nature, all our products are circular-designed and certified Climate Positive, with the intention to be refilled indefinitely. Our complimentary circularity programme, Beauty Circle, welcomes back empty packaging to be refilled or recycled, reducing carbon emissions by up to 74%. In 2021, our progress in sustainability garnered a personal endorsement by ethologist and United Nations Messenger of Peace, Dr. Jane Goodall. 
 
At Emma Lewisham we are known for thinking creatively and unconventionally to pioneer a better way. We seek excellence in all that we do, and we lead with authenticity, honesty, and openness. We treat people and our planet with respect and share kindness as a core value.

Name: Huedlife Pvt Ltd (Puretive)
Description: Huedlife Pvt Ltd is a house for brands with a dedicated mission to craft the upcoming generation of sustainable and environmentally conscious consumer brands within India. In the dynamic landscape of modern business, a new wave of companies is emerging, driven by a commitment to sustainability and a deep understanding of consumer preferences.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: HK Kolmar Canada
Description:
At Kolmar Canada, we make your brand a success by becoming your #1 partner for cosmetic manufacturing solutions. We are proud to be a Canadian manufacturer specializing in all production aspects, from product development to manufacturing, based on global innovative technology and quality control expertise.

We offer brands the option of proceeding with one of our library formulas, an innovative R&D formula or allowing us to use their existing formula and become the manufacturer/filler of their product.

Name: ERYAM

ERYAM est une marque de soins cosmétiques naturels, sensoriels et efficaces 

Nous avons pour ambition de révolutionner le marché cosmétique en Algérie   en devenant la première marque de clean beauty !

Inspirée par les rituels de beauté traditionnels algériens et la clean beauty, ERYAM associe la Science à la naturepour créer des produits sains et respectueux de l’environnement. 

Ensemble, rendons l’univers de la beauté plus clean, respectueux de notre santé, de celles et ceux qui nous entourent et de notre planète !

Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: A Sós
Description:
Sobre a A Sós 

Somos muito mais do que uma empresa de consultoria em produtos sensuais — somos um movimento que acredita no poder do relacionamento, no prazer com responsabilidade e na liberdade de exercer a sexualidade de forma saudável, respeitosa e sem tabus.
Atualmente, somos a maior rede de negócios e distribuição de produtos eróticos da América Latina. Uma empresa brasileira, com o coração em Minas Gerais e os olhos no mundo. 
Todos os nossos produtos são cuidadosamente pensados, desenhados e selecionados para garantir qualidade, proporcionar prazer e promover realização aos nossos clientes, líderes e consultores.

Nosso compromisso vai além de vender: queremos quebrar barreiras sociais, incentivar o autoconhecimento e apoiar uma sociedade mais livre, diversa e sem preconceitos.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/produtosasos/
Site: http://produtosasos.com.br/

Name: Ramsons Perfumes Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Affordable Luxury in Fragrance | Best Perfumes in India Since 1984

Ramsons Perfumes is one of India’s most trusted fragrance brands, offering a wide range of affordable perfumes and long-lasting fragrances for every taste and occasion. Since 1984, we’ve been committed to crafting high-quality scents that blend luxury with value—designed for everyone.

Our portfolio features perfume for men, perfume for women, Eau De Parfum (EDP), attars, deodorants, talcum powders, and air fresheners—each created to deliver an unforgettable sensory experience. We own our manufacturing and packaging units, giving us full control over quality, pricing, and innovation.

Available both offline and across top e-commerce platforms like Amazon, Flipkart, Nykaa, and BigBasket, Ramsons is proud to be counted among the best perfume brands in India.

Whether you’re looking for signature fragrances like “Stud,” “Secret Code,” "Brown Wallet" and “Exotica ,” or curated perfume gift sets, our range is inspired by global trends and tailored to Indian preferences. Every bottle is a statement—made to last and made for all.

Celebrity endorsements from Shikhar Dhawan and honors like “Iconic Perfume Brand of the Year” reinforce our reputation for excellence.

Join millions who trust Ramsons to bring luxury fragrances at budget-friendly prices.

Name: Jive Nutrition
Description:
Redefine how people approach nutrition by making functional products that are as enjoyable as they are effective. 

We believe that fueling your body shouldn’t feel like a compromise, and every product we create reflects that philosophy.

Name: PT Formula Jelita International
Description:
About

What We Offer
We provide full-service solutions from R&D and formulation to packaging and BPOM registration. Our factory is certified by BPOM, Halal, CPKB, and PKRT, ensuring full compliance with local and international standards.

Why Work With Us

Let’s build your brand
Reach out to develop your private label or enhance your existing cosmetic line with a trusted manufacturing partner.

Name: Lady Burd Cosmetics
