A private label manufacturer based in Long Island New York, with showrooms across the U.S., Lady Burd is committed to excellence.  The partnerships we form with our vast array of unique clients are very important to us.  Our goal is to forge a bond that benefits both parties

Name: Shavaz | شاواز
Description: Shavaz is a Cosmetic, Skincare, and Perfume Online Shop. We start it in 2021 and hope to become one of the major players in the industry. We are a fast-paced company with a cool office and great employees. Our motto is that "We are here to make your purchase easier" and we are trying to make this work.

Name: OYO Skincare
Description:
We care for intimate skin—softly, naturally, and without the shame.

At OYO, we create effective, all-natural routines that help women of every shade, shape, and skin type feel smooth, supported, and fully themselves. Our products are easy to use, gentle to the touch, and made to fit effortlessly into your day—so you can focus on thriving, while we handle the rest.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Chardike
Description:
With inspiration from K-beauty, Chardike started its journey in SEOUL initially and later in Bangladesh in May 2019. Chardike brought the success of a proven e-commerce platform in Bangladesh within a year.

Chardike provides a wide range of quality products from premium brands in Korea including Inninsfree, Cosrx, Missha, Some by me, Skinfood etc. We are the exclusive distributor of SKINFOOD from 1st october, 2020.

Chardike provides customers high quality beauty products with exciting beauty shopping experiences. Our commitment to quality and our ‘CUSTOMER FIRST’ policy has helped to become one of the fastest growing e-commerce websites in Bangladesh.
Chardike future business strategies are to continue striving for a perfect customer experience to maintain our competitive edge, to build strategic alliances with premium brands, and to grow and develop our talents to maintain our business success.
Chardike’s mission is to be free of harmful chemicals and improve the skin and enhance our customer’s looks, as well as improve the overall lifestyles of our customers by helping them look beautiful and regain their confidence. And we ensure 100% authentic Korean products to our customers.

Name: PANABEL
Description: Distribuidora especializada en la comercialización de fragancias y cosméticos para Panamá, Colombia y Costa Rica.

Name: Red Apple Cosméticos
Description:
Uma trajetória de sucesso! Estamos há mais de 30 anos no mercado sempre trazendo novidades em nossas linhas de produtos. Tenha a certeza de que para cada parte do corpo haverá um produto Red Apple pensado para a sua saúde, beleza e bem-estar.
A empresa possui uma estrutura física de 5000 metros quadrados com modernas instalações, laboratórios de pesquisa e desenvolvimento, controle de qualidade, tratamento de efluentes, equipamentos de última geração e equipe técnica voltada às boas práticas de fabricação. Preocupamo-nos também com o meio ambiente, controle de processos, controle de qualidade e assuntos regulatórios junto à Agência Nacional de Vigilância Sanitária (ANVISA).
Temos como missão incentivar o comprometimento individual de nossos funcionários, privilegiando o trabalho em equipe, e promover a melhora contínua da qualidade, oferecendo segurança, higiene, bem-estar e economia aos usuários dos nossos produtos, tendo em mente superar as suas expectativas!

Name: Hamsun Supply_PPE
Description:
Hamsun offers high-quality PPE products & workwear solutions suitable for a broad range of hard-working environments. Our priority is ensuring that maximum safety & security is achieved in the workplace. Hamsun is dedicated to offering our valued clientele the highest quality PPE & workwear solutions at the best possible prices. 

We encourage you to engage with us as we are always happy to hear from you & assist with any enquiries regarding your PPE & workwear needs.

Hamsun boasts a broad variety & range of PPE products for you to choose from, ensuring your particular industry needs are fully satisfied. Our expert team of professionals are happy to assist with pairing the ideal product for the specified use, ensuring that you as a customer are SAFE, in any tough working environment.

Name: Grace & Green
Description:
Everyone should have access to safe and sustainable period products - without exception and without compromise.

At Grace & Green, we combine ethical and innovative products with empowering period education, so that all people can navigate life with unwavering confidence and dignity. We show up for every body.

Our Founder, Fran, spent over a decade in the water and sanitation sector. Having witnessed firsthand how conventional period products impact our water systems and the environment, she knew that a solution had to be found.

After three years of research and product development, Grace & Green was launched. Grace & Green products are made from organic bamboo and cotton, making them free from pesticides, dyes, bleaches, and other toxic chemicals. All of our products are certified organic and either reusable or biodegradable. Innovation is taking us even further; we constantly strive for growth and look for new ways to work with what’s available to us, as provided by nature.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sinergi Group
Description: Step into the world of Sinergi Group, a fast-growing company in the beauty and health industry. We are dedicated to constant growth and innovation, ensuring our products not only enhance lives but also promote sustainability. At Sinergi, we strive to create a positive impact on both individuals and the environment by deliver a non chemicals product that embodying our vision of fostering goodness through every endeavor.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: black|Up
Description: Créée à Paris en 1999 par un maquilleur professionnel d’origine africaine, black|Up est la première marque haut de gamme à sublimer les beautés noires et métisses. Elle développe un véritable savoir-faire pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques des peaux foncées et offre des produits alliant qualité professionnelle et plaisir d’utilisation : effet velours, finis mat et poudré, couvrances parfaites, couleurs ultra lumineuses anti teint terne…Grâce à une offre inégalée sur le marché, black|Up s’inscrit comme un acteur incontournable de l’univers du maquillage et séduit autant les femmes noires et métisses que les fans de maquillage à travers le monde !

Name: Enaya Care International Company
Description:
تأسست شركة العناية العالمية للراحة والجمال عام ٢٠٠٦م بموقع واحد و ستة موظفين على يد المؤسس المستشار/ طلال بن محمد بن علي. شركة العناية هي رائدة في مجال الصالون والسبا و تحتوي على أكبر سلسة صوالين و مراكز تجميل بالمملكة العربية السعودية. شركة عناية مكونة من أكثر من علامة تجارية تخدم شرائح مختلفة من المجتمع.

أسرة عناية الرائعة و المكونة من مزيج خبرات سعودية وعربية و عالمية تضم في فريقها أكثر من 500 شريك نجاح يعملون بنفس الرسالة و القيم التي وضعها المؤسس من اليوم الأول. ويقدمون خدماتهم الراقية كفريق و احد لإرضاء العميل في أجواء عالية من العناية والإهتمام و الإحترافية. 

تتميز شركة العناية بإدارة إحترافية مكونة من إدارة تنفيذية مرجعيتها إلى مجلس إداري يتبع إستراتيجية علمية مرتكزة على الأبحاث لوضع خطط تطويرية معاصرة و عملية لكل شركاء النجاح من العملاء، و الموظفين، و الموردين.
ركيزة شركة العناية هي عملاءها ولذلك تحرص شركة العناية على الإختيار بدقة فائقة مختصين ذو كفاءات عالية و شهادات عالمية في مجالاتهم  لتلبية جميع إحتياجات العملاء. شركة العناية حريصة على إستخدام أفضل منتجات و مستحضرات التجميل العالمية و التي تضمن و تحافظ على جودة الخدمات المقدمة.
عناية…. للتألق بداية

Enaya Care Int. Co. was founded 2006 at one location with 6 employees by its founder and president Mr. Talal Mohammed Bin Ali. Enaya Care is pioneering the beauty services sector as the largest chain of Salon and Day spa in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It has different brands that serves differing Segments of society in their beauty and personal grooming needs. 

The amazing Enaya Care family consists of a mixture of Saudi, Arabic, and international expertise of over 500 valued success partners working for the same mission and with the same values that was instituted by its Founder and President on the first day. Enaya team offers its services to satisfy consumer needs in an atmosphere filled with professionalism and care.

Enaya Care Leverages its professional executive management that is led by its experienced board members to create and follow a research-based strategy that guarantees dynamic and consistent development for all of its success partners (Customers – Employees – Suppliers). 

The cornerstone of Enaya care is its customers. Hence, Enaya’s team make the utmost efforts to carefully select its specialists, who are highly skilled and internationally certified each in their domain, to satisfy its customer’s needs. Enaya care is resolved to utilize only the products and tools of highest quality and standards to guarantee and maintain the services provided.

Name: Maison M
Description:
Maison M révolutionne la beauté de demain.

Le premier rouge à lèvres personnalisé grâce à l'IA.
Il offre audacieusement trois nuances dans un écrin.
Vegan, français et rechargeable à l'infini, il réconcilie beauté responsable et beauté libérée.

Name: selfmade
Description:
Here at selfmade we're out to banish the stress cycle, both external and internal. Hand-in-hand with mental health experts, we pair products with behavioral concepts in order to build deeper emotional exploration into your daily routine. Centering healing at the core of our products and addressing how mental health directly affects your skin and body function takes major doses of intentionality and care. That’s why our formulas are vegan, cruelty free and take a hard pass on anything that affects your internal world, like hormone disrupting ingredients. 

Join us as we reimagine self-care for all.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Labonedjma
Description:
La société LABONEDJMA fut créée par Monsieur Abdelhamid GUEMARI, qui dispose de plus de 40 années d’expérience dans le domaine des cosmétiques, et fils du parfumeur EL Hadj Tahar Guemari actif depuis 1963.

LABONEDJMA s’est entouré d’un groupe d’experts spécialisés dans tous les segments du marché du cosmétique, et s’est équipée de machines et d’équipements de pointe.

Aujourd’hui, nous comptons plus de 200 collaborateurs, et plus de 600 produits commercialisés. 

De plus, nous disposons d’une unité de transformation de plastique, essentiellement basée dans le soufflage PEHD, PE, PET injection PP. LABONEDJMA bénéficie d’un apport considérable en terme d’emballages en plastique. Nous restons en quête de perfectionnement et d’amélioration de nos techniques. De ce fait, nous prévoyons un élargissement de nos activités en inaugurant notre site de  8800 m2 situé dans la commune de Larbâa. Ce dernier, regroupera nos diverses unités, ce qui nous permettra d’enrichir l’industrie du cosmétique avec un parc machines des plus modernes.

Name: Dawaa Dost
Description: We are India’s #1 Affordable Healthcare Company !
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Body Restore
Description:
Founded in 2020, Body Restore quickly established itself as the #1 selling shower steamer brand online and on Amazon. Our journey began with a simple yet powerful idea: to inspire moments of mindfulness and rejuvenation in everyday routines. Whether it's a calming shower ritual at the end of a long workday or a moment of quiet reflection after your morning workout, Body Restore is dedicated to enhancing these experiences.

Inspired by bath bombs, our first product—the shower steamer—is infused with essential oils, offering a range of aromatherapy benefits. These steamers come in various scents designed to relax, energize, focus, and relieve decongestion. They dissolve cleanly, transforming an ordinary shower into a spa-like experience. This effortless and accessible self-care routine provides a much-needed daily mental wellness break.

Our mission is to empower self-care and encourage moments of mindfulness in everyday routines. Join us in making every shower a sanctuary for the mind and body.

With over 30 million tablets sold, Body Restore has been featured in BuzzFeed, Byrdie, People, Elle, and more.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: CosIQ
Description: High performance skin care using effective clinical technologies with a focus on clean ingredients, functional actives, and pH levels. Beauty, Cosmetics & Personal Care with integrity.

Name: Haryon
Description:
Em nossos mais de 20 anos de caminhada, sempre nos inspiramos na família brasileira e somos reconhecidos como uma das empresas que mais inovam no segmento de fraldas descartáveis e lenços umedecidos.

Nosso Propósito:
Nosso propósito é levar conforto e qualidade para que os momentos em família sejam como devem ser: leves, tranquilos e sem preocupações.

Nossos Valores:
Somos uma empresa de pessoas para pessoas. Somos determinados e temos coragem de fazer o que precisa ser feito para nos tornarmos melhores a cada dia.

Nossa empresa possuí no portfólio a marca Big Roger, de fraldas descartáveis geriátricas e absorventes, a marca Baby Roger, de fraldas descartáveis infantis, lencinhos e toalhinhas umedecidas, e também, a marca Fraldas Mundo Bita, de fraldas descartáveis infantis licenciada com uma marca de grande sucesso nacional.

Name: kdc/one, Columbus
Description:
The kdc/one Columbus facility is one of the foundational members of the kdc/one network and a significant producer of specialty and personal care products. A critical partner to leading brands, kdc/one Columbus is one of 24 manufactures located in the New Albany Beauty Park and has produced over 1.5 billion units in over 3,000 different SKUs since its opening in 2012.

With its constantly changing portfolio of products, the facility has three state-of-the-art compounding suites: one for surfactant compounding for soaps and body washes, one for alcohol-based compounding for fragrance mists, and finally, one for Eau de Perfume compounding with maceration and OTC sanitizers.

Our capacity includes the ability to batch and fill 1.6 million bottles a day. Our soap and alcohol factory has nine filling lines with the capability of producing 100 to 300 bottles per minute complete with in-line labeling. Our prestige facility has eight filling lines with the capacity of producing 20 to 100 bottles per minute with a large variety of components and in-line labeling and cello wrap.

Highly efficient, with a focus to continuously improve operational excellence, KDC Columbus is a best-in-class partner.
__________________

About kdc/one 

kdc/one is a network of best-in-class custom formulators and manufacturers of color cosmetics, skincare, haircare, bath & body, fragrance, deodorant, home, health, industrial, and auto care products. kdc/one delivers high-touch innovation, operational excellence, and speed to market to well-known and emerging beauty, personal, and specialty companies from coast to coast. kdc/one has its head office in Longueuil, Québec. In addition, kdc/one has 10 operating facilities located throughout North America.  Altogether, the company employs nearly 4,800 talented and dedicated employees in North America.

Name: The Australian Society of Cosmetic Chemists
Description: The Australian Society of Cosmetic Chemists is a professional scientific organisation that promotes the advancement of the theory and practice of the science and technology of cosmetics, toiletries and perfumery. Membership is open to individuals who are working or interested in the cosmetics, toiletries and perfumery industry.

Name: Lovrén
Description:
Lovrén è un brand di Clinicalfarma, giovane e dinamica azienda italiana che lavora al servizio dei consumatori. 
Produce e commercializza prodotti per la cura del corpo e il benessere della persona, cercando di essere sempre al passo coi tempi, innovando e proponendo ai consumatori prodotti sempre all’avanguardia, di altissima qualità al giusto prezzo.

Name: Mesosystem, S. A.
Description:
Mesosystem quickly established itself as a leading marketer of high-tech and cosmetic in the industry of health, beauty and well-being. The success of Mesosystem is due to its dedication in the research and development of new products, combined with a passion to provide  excellent treatments with excellent  results.
The Mesosystem, which owns several international brands including the MCCM, has a long experience in the areas of medical devices and medical cosmetics, beauty and wellness.
Combining technology, entrepreneurship and experience, MCCM creates and develops an innovative and highly competitive range of products and equipment of the highest quality, based on the highest standards of exigency and rigor, ensuring the highest quality

MAKING THE DIFFERENCE

MCCM contributes actively to the visible developments and achievements in the cosmetics and devices market. As a result of the commitment, dynamism and know-how of a large team of professionals, the MCCM is recognized and associated with the concepts of efficiency, innovation, safety and results, reflecting the company’s position.
The ability to create, develop and provide products and equipments of the highest quality as a result of extraordinary competence, experience and flexibility is one of the factos that allow the company to differentiate itself from the rest of themarket.

Name: Yummygums Supplementen
Description:
We enable people to engage with their health in an enjoyable way through our unique vitamin gummies. Find pleasure in your healthy routine and get motivated to take good care of yourself! 

Our goal is to encourage a healthy lifestyle, allowing you to enjoy every step in the right direction. Yummygums offers a new form of supplements with fruity, vegan vitamin gummies that are fun, delicious, and easy. It's a routine you start and, for once, actually maintain.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sage Goddess
Description:
Sage Goddess is the world’s largest e-commerce and e-learning provider of metaphysical tools and teachings. Each week, Sage Goddess reaches over two million people across the globe.

Specializing in gems, minerals, jewelry, infused candles, perfumes, handmade bath salts, and sage bundles, Sage Goddess boasts more than 10,000 products and hundreds of hours of enrichment courses each year to help customers develop a truly holistic spiritual practice.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Exode
Description: Exode est une marque Française de cosmétique bio et zéro déchet. Née à Lyon à la suite d'un challenge, celui d'allié l'efficacité et la nature. Nous sommes les créateurs du premier déodorant bio à l'huile de nigelle.

Name: Kalichem srl
Description: Kalichem SRL is active in the cosmetic sector and specifically in hte production of raw materials used to develop cosmetic products. We specilize mainly in the research, development and production of cosmetic ingredients for cleanising and beauty skin care. Our ingredient are innovative for the sector, particularly they are of vegetal origin and/or have a low impact on the environment, from renewable source, easy and safe to use. They are delicate, dermocompatible and with an organic activity similar to the physiological activity of the skin. The Company has a team of experts on raw materials for cosmetic use with a long-standing experience in the research of original and innovative ingredients for the cosmectic sector. Our research is carried out within the company itself, making use also of the collaboration of university institutes and of the most renowned professionals of the sector.

Name: iwi life
Description:
At award-winning iwi life (“ee-wee life”) brand, we are dedicated to unlocking the nutritional superpowers of algae. For our health. For our planet. We are an experienced team of farmers, scientists and health industry leaders working hard to bring plant-based products to consumers around the world.

Our secret ingredient is algae, which is packed with nutrients like Omega-3s and protein, and uses resources that otherwise would not be utilized – like non-fertile land and salt water – to grow. Most people don’t realize algae is the original source of Omega-3s (fish, krill and humans can't make Omega-3s), the essential fatty acids critical for human health and wellbeing. Our algae requires no fresh water to grow, and is about 300 times more productive than peas in terms of production of essential amino acids. 

Our Omega-3 supplements are available nationwide at Amazon, Whole Foods, Sprouts, Vitamin Shoppe and other fine retailers and are always available at iwilife.com. They are vegan, non-GMO and sustainable. (Clinical studies show humans can absorb 1.7X more Omega-3s from iwi life's patented AlmegaPL than from fish or krill oil.) 
We are also developing new plant-based protein products, such as functional foods, snacks and supplements. Visit our site for more details.

At iwi, we are committed to the rural communities around our Texas and New Mexico farms, creating jobs both directly and indirectly, and leading a movement that we call Social Sustainability. Join the tribe!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: THALION
Description:
Les laboratoires THALION puisent au cœur de la Mer d’Iroise des actifs surpuissants de bien-être et de beauté. Créateur d’actifs marins brevetés, de galéniques innovantes et de soins signatures exclusivement manuels, nous valorisons l’excellence du savoir-faire à la française. Seule marque marine de prescription exclusivement distribuée par des professionnels de la beauté, THALION sublime une beauté saine et naturelle.


THALION laboratories draw from the heart of the Iroise Sea, powerful beauty and well-being active ingredients. As a creator of patented marine active ingredients, innovative textures and signature treatments with only manual techniques, we highlight the excellence of the French know-how. As the only prescripting marine brand, exclusively distributed by beauty professionals, THALION sublimates sound and natural beauty.

Name: Elevai Skincare
Description: Skincare powered by Cell Zero Exosomes. The best in regenerative aesthetics for potent anti-aging results.

Name: INGLOT Cosmetics Canada
Description:
As a brand, we appreciate our customers’ individuality and we offer a wide range of top-quality products to meet a wide range of needs. We are known for our innovative approach to cosmetics and our broadly diverse product offering, including breakthrough products that have revolutionized a modern approach to makeup. We are the pioneers in the concept of personalized makeup palettes known as Freedom System, unique Duraline as well as the famous AMC Eyeliner Gel, one of the most popular eyeliners around the globe.

The needs of our clients are our needs, and we want to create as many opportunities to meet them — virtually and physically — as possible. This is why makeup enthusiasts can find us in 90 countries in more than 950 locations from Oxford Street in London, to Times Square in New York, to The Grand Canal Shoppes in Las Vegas. We continue to develop and expand our sales channels both online and offline.

We work with renowned fashion designers and houses such as Kenzo, Coach and Badgley Mischka. For many years we have collaborated with producers of Broadway musicals in New York, as the makeup partner for productions like Mamma Mia!, Chicago, The Lion King, and Wicked. We teamed up with Jennifer Lopez launching a limited collection of makeup products.

The combination of modern technology with vivid shades is the embodiment of our collection. We offer over 2500 products, with perfect shades for everyone. We do not test any products or components of our products on animals — you’ll find us listed as one of PETA’s cruelty-free brands. About 60% of our range of products are vegan, certified by V-Label, the globally recognized organization.

We also hold The Halal certificate, covering the majority of our product range. 95% of our products are made in specialized and modern laboratories and production facilities located at the headquarters of the company in Przemyśl (Poland, EU).

Name: Lira Clinical
Description:
Our Story
Lira Clinical is a global skincare care company founded by a collective group of aesthetic professionals devoted to perfecting modern skincare. We combine science and nature, along with ancient aesthetic secrets to deliver product perfection. Our advanced formulations and effective combinations make Lira Clinical beautifully unique.
We recognize the importance for products that treat all skin types. Our streamlined skin care systems are specifically designed to brighten and tighten all global skin types in order to restore the skin's health and beauty.
A Beautiful Skincare Partnership
Lira Clinical is developed exclusively for licensed professionals. We offer the next level of skin care with quality products and treatments that produce real results.
Our easy to navigate Guide and Protect System (GPS) allows skin care practitioners to easily create treatment paths guiding their clients to achieve skincare goals.
Pride in our Product
Our products are formulated by an international team of experienced aesthetic, medical and scientific professionals. We use cutting edge and quality ingredients to generate remarkable results. All Lira Clinical research and development, products, and packaging are proudly manufactured in the USA.
Superior Education
Lira's Guide and Protect System (GPS) was exclusively developed by Lira Clinical's education team offering a modern guide to skin classification and treatment. Lira Clinical offers advanced courses on all levels of the GPS system. We pride ourselves on our expert educators and advanced aesthetic courses.

Name: Nikole Kozmetics | Cosmetic Manufacturer
Description: Nikole Kozmatics stands tall as a premier cosmetics manufacturer, crafting an extensive array of products catering to skincare, haircare, baby care, and bath and skincare needs. With a steadfast commitment to quality and safety, their FDA approved and GMP certified formulations ensure peace of mind for every customer. From luxurious skincare essentials to nourishing haircare solutions and gentle baby care products, Nikole Kozmatics elevates self-care routines to new heights. Trustworthy, innovative, and customer-focused, they are the go-to destination for those seeking excellence in beauty and personal care."

Name: Weleda Benelux SE
Description:
Sinds 1921 ontwikkelt WELEDA biologische en 100% natuurlijke verzorgingsproducten en (zelfzorg)geneesmiddelen, die zorgdragen voor jouw gezondheid en schoonheid. 

Na oprichting in Zwitserland ruim 100 jaar geleden, is WELEDA momenteel actief in ca. 55 landen. Duurzaamheid en ethische bedrijfsvoering zit vanaf het begin in ons dna en we zijn trots op onze hoge B Corp score, die we in het jaar van ons 100-jarige jubileum mochten ontvangen. 

We verbinden mens en natuur vanuit onze holistische visie en purpose, waarin we meer teruggeven aan de natuur dan dat we nemen. Daarbij gaan we uit van het gegeven dat processen in ons lichaam grotendeels gelijk zijn aan processen in de natuur. Daarom zetten we de kracht van de natuur in om de zelfregulerende processen van het lichaam en de huid te ondersteunen. 
Onze (h)eerlijke biologische en 100% natuurlijke producten bevatten vanzelfsprekend géén synthetische ingrediënten, zijn eerlijk tot stand gekomen en bestaan uit werkzame, kostbare ingrediënten van de hoogste kwaliteit. Afkomstig uit 50 eigen teeltprojecten en biodynamische tuinen wereldwijd. 

WELEDA. Grow together.

Name: REF Stockholm
Description:
We are an innovative Swedish professional hair care brand aiming to communicate our concept of natural beauty around the world.

Our product offer ranges from 100% vegan care line to high performing styling products and soft & permanent colours. 

REF Stockholm is present in more than 30 countries worldwide, with offices in Sweden and the US.

Name: Nilens Jord
Description: We’re always looking at the bigger perspective by pushing the standards of the beauty industry. We removed fragrance, essential oils and parabens long before most other brands did, and we were the first to partner with Allergy Certified - a third party research lab, which today is widely recognised as the golden standard within allergy certifications.

Name: SHRINE
Description: At SHRINE, we create products that give you the freedom to experiment and express yourself and a community where creativity thrives and individuality is celebrated.

Name: Vyom India Organics
Description: Mother Nature harbours all the remedies to ailments which plague the world.

Name: Alima Pure
Description:
Alima Pure was founded in 2004 by Kate O’Brien in her attic, when the natural beauty landscape was very different. She wasn’t a makeup artist or beauty industry insider. She was a mother and a kindergarten teacher. 

As a woman-owned and run company, empowering and connecting with others has always been at the forefront of what we do.  We believe that your makeup should be able to do many things at once, just like you. Makeup should enhance what you love most about yourself without hiding who you are. 

We are celebrating 10 years of being carbon neutral, by offsetting 100% of our carbon emissions through Carbon Fund. To commemorate our 10 year anniversary, Carbon Fund planted 100 trees.

We are enrolled in a Green Source Renewable Power Program, which derives power from 100% renewable sources including Solar, Wind, Biomass, Hydro, and Geothermal.

We have been a member of 1% for the Planet since our first year in business, donating 1% of our annual gross revenue (sales, not profit) to grassroots environmental organizations dedicated to protecting our planet.

Less mess, minimal waste. Our refillable compacts hold magnetic pans for easy on-the-go application, and can easily be swapped out for a new pan when your product runs out.

We are a proudly certified B Corporation dedicated to raising the bar for corporate responsibility with a commitment to people, profit, and planet.

We make makeup that doesn’t compromise. Our cosmetics are luxurious, high-performance, and made using pure, clean ingredients. We seek to redefine makeup as an empowering tool of self-expression through our diverse range of foundation shades and inspiring colors. Our products are free of parabens, sulfates, phthalates, dimethicone, petroleum, talc, bismuth oxychloride, and nanoparticles. They’re absolutely never tested on animals.

Alima Pure was founded by and is owned by a woman, Kate, run by sixteen women, one man, two babies, and three dogs. For us the past, present, and future are female.

Name: Wander Beauty
Description:
You’re busier than ever and we think your beauty essentials should work as hard as you do. Divya Gugnani, serial entrepreneur and mom of two and Lindsay Ellingson, jet-setting supermodel and mom, spent their days multitasking but their beauty products weren't doing the same. They decided to create Wander Beauty, clean beauty essentials, you reach for every day, wherever you wander. Each multitasker is co-created with our community and enriched with clean, globally sourced ingredients that work with your skin, not against it. 

https://wanderbeauty.com

FOLLOW US ON SOCIAL MEDIA
https://www.instagram.com/wander_beauty/
https://www.facebook.com/wanderbeautybrand/
https://www.youtube.com/user/wanderbeauty

Name: Beauty Warehouse
Description:
Beauty Warehouse was established in 1992 and has successfully expanded to become the leading salon supplies wholesaler to the professional hair and beauty market in Australia. We now service 1000's of customers all over the country including 5-Star day spas, beauty salons, IPL/Laser clinics, nail bars, hairdressing salons, schools, home and mobile salons, make-up artists and waxing/tanning salons.

Whether you’re after salon supplies, leading salon brands, furniture and equipment or expert professional advice, Beauty Warehouse with over 10,000 products is the place to shop. Our experienced team of friendly industry professionals are ready to help you.

Name: Fine Cosmetics S.p.A.
Description:
Fine Cosmetics is a company specializing in Research & Development, Production and Sale of Beauty Products.
Fine Cosmetics began its business in Trenzano (BS) in May 2007. Since the beginning, the company has had a significant growth, establishing itself among the leaders in the field of cosmetics production on behalf of third parties. The factory area, blending plants, packaging lines and laboratories have grown at the same pace, until the current configuration: a modern factory that covers an area of 22,300 square metres, of which 16,600 square metres are covered.

In 2021 was acquired by Fine Foods & Pharmaceuticals NTM S.p.A.
Fine Foods is a Benefit Company listed on Euronext STAR Milan, is an Italian independent Contract Services Development & Manufacturing Organisation (CSDMO).  It develops and manufactures contract products for the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries.
The Cosmetic Customer Portfolio consists of prestigious companies in the cosmetics and pharmaceutical industry, which operate in the large-scale retail trade and specialty channels such as pharmacies and perfumeries, both mono and multi-brand, nationally and internationally.
Holistic Sustainability for us is not just an environmental commitment, but a positive contribution to the well-being of our employees and of the community where we operate.
The main success driver has been a relentless quest for innovation and customer satisfaction, combined with special attention to ethics and human capital.
Fine Cosmetics develops and produces cosmetics on behalf of third parties in the following areas:
•ORAL HYGIENE
•SKIN CARE 
•PERSONAL DEODORANTS 
•BODY CLEANSING
•HAIR TREATMENTS
•PERFUMERY

Name: Moneshka Beauty
Description:
Moneshka started in 2016 with a vision of providing a complete skin-care solution under one roof. We at Moneshka believe that Beauty is about being comfortable in your skin.
We develop a high- quality, natural, innovative cosmetic user-friendly products and we aim to :
A. To take over the leading market position of cosmetic care.
B. To be the most influential natural skincare company in the world.
C. To be a company recognized by the quality of our beauty products.

Name: ANYA COSMETIQUES s.r.l.
Description: We design and create our cosmetics products with the exclusive B2B technology, participating with all our passion and care to the fulfillment of your ideas by balancing creativity, discretion and experience. With an eye always turned on the market, we create our products operating with care and attention to the aspects of guarantee and quality, ready to constantly improve them.

Name: mybacs
Description:
mybacs is a research-driven DTC company specialized in the human microbiome. Our goal is to revolutionize the market around intestinal healthcare and thus make a decisive contribution to the daily well-being of our customers. 

Our team of pharmaceutical scientists and physicians is focused on the development of innovative and highly-dosed synbiotic supplements. These are aligned by our singular formulations from specifically selected probiotic cultures, prebiotics as well as minerals and vitamins tailored to the individual needs of our customers.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Precious Labs
Description:
Precious Cosmetics is a Cosmetics company located in 40 Meta Lane Lodi, New Jersey 07644 United States.
Sami Mikhail, President of Precious Cosmetics is a skilled Chemist and Formulator. His own experience comes from many years of formulating for some of the most prestigious health and beauty manufacturers and distributors including Lancome, Revlon, AM Cosmetics and CMR Cosmetics.

Sami Mikhail started the precious cosmetics company in 1996 to offer new and innovative high end products that could be sold at affordable prices. Mikhail earned a Bachelor’s Degree in Chemistry and Science and pursued advanced coursework in coating technology. He previously worked at Lancome, Pavion and Revlon Companies in Research and Development before starting Precious Cosmetics.

Mikhail’s focus on high end, custom manufactured products at affordable prices is the company’s formula for success along with his team of experienced employees that genuinely care about the customer. The company theme is to achieve “quality without compromise at affordable prices.”
Precious Cosmetic’s staff is committed and dedicated to servicing customers with innovative solutions in various application areas: skin care, hair care, makeup and toiletries.

We understand that the quality of our products is not only a reflection of our company but of yours as well and therefore we strive to maintain the highest quality standards in the industry.

Name: Bluwe Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma indústria capixaba de cosméticos para unhas, criada por uma nail designer que conhecia de perto as necessidades da mesa.

Nos tornamos referência em produtos para alongamentos com naturalidade, graças ao nosso investimento em pesquisas e desenvolvimento de produtos inovadores e de alta performance.

Com o propósito de criar produtos de qualidade, que contribuem para o reconhecimento e a valorização da profissão de nail designer, trabalhamos de forma transparente e empática, na certeza de que a colaboração e o aperfeiçoamento constante são as chaves para os nossos resultados.

Name: LORİS
Description:
Turkey's fastest growing and most preferred Loris activities began in 2006, one of the perfume brands.
The whole production process focusing on perfume and by-products is carried out with the approval of the Ministry of Health.

Name: Dr.Jart+ 닥터자르트
Description: Dr.Jart+ Laboratory composed of 19 dermatologists develops the products that has direct effects on the skin through selecting safe and reliable ingredients. Furthermore, Dr.Jart+ Laboratory’s high technology contribute to recover the skin’s natural health and beauty and its excellent functions are recognized by customers and authoritative institutions.

Name: Beauty on TApp
Description:
We are a 100% woman owned beauty e-tailer based in South Africa. We've created an easy to use platform that retails niche and well known local and international beauty and selfcare brands. We launched our e-commerce platform when we realised there is a demand for an e-tailer thats purely focused on beauty distribution and that can provide an end to end beauty shopping experience. 

We started  off as a find a beauty service app and later evolved to an e-tailer given the demand for such a platform. We have become a preferred platform for beauty brands due our brand ethos, reliability, efficiency, and vast range of products. We have built a community that trusts our brand and that we remain highly engaged with. 

We recently launched a skincare brand, Pastry Skincare, under the Beauty on TApp umbrella that is exclusively available online via Beauty on TApp.  

We are currently only available online and ship nationwide in South Africa, Swaziland and Botswana.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Headbrands
Description:
Headbrands is one of the leading suppliers of hair care products in the Nordics. As the first to redefine how hairdressers shop, our story is rooted in innovation, entrepreneurship, and bold ambition. We are here for the hairdressers, barbers, and stylists we serve.

Our team consists of a dynamic community of hairdressers, creatives, and entrepreneurs who understand the industry from the inside. With around 100 employees, we’re a collective of dreamers, doers, and believers in the power of self-expression.

Headbrands is where global names meet the Nordic know-how. We partner with brands that share our passion for innovation and quality and have over 200 international brands in our portfolio.

We don’t just distribute. We set the rhythm. We raise the bar. We make our partners’ success the headline, every single time.

Join our journey at headbrands.com

Name: Dose & Co
Description:
Dose & Co is a range of premium ingestible beauty blends that harnesses the power of high-dose collagen peptides, and pairs them with vitamins, nutrients and antioxidants that are designed to deliver results through daily ritual.

Founded in 2019 by registered nutritionist and naturopath Libby Matthews in her native New Zealand, our range of premium beauty blends are made mindfully with science-backed ingredients, sustainably sourced collagen, no GMOs, and sustainable packaging. They’re designed with optimal dissolvability and absorption in mind, making them highly bioavailable and a pleasure to enjoy.

In three short years—with over 4 million tubs sold; several industry awards; backing by by doctors, dermatologists and aestheticians; and praise from almost every major media publication (think Vogue, Forbes, WWD, Harper’s BAZAAR and ELLE)—we’ve become a leader in ingestible beauty. Discover the Dose & Co difference for yourself

Name: Bio Infinity
Description: Bio Infinity has been present in the market for the sale of hospital products and accessories for over 10 years, a Brazilian company founded with the motivation of dealing with the challenges of the health area and being able to contribute to the development of the supply chain of medical materials and hospital. We are located in the city of São Paulo where we serve the entire national territory with maximum efficiency, we have strategic partners to carry out the service in any city in the country. We carry out the classification of medical devices and accessories for the areas of cardiology, anesthesia and intensive care, with a wide variety of brands and applications of use for a complete service to our customers. Seeking to be a partner in technological solutions for our customers, we created the hospital equipment leasing sector, leasing Multiparameter Monitors, Monitoring Center, Cardioverters, DEA, Pulmonary Ventilator, Electronic Scalpel, Infusion Pumps and Syringes, Electrocardiographs, Incubators transport and Heated Cradles.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience USA
Description:
You don’t give your all for over seventy years without a good reason… At Expanscience, we are a mission-driven company, and our purpose is to help individuals shape their well-being, from the youngest to the oldest. It’s what inspires our 1,300 employees to move forward, carry out research and innovate, every single day! Independence is our lifeblood. We’re a French company that is 100% family-owned, with products in over 90 countries. Our positive impact on society and the environment has been recognized by the B Corp label, and we commit to being a company that’s better for the world. Better for our employees, too, through the promise we make to develop the potential of each and every one of them! 

Our mission applies first and foremost to our teams. On a day-to-day basis, this means strengthening quality of life at work and professional equality, supporting those in vulnerable situations and promoting the inclusion of the most fragile members of society, proposing an ambitious talent and skills strategy and promoting work-life balance and collective efficacy. This requires ambitious measures that address the major societal challenges facing 21st-century companies. And it is bearing fruit: we are proud to have been certified as a Great Place to Work in 100% of our subsidiaries for the second consecutive year!

Find out more: www.expanscience.com/en-us
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Advanced Skin Technology
Description:
Discover the transformative power of clinically proven, results-driven skincare with Advanced Skin Technology. Since 1994, as your devoted partner, we have provided a carefully curated selection of cutting-edge cosmeceutical products and devices from around the globe, setting your business apart and delivering the ultimate skincare experience your clients desire, while driving strong commercial outcomes.

Driven by an unwavering commitment to excellence, integrity, and expertise, we offer unparalleled support and ethics to elevate your skincare business to new heights. Join us in redefining skincare excellence and unlocking your full potential—one exceptional solution at a time.

Discover how Advanced Skin Technology can elevate your business and boost commercial success—connect with us today.

THE AST MISSION
At the forefront of the skincare industry, we are constantly striving to push the boundaries of innovation by empowering partners to provide groundbreaking solutions that enhance their customers’ lives.

Name: SACHEU
Description: SACHEU is pioneering innovation in the beauty category. We invented the stainless steel Gua Sha and Facial Roller as well as the Lipliner STAY-N. We exist to change the category and positively disrupt the routines of many around the world.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BAKEL
Description:
Founded in 2009 by Dr. Raffaella Gregoris, BAKEL is the Italian brand that has revolutionized anti-ageing skincare with 100% active ingredient formulations and completely free from unnecessary additives. No preservatives, petroleum derivatives, silicones, colorants, or fillers — just science-backed ingredients that deliver visible, transformative results.  
 
Driven by years of cutting-edge scientific research, BAKEL holds 12 international patents and has pioneered proprietary technologies, including the groundbreaking BAKEL 3D-Technology. This patented, advanced delivery system significantly enhances the absorption and penetration of active ingredients — according to clinical tests up to 10 times more than traditional skincare treatments — delivering extraordinary and long-lasting results.
 
Recognized worldwide for its excellence, BAKEL has received prestigious awards including WWD in 2009 and Marie Claire’s Prix d'Excellence de la Beauté, which it won three times — in 2018, 2023, and 2025 — for 'Best High-Tech Cosmetic Innovation'.
 
Rooted in transparency, efficacy, and safety, BAKEL promotes authentic beauty and inspires mindful choices through its powerful “Be(auty) Conscious” campaign. Driven by responsible innovation and sustainability, BAKEL uses recyclable materials and has introduced refillable packaging to minimize environmental impact — proving that beauty and sustainability can go hand in hand.
BAKEL’s mission is to deliver high-performance, clean and safe skincare that respects both your skin and the planet. By seamlessly blending science, nature, and sustainability, BAKEL is the ultimate choice for those who demand uncompromising results and conscious beauty.

Name: Neill Corporation
Description:
Do you love what you do? Does your career satisfy your purpose? 

Neill is built on a foundation of trust and partnership not only for our network but for our family of employees. We are committed to lifelong, growing relationships giving everyone an opportunity to achieve their full potential. 

We are a leading exclusive distributor of AVEDA hair, beauty and skin care products in the beauty industry, specializes in AVEDA product distribution, salon and spa recruitment, salon business consulting, education and technology. Our family of brands, including AVEDA, AVEDA Institutes, Paris Parker AVEDA Salons and Spas, VOMOR, R Session Tools, Salon Biz, and Neill-Technologies, offers dynamic opportunities for individuals to grow into a specialty that ignites you as an individual. 

While embracing AVEDA’s mission of environmental leadership and responsibility, wellness, and lifelong learning, we are your trusted partner, committed to providing the training needed to grow. If you’re successful, we’re successful. If you win, we win!

Name: Sodico Health & Beauty
Description: SO.DI.CO è un’azienda eticamente responsabile ed affidabile che distribuisce cosmetici e prodotti per la cura e la bellezza del corpo e dei capelli. Giovane, fresca e dinamica, SO.DI.CO investe in innovazione e ricerca, orgogliosamente ancorata ai valori aziendali legati all’utilizzo di prodotti provenienti da produzione biologica ed italiani, nel rispetto delle benessere e della salute delle persone e dell’ambiente. I nostri brand Naturaverde, Naturaverde Bio, Vitalcare e Dermasensitive offrono prodotti cosmetici di alta qualità, efficaci e sicuri, rigorosamente testati dal punto di vista ipoallergenico e dermatologico, tear-free, nickel free, senza parabeni, SLS/SLES e profumi allergizzanti. Name: Pharmacie Familia
Description:
L’efficacité et le professionnalisme au service du patient, c’est notre vision du pharmacien de proximité.
Prévention, prise en charge d’une plainte (sous prescription ou en automédication), nos équipes sont de véritables interlocuteurs de confiance.
Soucieux de la santé et du bien-être de nos patients, nous les accompagnons de manière globale et intégrée en associant délivrance de traitement et conseil professionnel avisé.
Notre large offre de soins inclut également des gammes de produits non-soumis à prescription : nutrithérapie, phytothérapie, médecine naturelle, dermo-cosmétique...

Cette démarche étendue à nos 100 pharmacies a des implications fortes :
■ traçabilité des médicaments, respect de la chaine du froid,
■ bons conseils de posologie et d’observance, mais aussi
■ prévention de toute forme de surconsommation.
Nous proposons au sein de notre réseau une offre claire et détaillée, classée par préoccupation de santé.
Pour nos patients, cela se traduit par :
• Un accent sur la proximité et la qualité des services et conseils prodigués.
• L’assurance d’un prix juste sur une large offre de produits
• Une politique d’offre complète et universelle, sans aucune discrimination

Nous sommes également leader wallon dans la délivrance aux institutions. Elles sont déjà plus de 100 à nous faire confiance. Pour chacune, un pharmacien Familia sert de contact de première ligne, de relais privilégié entre les différents intervenants. Toute commande de médicament se fait par lui de manière manuelle ou via une préparation médicale individualisée (PMI). Nous disposons de notre centre équipé des robots les plus fiables d’Europe. Un réel gage de qualité et d’efficacité.
Le groupe dispose également de son propre dépôt médicaments duquel nos
pharmacies sont livrées quotidiennement. C’est plus de 13 000 références négociées et stockées selon les règles strictes de l’AFMPS.

Description:

Name: Elfa Pharm Sp. z o.o. produkcja kosmetyków
Description:
Elfa Pharm Sp. z o.o. jest polskim producentem kosmetyków, łączącym najnowsze trendy kosmetologii z tradycyjnym ziołolecznictwem. Spółka ma swoją siedzibę w Chociwiu (woj. łódzkie). Dzięki takiej lokalizacji może poszczycić się produkcją kosmetyków w czystej strefie ekologicznej. O najwyższej jakości wytwarzanych kosmetyków świadczy również infrastruktura zagospodarowana do produkcji. Elfa Pharm zaadoptowała bowiem na swoje potrzeby przestrzeń, która wcześniej wykorzystywana była do produkcji farmaceutycznej. Elfa Pharm, w odróżnieniu od większości polskich zakładów produkcyjnych, posiada własne studnie głębinowe i wyjątkowy system oczyszczania wody. Woda stosowana w produkcji wszystkich kosmetyków ma tak wysoką jakość, że mogłaby być wykorzystana nawet w farmacji.

Pierwszą częścią działalności Elfa Pharm jest produkcja kosmetyków pod własnymi markami: O’herbal, Green Pharmacy, Vis Plantis, Dr. Sante, Element, Very Berry, Fresh Juice. Drugą natomiast produkcja kontraktowa private label.

Swoim klientom Elfa Pharm oferuje szeroki wachlarz usług związanych z produkcją kosmetyków. Doświadczona kadra, własne laboratorium badawczo-rozwojowe i innowacyjny park maszynowy pozwalają spółce realizować zlecenia kompleksowo lub włączać się w wybrany etap prac. 

Pełen zakres działań realizowanych przez Elfa Pharm znajduje się na stronie internetowej spółki. Przykładowe z nich to:
•	opracowanie od podstaw receptur kosmetyków lub modyfikacja już istniejących,
•	przygotowanie wzorów oraz próbnych serii (warunki odpowiadające normalnej produkcji),
•	sporządzenie dokumentacji produkcyjnej,
•	sporządzenie dokumentacji niezbędnej do certyfikacji kosmetyków,
•	produkcja mas kosmetycznych od 30 kg,
•	napełnianie i zamykanie opakowań jednostkowych,
•	naklejanie etykiet, oznaczanie opakowań numerem partii i datą ważności,
•	pakowanie w kartoniki jednostkowe i opakowania zbiorcze.

Spółka jest częścią międzynarodowego holdingu, zlokalizowanego w Polsce, na Ukrainie i na Słowacji.

Name: SIMPLER Hair Color
Description:
SIMPLER Hair Color was born from the frustration of dying my own hair and beard. This is Snehal, the founder. I got grays early, in my twenties. So, I began casually dying my hair & beard using the box-dye brands found at stores. 

I hated the messy and complicated process of dying my hair and beard at home. It was intimidating and felt like I was conducting a science experiment in my bathroom. And, the dyes burned my skin, which made me worry about the long-term effects the ingredients were having on my body. I tried salons, but they took too much time and money, and in some cases, burned my scalp even worse.

So, having started and sold a few companies before, I did what entrepreneurs do. I decided to create a product that solved my own problem. I traveled the world, from Italy to Germany to Japan to Thailand and more, testing different products and speaking to top hair color chemists, all while searching for a gentler formula with safer ingredients, a thicker dye that didn’t drip, and a single product I could use for my hair, beard, and touch-ups, instead of having to buy 3 separate products. It was also important to me that I create a product I could reuse, with each application feeling as fresh, and being as effective, as the first, in a package that was environmentally responsible, and finally, I wanted to make the entire user experience SIMPLER. 

After much research, I found a team of formulators with years of experience making tried and trusted hair products, and a track record of creating safe, premium dyes, to create exactly what I’d been looking for. As I talked to men who dyed their hair and beard, and those that hadn’t but were curious, I heard many of the same frustrations and realized I wasn’t alone. I really believed and hoped that our product could help other people as well. I teamed up with Mitch, my cofounder, and fellow hair & beard dyer, to build a brand and team committed to treating customers the way we want to be treated.

Name: Jouviance
Description:

Pour en savoir plus et acheter sur www.jouviance.com.

 Rejoignez le mouvement d’une protection solaire plus clean & performante !

 Suivez-nous sur Instagram & Facebook pour nos conseils solaires !

Besoin d’un conseil ? D’un partenariat ? Écrivez-nous en MP !

Name: EISENBERG Paris
Description:
L’alliance de la science, des sens et de l’élégance.

–

The alliance of science, sensoriality and elegance.

Born from the vision of José Eisenberg, and now joined by his son Edmond, CEO of the Brand, EISENBERG places research, performance and beauty at the heart of its approach.

Driven by passion and high standards, we create unique experiences for all women and men.

Hi we're Baebeau

Name: Cosmetics and Cleaning Products Industry Association (KTSD)
Description:
Cosmetics and Cleaning Products Industries Association (KTSD) has started out in 2010 with the merger of Soap and Detergent Industries Association (SDSD) established in 1989 and Cosmetics and Toiletry Preparations Manufacturers Association (KTMD) established in 1993, with the vision of becoming the common voice of home and personal care industry on legal, scientific, and social platforms.

KTSD assures the unification and wide representation of the importing and manufacturing  companies in the sectors of cleaning and personal care products. The primary goal of the Association is to support the development of the sectors it represents by closely monitoring both local and global developments. 

KTSD has accepted among its foremost responsibilities to bring to life projects on cleaning and personal care which will be beneficial for the country and society as well as to ensure the positioning of Turkey as a country with European standards in these sectors. The joint "Touch Water and Soap" campaign of the Association with the Ministry of Health in 2010 is one of the most current examples of the social responsibility perspective. 

The short-term goals of the KTSD include 'establishing an infrastructure as a source of market data and technical data for the cleaning and personal care products sectors'. KTSD plans to schedule informative meetings, trainings, seminars for the related sector representatives in its role as the strongest public stakeholder of the sectors it represents in scope of the European Union harmonization policies.

Name: Opal Cosmetics Group
Description:
Established in 1994, Opal Cosmetics Group Co., Ltd. has evolved into a leading international cosmetics development company. We offer a comprehensive suite of R&D, Design and Manufacturing services from concept to delivery.

Our extensive intellectual property portfolio includes 133 patents, and our formulation library boasts 20,000 unique recipes. With over 10 partner factories across Asia, America, and Europe, coupled with our two wholly-owned manufacturing plants in Mainland China, we provide a global footprint for production excellence.

We are committed to fostering long-term partnerships based on trust, collaboration, and mutual success. Our dedication to customer satisfaction is unwavering, driving us to deliver exceptional services and support at every stage of the cosmetics development process.

Então, em 2005 o Dr. Marcos Gonçalves e Dra. Sheila Gonçalves se viram motivados a transformar frascos em tonéis e estava criada a Indústria de Dermocosméticos,, com o objetivo de fazer mais pessoas realizarem seus desejos legítimos de ter uma pele saudável e linda. Name: MG Evolution Factory of Cosmetics and Medical Devices
Description:
MG Evolution  – Your European Partner in Innovative Cosmetics & Medical Devices
 MG Evolution is your leading European partner specializing in innovative cosmetic products and medical devices. We offer comprehensive end-to-end development and production of personal care products, including skincare, haircare, and professional healthcare formulations. Our services include white-label and private-label manufacturing, scalable production, and full regulatory compliance, ensuring that every product meets the highest global standards. Certified under ISO 22716, ISO 13485, and ISO 14001, we guarantee top-tier quality, safety, and consistency at every step.

Name: Applechem - part of Solabia Group
Description:
Applechem is an ISO 9001:2015 certified cosmetic ingredient supplier with a diverse range of functional products for cosmetics, personal care, suncare, hair care and homecare formulations.

We understand that cosmetic formulators are extremely busy people, and they need product solutions that are broadly effective, reliable, and user-friendly. 

We believe sample requests should be treated generously. 

We believe that when it's time to scale up from lab experiments to large batch productions, a consistently stable product is a formulator's (and cosmetic engineer's) best friend. 

Most importantly, we believe in pushing the envelope in technological innovation, so that we're constantly expanding the range of options for cosmetic formulators all around the world.  Let's work together to Create Possibilities.

Name: Laboratori Del mediterraneo
Description:
Laboratori del Mediterraneo è un’azienda dì integratori alimentari e cosmetici che nasce nel cuore del Cilento, in un ambiente lontano da ritmi frenetici, con una flora di inestimabile valore per la ricerca.

I prodotti di Laboratori del Mediterraneo, elaborati con materie prime tipiche della macchia mediterranea e della gariga, confezionati in packaging ecologici, nascono seguendo questa filosofia: il consiglio qualificato del professionista della salute corrobora il rapporto unico e speciale con il proprio assistito, che trae beneficio dalla competenza tecnica delle figure sanitarie e di un prodotto che sfrutta i benefici della natura.

Il farmacista è, tra i nostri interlocutori principali, una delle figure che ha la vocazione di tutelare la salute e il benessere della persona, intesi come condizione “fisica, psichica e sociale e non semplice assenza di malattia”, con tutti gli strumenti scientifici, culturali e sociali a sua disposizione.

È la ricerca scientifica (per cui rimandiamo all’area Pubblicazioni) la principale fonte di ispirazione dei nostri prodotti, nonché l’attenzione per la ricchezza del territorio in cui nasce l’azienda: il Cilento e la sua flora.

Name: Cosmacon GmbH
Description:
Cosmacon GmbH entwickelt innovative und hochwertige Kosmetik- und Naturkosmetikprodukte, sowie Tierpflegeprodukte. Wir entwickeln gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden unique Rezepturen, die immer in den Besitz unserer Kunden übergehen.

Ein Alleinstellungsmerkmal ist, dass unsere Kunden bei uns eine Fast Track Fee buchen können und dann versuchen wir die Produktentwicklung innerhalb von 3 Monaten abzuschließen, so dass dann produziert werden kann.

Zu unserem Leistungsspektrum gehört auch die Zulassung nach der aktuellen Kosmetikverordnung und der Zertifizierung von Kriterien wie Vegan, Clean Beauty, Mikroplastik-frei, Tierwohl nach eigenen wissenschaftlich-fundierten Kriterien. 

Natürlich begleiten wir auch die Zertifizierung nach alle bekannten Naturkosmetikstandards an.

Cosmacon kann die Herstellung von Kleinstchargen beginnend mit 5 Kg bis Großchargen bis zu 10 t organisieren. Wir können in praktische alle Packmittelarten abfüllen lassen und unsere Stärke ist die Bgleitung von Start-up Gründern. 

Natürlich verlangen wir keine Vorkasse und sind stets ein erfahrener Partner an Ihrer Seite.

Fragen Sie noch Heute bei uns an!

Description: Selamat datang di PT Masumi Beauty Indonesia, mitra maklon kosmetik terpercaya untuk menghadirkan produk kecantikan unggulan Anda. Name: Annique Rooibos
Description:
In 1968 Dr Annique Theron stumbled across the natural healing powers of the South African herb, Rooibos, when she warmed Lorinda, her allergic baby’s bottle with warm Rooibos tea. For the first time since birth, Lorinda slept through the night and her allergic reactions to even mother’s milk calmed down.

 Despite facing many challenges as a women trying to prove her findings, she set out with a vision to create life-changing opportunities for all.

 This vision has grown into a globally respected health and beauty brand boasting:

 Over 7000 active Consultants
 250+ premium quality products
 Exports to 18 countries
 Numerous local and international awards
 Uses of the best quality Rooibos extract in Annique products
 50+ years of credibility

The Rooibos Connection
What makes Annique’s products unique is that they contain Rooibos extract, which has been a trusted and scientifically proven remedy over the past few decades. Rooibos has many healing properties, including that it is;

1. Anti-allergic
2. Anti-spasmodic
3. Anti-bacterial
4. Anti-ageing
5. Anti-viral
6. Anti-carcinogenic
7. Antioxidant

Name: BIOEFFECT
Description:
BIOEFFECT was founded by three Icelandic scientists following their scientific innovation of using plant-biotechnology to produce a replica of human growth factors in barley. The barley plant is the host for our growth factor production. Among these is EGF (Epidermal Growth Factor), one of the most important skin growth factors and BIOEFFECT’s signature ingredient. EGF plays a vital role in the production of collagen, elastin, and hyaluronic acid to maintain skin’s healthy and dense appearance. 

As we age, the production and effectiveness of skin growth factors decline. Once we reach our twenties the natural production of growth factors has already started to decrease and during menopause, the depletion has become significant. This decrease results in slower cell turnover and repair, eventually affecting our skin's appearance – skin starts to sag, and fine lines and wrinkles appear. 

Our science team at BIOEFFECT is composed of pioneers in biotechnology-powered skincare and specialists in developing and formulating skincare with growth factors as key ingredients. Through research and innovation, they have developed highly effective, science-driven formulas for age-defying skincare.

From serums to sheet masks, our products have won accolades in various categories, solidifying our position as one of the best anti-aging skincare brands in the market.

Name: Symbiome
Description:
The modern skin microbiome has lost ~80% of its microbial diversity. Symbiome is pioneering microbiome science into skin health via unique, bioactive compounds proven to restore skin’s natural resilience, longevity and beauty.

Drawing on a collective 80+ years of experience in microbial science, our expertly formulated Postbiomic collection of potent and precious Amazonian botanicals delivers long-lasting results to all skin types – restoring an undeniably radiant foundation.

Name: Neva Kozmetik
Description:
1991 yılında kurulan Neva Kozmetik, Türkiye kozmetik pazarına başarılı bir giriş yapmış ve kısa sürede tüketicinin güvenini kazanmayı başarmıştır. 1994 yılında Türkiye'nin ilk yerli saç boyası NEVACOLOR pazara sunulmuştur. 750 metrekare üretim ve depolama alanıyla yola çıkan Neva Kozmetik, 2012 yılı itibariyle Çerkezköy'de 15.000 metrekare kapalı alan üzerinde kurulan üretim tesisi ve 10.000 metrekare depolama alanı bulunan modern, çevreye duyarlı ve özel arıtma ünitesine sahip yeni binasıyla hizmete devam etmektedir.
Neva Kozmetik; kozmetik ürün imalatı, dolum, depolama, satış ve pazarlama aşamalarında ISO 9001:2008 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Standartlarına, ISO 22716:2007 İyi Üretim Uygulamaları Standardına ve ISO 14001:2004 Çevre Yönetim Sistemi Standardına uygunluğunu uluslararası firmaların denetiminde belgelendirmiştir. 
Markalarımız: NEVACOLOR, EXICOLOR, NATURAL COLORS, PREMIUM, BOTANIC, ORGANICS, NEVABLOND, NEVAMEN, NEVAFORM, NEVA STYLING, NEVADEPİL

Name: Beautigloo
Description:
Co-fondée par deux jeunes entrepreneurs, Clara Lizier et Florian Ménard, Beautigloo est une start-up spécialisée dans le secteur de l'électro-beauté (www.beautigloo.com). 

Beautigloo a pour ambition de préserver la beauté, à travers une gamme de produits innovants permettant d’optimiser l’efficacité des cosmétiques.

Sa première innovation est un Coffret Beauté Réfrigéré spécifiquement conçu les cosmétiques. Sa technologie brevetée combinée à une efficacité thermique prouvée font de lui le meilleur environnement de stockage pour les cosmétiques.

Soutenue par les écosystèmes du luxe et de la beauté, Beautigloo fait partie du prestigieux accélérateur de LVMH à Station F.


 Co-founded by two young entrepreneurs, Clara Lizier and Florian Ménard, Beautigloo is a French start-up specialized in electro-beauty (www.beautigloo.com). 

Beautigloo aims to preserve beauty through a range of innovative products increasing the effectiveness of cosmetics.

Its first innovation is a Refrigerated Beauty Box specifically designed for cosmetics. Its patented technology combined with proven thermal efficiency, Beautigloo is the best environment for cosmetic products.

Supported by both luxury and beauty ecosystems, Beautigloo is part of the prestigious LVMH accelerator at Station F.

Name: YSE Beauty
Description: YSE Beauty (pronounced "wise") is a line of perfectly edited, irresistibly luxe skincare products for brighter, more even skin. Founded by supermodel, actress, and host of America's #1 beauty podcast, Lipstick on the Rim, Molly Sims.

Name: COSMETEK
Description:
Quem somos?

Uma empresa especializada da prestação de serviços de excelência à Indústria Cosmética, numa abordagem integrada.
Desde a idealização do produto, I&D, produção, testes, avaliação de segurança e seleção do melhor tipo de embalagem, estaremos sempre ao seu lado em todas as etapas das suas criações.

Somos também o parceiro ideal para o controlo dos produtos que já produz atualmente, nomeadamente na libertação de lote com os resultados da análise microbiológica.

Vigiamos atentamente a evolução da legislação aplicável a esta atividade, bem como as propostas de alteração da mesma de modo a antecipar as alterações futuras às suas formulações e evitar constrangimentos.

Contamos com uma equipa qualificada e multifacetada capaz se adaptar a cada situação, de forma a proporcionar produtos cosméticos e de higiene corporal de alta qualidade, seguros, eficazes e sempre em conformidade com o Regulamento Europeu da Cosmética, RE 1223/2009.

Name: Prohall Oficial

Name: AOKlabs
Description:
Somos una compañía joven e innovadora, cuya meta es ayudar a mejorar la calidad de vida de quienes nos rodean, gracias a productos naturales, testados dermatológicamente para pieles sensibles y con enormes beneficios.

Somos vida, un eslabón entre continentes, una conexión entre producción artesanal y quienes necesitan cuidados en la piel. Queremos revolucionar Europa, el mundo con nuestra cosmética natural africana de última generación.

Apostamos por fórmulas innovadoras; por productos sinceros, auténticos, naturales. 

Estamos comprometidos con el cuidado al medio ambiente y la sostenibilidad; con la protección de las técnicas artesanales de producción; y con el control de la calidad para garantizar que nuestros principios activos no pierden sus cualidades naturales. 

Luchamos por el empoderamiento de las mujeres, sobre todo de África, el verdadero motor de este continente, cuyo futuro es prometedor. Promovemos una relación comercial justa entre la cooperativa que elabora nuestros principios activos y el consumidor; salarios dignos y equitativos, y formación para las mujeres que trabajan en ellas; y el acceso igualitario de ellas al mercado laboral.

AOKlabs África tiene su origen en África Ouro Karité (Oro Africano), nuestro producto estrella, que nos ha llevado a más de 3000 farmacias españolas y a poder lanzar nuestras siguientes línea de productos, Pure Life, Eternal Summer, Etc

La historia de nuestra empresa está muy ligada a la de sus fundadores, Katia Simone y Fran Morales. Al nacer su hijo observaron los extraordinarios resultados de aplicar Oro Africano en la piel de su bebé y tuvieron una revelación: este producto 100% natural era un completo desconocido en Europa, a pesar de sus enormes propiedades. 

Poco tiempo después, conocieron la labor de Nakunga y Kanvili, las cooperativas que recolectan y producen en Ghana nuestros activos y decidieron lanzarse al mercado ofreciendo cosmética natural africana de última generación.

Name: Grupo Modena e Silva
Description:
Fundada em novembro de 2014 pelos visionários empresários Natanael Modena e Flavio da Silva, a empresa iniciou sua jornada com a inauguração da primeira unidade em Cacoal, Rondônia. Com muito esforço e dedicação, a empresa expandiu-se rapidamente, adquirindo uma segunda farmácia em Vilhena e inaugurando uma terceira unidade em Ji-Paraná.

Reconhecendo o potencial de crescimento no estado, em outubro de 2016, a empresa inaugurou sua primeira unidade em Porto Velho. Até 2018, com diversas unidades já em operação em Rondônia, a empresa investiu na construção do seu primeiro Centro de Distribuição (CD), um passo crucial para otimizar a logística. Esta expansão direta na logística permitiu a redução de rupturas no estoque e facilitou a compra de produtos das maiores indústrias farmacêuticas do país.

Atualmente, a empresa conta com dois CDs em Rondônia, totalizando mais de 10 mil metros quadrados de espaço de armazenamento. Com 61 unidades distribuídas nas principais cidades do estado, a empresa continua firme em seu plano de expansão, sempre com o compromisso de oferecer excelência em seus serviços e produtos. Além disso, a empresa possui 13 lojas no Amazonas e 29 no Pará, ampliando sua presença na região Norte do Brasil.

O Grupo Modena & Silva é integrante da Farmarcas, a maior associação de farmácias do Brasil, que conta com mais de 1.500 lojas ativas. Este vínculo fortalece ainda mais a presença e o impacto da empresa no mercado farmacêutico nacional.

Missão:
Satisfazer as necessidades dos clientes com excelência e agilidade no atendimento, oferecendo produtos de qualidade a preços justos.

Visão:
Ser a maior rede de farmácias do Norte do Brasil até 2030, por meio de uma gestão profissional e inovadora, com foco na saúde, beleza e bem-estar das pessoas, e tornando-se referência em atendimento.

Valores:
Conduzir o negócio de forma ética, visando a lucratividade e estabelecendo com a equipe uma relação justa e mutuamente comprometida.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Description:
Atelier Rebul is a brand that represents a 125-year-old pharmaceutical heritage. It always combines the most natural raw materials with the most sophisticated scientific formulas developed over generations in our own laboratories.

Atelier Rebul has a history with the enterprising Jean Cesar Reboul. In 1895, he started Atelier Rebul in Istanbul and quickly gained a reputation for quality skincare and perfumes. All products are formulated from the best that nature has to offer, paired with years of pharmacy knowledge. 

'Quality and Trust is the Most Significant Legacy of the Rebul Family'

We believe there is an essential connection between nature and pharmacology. As a brand that specializes in pharmacology, we know a lot about herbal extracts. Also, we believe that the answer to most health problems can be found in nature. With our roots in pharmacy, we know which plant works best for the problem we are trying to solve. 

We take the traditional mortar and pestle knowledge and methods that are an indispensable part of pharmacy. We use these to create safe and healthy formulas. We create formulas with very natural ingredients. We follow the philosophy of 100% trust & 100% transparency. Since 1895, we have over 1,500,000 formulas. In our collections we use our traditional knowledge of herbal content and methods that we have been creating for over 125 years.
Explore our collections at www.atelierrebul.be. Feel free to contact us for questions around job openings or franchise opportunities.

Name: Talika
Description:
Talika est une marque de soin cosmétique française créée en 1948 spécialisé dans la pousse des cils, des sourcils et le contour des yeux. 

TALIKA, UNE VISION UNIQUE DE LA BEAUTÉ

« Chez TALIKA, chaque produit est un être vivant qui a une date de naissance, une raison d’être et un destin. Née d’une histoire d’amour entre un chercheur et les mystères de la Nature qu’il explore et cherche à décrypter, chaque création est l’aboutissement d’une innovation.

Depuis 1948, TALIKA puise ainsi dans les trésors du Monde Vivant pour élaborer des soins toujours novateurs, afin de permettre à chaque femme de faire rayonner sa beauté naturelle à chaque étape de sa vie. »

Alexis de Brosses, Président et Créateur

PLUS QU’UNE HISTOIRE, UN DESTIN

Tout commence pendant la Seconde Guerre Mondiale. Face aux pénuries qui frappent l’industrie pharmaceutique, Danielle Roches, infirmière au service ophtalmologique des Hôpitaux de Paris, formule un baume à base de plantes réparatrices pour soigner les blessés brûlés aux yeux. Elle remarque alors un effet secondaire époustouflant : au-delà̀ de cicatriser les brûlures de ses patients, sa crème à base de plantes stimule la pousse de leurs cils et de leurs sourcils de façon spectaculaire.

Cette merveilleuse découverte, Danielle Roches se devait de la partager avec les femmes. En 1948, elle commercialise le 1er soin pour la pousse des cils de Talika, la crème de la pousse des cils. C’est le début de la destinée de TALIKA.

EXPLORER, DÉCOUVRIR, TRANSMETTRE

TALIKA s’est affranchie des frontières de la cosmétique traditionnelle pour adopter un processus créatif unique via des transferts de technologie ainsi qu'un transfert de vie, d’énergie vitale jusqu’aux cellules. En créant de nouveaux gestes de beauté allant au-delà de la cosmétique classique.

Name: Madame la Présidente
Description:

Madame la Présidente, c'est la volonté de remettre au cœur des préoccupations des femmes d’aujourd’hui, le soin qu’elle mérite en développant des routines capillaires simples d'utilisation dans le respect de l'environnement.
Madame la Présidente, c'est une prise de parole envers la société. Les femmes ont le droit de se sentir belles et représentées, quel que soit leur texture de cheveux, leur morphologie, la couleur de leur peau. Au-delà de l’esthétique, les cheveux représentent notre identité, notre culture, celle transmise par nos aînés. En prendre soin et les chérir est signe d’acceptation et d’amour de soi.

10 nouveaux revendeurs chaque mois

Name: Grupo Femina
Description:
Fundado em 1981, o Grupo Femina nasceu em Florianópolis/SC e, desde então, constrói uma trajetória sólida ao lado de uma das maiores e mais admiradas marcas de beleza do Brasil: O Boticário. O que começou como uma loja de presentes se transformou, ao longo dos anos, em um grupo de referência no varejo de beleza em Santa Catarina.

Hoje, estamos presentes nas regiões da Grande Florianópolis, Joinville, Rio do Sul e Balneário Camboriú, com 42 locais de atendimento.

Nossa atuação vai além das lojas: somos parceiros de milhares de revendedores e também marcamos presença no e-commerce, oferecendo um portfólio completo de perfumes, maquiagens e cuidados pessoais que traduzem beleza, inovação e autoestima.

Em 2024/2025, conquistamos o IAF Diamante, a premiação máxima entre as franqueadas O Boticário, reconhecimento que reforça nosso compromisso com a excelência, a sustentabilidade e a experiência do cliente.

Nossa Essência

No Grupo Femina, acreditamos que beleza é conexão. Trabalhamos para encantar clientes, desenvolver pessoas e gerar impacto positivo na sociedade. Nossos valores são a base de cada decisão:

. Valorização das pessoas e das relações humanas
. Ética e transparência em todas as ações
. Sustentabilidade como compromisso
. Atitude de excelência e busca constante pelo crescimento

Somos um grupo movido por pessoas. Por isso, valorizamos a diversidade, o desenvolvimento e o protagonismo de nossos colaboradores – afinal, são eles que constroem, todos os dias, a história de sucesso do Grupo Femina.

Nossa Missão: Encantar e proporcionar experiências positivas na vida das pessoas.

Nossa Visão: Ser um grupo empresarial perene, rentável e sustentável na gestão de multinegócios.
