We are Hintz Cosmetics, a cosmetics company that has been operating in the market since 2006. Our products are focused on facial beauty and skincare.

Our newest makeup line, Expressão Facial Makeup, features products with impeccable colors, textures, and nuances. It's a highly personality-driven line created to appeal to all audiences.

Acting innovatively, the Intensive Skin Care line comes with revolutionary formulas to take care of your skin, leaving it cleaner and with a natural glow.

And of course, our Expressão Facial line, with a special focus on eyebrows – considered the frame of the eyes – aims to enhance one of the most attention-catching areas of the face, giving you a new expression through a special touch.

Today, Hintz Cosmetics operates in all 26 Brazilian states as well as the Federal District. Description:
d’you was born out of a hope to dismantle the chemophobia that has deeply penetrated the beauty industry. We have a science first approach that is not only the foundation of our brand, but is amplified in our formulations. Name: La Corvette - Soapmakers in Marseille since 1894
Description:
Since 1894, the Savonnerie du Midi has been proudly and passionately perpetuating the heritage of genuine Marseille soap, an emblem of Provençal culture and a symbol of artisanal excellence. Thanks to ancestral know-how handed down from generation to generation, this historic soap factory continues to make this exceptional product using traditional methods, scrupulously respecting the cauldron saponification process, which guarantees unrivalled quality.

In the heart of Marseille, in one of the last remaining workshops, a new generation of master soap-makers works daily to preserve and enrich this living heritage. Their expertise and commitment enable them not only to perpetuate a centuries-old tradition, but also to innovate in response to contemporary demands for naturalness and eco-responsibility.

Created by the Savonnerie du Midi, LA CORVETTE embodies this heritage of excellence. A 100% Marseille-based brand, it offers a complete range of body care and household cleaning products, designed with authenticity, quality and sustainability in mind. Its emblematic Marseille soap, made exclusively from vegetable oils, without colouring agents, preservatives or superfluous additives, is certified by the Ecocert label, guaranteeing a composition that respects the skin and the environment.

Through its products, LA CORVETTE perpetuates a tradition while taking a responsible approach to innovation. Whether it's for daily hygiene, caring for sensitive skin or ecological home maintenance, its natural, effective formulations meet the expectations of a demanding public, concerned with well-being and responsible consumption.

Choosing LA CORVETTE means opting for authenticity, excellence and respect for Marseille's know-how, while adopting a more sustainable and responsible approach to everyday life.

Name: Flora & Curl
Description:
Flora & Curl is a plant-powered haircare range with a mission to simplify the textured haircare routine.

We believe that taking care of textured haircare should be simple, effective and enjoyable.

Compared to the norm, our products are free from synthetic fragrances. We take a wellness approach to haircare, with formulations that are scented purely by plants.

How it started: Flora & Curl was launched in 2017 by Rose Ovensehi, after her experience with extremely brittle and dry hair. 
After a long break from using chemical relaxers to straighten her hair, she began mixing in her kitchen using pure and raw botanical ingredients, from oils to butters and botanical waters with the goal of keeping her routine quick and simple. 

While developing the formulae, she realised that she didn’t want to create a range that would that would require too many steps to achieve her desired results. 
The functionality of our core collections, ‘Style Me’, ‘Hydrate Me’, 'Strengthen Me', ‘Soothe Me’ and ‘Protect Me’ makes it easier for customers to understand the function and purpose of each product within their routine. Our line of products are ideal for those looking to start their natural hair routine, or those who are experienced and looking to streamline their current hair routine.

Through a minimalist approach, Flora & Curl’s line of products turns haircare into selfcare, by making taking care of textured hair (curls, coils and wave) simpler.

Founded in 1945 and headquartered in Milan, Italy, Framesi products are marketed and sold in over 70 countries worldwide.

Additionally, Framcolor Eclectic is the next generation of  demi-permanent cream hair color with cutting edge Encapsulation Technology

Framesi products have always been professional-only, sold exclusively to licensed hairdressers. Believing that the hairdresser should always have the authority to recommend the best products for the client, Framesi never sells its products to retail chains or discount beauty outlets. Diversion of Framesi products is almost non-existant.

Veoli Botanica 

When creating our products, we focus on the Clean Beauty philosophy. It is an uncompromising trend of natural cosmetics that focuses exclusively on vegan ingredients, responsible production, safety, and reliable effect. 

Veoli Botanica cosmetics were created in order to meet all the skincare needs of an active woman of the 21st century. Our goal is to secure the skin as well as possible against external factors, rebuild its protective barrier, and restore the skin's balance in order to preserve its vitality and young look. made of highest quality pharmaceutical glass.

inside bottles of evo that are bursting with personality, you'll find luxurious products that are sulphate, paraben, dea, tea and propylene glycol free; products that give professional results while respecting the environment.

Our purpose and inspiration is to do what is fundamentally right for our customers and helping them achieve true and honest #skingoals. And the truth is that we are all born beautiful. Name: LifeStyle Aesthetics Group
Description:
Welcome to Life Style
Lifestyle Aesthetics is a Dubai based company, incorporated in 2011 as a leading supplier and distributor of state-of-the-art products in the field of aesthetic medicine, plastic surgery, dermatology, cosmetology and lasers. We believe that “age is just a number”. We have always kept our enthusiasm and drive to achieve more, this is driven by our leadership team and the multi tasking reactivity in terms of selling, marketing and providing training for professionals.
 
Mission
Our mission is to be the pioneers in our region in terms of bringing safe and effective anti ageing and aesthetic solutions with long term satisfactory results for plastic surgeons, dermatologists, laser technicians and cosmetic therapists to meet every customer’s particular expectations.

Name: Batallure Beauty
Description:
Batallure Beauty specializes in brand strategy, product and package development, sourcing and manufacturing in the fragrance, color cosmetics, hair care, skin care, body care and men’s grooming categories. We offer custom development for various levels of complexity and innovation, each executed with the highest quality standards. Our mission is to employ our knowledge, skill and unparalleled access to envision and evolve your brand into a successful beauty business.

In 2006, Robin Burns-McNeill and Sam Ghusson co-founded Batallure Beauty.The name was inspired by the French word “bataleur,” an acrobat who demonstrates balance and flexibility on a tight wire. Today, Batallure Beauty embodies those same traits. By leveraging the founders’ combined experience in creating the world’s most recognized and highly successful beauty brands, Batallure Beauty brings exceptional strength to every project, whether it’s a licensing agreement, joint venture, strategic alliance or private label business structure.

Firstly, we have been developing creative brand concepts for almost 70 years. Secondly, we produce body care products for the private labels of drugstores, discount stores and food retailers. Name: Industrias Lavin de México
Description:
Somos una empresa 100% mexicana dedicada y comprometida con el desarrollo, la fabricación y la comercialización de productos de belleza, cuidado personal y del hogar, de la más alta calidad, al mejor precio del mercado. Hace más de 30 años, ingeniero Luis Martínez Lavin y García Lascurain, identificó una oportunidad y necesidad muy importante dentro del mercado de belleza y cuidado personal en México.

Él se dio cuenta que, en ese momento, la oferta de productos que tenían las marcas de la competencia estaban diseñadas pensando casi exclusivamente en un mercado con alto y medio poder adquisitivo, dejando poco atendido y con opciones muy limitadas a los consumidores dentro de los niveles socioeconómicos medio bajo y bajo. Fue así como tomó el reto y la decisión de convertirse en emprendedor, fundar Industrias Lavin de México y así poder proveer productos con excelente calidad, fórmulas avanzadas, tecnología, ingredientes en tendencia y empaques innovadores, al mejor precio mercado.

En Lavin, buscamos impactar positivamente la vida de las personas. Queremos ayudarte a cuidar de tu bebé, hacerte sentir bella todos los días, brindarte confianza en tus diferentes aventuras o ayudarte a cuidar de ti y de tus seres queridos. Todo esto al alcance de tu economía. Nuestras marcas y productos cuentan con presencia nacional e internacional, logrando su distribución en las principales cadenas de supermercados, farmacias y autoservicios de México, Estados Unidos y Latino América. Asimismo, somos líderes en la fabricación de productos de maquila, manufacturando productos de belleza e higiene personal para grandes cadenas de autoservicio en México y Estados Unidos.

Name: COAL Clean Beauty
Description: COAL Clean Beauty is a skincare and haircare brand. Our products are manufactured on European clean beauty standards. Name: Odacité Skincare
Description:
WHO WE ARE
Leading a revolution in the world of high-end natural skincare, Odacité sparks a new conversation about beauty, proving that you can have it all: complete performance and absolute purity.

Born in Paris and raised in LA, Odacité marries the best of two worlds: luxurious French skincare and green California living.

WHAT WE DO
Our endeavor is to produce the most effective products without a drop of synthetic chemicals.

We scout the world to source the highest quality ingredients, precious plant extracts, magical oils and efficacious cosmeceuticals.

Ultimate potency, absolute freshness and complete purity are our criteria of selection, ensuring that each formula instantly improves the way your skin looks and feels.

OUR STORY: FROM FIGHTING CANCER TO FIGHTING WRINKLES
It all started after French-born Odacité Founder Valérie Grandury was diagnosed with breast cancer. It was a wakeup call that she couldn’t ignore: she needed to make her health and wellbeing a top priority.

She embarked on a healing journey, setting out to completely remove toxins from her life. When it came to skincare, she wasn’t willing to sacrifice the performance and luxury she got from her French skincare.

So, she began mixing her own skincare potions - formulated with the purest, most powerful botanicals in the world. And Odacité was born.

Odacité is a french play on “audacity” - a reminder of Valérie’s bold decision to challenge the norms of the beauty industry and set out to do something revolutionary.

To quote Valérie, "You only have... One Life, One Skin. Make It Beautiful.“

Name: Myriam•K Paris

Myriam•K Paris is a worldwide beauty empire and brainchild of Myriam Keramane, CEO and aesthetics entrepreneur, celebrity hair colorist and digital influencer. 

Founded in the competitive and standard-setting world of French haircare, Myriam•K Paris now features 300+ products in hair care and beauty, all built on state-of-the-art ingredients and innovation in aesthetics. The brand is headquartered in Paris, France, where its product lines are the centerpiece of consultation and treatment at Myriam's Showroom on Champs-Élysées. 

With decades of industry experience and a strong understanding of hair clientele worldwide, Myriam•K Paris strives to deliver 360-degree solutions for both women and men. Name: FLORENCE COSMÉTICOS
Description:
É considerada uma marca exclusiva, voltada ao mercado premium, que se consolida através da união do clássico e do moderno, do requinte e do glamour.

O próprio nome FLORENCE nos remete a um cenário majestoso, requintado e belo da cidade de Florença, na região da Toscana, na Itália. Esta cidade com sua bela Catedral, pontes, palácios e campos nos traz a lembrança da cultura medieval Renascentista.

Possui em suas linhas uma grande variedade de produtos e fragrâncias que encantam e atraem os mais apurados sentidos do ser humano. Inicialmente contava com apenas Sabonetes de Luxo, atualmente já possui mais de 180 itens como Loções Hidratantes, Sais de Banho, Perfumes, Sabonetes Líquidos, Sabonetes Savon Creme, Sabonete Super Luxo e outros muitos mais.

Querendo expandir mais, com o foco em seus consumidores, a REALGEM'S DO BRASIL INDÚSTRIAS DE COSMÉTICOS LTDA, decidiu então unificar suas duas empresas, a PRINCESS COSMÉTICOS (Perfumaria) e FLORENCE COSMÉTICOS - Um Banho de Luxo (Corpo & Banho), em uma só.
Nascendo então, a FLORENCE COSMÉTICOS - Realçando sua Beleza, Para representar o expressivo posicionamento da marca junto ao mercado, bem como traduzir os avanços estéticos e tecnológicos da sua linha de produtos, foi renovado sua identidade visual.

Name: Mahina
Description:
Mahina was born with care - for the body, the planet, and every woman who bleeds.
Founded by Natasha Jamal in 2020, we set out to reimagine period care through reusable, leak-proof underwear that feels simple, safe and high performance.
Made in India by a team that’s led by women, Mahina is a blend of apparel science and empathetic design, made to restore comfort and dignity for every woman’s cycle.
And this is only the beginning. If our vision speaks to you, join us! Let’s shape the future of menstrual care, together.

Name: Dr Pierre Ricaud
Description: Créée en 1986, la marque de cosmétique Dr Pierre Ricaud excelle dans la création de soins à très haute efficacité dans le domaine de l'anti-âge. Elaborées dans nos laboratoires, fabriquées sans intermédiaire dans nos usines en Bretagne, nos formules sont issues d'une science respectueuse de la peau, alliant ingrédients naturels et technologiques. Nous offrons une cosmétique transparente sur laquelle nous voulons tout dire : le contenu des formules, le choix des ingrédients, les méthodes de fabrication et les coulisses de la marque. Nous distribuons nos produits et services en direct sur le digital, par mailing ou dans notre propre réseau de magasins en France . Passionnées, exigeantes, authentiques, les femmes nous inspirent pour inventer ensemble la cosmétique de demain. Nous avons conçue pour elles la Communauté Beauté, une plateforme d’échanges et de co-création.La marque Dr Pierre Ricaud fait partie du Groupe Rocher, un groupe familial français d’origine bretonne présent dans 115 pays et qui rassemble plus de 18 000 collaborateurs et 50 millions de clientes dans le monde. Le Groupe Rocher a adopté le statut d’Entreprise à Mission avec l’ambition de reconnecter les femmes et les hommes à la nature.

Name: VB Cosmetics, Inc.
Description:
VB Cosmetics is a manufacturing company engaged in the creation and sale of cosmetics and personal care products. It has successfully transitioned from its beginnings as a private label manufacturer of its inventions to building its own global brands of clean, nature- and science-based, functional and proprietary beauty products. 

Its transformational product called Dazzle Dry, a quick-dry nail polish system, is living up to these attributes, earning awards and accolades and revolutionizing the nail industry, creating a class of its own in this crowded market filled with brands vying for a fraction of this market offering products that are essentially the same. Dazzle Dry uses a new set of materials different from other brands. Our well-equipped analytical laboratory allows us to test every drum of raw materials before they are released for use in production.

Women are validating our claims of five minute dry time, longevity of wear (7 to 14 days) which rivals that of gels and easy removal using regular polish remover without damage to their natural nails. In fact, our customers report that their nails have grown healthier and stronger by switching exclusively to Dazzle Dry.

Name: Chemist Warehouse New Zealand
Description:
Over the last 6 years Chemist Warehouse has grown from a single Pharmacy in Auckland to becoming one of Aotearoa's most trusted Community Pharmacy Groups. Today, the group has over 50 Pharmacies across the Country and continues to grow to meet demand. We are proudly NZ Owned & Operated and pride ourselves in our commitment and dedication to making healthcare more accessible than ever before. Our mission is to break down all barriers to medication and healthcare access so that our communities can live happier and healthier lives. 

The key to our success is our people! Our organisation is underpinned by a passionate group of Pharmacists who share the same vision and are the pillar to our company’s success. Pharmacists at Chemist Warehouse offer a comprehensive range of clinical services and practice at the top of their scope with the aim of seeing their patients healthy and happy again!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Cosmo Group (NEONAIL, NEONAIL EXPERT, NEO MAKE UP, StayLAC)
Description:
O NAS

Kosmetyki Cosmo Group wyróżnia wysoka jakość, nowoczesność oraz innowacyjne rozwiązania. Wychodzimy naprzeciw potrzebom współczesnych kobiet, inspirujemy i tworzymy trendy.

•	NEONAIL to międzynarodowa marka kosmetyczna, która oferuje ponad 4500 produktów, w tym ponad 400 kolorów lakierów oraz akcesoria do stylizacji i pielęgnacji paznokci. Naszą misją jest inspirowanie kobiet każdego dnia oraz pokazywanie nowych rozwiązań i pomysłów na stylizacje paznokci. •	NEO MAKE UP to marka kosmetyków kolorowych. Łącząc moc profesjonalnych produktów do makijażu z siłą naturalnych składników pielęgnacyjnych, pomagamy podkreślić naturalne piękno. 
StayLAC -  oferuje kompletne wsparcie w manicure i pedicure. Nasze produkty są stworzone z myślą o wygodzie i estetyce, aby każda kobieta mogła cieszyć się profesjonalnym efektem manicure w zaciszu własnego domu. Stawiamy na jakość i prostotę
KOGO SZUKAMY
Czy cechuje Cię ambicja, masz w sobie niezmierzone pokłady energii i głowę pełną pomysłów? Nasz zespół składa się z ludzi, dla których branża beauty to nie tylko praca, ale i pasja! Szukamy dynamicznych i pomysłowych osób, które nie boją się nowych wyzwań. www.kariera.cosmogroup.pl

Name: MAMAAURA DERMO COSMETICS GmbH
Description:
Mamaaura | Clean Beauty Backed by Science – For the Whole Family

Mamaaura is a clean beauty brand dedicated to creating safe, minimalist, and clinically grounded personal care products for every member of the family — from baby care to hair and body wellness.

Founded with a clear purpose in 2020 and brought to life through rigorous R&D by 2023, Mamaaura combines scientific credibility with emotional intelligence — addressing real-life needs with ethical, high-performance solutions.

Our formulations feature edible-safe ingredients, are supported by clinical insights, and avoid unnecessary additives. Today, our product portfolio spans baby care, postpartum recovery, hair care, and functional skincare for sensitive adults.

Mamaaura is currently present through exclusive partnerships in a diverse mix of markets — from growth-oriented regions like Uzbekistan, Ghana, Romania, Iraq, and Mauritius, to high-demand strategic territories such as Turkey, Russia, and China.

What sets Mamaaura apart?

Clinical-grade simplicity – no fluff, no trends, just functional formulas that work
A whole-family mindset – rooted in trust, care, and everyday wellness
Selective partnerships – we grow with long-term local allies, not just resellers
Support beyond product – marketing, regulatory, and training tools at your side
We believe that skincare is not just topical — it’s emotional, relational, and cultural.
Let’s redefine clean beauty together.

 Interested in distributing Mamaaura? Get in touch to explore partnership opportunities.

RESPEITO: Porque todas as nossas ações impactam os colaboradores e os clientes internos e externos.

In 2003 Faberlic entered international market, and now it has representations in 24 countries all over the world. More than 700 000 Representatives cooperate with Faberlic in Europe and Asia. Near 5 000 000 consumers enjoy Faberlic products every day!

Name: INUKA Fragrances
Description:
INUKA Fragrances meaning “surrounded by smell”, was established in June 2010. 

We manufacture high-quality perfume and beauty products in Bellville, Cape Town. 

INUKA started with the Vision to provide a Rewarding and Financially Sustainable Business Opportunity for people from all walks of life with easy and affordable start-up options. We offer a business where you can supplement your income with retail profit or build a serious career with Monthly Volume Rebates, Quarterly & Annual Rewards, Hotel & Travel Rewards and Earn a Car registered in your own name, becoming your personal property for life #DreamIt,EarnIt,OwnIt. 

We make it possible for our Members to earn a guaranteed income even if you only rely on personal sales efforts and never introduce fellow business entrepreneurs. 

Our mission is to create an environment where our entrepreneurs will feel at home, valued, and part of our INUKA Family whilst experiencing the fulfillment to build a consistent, reliable, and growing income. 

INUKA has a dedicated Helpdesk and Call Centre with experienced consultants. We will assist, support and encourage you in every step toward building your sustainable business. Our measurement of accomplishment is based on the success stories of our business entrepreneurs. We celebrate our Members by hosting Quarterly Rewards Events, where we recognize their steps to success. #TheJourneyIsTheReward.

Today, the INUKA Brand is recognized in 11 African Countries: South Africa, Namibia, Lesotho, Botswana, Zimbabwe, Mozambique, Zambia, Swaziland, the DRC, Angola, and Malawi. Sharing The Products & Business Opportunity We Love.

Description:
فروشگاه آنلاین محصولات آرایشی، بهداشتی و مراقبتی لیدی

Name: Lipson Cosméticos
Description:
Quem somos:
A Lipson atua no mercado de fabricação de cosméticos para terceiros há mais de 30 anos. Tem como foco o desenvolvimento de produtos de alta qualidade, utilizando tecnologia avançada e matérias-primas selecionadas para atender às
necessidades e expectativas dos seus clientes. Possui uma equipe de profissionais altamente capacitados em pesquisa e desenvolvimento de novos produtos, garantindo a constante inovação e atualização do portfólio de cosméticos.

Missão:
A missão da Lipson é mais do que fabricar cosméticos; é sobre criar uma experiência que inspire confiança e alta qualidade, influenciando positivamente o setor de cosméticos. Ao fazer isso, a Lipson busca deixar um legado duradouro de beleza, qualidade e inovação.

Visão:
Através de nossa dedicação à qualidade, inovação e parcerias sólidas, visamos definir um novo padrão de excelência e contribuir para o avanço contínuo da indústria de cosméticos, destacando-nos pelo compromisso com a alta qualidade e inovação. Nosso objetivo é não apenas ser uma opção entre muitas, mas sim liderar o setor, definindo padrões e elevando a experiência de beleza e cuidados pessoais para um novo patamar.

Name: Cozmetica.pk
Description: CozCom is the parent company of Cozmetica.pk - a beauty concept store for 100% original and authentic Beauty, Health, and Wellness product range.

Name: Hårklinikken
Description:
Founded in 1992 by Lars Skjøth, Hårklinikken is a Danish hair and scalp health clinic.

Present across the world, our clinics are dedicated spaces that provide the tools, knowledge and support to enable clients to achieve long-lasting hair gain. Spaces where each client is individually recognised, and their hair and scalp goals are uniquely treated. 

The Hårklinikken Method was born in our clinics, driven by Skjøth’s mission to empower as many people as possible to gain hair. It combines customised scalp care with in-person consultations to deliver a client-informed and dynamic regimen that maximises results. 

Our award-winning Hair Gain Extract is formulated using a client’s unique thinning pattern, scalp environment and lifestyle, creating a 100% custom-blend treatment for their condition. 

Hailed as ‘the personal trainer for your hair’, it is the first of its kind to deliver a treatment informed by science and the client in equal measure, helping more than 100,000 people worldwide to find a solution.

All Hårklinikken products are 100% scalp-safe, follicle-friendly, vegetarian, cruelty-free, silicone-free and paraben-free.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Fushi
Description:
At Fushi, we believe true wellbeing begins with intention – in what we create, how we source, and how we live. 

Since 2008, we’ve been on a mindful journey to improve wellbeing and inspire healthier, happier lives. Guided by Ayurveda and a deep respect for nature, we craft health and beauty products that blend ancient wisdom with modern living. 
Each drop of our Fresh-Pressed oils and every hand-blended formula is made in our London workshop – using ethically sourced, organically grown ingredients from communities we proudly support. 

Every decision we make is done intentionally. That’s why we produce in small batches to preserve freshness, ensure traceability, and reduce waste — all while using recyclable packaging and cruelty-free practices. 
We’re honoured to be named among the Planet 100 (2025). Being recognised as one of the UK’s most loved sustainable companies reflects our dedication to creating balance between people, planet, and purpose. 
 
Over the years, we have grown from a wellness brand into a community built on kindness, integrity, humility, and commitment.  

Join us in redefining wellbeing, one conscious choice at a time.

Name: Charava
Description: Charava is a UK-established brand with the goal of supporting individuals around the world in their pursuit of longevity and well-being, by providing them with a comprehensive range of pure and premium longevity supplements.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beauty Solutions Trading
Description:
Beauty Solutions brings internationally recognised brands to the Middle East, helping to establish the region as the number one haven for the most luxurious beauty establishments in the world.

Beauty Solutions is a company with a multinational team of experts that have worked in the Middle East and has relevant experience both here and abroad.

Beauty Solutions bases itself out of the commercial and cosmopolitan hub of Dubai and has affiliates in other countries to ensure on the ground and consistent brand representation.

They focus on globally recognised brands that are fashionable, innovative, unique, revolutionary and stylish. Their comprehensive range of products target the best beauty salons and spas, nail bars and select retail outlets.

Beauty Solutions brands include -
NuFace, Bondi Sands, Miller Harris, This Works, Living Proof, Kate Somerville, PMD, Rodial Beauty, Salt by Hendrix, Aceology, Umberto Giannini, Hampton Sun, Murad, MERMADE HAIR, Cosmedix, Sachajuan, M2 Beaute, The Light Salon, Neom Organics, Legology, Damion barber, Growth Bomb, Verso, NCLA, HAAN, Grace de Manaco, Nutriburst, Bubble T, Formula 10.0.6, Ohora, Patchology, Glov, GEM, Hair Chemist.

Beauty Solutions have now launched their UAE e-commerce platform at www.beautysolutions-me.com

Name: Ace Blend
Description:
Ace Blend is a multi-award-winning nutrition company that introduced superfood-based plant protein blends in India in the latter half of 2017. Ever since we have been innovating for the next generation of nutrition.

Ace Blend is not merely a marketing company. Rather a vertically integrated nutrition ecosystem with world-class in-house capabilities ( of product RnD and complete product creation).
Our new approach to modern nutrition is targeted to curate a novel range of life-enhancing, all-natural health solutions to enhance people's daily living in the 21st century, invented & patented by us, globally.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Glad2Glow Malaysia
Description: At the heart of Glad2Glow's mission is a commitment to celebrate natural beauty with innovative skincare solutions. By integrating advanced technology with gentle, natural components, the brand offers a range of products designed to promote a radiant and youthful complexion. Glad2Glow is dedicated to providing accessibility to affordable options without compromising on quality.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: cosnova Italia
Description:
Cosnova GmbH was founded in 2001, by Christina, a businesswoman with a strong desire to create cosmetics that could offer the highest quality at extremely competitive prices. 

In 2002 essence cosmetics was launched in Germany. Since then, essence has been achieving amazing results such as in 2007 it becomes #1 in Germany and is sold in 50 other countries and in 2013 it is the best-selling brand in Europe in the decorative cosmetics segment.* 

In 2004, the launch of CATRICE cosmetics in the German market and from then the presence of CATRICE, as well as its global performance, is constantly increasing. 

Italy has always been a key market in the world of cosmetics, and for this reason,  in 2017, cosnova Group decided to closely follow the 360-degree development of essence and CATRICE by opening the Italian subsidiary: cosnova Italia. 

Our mission: our heart beats for everyone in this world. We offer them the products and brand experience that help them to feel more beautiful, at any time.

* in volume, in the entry price segment.

Name: ASAIA Private Limited
Description:
ASAIA Private Limited (formerly Ontex Pakistan (Private) Limited) has a proud legacy of providing personal hygiene solutions for babies, women and adults in Pakistan.  

Our mission is to provide best-in-class personal care brands that satisfy the needs of mothers and babies, women, and elderly consumers. Quality of our products, processes, and people is our hallmark. 

ASAIA manufactures and sells the following brands in the Pakistan market:
Baby care: Canbebe and Bello
Adult care: Canped
Feminine care: Sincere
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Winston India
Description:
Our range of products is curated keeping in mind the needs
of the audience and what they have been missing out on in
the Indian market. All the products at Winston are innovative, trustworthy and of highest quality.

Name: LEMI Group
Description:
LEMI Group is an Italian company and a global leader in the production of massage beds, spa beds, aesthetic chairs, podiatry chairs, and innovative Pedi Spa solutions. Since 1989, we have been a worldwide benchmark in the wellness and spa industry, thanks to the unique combination of Made in Italy design, technological innovation, and craftsmanship excellence.

With over 150,000 products manufactured and exported to more than 130 countries, LEMI collaborates with the most prestigious hotel chains and luxury spas worldwide, including Four Seasons, Mandarin Oriental, Six Senses, Accor, Marriott, Casa Cipriani, and The Royal Atlantis Dubai.

Our 100% Made in Italy production is entirely carried out in our facilities in Azzanello and Casalbuttano (Cremona), where we manage the complete production cycle – from design to upholstery – ensuring maximum quality control and certified solutions with the finest materials.

Every LEMI product embodies:

Extreme customization: over 45 finishes, 12 wood options, embroidered logos, and bespoke details.

Exclusive innovation: EVO mattress with HBS system, Vibro-Music Technology, integrated chromotherapy, and Breast Relief System.

Sustainability: solar-powered production, Km0 suppliers, FSC-certified materials, eco-friendly finishes, and 2 VITA eco-sustainable color collections.

Long-term warranty: the Lifetime Assistance program guarantees spare parts availability for the entire product life.

LEMI quality is certified by TÜV ISO 9001, UL, and the 100% Made in Italy mark, and has been recognized with prestigious awards such as the American Spa Awards, ISPA Innovate Awards, Spa & Wellness MexiCaribe Awards, World Wellness Weekend Champion, and the Italian Excellence Award 2025.

Choosing LEMI means relying on a brand that combines luxury, innovation, and reliability. Our spa beds and professional wellness equipment are not just tools but experiences of well-being that enhance the finest hotels, resorts, and beauty centers worldwide

Name: Kind Patches
Description:
At Kind Patches, we support your well-being with innovative, natural solutions. Our patches use sustainably sourced ingredients and a gradual release system to provide relief for stress, sleep, energy, and focus—helping you feel your best, every day. Kind to you and the planet, we deliver reliable support to help you feel better, naturally and effectively. 

Why? Because you're one of a kind.

Name: Lilac St.
Description: Lilac St. offers a range of DIY eyelash extensions and false eyelashes kits. The products include natural-looking falsies, spikey, volume, and natural lashes. Customers can explore custom eye-opening and accentuating looks tailored to their eye shape. The company also provides reusable lashes and offers various sales and discounts on their products.

Name: LAURASTAR
Description: Since 1980, Laurastar has been the world leader in high-quality steam systems. From ironing and steaming through to the purification and cleaning of textiles, objects, and surfaces, the brand builds on Swiss savoir-faire, innovation, design, and its unique DMS (Dry Microfine Steam) technology. Laurastar is committed to fighting planned obsolescence, with its durable and repairable products designed to last a generation. Family-owned and based in Châtel-Saint-Denis, Switzerland, Laurastar’s mission is to beautify your life and protect you and your loved ones.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NewAge, Inc.
Description: Empowering people to build a healthier world.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Fur
Description:
Fur is the first brand dedicated to helping you care for your body hair and skin from head to toe, no matter how you choose to groom. All of our products are formulated with the cleanest facial-grade, vegan, cruelty free,  ingredients that are dermatologically and gynecologically tested. Wherever you fall on the spectrum of bare to full, we provide natural care, free of mineral oil, silicones, parabens, synthetic fragrances, and artificial dyes that nourish skin, soften hair and eradicate ingrowns. That's why Fur products are gentle enough for pubic hair and skin, but effective from head to toe. Whether you shave, wax, laser, or go au naturale, Fur plays well with any hair care routine. Welcome to the new era of body care!
 
Fur was founded in 2015 by best friends Lillian Tung and Laura Schubert. Fur is sold online and in several different retailers across the United States as well as the UK, Canada, Poland, Germany, Australia, Belgium, Czech Republic, Singapore, Netherlands, Trinidad, Tobago, Japan, New Zealand and Hong Kong. Check out the list of our select retailers on our website to see if there is a Fur retailer near you. You can also find us in Vogue, Marie Claire, Allure, Nylon, Forbes, Goop and Season 11 of ABC’s Shark Tank. 

Collaboration, diversity and creativity drives Fur’s constant desire to continue to grow and learn. We would love to take you on this journey with us!

Name: MIA Cosmetics
Description:
Your Italian Beauty: the payoff of Mia Cosmetics encapsulates all the brand's values. A manifesto of Mediterranean beauty, since 2015, the year of its founding, Mia has become a beauty ally for women and men all over the World.
Mia Cosmetics was founded by @damoreluigi together with a team of beauty and cosmetics professionals who, thanks to their skills, have created a line of high-quality products. The company is based in Italy, and this is reflected in the attention to detail evident in each product. Mia Cosmetics is committed to using controlled, cruelty-free ingredients that are not restricted by gender, age or race stereotypes promote diversity and inclusion.
MISSION
To think and make unique and inimitable cosmetics that enhance and celebrate beauty in every aspect without prejudice and without boundaries.We want to challenge the definition of beauty, encourage authenticity and celebrate diversity. Your Italian Beauty is the claim that highlights the identity of MIA Cosmetics rooted in Made in Italy. The mission is based on countless innovative display solutions that allow consumers to choose from a wide range of products, constantly enriched with new launches and seasonal collections.
VISION
To be among the ambassadors of Made in Italy in the world, spreading company values, strengthening identity and aligning individual and group goals by making employees, retailers, makeup artists, international distributors, listening to customer needs, feel part of the MIA world in order to become the best ambassadors of the Brand.

MIA COSMETICS BRANDS
Mia Cosmetics offers a wide range of products encompassed in 2 brands with the same philosophy:
MIA Makeup with makeup products formulated to meet the needs of all skin types
MIA Proskin with cosmetics for the daily beauty routine to combat skin imperfections.

Name: ROWSE
Description:
ROWSE came to life to fulfill a personal need of skincare that embodies beauty, love, trust, and hope—connecting nature to the community.

A need of knowledge and understanding of the body and the skin, on how these can be uplifted by natural remedies rooted on plant based and conscious values.

Determined instead to celebrate raw beauty, and to protect the planet we call our home, we knew we needed to do things a little differently. 

This is how ROWSE was born, and launched a collection of sustainably-sourced and vegan products, from our firstborn, made as an oil blend with raw ingredients that shortly evolved to bring new offerings such as powders, floral waters, essential oils and clays. 

Determined to promote a simple but unique blend of products, while celebrating the origins of each of our ingredients, we’ve worked closely with independent labs to combine and create beauty from recipes and formulations, that celebrates beauty and our planet in an intimate and beneficial way to bring safety and care all over our body.

Name: Pachamamaï
Description:
PACHAMAMAI, une marque des laboratoires Paris Dôme.
Nos produits sont naturels, vegans et éthiques avec un soin tout particulier porté sur le choix des ingrédients et matières premières.
Nos cosmétiques sont confectionnées à la main, en France.

Name: Cosmetique Asia Corporation
Description:
Cosmetique Asia Corporation, established in 2001, is guided by its founder, Mr. Alexander S. Co who has over 30 years of cosmetic retailing experience.

The company began with the introduction of its flagship brand - Silka Papaya Soap, its first venture in the cosmetic industry.

After the Silka Papaya line gained popularity and market share in the whitening soap category, Cosmetique Asia launched Juicy Cologne, the company's first foray in the fragrance industry.

With the success of both the Silka and Juicy brands, Cosmetique Asia brings in a new category to its growing portfolio in 2014 - Biogenic Alcohol.

As the company continues to expand its product lines, Bambini is relaunched as its first endeavor in the baby category. Bambini Baby Cologne is introduced in 2016.

Today, Cosmetique Asia Corporation continuously develops and innovated products to address the needs of its consumers.

Name: Jasmine Concrete Exports Private Limited
Description: Jasmine Concrete Exports Private Limited is a Company headquartered in Chennai and having its factories at Dindigul and Coimbatore is engaged in the manufacture and export of natural floral extracts, spice extracts, essential oils etc. The Company has  entered into a JV with Global major Firmenich in 2014.

Name: Bandi Cosmetics Sp. z o.o.
Description:
BANDI COSMETICS is a Polish family bussiness, founded in 1986 by a talented chemist. Today, it’s run by her daughter, continuing to grow and earn recognition both in Poland and internationally. At the heart of the company is our Research & Development Department – the driving force behind BANDI’s success, creating innovative skincare formulas. Our products are crafted with advanced ingredients that work in perfect harmony to deliver impressive results.
Our range includes: BANDI PROFESSIONAL – professional skin care, BANDI MEDICAL EXPERT – dermocosmetics, and BANDI TRICHESTHETIC – targeted hair and scalp care. We’re proud of our loyal community, who trust in the effectiveness of our products and embrace every new launch with enthusiasm.
Switch to professional care and feel the difference!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cmy-op7_qL0

Blisko 40 lat produkujemy wyjątkowe kosmetyki!
Przez ten czas opracowaliśmy i wdrożyliśmy wiele skutecznych, czasem unikalnych i przełomowych receptur. Preparaty wielokrotnie uznane i nagradzane przez ekspertów, a co ważniejsze, przez Klientów.

Od początku istnienia BANDI miało jasny cel: tworzyć doskonałe kosmetyki na kieszeń każdej Polki. Właśnie tak jest i jesteśmy z tego dumni. Miarą naszego sukcesu są tysiące salonów i dziesiątki tysięcy kobiet stosujących nasze produkty.

Name: Indfrag Biosciences Pvt Ltd
Description:
Indfrag – short form for Indian Fragrance – was started in 1989 in collaboration with Quest International’s facility in the South of France.  We made fresh Flower Concretes and Absolutes for Quest and other French companies up till 1994.  
We currently focus on manufacturing botanical extracts for the Cosmetics, Food and Nutrition Industry.
We operate 3 manufacturing units of varying capacities which allows us the flexibility to supply extracts from milligram quantities to several tons to our customers’ specifications.  We have a vast global network of raw Botanical suppliers developed over the past 35 years, ranging from Eastern Europe to places like Ghana, Madagascar and Indonesia. We currently supply our cosmetic active ingredients to leading brands and companies in the EU, North/South America and Asia. 
Our factory is located in India and we have offices in India, USA, and Singapore.
Indfrag Biosciences is committed to quality and has adherence to best practices. We believe in innovative products with standardized manufacturing procedures that help us to deliver the best to the customers. 

Apart from this the company has been certified by various independent bodies. We have FSSAI, FSS22000, ISO 14001, ISO 9001+HACCP, FAIR TRADE, RAINFOREST ALLIANCE, KOSHER, HALAL certifications for our factories and ingredients. We are also a member of UEBT (Union for Ethical BioTrade).  Our site has also been FDA Approved.

Name: Hemas Consumer Brands (Pvt.) Ltd - Bangladesh
Description:
Hemas is a Sri Lanka based Multinational Company, it takes pride in offering affordable, practical, and high-quality products and services in specialized sectors of FMCG, Pharmaceutical, Hospital, Transportation and Leisure. Hemas offers quality and reliable services in every possible way. Kumarika is the well-known Brand of Hemas in Bangladesh.
http://www.hemas.com/

Name: The Skin Diet Company
Description:
Like our body needs a balanced diet that contains all kinds of vitamins,  nutrients & minerals, our skin does too.

The Skin Diet Company is an upcoming ingredient-based skincare brand inspired by  “Superfoods” that provide extraordinary benefits to the skin. Our products  will be Toxin-free, Sulphate-free, Paraben-free, Mineral Oil and Petrolatum free & 100%  vegan with natural ingredients and will not be tested on animals.

TSDC represents a brand that aims to help everyone experience their own self-improvement enriching journey. A brand that aims to make people mindful about feeding their body, mind, and skin with Superfoods. A brand that not only promotes healthy skin care but also a healthy lifestyle. Keeping “Skin Minimalism” in mind our products will give multiple benefits to the skin, same as superfoods give to the body. The brand aims to address skin inclusivity, positivity & diversity & drives habit change.

Name: Cherish
Description: Cherish develops intelligent radar-based sensor platforms that revolutionize health and safety monitoring wherever people live, work, play, or receive care. Our patented spatial computing technology works ambiently (through the air) without changing how people live or work and by prioritizing their privacy. We detect emergencies and risks to people’s health and well-being and bring timely help. We help make wherever people live the safest place on Earth, and we help protect care providers and the people they serve.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Epionce / Episciences, Inc.
Description:
Epionce is a dermatologist-developed, medical grade skin care brand that has been obsessed with a healthy skin barrier for over 20 years. Epionce barrier-nurturing products utilize elegant blends of botanical ingredients to show measurable and visible improvement to the appearance of the skin. Founded on completely original research, Epionce was built upon a strong medical heritage, and has always been better for your barrier.

Our elegant formulations are made with barrier-boosting cholesterol and ceramides, and antioxidant-rich botanical blends. They are gentle enough for the most sensitive of skin types, yet strong enough to provide proven results for any aesthetic goal. 

The Epionce formulas have undergone over 15 rigorous independent clinical trials to prove safety and efficacy. This combination of elegant barrier-first products that have met very high clinical standards, has made Epionce a pioneer in the medical aesthetic industry. Epionce products are trusted, recommended and sold by medical skincare professionals.

Every product is carefully developed, tested and produced to the highest standards in our own manufacturing facility in Boise, Idaho. This way we can be in control of every step of the process. We truly care about how Epionce is made so it can care for your amazing, beautiful skin.

Put your skin barrier first, and beautiful skin will follow. We Deliver the Beauty of Healthy Skin.

Name: Laboratoire Indemne
Description:
Le Laboratoire Indemne est spécialisé dans la fabrication et la commercialisation de produits dermo-cosmétiques à base d’huiles essentielles et d’huiles végétales. Au travers de sa marque INDEMNE, la société réinvente les premières huiles essentielles prêtes à l’emploi. Des soins 100% naturels pour le traitement dermatologique des peaux atopiques, sensibles, irritées et « capricieuses ». 

Certifiée : Slow Cosmétique - Cruelty Free - Vegan - Origine France Garantie

Ma Peau Chérie Group is specialized in manufacturing and marketing of dermo-cosmetics with essential oils and vegetable oils. Through its brand INDEMNE, the company reinvents the first essential oils ready to use. INDEMNE ‘s range of products  is based on natural cares exclusively for dermatological treatment of atopic, sensitive, irritated and "capricious" skin. 

Facebook :     https://www.facebook.com/IndemneFR / 
Instagram :     https://www.instagram.com/indemnefrance/
Youtube:         https://www.youtube.com/user/IndemneFR
Pinterest :       http://fr.pinterest.com/indemneFR/

Name: IZZON Lab
Description:
At IZZON Lab, we redefine excellence in the development and manufacturing of personal care products. As part of the prestigious holding Daler Management, we bring over 30 years of experience and a steadfast commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability.

Our vision is clear: to transform the market by offering personalized and exclusive solutions that not only meet but exceed the expectations of the most discerning consumers. We combine cutting-edge technology, strategic creativity, and responsible processes to develop products that deeply connect with today’s increasingly conscious and selective customers.

-

En IZZON Lab, redefinimos la excelencia en el desarrollo y la fabricación de productos de cuidado personal. Como parte del prestigioso holding Daler Management, aportamos más de 30 años de experiencia y un compromiso inquebrantable con la calidad, la innovación y la sostenibilidad.

Nuestra visión es clara: transformar el mercado ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas y exclusivas que no solo cumplan, sino que superen las expectativas de los consumidores más exigentes. Combinamos tecnología de vanguardia, creatividad estratégica y procesos responsables para desarrollar productos que conectan profundamente con los clientes de hoy, cada vez más conscientes y selectivos.

Name: The Lip Bar Inc.
Description:
The Lip Bar is a vegan and cruelty-free beauty brand that exists to help change the way you think about beauty. We're taking the guess work out of beauty by creating convenient and curated experiences for our customers. 

In 2012, Founder + CEO Melissa Butler started The Lip Bar by making lipstick in her Brooklyn kitchen. Since then, The Lip Bar has been awarded by Byrdie, Refinery 29, and Allure. 

The Lip Bar is now available in 750 Target Stores, 500 Walmart Stores, and our Flagship Store in Downtown Detroit.

Name: Eley
Description:
ELEY is a 100% Italian company that since many years produces innovative and functional "green" cosmetics for hair, face and body.

An ever-growing presence on the international market that expresses the aspiration to be an ambassador of the Italian quality and style.

INSIGHT is born in the ELEY laboratories: a brand in which the ancient knowledge of phyto-extracts and phyto-oils and the ethical choice to work with organic ingredients find a perfect synergy.

INSIGHT's mission is eco-sustainability, not only on an environmental level, but also on a social level. Be within everyone's reach, proposing green, gentle and at the same time performing formulas.

The ELEY production department works according to strict safety, hygiene and control standards,

Eley has obtained ISO 9001 (Quality System) and ISO 22716 (GMP - Good Manufacturing System) certifications. This certification process has allowed us to increase our ability to meet the needs and expectations of our customers, through a better control of the company processes.

Eco-sustainability, technology and effectiveness melt on one philosophy.

Name: Valmont - CVL Cosmetics North America
Description:
For more than 30 years, the Valmont Group has been helping women and men master the visible signs of ageing. Heir to traditional Swiss medicine, the company draws from the unspoiled natural resources of Switzerland and the latest cellular cosmetic research findings to formulate utmost anti-ageing skin care products featuring visible and long-lasting efficacy. 
The group has surrounded itself with the best experts to create extraordinary product ranges, all subtly combining refinement and anti-age efficacy… to enhance the beauty of women and men.

Name: STRIVE—PlantByte Foods and Nutrition
Description:
STRIVE Plant Powered Nutrition is a pioneering Wellness Company on a mission to elevate India's health & wellness in a Science-based way. 

We launched India's 1st dairy-free DAILY Protein & Nutrition Shake and disrupted the Plant Protein category. Stay tuned to learn more about our products and how we can help you.

Protein Powders  & Shakes | Nut Butters | Protein Cookies | Stevia
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: KEVIN.MURPHY France
Description:
KEVIN.MURPHY France est une entreprise spécialisée dans le secteur d'activité du commerce de parfumerie et de produits de beauté.
Aujourd'hui distributeur exclusif sur le marché français des marques KEVIN.MURPHY, COLOR.ME, CODE by KEVIN.MURPHY.

KEVIN.MURPHY: est une marque australienne, de soins des cheveux à la pointe des tendances, destinée tout particulièrement aux salons, aux professionnels de la coiffure. Elle propose des produits haut de gamme, créés par Kevin (le fondateur, lui même né en Australie), pour répondre aux exigences des coiffeurs.

Insatisfait des produits pour cheveux standard qu'il rencontre. Il propose des produits légers, performants qui offrent un soin pénétrant pour rendre les cheveux plus beaux au quotidien.

Née d'une philosophie similaire aux soins de la peau et s'inspirant du meilleur de la nature, la gamme KEVIN.MURPHY, de shampoings , après-shampoings, de soins et de styling, est un respect de la coiffure sur des bases de l'aromathérapie naturelle exigée pour chaque type de cheveux. La gamme compte 38 références.

Les produits sont élaborés avec des ressources renouvelables et durables chaque fois que possible, utilisant des huiles essentielles pures, des extraits de plantes et des antioxydants naturels. Tous les produits KEVIN.MURPHY sont sans sulfate et sans paraben.

COLOR.ME by KEVIN.MURPHY:  Une gamme complète de coloration permanente inspirée de la philosophie KEVIN.MURPHY. Une coloration douce, avec du beurre de karité, du miel, sans ammoniaque.

Name: Innovative Beauty Group (IBG)
Description:
IBG is a global team of 300+ people across 13 locations, working every day on beauty brands around the world. 

We’re brand builders and brand boosters: we help create new brands, refresh existing ones, and scale what’s already working. That can include brand strategy, design, packaging, product development and launch support: whatever is needed to move a beauty idea forward.  Consisting of 5 key brands – Orchard Custom Beauty, Fasten Packaging, Roberts Beauty, Centdegrés and Finemakers – we help brands develop innovative, best-selling beauty products. Beauty starts with great ideas, we help bring them to life
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

WiseLife began with our Founder’s journey to self-realisation and a simple desire to eliminate the stress, anxiety and unease that was affecting his mental and physical wellbeing. 

He found his solace in Yoga and made it his life’s mission to make it easier for people make it a part of their lives.

Our mission is straightforward: to be your ultimate destination for premium health and wellness equipment. 

We proudly champion the "vocal for local" spirit. Our products are manufactured right here in India because we believe in crafting innovative and handcrafted products that cater to your artistic and wellness needs.

We are best known for our Yoga Mats, which are designed with care, hand printed, and use a material that has the best grip. 

WiseLife is a one-stop-solution for all your fitness essentials.

Thousands of users have shown faith in our ground breaking innovations, non-toxic and cruelty free products with a commitment to environmental sustainability. 

And this faith has transformed into a nationwide movement. 

We welcome you to Wiselife, where we invite you to be a part of our community that values your well-being above all else.

Name: Beauty Creations Cosmetics
Description:
From trends to our favorite influencers, our products are inspired by all our BC Babes. Developed exclusively in-house, Beauty Creations delivers products for everyone! 

Beauty Creations is founded by our CEO Esmeralda Hernandez; an innovator and creator behind this fast growing beauty company, along with parent company Bebella Cosmetics. Growing up with a single parent mother her career began at a young age. Esmeralda started working with her mother at the swap meets at age 12 and by age 15, she was running her business in the perfume and hair industry. She realized that her true passion was in beauty. Being Latina woman in business she saw that there was a market that was being neglected. Her experience of working at the swap meets, she saw that the demand for beauty at an affordable cost was being missed. Coming across people who had the same love for beauty but unable to afford luxury she cultivated a line that was created with quality, without breaking the bank. Beauty Creations was made to be a line as CEO, Esmeralda says “ selling her oranges to everyone” changing the market, by allowing Beauty Creations to be accessible to everyone. 

We will continue to redefine the beauty industry one product at a time through inspiration, creation and passion. Currently, our products are cruelty-free with a line expanding from Eyes, Lips, Face, SKIN, hair tools, vanities and Exclusive Collections. We want our BC babes to feel inspired, and have the freedom to express their inner girl boss attitude. This is just the beginning for Beauty Creations, we hope you can enjoy this ride with us because we aren’t stopping.

La marque de soins In & Out naturelle dédiée au bien-être et à l'équilibre hormonal féminin de la puberté à la ménopause à travers 3 axes : Le confort physique, l'équilibre émotionnel, et les répercussions sur la peau et les cheveux 

Nous souhaitons aider les femmes à naviguer sereinement avec leurs fluctuations hormonales tout au long de leur vie grâce à des soins et compléments alimentaires naturels, efficaces et avec le minimum de contre-indications (sans phytohormones ni perturbateurs endocriniens suspectés)

Name: CITTA (Lexicon Lifestyle - A Lexicon Group Enterprise)
Description:
At CITTA, Dadi Nani Ke Nuskhe meet science to create the most effective and safe natural skincare products for babies and kids. Our products are formulated after conducting extensive research on the numerous childcare traditions, rituals, and practices across various regions of India. Like a doting grandma, CITTA products are designed to nurture your little ones with love and pass on the wisdom of time-tested traditions backed by science.

We also know that parenting is anything but easy! That’s why our products are also designed to offer parents maximum convenience when it comes to their child’s skincare.  

Derived from the Sanskrit word “Chitta,” meaning consciousness, our name CITTA embodies our core philosophy of doing everything consciously — we care for people and the planet. 

Made with ethically sourced and manufactured natural ingredients of the highest quality, our products are cruelty-free and dermatologically tested and approved. We work with doctors to keep out harsh chemicals — all our products have skin-friendly pH and are free of parabens, sulphates, silicones, mineral oils, allergens, and toxins. We believe in transparency — all our ingredients are listed on the product labels so that people can make a conscious choice.

Join us on our mission of creating the safest and most effective natural skincare that offers the best of both worlds — Indian traditions and science. Explore job openings on our page to become a #cittazen today
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoires Sicobel
Description:
Laboratoires engagés et responsables, les Laboratoires Sicobel sont spécialisés depuis plus de 60 ans dans la fabrication et la distribution de produits bio et naturels. 

Notre mission : proposer une offre variée, à moindre impact écologique et accessible au plus grand nombre dans le domaine de la beauté et de la santé. 

Précurseur dans la fabrication de cosmétiques certifiés bio, les laboratoires Sicobel développent des produits à l’empreinte écologique réduite et se mobilisent autour de marques responsables distribuées en pharmacies/parapharmacies et instituts de beauté/spas.

Nos marques beauté fabriquées en France
•Placentor Végétal : créée en 1959, Placentor Végétal est la 1ère marque de phytodermalogie appliquée. 
•BcomBio : 1ère marque de dermo-cosmétique certifiée BIO depuis 2003. Des soins-beauté performants et accessibles à tous les consommateurs. 
•BcomBio homme : des cosmétiques pensés pour les Hommes et formulés pour garantir une efficacité et une tolérance optimale.
•Osmaé l’atelier des sens : une marque 100% plaisir aux parfums raffinés, composée de produits naturels ou BIO pour les besoins simples du quotidien.
•Green Tribu : une marque de soins BIO engagée aux compositions ultra clean, conçus pour minimiser leur impact sur l'environnement. 
•Recettes d’antan : des savons authentiques, conçus selon des savoir-faire ancestraux apportant tous leurs bienfaits pour la peau.
•Thalac : Des cosmétiques issus de la thalassothérapie pour les professionnels en Instituts. Un concentré de soins marins !

Mais aussi
•Dolpic : Des soins techniques et innovants pour accompagner tous les sportifs à chaque étape de leur pratique. 
•Solens : Des confiseries gourmandes, saines et authentiques issues du savoir-faire de nos régions françaises. 
 
Les laboratoires Sicobel distribuent également en pharmacies et parapharmacies les marques : Möller’s, Douce Nuit, Gerimax, Nuviline, Aloesol, Papier d’Arménie, Uberti, Bio Since, Acorelle, Marcus Rohrer et Douce nature.

Name: PARISIENNE ITALIA S.P.A.
Description:
LA NOSTRA STORIA, LA STORIA DI UN’ECCELLENZA TUTTA ITALIANA
È l’Italia che sta per essere travolta dagli entusiasmi e dalla frenesia del boom e della dolce vita. È l’Italia animata da
nuovi propositi, in fibrillazione per suggestioni e grandi traguardi da raggiungere.
È l’Italia del 1955, quella di Fape, l’innovativa brillantina per capelli che rivoluziona il mercato della cosmesi
italiana e con cui la nostra azienda s’impone sulla scena nazionale. Di lì a poco, Fape diventa Parisienne Italia e avvia - prima nel Bel Paese - la produzione di lacche destinate al mercato nostrano. Sono trascorsi oltre sessant’anni e, da allora, il gruppo Parisienne Italia compartecipa ogni giorno all’evoluzione di un’eccellenza cosmetica rigorosamente made in Italy.
DA OLTRE SESSANT’ANNI UNA DOLCE VITA AL SERVIZIO DELLA COSMESI.

OUR STORY IS ONE OF ALL-ITALIAN EXCELLENCE
An Italy about to be gripped by the enthusiasm and excitement of the boom and the dolce vita. An Italy galvanised by new offers, in a frenzy of ideas and bold goals to achieve.
This is the Italy of 1955, that of Fape, an innovative brilliantine for hair that revolutionised the market of Italian cosmetics, and which set our company on the national market. Shortly after, Fape became Parisienne Italia and - as first company in the Bel Paese - began producing hairsprays for the Italian market. Since then, over sixty years have gone by, and Parisienne Italia contributes every day to the evolution of cosmetic excellence, rigorously labelled Made in Italy.
FOR OVER SIXTY YEARS, THE DOLCE VITA AT THE SERVICE OF COSMETICS.

Name: Dr. Sheth's ~ For Indian Skin
Description:
Dr. Sheth's is a luxury, vegan skincare brand formulated by three generations of expertise in Indian skin research

Our founders have over six decades of expertise in Indian skin including several A-list Bollywood celebrities

1ST GENERATION 
Dr. Sharat C. Desai:  India’s first dermatologist , he organized India’s first international dermatology conference.

2ND GENERATION
Dr. Rekha Sheth : India’s first and foremost cosmetic dermatologist - the visionary behind the brand  is respected globally as *the* authority on Indian skin.

3RD GENERATION
Dr. Aneesh Sheth:  An Ivy-league educated pharmacist, Dr. Aneesh understands the chemistry behind the science, building out formulations to address the needs of Indian skin

Indian skin is different and requires special care.  
Most products available today are formulated by scientists in developed places like the US, Korea or Europe. These countries don’t face the harsh abuse from pollution, heat and the UV that our skins face everyday. To repair this damage, our skins require much higher doses of vitamins and proteins.

We are the only brand in the market creating skincare products designed for skin of color , that are naturally inspired, scientifically validated and medically created. 

Our formulations are toxin-free, vegan, jain and, wherever possible, naturally derived. We do not believe in animal cruelty and respect the environment which we live in.

Name: Imperial Armour
Description:
Imperial Armour is the longest established manufacturer of personal protection equipment in South Africa.  This award winning company aims to save lives by manufacturing soft and hard armour to the highest of standards.   Providing the latest technology to the Military, Police, Security Companies and Emergency Services.

Imperial Armour is recognised for its quality, ensuring maximum comfort and agility in its design without compromising safety.

All of our products are rigorously tested and certified to International Standards at NTS Laboratory in USA.  Our factory has the latest ISO certificate for quality and control - ISO 9001: 2015.

We have been awarded large contracts supplying Body Armour, Helmets & plates in SADIC countries.

We have also been awarded three large contracts last year in West Africa for RIOT Equipment:  Armadillo Anti Riot Vests; Shields, Riot Helmets, Gas Masks.

No contract is too small or too large - we have 23 years experience.

Please contact our CEO:  Louisa Garland to discuss future business opportunities

louisagarlandels@imperial-armour.com

Name: s’hevec
Description:
S'he Vec olarak, %100 yerli üretim ve bütünsel yaklaşımla, tüm cilt bakım ihtiyaçlarınızı en rafine aktif bileşenlerle karşılıyoruz. Yenilikçi AR-GE çalışmalarımızla, çevre dostu çözümler sunuyoruz. Tüm formül ve içeriklerimizde sizin için en iyi ve doğruyu arıyor, açık ve şeffaf bir iletişimle sizinle paylaşıyoruz. 

Sağlıklı bir görünümün özgüveni ne kadar desteklediğini biliyor ve bu nedenle özgüveni yüksek bir toplum yaratmak için bize düşeni yapmaya gayret gösteriyoruz. 

S’he Vec, doğadan gelen rafine aktif bileşenlerle cildinize dokunur. Bilimsel araştırmalarla desteklenen, temiz, vegan, zararlı kimyasallardan uzak ve güvenilir formülasyonlar; son teknolojik cihazlarla, kalite standartlarına uygun, steril ortamlarda kendi tesisi olan Vec Kimya’da üretilmektedir.

Name: Merz Lifecare
Description:
Merz Life Care hilft Menschen, ein gesundes Leben zu führen. Selbstbestimmt, alltagstauglich und mit Marken, die wirken. Mit bekannten Brands wie tetesept, Merz Spezial und Brooklyn Soap Company schaffen wir echte Mehrwerte für Gesundheit, Wohlbefinden und Lebensqualität.

Unsere Produkte sind so vielfältig wie die Menschen, für die wir sie entwickeln. Wissenschaftlich fundiert, naturinspiriert und mit Blick auf das, was wirklich zählt.

Wir haben ein tiefes Verständnis für die Bedürfnisse unserer Zielgruppen und den Mut, Gesundheit immer wieder neu zu denken. Uns prägt eine Unternehmenskultur, die Verantwortung, Teamgeist und Purpose verbindet.

Wir glauben daran, dass starke Marken Vertrauen verdienen. Durch Qualität, Relevanz und Authentizität. Deshalb investieren wir in Forschung, nachhaltige Lösungen und in die Menschen, die Merz Life Care mitgestalten. Gemeinsam arbeiten wir daran, Gesundheit und Wohlbefinden nicht nur verfügbar, sondern erlebbar zu machen.

Merz Life Care ist die Unternehmensmarke der Merz Consumer Care GmbH, einem der führenden Anbieter für Gesundheits-, Wellness- und Beautyprodukte im deutschsprachigen Raum. Merz Consumer Care ist Teil der Merz Gruppe mit Sitz in Frankfurt am Main.

Name: LCB Cosmétiques
Description:
LCB Cosmétiques est un entreprise éco-responsable qui prône les valeurs de partage et transparence pour le bien-être de ses clients et de ses collaborateurs, tous animés par un formidable esprit d'équipe ! 

Créé en 2009, LCB développe, fabrique et commercialise des produits cosmétiques biologiques et naturels sous deux marques différentes : Oxalia et Ylaé.
Oxalia est une marque spécialement destinée aux professionnels de l'esthétique  (Instituts de beauté, esthéticiennes à domicile).  
Pour plus d’informations, consultez le site www.oxalia.eu
 
La gamme des produits Ylaé est quant à elle distribuée en magasins biologiques et sur le site marchand www.ylae.fr. 
Des cosmétiques biologiques naturels avec une forte teneur en ingrédients bio et plus de 99% d’ingrédients naturels, ce qui offre à LCB une vraie valeur différenciante par rapport à ses concurrents dans un environnement fortement dominé par de grosses entreprises allemandes. 
L’innovation est non seulement dans la formulation avec une attention toute particulière portée au choix des matières premières (principalement issues de France), et aux actifs qui composent les produits, mais aussi dans le packaging avec des étuis cartonnés imprimés avec à des encres végétales, des contenants en verre ou en polypropylène, pour offrir aux consommateurs des produits entièrement recyclables, sans parler des tubes airless, une innovation française qui présente l’avantage de restituer jusqu’à 98 % du produit en protégeant la formule et limitant les conservateurs.
Certifiés « Qualité France », les  produits de LCB respectent la charte nationale  Cosmébio  et depuis peu la charte européenne COSMOS ORGANIC, qui garantit le respect des techniques de fabrication de la cosmétique naturelle et bio, le respect des Hommes, de la Nature et des Animaux et l'assurance d'une communication responsable et transparente !

Name: PEGGY SAGE

Depuis 1925, Peggy Sage incarne l’élégance, la qualité et le savoir-faire professionnel dans l’univers de la beauté. Marque patrimoniale devenue référence incontournable, nous avons su traverser les époques en restant fidèles à notre mission : rendre la beauté accessible à toutes et à tous, avec exigence et créativité.

Aujourd’hui, plus que jamais, nous sommes tournés vers l’avenir : innovation produit, écoresponsabilité, digitalisation, écoute de nos communautés… Autant de leviers que nous activons pour faire rayonner notre marque avec modernité et ambition.

Depuis 100 ans, Peggy Sage partage son expertise beauté avec vous et pour vous.

A Flora, indústria brasileira de bens de consumo com 45 anos de história, também atua na produção terceirizada (private label) de sabonetes, sabões em barra e massa base.

Name: Groupe Laboratoire Rivadis
Description:
Entreprise familiale, créée en 1971 par un pharmacien, Michel Rival, le laboratoire Rivadis développe, fabrique, conditionne et commercialise des produits d’hygiène et de soins , pour l’univers médical et hospitalier, ainsi que pour toute la famille.Aujourd’hui, le laboratoire Rivadis compte 184 salariés et propose ses produits :
• Aux établissements médicaux-hospitaliers : promotion et distribution de produits d’hygiène et de soins aux collectivités médicales.
• À toute la famille : vente par relation au personnel médical et au grand public (Rivadouce, Milton)
• En pharmacie : Vente des produits Rivadouce des gammes Bébé et Partenaires soins.
• À l’export : vente des produits Rivadouce notamment en Chine.

Name: butter LONDON
Description:
We are butter LONDON the bon vivants of beauty...cultured, confident, expertly curated, divinely distinctive, and authentically inclusive.

butter LONDON boldly eschews conventional beauty... we believe playful is beautiful and we encourage you to live a little.

Founded in 2005 by British entrepreneur, Sasha Muir with the help of Nonie Creme, London's premier fashion manicurist, butter LONDON quickly became the world-renowned 3-Free nail lacquer brand with a huge cult following. Today we continue to lead industry innovation with imaginative products, and good-for-you formulations in our expanded colour repertoire for eyes, lip & face using the same ingenious carcinogen-free Crafted with Care approach to formulations. We are high-impact captivating colour without compromise.

Famous for unbridled creativity, self-expression, and unmistakable cheeky Brit wit... we're here to inspire. From our iconic ladylike botanical wallpaper emblazoned with faceted gems, bugs, and skulls to our distinctively charming shade names-think Disco Biscuit and Pink Knickers-if there's one thing you can expect it's the unexpected. 

Here's the clincher... butter LONDON is an American brand. Yep. Infinitely inspired (and a 'lil obsessed) with rebellious British creativity and the allure of LONDON-in all its energizing, eclectic, eccentric, glamorous glory. Doesn't everything sounds better with a British accent? We bring you imaginative London-inspired luxury (so you can skip the 14 hour flight).

By the by, we love demanding darlings who insist on colour without compromise. butter LONDON is luxe you can trust. Only the best for the best, expect nothing less.

We are makeup royalty...and we wear it very well.

Name: TePe UK Oral Hygiene Products

Name: AMG Medical
Description:
A.M.G. Medical Inc. manufactures and distributes home healthcare and medical professional products. Our core brands include Physio Logic, ProActive, Dex4, MedPro Defense, Zorbi, NocoSpray, Ultra-Blok and MedPro.

Our comprehensive product lines adhere to world class standards for high quality, low cost and quick response. Founded in 1972 and headquartered in Montreal, Canada, AMG corporate offices adjoin a 60,000 square foot manufacturing and distribution facility. To serve our U.S. customers, we utilize a distribution center located one hour south of Montreal in Chazy, New York. 

AMG is an ISO / MDSAP Certified company registered with the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA), and the Health Protection Branch (HPB) of Health Canada. For more information about our company, please visit http://www.amgmedical.com.

Name: Swissline Cosmetics
Description:
Nurturing Your Skin Beyond Beauty.

Founded in Switzerland 35 years ago, Swissline is one of the very few brands who can trace its origins into cellular therapy. We are proud of our heritage and remain at the heart of biotech innovation and development to this day.

Our philosophy is simple: Intelligent skincare respects and works with the skin, not against it. From ideation to creation, our Swiss DNA informs everything we create. Our award-winning formulas embrace natural actives and skin-identical ingredients such as Hyaluronic Acid, Collagen, Niacinamide, Pre and Probiotics, Madecassoside and more. 

Swissline’s premium products can be found in exclusive locations across the globe.

Name: Kiro Beauty

With a genuine mix of integrity and darn good efficacy Kiro was born.

Name: La Vie en Rose by Dimitra Katsafadou
Description:
La Vie en Rose: Εκεί όπου η μαγεία της φύσης συναντά την ψυχολογία της ύλης. 

Η La Vie en Rose by Dimitra Katsafadou είναι μια πολυβραβευμένη ελληνική εταιρεία παραγωγής καλλυντικών, εμπνευσμένων από τη δύναμη της φύσης και τη βαθιά γνώση της χημείας. Δημιουργήθηκε το 2016 από την επιστήμονα Δήμητρα Μαρία Κατσαφάδου, η οποία ξεκίνησε το όραμά της πειραματιζόμενη στην κουζίνα του σπιτιού της.

Σήμερα η εταιρεία διαθέτει σχεδόν 70 καταστήματα σε Ελλάδα και Κύπρο, ενώ τα προϊόντα της διανέμονται και στο εξωτερικό. Η παραγωγή γίνεται σε πρότυπο εργαστήριο αδειοδοτημένο από τον ΕΟΦ.

Η εταιρεία ξεχωρίζει για τον πλούτο φυτικών συστατικών, την καινοτομία, τις πατέντες και την εμπιστοσύνη του κοινού. Παράλληλα με την επιστημονική της πρόοδο, η La Vie en Rose έχει αναπτύξει μια διακριτή κοινωνική παρουσία. Μέσα από δράσεις αλληλεγγύης, στηρίζει ανθρώπους και φορείς που έχουν ανάγκη.

-----

La Vie en Rose: Where the Magic of Nature Meets the Psychology of Matter

La Vie en Rose by Dimitra Katsafadou is an award-winning Greek cosmetics company, inspired by the power of nature and a profound understanding of chemistry. Founded in 2016 by scientist Dimitra Maria Katsafadou, she began pursuing her vision experimenting in her own kitchen.

Today, the company operates nearly 70 stores across Greece and Cyprus, while its products are also distributed internationally. All production takes place in a state-of-the-art laboratory licensed by the Greek National Organization for Medicines (EOF).

Renowned for its rich botanical ingredients, innovative approach, and patented formulas, La Vie en Rose has earned the trust of its customers. Beyond its scientific achievements, the company maintains a strong social presence, supporting people and organizations in need through acts of solidarity.

TTO (Tea Tree Oil) Thermal Natural Products: Body Care, Skin Care, Ophthalmic Prods., Dental Health, Sexual Health, Diabetic Prods., Hair Care and Special Products.

Our products are manufactured according to management and quality requirements of ISO 9001:2015, Medical Devices 93/42/EEC Directive, EN ISO 13485:2012, CE Declaration of Conformity. 

The management system of Jeomed has been assessed and found to comply with the requirements of Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP). The GMP System applies to the production, sale, and export of cosmetics, medical devices, food supplements, health and cleaning products, and disinfectants.
