Name: JAPONESQUE
Description: For almost 40 years, Japonesque has been committed to providing distinctive, premium beauty tools to help people celebrate the best of their personal beauty. What started as a color cosmetics brand has blossomed into a company with a portfolio of brands, JAPONESQUE, The Original MakeUp Eraser, and Barefoot Scientist, which are all dedicated to make the best tools and tips from make-up artists, estheticians, dermatologists, and beauty professionals accessible to more people.

Name: Skin Design London
Description:
Founded in 2017 by Fatma Shaheen, Skin Design London offers a pioneering approach to premium, science-led skincare. Named by the Financial Times as "one of the world’s best beauty destinations", Skin Design London deftly melds the worlds of prescription and luxury skincare, combining award-winning products and treatments to achieve globally innovative formulations and industry firsts.  

Skin Design London redefines cosmeceutical excellence, with an edit of skin-transforming formulations for optimal skin health. The pioneering and carefully edited product and treatment range, enriched with a powerhouse of active ingredients, marks a new era in performance-lead skincare, promising clinical style results without the downtime.

The creator and innovator behind Skin Design London is Fatma Shaheen, an award-winning skincare and clinical expert and hailed as a “Skin Designer To The Stars” by L’Officiel. Internationally renowned as one of the world’s leading skin experts, she is highly sought after and internationally celebrated. Fatma has been named “one of the most famous facialists in the world” by Vogue Italia, with her clinic being hailed as “a cult secret amongst those in the know.”

Name: It's a 10 Haircare
Description:
ALERT: We are aware of a scam whereby imposters are posing as employees from It’s A 10 Haircare. Please BEWARE of anyone reaching out from our Company and asking you to click a link, download a business proposal or a pdf document. We do not and will not reach out to vendors directly via their website or through LinkedIn.

Our story began with the idea that feeling good about your hair should be easy. Over the years, hair care has gotten confusing. Many brands have filled store shelves with an array of products that only seem to accomplish one thing. People have had to create their own concoction of products to get the results and hair health they are looking for.

It’s a 10 has changed that. Our hair care products provide exceptional results designed to deliver a combination of 10 benefits – all in one bottle.

Now, through our exclusive professional salon formulas, you can enjoy shine, hydration and healthy movement with just one product. We call it “strength in simplicity” and it will undoubtedly change the way you think about hair care. After 20 years in the making, It’s a 10 has become the best.

Learn more about our company here: https://itsa10haircare.com/pages/our-company

Name: Al Thiqa Pharmacy
Description:
We founded Al-Thiqa Pharmacy in 2016 with one goal in mind "prioritizing patients’ health and earning their trust". Since then, we pursued this goal by delivering superior care & helping our patients feel their best.

We are introducing innovative solutions & providing new services to exceed patients' expectations & deliver outstanding care. We now serve the whole island of Abu Dhabi with 8 branches, equipped with experienced pharmacists and teams offering one-of-a-kind services.

Our commitment won’t stop there; the effort continues, and we will continue to endeavor to provide the best care possible in a way that no one else can.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: LetsShave
Description:
LetsShave was founded on the desire to provide high-quality hair removal products and bring changes to boring routines in people's lives at a fair price.

Sidharth Shanker Oberoi, Founder & CEO LetsShave, began the journey in 2012 at a University Dorm in the United States, with the core value of providing Value, Quality, Fair Pricing, and World-Class Technology to every customer on the planet. We have made history by developing the world's first 6-Blade razor with a precision trimmer blade and launching India’s first V-Shaped BALLS trimmer. LetsShave products are now available globally via our website letsshave.com and on Amazon; thus expanding so that we reach every human and give them the LetsShave Experience.

Name: Pure Cosmeceuticals Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Mission:  
'Products that works '
Sounds simple right? But that's exactly it. 
Our aim is to create a 'Made in India' cruelty free brand that combines cutting edge synthetic ingredients and penetration technologies from west with time tested ayurvedic herbs and practices  that gives realistic results. No false marketing gimmicks but clear results.

Name: OXYENERGY
Description:
OXYENERGY: Premium Nutrition, Inspired by Nature

Born in Aotearoa (New Zealand), the land of the long white cloud and one of the last pure environments on Earth, OXYENERGY embodies the spirit of this pristine paradise. Surrounded by rugged mountains, untouched forests, and crystal-clear coastlines, New Zealand’s breathtaking landscapes have instilled in us a deep respect for nature and a commitment to purity, sustainability, and peak performance.  

At OXYENERGY, we harness the finest natural ingredients to craft essential, sport, advanced, and premium nutrition products that fuel active lifestyles and optimize well-being. Whether you're an elite athlete, a fitness enthusiast, or someone striving for a healthier life, our science-backed formulations are designed to deliver clean, effective, and high-performance nutrition.  

From our roots in New Zealand, we've expanded our reach to share OXYENERGY’s excellence globally. Today, we proudly serve not only our home market but also growing communities in China,Malaysia and the United States, bringing the purity and power of New Zealand's natural bounty to health-conscious consumers worldwide.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NOPALERA
Description: Nopalera is a Modern Mexican Beauty & Lifestyle brand made for the modern beauty explorer.

Name: Dermalogica France
Description: Nous souhaitons que chacun, homme ou femme, puisse obtenir une peau saine quelque soit sa condition de peau, quelque soit son style de vie. Révéler la santé de votre peau, c’est notre raison d’être et notre domaine d’expertise depuis plus de 35 ans.

Name: cosnova South Africa
Description:
cosnova is well-known for its popular beauty brands, Catrice and essence, with Catrice and essence being two of Germanys biggest selling makeup brands.

cosnova South Africa handles the distribution and marketing of Catrice and essence in the South African market. essence was launched in South Africa in 2009, and Catrice in 2012, with unprecedented success. Catrice and essence are widely available in various retail stores and online platforms in South Africa, offering accessible, high-quality and affordable beauty products to all, with both Catrice and essence being 100% cruelty free, vegan and free of microplastic particles.

cosnova South Africa is a subsidiary of cosnova Beauty, a global cosmetics company based in Germany. cosnova South Africa was previously known as Cosmetix South Africa; late in 2023, cosnova Beauty took over 100% of the shares in Cosmetix, its long-established distributor of Catrice Cosmetics and essence cosmetics in South Africa. This acquisition laid the foundation for the rebranding, from Cosmetix South Africa to cosnova South Africa in January 2025, thus solidifying cosnova South Africa as a full subsidiary of cosnova Beauty. This transition marks a key milestone in the company’s growth strategy and underscores the importance of the South African market in cosnova’s global vision.

Name: FRANCELAB
Description:
Part of International Marie Claire Group, FRANCELAB is the first beauty agency to combine art and technology for limitless beauty. We create and shape innovative beauty brands and products through a tailored and “à-la-carte” approach. 

From marketing to R&D, design, development, regulatory, manufacturing and logistics, our expert teams work seamlessly to support you in creating skincare, makeup, haircare, fragrance, and home products.

More than a service provider, FRANCELAB is a true business partner designed to accelerate your beauty growth, transforming your vision into iconic beauty brands and products, ready to stand out on the market.

Name: FROMM INTERNATIONAL LLC
Description: Founded in 1907, Fromm International is passionate about beauty and creates prestige hair tools with our consumers in mind.  Whether you are a stylist working with clients all day or a beauty enthusiast trying new looks at home, Fromm has what you need!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Vaince Cosmetics Private Limited
Description:
Vaince Cosmetics is a Private labeling and Contract manufacturing expert offering complete and comprehensive manufacturing support  to brand owners, FMCG giants, Start-ups. 
Right from ideation to execution, we support brand owners in short listing of products, packaging development, formulation development, FDA and FSSAI registrations, sample development and finally actual manufacturing.
We are the only company private labeling company offering manufacturing support of more than 10,000 + formulations from 5 different factories pan India.
We help the new product development to ideate and conceptualize products, shortlist and prioritize fast moving products, make effective formulations, freeze minimum order quantities with respect to packaging options, assist in label and creative art works, help with FDA registrations and launch products in a time bound manner.
We have multiple manufacturing facilities where we invest heavily in quality, certifications, packaging development, R&D and Cost optimization to deliver the best for our customers.

Our Factories are located in following regions:
- Western India: Navi Mumbai and Bhiwandi MIDC, Maharashtra
- North India: Solan, Himachal Pradesh
- South India: Hyderabad

Focused Sector:
- Cosmetics
- Pharmaceutical
- Nutraceutical
- Wellness
- Hygiene

Product Portfolio:
- Personal Care
- Home Care
- Female Hygiene
- Sexual Wellness
- Health Care
- Men's Grooming

Name: Porcelain Pte Ltd
Description:
Porcelain is a cult-premium skincare brand from Singapore founded by veteran aesthetician, Jenny and her daughter, Pauline with the vision to marry craftsmanship and technology to create the future of skincare. 

Guided by its key philosophy of achieving healthy skin from within, Porcelain Spa and Porcelain Skincare (its product range) has won more than 130 awards since inception in 2009.

Porcelain has been featured on Forbes, BBC, the Louis Vuitton City guide and won Best Beauty Spa in Asia (WLSA) for 10 consecutive years. An industry trailblazer, they own and operate three upscale spas including Singapore’s first smart-spa x wellness café concept store at Paragon Orchard.

A digital pioneer, they are highly tech-enabled, one product being a proprietary mobile app which tracks a client’s skincare journey and offers personalized prescriptions.

Through their uncompromising standards in products and service, Porcelain aims to be a lifelong beauty partner to journey with men and women through the evolution of their skin.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Karmameju Skincare
Description:
Karmameju is skincare with nature's ingredients and sense-awakening fragrances.

As we believe in the human connection with nature, we base our skincare on natural, bioactive and organic ingredients. Created with biotechnology, plant oils, plant extracts, essential oils and clinically proven ingredients.

Name: STENDERS
Description:
STENDERS is a premium bath and body care company founded in Riga, Latvia, in 2001. Inspired by the rich heritage of the Nordic region and the age-old practice of pirts (steam bathhouses), STENDERS creates premium bath and body care products that nourish the skin and uplift the spirit. The products are made using natural ingredients and include bath bombs, foams, salts, body butters, creams, lotions, oils, scrubs, and yoghurts, as well as hand creams and lotions. The company is dedicated to sustainability and ethical practices, striving to minimize its environmental footprint through sustainable packaging and responsible sourcing.

STENDERS is present in 30 countries globally. Since October 2024, the company has been part of the L’Catterton group

Name: Joanna Vargas
Description:
Joanna Vargas, recognized skin care expert and founder of her eponymous skin care collection, is focused on one thing: beautiful skin. Combining her commitment to plant-based ingredients and her passion for science, Joanna’s nature-meets-technology approach has made her one of the most sought-out estheticians and experts in the beauty industry today.

As her practice evolved and expanded, Joanna was inspired to apply her philosophy to a namesake skin care collection, making it possible for clients and fans everywhere to maintain their skin at home. In 2018, her Rescue Serum won the Allure Best of Beauty Award, and simultaneously her Super Nova Serum won InStyle’s Reader’s Choice Award. Joanna Vargas Skin Care products are now sold in retail stores internationally.

Name: skinsociety.me
Description:
At Skin Society, we believe that #beauty is all about feeling #InGoodSkin. 

Combining the health, beauty & wellness expertise of G Management Group under one roof, we offer a huge variety of retail products, services and parapharmacy goods to get you back into the world feeling and looking #InGoodSkin with the latest trends in mind to meet tomorrow's beauty needs! #EYESOPEN #SPOILYOURSKIN #BAREYOURSENSES #WEARASMILE for the ultimate unapologetic self care to tackle whatever life throws at you! 

We are your #ONEBeautyDestination!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Kess Berlin
Description:
Kess Berlin, die Beauty Brand aus Berlin mit vielen zufriedenen und regelmäßig wiederkehrenden Kund*innen. Unser Ziel ist es, die Bedürfnisse unserer Zielgruppe mit qualitativ hochwertigen und fair produzierten Produkten bestmöglich zu bedienen. Dies erreichen wir durch multifunktionale Produkte, die einfach anwendbar sind, sich gut in den Alltag integrieren lassen und Spaß machen.
Unser internationales Team voller kreativer Köpfe macht das möglich. Bei uns können Mitarbeiter*innen eigene Ideen entwickeln und umsetzen, Verantwortung übernehmen, sich entfalten und aktiv am Aufbau des stetig wachsenden Unternehmens mitwirken. Seit unserem Launch im Jahr 2019 konnten wir bereits einige Milestones feiern und erweitern unser Team stetig, um Kess gemeinsam auf das nächste Level zu heben.

Für weitere Infos: www.kessberlin.de
Instagram: @kessberlin
Pinterest: Kess Berlin

Name: Winky Lux
Description: Winky Lux was founded in 2015 with a JOYFUL mission to bring beauty lovers together with happier healthier products that delight every sense. We believe that the spirit of beauty is rooted in play and that thoughtfully produced products can be tools for self care, creative expression and even a way to spark new friendships. Our goal is to redesign the beauty industry into something more delightful. For us that means more transparent supply chains, closer customer relationships and ethically sourced ingredients that still provide real results! Join our party and see what all the pretty is about! Lots of love, Winky

Name: SkinClinic
Description:
SkinClinic se ha posicionado como una marca de “cosmética de resultados”. Más de 2.000 médicos de estética y dermatólogos en España recomiendan hoy sus productos. Son estos profesionales los que a diario aplican los cosméticos formulados por Cayetano Gutiérrez para SkinClinic en sus pacientes y quienes destacan su eficacia.
SkinClinic has positioned itself as a brand of ‘cosmetics with results’. Over 2,000 beauty and dermatology professionals in Spain recommend its products. These professionals are the ones who daily test on their patients the treatments formulated by Cayetano Gutiérrez for SkinClinic and who highlight their efficacy.

www.skinclinic.es
www.skinclinicshop.es

Name: Martine Cosmetics
Description:
Martine Cosmetics, marque de make-up vegan & cruelty-free, devenue incontournable dans le secteur de la beauté grâce à un univers résolument disruptif, des produits best-sellers et des collections originales. Inclusive et abordable, Martine Cosmetics propose des produits de haute qualité. 

Martine Skin, une gamme de skincare créée avec précision et une attention particulière à la composition des produits : naturelle, clean, sans superflu, vegan, cruelty-free, made in France, ageless et genderless. La marque prône une approche vulgarisée et des soins traitements compris par tous.

Description:

http://www.prescriptionlab.com/la-box

Name: ADCOS BH
Description:
A Adcos BH e a Adcos BH Profissional representam a marca Adcos em Belo Horizonte e Uberlândia nos Canais Home Care (cliente final) e também com o Canal Profissional (profissionais).

A marca, que está há mais de 30 anos no mercado, foi criada com a missão de disponibilizar soluções eficazes em tratamentos dermocosméticos que promovam a beleza com saúde.

Desde sua criação, sempre comprometida com a beleza e saúde da pele brasileira, a Adcos investe na pesquisa e no desenvolvimento de soluções inovadoras e eficazes em dermocosméticos. Nossos produtos são desenvolvidos com tecnologia de ponta e o conhecimento adquirido em anos de estudos científicos sobre cosmética de tratamento.

Hoje possui um portfólio com mais de 200 produtos específicos e adequados às necessidades da pele brasileira, todos dermatologicamente testados e aprovados, bem como alinhados às últimas tendências da cosmetologia mundial.

Sempre trabalhando para atender com ética e levar cada dia mais um atendimento diferenciado e personalizado para nossos clientes, o escritório hoje, é um Master Franqueado, sendo um dos maiores franqueados do Brasil, possuindo 7 lojas em Belo Horizonte e 1 em Uberlândia atendendo o Canal Home Care e 1 Showroom, além de uma equipe de televendas para atender o Canal Profissional.

Name: abril et nature
Description:
abril et nature es una compañía de desarrollo y producción de tratamientos capilares profesionales de alta calidad.

Se diferencia por la utilización de tecnología de última generación y una combinación totalmente innovadora de activos más tradicionales, llevando los productos finales a la máxima expresión en cuanto a resultados y efectividad.

Tratamientos específicos para cada problema o tipo de cabello, combinables además entre sí que permiten que los usuarios de sus productos disfruten de un pelo sano y de aspecto inmejorable desde el primer uso.

Células Madre, Queratina, Ácido Hialurónico, Manteca de Karité, Extracto de Caviar y acondicionadores catiónicos (que intercambian iones positivos con la fibra capilar para evitar el encrespamiento) entre otros muchos, son combinados en fórmulas específicas destinadas a reparar el daño que sufre el cabello durante el día a día.

Concienciada en el futuro de nuestro planeta, abril et nature produce sus productos en un moderno laboratorio de reciente diseño y construcción con certificación de la Agencia Española del Medicamento.

Con un catálogo adaptado a los nuevos tiempos, en donde se ofrecen muchas soluciones veganas y sin pruebas con animales desde el nacimiento de la empresa en 1998, abril et nature enfoca el futuro con la misma ilusión y ganas que en su nacimiento.

Compuesta por un equipo de reconocida experiencia y conocimiento, la compañía sigue desarrollando nuevos tratamientos cada año avanzando aún más en resultados y facilidad de uso.

La filosofía de abril et nature permite que la empresa sea una marca de presente y futuro.

Name: kaia naturals
Description:
Known for  effective  underarm routines: the takesumi detox and the takesumi bright, kaia naturals has helped consumers find success with natural deodorant and intimate body concerns

Providing solutions for common underarm concerns such as excess odor, sweat, dark spot pigmentation and the detox period that occurs when transitioning from antiperspirant to natural deodorant. 

Founded by beauty industry veteran Mary Futher (a.k.a. @MadameSweat on TikTok) who saw the complexities of often overlooked underarm problems and wanted to eliminate the stigma associated with unsexy body issues. 

kaia naturals is leading the clean underarm care category with a line of luxurious, high performance, cruelty-free and award-winning products made with plant-based ingredients and planet friendly packaging, specifically designed for problem underarms.

Our products have won awards from Allure, Nylon magazine and MindBodyGreen.

In 2017, Mary Futher, was one of ten female founders selected by SEPHORA across the U.S., Canada, Mexico and Brazil to participate in their SEPHORA Accelerate program. This exclusive mentorship program was created to support female entrepreneurs in all areas of the beauty industry with a focus on social impact.

OUR BACKSTORY:

In 2009, Mary Futher left her career in corporate beauty and set out to create her own clean beauty brand. Being a busy travelling senior executive Mary often found herself reaching for traditional makeup wipes, but would find they constantly irritated her eyes. Soon Mary began digging deeper into the ingredients used in her everyday beauty products and was shocked to find all the toxic ingredients she was putting onto her body every day. 

Launching first with juicy bamboo cleansing cloths, the brand has expanded to create more award-winning products like the takesumi detox charcoal deodorants, the underarm bar, the sweat powder, the takesumi bright collection, the takesumi detox overnight dry shampoo, and the vitamin cleanse.

Name: EM Cosmetics
Description:
"From the moment I drew the first line on my eyes, I understood that makeup was a powerful medium of self-expression. EM Cosmetics was created to give you the tools you need to express yourself—through colors, lines and other forms of creativity. Whether you are a new beauty enthusiast, a seasoned creator, or a bona fide pro artist, I hope you find our products to be refined, effortless and useful in your own personal journey of self-expression.
Through EM Cosmetics, I encourage you to claim your power, share your art, and above all—rethink beauty.
Good luck!"- Michelle Phan

Name: This Place
Description:
This Place is a nurturing haven for your well-being. Here is where Earth’s natural resources, peace of mind and body as well as and your own specific needs are treated with utmost care. 

Our products embody a passion for the healing powers of nature and respect for the captivating complexity of the human body. “Healthcare” and “holistic solutions” aren’t just words to us. They’re our foundation, a life’s mission that’s centered on physical, emotional, and mental self-care.

We are delivering soft support trough functional cosmetics for your everyday problems.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Millennium Babycares Ltd.
Description:
Millenium Babycares Pvt. Ltd. is a manufacturing company of self-care products like baby diapers, adult diapers, and sanitary napkins under the brand name: Bumtum Pants, Elduro, and Freeme. 

MBC Pvt. Ltd. was established in Indore, Madhya Pradesh with its manufacturing plant at Pithampur and has state-of-the-art imported machinery that produces quality products under a controlled environment. 

Millennium Babycares adheres to powerup self-care with hygiene checks keeping its consumer's demands in mind.

Name: &co. Cosméticos
Description:
A &co. é uma indústria cosmética especializada com mais de 10 anos de experiência no mercado. Nosso time oferece soluções personalizadas no desenvolvimento e fabricação de produtos ou linhas inteiras de cosméticos com a sua marca, nos formato private label, customização ou cobranding.

 

Temos uma estrutura completa para atende-lo em todas as etapas de produção: ideia, desenvolvimento, testes, regulamentação, industrialização, rotulagem, embalagem.

 

Possibilitamos a produção do seu produto, evoluímos para aprimorá-lo e agimos para crescermos juntos.

Description: We believe in the power of skincare as a self-care ritual. Myriad Beauty is an omni-channel retail store based in Qatar and offers cult beauty products from around the globe!

Name: PFC Cosmetics
Description:
You are our main commitment.
PFC Cosmetics is the brand of choice for professionals in search of complete, advanced and outstanding treatments. The best solution for those concerned about their health and beauty. 

Working side by side with professionals using top-quality products.
A GMP certified product with over 40 years experience in the cosmetic sector and pharmaceutical industry guarantee our demands on the quality and safety of our products.

Synergy-PFCnology. The most advanced, cutting-edge cosmetic techniques.
PFC Cosmetics revolutionizes the cosmetic sector with its unique, innovative technology Synergy PFCnology.
This technology relies on the application of the most advanced techniques in cosmetic active ingredient combinations, thus making this technology a unique process and increasing its effectiveness thanks to the synergy and interaction of its active ingredients.

Products developed under a single concept: effectiveness.
The high concentration of active ingredient and the technology used in their combination have resulted in highly effective products and treatments. 

Treatments and products together, result in an outstanding performance on your skin.
A wide range of specific products for meeting all the needs of your skin and rebuilding the skin’s architecture.  A comprehensive selection of treatments specifically designed by and for professionals, offer consumers a unique experience.

Expert research into skin care:  skin qualities, composition and evolution.
Years of experience in the knowledge and understanding of the evolution of skin structures over time, has enabled us to use of state-of-the-art cosmetic technologies to deal with the different weaknesses of each skin type.

We want our customer to be a Premium customer.
We strive for a relationship of trust beyond a plain and simple commercial relationship.  The technical support and service we offer is as exclusive as our customers.

Name: Claus Porto
Description:
The rich history of Claus Porto dates back to 1887, when it was established in the city of Porto, Portugal. For over four generations, Claus Porto has been renowned for crafting exquisite hand-finished soaps, fine fragrances, and cosmetics, blending European heritage with Portuguese artistry. Its iconic designs and timeless scents have made it a favorite among discerning customers worldwide. Today, Claus Porto continues to uphold a legacy of elegance and excellence in each of its creations.

Holding four collections – Deco, Classico, Agua de Colonia and Musgo Real –, it offers a wide range of products within the bath & body care, colognes and home fragrances categories, alongside a selection of lifestyle products such as notebooks, accessories and herbal teas.

Claus Porto has two free standing stores: its Flagship Store in Porto, the city of its birth, at Rua das Flores 22, the other in Lisbon, at Rua da Misericórdia 135, in Lisbon’s Chiado district.

The brand is present in 60 countries, sold in the world’s most prestigious stores, including Bergdorf Goodman, Neiman Marcus and Nordstrom in the United States; Liberty London in the UK; The Conran Shop in London & Paris; Le Bon Marché and Printemps in Paris; The Corner in Berlin; The Galeria, Belport and Shinsegai in South Korea; 10 Corso Como in Shangai and Seoul; Space.NK in China; and also online at Net-a-Porter and Mr Porter.

Name: Anubis Cosmetics

Contribuimos a la mejora del bienestar y la calidad de vida de la sociedad proporcionando a centros de estética, hoteles, Spa, Medical-Spa y clínicas estéticas, los tratamientos estéticos profesionales más avanzados.

Con 3 décadas de experiencia, presente en 39 países y una amplia gama de productos con 200 referencias faciales y corporales que cubren todas las necesidades de la piel, Anubis Cosmetics desarrolla tratamientos de alta eficacia y tecnología cosmética, unido a un equipo profesional comprometido y altamente cualificado, la convierte en referente del sector de la cosmética profesional y la posiciona entre las marcas líderes.

Name: RAMPAL LATOUR
Description: For 190 years, the men and women of our soap making business have contributed to its development. A strong set of values embodied by each and everyone : authenticity, quality, relationship, respect and tradition—are the basis and core components of our unique enterprise.

Name: Al Tafaol Trading Co. (TTC)
Description:

With over 35 years of experience, we have firmly established ourselves as a trusted provider of healthcare and beauty solutions in the Qatari market. Our portfolio includes a wide range of globally recognized brands, serving both professional and retail customers.
Our commitment to quality is reflected in our comprehensive product training programs, ensuring that we deliver the highest standards of knowledge and expertise.
By partnering with key sales networks throughout Qatar, we continue to strengthen our position, offering our customers the finest health and beauty products available.

By fusing passion and purpose with ingredient integrity, we are reimagining what it means to look good, feel good, and do good—all while working to leave the world better than we found it. Founded in 2007, marocMaroc is the result of a strong desire to pass on and promote this exceptional cultural heritage. Our teams have been striving to sublimate ancestral beauty rituals and develop original, innovative and exclusive skincare products.	

The marocMaroc range is composed of 25 products for the body, face and hair. We take a multi-channel approach to distribution, focusing on 3 main channels : retail, spa and online sales.	
 	
With more than 100 sales points worldwide, marocMaroc is a high-potential niche brand. Our products and treatments are available in various high-end spas, luxury hotels and selective perfumeries.

Esse é nosso compromisso com você!

Name: Bravi Distribuidora
Description:
Há 10 anos, a Bravi Distribuidora tem sido sinônimo de excelência na oferta de soluções profissionais em higiene, limpeza, descartáveis, maquinários e EPI's. Com distribuição própria nos estados de Alagoas, Pernambuco, Paraíba e Rio Grande do Norte, e sendo um dos líderes de mercado na região Nordeste do Brasil, nos orgulhamos de fornecer aos nossos clientes um extenso portfólio de produtos de alta qualidade dos principais fabricantes do setor como a Unilever, Spartan, Becker, Santher, Kunber, Volk do Brasil, Hálito Puro, Plumax, Brinox, Nutriex, Cheiro Bom, além da marca própria Bravi Mais.

Nossa missão é clara: tornar o cuidado e a higiene profissional um sucesso garantido para nossos clientes. Estamos comprometidos em fornecer soluções abrangentes que atendam às necessidades específicas de cada negócio, desde pequenas empresas até grandes corporações. 

Na Bravi, valorizamos o relacionamento com nossos clientes e entendemos que cada um deles é único. Nossa equipe comercial altamente capacitada está pronta para ouvir suas demandas, entender seus desafios e fornecer a melhor orientação possível, selecionando os produtos mais adequados para suas necessidades, garantindo um alto desempenho e resultados impecáveis.

Além de oferecer um mix com mais de 3 mil itens, também fornecemos assistência técnica completa. Nossos especialistas estão disponíveis para auxiliar nossos clientes com instalação, manutenção e treinamento, oferecendo suporte total para que você obtenha o máximo de cada produto adquirido conosco.

Estamos aqui para fornecer soluções inovadoras, serviços excepcionais e uma parceria confiável. Junte-se a Bravi e experimente a diferença de trabalhar com uma empresa comprometida com sua satisfação.

With us, you gain 360-degree support in all aspects of your life — we root for your financial freedom, health, wellness and beauty as a community of close friends, partnering with you in ways never done before. We’re with you every step of the way because with Partner.Co, you make a connection that counts for life.

Name: Moehair USA Inc
Description:
Over a decade ago, Moehair embarked on a journey to create a nature friendly, diversity-embracing haircare line. In our progress to success, we have pioneered our vision of reinventing haircare that aligns with nature and establishes a perfect foundation to serve the haircare needs of millions of people across the globe.

Our humble beginnings started next to California, USA with the dream of creating a solution based, resolution centric, effective haircare brand. We are exponentially broadening our horizon to celebrate beauty in all forms of diversity with the perfect fusion of quality ingredients and innovative technology.

What began as a passionate project by our founders, has grown into an amalgamation of science and nature to develop a full line of haircare products, infused with the goodness of natural antioxidants, proteins, oils and butters. 

We believe all hair is beautiful and we are passionate towards making it last a lifetime with our haircare collection. Our products and passion have stood the test of time, offering high quality, safe and sustainable hair care to global communities.

Today, Moehair is loved across the United States, Canada, Australia, Middle East & UAE, S. Africa and Egypt, making products that make you feel good in your own skin and hair.

In our direct journey from salons to our customers, we are dedicated to realizing and empowering positive hair transformations, worldwide.

Name: Kamedis Ltd.
Description:
Kamedis is the groundbreaking dermocosmetic brand behind an award-winning collection of clinically-proven, dermatologist-tested botanical skincare products.

Founded in 2003 by expert TCM practitioner Roni Kramer, Kamedis combines ancient wisdom with state-of-the-art modern knowhow to relieve chronic skin conditions like atopic dermatitis, seborrhea, psoriasis, and more. The result is an exclusive collection of OTC dermocosmetics that brings together East and West, tradition and innovation, safety and effectiveness.

All Kamedis products are based on our proprietary Botaniplex system. Using industry-established research methods, we have harnessed the benefits of TCM botanicals and other key ingredients to create powerful dermocosmetic and OTC solutions that relieve skin conditions and rebalance the skin’s natural barrier. These products are free of parabens, dyes, bleaches, steroids, and tar, and have prebiotic properties.

Kamedis is positioned at a unique intersection, creating effective dermocosmetics products with proven botanical formulas based on years of in-depth research and extensive clinical testing. We offer not only revolutionary products, but also a completely different approach to skincare.

Today, Kamedis products are sold worldwide, across the USA, Asia, and the EU. We are very proud to have recently won the 2019 Allure Best of Beauty Award (Best Body Moisturizer: Eczema), and our researchers are frequently published in top dermatology journals.

Name: Grænn A/S
Description:
Grænn shapes the future of Scandinavian Beauty through bold brand building and consumer-driven innovation. 

We create, build and acquire Scandinavian beauty brands. We aim to be the leading international authority in Nordic Beauty with strong Scandinavian values.

"Grænn" is the Icelandic word for green, and we have chosen this as our company name as a Scandinavian reference to the universal green symbolism. Green symbolises new beginnings and growth. It signifies renewal and abundance, and it evokes a feeling of hope, responsibility and energy. All words that describe us as a company. 

We are the parent company of the market leading Danish makeup brand Nilens Jord; the fast growing beauty brand Miild, and Flora Danica Beauty - the premium beauty brand inspired by the iconic Danish encyclopaedia Flora Danica from 1761. We are also a subsidiary of Matas Group; the leading Nordic beauty retailer with revenues exceeding one billion €.

Please send job applications to jobs@graenn.com and not via our DM on LinkedIn.

Description:
Royal Sanders is een snelgroeiende Europese producent en leverancier van persoonlijkeN verzorgingsproducten. 
Ons bedrijfsproces bestaat uit het ontwikkelen, produceren en distribueren van een breed assortiment producten zoals shampoos, crèmes, lotions en deodorants. 
Wij produceren voor private labels van bekende winkelketens in binnen- en buitenland en wij zijn actief op het terrein van contractmanufacturing voor aansprekende, internationale merken. Ook hebben wij een aantal eigen merken waaronder Van Gils, Odorex, Sanicur en Melkmeisje. 

Onze vestiging in Nederland zit in Vlijmen (bij Den Bosch), onze Belgische vestiging zit in Ieper en in de UK werken wij vanuit Bradford en vanuit Preston (bij Manchester).  
Royal Sanders heeft een sterke focus op continuous improvement. Op die manier realiseren wij duurzame groei en halen wij solide financiële resultaten.

Name: The Doux
Description:
Available at Walmart, Target, Sally Beauty, CVS, Walgreens + More!

The Doux (pronounced DO) was created by licensed cosmetologist, Maya Smith. With 27-years in the hair game, she's a certified O.G. She's worked internationally with thousands of women of all hair textures, opened 2 salons, and racked up hella receipts styling more curls on her worst day than the average "influencer" touches in a year. 

The Doux is an award-winning brand of super-fresh, texture-focused solutions inspired by Maya's life as a stylist and her love for the Culture. Merging old-school flava with new-school science, she developed a range of simple, multi-functional formulas designed to put an end to the complicated regimens and conflicting information that are shattering your confidence. At the Doux, we keep it sucka-free by ignoring the yip-yap and fake ingredient hype. Instead, we show & prove by Douxing the work & taking you back to the basics.

When you rock with us, you can be confident that every single product has been tested in our salon on real people with hair like yours. Our professional-quality formulas are rooted in real facts, verifiable science, decades of hands-on experience, and a whole lot of common sense. Our non-toxic, cruelty-free fragrances bring all the feels, transporting you back to some of your dopest memories.

"I believe that your hair, no matter what letter/number you choose to identify, is perfect. I'm not here to fix you. I'm here to tell you the truth about what's really going on with your hair and to educate, equip & inspire you to love it unconditionally. DOUX YOU." - Maya Smith, CEO

Name: withinUs
Description:
Our Mission is simple yet profound: to create safe, effective, and exceptional products that enhance the lives of our customers and their families while safeguarding the planet and giving back to our community.

The withinUs Philosophy is our unwavering guide, reflecting our core values and principles. We ensure that every sustainable product we introduce is of the highest quality. As our mission evolves, so does our dedication to making better, more sustainable products and being a responsible corporate citizen. We embrace innovation and development, constantly seeking ways to improve and grow, understanding that the pursuit of excellence, sustainability, and community support is never complete.

Core Values:
Honesty: Transparency in all our actions.
Sustainability: Commitment to the planet's well-being.
Community: Supporting and giving back to our community.
Well-being: Prioritizing the health of our customers.

Together, we aim to make wellness, sustainability, and community support a way of life, transforming individuals and communities one step at a time.

Name: Umberto Giannini Hair Cosmetics
Description:
Award-winning British hairdressing, products and salons with a history of creativity and innovation - established in 1990 by Umberto Giannini. In-house creative innovation extensively distributed in the UK through Boots and www.umbertogiannini.com and now internationally. B Corp certified, 100% vegan and cruelty free.


VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE
We never use animal or animal derived ingredients in our products, salon tools or food served at our events. We will never buy from or work with partners who don't feel the same. Umberto Giannini became a member of PETA in 2018 and is now officially recognised for this. 

ENVIRONMENT
There's a long way to go for the beauty industry to reduce waste, carbon footprint and emissions but we are committed to always looking for the most environmentally friendly ways to make our products. We use UK suppliers wherever possible. Currently 100% of our range is made in the UK. Our packaging is fully recyclable when empty. 

WORKERS' RIGHTS
We never want to be supporting industries that don't live up fair pay for a fair day of work. All of our supply partners feel the same and every factory, supplier and harvester is checked and approved before we work together. 

Umberto Giannini is reinventing haircare.

Name: MARION Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Marion – Piękno każdego dnia.

Lokalnie i globalnie:
Marion to polska, dynamicznie rozwijająca się firma kosmetyczna, która od lat tworzy innowacyjne produkty do pielęgnacji włosów, twarzy i ciała. Nasze kosmetyki są dostępne w ponad 34 krajach, łącząc wysoką jakość z nowoczesnymi technologiami.

Ekspercka wiedza i najwyższe standardy:
Za sukcesem Marion stoi zespół specjalistów, którzy dbają o każdy etap powstawania kosmetyków – od badań naukowych i mikrobiologicznych, przez kontrolę jakości, aż po nowoczesną produkcję. Dzięki innowacyjnemu podejściu i dbałości o detale nieustannie podnosimy standardy branży beauty.

Dla klientów indywidualnych i biznesowych:
Marion to nie tylko marka kosmetyczna, ale także zaufany partner w produkcji private label. Oferujemy kompleksową obsługę – od opracowania receptury, przez produkcję, aż po konfekcjonowanie. Dysponujemy jednym z największych parków maszynowych w Polsce, co pozwala nam realizować najbardziej wymagające projekty.

Tworzymy piękno na co dzień – dla Ciebie i Twojego biznesu.

Name: Heathcote & Ivory
Description:
Heathcote & Ivory is a forward-looking, quintessentially British beauty company based in Queens Park in London. Led by Denis Aaronson, the company has built a reputation over twenty years for its award-winning expertise in producing beautifully crafted and scented products and gifting collections for bath, body, wellness and lifestyle, peppered with British wit and charm. Committed to creating products that adhere to the highest sustainability levels possible Heathcote & Ivory is working tirelessly to innovate and excel.

Values of authenticity, kindness, commitment and responsibility underpin the ethos of this family-run business. Heathcote & Ivory is dedicated to helping elevate everyday self-care rituals with vibrant collections and brand collaborations with imaginative stories and a helping of fun. Heathcote & Ivory is sought after by leading brands, creatives, not for profit organisations and charities to design and produce collections that reimagine the brand’s iconic designs, heritage and DNA for today.

Name: Mad Hippie
Description:
Mad Hippie was built on the notion that natural skin care can be every bit as effective as traditional. We never formulate with Parabens, synthetic fragrance, dyes, petrochemicals, PEGs, SLS and other nasty additives.  In fact, they have no place in the products we, and those we love, put on our bodies.

Here at Mad Hippie we take skin care seriously, but we also take corporate responsibility seriously.

We appreciate the faith a customer puts into a company when buying their line, and that’s why we strive to always make the safest, most effective products possible while also working to limit our carbon footprint and impact on the planet.

So, give our natural skin care a try & feel good knowing you are taking a step towards healthier, more beautiful skin, while we work together towards a healthier, more beautiful planet.


GIVING BACK:
We take our responsibility to the planet seriously & that’s why we are always working to further reduce our carbon footprint and impact on the environment.  From utilizing reusable packaging & bioresin sugarcane tubes, to printing with soy inks on FSC certified paper, giving $1 of every web sale to conservation, and controlling our downstream waste through a partnership with Terracycle, Mad Hippie is dedicated to the preservation of the planet. 


Benefits of working for Mad Hippie:
- Warm, supportive team
- Positive impact on the industry pushing for safety & sustainability
- Gold level health insurance provided free to all FT team members
- Matching 4% 401K
- Paid community service
- Fast growing industry leader - #1 selling natural skin product in the US (SPINS 2022)

Name: Secrets de Miel
Description:
En créant Secrets de Miel, j’ai voulu créer du lien et des moments de partage autour de ma passion familiale pour l’Apithérapie :

En faisant découvrir à mes proches comment prendre soin d’eux naturellement grâce à la magie de la nature.

En offrant l’opportunité à chacun et chacune de partager ces secrets lors de moments authentiques de convivialité entre amis, voisins, collègues etc.

Secrets de Miel, c’est du bonheur à partager avec ses proches. Chaque Api’Time est une expérience unique de découverte, de fun et de partage. Une occasion de se chouchouter, de tester, goûter, échanger des astuces et des secrets de bien-être, tout cela sans stress ni contrainte et en toute convivialité.

Secrets de Miel, c’est aussi l’opportunité de se créer un revenu en prenant soin des autres ! C’est donner le pouvoir aux femmes d’être aux manettes de leur vie et d’entreprendre sans risque, à temps choisi !

C’est du bonheur pour tous, c’est un engagement pour un monde plus humain et un mode de vie social, local et durable.

Nous recrutons dans toute l'Europe !

A empresa tem como premissa um processo que vai ao desenvolvimento e acompanhamento do que é fabricado, até a finalização da embalagem que, acima de tudo, deve traduzir a realidade do que contém.

O compromisso da marca é manter a qualidade de tudo que desenvolve, utilizando as melhores matérias-primas e tecnologia de ponta na fabricação. A Intt trabalha incansavelmente em prol da sexualidade e do bem-estar, com finalidade de aumentar a intimidade e promover o prazer.

Name: The Merchant of Venice
Description:
The Merchant Of Venice represents the Art of Perfumery of Venice. It draws attention to the everlasting role of the city as an essential force in the perfumery tradition throughout the world, and it is intended to highlight the tradition that made Italy, and particularly Venice, central to the history of perfumery. The Merchant Of Venice is a luxury line that offers a large assortment of exclusive Eau de Parfum and Eau de Toilette, along with body care and household products and accessories.

The line is inspired by the “Mude,” the maritime trade routes that covered a very large area from Asia to Africa, and on to Europe as far as the Northern Seas. The “Mude” started from Venice and reached many different harbours, which in turn were the destination of other commercial routes. These ports were the exchange centres for raw materials and finished products.

This system enabled the Republic of Venice to acquire the knowledge and raw materials that otherwise it could not directly attain from within its own mainland. Through master craftsmen such as the muschieri (perfumers), venditori de polvere di Cipro (Cyprus powder haberdashers) and the saoneri (soap makers), new techniques of production were invented that made the Venetian perfumes and cosmetics highly sought after products in all the Royal Courts of Europe

Name: Les Bénéfiques, Vous allez enfin TOUT savoir !

Like us, you think that something which is not good for your health should not be good for the planet either. We, as Les Bénéfiques, think that we must be back to basis in the way we consume in our everyday life, with made in France products, with local ingredients, zero waste at max, recycling in every step, shortening distribution as much as possible... You must be one of Les Bénéfiques without knowing it... to discover more about our brand and entrepreneur experience, follow us also on instagram @les benefiques (https://www.instagram.com/lesbenefiques)

Name: Rhea Cosmetics
Description:
Rhea is a skincare company that brings the tailor made concept to professional cosmetics.  

Mixing Rhea products it’s actually possible to obtain 31 billion different combinations, meeting the specific needs of every skin type. When properly used by the beautician, they are very powerful tools which allow total customization for each and every client. A special method of stratification to perform professional treatments, Rhea Layerin, permits even further personalization opportunities.  

Age, gender, ethnicity: all these categories are outdated because Rhea thinks of every single skin as a self-standing category.

This approach requires, by its very nature, a new professional attitude and technical skills.

Here’s why Rhea involves the beautician in a holistic training programme, providing the essential tools to evolve into the Dermotecnologist: a specialist who is able to deeply analyze the skin and create freshly prepared cosmetics and tailor-made treatments.  

Rhea Cosmetics is a kind of revolution: it broadens the views of the beauty industry with a new, person-centered approach to skin, it fosters the formation of the beautician who becomes a true skincare creator and provider, and it proposes a contemporary image that brings back real people as the center of attention. Name: Pechoin
Description:
【起源】
1931年，上海富贝康公司（百雀羚前身）引进德国配方，中国第一代护肤品成功问世；

【扬名】
自30年代起，百雀羚独有的芳香就伴随着沪上巨星引领一个时代的芳华，甚而当时的政商名媛也备为推崇代表东方时尚的百雀羚，由此百雀羚以“东方美韵，护肤精品”享誉海内外；

【发展】
80年代后，国内首创肌肤由单纯的“保护”诉求，进入全面“护理、滋养”的护肤新理念，旗下系列产品风靡全国；

【兴盛】
2000年起，产品和技术不断升级超越，百雀羚止痒润肤露、有“中国小黄油”美称的凡士林霜、甘油一号、 护发素等明星产品畅销全国。“百雀羚”多次荣获上海著名商标称号；

【辉煌】
2007年，“百雀羚”荣获“中国驰名商标”称号；2008年，作为中国传统医学与先进科技的完美结合，百雀羚草本系列隆重上市；

【腾飞】
2010年，百雀羚草本•水嫩倍现保湿系列华丽上市，开启草本护肤新时代，成为草本护肤市场的超越之作！

【领先】
2011年，百雀羚喜迎80华诞，社会各界共同见证中国经典护肤品牌的不老传奇。草本水嫩倍现保湿系列市场份额极速增长，引领东方草本护肤新风尚;

【跨越】
2012年，百雀羚品牌成功走向国际舞台，绽放东方之美；7000万重金中标2013《中国好声音》独家特约赞助商，并追加3000万硬广投入，总投资达1亿元，携手中国最火爆的音乐娱乐节目，共同打造天然好草本。重金投入3000万夺得2013《中国好声音》搜狐视频全程联合赞助，引爆网络收视狂潮。“百雀羚”号遨游黄浦江，上演王者归来；

【创见】
2014年，百雀羚以1.53亿再夺第三届《中国好声音》独家特约，大传播战略引爆品牌大势；众多美妆行业奖项印证良好产品口碑，全年线上线下销售持续领跑国内护肤品牌；

【创领】
2015年，百雀羚继续联姻《中国好声音》、《快乐大本营》等强势媒体节目，全年总投放超6亿；多个全新系列产品跃然问世，百雀羚以更丰富的草本护肤佳品引领国内化妆品市场新的巅峰！

【启新】
2016年，百雀羚喜迎85周年，作为中国第一代护肤品牌，以工匠之心打造东方护肤臻品，让东方之美在世界盛放！以成就为起点，全新启程。

Name: MedSkin Solutions Dr. Suwelack AG
Description:
MedSkin Solutions Dr. Suwelack emphasizes intensive research to utilize biological modes of action for use in medical care, aesthetic care and professional skin care. By stimulating biological regeneration processes, we restore lost skin and tissue functionality. These are powerfully-acting biomechanisms that fulfill even the highest demands.

The key to our unique innovations at MedSkin Solutions Dr. Suwelack is a Combination of Biological Mechanisms which occur in nature but don’t usually act together.

Our solutions are the result of scientific research and technological leadership. The Advanced CryoSafe Method developed by Wolfgang Suwelack preserves and refines the natural properties of biomaterials. It also allows for both application-specific modulations and highly precise reactivation of their functionalities.

Our solutions and products are developed in close collaboration with physicians, scientists  and skin care experts working in related fields, enabling them to be custom-fit, trendsetting, effective and cost-efficient.

Innovative drive, passion and quality awareness have made MedSkin Solutions Dr. Suwelack a successful globally-networked company.

This encourages us to work in conjunction with customers, patients, clients, business partners and employees on current and future scientific concepts designed for people’s health and wellbeing.

Description:

Today, we have access to emerging active ingredients that are safe, clean and environmentally friendly, naturally and continuously sourced without dependence on exploited land, animals or climatic conditions. Name: Mendu Herbs
Description:
About Us
Welcome to Mendu Herbs, your premier source for pure Shilajit resin, meticulously sourced from the pristine peaks of the Himalayas. We are dedicated to bringing you the purest and most potent Shilajit, renowned for its numerous benefits and historical significance.

Our Products
At Mendu Herbs, we focus on offering high-quality Shilajit resin in its most natural form. Our pure Shilajit resin retains all its beneficial properties, providing you with an authentic and potent product for your wellness needs.

Our Commitment to Ayurveda
Mendu Herbs is deeply rooted in the principles of Ayurveda, the ancient holistic healing system. Our mission is to enhance your well-being by providing natural products that align with Ayurvedic practices. While we currently specialize in pure Shilajit resin, we are committed to expanding our range to include various other natural products in the future.

Our Services
Beyond providing exceptional Shilajit resin, Mendu Herbs is committed to customer satisfaction through:

Educational Resources: Comprehensive guides and articles to help you understand the benefits and uses of Shilajit and its role in Ayurveda.
Customer Support: Dedicated support team to assist you with any inquiries and ensure a seamless shopping experience.
Quality Assurance: Rigorous testing and quality control processes to guarantee the authenticity and effectiveness of our products.

We believe in the power of nature and strive to deliver Shilajit in its most authentic form. Thank you for choosing Mendu Herbs. We look forward to being a part of your wellness journey and supporting your Ayurvedic lifestyle.

Name: Prem Green Private Limited
Description:
Prem Green Pvt Ltd has a humble origin. We started from a small town by the name of Sojat in Rajasthan. But we have great ambition to become one of the largest producers of beauty products in the country.

It was a hard road no doubt about it, but we persisted and now we are one of the biggest manufacturers and suppliers of henna, Mehandi cone and Mehandi powder in India. We have a pan India presence, but we did not stop there. We have presence in many countries like the USA, Dubai, UK and many more.

We started with henna, Mehandi cone and Mehandi powder and all its derivative products, however that was just the beginning. After we have established ourselves as the dominant presence in the henna, Mehandi cone and Mehandi powder. We entered into other segments of the FMCG like personal care and hair care products.

Currently we manage 6 brands under Prem Green (Prem Dulhan, Enega, Vakola, Neera, Kuhu and Yaksha) that cater all kinds of beauty needs for everyone, ranging from products for professional and hair salons to one time use for products for the everyday consumer for ease of use.

We have something for everyone.

Little Extra is a modern personal care brand built on one simple belief: safe and effective care comes from honest science, transparent formulations, and nature-inspired ingredients.

Name: Elfa Pharm Polska
Description:
Vis Plantis - means the power of plants in Latin.  We believe that they have the power to stay healthy and beautiful for longer. What is simple and natural is best for us, which is why we derive the most valuable and beautiful ingredients of our cosmetics from nature.
The effectiveness of our products is based on years of experience, scientifically proven solutions as well as commitment, reliability and honesty that guide us. We are convinced that it is not the high price of a product that determines the quality, but the effects of its operation and customer satisfaction. All this to guarantee consumers effective and comprehensive skin, body and hair care.
Our portfolio includes several brands dedicated to the needs of women and men: Vis Plantis, so! Flow, Gift of Nature, Element Cosmetics and Vis Plantis Professional. Our products combine the highest quality raw materials of natural origin with modern technologies. The active ingredients of our cosmetics are carefully selected and imported from the best suppliers in the world. Their operation is confirmed by certificates from renowned European laboratories and the opinion of millions of people around the world. In our products, we avoid the use of parabens, SLS and other artificial ingredients harmful to the environment and the skin. We do not test on animals, we do not use raw materials tested on animals, or those that could cause them suffering.
Within a few years, we have gained wide recognition among consumers not only in Poland, but also abroad. Currently, we export our products to most countries in Western and Central and Eastern Europe, as well as to the United States, Malaysia, Taiwan and the Persian Gulf countries.
Cosmetics are available on the shelves of the best pharmacies and drugstores throughout the country, as well as in our online store  www.visplantis.pl
Discover the power of plants that comes from our cosmetics. Welcome to the world of Vis Plantis

Name: Zelens
Description:
Zelens represents a new generation of skincare developed using breakthrough scientific research in the biological functions of the skin.

Our innovation is driven by founder Dr. Marko Lens' 20 years of research in skin ageing, his clinical experience as a plastic and reconstructive surgeon and his deep knowledge of formulation chemistry combining active biotechnology ingredients with pure molecules derived from botanicals.

Combining biotechnology and botanicals is not enough. Zelens products combine powerful high-performance active biotechnology ingredients with the unique blend of plant-derived molecules with potent anti-ageing and healing properties.

But simply combining ingredients derived from both sources does not create truly effective skin care. Ingredients must be carefully selected, science-backed and integrated in a formula to work in synergy. Only the exact balance and synergistic action of all ingredients can effectively trigger cellular processes necessary for skin regeneration and repair.

The sophisticated technology of our formulations including multiple ingredients that work in balance and synergy is essential to the remarkable effectiveness of Zelens products.

The leading edge in skin care. Always. Zelens' consistent skincare innovation is the result of Dr. Lens' continuous research, development and testing. Every Zelens product represents the most advanced, most effective skincare technology available anywhere.

Other good things to know:
Zelens products are extensively tested for safety and efficacy by renowned independent laboratories. Zelens uses no animal testing and no animal-derived ingredients. Zelens uses no parabens. Zelens is committed to eco-responsibility.
