Name: Gloss Express
Description:
Somos a Gloss Express, uma empresa que une saúde e estética em produto e revolução em modelo de negócio. 

Atuamos desde 2020 e estamos presentes em oito países, sendo Brasil, Portugal, Japão, Angola, Estados Unidos, Inglaterra, Paraguai e Bolívia. Estamos em mais de 10 mil salões e já atendemos aproximadamente 1 milhão de clientes.

Criamos uma coloração única especializada em pigmentação de fios brancos que alcança até 7 tons, do castanho escuro ao loiro claríssimo em até 20 minutos. 

Nosso propósito é levar excelência e resultado a todos os profissionais cabeleireiros, oferecendo produtos com diferenciais únicos para atender todas as mulheres.

Nosso objetivo é devolver a cor com naturalidade.

Mais cor, menos branco. Vem ser Gloss!

Name: Cosmetic Creations
Description:
With over 40 years’ experience in contract formulation and manufacturing, our expert team in Mayo work closely with our valued clients to make their ideas a reality. 
We develop award winning products. From skincare and self-tanners to supplements and cosmetics, we're passionate about using the best ingredients possible to deliver bespoke products that adhere to the highest standards of manufacturing practices. 

Cosmetic Creations provides an extensive product development and formulation service, product registration and dossier preparation with the Irish Medicines Board, and an ongoing consultancy and support service. Our customers vary from local and national operators to multinational companies.

Formerly LYNOSLIFE.

Name: Forenqui Laboratorios
Description:
At Laboratorios Forenqui, we create products that inspire, innovate and respond to market demands. Since 1987 we have been developing products through our brands Anian and Foresan and we help our customers to develop products that make a difference and connect with consumer needs. We formulate and manufacture 100% in Spain and have a presence in the main international markets.

You can find out more about our own brand Anian at www.anian.es.

Name: Furtuna Skin
Description: At Furtuna Skin, we are botanists, farmers, and skincare experts. Learning from the lands, and advancing in the labs, we create transformative skincare from our proprietary olive oil and the wildly potent botanicals sourced sustainably from our organic estate in Sicily.

Name: Marco Aldany
Description:
Marco Aldany es la Cadena Líder de Peluquería y Estética en España que cuenta con la experiencia de más de 400 aperturas en todo el mundo y más de 4000 estilistas.
 
Su imagen vanguardista, urbana, actual e innovadora y sus excelentes servicios, han convertido a Marco Aldany en la firma clave que impulsa el negocio de la estética y la belleza en nuestro país, con más de 6,5 millones de visitas.
 
Desde su nacimiento, en el año 1997, apostó por ser el referente del sector; rompió con el concepto tradicional de peluquería y revolucionó el panorama con su potente imagen de marca, una decoración única, el horario ininterrumpido más amplio y la más completa carta de servicios, productos y tratamientos de calidad a un precio muy competitivo. Este nuevo concepto además, integraba procesos de trabajo, tecnología, gestión de negocio, formación y marketing con el único objetivo de satisfacer al cliente y crear una relación rentable, segura y duradera para el franquiciado.

Name: Susteau
Description: Susteau creates clean, conscious, concentrated haircare inspired by the future. Our science-backed brand is the first to deliver transformative powder-to-liquid formulas that are designed with people and planet in mind. Efficacy meets sustainability with our futureproof haircare. Join us in rethinking the routine.

Name: Otowil
Description: Generar lazos estratégicos con nuestros clientes para mejorar las propuestas en el mercado. Desarrollar productos de excelencia y ser elegidos principalmente por la calidad de nuestros productos.

Name: Pharma Cos s.r.l.
Description:
Pharma Cos is a B2B company specialized in the production of cosmetic makeup. Thanks to our modern laboratories of R&D and our fittings of production, we offer a complete range of products for the make-up. 
Conscious of the company's experience, now our desire is to embrace new challenges.

Name: Serge Lutens
Description:
Over the past five decades, the career of legendary Serge Lutens has followed a most untraditional path. 
Propelled by an insatiable curiosity and sincere love for the mystique of femininity, he has seen success as a make-up artist, photographer, designer, creative director, filmmaker and of course perfumer. 
He is driven by his passions from one project to the next, and his vision has led many revolutions in the world of beauty and perfume. 
In 1992, the launch of the Féminité du bois, the first unisex ever created, was considered a revolution. Spurred by its success, Serge Lutens decided to create his own brand in 2000. 

His 80 fragrances reveal something of a person’s character, bringing out the true personality of the wearer, placing him as an amazing storyteller and a unique perfume creator.

As a multi-talent visionary, his high-definition makeup line brings together beauty essentials with an expert selection of cosmetics. 
The brand reflects its authentic, bold creator who conceives creations without concession, in an inimitable style. 
Discover the universe of Serge Lutens and experience the wonder of his unique creations.

Name: Laboratoires ARVAL S.A.
Description:
Laboratoires Arval is a distinguished, family-owned cosmetics company with deep Italian heritage, perfected through Swiss craftsmanship. For over 70 years, we have been the leading company dedicated to excellence, combining advanced technology with decades of expertise. Our commitment goes beyond delivering superior products; we bring a legacy of tradition and innovation to everything we create.

Our Expertise:
Laboratoires Arval specializes in comprehensive cosmetic solutions, from concept to production. We offer a full range of services including Marketing Development, Product Conceptualization, Formulation, and Production across skincare segment. Whether you require bulk production, full-service development, or white label, we are your ideal partner for creating impactful and successful cosmetic products.

Our Commitment:
We are committed to excellence and sustainability, ensuring that each product reflects our dedication to quality and environmental responsibility. Our advanced laboratories and expert team work tirelessly to meet and exceed your brand's expectations, delivering products that stand out in the market.

Join us in shaping the future of cosmetics with Laboratoires Arval, where Swiss craftsmanship meets innovative beauty solutions.

Name: Toddle
Description: As a parent, every day is an adventure! We make skin care gentle enough for babies, but tough enough to weather the elements. Toddle is an innovative British skin-care company that exists to protect your little adventurers.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MAXIM Markenprodukte GmbH & Co. KG
Description: MAXIM Markenprodukte liefert alles aus einer Hand und in direkter Zusammenarbeit. Welches Produkt aus dem kosmetischen Sektor auch gewünscht ist, wir finden eine Lösung, um Kunden-Wunsch und Umsetzbarkeit zu vereinen. All dies nach entsprechenden Vorgaben und dennoch frei in der Innovation. MAXIM verkauft nicht nur ein Produkt, sondern ein Gefühl. Dabei verlieren wir nie den Blick auf die Zukunft und legen in unserer Arbeit einen hohen Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit.

Name: Scandinavian Biolabs
Description:
Scandinavian Biolabs is a striving Danish brand that creates solutions for hair growth. Our products are all made from non-toxic, powerful and natural ingredients. We advocate innovation through naturally-derived ingredients and full transparency when it comes to the production process. 
Our goal is to bring a complete solution against hair loss - for hair growth. Scandinavian Biolabs' unique Bio-Pilixin Formula in the Hair Growth Routine stimulates a healthier and stronger hair growth while prolonging the lifetime of the hair fibres. 
Above all, our mission is to offer products which help to regain and boost self-confidence by addressing the struggle people are facing when it comes to hair loss.

Name: Bryan & Candy
Description:
Bryan & Candy is where luxury meets self-care. As a premier bath and body care brand, we are committed to crafting indulgent experiences that elevate your everyday routine. Our wide range of products, inspired by the vibrant and diverse world around us, transforms daily self-care into moments of pure bliss.

From invigorating shower gels to nourishing body butter, and sugar body scrub to foaming body wash every Bryan & Candy product is meticulously formulated with the finest ingredients to pamper your skin and uplift your senses. We believe that self-care is not just a routine but a celebration of yourself, and our products are designed to bring that celebration into your daily life. With an amazing collection of amazing gift sets, we have a gifting solution for every occasion.

With a deep passion for quality and innovation, Bryan & Candy continually evolves to meet the needs of our discerning customers. Our commitment to sustainability and ethical practices ensures that our products are not only luxurious but also responsibly made.

At Bryan & Candy, we offer gifts for a loved one or a treat for yourself, our collections offer something special for everyone, making every moment a little more magical. A brand that truly cares.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Michel Germain Parfums
Description:
Michel Germain is the award-winning perfumer who creates luxury fragrances
that invite seduction using gorgeous, natural oils.

Michel Germain is the fragrance industry’s “Lifetime Achievement” award
winner which honors his contribution to the fragrance world for over 25 years.  His prestige fragrance collections are top sellers in luxury department stores, including Macy’s and Hudson’s Bay.

Known internationally for their natural oils, his fragrances invite closeness, create allure, and inspire love. It is this element of Michel Germain fragrances that have catapulted the brand to the top of the fragrance market and into a niche of its very own.

Name: Rebundle
Description: The first U.S.-made plant-based hair extensions. More comfort and less waste made from banana stems.

Name: CbayExpress
Description:
Cbayexpress is Toronto based organization with over 6 years in Hair Care and Health & Fitness products.

Herbishh - www.herbishh.com
Home of a wide range of quality and unique Hair Care Products. Our beliefs fuel our commitment to offer an impressive range of brands and products. We believe everyone should have access to quality hair care, regardless of where they are, who they are, and how much they can spend. 

Bisonbody - www.bisonbody.com
Focusing on Health & Fitness Technology to empower individuals with cutting-edge devices and insights, enabling proactive health management and fostering a healthier, happier global community.

We are global brand and you can find us on Amazon, Walmart, Ebay, Etsy, Shopify, Cash, Lazada and others.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: ODYCEA
Description: ODYCEA is a French supplier of active ingredients led by nature explorers. Our mission is to discover very unique bio-inspiration and active substances involved in plant adaptation strategies to survive in the most extreme environments. Once identified and quantified, we reveal their powerful activities on new dermatological targets. The efficacy of these innovations is scientifically proven and most of them are patented.

Name: VINI COSMETICS PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Vini Cosmetic is a cosmetic company that offers personal care and over-the-counter products. The company owns the brands Fogg, 18+ deodorants, and White Tone Talc.

It was founded in 2009 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.

Name: Sothys USA
Description:
From Paris to New York and across the globe, Sothys is the dedicated partner of Beauty Salons & Spas. 
A global brand that transcends continents and cultures, represented in 20,000 spas in over 120 countries worldwide.

Setting the standard of professional beauty care for more than 60 years, Sothys is renowned for bringing advanced skin care and expertise to consumers exclusively through professional spas worldwide.

Sothys’ complete professional face and body rituals and high performance home care recommendations provide a single source to exceed both the professional spa and the consumer’s quest for finding well-being and skin health.

Sothys continues to set the pace with innovative collections featuring cosmeceuticals, marine & botanical actives and COSMEBIO certified organics.

Name: CosmeTec s.r.l
Description:
Azienda italiana che fonde la sua mission già all’interno del suo nome: Cosm&tec. Cosmetica & Tecnologia.
Un’approccio completamente nuovo alla produzione di prodotti di make-up, la "cosmetica del colore".
La perfetta fusione tra formule d’avanguardia per ricerca&sviluppo, sensorialità e resa prodotto, con la più alta tecnologia produttiva, capace di rendere unici ed inimitabili i prodotti stessi.
L’anima Cosmetica è rappresentata da innumerevoli formule studiate per la bellezza del viso, delle labbra e degli occhi. E’ il risultato di una ricerca costante, già a partire dalla selezione delle materie prime, fino ad arrivare a proposte che vogliono rappresentare la simbiosi tra il prodotto e l’area di applicazione, per creare armonia tra texture e pay off, regalando un altissimo livello di sensorialità e confort.

L’anima tecnologica si occupa invece di design e progettazione e rende irresistibili i prodotti già al primo sguardo. E’ gestita da persone esperte di tecniche di produzione e riempimento che, con il supporto di un gruppo creativo, costruiscono soluzioni personalizzate per i diversi clienti, con garanzia di esclusiva.
L’unione tra le due anime, l’indispensabile "&" tra cosmetica e tecnologia è il link che permette di ottenere i migliori risultati e di fondere, nel pieno rispetto del lean manufactoring, creatività ed innovazione con qualità e sicurezza. Questa anima è capace di pensare al prodotto in ogni sua fase di vita e si esprime con un servizio di full-service estremamente efficace e mirato.

Name: SEGLE
Description: SEGLE es una marca farmacéutica de cosmética biotecnológica. Especialistas en sérums, desarrollamos tratamientos multiacción para prevenir y tratar en conjunto los signos de la edad. Con activos biotecnológicos para obtener la eficacia máxima.

Name: HOLIDERMIE
Description:
La mission d’Holidermie est d’accompagner les femmes actives au quotidien pour qu’elles restent belles et rayonnantes plus longtemps :

-En préservant et embellissant leur peau de l’intérieur comme de l’extérieur.
-En contribuant à leur bien-être physique et psychique.
-En leur permettant de soigner leur style jusque dans leur salle de bain.
Une synergie d’expertises et de style pour une beauté globale. Une efficacité prouvée et des performances décuplées grâce à la synergie des actifs, nutriments, pré et probiotiques des soins et des compléments alimentaires.

Name: Laboratorios Egalle
Description: We are a Spanish rooted company, but which pursues international growth. Despite our young spirit, our more than 40 years’ experience in hair cosmetics sector has led us to develop a huge range of products. As a result, both the professional and the costumer have to their entire disposition a wide variety of products which are divided into women, unisex and men’s brands. In addition, we also offer personalised private label manufacturing. #cosmetics #manufacturer #hairdressers #haircare #beauty - Somos una empresa con raíces españolas pero con crecimiento internacional. A pesar de nuestro espíritu joven, los más de 40 años de experiencia en el sector de la cosmética capilar nos han llevado a desarrollar una amplia gama de productos. De esta manera, tanto el profesional como el público final tienen a su disposición un vasto abanico de productos que se dividen en marcas de mujer, unisex y caballero. Además, tenemos a su disposición la fabricación a terceros totalmente personalizada. #cosméticacapilar #fabricantes #peluquería

Name: Novachem Srl
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina con más de 15 años en el mercado que investiga, desarrolla y comercializa principios activos e ingredientes biotecnológicos, naturales y sostenibles para la industria cosmética.
-

We are an Argentine company with more than 10 years in the market that investigates and develops biotechnological, natural and sustainable active ingredients for the cosmetic industry.

-Cruelty Free, Hypoallergenic, 100% natural products.

Name: Minthacare
Description:
Minthacare is a company based in South Asia. We operate exclusively in Dermatology and Pediatrics. Our missions are to distribute, promote and empower “Best in Class” brands in patient and consumer healthcare. We cover Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar and Vietnam.

Requests : contact@minthacare.com
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: estime et sens
Mizuhada Group
Description:
AT MIZUHADA GROUP, WE BELIEVE TRUE BEAUTY AND WELL-BEING ARE WITHIN EVERYONE.
This belief lies at the heart of everything we do, from thoughtfully selected ingredients to high-performing and gentle formulations. Our products are crafted to deliver proven results and everyday comfort - enhancing the way you look, feel, and live.

FROM CARE TO QUALITY
We empower individuals to feel confident in their unique expression through high-quality skincare, nourishing supplements, and skin-friendly colorful cosmetics. Mizuhada Group products are designed to support your beauty and well-being- both inside and out.

Name: Oshea Cosmetics Official
Description: Oshea Cosmetics, established in 2021, finds inspiration in the numerous benefits of organic shea butter for skincare. Our journey commenced with a dedication to natural efficacy, evolving to encompass a variety of products for skin, hair, lips, and eyes. Each formulation features a natural structure, providing reliable solutions that enhance natural beauty. As an independently owned Jordanian brand, Oshea is committed to addressing market gaps with genuine, high-quality cosmetic products, enriching lives while upholding integrity and excellence.

Name: Daffy Group of Companies
Description:
Daffy Group provides superior contract and white label manufacturing services for the leading cosmetics and personal care brands. 

We are experts at formulating, manufacturing, and packaging products for the industry. The unique approach to product development allows us to create high-quality products that meet the specific needs of our clients. 

Our unparalleled quality and service have made us a trusted partner to some of the biggest names in the business. 

With over two decades of experience in the domain, our unique offering is our ability to provide a one-stop-shop for all our clients' needs - from formulation to packaging and labeling of a long-range of personal care products.

Currently, we are operational with a lineup of 185+ different products. The ultimate motto of such a wide range of products is to help clients build their own brand from scratch or scale an existing one to massive heights.

Name: Mitchell USA
Description:
Mitchell USA has been at the forefront of exploration and innovation in beauty and skincare, since it began its journey in Scotland, in 1954. Today it has spread all over the world to Europe, The Middle & Far East, USA, Canada, the Caribbean, and Asia Pacific.
Over the years, the Mitchell Group and its laboratories in Switzerland, United States, and France, continue to reinvent its legacy, with constant research and development of formulations.
In India, our natural beauty and skincare story is spearheaded by Sunita Ajay Ramnathkar, an industry veteran, a professional Bio-chemist, and visionary who created FEM, India’s first facial bleach brand before turning it into a massive success saga. Not a soul to bask in her glories, Sunita set out to scale greater heights of excellence. She felt it was time to move on and introduce the modern Indian woman to the world's best anti-aging skincare biotechnologies.
After tremendous research, Sunita acquired a stake in Mitchell USA, in 2008, and gained access to extraordinary anti-aging skincare formulations developed in some of the most advanced research laboratories in the world. After dedicating her time and energy to test these formulations to suit melanin-rich Indian and South Asian skin, Sunita launched Mitchell USA’s Age-Less range in 2017.

Name: PT Era Ventura Indonesia
Description:
Era Ventura Group is a dynamic marketing and distribution company with more than 20 years of experience in consumer products. With our expertise in brand building and development, we are dedicated to connecting businesses with their target audiences and facilitating seamless distribution across Indonesia.

We are an official importer & distributor for international personal care brands of Adidas, Alpecin, Batiste, Maro, Moist Diane, Mutouch, and Plantur in Indonesia.

We run our businesses with passion, commitment, and integrity to foster long-term growth with brands and trade partners. Our integrated services are designed to ensure seamless processes for our partners and brands, covering all major offline and online trade channels nationwide.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: OMORFEE
Description:
OMORFEE believes in replenishing your beauty in the most pristine form! It promises to present to you the purest, safest and effectual beautifying products. The use of purely natural, organic and non-toxic ingredients, makes Omorfee a sheer standout.  It promises to deliver what it claims since all the products are a result of diligent research work. Omorfee sustains the efficacy and impeccability of its products without any compromise.

OMORFEE also strongly strives in keeping a perfect harmony with nature. Omorfee holds the sanctity of nature at a very high pedestal.  Every product is contained in pure bamboo jars, which are biodegradable. Thus, Omorfee does its small bit towards preventing environmental pollution. Our program ‘YOU BUY, WE PLANT, is an initiative towards environmental conservation by sowing saplings of rain giving trees and protecting the environment.

Name: Face the Future
Description:
Through real experience and knowledge, Face the Future provides support for your lifelong self-care journey. Whether you’re a skintellectual or new to the skincare game, our team of experts are here to give you advice for life during every chapter of your story. Because every version of you deserves to be cared for.

We know that working on your ‘you time’ means more to you than just your skincare routine, so we also stock industry-leading haircare and cosmetics brands to offer you the ultimate destination for all your self-care and beauty needs.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: LABORATOIRE SOSKIN
Description:
Parce que nous respectons la nature de l’homme, nos formules sont inspirées de la structure de la peau et préservent son équilibre.
Parce que nous ne voulons pas faire de compromis, nos produits sont faits en France, testés pour leur biocompatibilité et garantissent une tolérance optimale.
Universels et Unisexes, ils reproduisent les mécanismes biologiques pour une efficacité immédiate et durable.

 Reconnu par les Dermatologues 
 3500 Pharmacies dans le monde

 Réparation des peaux sensibilisées

Name: the breakout hack
Description:
Not just another pretty skincare brand. tbh Skincare is bringing to market a completely new patented technology that disrupts biofilm, the key to treating acne causing bacteria in the skin. 

From a recent report by EffeMarket we know that more than 90 percent of world population is affected by acne at some point in their life, with several studies confirming acne has an impact on a person’s quality of life, self-esteem, and mood. In fact, a report by the British Journal of Dermatology showed those diagnosed with acne are 63% more likely to experience depression within the first year of developing symptoms. 

tbh not only addresses the staggeringly high numbers of those suffering from acne with its new patented treatment, but is also tackling the emotional aspects involved. Through its website blog and social media pages, the brand is creating a safe space where sufferers of acne can go to support one another and get access to tools and techniques linked to confidence, body positivity and bettering their general mental wellness. 

Launching 18 March 2020.

Name: Skinvest Skincare
Description:
The Gen Z and millennials with Indian skin type needs distinct attention from brands that cater to their specific skincare needs.
Skinvest is here to bring the youth of India closer to their skincare goals by focusing and resolving the real problems like pigmentation, acne, cellulite, stretch marks, dark circles, sun damage and many more.
Skinvest is a premium, result oriented skincare brand for the Gen Z of India, addressing their niche skincare needs in a qualitative and medically approved way. Our products are curated by dermatologists and are clinically tested for safety, non-irritation, sensitivity, and effectiveness. We are bold, fun, chic, inclusive, and gender neutral. Join our community to learn about your skin, skincare routines, tips, DOs and DONTs, benefits and importance of specific ingredients with respect to your skin type and much more. Keep glowing!
Website links - https://skinvest.care/
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: ishga Skincare
Description:
Experience results-driven skincare derived from the ocean, backed by science.

The name ishga is derived from the Gaelic word for water.

The pure, clean waters of the Hebridean Islands off the north west coast of Scotland are home to ishga, and where we sustainably hand harvest the four types of seaweed that are at the heart of our organic skincare range. Hebridean seaweed contains potent natural antioxidants with properties which transform and protect skin. ishga has developed a bespoke process to extract its natural goodness, harnessing an abundance of vitamins and bioactive minerals to create a remarkable range of high performing products that deliver efficacy for all skin types. 

Find out more and shop at www.ishga.com

Name: Allure Beauty Concepts
Description: Allure Beauty Concepts is the integration of Allure Labs and Kleen Concepts, two industry leaders coming together to form a next-generation innovation lab and contract manufacturer. We specialize in OTC, high-performance skincare, and hair care products for both emerging disruptors and established global brands. With over 155,000 square feet of state-of-the-art production space across two facilities, we’re built to scale without compromising on quality, speed, or care. From concept to creation, we combine scientific rigor, sustainability, and a concierge-style approach to deliver products that perform.

Name: ELLA BACHÉ PARIS
Description:
[1936 - 2026 : 90 ans d’innovations]

Maison dermo-esthétique française depuis 1936, la marque ELLA BACHÉ appartient au groupe familial THALGO, leader mondial de l’esthétique professionnel. Alternative cosméceutique naturelle et sensorielle, ELLA BACHÉ repose sur 4 piliers :
> Sa fondatrice Mme Baché [1900-1999], pharmacienne pionnière de la dermo-esthétique depuis 1936.
> Une méthode professionnelle personnalisée aux résultats visibles, en 3 étapes : SKINTEXDIAG, SKINTEXLAB et programme à domicile.
> Des principes actifs cosméceutiques d’origine naturelle, à la juste dose.
> Un engagement auprès des femmes pour les aider à se sentir belles et confiantes.

Le tout avec un accompagnement commercial hors pair : formation, marketing et communication.

À découvrir exclusivement en Instituts de Beauté, Spas et Médi Spas.

Name: MARC INBANE B.V.
Description:
MARC INBANE is a Dutch premium brand, specialized in creating high-end cosmetics and innovator in tanning products. A combination of pure ingredients, craftsmanship, minimalistic design and professionalism through the entire process puts MARC INBANE in a leading position in the world of luxury cosmetics. Celebrities derive their natural appearance from it and it is often used in shows of the major fashion houses.

Founded in 2012, MARC INBANE has already won a number of impressive awards and is currently being sold in over 40 countries worldwide. 

MARC INBANE is thé leading innovator and creator of tanning spray based on natural ingredients.  The award-winning Natural Tanning Spray is daily used and recommended by leading hairstylists, make-up artists and dermatologists.

Name: TONI&GUY WORLD
Description:
About us: 
With over 60 years of experience, TONI&GUY is an international iconic brand leader and official 'Superbrand' in the hairdressing industry, setting new standards for hairdressers and making education available globally. Our mission is to grow the best, most profitable hairdressing company on the planet where people love to work and clients love to be. We look for people who are passionate, proactive, innovative and believe in upholding the quality brand.

Working with us:
A career with TONI&GUY is fun and rewarding. We look for individuals with a positive attitude, a willingness to self-develop and a love of life whether that's working in a salon, at one of our teaching Academies or at Head office. In return, we offer you the support and training needed to be successful and an amazing benefits pack.

Hair, fashion, education and motivation are the cornerstones of our success. Every job role is valued; every single employee contributes to the success of TONI&GUY. Our passion is to foster a high performing team in every department.

Find us: 
TONI&GUY Head Office is based in London, looking after more than 475 salons across 48 countries.
 
Follow us: 
Follow our story on social media via @toniandguyworld

Name: Dyscamp Cosméticos
Description:
Transformando a beleza e redefinindo padrões desde 1998. A Dyscamp não é apenas uma distribuidores de cosméticos; é  uma narrativa de evolução, paixão pela beleza e comprometimento com a excelência. 
Estabelecida em Campinas/SP, a Dyscamp se destaca como principal distribuidor de produtos de beleza e acessórios do Brasil.

A Dyscamp foca em investimentos em tecnologias de ponta para otimizar processos, revolucionando a distribuição com automação logística que garante agilidade, precisão e confiabilidade. Este é o reflexo de uma visão progressista e um compromisso com a excelência operacional, assegurando a satisfação de nossos clientes.

Acreditamos que a beleza vai além do exterior; é uma expressão de confiança, autoestima e cuidado pessoal, e é nisso que nos dedicamos diariamente.

Junte-se a nós nessa jornada pela transformação da beleza e excelência em serviço. Estamos comprometidos em continuar evoluindo, superando expectativas e proporcionando experiências únicas. Vamos redefinir juntos o conceito de beleza.

Name: 10/10 GROUP ▌10/10 APOTHECARY · 10/10 HOPE · 10X
Description:
誕生於2010年，以10/10追求完美的態度，提供100%精緻的選擇。

客林國際(10/10 Group)股份有限公司旗下擁有 10/10 APOTHECARY、10/10 HOPE及10X 三間獨具匠心的複合式美妝通路，從世界各地精選與我們理念相同的利基品牌與產品，與兩岸三地的消費者共同分享品味生活、健康人生。

【10/10 APOTHECARY】
Authentic．Well-being．Cutting-edge
APOTHCARY源自歐洲「藥妝店」之名，其意涵確保產品的有效、安全、健康及可信賴的專業服務，同時兼具精緻、優雅、愉悅的形象。
10/10 APOTHCARY集萃複合櫃以真實醇美(Authentic)、健康概念(Well-being)及尖端技術(Cutting-edge)為核心價值，為懂得品味生活的消費族群打造化妝保養品的集萃空間。

【10/10 HOPE】
Healthy / Organic / Positive / Eco-friendly
健康是實現生活的力量

10/10 HOPE帶著傳遞美好生活的理念出發，自世界各地精選與我們理念相同的產品，以純淨、天然甚至有機的植物成份，從內而外幫助您達到身心的健康美好。

【10X】
10X 為客林國際集團(10/10 Group)旗下第三個通路，有別於 10/10 Apothecary 的真實醇美和 10/10 HOPE 的天然有機，10X 以Cutting Edge "前衛卓越"作為核心命題，強調充滿創意美學的設計感與跳脫框架的原創精神的商品集合，結合線上線下銷售通路，帶來潮流、新奇、獨特質感的小眾品牌，提供給消費者美好生活的更多可能與想像。

10X致力探索想像力的前沿，匯聚體現多元觀點的全球小眾品牌。聚焦香氛、美妝保養、藝術、設計與工藝領域的傑出作品，突破主流思考框架，孵化未來經典。
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Essentia Beauty is an Italian company specialized in creation and production of makeup, fragrances and accessories/GWP
Our mission is to support brands and retailers with creative designs and tailor made formulations offering very competitive timetables and costs, thanks to a dynamic and professional staff with an almost twenty-year experience in the field

Name: Odorata Cosmeticos
Description: Odorata, is a cosmetics company based out of R 18, Com Eixo Primario, Sn, Quadra 18, Lote Modulos 1 E 4, Galpao 2,, Aparecida De Goiania, Goiás, Brazil.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Brasil
Description:
Não nos entregamos a fundo há mais de 70 anos sem uma boa razão... Na Expanscience, somos uma empresa com uma missão social e o nosso fundamento é ajudar cada um a alcançar o seu bem-estar, da infância à terceira idade. É isto que faz avançar, pesquisar e inovar os nossos 1300 colaboradores, todos os dias! Com espírito livre, somos uma empresa francesa 100% familiar, com produtos (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) presentes em mais de 90 países. Para nós é muito claro: O bem-estar das mulheres e dos homens é indissociável da saúde do planeta e está nas mãos de todos nós. Para que os pais não tenham mais que escolher entre um cuidado de qualidade para os seus filhos e uma solução boa para o ambiente que os rodeia e os vê crescer, damos-lhes produtos naturais, eficazes e saudáveis. Para permitir a cada um construir o seu bem-estar com o evoluir dos anos, ajudamo-los a preservar o seu conforto articular, e a sua agilidade física e mental o mais cedo possível.  Desenvolvemos ativos cosméticos e ingredientes sensoriais de origem 100% natural, que contribuem para o bem-estar do corpo e da alma. O nosso impacto positivo na sociedade e no ambiente é reconhecido pela certificação B Corp e, através do nosso programa de RSE « impACT », estamos determinados em tornar-nos uma empresa com impacto positivo e uma visão regeneradora.
A nossa visão destina-se essencialmente às nossas equipas. No dia a dia, isso traduz-se no reforço da QVT e da igualdade profissional, no apoio às vulnerabilidades e na promoção da inclusão dos mais fragéis, na proposição de uma estratégia ambiciosa de talentos e competências, assim como na promoção do equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional e da eficiência coletiva. Isto requer medidas ambiciosas que abordem os principais desafios sociais enfrentados pelas empresas do século XXI. E traz os seus frutos: orgulhamo-nos de ter a certificação « Great Place to Work » em 100% das nossas filiais pelo segundo ano consecutivo!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: HYDRINITY
Description: Hydrinity Accelerated Skin Science, the fastest-growing professional skincare brand in the U.S., began as a regenerative medicine company developing advanced wound care products and drug delivery systems for oncology and hematology patients. Since launching in 2022, Hydrinity has become the leader in hyaluronic acid technology introducing clinically backed formulations that contain Supercharged injectable-grade hyaluronic acid and patented and proprietary technologies able to penetrate deep into the dermal layers of the skin. Today, Hydrinity Accelerated Skin Science is available in over 4,000 U.S. based professional practices and over 20 international markets and is rapidly expanding.

Name: FTK Beauty Group
Description:
Corporate specialized in skin care and health with different business lines in the beauty sector in Mexico City and Puebla.
We offer quality, positive results and excellence in customer service.

Name: Laboratoire Gravier
Description:
Concepteur, formulateur, fabricant, conditionneur, et distributeur de produits cosmétiques certifiés bio et produits écologiques d’entretien pour la maison depuis 1975.

Aujourd’hui, fort de plus de 45 ans d’expérience et d’innovation, l’engagement du Laboratoire Gravier reste intact : la Bio est une philosophie et l’écologie un moteur de progrès.

Name: Nuskin Independent Distributor
Description: Distribuidor independiente de nuskin de chile para el mundo buscando personas con gana de salir adelante y lograr sus objetivos y sueños hechos realidad .
Location: Las Condes, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: Lenphor
Description:
Lenphor is essentially a pursuit of gifting beautiful experiences to women, every single day. Since the socio-cultural evolution, the female fraternity has been dotted with beauty rituals, both classic and eccentric. 

Our endeavor is to ideate, develop, and provide the trendiest beauty products that find a place in every customer’s heart and pamper their desires and diversities. 
We are defined by our unrelenting passion for fashion. A meticulously crafted, carefully curated range of cosmetics, accessories, and makeup products manifest our quest for ‘a beautiful world’. Through unconventional approach, inspiring design aesthetics and commitment to world-class production, we contrive to fortify our brand promise which stands for – Premium Range I Affordable Fashion I Supreme Quality.

Lenphor Genesis
Lenphor is the torch-bearer of Pune-based beauty legacy – DWJA Cosmetics Pvt. Ltd.

DWJA Cosmetics is a leading CNF business that has been addressing beauty concerns by providing premium products and accessories since 2017. Naturally, the talent maneuvering this new endeavor understands the beauty world, individual nuances and solutions, having been operational already in the cosmetic ecosystem.

Name: Realgems Cosméticos e Amenities
Description:
Quando falamos da marca Realgems, dos produtos e do design inovador, também estamos contando a história de nossos clientes.

Férias de verão, noite de núpcias, viagem de negócio, lazer, descanso, momentos especiais: datas que fazem parte da rotina de clientes e da vida de consumidores, que também comemoramos com muita alegria.

Fundada em 1983, hoje é a maior e melhor empresa fabricante de cosméticos para hotelaria (amenities) do Brasil. A Realgems mantém compromisso com a qualidade, mas também com a beleza, o encanto, a felicidade e a realização de nossos consumidores. Mais do que presentear, nossos cosméticos transformam breves momentos em lembranças inesquecíveis.

A cada linha, um design único, moderno e surpreendente. A Realgems não se intimida em investir em tecnologia, inovação e bom atendimento. Hoje, possui o que de melhor existe em tecnologia europeia e domina todos os processos que envolvem seus produtos, desde a fabricação das embalagens e decoração até o produto final. Além disso, a Realgems confia sua produção aos mais capacitados profissionais do mercado. Por isso, hoje é considerada pelo mercado hoteleiro como a número 1 em amenities.

A Realgems tem uma equipe talentosa que busca tendências mundiais, pesquisa materiais, estuda e tem a sensibilidade de saber o que você e seu consumidor gostam, criando as mais charmosas linhas de cosméticos do mercado.

A história da Realgems e a sua se encontram e seguem em frente, enquanto existirem momentos especiais na sua vida e na de todos os nossos clientes e consumidores.

Name: TopGum Industries
Description:
TopGum is a disruptive, industry-leading company specializing in the development and manufacturing of functional gummy supplements. 

Founded in 2004, the company has earned global recognition for integrating science, technology, and exceptional organoleptic profiles to produce gummies that deliver health benefits while offering superior taste and texture. 

Committed to clean-label formulations, TopGum develops plant-based, non-GMO, and allergen-free gummies, addressing the rising demand for natural and sustainable products. 

With advanced R&D capabilities and cutting-edge manufacturing, TopGum excels in creating innovative solutions that set industry standards. We work closely with partners to turn ideas into products aligned with their brand vision, meeting evolving consumer trends and shaping the future of gummy supplements for a healthier tomorrow. 

The company employs over 250 professionals, including leading food technologists, pharmaceutical engineers, chemists, and mechanical engineers. TopGum’s US team comprised of expert sales and product development teams – empowering customers with unparalleled gummy capabilities.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: JOVOY PARIS
Description:
JOVOY est avant tout connue pour sa ligne de parfums ainsi que ses bougies, synonymes d’une parfumerie moderne et parisienne, résolument dédiée à nos contemporains.
C'est également "l’Ambassade des parfums rares à Paris". Située dans un écrin privilégié, entre la place Vendôme et le Jardin des Tuileries, la parfumerie multimarques Jovoy est entièrement dédiée aux parfums et belles bougies à Paris.
Depuis 2014, JOVOY a lancé un programme de franchise de son concept retail avec une implantation pilote en France au Mans et des franchises aux Emirats Arabes Unis et Qatar.
Avec un vaisseau amiral à Paris et, depuis Juin 2017 une filiale à Londres avec l'ouverture d'une boutique en plein cœur de Londres dans le prestigieux quartier de Mayfair (21 Conduit st), JOVOY est devenu, en quelques années , un acteur incontournable de l'industrie de la parfumerie de niche.

Name: Pestle & Mortar
Description:
Skincare should be simple, and it should work. At Pestle & Mortar, we blend the ancient wisdoms of Indian natural healing with cutting-edge science to create simple solutions for beautiful skin. 

Founded in 2014 by Sonia Deasy, Pestle & Mortar is an Irish skincare brand creating clean, effective, and simple products that work. 

𝗟𝗘𝗦𝗦 𝗜𝗦 𝗠𝗢𝗥𝗘
Skincare shouldn’t be complicated. Our range is streamlined, simple to understand, and easy to use, so everyone can achieve a pared-back routine that works.

𝗡𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘 + 𝗦𝗖𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗘
Every formula blends proven active ingredients with skin-healing natural extracts. This balance ensures performance you can see and feel — effective, safe, and always gentle on the skin.

𝗖𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗡 + 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗦𝗖𝗜𝗢𝗨𝗦
Our products are clean, cruelty-free, vegan, and suitable for all skin types. We formulate without harmful ingredients and produce responsibly to minimise environmental impact.

𝗖𝗨𝗟𝗧 𝗙𝗔𝗩𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗜𝗧𝗘𝗦
Stocked in over 135 retailers and distributed globally, our hero products combine proven performance with universal appeal —

𝗣𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗛𝘆𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘂𝗺 – Multi-award-winning hydration hero and brand icon, delivering deep, lasting moisture without irritation.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗗𝗲𝗿𝗺𝗮 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗥𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗲 – Dermatologist-approved daily essentials specially formulated for sensitive, redness-prone, and reactive skin.

𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗚𝗶𝗳𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 – Luxurious, ready-to-retail collections designed for seasonal peaks and year-round premium gifting.

𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗡𝗘𝗥 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛 𝗨𝗦
We work with retailers and distributors worldwide to bring award-winning, retail-ready skincare to shelves. Pestle & Mortar is proudly stocked by premium retailers in 16 countries — https://pestleandmortar.com/stockists/

Ready to bring award-winning skincare to your customers? 
 stockists@pestleandmortar.com |  www.pestleandmortar.com

Name: Philip Kingsley
Description: Philip Kingsley is the world's leading trichologist (hair and scalp specialist), with clinics in London and New York. His 55 years of trichological heritage and belief that 'healthy hair is beautiful hair' have secured him an international reputation for excellence. He was the first person to introduce the concept of ‘hair textures’ into the industry, and also coined the term ‘bad hair day’. While the Philip Kingsley clinics have made personalised, hand-made hair care products since 1957, in 1998 Philip and his clinical team developed a retail line in order to make premium, scientifically based hair care easily available to the mass consumer. We adopt a holistic approach to hair care, encompassing hydration, nutrition, well-being and regime. Formulated by the world's leading trichologists, Philip Kingsley products have been created to make hair fit, healthy and beautiful.

Name: Maa Althahab
Description:
Maa Althahab Fragrances member of Al Masmoum Group Companies is one of the largest fragrance companies in Syria despite its short journey in fragrances business, through building up the company on solid foundations using latest management concepts (Established in the beginning of the year 2006) by Mr. Abdul Hadi Al Masmoum.

Al Masmoum group was founded in 1987 in Homs – Syria, and after great success of the group in its products “perfumes and deodorants, hair care products, cosmetics and makeup, accessories” and becoming one of the leading companies in the region with four factories, the youngest brother of Al Masmoum family decided to start new line of business lunching Maa Althahab Fragrances.

Maa Althahab headquarters was first established in Syria, now we are in heart of Cairo. The company offers its products in the Egyptian market at its almost 30 branches that have been picked up in remarkable places. We are a global brand with a chain almost 100 stores all around the world. We are expanding and we are not finished developing.

Maa Althahab efforts consist in four main domains, Oil Fragrances, ready products, Oriental bottles, Franchising.

Maa Althahab within a short time, has been successfully able to acquire the satisfaction of its clients through its excellent service, quality products, special designs, and competitive prices.

Our vision:
We seek to Be a leading regional fragrance company that delivers superior results

Our mission:
We create unique, superior and economically competitive products through regional-class integration of fragrance expertise, consumer insights and brand understanding

Maa Althahab is committed to the fulfillment of our Vision through a powerful focus on Customers, People and Innovation. We apply a culture of innovation and demonstrate continuous improvement in everything.

Name: The Orange Square Company
Description:
The Orange Square Company was founded in 1991 by the owners of the celebrated London fragrance specialist boutique “Les Senteurs”.

Orange Square was designed to provide a wider distribution for some of the rare & exclusive perfume houses whose products Les Senteurs imported. 

In 1992, Orange Square began to work with a highly specialised Parisian perfumer by the name of Olivier Creed. Over the next 20 years Orange Square nurtured and developed CREED into becoming the best selling niche fragrance brand in the UK.

The Orange Square Company has gradually added a most discerning and exciting range of luxury niche brands to its portfolio. Each brand is distinguished by a special attribute – be it a concept, an intriguing history or a remarkable heritage. Each brand is noted for the quality and creativity of the product. Every perfume house represented by Orange Square is set apart from the majority of fragrance brands by its exacting standards and impeccable taste. 

The Orange Square Company is now established as the number one distributor of artistic luxury fragrance brands in the UK.

Orange Square continues to be a family-owned business dedicated to nurturing and developing highest quality traditional and contemporary fragrance brands through selective distribution channels.

Name: Beter Horen
Description:
Amplifon is dé retailmarktleider in hooroplossingen en accessoires. Met een wereldwijd netwerk van 10.000 verkooppunten en 20.900 medewerkers in 26 landen, helpen wij mensen om opnieuw alle emoties van geluid te ervaren.

In Nederland opereren wij onder het merk Beter Horen, met 200 verkoop- en servicelocaties en 700 toegewijde professionals. Wij bieden onze klanten een unieke winkelervaring en begeleiden hen op hun weg naar zelfbeschikking. Ons doel is om de specifieke behoeften van elke klant te begrijpen en de beste hooroplossingen te bieden, zodat zij optimaal van het leven kunnen genieten.

Of het nu gaat om een hoortoestel of op maat gemaakte gehoorbescherming voor festivals, wij luisteren naar onze klanten en erkennen de uniciteit van ieder individu. Als doelgedreven organisatie blijven wij groeien en zoeken we continu getalenteerde professionals die willen ontwikkelen in een internationale omgeving waar je vanaf dag één impact maakt.

Op zoek naar een nieuwe uitdaging? Bekijk onze carrièrepagina en ontdek of er een passende rol voor jou bij zit!

https://careers.amplifon.com/nl/search-jobs?country=Netherlands
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: August
Description: August is a lifestyle period care brand working to reimagine periods for everyone who menstruates. Follow along @itsaugust
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: VidaCorp
Description:
VidaCorp, the consumer health and beauty subsidiary of DBG Health Group, is home to market leading Health, Wellness, and Beauty brands.

Our mission is to provide access to high-quality consumer health, wellness and beauty products and services that enhance well-being, promote inclusivity, and inspire confidence. 

Leading through our values of Pioneering, Accountability, Collaboration and Tenacity it is our PACT to show up every day for ourselves, our team/s and our customers and strategic partners to deliver on our mission.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NØIE
Description:
Founded on the belief that customised skincare can effectively address skin concerns such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis, NØIE is on a mission to improve the quality of life for each individual with a skin condition. 

We have created a unique method of doing by combining science, artificial intelligence, and real-life to match individuals with a personalised solution customised for their skin’s needs.

Name: Twincraft Skincare
Description:
Twincraft Skincare is the premier contract manufacturer of innovative bar soap and skincare products. We have been in business for 50 years, and during that time, we have worked with hundreds of different companies including many of the world's leading personal care brands. Our customers recognize us for our partnership in their businesses, our responsiveness to their needs, and our willingness to explore options. 

We have developed a number of advanced proprietary formulations. Our bar soap portfolio features an impressive array of bar soaps such as delivery system bars, certified organic, 2-in-1 and 3-in-1 formulas, shampoo bars, and more, all of which are available for sustainability certification through the RSPO. 

We conduct analytical and stability testing on every formula we produce and our labs can customize test programs based on your specific needs.

We also offer an array of bar soap aesthetics including co-extruded, multi or single-striped bars, bars with soap chunks, marbleized bars, and everything in between. Our packaging team sources a wide variety of sustainable packaging types from biodegradable and recyclable to cartons that are FSC certified to wraps that are made from plant-based materials.

Our capabilities in liquid skincare products have expanded in recent years to include a full range of products, from water-thin serums, creamy cleansers and clay masks, to thick body butters, as well as natural deodorants and other hot pour products. The formulations are developed through a natural lens, with conventional, clean, and certified natural options for our customers.

To learn more about Twincraft Skincare, our career opportunities, and our business, please contact us: https://www.twincraft.com/contact-us

Name: You Are The Princess
Description:
En You Are The Princess, hemos reescrito las reglas de la belleza en España. Nuestra historia comenzó en 2017 de la mano de Carlota Pérez con un sueño claro: crear una marca de cosmética, belleza y accesorios pensada por y para mujeres.

Demostramos que la innovación, la accesibilidad y el diseño no son solo palabras, sino los pilares de nuestro universo.

Desde nuestra base en Madrid, nos movemos entre el mundo digital y el retail, anticipándonos a los deseos de nuestras Princesas y lanzando más de 200 novedades cada mes. Gestionamos un portafolio de más de 30 marcas propias y 6.000 referencias activas, convirtiendo cada producto en un reflejo de lo que nuestras clientas necesitan y sueñan.

Hoy, nuestro reino se extiende por 13 países, un camino de expansión que nos llena de ilusión. Porque en este universo, nuestra misión es que cada mujer se sienta como la protagonista de su propio cuento.

Name: FHI Heat
Description:
With nearly 20 years of experience in the professional hair industry, FHI Heat has established itself as a brand synonymous with excellence, precision, and quality.

We are committed to creating technologically advanced tools with the power and performance needed for professionals and consumers alike. Each FHI Heat product works to give you faster, smoother, more professional results.

Name: Raw Sugar Living
Description:
Founded in 2014 in Southern California by Donda Mullis and Ronnie Shugar, Raw Sugar is an aspirational lifestyle brand on a mission to promote clean and healthy living through products that are good for the body and nourish the soul. We are committed to providing the highest quality vegan hair and personal care products at a price that is accessible to all, as we believe everyone deserves products that make them feel clean, beautiful, empowered and loved from the outside in.  
 
We create with care and formulate with clean ingredients and formulate without SLS/SLES.  We never test on animals. Our packaging is made with sustainable materials including post-consumer recycled plastic and FSC-certified paper. 
 
We subscribe to a rigorous supplier code of conduct policy. Our products are available at major retail outlets throughout the United States including Walmart, Target and CVS, as well as at Shoppers Drug Marts throughout Canada. 
 
Raw Sugar was recognized by Circana as the #3 non-food brand on their 2024 Pacemakers list, as well as by Beauty Matter as a visionary brand shaping the face of beauty in the 2024 FUTURE50 class. Our co-founder, Donda, was recognized by CEW as one of five Visionary Award Honorees for her commitment to community and social impact.  Each Raw Sugar purchase supports our social give-back program, the Raw Sugar Initiative, dedicated to making clean water and soap available to those who need it most.  To date, we’ve donated more than 16 million bars of soap and other clean essentials to those in need. 
 
To learn more, visit rawsugarliving.com. Follow us on Instagram @rawsugarliving and on TikTok at @rawsugarliving_.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dermarome, leading beauty & skincare distributor in the Nordics
Description:
Dermarome – A Leading Distributor in Beauty and Skincare in the Nordics

Dermarome is a trusted distributor of premium beauty and skincare brands across the Nordic region. With over 30 years of experience, we represent 23 globally recognized brands and operate across all major sales channels – professional, retail, e-commerce, and pharmacy – with a presence in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, and Iceland.

We are proud to be part of the Dermanordic Group, the Nordic region’s leading professional beauty group, combining deep local expertise with strategic reach.

Our brand portfolio includes Avène, A-Derma, Beauté Pacifique, Browgame Cosmetics, By Terry, Grande Cosmetics, Löwengrip, Milk Makeup, ELEMIS, The INKEY List, Erborian, Sprekenhus, N.C.P., Nisim, Mario Badescu, L'Occitane, Grown Alchemist, REN, Lipsmart, and more.

Within the professional channel (salons, spas, and clinics), we offer exclusive brands such as PRIORI, Obagi Medical, Skeyndor, and Skinbetter Science, all renowned for their high-quality, results-driven products.

Education is at the heart of what we do. Through both in-person and digital platforms, we offer tailored training programs focusing on ingredients, techniques, and brand knowledge – to support long-term success for our partners.

With full Nordic coverage and presence in all key sales environments, Dermarome is your strategic partner for growth in the modern beauty industry.

Name: Niche Beauty Lab
Description:
FROM OUR LAB TO YOU!
Niche Beauty Lab, established in 2018 in Barcelona, spearheads beauty transformation. Our mission: democratize skincare with premium yet affordable products. Embracing an innovative "From our Lab to You" approach, we formulate with cutting-edge ingredients, a commitment evident in our groundbreaking solutions. Beyond brands, we consistently develop new products, ensuring quality at competitive prices. Niche Beauty Lab isn't just redefining beauty; it's a pledge to reshape the rules. Follow our journey as we revolutionize the beauty landscape!

Follow us at:
https://www.instagram.com/nichebeautylab/
https://www.tiktok.com/@nichebeautylab

Name: Mutari Cosméticos
Description:
Mutari is a cosmetics and dermocosmetics company from Minas Gerais that occupies a prominent place in the national market. Driven by its strong business network, it is committed to offering beauty and aesthetic professionals complete lines of treatment and hair and dermatological transformation, in an effective and absolutely healthy way.

For that, it counts on advanced technology, innovation, quality, safety. Our team of professionals is highly qualified – and this is our biggest criterion for achieving a differentiated positioning with the final consumer.

Name: La Belle Boucle

Née sur les réseaux sociaux en 2017, elle compte désormais une communauté de plus de 240,000 personnes. En 2019 La Belle Boucle évolue en ouvrant une boutique en ligne sur son site pour vendre les meilleurs produits capillaires naturels et biologiques. En 2021, on passe du virtuel au réel avec l'ouverture du premier Studio à Lyon et la sortie du premier produit capillaire !

Description:
Skafe Cosmetics was established in 1986 with the object of manufacturing
high quality hair cosmetic products to attend specifically the final client all
over the Brazilian market.
The main differential of Skafe is the responsibility with the quality of your
goods, using ingredients that really are a true beauty treatment, but
without harming or damaging the environment.
We have more than 200 products in our portfolio, that are distributed in

successful way. The company has already its goods on the shelves of
major global reference networks in Spain, Portugal, United States of
America, Panama, Angola, Mozambique, Saudi Arabia and more recently
in Chile, Egypt and EAU.
At the present time we are very interested in developing a successful
partnership with you Company and we would appreciate your contact in
case of interest.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Korff
Description:
Korff è un’azienda cosmetica italiana, dalla forte anima scientifica, sostenibile e inclusiva. Grazie al nostro impegno nei confronti del pianeta e del territorio, siamo diventati Società Benefit. 

La nostra filosofia si basa sulla continua ricerca scientifica e sullo studio di ingredienti e materie prime sicure ed efficaci, perché desideriamo ottenere il minor impatto sull’ambiente, ma raggiungere un’elevata efficacia dei prodotti.

Per questo, nella produzione dei nostri cosmetici, utilizziamo energie provenienti da fonti rinnovabili e i packaging dei nostri prodotti sono realizzati con materiali riciclabili e riciclati. Allo stesso tempo desideriamo promuovere concetti di inclusività e benessere. 

Siamo portavoce di un concetto di bellezza che va al di là dell’omologazione e dei canoni di perfezione imposti dalla società odierna. Crediamo che ogni donna sia unica e bella nel suo essere, perché la bellezza per noi non è perfezione, ma unicità. La perfezione esiste solo nella scienza.

Name: Laboratoire BF International
Description:
Laboratoire de formulation de produits cosmétiques, dermo-cosmétiques, d’hygiène, parfums et dérivés de lignes parfumées. Nous assurons pour nos clients un service intégré "clef en main" grâce à des compétences qui couvrent la conception de produits, le développement de formules, le développement de packaging, l’accompagnement réglementaire, l’industrialisation, le conditionnement et la logistique. 
Notre société bénéficie d’un savoir-faire reconnu depuis près de 30 ans dans la formulation de produits cosmétiques et de textures innovantes. A l’image de notre expertise unique et brevetée dans le domaine des technologies haute-pression, l’innovation et la créativité sont des valeurs clés de notre Laboratoire. Ces compétences se traduisent par des relations à long terme avec nos clients, parmi lesquels des grands groupes de luxe, de la cosmétique et de la pharmacie. 
Notre équipe à taille humaine place au coeur de sa réussite l’accompagnent et la valorisation de ses talents.

Name: JustForYou
Description: JustForYou is made possible with the help of technology, but also many human minds that keep coming up with ideas and putting them into practice, such as using Artificial Intelligence to create a more conscious way to consume shampoo and conditioner. Yes, there are people here on this side and happy in life for bringing so much innovation and affection to you. People who have a lot of hair, little too, straight, wavy and curly. People who like to think about work even at bath time, who tested the first formula with the greatest anxiety and who vibrated when they saw that it worked! Our brand is made for you, for you and for people like you - who wants more transparency in buying, better results and a cooler world you know? We are givers, which means we have a collaborative culture based on freedom of thought, expression and action. We have a passion for technology and innovation, we like to do differently and dream big, and we always want to learn more. We mix talent, test everything to make your product experience as good as possible, and we love to know literally what's on your mind! We believe in natural beauty and true promises.

Name: Beauty 21 Cosmetics, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to Beauty 21 Cosmetics, Inc., where beauty meets innovation and excellence.  Since 1985, we have been at the forefront of the beauty industry, committed to making high-quality, cruelty-free beauty accessible to everyone. Founded in sunny California, and as the proud parent company of L.A. Girl and L.A. COLORS Cosmetics, we’ve carved out a global reputation for delivering exceptional products that resonate with millions of beauty enthusiasts worldwide. Our expertise spans every major beauty category—Eye, Face, Lip, Nail, and Accessories—ensuring that every individual's unique beauty needs are met with excellence.

Recognized as one of the top 10 cosmetic and nail brands in the nation, we continue to lead with innovation and passion. At Beauty 21 Cosmetics, we don’t just follow trends; we set them. Our award-winning formulations have been recognized by some of the most prestigious names in the industry, including features in Allure, Harper’s Bazaar, PETA, and Forbes Vetted. Whether it’s through L.A. Girl’s trendsetting, luxurious offerings or L.A. COLORS’ vibrant, affordable products, we empower people around the globe to express their individuality with confidence. Our products are accessible online and through leading beauty, mass market, and specialty retailers, with availability in over 45,000 retail outlets across more than 30 countries, ensuring that everyone, everywhere, can experience the transformative power of beauty.

Join Our Team: As we continue to set new standards and expand our global footprint, we invite you to be part of our exciting future. Embrace the opportunity to contribute to our legacy of innovation and excellence. Discover the beauty of working with Beauty 21 Cosmetics, Inc. - where every day is a chance to inspire and make a difference.

Name: Urban Company Bali
Description: Urban Company is one of the largest companies located in Bali. In charge of several subsidiaries such as MS Glow, Urban Indo Manufacture, TUB Beauty Store, MS Glow Aesthetic Clinic, Urban Bali Property, MS Kids, MS Cosmetic, Urban Express, Bank Urban, and Urban Asia Industri

Name: Nuvó Oficial
Description:
En Nuvó fomentamos el trabajo en equipo, la integridad, la responsabilidad, la innovación y la celebración como parte de nuestra vida organizacional.

Te invitamos a formar parte de nuestra compañía y sumar tu talento a nuestros equipos!

Name: UpCircle
Description:
Nature gives us lots of wonderful ingredients that make our skin healthier and more radiant – like used coffee grounds and brewed chai tea spices. But they often end up going to landfill.

Why should all that good stuff go to waste?

It shouldn’t. That’s why, at UpCircle, we elevate leftover natural ingredients, bringing them back to life as beauty products your skin will love.

That's all round better skincare.

About us:  upcirclebeauty.com Get Social: @upcirclebeauty

Name: Antipodes
Description:
Antipodes is a Scientific Green Beauty brand from New Zealand. We use pollution-free, results-driven natural ingredients in our globally awarded, certified organic and vegan premium skincare.  
 
At Antipodes, innovative science discoveries unite with Nature to inject your beauty ritual with some of the cleanest ingredients on Earth. Ingredients like nutrient-rich avocado oil, revolutionary antioxidant Vinanza Grape, plant-based hyaluronic acid, and world-famous antibacterial manuka honey are beloved by our devotees. 

Our ingredients come from sustainable growers, and our plant-powered formulations are tested using in-vitro scientific investigations and clinical trials. 
 
For 15 years, we’ve never compromised on clean. Thanks to 100% nature-sourced ingredients, independent audits of our credentials, and sophisticated formulations that meet the needs of women seeking actual results from natural skincare, our Green Beauty ethos is evident in every Antipodes product. 

From Wellington to the world - lift the lid of an Antipodes product and escape to nature in New Zealand.

Name: SORA COSMETICS
Description:
Sora Kozmetik, 1981 yılında Türkiyede ilk aeresol dolum makinesini yaparak faal iş hayatına başlamıştır. Firma, 2000 yılından itibaren kozmetik ürünlerinin üretimine başlamış olup kısa zamanda yurtiçinde ve yurtdışında kozmetik sektörünün önde gelen firmalarından biri haline gelmiştir. 2011 yılını IKMIB ihracat verilerine göre “ Kişisel Bakım “ dalında sektör ikincisi olarak kapatan firmamızın ürünleri 5 kıtada sayıları 70’i aşan ülkede yerleşik kozmetik dükkânları, zincir market ve toptancılara ihraç edilmektedir.

Firmamız, yine 2011 yılında 1933 yılında kurulmuş bir firma olan BEBAK firmasını tüm lisans ve marka haklarıyla birlikte satın almıştır. Acı badem sütü özlü krem ve makyaj temizleyici krem ürünlerini portföyünde bulunduran Bebak, bu segmentte Türkiye pazar lideri olup yakın bir tarihte de Sora çatısı altında ihracat pazarlarında satış ve pazarlama faaliyetlerine girmeyi planlamaktadır.
Sora ürünleri; kişisel bakım başlığı altında kadın, erkek ve çocuklara yönelik  geniş bir cilt bakım, bebek bakım ve kişisel temizlik ürün grubu yelpazesi sunmaktadır.  

Firmanın önde gelen markaları arasında ECI,  BEK, SECRET OF LADY, BEBAK, SORA CARE, GARDEN ve COOL AIR yer almaktadır. 
Şirketimiz, uluslararası vizyonuna paralel olarak düzenli şekilde COSMOPROF BOLOGNA, COSMEETING PARIS, HAIR & BEAUTY FRANKFURT, BEAUTYWORLD DUBAI ve COSMOPROF HONG KONG gibi sektörün önde gelen fuarlarına katılmakta ve müşterilerini düzenli şekilde ziyaret etmektedir.

Name: Vue Swiss
Description:
Vue Swiss, where science meets beauty. Embrace simplicity with Vue, and say goodbye to complicated skincare routines.

Join us on a journey to better skin, and discover the transformative benefits of science-backed beauty products.

Name: RANAVAT
Description: RANAVAT creates luxurious, efficacious skin and hair treatments inspired by Indian beauty traditions.  The brand is female + minority founded/owned, AWARD WINNING, and counts the World's top retailers such as Sephora and Harrods as its partners.  RANAVAT invites you to #ClaimYour Crown as you indulge in our Royal Ritual.

Name: KAIN Cosmeceuticals Private Limited
Description:
Have you ever wondered if cosmetics could be both innovative and eco-friendly? KAIN Cosmeceuticals redefines the answer, where precision and sustainability are the essence of every product. Our commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability has set us apart as a frontrunner in the market.

At KAIN Cosmeceuticals, we pride ourselves on being India's first Green contract manufacturing unit, promoting eco-friendly practices in our operations. Our cutting-edge facility boasts fully automatic manufacturing and packaging lines, comprising 17 manufacturing lines and over 20 packaging lines, enabling precision and efficiency in our production.

With a staggering packaging capacity of 500 million units per annum, we are poised to meet the most demanding requirements of our clients. We are also proud to be an inclusive employer, with a 51% female workforce, promoting diversity and empowerment within our organisation.

Our expansive 1,40,000 square feet facility in Khalapur is a testament to our commitment to both quality and sustainability. It's strategically located near key transportation hubs, including Mumbai, JNPT (Jawaharlal Nehru Port Trust), and the proposed Navi Mumbai Airport, ensuring seamless logistical support.

We invite you to explore our state-of-the-art facility and witness firsthand our dedication to quality, innovation, and environmental responsibility.

Name: Antati أنتَِ
Description: Antati, meaning "you" in Arabic, embodies the essence of personalized skincare. Our brand recognizes the unique dermatological needs of individuals across North Africa, the Middle East, and the Arabian Peninsula. Leveraging local insights and scientific expertise, Antati offers a range of products meticulously formulated to address the specific challenges posed by our environment, dietary habits, and sun exposure. Our commitment to safety and efficacy ensures that every product is free from harmful chemicals and enriched with the benefits of natural ingredients.

Name: Cervin
Description:
CERVIN est un groupe familial, cumulant plus de 60 ans d’expérience en tant que façonnier dans les secteurs de la parfumerie et de la cosmétique.

Le groupe réunit 3 sites de productions ainsi qu’un site de conditionnement de coffrets et un centre de recherche et développement dédiés à la satisfaction des besoins de nos clients.

Nos valeurs, profondément ancrées dans le métier de la sous-traitance, tiennent en quelques mots qui présentent un sens pour l’ensemble de nos collaborateurs et clients :

Souplesse : Nous adapter à vos contraintes. 
Cela passe par la gestion d’activité en full service, susceptible d’intégrer les phases de développement, d’approvisionnement, de fabrication, de conditionnement et de préparation de commande. Cela comprend également l’adaptation rapide de nos process aux évolutions du secteur (liaison chaude pour les produits coulés à chaud, automatisation par cobots, environnement de conditionnement ISO 7 pour produits sensibles en cosmétiques....).

Innovation : Booster votre créativité.
Développer des nouvelles textures, de nouvelles fonctionnalités au travers de la formule ou de son pack, penser un nouveau procédé, l’ensemble de nos équipes de développement formule, pack et industrialisation sont mobilisées pour accompagner !

Qualité : Sous-traiter une image de marque requiert de la confiance.
Qualité des produits (référentiels FDA, ISO 22716) , Qualité de notre relation aux autres (RSE ECOVADIS) et à l’environnement (certification Ecocert, COSMOS, Programme environnemental), ces valeurs sont au cœur des démarches de nos clients, grands groupes internationaux ou PME. Gérer la production et le conditionnement de vos produits c’est aussi prolonger les valeurs que vous portez auprès de vos collaborateurs, partenaires et clients.

Description:

Name: Ever Green
Description:
Somos a Ever Green, muito prazer!

A Ever Green é uma empresa nacional – com 36 anos de atuação no mercado –, que figura entre as principais fabricantes de produtos descartáveis nas categorias de Cuidado Feminino, Cuidado Adulto e Cuidado Infantil.

Desde a nossa fundação, temos como Visão “democratizar o uso de produtos descartáveis higiênicos”.

Estamos em constante evolução e atentos às tendências e necessidades dos consumidores modernos para desenvolver produtos de alta qualidade com preços acessíveis.

Nossa Visão é ser “a MARCA NACIONAL LÍDER em produtos descartáveis higiênicos nas categorias de Cuidado Feminino, Cuidado Adulto e Cuidado Infantil”.

Para atender o mercado, a Ever Green possui três unidades fabris: duas em São Bernardo do Campo/SP e uma em Maracanaú/CE, responsáveis pela produção de cerca de 150 produtos, entre absorventes, protetores diários, toalhas e lenços umedecidos, fraldas geriátricas e infantis e máscaras de proteção, comercializados, inclusive, em outros países da América Latina e África.

Com visão de futuro, a empresa atua orientada por valores sólidos e inegociáveis, que influenciam todas as suas ações: Pragmatismo, Integridade e Honestidade, Disciplina, Determinação, Pertencimento e Disponibilidade!

Quer conhecer mais sobre nossa empresa? Fale conosco!
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Kindra
Description:
75% of women will experience vaginal or sexual health issues in their lifetimes. These issues follow women through all phases of life, from reproductive years, postpartum, to peri/post-menopause.

Our patent-pending, OTC products provide women optimal relief for the most disruptive symptoms; whether used as standalone or adjunct to prescription hormone therapies. Kindra’s products are clinically-backed and recommended by 3,000+ OB/GYNs, pelvic floor therapists, urologists, and primary physicians.

Find relief at Kindra.com. 
Join our community @ourkindra.

Have a question? Email us at hello@ourkindra.com

Are you a medical provider, clinic, or hospital? Email us at info@kindramedical.com to join our free clinical sampling program.
