Name: Finmark S.r.l.
Description:
I principi della cosmesi moderna hanno origini lontane acquisite dalla sapienza millenaria di antiche culture che, straordinariamente attente all’espressione di benessere in ogni manifestazione di vita quotidiana, bramavano risultati di bellezza con sofisticate mescolanze di rimedi naturali e deliziavano l’olfatto con intense fragranze sprigionate da preziosi olii essenziali. Rielaborando tali esperienze del passato ha inizio l’evoluzione dell’attuale industria cosmetica che, sostenuta da nuove tecnologie di ricerca, si arricchisce di combinazioni, ottenute tra una maggiore varietà di ingredienti, sempre più complesse ed efficaci. In questo contesto si inserisce Finmark con il suo percorso proiettato alla ricerca di trattamenti sempre più esclusivi da offrire, come principali protagonisti, ai suoi interlocutori.

Nata con l’intento di offrire al mercato italiano cosmetici di grande qualità, Finmark si caratterizza per la raffinata offerta di prodotti di bellezza accuratamente selezionati tra i marchi internazionali più prestigiosi ed affermati nell’ambito dei trattamenti di alta cosmetica. Con le sue proposte Finmark introduce cosmetici dal contenuto innovativo, sinonimi di classe e di prestigio, diffondendo la tradizione di marchi che, nel corso degli anni, hanno saputo fondere ricerca ed estro in trattamenti esclusivi e personalizzati.Le formule uniche ed eccezionalmente efficaci perfezionano creme all’avanguardia per le diverse esigenze cutanee ed arricchiscono soluzioni per un makeup sofisticato e dalle colorazioni versatili ideali per sottolineare il proprio fascino.

Name: NEODERMA
Description:
NEODERMA: Innovative. Ethical. Beautiful. 
Beauty for the Smart Generation

NEODERMA presents the art of innovation, and the science of flawless skin. By reimagining luxury skincare, we revolutionise the essence of daily skincare essentials. 

Cruelty-free formulae meets cutting-edge airless technology. Potent FUSION-BIOTICS ingredients meet an array of precious natural extracts. The result? A broad range of future-forward, ethical, and beautiful skincare products, curated and crafted for the needs of the smart generation.

The Airless Revolution in Smart Skincare

NEODERMA is the world’s first 100% airless luxury skincare brand, pioneering an approach which ensures precision and perfection with every use. Our audacious products are sealed and finessed within an airless container, preserving each formula in its purest state. 

This signature method doesn’t just guarantee lasting freshness and the integrity of NEODERMA products. It eliminates the use of potentially harmful preservatives, allowing the potency of the natural ingredients, electrolytes, and probiotics to truly shine. 

Skincare science has advanced to the point at which there are, quite simply, no more excuses for anything other than the utmost in clean beauty standards. Our skin is complex, fascinating, and capable of expressing the utmost in natural beauty and radiance. As such, it deserves skincare solutions that not only work with your innate natural balance, but which also harmonise with the world which we all share. 

NEODERMA is committed to cruelty-free beauty practices, and to upholding the highest standards. Our innovative and certified-vegan formulae are not - and will never be - tested on animals, and our sustainability goals go above and beyond the international standard. Natural beauty isn’t just a goal, it’s a philosophy informing every aspect of what we do best.

Name: OSKIA Skincare
Description:
PURE NUTRITIONAL SKINCARE
The name OSKIA is derived from the ancient Greek for 'delivering nutrients' and 'beauty'.
 
OSKIA is a nutri-cosmeceutical brand, founded after a personal journey with the food supplement MSM, that specialises in bio-cellular skin nutrition. 
Our effective formulations are designed using clinical bio-available or cellular nutrients and complex actives to give you a beautifully healthy & glowing complexion. We specialise in cellular nutrition through patented micro-encapsulation and liposome technology. Vitamins, minerals, proteins/amino acids & omegas all combine to improve cellular activity and efficiency, leading to skin that’s healthier and happier. Our cellular nutrients are then blended with high-tech bio-actives (including plant stem cell technology, peptide complexes, anti-oxidants, enzymes, prebiotics, botanical extracts and floral oils) to combat all the key concerns associated with ageing and the impact of lifestyle and the environment. The result is healthy, happy & glowing skin.

AWARD WINNING
Winner of over 210 beauty awards including Best British Brand & Best Global Natural Brand.
 
MADE IN THE UK
Our products are designed by Georgie, formulated by our team of Doctors, nutritionists, cosmetic scientists and skincare specialists, and manufactured at our very own laboratory and factory in the rolling hills of Wales. We have spent 10 years perfecting the bio-availability of our nutrients and the concept of nutritional skincare.
 
NATURALLY-DERIVED
We use naturally-derived or nature and bio-identical ingredients. We pride ourselves in using bio-technology to produce bio-identical molecules that are both environmentally and socially more sustainable.

Name: Vintner's Daughter
Description:
Vintner’s Daughter was founded on a simple belief: to create the finest products, you must move at the speed of quality. Our story begins in Napa Valley, where founder April Gargiulo was raised by farmers and winemakers who taught her to honor craftsmanship, patience, and the power of nature. In fine winemaking, shortcuts don’t exist, every step requires care, integrity, and time. Those values became the foundation of Vintner’s Daughter.

April asked a radical question: what if skincare were made with the same rigor as fine winemaking, using the world’s highest quality, whole-plant ingredients, never rushing the process, and refusing to compromise? Working backward from synthetic ingredients to their original source, she developed our proprietary Phyto Radiance Infusion, a meticulous three-week process that captures the full spectrum of nourishing plant actives. Taking 66 times longer than the industry standard, it sits at the heart of every formula and delivers compounding, long-term results.

We release products slowly and intentionally, only after years of research, and only when they are true game-changers. In our first eleven years, we launched just three products, designed to work together as a powerful, minimalist routine. We don’t make your next products; we make your last, the ones you choose for life.

As a certified B Corporation and pioneer of Positive Beauty, we exist to positively impact skin, spirit, and our shared world. Since day one, we’ve donated 2% of every purchase to organizations supporting women and children globally. Vintner’s Daughter is a lighthouse for a more thoughtful, sustainable, and joyful future in beauty, rooted in integrity, craftsmanship, and respect for living skin.

Name: Global Cosmetics
Description:
Global Cosmetics (HK), and its wholly owned factory Global Cosmetics (China) is a leading skincare, personal care and color cosmetic enterprise in HK & China. We market both branded skincare & color cosmetic, as well as engaging OEM/ODM business for overseas retailers in the same product categories.Global is built up with a strong group of experience professionals throughout Asia.

t. (852) 2522 2811 f. (852) 2973 0033

Disponible sur notre site

Name: Paese Cosmetics Poland
Description:
Euphora jest polską firmą-producentem kosmetyków kolorowych i właścicielem marki PAESE Cosmetics, obecnej na rynku od 2008 roku.
 
Nazwa marki wzięła swój początek od włoskiego słowa "paese", które oznacza krainę. Dla nas PAESE to kraina piękna dla kobiet o wszystkich typach urody i skóry.  

Produkujemy kosmetyki kolorowe, ale naszym Klientkom oferujemy nie tylko produkty. Oferujemy przede wszystkim ideę – ideę piękna, poczucia wartości i wyjątkowości. Markę PAESE Cosmetics tworzy zespół ludzi z pasją, zaangażowaniem, którzy dzielą się swoją wiedzą i doświadczeniem. 

Asortyment produktów obejmuje kosmetyki do makijażu dostępne w szerokiej gamie kolorystycznej, takie jak: podkłady, pudry, cienie, pomadki, błyszczyki, bazy pod makijaż, korektory itd. Dodatkowo w swojej ofercie posiadamy serię pielęgnacyjną, którą tworzą produkty do demakijażu, naturalne oleje, wysokiej jakości kwas hialuronowy czy serum z innowacyjną formą witaminy C oraz akcesoria.

Własna produkcja pozwala nam na staranne dobieranie składników nie tylko pod względem funkcjonalności czy stosowania, ale również dodatkowych właściwości pielęgnacyjnych. Wszystkie kosmetyki zawierają w swoim składzie komponenty naturalne, kompleksy witamin, oleje, woski, minerały czy filtry przeciwsłoneczne. Dbamy, by ilość użytych składników aktywnych gwarantowała ich skuteczne działanie.

Naszą wysoką jakość doceniano w wielu konkursach i plebiscytach od samego początku działalności - markę wyróżniono min. tytułem Doskonałość Roku 2010 Twój Styl, czy wieloma innymi tytułami w plebiscytach Glammies, Best Beauty Buys, Stylowy Kosmetyk, Qltowy Kosmetyk, Must Have Make-up Trendy, Produkt Roku Women's Health.

Kosmetyki marki PAESE dostępne są w ponad 50 krajach na całym Świecie.

Name: PERSEIDA BELLEZA S.L.
Description:
PERSEIDA BELLEZA (Perseida Beauty) es un fabricante español con certificación ISO 9001: 2015, ISO 22716: 2008, GMP y IFS HPC propiedad 100% del Grupo CL Industrial. Cuenta con un potente laboratorio de I+D+i en continuo crecimiento. Full Service es nuestra mayor ventaja competitiva, somos one stop shop en el mercado de la perfumería, belleza e higiene personal.
Nuestra experiencia en desarrollo, fabricación y envasado de productos de perfumería, belleza e higiene personal nos hace un referente en el sector Private Label para el segmento retail y Contract Manufacturing.
Apostamos por la innovación, reflejada en la amplia gama de productos que desarrollamos y que ofrecemos a los clientes a un coste competitivo, ofreciendo productos de calidad y tendencia que puedan satisfacer las necesidades de los consumidores finales.
Experiencia y capacidad de adaptación nos permite fabricar productos únicos atendiendo a las necesidades de cada cliente o marca a nivel de diseño, formulación y packaging, creando productos únicos, exclusivos y de calidad.  
Entre nuestros clientes, se encuentran las primeros retailers de distribución de renombre internacional, prestigiosas cooperativas farmacéuticas, conocidas cadenas hoteleras y numerosas marcas de fabricantes.  Nuestros productos se pueden encontrar en más de 17 países.
Póngase en contacto con nosotros para cualquier proyecto que tenga, para la fabricación de sus productos cosméticos, perfumería o higiene personal. Podemos fabricar según sus fórmulas y requisitos a medida, o desarrollar fórmulas y envases con usted de acuerdo a sus necesidades para que su proyecto sea un éxito.  Disponemos de más de 1.500 fórmulas en nuestro portfolio, con todos los niveles de calidad y precio de acuerdo a la Legislación Europea. 



Página web de la empresa: www.perseida.com
Página web del grupo: grupoindustrialcl.com
Correo electrónico de contacto: info@perseida.com
Teléfono fijo: +34 924 750 512

Name: Orebella
Description:
Reveal your alchemy

Name: Thirdbase
Description:
At Thirdbase, we’re redefining intimacy for millions of Indians. We sell thoughtfully crafted  sleek, modern intimate wellness products, designed to elevate pleasure and connection, whether solo or with a partner. 

Our mission is simple: make your bedroom experience more fun, fulfilling, and joyful. Let’s make every moment of love unforgettable!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Naty I Certified B Corp
Description:
Naty (formerly Eco by Naty) is a Swedish pioneer in certified, plant-based hygiene care, founded in 1994 by a mother seeking safer alternatives for her baby. Today, Naty develops high-performance hygiene products for babies and women, combining biobased innovation, certified skin safety, and full transparency.

As a certified B Corp, Naty meets verified standards for social and environmental performance, accountability, and governance. All products are developed with a skin-first approach and backed by independent third-party certifications, including OEKO-TEX, FSC, Dermatest, Ecocert Cosmos Natural, and TÜV Austria.

Naty’s portfolio spans diapers / nappies, wipes, pads, tampons, and more, sold in over 30 markets worldwide. The brand has received multiple industry recognitions, including the Loved by Parents Award for product excellence and Most Pioneering Personal Care CEO 2025 (EU Business News).

Certified care. Built for trust. Since 1994

Name: Swiss American CDMO
Description:
Swiss-American is a full-service CDMO (Contract Development & Manufacturing Organization) delivering innovation & superior manufacturing solutions for more than 30 years. We help people achieve healthy skin by developing and manufacturing topical skin and wound care products for companies worldwide.

Our broad perspective and experience often lead to novel and more effective product solutions which deliver superior performance and enable a sustainable competitive advantage. We routinely develop healthcare products for use throughout the world, we are knowledgeable about various international preferences and regulatory requirements.

There is no way around it—we are simply obsessed with quality. While we strive to put forward our best products, our passion is what keeps us working around the clock. That same passion is what you should look for in a CDMO. Needless to say, we don't put our name behind anything that doesn't exceed expectations. 

Skin, sun and wound care. Whatever it may be, we're always #SurpassingStandards. That's what we owe to you.

Name: Wholehealth Pharmacy Partners
Description:
Established in 2016, Wholehealth Pharmacy Partners is Canada's fastest growing independent pharmacy banner with over 270 pharmacies and growing! We provide enterprising pharmacists with a strategic blend of operational autonomy, formulary expertise, educational programs, marketing resources, business transparency, geographic exclusivity, proven leadership, and long-term value.

Our mentality is simple: we’re pharmacists supporting pharmacists. This approach is based around the reality that our leadership team is built around pharmacists who are proven leaders within the profession. This uniquely positions Wholehealth to leverage dynamic pharmacy insight and extensive experience working with industry stakeholders and vendors.

Wholehealth pharmacies are known by our patients for a uniquely personal experience that blends empathy with a very high quality of health care while helping to enrich the communities they serve. Our partners retain their independence as a core principle ensuring we keep the ‘independent’ in independent pharmacy!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: R&D Color srl
Description:
At R&D Color, we bring beauty to life with precision and creativity. 
From initial inspiration to product development and packaging design, we craft tailor-made makeup and skincare solutions that embody Italian craftsmanship and cutting-edge innovation. 
Every step of our process reflects our commitment to excellence, from the meticulous attention to detail that defines our work to the high-performance formulas we develop, designed to deliver exceptional results and meet the latest industry trends.
Made in Italy is more than a label for us—it is a symbol of quality, style, and innovation recognized worldwide.
With a deep passion for beauty, we create products that inspire, captivate, and elevate the everyday experience.
At R&D Color, we transform ideas into extraordinary solutions, shaping the future of beauty with every creation.

-

In R&D Color, diamo vita alla bellezza con precisione e creatività.
Dall’ispirazione iniziale allo sviluppo del prodotto e al design del packaging, realizziamo soluzioni su misura per makeup e skincare che incarnano l’artigianalità italiana e l’innovazione all’avanguardia.
Ogni fase del nostro processo riflette il nostro impegno verso l’eccellenza: dalla meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli che caratterizza il nostro lavoro, alle formule ad alte prestazioni che sviluppiamo, pensate per offrire risultati eccezionali e rispondere alle ultime tendenze del settore.
Made in Italy per noi non è solo un’etichetta, ma un simbolo di qualità, stile e innovazione riconosciuto in tutto il mondo.
Con una profonda passione per la bellezza, creiamo prodotti che ispirano, conquistano ed elevano l’esperienza quotidiana.
In R&D Color trasformiamo idee in soluzioni straordinarie, plasmando il futuro della bellezza con ogni nostra creazione.

Name: National Beauty Distribution
Description:
National Beauty Distribution is a leading importer and wholesaler of products to the beauty and cosmetics industry in Ireland. We are dedicated to providing quality sales and marketing expertise to all our sales partners.

We are equally focused on establishing an in-depth understanding of the products we source as well as the effective marketing of all brands we represent. Combine this with the significant level of stock that we carry at all times and you can be guaranteed that National Beauty Distribution is the missing link in your supply chain that you have been looking for.

We work with a wide variety of retailers across Ireland from beauty salons to high-street outlets so we are certain to understand your needs. We work closely with our customers to insure that our products sell quickly by making sure that your staff are as well trained on the brands as we are. We also make a wide variety of brochures and point-of-sale material available to you. For new products, we will provide you with samples free of charge.

Name: Ourself
Description: We are Advanced Skincare Delivery for Results that Run Deep. OURSELF is the only company who has focused on a highly-advanced delivery system to more effectively penetrate the skin, without needles, for maximum impact.  Along with patented scientific delivery, Ourself products stimulate more bioactivity in the skin, speed up visible results, and ultimately simplify your daily regimen with all-in-one products that help patients look and feel their very best.

Name: Royal Sanders (UK) Limited
Description:
Royal Sanders is a global business operating in the health and beauty space with production facilities in the UK as well as other sites across Europe including Holland, Germany and Belgium.

Our core activities are centred on the three business areas of private label manufacturing, contract manufacturing and our own brand portfolio consisting of Cuticura, Soft & Gentle, Inecto and Provoke.

RSUK is located in Preston, Lancashire, with manufacturing, quality, R&D, Commercial and support services, all on one site.  We also have a distribution centre located in Blackburn and a brand hub in Bracknell, Berkshire.
 
We pride ourself on having the best people to deliver a world-class service to our customers with a focus on product innovation, efficiency, sustainability and personal development.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Savonnerie Marius Fabre
Description:
"Depuis plus de 120 ans et quatre générations familiales, nous nous efforçons de maintenir un savoir-faire plus que jamais menacé : fabriquer du vrai savon de Marseille en respectant les techniques de saponification en chaudron.
Notre secret, c’est un tour de main transmis de génération en génération, de père en fils puis de père en fille.

Notre critère absolu, c’est la qualité des matières premières.

Notre savon est fabriqué exclusivement à partir d’huiles végétales, dont la précieuse huile d’olive. Il ne contient ni colorant ni adjuvant de synthèse. C’est cette pureté exceptionnelle qui lui confère ses vertus pour la peau et en fait l’un des meilleurs amis de l’environnement.

Tous nos produits sont le fruit de la même philosophie.
Savoir-faire, patience et exigence sont les règles d’un art qui permet à la savonnerie Marius Fabre d’offrir un savon de Marseille aux qualités toujours inégalées.

Nous sommes fières de poursuivre aujourd’hui l’aventure commencée en 1900 par notre arrière-grand-père, Marius Fabre".

Marie et Julie Bousquet-Fabre

Depuis 1900, les produits Marius Fabre sont tous fabriqués selon la même philosophie :
- à partir d’huiles végétales
- sans graisses animales
- sans colorant ni paraben
- non testés sur les animaux 
- biodégradables, respectueux de l’environnement
- emballages recyclables

Name: NUTRISHE (PT Naura Global Indonesia)
Description: A skincare brand inspired by the diversity of Indonesian. We believe that everyone is beautiful in their own way. When we create Nutrishe products, we choose high-quality ingredients. Our goal is to make people embrace their own beauty and be the best version of themselves.

Name: HAAN
Description:
Turning Care Around
HAAN is a personal care brand that wants to build a better future for the planet and humanity. Our aim is to celebrate the pleasure of self-care through a disruptive approach where sustainability and effectiveness meet style.

Name: MIRABELLA BEAUTY
Description:
Mirabella Beauty | Professional Clean Cosmetics Trusted by Salons, Spas & Artists for 20+ Years

Mirabella Beauty is True to You—a professional clean beauty brand dedicated to creating high-performance, skin-loving formulas that deliver both safety and results. For over two decades, we’ve been a trusted leader in professional cosmetics, earning loyalty from makeup artists, salons, spas, and beauty enthusiasts with products that are gluten-free, talc-free, and cruelty-free.

Founded on the belief that makeup should enhance, not mask, Mirabella has become the go-to brand for professionals who demand salon-quality, inclusive, and high-performing clean beauty products. Each formula is developed with real, skin-loving ingredients and tested for comfort, wearability, and long-lasting performance. From foundations with flawless coverage to pigment-rich eyeshadows and long-wear lipsticks, Mirabella delivers products designed to meet professional standards while being loved by everyday wearers.

 Trusted – For over 20 years, beauty professionals have relied on Mirabella’s clean, high-quality makeup backed by performance and integrity.
 Real – Every product is crafted with clean ingredients, free from harmful fillers and substitutes, for results that are safe and effective.
 Universal – Our inclusive formulas and shade ranges embrace all skin tones, empowering individuality and celebrating diversity.
 Effective – At Mirabella, clean beauty never sacrifices performance. We partner with top labs to create innovative, professional-grade cosmetics that perform as powerfully as they are pure.

At Mirabella Beauty, we believe beauty should be empowering, inclusive, and inspiring. Our mission is to redefine professional clean beauty by combining artistry, innovation, and integrity—delivering products that professionals trust and clients love.

Name: Ideal Cosméticos
Description: Fundada em 1967 e focada em ser uma referência em beleza e bem-estar, a Ideal busca desenvolver cosméticos com o mais alto padrão de qualidade, apresentando níveis de excelência e satisfazendo consumidores, clientes, parceiros e acionistas da empresa de maneira sustentável, apresentando sempre produtos com excelente custo benefício.

Name: OPDSure
Description:
OPDSure is a comprehensive healthcare plan that focuses on outpatient department (OPD) expenses, covering doctor fees, pharmacy costs, diagnostic tests, and full-body check-ups ¹.

This plan is designed to help individuals and families manage their OPD expenses, which can account for up to 75% of their lifetime medical costs ¹.

*Key Features:*

- *Age Limit*: The plan is available for adults up to 59 years and children up to 25 years ². Senior Citizen 60+
- *Doctor Consultation*: The plan covers in-clinic doctor consultations with a limit of ₹500 to ₹2,000 per visit.
- *Specialist Coverage*: OPDSure offers coverage for specialist consultations anytime anywhere, 24/7 access to any clinic & hospitals, including allopathy, homeopathy, ayurveda, and unani.
- *Online Specialist Coverage*: The plan provides FREE unlimited online specialist consultations with over 30 specialist doctors.
- *Pharmacy Bills*: OPDSure covers 50%* of prescribed pharmacy bills, from ₹250 to ₹1,000/- per doctor visit.
- *Diagnostic Tests*: The plan covers 50% of prescribed diagnostic tests, from ₹250 to ₹1,000/- per doctor visits.
- *Preventive Health Checkups*: OPDSure offers complimentary preventive health checkups for all members including vitamin checks in our top subscriptions plan. 

*Benefits:*

- Affordable outpatient healthcare coverage for employees and families.
- Focus on preventive care to reduce medical costs in the long run.
- Convenient scheduling and access to premium doctor consultations.

Overall, OPDSure seems to be a comprehensive and convenient healthcare plan that prioritizes outpatient care and preventive measures.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Nala's Baby
Description: Nala’s Baby was created from a genuine place of love before anything else, from a family that wanted the absolute best for their daughter’s hair & skin. We offer a natural, clean and trusted take on skin and hair care for the family. Our products have been scientifically created with love and extra care to cater to your little one from a newborn all the way through to childhood. Here at Nala’s Baby, we understand how sensitive your baby’s skin and scalp can be, and how important it is to choose the right products without worry. Our products are naturally derived, non- toxic, soothing and nourishing, with beneficial ingredients for your little cub. Our entire natural range is paediatrician and dermatologist approved. We are suitable for sensitive and eczema prone skin, as well as being vegan, tear free and cruelty free. Being socially responsible, it was a priority for us to source ethically and ensure our products are environmentally friendly and recyclable. We are also rated 0 (cleanest) on the world’s largest ingredient rating app, ‘Think Dirty’. We are proud to be the only brand in Boots retail stores with this rating. Nala’s Baby is a brand you can trust with your little cub’s skin and well-being.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

All our scents, like those moments that forge us, heartfelt declarations, gestures of tenderness, stolen kisses, tell a part of your story. Scents of your life.

Name: BFF Cosmetics
Description:
We are proud to be the leading cosmetics brand that continues to grow in in the cosmetics industry, in our quality and hygiene standards for more than 44 years with our mission-based goals. We are a manufacturing company, focused on quality and process, aiming at customer satisfaction, and offering pleasant experiences, innovative and free. We are a company that enjoys producing solutions and embraces a business model that respects nature and labour. BFF Cosmetics’ headquarter is in Tuzla/Istanbul.

The factory is 10.000 m2 and our facility has in-house development capabilities from Export & Import Department, Sales Department, Marketing and Graphic Design Department, R&D Department and Warehousing. Since 2010, our brand BFF Cosmetics, which has been leading the sector in many areas of cosmetics with its 10,000 product formulations per year, technology laboratories and constantly developing R&D studies; continues to impress the whole world with its own brands and extensive international Private Label production and product designs. BFF Cosmetics has a wide range of portfolio types such as production of Hair, Skin, Body, Men, Feminine, Oral, Sun, Foot, Baby Care products and also EDT & Cologne, SPA & Massage, Ambient Scenting products. Apart from the Private Label production network, we make a difference in cosmetics with our own brands Petite Maison and Pielor with more than 400 SKU products.

In our facility with a total of 16.000 m2 of integrated production standards, we lead scientific developments with our strong production network, we are exporting to over 140 countries in 7 continents. Our products are in chain markets such as Douglas, Müller, Manor, Carrefour, Auchan, Maxima, Géant, Konzum and DM.

Daily Production Capacity of our Facilities:
• 44.500 kg of Creams & Conditioners & Gels
• 197.000 lt of Shower Gel & Shampoo & Liq. Hand Wash & EDT
• 190.000 lt of Water & Raw Materials & Alcohol
• 450.240 units of Tube Filling & Bottle & Jars & Vacuum & Wrapping

Name: florence by mills

That’s why she named florence after her great-grandma, a woman who embraced herself and did things that made her happy all her life.

Name: Omum
Description:
OMUM is a French Organic and Vegan certified cosmetic brand, dedicated to pregnant women and new mothers.

OMUM offers a glamorous, modern and feminine vision of motherhood, with 7 solutions focused products adapted to the specific needs of expectant mothers and new mum’s skins.

OMUM reintroduces emotion in pregnancy, with the best safety standards on the market:

http://www.omum.fr/nos-boutiques

Description:
Our customers can create their ideal beauty experience. We offer personalized service that fits the customer.  All they need to do is tell us if they'd like a one-on-one consultation, a party with friends, a virtual party, makeup tips, skin care advice or free samples.

Name: Cosmetics & Perfume Filling & Packaging, Inc.
Description:
Cosmetics & Perfume Filling & Packaging, Inc. is a full service contract filling, blending, and packaging company serving the fragrance industry for over three decades. It occupies a 254,000 square feet state of the art facility conveniently located in Monroe, New Jersey. 
CPFPI prides itself on offering all the services needed and expected by its client, specializing in but not limited to fine fragrance products. 
Onsite we have an R&D lab and quality department to create, monitor and ensure that all products meet our customer’s needs and comply with all regulations.

For more information and requests contact us at request@cpfpi.com.

Name: Yasharth
Description: Yasharth is involved in end to end project management in the personal care arena. We are committed to partner with our customers in development of their products right from concept creation to shipping finished products. Our aim is to evolve into a global and agile solution provider for the beauty and wellness industry with focus on innovation as well as sustainability.

Name: Laboratorio LACA - Oficial
Description:
Laboratorio LACA es una empresa argentina fundada en 1956 dedicada al servicio integral de la belleza profesional. Tiene una completísima línea de productos para el cuidado facial, corporal y maquillajes elaborados con principios activos dermatocosméticos innovadores.

Estos productos se comercializan a través de profesionales de la belleza (cosmetólogas, esteticistas, maquilladores, manicuras, depiladoras, etc.), centros de estética y spas.

Hace ya varios años el laboratorio ha logrado la certificación ISO 9001 de su Sistema de Gestión de Calidad que abarca el desarrollo, la fabricación, el envasado y el despacho de todos los productos cosméticos que se producen en la empresa.

Los productos son avalados por normas GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice o Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura). Esto es una garantía de calidad que asegura que los productos se fabriquen en forma uniforme y controlada, de acuerdo con las normas adecuadas al uso que se pretende dar a los productos y conforme con las condiciones exigidas para su comercialización.

Todos los perfumes que se utilizan en las formulaciones son libres de alérgenos, esto reduce considerablemente las posibilidades de que un producto produzca una reacción.

LACA ofrece actualización y capacitación permanente en Cosmetología, Cosmiatría, Estética corporal, Maquillaje Social/Profesional, Maquillaje Artístico, Manicuría y Pedicuría.

Cuenta con una importantísima red de sucursales en Argentina y en el exterior.

LACA, tu belleza por profesionales.

Name: Kevyn Aucoin Beauty
Description:
About Kevyn Aucoin Beauty:

Kevyn Aucoin was a man ahead of his time. The self-made makeup artist turned industry icon painted and sculpted some of the day's most famous and beautiful faces his short, yet prolific career. Though he worked with celebrities and royalty, he is an inspiration, most profoundly, to all women, revealing true timeless beauty in a way no one has before or since. His talent went beyond the technical, able to highlight and transform not only a woman's assets, but reveal something deeper within her soul.

Despite his untimely passing in 2002, Kevyn Aucoin's vision lives on through his unrivaled, time-tested techniques, his New York Times best-selling books The Art of Makeup, Making Faces, and Face Forward, and the Kevyn Aucoin Beauty brand he founded and launched in 2001. Aucoin's most important legacy is the passion he left us with, imparting the wisdom that while true beauty is more than skin deep, it is through the transformative power of makeup that we can discover something deeper about our true selves. Kevyn Aucoin Beauty celebrates uncovering the beauty of the soul, which continues to thrive in our ever-expanding line of iconic products designed to bring out the beauty in you.

Name: Cosmoderma
Description:
Cosmoderma develops and produces innovative cosmetic products for the most well-known international cosmetic brands, realizing the most ambitious projects of its customers for over forty years.

To always guarantee maximum excellence in Research and Development, Cosmoderma puts the high competence of its cosmetic laboratories at the center of its corporate mission.

In Cosmoderma laboratories there is a team of highly qualified researchers specialized in the study and realization of different types of formulations: face and body creams, face serums, sanitizing gels, face and hair masks, face and body scrubs, cleansers.

The client's company profile is studied starting from the brief to achieve the set objectives, aiming at differentiation from competitors and respecting the defined target price.

The study of the formulation is completely tailor-made according to the client's business specificities thanks to the search for raw materials that follow the most current trends ensuring the effectiveness of the products in collaboration also with researchers from Italian universities and laboratory tests to evaluate stability and the compatibility of the formula within the defined packaging.

The production strength of Cosmoderma expands through a network of international production sites (Europe, Australia and the USA) which allows to geolocate the production according to the customer's logistical and commercial needs. The different production units allow us to fulfill the requests for large quantities of supply in the shortest times, always guaranteeing the expected quality and the protection of the intellectual property of the formulations.

Ethics and sustainability are the foundation and completion of our daily actions to continue to grow responsibly.
Location: San Benedetto Val di Sambro, Italia

Name: Oak Essentials
Description: Oak Essentials is clean, foundational skincare for everyone—at every age. We believe in an approach to beauty where skincare is seen as a trusted routine designed to simplify everyday living. Regardless of skin type or age, our mission is to empower individuals from all walks of life to celebrate aging gracefully.

Name: Natura Siberica Greece
Description:
It’s in our Nature!

Η Natura Siberica είναι μία καινοτόμος σειρά καλλυντικών που συνδυάζει τις ευεργετικές ιδιότητες των αρχέγονων βιολογικών άγριων βοτάνων και φυτών της Σιβηρίας με την σύγχρονη επιστήμη της βιολογίας για να προσφέρει προϊόντα περιποίησης για τις απαιτητικές ανάγκες του σύγχρονου ανθρώπου.  
 
Η ιδέα χρήσης βιολογικών άγριων βοτάνων, γεννήθηκε το 1940 από δύο διάσημους βοτανολόγους, οι οποίοι μελέτησαν περισσότερα από 4.000 φυτά που ευδοκιμούν στην Σιβηρία και χρονολογούνται από την εποχή των παγετώνων. Γνωστή για τις σύνθετες και ακραίες κλιματολογικές συνθήκες με ισχυρούς ανέμους και θερμοκρασίες από - 57°C  τον Χειμώνα έως +35°C το Καλοκαίρι, τα φυτά της Σιβηρίας, έχουν αναπτύξει ιδιαίτερα ανθεκτικά συστατικά, μοναδικές αντιοξειδωτικές ιδιότητες και χαρακτηριστικά τα οποία συμβάλλουν στη βελτίωση της συνολικής κατάστασης της υγείας της επιδερμίδας και πολλά εκ αυτών  επιβραδύνουν και την διαδικασία γήρανσης. 

Σε αυτή την ιδέα ήρθε να προστεθεί η σύγχρονη επιστήμη της βιολογίας με τα ενεργά συστατικά όπως το υαλουρονικό, τα πεπτίδια, η νιασιναμίδη, η φυτική ρετινόλη, το SYN-AKE, το SYN-COL και πολλά άλλα τα οποία ενισχύουν την δράση των φυσικών συστατικών, δημιουργώντας μοναδικές φόρμουλες πιστοποιημένες από την ICEA κορυφαίο οργανισμός πιστοποίησης βιολογικών προϊόντων στην Ιταλία. 
Στην Natura Siberica θα βρείτε σειρές περιποίησης για το πρόσωπο, το σώμα, τα μαλλιά καθώς επίσης και για τα κατοικίδια. Όλα τα προϊόντα περιέχουν έως και 95% πιστοποιημένα φυσικά βιολογικά συστατικά και είναι απαλλαγμένα από parabens, σιλικόνη, τεχνητά αρώματα και τεχνητές ουσίες.

Name: DAISE Beauty
Description: We think beauty and self-care could be less serious and more open-minded, so we made DAISE as a world where beauty meets play. A non-intimidating place where you’re free to experiment with mood-matching products that help you express who you are and discover who you want to be. Our range of bath, body, fragrance and lip products are yours to layer, mix and match to make your DAISE—just add you!

Name: Per-Scent
Description: Per-Scent is the UK's leading fragrance distributor of the most sought after brands across premium, celebrity and lifestyle fragrances.

Name: Flamingo
Description:
Flamingo is an award-winning body, hair, and care brand delivering high-performance, thoughtfully designed products at an accessible price. Since launching in 2018, Flamingo has become the #3 player in women’s shave in the U.S. and expanded our assortment to offer products for every routine: razors, wax steps for face and body, shave gel, and body lotion. With a mission to empower women, we’re committed to partnering with nonprofit partners working to help women and girls build healthy relationships with their bodies and have helped connect over 200K individuals to quality mental health and wellbeing resources. 

Flamingo is part of Mammoth Brands, the modern CPG company. Driven by a mission to “Create Things People Like More,” the company’s growing family of brands—Harry’s, Flamingo, Lume, Mando, and Coterie—offers exceptional products that speak to today’s consumer, and as a result have become an essential part of millions of people’s daily routines.

Name: Pichara
Description:
En Pichara, llevamos más de 50 años acompañando la belleza en Chile.
Nacimos en 1966 como un emprendimiento familiar dedicado a artículos de peluquería. En 1968 se sumó Don Abraham Pichara, quien con su visión transformó nuestra marca en un referente del rubro.

Durante los años 90, impulsados por el crecimiento del sector, creamos el Centro Técnico Pichara para apoyar a los profesionales con formación continua. Hoy seguimos ese legado educativo con academias en Santiago, Viña del Mar y Concepción, donde formamos a nuevas generaciones de expertos en peluquería y estética.

Actualmente contamos con más de 90 tiendas en todo Chile y presencia en Perú desde 2017. Este 2025 dimos un nuevo paso con la apertura de nuestros salones Mimi, un espacio donde la belleza y el cuidado personal se viven con estilo.

Somos pasión por la belleza, dedicación al servicio y compromiso con quienes hacen de esta industria algo extraordinario.

Name: CLINICAL SKIN
Description: Clinical Skin is at the forefront of skincare innovation, driven by the visionary leadership of industry titans Jaime Castle and Dr. Laurence Dryer. Founded on the principle that skincare is both a science and an art, Clinical Skin combines Castle's decades of expertise in brand development with Dr. Dryer's groundbreaking work in neuroscience and skincare. At the core of Clinical Skin's transformative approach lies its proprietary ACE Technology, a revolutionary blend of rapid antioxidant enzyme, free radical safeguards, and essential ceramides meticulously crafted to deliver targeted results for diverse skin concerns. With a relentless commitment to excellence and innovation, Clinical Skin is empowering individuals worldwide to embrace their natural beauty and achieve radiant, healthy skin.

Name: Louis Widmer SA
Description:
A life dedicated to skin
Louis-Edouard Widmer and his son Louis-Max Widmer devised this slogan when they set up Louis Widmer SA in September 1960. And yet why did they dedicate their life’s work to the skin? The founders of the company were fascinated by the unique complexity of the largest human organ and its innumerable elementary functions, a fascination that still characterises the entire company today and finds expression again and again in innovative products for the skin.

Quality from cure to care. From cleansing and skincare right through to medical preparations, Louis Widmer ensures optimum effectiveness and excellent tolerability. History has shown that the quality philosophy of Louis Widmer has not lost any of its topicality; the essentials have been preserved over decades.

At the same time, Louis Widmer has consistently used state of the art means to improve quality and allow new findings to be incorporated. The ultimate in quality, maximum possible effectiveness and optimum tolerability by the skin – the original credo is still lived and breathed in Schlieren to this day and facilitates the development of care products that have received awards for Louis Widmer.

Name: inovapotek
Description:

A Contract Research Organization providing customized R&D, Testing, Regulatory and Consulting services to the Personal Care, Pharmaceutical, Medical Devices and Food Supplements industries.
Our goal is to be in the scientific research vanguard, promoting the development of innovative products that meet both regulatory demands and consumers’ needs.

What we do
We provide a broad range of services worldwide from formulation development, to stability, safety, efficacy and consumer testing, as well as regulatory affairs, for the creation of fully customized, innovative, stable, safe, effective and regulatory compliant products for smaller to larger global brands.

How we do it
To help the creation of truly innovative solutions, we are driven by SCIENTIFIC EXCELLENCE and INNOVATION values. As understanding and studying our client’s needs and expectations is essential for the project's success, CLIENT FOCUS and COMMITMENT principles are in our DNA, and because we develop and test products for people, strong ETHICS values are visible on all our studies.

Name: Skinmology by Bening's Indonesia
Description:
Skinmology percaya bahwa merawat kulit bukan sekadar soal kecantikan, tetapi juga tentang kepercayaan diri dan mewujudkan versi terbaik dari dirimu sendiri. Karena kulit yang sehat bukan hanya fondasi, tapi juga bagian dari perjalanan untuk jadi lebih baik setiap hari.

Dengan filosofi yang berakar pada Scientific Precision, Holistic Wellness, dan penggunaan Best Ingredients from Europe, Skinmology menghadirkan pendekatan unik dalam perawatan kulit. Skinmology — Lock Your Bright

Name: Extratos da Terra
Description:
A trajetória da Extratos da Terra começou em 1988. Com o espírito empreendedor de seu administrador e fundador, Joel Aterino de Souza, a empresa deixou de ser um sonho e passou à realidade no ano de 1990, quando foi então registrada com o nome de Santa Terezinha Indústria e Comércio Ltda.

A escolha da marca Extratos da Terra surgiu da necessidade de se trabalhar com produtos naturais em virtude de uma carência de mercado nesse aspecto.

Levando em consideração essa necessidade e pensando no bem-estar do cliente, a Extratos da Terra passou a desenvolver produtos nas linhas capilar, corporal, de higiene e facial. Hoje a Extratos da Terra trabalha em sede própria com 2336.62 m², gerando 60 empregos diretos e dezenas de empregos indiretos e buscando cada vez mais parcerias e crescimento mútuo.

Possui uma rede de distribuidores na linha profissional pelo Brasil e atua também no mercado exterior, em países como Estados Unidos e Arábia Saudita, e na Europa. A Extratos da Terra possui um compromisso com o meio ambiente, o que fica muito claro com sua Política Ambiental, que defende a implantação da ISO 14.001.

Name: KRIIM
Description:
Kriim is a natural cosmetics brand born in Barcelona. We focus on in-store-experience offering the best organic cosmetic products in our stores and ecommerce. Our aim is to provide the perfect solutions and daily routine in order to make a difference. Our team of experts is encouraged to find out the best way to get our clients goals.

All our products are made of organic ingredients.

Natural | Design | Experience

Name: Soeder
Description:
A good product — in our understanding of the term — is one that you want to keep around for a long time. It is one that continues to bring joy and remains relevant because it doesn’t follow any trend. It is made simply, carefully and timelessly. We don’t follow the rules of a fast-paced market, nor its production methods. It is much more important to us to consider the veritable needs of people — those that make and those that buy the products — as well as the needs of nature. 

That’s why we develop and produce our own everyday
basics. We source their material down to the packaging and search for production partners that share our mindset, in Switzerland and all over Europe. And we never stop, for if we find even better material, we upgrade, and if there’s a more sustainable way of manufacturing, we are all for it. We all know enough about the existing and dire circumstances in which a lot of what we can purchase was made. It is our responsibility to change those circumstances now — because knowing your new product comes from good hands is what makes it truly invaluable.

Name: Aspects Beauty
Description:
We are a successful family-run company with a commitment to finding innovative, intelligent & creative ways to market, of engaging with retailers and of building luxury brands, adopting a flexible and open-minded approach to all our partnerships.

Our unique culture ensures our valued employees are at the heart of our business, where we encourage a strong sense of community, team spirit and pride in everything we do.  We work collectively and passionately towards achieving our goals and growing our brands, each team member bringing their own set of personal and professional skills, ideas and experiences, allowing us to do things a little differently, flourish together and always enjoy what we do.

Our specialised teams collaborate closely with our brand and retail partners, offering a wide array of services to create a customised approach to align perfectly with each brands unique requirements.

Brand Management & Marketing
Digital Expertise
Sales

Distribution, Logistics & Finance

You can rely on our support every step of the way.

Description:

It brings together an experienced and agile team of strategic and operational experts with a track record of launching market-leading consumer goods companies.

(USA) full range of products into the following regions:  Africa - Atlantic & Indian Ocean Islands - Middle East - Asia (AMEA)regions.

Somos contemporâneos e intensamente humanos.

Name: Santex S.p.A.
Description:
Since 1961 Santex never stopped evolving. Our goal is to bring to the world quality and innovation aimed at incontinence management and personal care.

VISION
As experts in incontinence, we care for the most vulnerable people, developing integrated solutions to improve their quality of life.

MISSION
We aim to preserve the quality of life of vulnerable people and their caregivers.

Our 100% Made in Italy manufacturing excellence and expertise enable us to produce devices and services to manage incontinence.
We believe in the value of our employees and invest in innovation and technology for a more sustainable future.

Santex is the trusted partner for those seeking reliability and expertise in the incontinence industry. We constantly invest in innovation, technology and sustainability, maintaining a high standard at every stage of production, from the selection of raw materials to the finished product.

Name: FARCOM S.A.
Description:
FARCOM is a greek manufacturing company, leading the cosmetics sector. It was initially established by the late former president, George Sarasidis in 1970 in Thessaloniki.

Since the beginning the company's mission has been to offer products of the highest quality to the hairdressers to enable them to reveal the beauty in every woman. Over the years the company extended this same idea to production of beauty and care products directly to consumers as well.

For over 50 years the company has maintained its strong presence and loyal customers in B2B and B2C markets, both in Greece and in over 50 countries abroad. Today FARCOM offers a wide range of cosmetics products including hair care, facial care, body and hand care, personal hygiene and oral care, making it one of the top Greek manufacturers and innovators in the cosmetics sector.

FARCOM offers its products and services in the following key areas:
Production of consumer products for retailers, such as supermarkets and beauty shops.
Production of professional products for hairdressers supported by exclusive seminars for professional customers.
Private label manufacturing.


FACILITIES

FARCOM’s privately owned headquarters are located in New Redestos (Thessaloniki), on a 31500m2 site and 5500m2 premises, which houses the Finance and Administration Department, Sales and Marketing Department, the Logistics Department, the Foreign Markets Department and the Industrial Design Department.
The production is made in its privately owned factory in Thessaloniki, on a 17000m2 site and 3500m2 premises equipped with the most modern equipment to ensure flexibility and quick response for meeting the increasingly growing market demands. The annual production capacity amounts to 13.500.000 units of hair color tubes and 45.000.000 units of miscellaneous products.

Description:
R+Co is a collective of some of the most knowledgeable, forward-thinking, rule-bending hairstylists in the business—a “supergroup” that has come together to make a “superline” of products and to share the knowledge garnered over a combined century of hairdressing. The lead stylists in the collective are industry legends Howard McLaren, Thom Priano and Garren. The line offers every single product that a hairdresser could possibly need in his or her kit, and each of those products embodies experimentation, design, artistry, passion and curiosity.

Founded in 1996, Bioswiss Group is leading company in the beauty and wellness treatment industry. As the umbrella company for Biosphere Cosmetics and BioskinSpa worldwide, we are committed to continuous innovation and improvement in the cosmetics and health sectors.

At Biosphere, we are dedicated to delivering individually tailored products and treatments that exceed our clients' expectations. Our products are made in Switzerland using the finest natural ingredients, ensuring they are safe even for the most sensitive skins.

BioskinSpa offers unparalleled wellness and anti-aging treatments coupled with exceptional service, employing the latest equipments and products to rejuvenate your body, and mind from the inside out. Our face care treatments combine superior skincare products with state-of-the-art aesthetic technologies to preserve your youthful skin. Our body remodeling therapies are designed to shape, tone, relax and defy aging, while our hair treatments nurture follicles from the scalp to the roots.

Our branches welcome you in Qatar, Lebanon, Egypt, the UAE and Saudi Arabia, and the Biosphere line is available in Lebanon, the GCC countries, Europe and Hong Kong.

Join us in our mission to provide exceptional beauty care services and to continue to innovate and improve the beauty care sector.

Name: RUDOLPH CARE
Description:
At Rudolph Care, we believe that true beauty is a balance between caring for your skin and caring for the world.

Our journey began with a single powerful ingredient – the açaí berry, a wonder of nature rich in essential fatty acids, antioxidants, and minerals. Harvested sustainably in the Amazon by a local community, this organic berry is the cornerstone of our skincare line.

Founded by Andrea Elisabeth Rudolph in 2009, Rudolph Care was born to create high-quality skincare products that are as kind to the planet as they are to your skin. Andrea’s vision was clear: to combine the purity of nature with the efficacy of science, offering a skincare line that feels incredible and delivers visible results.

From our development labs in Denmark to the shelves in your home, every Rudolph Care product is crafted with great attention to detail. We source only the highest quality ingredients, ensuring each formula is packed with active agents that nourish, protect, and enhance your skin’s natural glow. Our commitment to quality extends beyond skincare; it is rooted in our dedication to sustainability, ethical production, and transparency.

We hold ourselves to the highest standards, which is why our products are certified to validate our promise of care for your body and the environment. These certifications are not just labels; they embody our pledge to deliver safe, effective, and responsible skincare.

Rudolph Care is continuously evolving. We are driven by a passion for innovation, always seeking new knowledge and embracing new ways to make a positive impact. Our mission is to inspire and empower you to take care of your skin, knowing that each product you use is a step towards a more beautiful, sustainable world – for generations to come.

All Rudolph Care products are developed and manufactured in Denmark. 

Certified B Corporation since 2021. Founding member of the B Corp Beauty Coalition.

Atak Cosmetics is one of the pioneer companies in cosmetics sector offering Private Label service to its customers. In its reputable facility, production of both aerosol and liquid personal care products is available.
 
In addition to its investments in Turkey, Atak has taken action to build a facility in cosmetics industry in Dubai, in order to play more effective part in the Globalised World. ATAK aims at establishing international distribution of its product lines through the use of exclusive and nonexclusive distribution agreements in such major territories, such as Russia, Europe, Middle East, Far East, America and Africa.

 We have all necessary certificates. We value; safety, strict testing, special formulas, production compliant with pharmaceutical standards, investing in research, innovative offer, dynamically responding to market needs. We offer price and quality balance in products.

Name: Kat Burki Skincare
Description:
With over 30 years of education and research, Kat Burki has made a successful career in applying the proven principles of Nutritional Biochemistry to healthcare programs, policies, and skincare formulations.  

Kat founded her eponymous Biochemistry Backed Skincare line, formulated to be skin-communicating to maximize the health and healing of the body’s largest organ on the outside, the skin. Kat Burki products are clinically - proven formulations where every ingredient works synergistically with the other and is optimized for bioavailability, so you can finally achieve the fastest, greatest, long-lasting results. 

Kat Burki Skincare is committed to creating the most effective skincare through the proven principles of biochemistry and to teaching, showing, and supporting others so they can take control of their skin health journey once and for all and finally achieve the skin health results they desire without feeling duped, confused, or misled.

Name: EQUILIBRA
Description:
EQUILIBRA RISPETTA LA TUA NATURA

Name: DermaPharm A/S
Description: DermaPharm has been developing, producing and setting the standard for environment-friendly, mild and skin-friendly bodycare products for over 40 years. Our products are based on clean, eco and allergy-friendly raw materials produced under strict industry requirements and control. We have been approved by the Nordic Ecolabel and we are Ecocert/COSMOS certified within organic cosmetics and vegan certified by The Vegan Society. We also produce a wide range of products recommended by Asthma Allergy Nordic and Allergy Certified. What’s more, DermaPharm is also certified in compliance with the internationally recognized standards for quality and environmental management: IFS HPC and ISO 14001. Read more on our website.

Name: Ecobana Limited
Description:

Name: DermaQuest Clinical
Description:
Skin Health Isn’t Optional—It’s DermaQuest Essential

For over 25 years, DermaQuest has been a trusted partner to skincare professionals around the world, delivering advanced, Fitzpatrick-inclusive treatment solutions that elevate the client experience and drive visible, transformative results. With a commitment to education and partnership, DermaQuest empowers skincare professionals through comprehensive training in ingredient innovation, treatment planning, the DermaQuest Skin Health System, and strategic business development, equipping them with the tools to grow their practices and deliver exceptional care. Backed by an FDA-approved manufacturing facility and a team of globally recognized experts in formulation, manufacturing, and quality assurance, DermaQuest consistently delivers skincare solutions that meet the highest standards of safety, efficacy, and performance. Our products are trusted in treatment rooms and home care routines alike, offering professionals a reliable foundation to help clients achieve their healthiest, most radiant skin.

DermaQuest’s Skin Health System is a complete 4-step approach designed to strengthen, target, boost, and protect skin for lasting results. It begins with foundational skin health, focusing on the skin barrier, and progressing into advanced, layered solutions. This personalized system empowers professionals to treat every skin concern with confidence, both in the treatment room and at home.

Name: Bio Creative Labs
Description:
About Bio Creative Labs:
We seek to empower people everywhere to take control of their health. Our mission is to create effective, natural products that are good for you, and for the planet. We believe what you put on your body is just as important as what you put in it. We follow the world’s strictest ingredient standards by banning over 1,500 harmful ingredients in our products to protect you and the planet. We infuse our formulas with plant-based natural and organic ingredients to create high-quality products, naturally.
We believe that sustainability is both a company and employee responsibility, which is why we are transitioning to 100% Ocean-bound recycled packaging. We also donate 1% of our profit for education to support those in need. 
A trusted company all around the world, we have a strong international and domestic presence. Our products are sold across the Americas, Europe, and Asia.

About our Be Care Love Brand:
Be Care Love is driven by a passion to expand the mind, body, and soul, and all of our products are inspired by the mantra "Be. Care. Love." The Be Care Love Spa brand, formerly known as BCL Spa, was created for professionals in the hair care and salon world. Learn more at: https://www.bclspa.com/

About our Petal Fresh Brand:
Created under the California sun, Petal Fresh embodies a lifestyle of being health-conscious, eating right, and staying active outdoors. We never compromise on performance and we believe in being inclusive, affordable, and fun. Petal Fresh products are for anyone who wants effective, natural products for their hair and body. Since entering the market in 2019, NACIFIC has built a strong local presence through its clean, nature-inspired approach and commitment to effective, gentle skincare.

In 2023, Abill Korea joined forces with The Skin Factory (TSF), marking a new chapter of collaboration between two prominent personal care companies. The full merger in 2024 unified Abill Korea and TSF under one group, bringing Abill Indonesia Jaya into The Skin Factory family and strengthening our innovation, supply chain, and regional capabilities.

Today, AIJ continues to grow as the Indonesian home for NACIFIC and KUNDAL, supported by a passionate team of Nacimin and Mindal who are dedicated to delivering exceptional customer experiences. Our vision is to bring meaningful Korean beauty and lifestyle experiences to Indonesia, guided by innovation, quality, and genuine care for our consumers.

Name: The Solved Skin
Description:
Built out of a deep conviction on what good skincare looks like, The Solved Skin is on a mission to help people with skin concerns get clear, healthy, skin through simple to use everyday products that are really effective and build skin health over time. While working at some of the biggest beauty brands in the country, Divanshee noticed a troubling gap between promises made by skincare products and their actual results. So, with her co-founder Abhishek, together they’ve set out to challenge the status quo in the beauty industry, which has become super complex and overwhelming for consumers. Both are consumer obsessed leaders with over 2 decades of working experience between them across top organizations - Unilever and Gojek. 
If you’re a skincare junkie, and/or a high passion, energy person who wants to work on something that’s going to be disruptive in the skincare industry, we look forward to having you join our team. In case you don’t see a role that’s directly suitable for you, but you feel like you can be a great addition, please feel free to send us a DM or a mail 
What all you get by working with us
1. Learn directly from founders who understand consumers and beauty industry in and out. 
2. Work on exciting, challenging problems and have no time for existential crisis.
3. High ownership. You’ll get to think about problem from first principles, and explore solutions.
4. If you’re wired different, and have had trouble fitting in, you might find it extremely comforting to be around us

Name: CBDfx
Description:
CBDfx is a U.S. based company founded on providing high-quality cannabidiol (CBD) wellness products, made with the highest quality hemp, to customers in a wide variety of formats; from tinctures and topicals to gummies and capsules. Founded in 2014 with a mission to push quality to the forefront of the CBD industry, CBDfx provides some of the finest, purest, and most trusted CBD products in the world. CBDfx products are sold in more than 25,000 points of distribution in 21 countries, and online at CBDfx.com.

Mission:

CBDfx's mission is to deliver the finest, purest, and most effective CBD products on the planet. They aim to cater to both new and experienced users, providing them with a truly exceptional CBD experience.

Product Safety:

CBDfx prioritizes safety with every product they sell. These products are exclusively produced in Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) facilities under the strictest clinical-grade standards and supervision in the industry. In the spirit of transparency, CBDfx provides in-depth lab reports from independent, third-party laboratories. This Certificate of Analysis allows customers to shop with peace of mind, knowing that they are purchasing the highest-quality CBD products anywhere. Just look for the traceable QR code found on every CBDfx product, which allows every customer to see where, when, and how their products were produced before putting it on or into their bodies.

Extraction Process:

CBDfx uses a supercritical carbon dioxide (CO2) extraction process to extract CBD from hemp. This method is considered cleaner compared to solvent-based extraction, as it doesn't leave any chemical residue behind. However, it may result in a product with fewer aromatic terpenes, which are a natural component of hemp.

Reputation:

Since 2014, over 450,000 customers have trusted their wellness to CBDfx. They have gained a reputation for providing high-quality CBD products, with over 20,000 5-star reviews.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Secret Alchemist
Description:
Secret Alchemist began as an aromatherapy-led brand, dedicated to the mindful use of botanicals. Over time, we evolved into perfumery, bringing the same intention and purity to fragrance. We are shaping a new era of clean scents - crafted without parabens, phthalates, and other harmful additives.
With a legacy spanning over 35 years, we bring a modern perspective to time-tested ingredients, creating fragrances that are pure, balanced, and designed to enhance both beauty and well-being.

Name: Walker & Company Brands, Inc.
Description:
Walker & Company exists to make health and beauty simple for people of color. 

We do this by designing, developing, and testing products and services specifically tailored to our community's needs and delivering on the promise of great customer service and an easy, practical shopping experience

Name: Biomarine Dermocosméticos inovadores
Description: A Biomarine combina a biotecnologia marinha com um toque de caviar para criar dermocosméticos inovadores e de alta tecnologia, feitos com ativos de última geração para tratar do corpo e do rosto, dando à sua pele mais jovialidade e beleza. Nossos dermocosméticos são ricos em proteínas, aminoácidos, vitaminas do complexo B e sais minerais que realçam a beleza da pele e suavizam os sinais do tempo.

Name: Christophe Robin
Description:
Coloriste de renommée internationale, Christophe Robin commercialise en 1999 sa ligne de soins spécifique aux cheveux colorés, conçue à l’origine pour son usage professionnel. Il devait transformer tellement souvent et radicalement les tops - models qu’il a recherché des produits de soins ultra-performants pour restaurer en profondeur le cheveu.

A base d'ingrédients naturels comme l'huile de germe de blé, la lavande, le citron, la camomille, le bleuet, la myrtille, cette ligne est conçue pour nourrir, hydrater et protéger les cheveux sensibilisés ou fragilisés par les produits chimiques, décoloration et les éléments extérieurs.
Tous les produits sont sans paraben, alcool, silicone, oxydant, ammoniaque et SLS.

La marque Christophe Robin est en fort développement en France et à l'international. 
Elle est présente dans plus de 300 salons et parfumeries en France, et dans plus de 15 pays (Europe, Asie, USA, Australie).

Name: Gallinée Microbiome Skincare
Description:
You are a planet.
You are made up of human cells and of billions of bacteria living together in perfect harmony.
If you look after them, they will look after you.

At Gallinée we are the world’s first skin and haircare line dedicated to the health and wellbeing of Planet You. Your skin is made up of 1000s of good bacteria which form the protective layer called the microbiome. If the microbiome becomes unbalanced or stripped away, then your skin becomes inflamed and sensitive. Does this ring a bell? Well, we have the solution for you.

At Gallinée we believe in working with your microbiome to help it to look after you. Our products contain a patented complex of prebiotics, probiotics and postbiotics to nourish and support the good bacteria that make your own personal ecosystem. Helping them to look after even the most sensitive skin.

At Gallinée we’re a young company but we dream big. We’re a team of passionate nerds, full of doctorates, patents and a dedication to you. We believe we can change the world of beauty forever. Come and join the bacterial revolution.

Gallinée. You are 50% bacteria*. Care for them.
*not an insult.

Name: Pevonia International LLC
Description: Pevonia believes the most powerful ingredients in skincare come from the safest source – nature. For more than three decades, Pevonia has used highly sustainable processes in line with the company’s stance on environmental conservation, and in 2019, the company became a proud supporter of charity: water. Pevonia delivers outstanding multicultural solutions to nearly 130 countries by restoring, de-aging and revitalizing our largest and most visible organ…our skin! The company tests only on humans and is a renowned leader in delivering natural skincare solutions to elite spas and leading aestheticians globally. As a multi-award winning brand, Pevonia is coveted by celebrities and beauty/wellness influencers and often featured in leading worldwide press, praising our natural solutions for delivering outstanding, instant and long-term results.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Eskayvie Sdn Bhd
Description:
Eskayvie Sdn Bhd | Empowering the Economy and Health of Mankind

Established in 2009, Eskayvie Sdn Bhd is a health and wellness company founded by visionary leaders Dr. Syid Ayob Syid Mustafa Al-Qudri and Kartika Wati Mohamed. Built on a strong foundation of innovation, science and social responsibility, Eskayvie has grown into a leading name in the health and beauty industry with a presence in Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, Brunei and the Philippines.

For over 15 years, Eskayvie has enriched lives through premium nutraceutical products, scientifically formulated to support holistic health. From anti-aging innovations to immune boosters and cognitive enhancers, every product is developed by an expert in modern, alternative and anti-aging medicine, ensuring the highest quality standards in formulation and manufacturing.

Driven by a strong mission to enhance the quality of life, Eskayvie combines cutting-edge research, world-class ingredients and GMP-certified production to deliver effective, safe and natural health solutions. The company’s holistic approach is anchored on five health pillars: Detoxification, Restoration, Rejuvenation, Stabilisation and Immunity.

Beyond product excellence, Eskayvie is committed to empowering communities. Through Eskayvie Nexus, a digital entrepreneurial platform, the company has enabled over 85,000 individuals to build sustainable income streams. Meanwhile, Eskayvie Academy offers comprehensive training and education to nurture knowledgeable and successful entrepreneurs.

Eskayvie’s philanthropic arm, the Eskayvie Foundation (Yayasan Eskayvie), champions meaningful social impact by supporting underserved communities through healthcare and essential support initiatives.

With bold aspirations to expand into 11 ASEAN countries by 2027 and become the world’s leading halal health and beauty brand, Eskayvie continues to redefine wellness with integrity, innovation and purpose.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DBG Health
Description: DBG Health (DBG) is Australia’s leading diversified health, wellness, and beauty group, built on a mission to make better health more accessible. Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, DBG operates across five core divisions: Arrotex Pharmaceuticals, VidaCorp Consumer Brands, Independent Pharmacies of Australia (IPA), AXE Health Services, and myDNA.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: This Works
Description:
This Works was created in 2003 by former Beauty Director of Vogue UK and International journalist, Kathy Phillips, as an antidote to modern life, its impact on skin and wellbeing.

As both yoga teacher and beauty expert, Kathy understood the link between lifestyle and skin health, creating intelligent, targeted solutions that optimise skin performance 24 hours a day, based on the body clock. .

The result was and is a collection of high quality, efficacious products that deliver on their promise without using unnecessary chemicals, that work with your natural Circadian Rhythm to support and maximise skin performance 24 hours a day. This Works was among the pioneer brands to replace sulphates, phalates, GMOs and parabens with cleaner alternatives.

Name: National Care Group
Description: National Care Group is an e-commerce platform for medical and personal care products based in Kuwait.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratorio Copahue
Description:
We are a laboratory that originated 33 years ago in the tourist center of Caviahue – Copahue, which is located in the heart of the Andes mountain range. Situated northwest of the province of Neuquén at 2,000 meters above sea level, at the foothills of the Copahue Volcano, and on the shores of Caviahue Lake is where we source our natural ingredients.

Our essence is nature, and we want to preserve it with a sustainable and socially responsible business. In all our brands, we are guided by the same path, a unique fusion between the best of nature and the power of science.

Cremas Caviahue is a Thermal Dermocosmetic brand that has provided the best care for your skin since 1989. We want to share the magic of our unique origins to the people who want to take care of their skin, from our Patagonia to the world. Therefore, maintaining the highest quality and the properties of our products with Thermal Water of the Copahue Volcano. 

Mizu is a brand of dietary supplements based on Hydrolyzed Collagen. We combine the best of nature, science, and food technology with the knowledge of the human genome and nutrigenomics to improve, prolong, and enhance the quality of life of people. We develop functional products with natural ingredients designed to provide well-being and performance. 

We are young, we reveal ourselves and innovate to improve day by day and leave a positive impact on:
The Caviahue-Copahue community.
Our clients, orienting ourselves and adapting to their trends and necessities.
Our work team, so that while we make all this possible with great effort, we also enjoy our path and develop our maximum potential.

Name: Etnia Cosmetics
Description:
ETNIA es una empresa de Make up y cosmética española que nace en el año 2012 tras encontrar una necesidad en el mercado: productos de maquillaje y cosméticos de buena calidad y precio competitivo con asesoramiento de profesionales.
Cuenta con más de mil referencias bajo la marca Etnia: entre ellas encontramos una gran variedad de color, una amplia gama de tratamientos faciales y corporales y una excelente línea de fragancias.
Además, cuenta con un gran equipo profesional y humano que está en constante contacto con el cliente, haciendo realidad su ilusión: verse/sentirse guapa día tras día.

Name: Uniclan Healthcare Pvt. Ltd (A subsidiary of DOMS Industries Ltd.)
Description:
Uniclan is a promise for a better health and hygiene care for women and children. After intense global research and development, our team is constantly working to not only manufacture the highest quality and super comfortable products but also for ways to enhance processes and their outcomes. A focus on best practices, an emphasis on constant growth for all, and respect for a successful tomorrow are the values that Uniclan abides by. The company was established in 2016, to ensure high-quality products designed for extreme comfort, guaranteed hygiene, and easy access pan India.

Under the wide umbrella of Uniclan are the brands of ‘Wowper’ – ultra-soft pant style diapers for babies, ‘Wowpad’ – hygienic sanitary napkins for the modern woman and ‘Wowpro’ – Face Masks to help you combat with the pandemic. These brands are only starting points of Uniclan’s journey, thanks to the state-of-the-art manufacturing plant in pink city - Jaipur, Rajasthan, India which started operation in 2019. 

Built with world class infrastructure, the plant production capacity is currently at 300 million baby pant style diapers and 300 million sanitary napkins per year. The futuristic technology encompasses fully servo automatic machines, ensuring that the product remains untouched by human hands throughout the process and is carried out in a clean environment maintaining high sanitation standards before it reaches the consumers. 

All the facilities are equipped with ISO, WHO, GMP, CE, QA, QC certification, ensuring our customers and investors receive the best of hygiene. The Uniclan brand Wowper was recognized as the ‘BASES Top Breakthrough Innovations’ from NielsenIQ under the “Brand Growers” category in the FMCG Sector of India.

Name: Delivra Health Brands (TSXV: DHB | OTCQB: DHBUF)
Description:
Delivra Health Brands is a health and wellness CPG leader delivering science-backed, alternative solutions to everyday issues like chronic pain, anxiety, and sleeplessness.

Our portfolio features innovative brands like Dream Water and LivRelief, backed by proprietary delivery technology, extensive clinical research, and a proven track record of over 37.5 million units sold worldwide.

Led by seasoned professionals from the consumer-packaged goods industry, our team continues to develop solutions that enhance lives—building a community of wellness, naturally.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: ALPHANOVA SANTE
Description:
Située en Provence Alphanova est une société privée, française spécialisée dans la conception de soins cosmétiques naturels et biologiques respectueux de la santé et de l'environnement. 

 Nos soins sont présents dans plus de 4 000 pharmacies, magasins biologiques et magasins de puériculture. 

Nos produits sont présents dans plus de 30 pays à travers le monde, du Pérou à la Corée en passant par Taiwan ou la Pologne...

Name: Arusha Foods
Description: We aim to become a trustworthy brand in providing health & wellness solutions, by bringing nature’s best to your doorstep, sustainably sourced so that every purchase has a positive impact.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Light Up Beauty
Description:
Light Up Beauty is transforming skincare in India with innovative, trendsetting formulations. We proudly pioneer cutting-edge ingredients like THD Ascorbate, New Zealand Glacial Clay, and Soap Free Cleansers. Our clean-label approach harnesses the power of superfoods for exceptional results.

We are featured in Vogue, Femina, Elle, Grazia, Lifestyle Asia, HELLO, Hindustan Times, Economic Times, and many more.

Our products are available on leading platforms like Nykaa, Amazon, Flipkart, Vanity Wagon, Sublime Life, and Kindlife.
