Name: AVON Costa Rica
Description: Avon es la empresa que pone máscara en las pestañas y comida en la mesa, que combate las arrugas y también el cáncer de seno. Es la empresa que lleva la belleza a su puerta, pero también las abre con miles de oportunidades. Es la empresa que brinda un negocio propio a más de 6 millones de consultoras en más de 100 países. Esa es Avon. La empresa que por más de 50 años ha representado belleza, innovación, optimismo y por sobre todo… a la mujer costarricense.

Name: Nesperta Europe Sp. z o.o. – Semilac, Hi Hybrid, Semilac Professional
Description:
Witamy w świecie pięknych i zdrowych paznokci!

Nesperta jest właścicielem marek Semilac (www.semilac.pl) i hi hybrid (www.hihybrid.pl) . W swojej ofercie posiada profesjonalne kosmetyki oraz akcesoria do stylizacji i pielęgnacji paznokci, tj. lakiery hybrydowe, lakiery tradycyjne, żele kolorowe, płyny, akcesoria i urządzenia do paznokci.
Historia firmy to splot trafnych decyzji biznesowych, odważnych ruchów, ale i intuicji, która nie zawiodła jej założycieli. W ciągu zaledwie kilku lat, Nesperta przekształciła się z niewielkiego przedsiębiorstwa w dynamicznie rozwijającą się firmę, zatrudniającą kilkaset osób i posiadającą własny, nowoczesny park maszynowy. Produkty marek z jej portfolio są dostępne nie tylko w Polsce, ale i w ponad 30 krajach zagranicznych.
Semilac – marka nr 1 w Polsce!*
Semilac od lat jest synonimem wysokiej jakości, trwałości i bezpieczeństwa. To marka, która zapoczątkowała w Polsce „modę na manicure hybrydowy” i do dziś wyznacza trendy w tej dziedzinie. Szeroki asortyment sprawia, że po produkty Semilac sięgają zarówno zapalone miłośniczki stylizacji paznokci, jak i osoby, które dopiero zaczynają swoją przygodę z hybrydą. Semilac namawia je do spotkań – nie tylko na paznokcie! Te są jedynie pretekstem do przyjemnie spędzonego czasu w kobiecym gronie. 
hi hybrid – Easy like a selfie
To marka powstała z myślą o młodych dziewczynach, które kosmetycznych inspiracji szukają przede wszystkim w mediach społecznościowych. Z produktami od hi hybrid ich nowy manicure stanie się tak prosty, jak zrobienie selfie! Bogata paleta modnych kolorów, wielofunkcyjne akcesoria i przystępna cena – to wszystko pozwoli im z łatwością wyrazić siebie. Ich manicure hybrydowy sprawdzi się w każdych warunkach – nawet podczas najbardziej szalonej przygody.
*Wg badań Kantar Polska aż 44% kobiet malujących paznokcie, regularnie używa lakierów hybrydowych Semilac. Badanie zostało przeprowadzone w maju 2021 r. na próbie kobiet w wieku 18-60 l., używających lakierów do paznokci

Name: Bleach London
Description:
The meteoric rise of hair brand Bleach London is best described by Time Out as  “The grungy salon that pioneered the dip-dye, then conquered the globe.” The female-led, boundary-pushing business was launched by Alex Brownsell and Sam Campbell in 2010 as the world’s first salon focused on colour. 

With a closely knit family of international premises, ever-expanding vegan product range and intuitive digital salon services, Brownsell and Campbell have reimagined the way people approach their hair. They’re on a mission to make Bleach’s expertise accessible to all, so anyone can express themselves through their hair colour affordably and informatively.   

To date, the company has sold over £30million worth of products in the UK alone and is carried in retailers including Boots, Cult Beauty and ASOS. The coveted Bleach brand, regularly featured in Vogue, Dazed, i-D and more, paired with its pioneering approach, marks a new era in digital beauty and at-home hair dyeing. 

With a team of dedicated specialists across creative, colour chemistry, styling, retail, marketing, social, digital, data and global operations, Bleach saw a 600% D2C growth in 2020 and is set to continue to expand in 2021. New market launches including the USA will continue to reinforce Bleach’s position as a leader in the £40billion hair colourant category.

Name: Swissklip
Description:
We live life on a 'sharp edge', starting from simple things. Where others say “don’t mess with a good thing”, we keep going until it’s perfect.

When we started, we couldn’t believe that something so essential to people’s needs, like nail and dental care was not given the attention it deserved.

We promise precision and superior craftsmanship with our German-engineered products with lifetime warranties on products you'll love.

Name: Essential Labs
Description:
Essential Labs, located in the Pacific Northwest, is a premium natural and sustainable personal care formulations manufacturer for your private label needs.  We create small-batch, handcrafted products using LEAN-manufacturing principles for efficiency and quality control.
 
With our small batch processes, we ensure freshness and typically do not keep all offerings in stock at all times... this means you will not get products that sit on the shelves for months.
 
We have the ability to manufacture several thousand pounds a day in order to meet the needs of clients, both small and large. Our team includes an array of professionals with over 100 years combined of cosmetic manufacturing experience. We responsibly source our ingredients as close to the source as possible.
 
We offer a broad range of services from concept and product planning to finished products - all handled at our FDA Registered and cGMP-compliant facility.

Name: Manic Panic NYC, Inc
Description:
Beginning in 1977, vivid rainbow colors dyes were one of the first products to be sold at Tish & Snooky's original Manic Panic boutique on St. Mark’s Place.

In the 90s, due to heightened demand, distribution of our products expanded tremendously. Since that time, the High Priestesses of Hair Color have worked continuously to make sure our Manic Panic formula remains the best on the market by listening to customer feedback and staying ahead of the trends by starting them!

In 2005, Manic Panic introduced the Amplified semi permanent hair dye formula for Dye Hards that were looking for an even longer lasting formula. Manic Panic can guarantee that our products are the best on the market as the dyes continue to be tested and quality-controlled by in-house staff – which includes Tish and Snooky to this day! Manic Panic guarantees all of our ingredients and all our supplier's ingredients are both Vegan & Cruelty-Free, as accredited by PETA! Tested On Celebrities, Not Animals is our motto!

Often imitated, but never duplicated because Manic Panic isn’t just a brand, it’s a lifestyle! As Tish and Snooky always say, we don’t just sell it, we live it!

Name: NCDSM - SAVONNERIE FER A CHEVAL
Description:
La Nouvelle Compagnie des Détergents et du Savon de Marseille (NCDSM) produit une gamme complète de savons et de détergents en poudre et liquide pour ses marques propres et ses clients à travers le monde.

Installée en plein cœur de Marseille, NCDSM détient au travers de sa savonnerie Fer à Cheval fondée en 1856, le savoir-faire ancestral et la maîtrise de la fabrication du savon de Marseille traditionnel cuit en chaudron. Membre fondateur de l’Union des Professionnels du Savon de Marseille (UPSM) et reconnue Entreprise du Patrimoine Vivant, elle est aujourd’hui l’un des derniers fabricants en France du savon de Marseille à l’ancienne. 

La société détient un second pôle d’activité dans la détergence et peut concevoir des applications nouvelles de lessives et de produits détergents pour les collectivités professionnelles.

La NCDSM compte 40 salariés, 5 marques propres (Fer à Cheval, Le Marseillois, Econet, Néo’Kleen et Clean’Surf ) et plus de 200 références au catalogue.
                                                                     ____________________________

The Nouvelle Compagnie des Détergents et du Savon de Marseille (NCDSM) produces a complete range of soaps and detergents in powder or liquid for its own brands, and customers around the world.

NCDSM owns Fer à Cheval, the oldest soap factory founded in 1856 and located in the heart of Marseille. It has been since making the genuine Marseille soap in traditional cauldrons, passing on the ancestral know-how from generation to generation. It is today one of the very last manufacturers in France of the tradional Marseille soap.
Fer à Cheval is the founding member of the UPSM, the Union of Marseille Soap Professionals, which promotes the traditional Marseille soap.

NCDSM has a second business unit in detergency and can design new applications of detergents for professionals.

The company has 40 employees, 5 own brands (Fer à Cheval, Le Marseillois, Econet, Neo'Kleen and Clean'Surf) and more than 200 references in the catalog.

Name: Nicolaï Parfumeur-Créateur
Description:
Depuis plus de trente ans, NICOLAÏ a réussi à se hisser parmi les fleurons de la parfumerie française. NICOLAÏ a bâti sa réputation sur la qualité exceptionnelle de ses parfums et c'est l'une des très rares marques à intégrer à la fois la création, l'achat des meilleures essences naturelles, et la fabrication. Patricia de Nicolaï et son fils Axel, restent fidèles à leurs illustres ancêtres parfumeurs: être créatifs, tout en gardant une signature élégante et distinguée.

For more than thirty years, NICOLAÏ has succeeded to be a part of the finest French perfume brands. NICOLAÏ has built its reputation on the exceptional quality of its fragrances and it is one of the rare brands to integrate everything from the creation process, the purchase of the best natural essences and the manufacturing. Patricia de Nicolaï and her son Axel, remain faithful to their prestigious perfumer's ancestors: being creative while keeping a distinguished and elegant signature.

Name: Libi & Daughters
Description:
Our story began centuries ago when a mother taught her daughter how to treat skin and started to create our traditional recipe book. Since then this tradition and later on the family business has been passed through generations of female members of the family, who all were skincare experts or dermatologists. The family’s secret book of formulas still exists and contains unique, effective, nature-inspired skincare formulas of cremes, ointments, tonics, masks and tinctures, which have been applied for over a hundred years and withstood the test of time.

In old times the one and only way to treat skin was that a professional examined the skin and the patient, prescribed and created special formulas based on the condition of the patient. The products were hand-prepared specially for the patients by pharmacologists. That meant that each and every ingredient in the formula was there for a reason and there was nothing that the skin did not need and had to fight against. That was the respect for the patient and his skin.

Unfortunately today the approach is different. It is more about mass market and money. There is no way that off-the-shelf products can be suitable for everyone. To make them safe for each consumer only a tiny amount of active ingredients is possible in the formulas, not considering substances that the skin has to eliminate to survive.

We are bringing back the old tradition of care, cherish and respect to every customer. The tradition of paying attention to every detail, of our holistic approach: perception the body as a whole. Our aim is to offer this revolutionary skincare approach to the general public.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

The ORMAIE fragrances made solely with exceptional ingredients.

ORMAIE has brought together artists and artisans with exceptional know-how to write each chapter of its story.

Description: Aveolabs (Earlier known as Cosmetics Solutions)  is into R&D of Personal Care & Home Care Products founded by Bhavana Bhansali (M Tech in Cosmetics from LAD College, Nagpur)

Name: DERMELECT
Description:
We got you covered- everything anti-aging from beautiful, youthful skin to long, strong natural nails! Technology + Luxury = True Beauty!

Concentrating on prevention as well as treatment, Dermelect provides targeted solutions for focused areas to provide ultimate benefits. Luxurious yet effective solutions, the latest technologies, ingredients and delivery systems are used to provide optimal beauty benefits.

Name: IOMA Paris
Description:
Fondée en 2010 par Jean Michel Karam, IOMA signifie « à moi ». Il suffit de lire dans le sens opposé. C'est avant tout la marque n°1 de la Cosmétique Personnalisée.

Elle propose des soins à l’efficacité prouvée, créés et formulés à partir d'un diagnostic Haute Technologie de votre peau, ce qui a permis de créer l’Atlas de la Peau IOMA, une base de données d’exception de plus de 1 million de diagnostics, qui continue à s’enrichir chaque jour. 

IOMA, c’est la cosmétique faite pour vous, uniquement pour votre peau. 

IOMA, la perfection pour votre beauté.

Name: Kelma Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada em 1956, a KELMA COSMÉTICOS é uma empresa 100% brasileira, com produtos de fabricação própria voltados para a beleza e bem-estar dos cabelos e do corpo.

Desde sua criação o seu senso inovador se manifestou em produtos inéditos para o mercado consumidor.

O DNA de formação da KELMA é a constante preocupação em garantir o sucesso e a qualidade de seus produtos, utilizando sempre os extratos e as matérias-primas mais nobres. 

A empresa investe na seleção de fornecedores preocupados com a sustentabilidade de seus produtos, na contratação de profissionais altamente qualificados e no aperfeiçoamento contínuo de seus colaboradores, oferecendo cursos, treinamentos e outras formas de qualificações profissionais, buscando manter um ambiente de trabalho seguro e agradável. A saúde, a segurança e o bem-estar de seus funcionários é prioridade, é com eles que a KELMA garante sua fórmula de sucesso.

A cada ano que se passa a KELMA COSMÉTICOS sente mais orgulho de seus passos que têm levado ao crescimento contínuo, se destacando no mercado nacional com produtos que já são parte da vida da família brasileira. Agora, as expectativas são ainda maiores, com desejo de inovar cada dia mais e obter um crescimento cada vez maior.

Nossa tradição é cuidar da sua beleza!

Name: SEEN Haircare
Description:
Developed by Harvard-trained dermatologist Dr. Iris Rubin, SEEN recognizes that haircare is an essential part of good skincare. SEEN promotes healthy hair AND skin, with patented and award-winning formulas that are clinically proven to be non-comedogenic (won’t clog pores), and safe for sensitive skin.

After experiencing breakouts that were traced back to a surprising source - the haircare products at her salon, Dr. Rubin set out to create a solution. It took 4+ years and countless lab samples to bring SEEN to life, and Dr. Rubin has done more than create clean, effective, luxurious haircare products that respect the skin. SEEN is routinely described by our customers as life-changing, and game-changing. 

SEEN is also loved by dermatologists (and samples to over 1400+ dermatology practices), backed by a syndicate of world-class investors, including some of the most successful entrepreneurs of our generation, as well as Harvard dermatologists and scientists.

SEEN was built on the belief that you deserve to have both gorgeous hair and healthy skin—and you should not have to compromise. Our mission is to help everyone feel SEEN for their best self.

Description: We are a design-driven company reinventing wasteful, overlooked product categories. We started with wipes. Meet the clean system revolution.

Name: SOLSKIN
Description:
Family-founded for their daughter's eczema, SOLSKIN is a self tan brand offering a solution for sensitive skin users who love to glow.

SOLSKIN is on a mission to promote self-love and self-care for all skin types with their science-backed, innovative products designed to be inclusive and kind to your skin, boosting not just your tan but also your mood.

All SOLSKIN products are vegan, cruelty-free, dermatologically tested and made in Britain!

Name: al.ive body
Description:
al.ive body is dedicated to enhancing your home and shaping your surroundings through innovative product design, sitting at forefront of industry trends. 

Founded by Alisa and Lysandra Fraser, former winners of The Block and interior design experts, the company was born out of the duo's struggle to find bathroom and kitchen styling products that complemented their finished projects. They discovered that the personal care market was saturated with brands that focused heavily on design aesthetics or product purity, but rarely did one brand excel in both areas.

Now, as a committed leading brand within the design community, al.ive body continues to innovate and create new products that align with customer demand, pushing the boundaries of the personal and home care industry.

Launching in March 2020, the brand quickly established distribution in independent homewares and design retailers across Australia, as well as recruiting thousands of customers via their e-commerce site.
Beginning with hand and body washes and lotions, continuous product innovation has extended al.ive body into hair care, home fragrance, baby, home cleaning and premium kitchen cleaning.

At al.ive body, we believe that sustainability is not just a buzzword, but a responsibility. We are committed to creating products that prioritise the well-being of our customers while also protecting the planet for generations to come. Our stylish products have been designed for long-term use, while our refill pouches use 85% less plastic.

The al.ive body range is formulated and ethically manufactured in Australia with naturally derived ingredients, including essential oils and botanical extracts. But just as important is what is NOT in our formula.

Name: Detox Nation
Description:
Detox Nation is a root-cause health education company founded by Sinclair Kennally, educator, clinician, and leader in environmental and nervous-system-based healing.
After navigating her own complex chronic illness and being repeatedly told her labs were “normal,” Sinclair uncovered the deeper biological drivers behind her symptoms: mold toxicity, parasites, chemical load, bile and drainage dysfunction, mitochondrial exhaustion, and nervous system dysregulation. Her husband and co-founder, Michael Spandel, experienced a different set of symptoms with the same root causes. Together, they healed themselves using the frameworks they now teach through Detox Nation.

Today, Detox Nation helps people understand why they’re experiencing chronic fatigue, brain fog, gut issues, histamine reactions, sleep problems, sensitivity, and nervous system overwhelm, and how to restore health by addressing root causes in the correct order.
Rather than chasing symptoms, Detox Nation focuses on systems-based healing. Our work integrates bioregulatory medicine principles, environmental illness education, detoxification physiology, mitochondrial health, and nervous system regulation to help people rebuild capacity, resilience, and energy.

Core focus areas include:
• Root cause health education
• Chronic illness and unexplained symptoms
• Gut health and digestive issues
• Mold and mycotoxin exposure
• Parasites and microbial imbalance
• Histamine intolerance and MCAS patterns
• Liver, bile, and detox pathway dysfunction
• Nervous system dysregulation 
• Mitochondrial dysfunction and low cellular energy
• Environmental exposures and toxic load

Detox Nation offers structured online programs, memberships, and practitioner-level trainings for both individuals and health professionals.

Under Sinclair Kennally’s leadership, Detox Nation exists to simplify complex biology, validate lived experience, and provide a clear, practical roadma
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Annie International, Inc.
Description:
For more than thirty years, Annie has been a pioneer in the beauty and hair care industry, catering to multi-ethnic and textured hair communities, both domestically and internationally. What began as a heartfelt mission to foster self-love and confidence has blossomed into a vibrant community of style enthusiasts celebrating their unique beauty.

Founded by our intrepid CEO, Annie was born from the recognition of a need for affordable, quality textured hair care. Inspired by his wife, our CEO launched Annie as a beauty brand deeply rooted in servicing the beauty needs of its community. With extensive experience in the beauty industry, he has guided Annie in developing a comprehensive range of products that meet diverse consumer needs.

Annie's product lines, including cultural icons like Mr. Durag and Ms. Remi, have become staples in communities nationwide. Available in every state across America, mainstream retailers, and around the world, Annie products are embraced by millions daily.

Celebrating 30 years of innovation, Annie remains at the forefront of the beauty and hair industry, continually evolving with no signs of slowing down. Our commitment to high quality is reflected in our rigorous in-house testing and meticulous product design. Our diverse offerings cater to all hair types and textures, providing essentials for men, women, and children.

Annie's core values emphasize exceptional customer service, continuous innovation, an inclusive workplace, and active community support, ensuring we exceed expectations and uplift communities globally.

As Annie begins a new era of success and growth we invite you to join us on this exciting journey. Our commitment to innovation and excellence remains unwavering as we continue to champion textured hair care and celebrate the beauty of diversity. Together, let's embrace the future with confidence and creativity!

With the ambition to become a sustainable beauty brand, IDUN Minerals has an increased focus on local production, transparency, becoming 100 % vegan, and reducing the environmental impact of the products. Celebrating products that have won awards from the Swedish Beauty Awards, the Scandinavian Global Makeup Awards, been recommended by the Swedish Asthma & Allergy Association and carrying the Nordic Swan Ecolabel, IDUN Minerals becomes a widely recognized high quality clean beauty brand. The blog is all about skincare: every month, dr. Jetske Ultee writes several blogs about products, mythes & claims, skinproblems and so on. The blog is available in Dutch, Deutsch and English. 
www.dr-jetskeultee.nl | www.dr-jetskeultee.com | www.dr-jetskeultee.de

www.uncover-skincare.nl

www.skinwiser.com

www.smeerjein.nl

Name: Nippon Shikizai France
Description:
Fondée en 1985, Nippon Shikizai France est une société qui formule et fabrique des produits cosmétiques, maquillage soin et produits parfumés pour des marques en propre. Nous travaillons suivant un savoir-faire passionné « Made in France » via notre laboratoire et nos différents services de gestion de projets. Nous sommes experts dans la formulation de poudres et produits coulés à chaud, ainsi que dans le développement de produits naturels et biologiques mettant en avant l'ultra-sensorialité et la performance couleur.
Nos clients prestigieux de l'industrie française de la cosmétique de luxe sont la raison pour laquelle nous travaillons toujours plus dur, avec des produits innovants et performants, en étant attentifs aux détails qui comptent ! 
Nippon Shikizai France a rejoint en janvier 2017 Nippon Shikizai Group, leader du fournisseur de l'industrie cosmétique au Japon. Depuis, les meilleures formules du marché, imprégnées de la technologie japonaise, peuvent être transférées et produites « Made in France » dans notre usine française proche d'Orléans, au cœur de la Cosmetic Valley.
____
Founded in 1985, Nippon Shikizai France is a private label formulator & manufacturer of make-up and scented products. We offer a passionate « Made in France » full-service know-how and our expertise in powders and hot-poured products, as well as formulation of Natural and Organic products highlighting ultra-sensoriality and color performance.
Our prestigious customers from the french luxury cosmetic industry are the reason why we are always looking beyond with innovating products and why we are so careful to details that matter!
Nippon Shikizai France has entered in January 2017 Nippon Shikizai Group, leader of the cosmetic industry supplier in Japan. Since then, the best formulas of the market, infused with Japanese technology, can be transfered and produced « Made in France » in our french factory close to Orléans, in the heart of the Cosmetic Valley.

Name: QIRINESS
Description:
Qiriness a été fondée en 2004 par Mi-Ryung Beilvert, passionnée de cosmétologie, de beauté et de bien-être depuis plus de 20 ans. Créer une marque oui, mais une marque qui lui ressemble, sincère, exigeante et surtout efficace. Mi-Ryung, qui connaît parfaitement l’univers de la cosmétique est convaincue qu’il manque l’essentiel, une marque authentique à l‘écoute de nos besoins, une marque qui ne promet pas l’impossible mais qui nous aide à trouver notre équilibre, à mieux respecter notre peau, à nous recentrer sur l’essentiel, une marque qui révèle la beauté de chacun en nous apportant sérénité, harmonie et énergie. Pour cela, il faut envisager la beauté globalement, allier le meilleur des rituels ancestraux de son enfance coréenne à son expertise acquise auprès des laboratoires les plus innovants.

Avec son concept Spa maison unique au monde, Qiriness allie l’efficacité des actifs de ses soins visage et corps à leur plaisir d’utilisation, pour un résultat optimal garanti.

"Le bien-être et la sensorialité, associés à une qualité irréprochable d'actifs naturels, améliorent l'efficacité des produits. Notre souhait est donc d'offrir à chaque femme et à domicile une réponse personnalisée en matière de soin, en combinant l'efficacité des actifs et le plaisir sensoriel de l'utilisation, avec des résultats comparables à ceux d'un soin pratiqué en spa."
Mi-Ryung Beilvert, Présidente et Fondatrice de Qiriness

Name: REVIDERM AG • Skincare. Technology. Expertise.
Description:
Die REVIDERM AG mit Tochterfirmen in Österreich und der Schweiz ist führend im Bereich der Mikrodermabrasion und medizinisch orientierten Wirkstoffkosmetik. Fasziniert von der Komplexität der Haut verbindet REVIDERM seit 36 Jahren Innovationen der Wirkstoffforschung mit den Erkenntnissen moderner Dermatologie.

Lange bevor „Medical Beauty“ zum Trend und Wachstumsmotor der Kosmetikbranche wurde, begann REVIDERM-Gründer Dr. Klaus Laeschke 1986 die Suche nach medizinisch fundierten Methoden, um die Haut sicht- und nachweisbar vor vorzeitiger Alterung zu schützen. Er löste die damals unangefochtenen Grenzen zwischen Medizin und Kosmetik auf.

Heute arbeiten Kosmetikerinnen und Dermatologen in über 50 Ländern überaus erfolgreich mit REVIDERM-Produkten, Behandlungen und Geräten und profitieren von unserem Angebot und fundierten Aus- und Fortbildungssystemen. Kompetenz, die unter die Haut geht! Gut 130 Mitarbeiter/Innen in 17 Fachbereichen schreiben mit an der Erfolgsgeschichte von REVIDERM.

Lerne REVIDERM kennen und mach mit Haut und Herz Karriere.

Wir freuen uns auf Deine Kontaktaufnahme.

Description:

Name: Beauty Marketing Agency
Description:
Beauty marketing is about selling the dream and making it attainable. Whether you're an established cosmetic brand looking for a new audience or an upstart skincare brand just breaking in, we have the strategy that will make you stand out.

The beauty industry is wide and varied opening up opportunities for brands to partner with other brands who may not be a direct competitor. This creates a holistic approach to beauty that adds real value to both brand's customers. 

We combine social media and influencer marketing with, search engine optimisation, smart Google Shopping and Performance Max ads and email marketing and SMS to get your beauty company seen and in the hands of customers around the globe.

We understand that partnering with the right agency is an important choice because it will influence the prosperity of your business. Our spirit of partnership with all of our clients as it’s only through trust and openness can we all truly succeed.

Whether you want to promote a revolutionary skincare product or reach younger buyers, advertising is a key component to successfully scaling your brand. 

We aim to meet beauty mavens in the communities where they’re seeking discovery, and develop a consumer journey from online to off that satisfies their desire to experiment, to learn, to share, and to try.

Creating a digital experience as magical as visiting a charming brick-and-mortar store in order to attract not only one-time customers, but lifetime customers is the key to attracting not just one-time customers but lifetime customers as well. 

Beauty marketing agency excels in creating this digital atmosphere for clients with services like user-generated content, videos, filterable reviews and creating content that inspires buyers to fall in love with your brand and products.

Do you need help with your brands digital marketing?
Get your brand the results and recognition it deserves – as quickly, profitability, and sustainably as possible.

Name: Torf Corporation Sp. z o.o.
Description:
w czasach kiedy wszystko jest pozornie przydatne, najważniejsza umiejętnością okazuje się zdolność mądrego wybierania.

to nie tylko kwestia decyzji podejmowanych w sklepie, ale całego stylu życia. 

My w to wierzymy.

chcemy odczarować i przybliżyć świat kosmetyków. Chcemy rozmawiać o skórze, włosach i zębach
 - przy wsparciu specjalistów codziennie dowiadywać się czego potrzebują aby być zdrowe.

chcemy aby to jak je traktujemy na co dzień było bezpieczne.

kiedy szukamy skutecznych rozwiązań zawsze najpierw testujemy kilka możliwości, aby wybrać tę najlepszą.

obiecujemy, że dzięki nam kosmetyki przestaną się marnować przyszłość to ograniczone zasoby, musimy być pewni, że korzystamy z aktualnych w przemyślany sposób.

ktoś mógłby powiedzieć, że wygląd zewnętrzny nie jest najważniejszą rzeczą na świecie. Ale my uważamy, że to jak czujemy się każdego dnia, wpływa na całe nasze życie.

satysfakcja to suma drobnych, ale przemyślanych decyzji. 

jesteśmy dumni kiedy decydujesz się zaufać nam w procesie troski o swoją skórę, włosy czy uzębienie.

Jesteśmy Torf Corporation.

Reprezentuje nas #tołpa, #ON i każda utalentowana osoba współtworząca nasz ekosystem.

Description:

 Clinically tested and doctor-recommended

Name: Fresh Beauty Studio LLC
Description:
Over the past decade, makeup artist and entrepreneur, Nikol Johnson has taken South Florida by storm with her amazing sense of style and undeniable talents in multi media makeup artistry.  She is the founder and creator of Fresh Beauty Studio LLC, an international on location makeup artistry studio that is right at your front door, photo shoot or production. Extremely personable, Nikol's personality and zest for life is infectious; she makes everyone feel right at home with her warm heartedness and knowledge of skin care and cosmetics.  
 
Nikol specializes in bridal, fashion and beauty makeup; bridal being her forte. She has worked on countless brides and bridal parties. Nikol has built a strong reputation both nationally and internationally for her attention to detail and professionalism. Nikol has been dubbed "The Bridal Expert" by her fellow clients "She is always one step ahead of the beauty trends for brides".
 
Nikol is a veteran in the fashion industry; working as a FORD model in New York and Miami in the early 1990's, she gracefully traveled the world working in print, national commercials, film and runway. Today she is still an active member of  the Screen Actors Guild. After a 15 year run in the modeling industry, Nikol moved forward with her passion for skin care and cosmetics and became a hair and makeup artist and licensed esthetician. She has worked for Bobbi Brown, Laura Mercier and Chanel. Nikol graduated from The International Dermal Institute for esthetics and Cosmix school of makeup artistry.  She has worked for top spa lines such as YonKa Paris, Phytomer and MD Skincare. Nikol was hand picked by Dr. Dennis Gross to be a national educator for his clinical skin care line--MD Skincare.  Some of her work includes 2009-2010 Miami Dolphin Cheerleaders, Miami Fashion Week, Pregnancy and Newborn, Crocs, Atlantic Ave Magazine and HSN.

Name: Dax Cosmetics Rohto Pharmaceuticals Group
Description:
Dax Cosmetics is one of the Polish leading cosmetic companies, with more than 30 years of experience in cosmetics.

Since June 2014, it belongs to the Rohto Pharmaceuticals Group, a Japanese cosmetic and pharmaceutical company based in Osaka, Japan. The company was founded in 1899, and today it is a global concern and operates in 120 markets around the world.

Dax Cosmetics specializes in manufacture and sale of facial and body care products, sunscreen preparations, and also has make-up products. Products’  high standards and quality are confirmed by numerous awards granted by consumers, the cosmetic industry and the business community.

In the portfolio of Dax Cosmetics, there are currently nearly 80 cosmetic lines in seven brands: YOSKINE, PERFECTA, CASHMERE, DAX SUN, DAX MEN, CELIA, and HADA LABO, the leading brand of Rohto, which sells worldwide every two seconds.

The strength of Dax Cosmetics is its own R&D laboratories. Since 2004 Dax has been certified for Quality Management ISO 9001-2000 and since 2012 GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices).

Dax Cosmetics employs over 250 people. The production area occupies 7 thousand sq. meters and modern equipment allows you to produce 8 tons of cosmetics daily.

To learn more visit our website: www.dax.com.pl

Name: minimaliste France (cosmétiques)
Description:
minima[Liste], c’est une histoire de conviction.
La conviction d’un couple dans la vie et au travail : Eglantine et François-Xavier. Depuis 15 ans dans l’industrie de la beauté, ils considèrent que «moins» est synonyme de «mieux» ! Réduire la liste des ingrédients au minimum, créer des formules sans eau (en cosmétique, elle est superflue pour la peau !)  et se concentrer sur des actifs simples, bio et 100% naturels ont guidé leur pas. Chaque soin est hyper clean, donc irréprochable pour l’homme et la planète mais sans compromis : les produits sont efficaces, sensoriels et pratiques.

Name: The Makeup Armoury

The Makeup Armoury was established in 2016. Our sole determination is to equip make up artists with the highest quality products, providing everything from beauty and Special FX to prosthetics and hair.

Our aim for the company is not only to be the most efficient and reliable pro shop in the UK, but also to be a supportive and educational community. Pop in to use our studio space free of charge, scour our shelves for the latest products or simply come and have a coffee and a chat with one of our fervent makeup gurus!

Keep up with our blog, which is regularly updated, giving you an insight into the industry from a completely different point of view with behind the scenes action and interviews from some of the industry’s kingpins.

 The makeup industry with all its effervescence and ingenuity can be relentless and ruthless – this is where we come in.

We are your comrades. We are your tools. We are your Armoury.

Name: dpHUE
Description:
Our mission is to help you achieve your shiniest, healthiest HUE.
Your hair color should be glossy and dimensional every time you look in the mirror. From scalp-balancing scrubs to root coverage and brightening shampoos, we created dpHUE to give you the tools and confidence you need to make every day a great hair color day.

Name: PDT Cosmetici | Skin Care Beauty Cosmetics
Description:
PDT Cosmetici nasce nel 1996 a Putignano in provincia di Bari come azienda specializzata nella produzione di cosmetici conto terzi. Siamo Società Benefit: l’azienda si impegna a perseguire finalità di beneficio comune in modo responsabile, sostenibile e trasparente, considerando l’impatto dell’impresa sulla società e l’ambiente per tutti gli stakeholder.

Dotata di in una moderna struttura che dispone di laboratori di Ricerca e Sviluppo, Controllo Qualità, impianti per la produzione di cosmetici, linee semiautomatiche per il confezionamento ed ampi locali per lo stoccaggio del prodotto finito, PDT cosmetici, in ottemperanza alla Legge 713 dell’11 ottobre 1986 e successive modifiche, è in grado di fornire ai propri clienti una vasta gamma di prodotti per la cura, l’igiene ed il benessere di viso e corpo.
L’insieme di tutte le attrezzature disponibili conferisce all’azienda elevata flessibilità di produzione di piccoli, medi o grandi quantitativi.

Oltre alla produzione conto terzi, PDT cosmetici in linea con le scoperte dei laboratori di Ricerca e Sviluppo, produce linee cosmetiche proprie a uso personale e professionale.

Name: Attractive Scent SAS
Description:
Attractive Scent est une maison de création olfactive à la pointe de l’innovation. Équipée des dernières technologies d’analyse, elle s’appuie sur deux robots pour une réactivité optimale.
Notre laboratoire de R&D dédié au contrôle qualité garantit l’excellence de nos compositions parfumées, tandis que notre atelier de production assure leur mise en œuvre avec savoir-faire et précision.
Spécialistes de la création de parfums, nous concevons des fragrances sur mesure pour diverses applications :
- Parfumerie fine et eaux de toilette
- Cosmétiques et soins du corps
- Produits d’ambiance (bougies, diffuseurs, etc.)
- Détergence technique

Attractive Scent is an olfactory creation company at the cutting edge of innovation. Equipped with the latest analysis technology, it relies on two robots for optimum responsiveness.
Our R&D laboratory, dedicated to quality control, guarantees the excellence of our fragrance compositions, while our production workshop ensures that they are applied with skill and precision.
As specialists in perfume creation, we design tailor-made fragrances for a wide range of applications:

Somos una empresa de cosmética Argentina, con fábrica propia y más de 40 años de trayectoria.  Nos dedicamos a la elaboración y venta de productos capilares para profesionales tanto a nivel nacional como internacional. Elaboramos productos propios y para terceros. Exportamos a más de 15 países.

Name: Synergie Skin
Description:
We are an Australian made and owned cosmeceutical company dedicated to the long-term health and vitality of your skin. Our mission is to create skin health and confidence through exceptional skincare, harnessing the synergy of science and nature.  

_____

Founded in 2005, Synergie Skin is an internationally recognised company, widely regarded by cosmetic medical practitioners and skin clinicians as their preferred cosmeceutical range. All products are formulated by biological scientist and cosmetic chemist Terri Vinson (BSc. DipFormChem. DipEd. ASCC). 

Since Synergie Skin is Australian owned and vertically integrated, all products are conceptualised, manufactured, and packaged under the one roof. This unique methodology guarantees that each and every product is crafted with the highest excellence.

Synergie products are supported by clinical data and are entirely free of ethically questionable ingredients. Our range is highly active, easy to use, and most importantly, it visibly improves the health of your skin. Available exclusively online at www.synergieskin.com or in-store at premium skincare clinics and medically-affiliated practices.

Name: Acqua dell'Elba
Description:
Acqua dell’Elba, Società Benefit, è un’azienda a conduzione familiare nata 24 anni fa, con sede a Marciana Marina, Isola d’Elba nell’ Arcipelago Toscano. È presente sul mercato con 31 negozi monomarca, una rete di distribuzione che conta circa 1000 profumerie clienti sparse su tutto il territorio nazionale ed europeo, 1 filiale negli Stati Uniti e una in Cina, 3 accordi internazionali di distribuzione.
Acqua dell’Elba nasce come impresa familiare ed è un’“impresa” a tutti gli effetti: come realtà imprenditoriale ma anche e soprattutto come
avventura, nata dalla passione per i profumi dei tre fondatori e da un sogno. Il sogno di creare, all’Isola d’Elba, profumi ispirati dalla bellezza del mare che soddisfino l’idea di ben-essere delle persone grazie all’eccellenza dei migliori maestri profumieri.
È infatti grazie alle solide radici nella nostra isola e comunità che Acqua dell’Elba si è fatta
rappresentante dell’eccellenza Made in Tuscany, in Italia e all’estero.
Oggi Acqua dell’Elba impiega oltre 100 persone, collabora con più di 100 fornitori principalmente in Italia e con diversi distributori in tutto il mondo. 
Il nostro impegno responsabile si esprime soprattutto nella nostra attenzione nei confronti delle persone, della comunità elbana e dell’ambiente.
È con questo ideale che nascono i molti progetti per la valorizzazione
ambientale, artistica, culturale e sociale della nostra amata Isola d’Elba.
Acqua dell’Elba è l’autentica interprete delle sensazioni e delle evocazioni del mare, restituite ai suoi clienti tramite 6 linee di parfum (classica, arcipelago, blu, bimbi, sport, essenza di un’isola). A questi si aggiungono prodotti corpo (creme corpo, gel doccia shampoo, saponi, deodoranti, salviette), accessori (beauty, teli, parei, bermuda) e prodotti per la profumazione d’ambiente (profumatori d’ambiente, profumi d’ambiente, candele profumate, gessi profumati).

Name: Jean&Len
Description: 2013 begann alles mit einer Vision: Leonard (Du kennst ihn als „Len“ aus unserem Markennamen) wollte Pflege verkaufen, die das Beste aus Natur und Labor vereint. So gründete er Jean&Len, um damit die Lücke zwischen traditioneller Naturkosmetik, die oftmals in der „Öko“-Ecke der Drogerien verstaubt, und wirksamen, aber gleichzeitig stylisch designten Produkten zu schließen. Name: BYHEALTH
Description:
"In a few years' time, people may not remember where she comes from originally when they talk about BYHEALTH, as she is the 'United Nations' of superior nutrition supplements which gathers their essence worldwide."

Established in October 1995, BYHEALTH introduced Vitamin & Dietary Supplements into Chinese indirect selling market systematically in 2002, and grew into a leading brand and iconic company in this industry. In August 2010, Yao Ming, a former NBA superstar, signed to become the media spokesperson of BYHEALTH. On December 15, 2010, BYHEALTH went on public listing on the GEM in Shenzhen Stock Exchange.

For more than a decade, BYHEALTH has been adhering to execute the 'Three-Step' differentiation global quality strategy, from sourcing of the raw materials globally, to establishing its global exclusive raw material supply bases, and ultimately, building its own organic farms worldwide. So far its raw materials have been imported from 23 countries, and five exclusive raw material supply bases have been established in countries such as Brazil and Australia, with its own organic farms under construction in the meantime. BYHEALTH has been seeking the high-quality raw materials globally, and is becoming the 'United Nations' of superior nutrition supplements which gathers their essence worldwide. 

Established in Zhuhai in June 2012, BYHEALTH has the first 'transparent factory' within its industry, which is one of the advanced production bases worldwide for Vitamin & Dietary Supplements with strict quality control. The transparent factory is open to the public with its global raw materials traceable and the producing process visible. There are about 200 detection items of internal control which are carried out with standards that are stricter than the national standards, in order to keep the customer confidence with high quality products. BYHEALTH always believes that 'Integrity is more important than intelligence'.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Our exclusive and wide range of beauty products is manufactured using highest quality ingredients and components. In-house R & D team ensures that each and every product meets global safety and International standards.

Description: For six decades, Vectem has been building a legacy that combines science, responsibility and well-being. Name: Gerçek Kozmetik
Description:
1993 yılında Maltepe’de Gerçek Ecza adlı ecza deposu ile faaliyetine başlamış olan Gerçek Kozmetik, hızlı bir gelişim göstererek 1997 yılında Maltepe’de 3000 m2’lik kendi iş merkezine taşınmıştır.

Pazardaki gelişmeleri sürekli takip ederek daha iyi konumlara gelmeyi hedeflemiş yapısı ile 1999 yılında L’oreal markasının Marmara distribütörlüğünü alarak kozmetik sektörüne giriş yapan Gerçek Kozmetik, dünyaca ünlü uluslararası firmaların markalarını da bünyesine katarak kısa sürede kozmetik sektöründe kendisine önemli bir yer edinmiştir.

Gerçek Kozmetik, Türkiye’nin her bölgesinden 4.500’ün üzerinde eczane, kozmetik, zincir grup mağazaları, kuaför, perakende ve toptan satış noktalarına hizmet vermektedir.

Name: L'Atelier du Sourcil
Description:
L'Atelier du Sourcil appartient à IEVA Group, fondé par Jean Michel Karam. Pour IEVA Group vos inspirations sont notre énergie pour innover et créer ensemble le futur de la beauté. Celles pour soi, celles qui offrent la possibilité d’être soi-même. Nous créons des marques, des services et des expériences de beauté personnalisée, activés par des technologies et des datas, et propulsés par les talents IEVA, pour préserver le capital beauté & bien-être de chacun, le capital Terre pour tous, et renforcer la connexion humaine.
 
Aujourd’hui, L’Atelier du Sourcil occupe la 1ère place sur le marché de la beauté du regard et s’exporte à l’international, en Europe et aux États-Unis. Le réseau compte 126 ateliers dans toute la France, en Guadeloupe, à Madrid, à Milan, en Belgique et au Luxembourg pour sublimer tous les regards à travers le monde. 
Ce succès, l'enseigne le doit à la relation privilégiée partagée avec chaque cliente, chaque Brow Addict. Se rendre dans un Atelier, c’est vivre une expérience ultra-personnalisée avec sa technicienne, véritable fée du regard, qui travaille avec le matériel, les produits et les matériaux les plus performants et qui applique les protocoles d’hygiène les plus
drastiques, pour être toujours à la pointe de l’innovation et du bien-être de la cliente.
C’est aussi accéder à leur expertise inégalable. Elles sont formées tout au long de leur carrière aux dernières techniques d’épilation et de maquillage permanent développées par l’enseigne, pour vous, pour l'harmonie de votre visage et au service de votre confiance.

#innovation #Cosmetique #Beauté

Name: JOJOBA DESERT
Description:
Jojoba Desert is the world’s leading Jojoba Oil manufacturer located in the heart of the Israeli desert. We provide a stable supply of a variety of grades of Jojoba Oil, Jojoba Oil derived products, and naturally sourced active ingredients, to the top international cosmetic brands and manufacturers, all while engaging in responsible leadership.

As a cooperative settlement (Kibbutz) owned entity, we have a holistic approach based on a collective community and operate under the values of fairness, reciprocity, and social responsibility. We leverage over 30 years of combined pioneering spirit, world-class technological, agronomic, and manufacturing experience, and expertise.

Our ingredients are produced under the most stringent certification protocols and meet rigorous quality standards with a fully automated process, designed to support the rapid global demand and ensure stable supply in terms of quality and availability. We have been granted 10 globally recognized certifications, including Fair for Life, Ecovadis, and Ecocert. Jojoba Desert has become the leading company offering end-to-end production coverage and traceability.

Jojoba Desert is committed to nurture the planet for a better future for the next generations. We uphold social, environmental, and economical sustainability programs which include giving back to the community, unparalleled metrics for emissions and water preservation, as well as supporting the “Be the Change” movement of the 17 UN Sustainable Development Goals.

Name: Chemist at Play
Description:
We are Chemist At Play; India's first ceramides-based skincare brand that's here to change your skincare game! Backed up by science, all our products are based on 3Bs of Skincare Science; 
- Bio Compatible: All our products absorb really well into the skin to work their magic instantly.
- Bio Effective: Our products are specially formulated to target specific skin woes and thus, super effective on the skin.
- Botanical Actives: Our products are made with Botanical Actives (because we love animals!). And one of the favourite Botanical Actives we love working with is CERAMIDES!!!
...
To understand why Ceramides are the next big thing in beauty verse, imagine you are making laddoos.
If you have ever tried your hand at making them or watched a YouTube tutorial, then you know that ghee is the most important ingredient. That is because, without the right amount, the laddoos won't hold its shape, look good or even stay fresh for long.
In the skincare world, ghee= Ceramides!
.
Think of ceramides as 'cement'; holding together the cells in your skin and thus making us look fab & young! That's not all, Ceramides lock in the moisture, have anti-ageing properties, protect the skin's barrier; in short, make the skin look gooood.
.
Time to put a stop to all your skincare experiments and upgrade your regimen with us. 
Happy Skincare shopping!

Name: Naturich Labs, Inc.
Description:
Naturich Labs, Inc. specializes in the formulation and manufacturing of personal care products. With a focus on natural and organic ingredients, Naturich prides itself on producing items that are not only effective but also environmentally friendly and sustainable. The company offers a diverse range of goods, including skincare, bath & body care, and home goods products, catering to consumers who are conscious about the ingredients that go into their personal care regimen.

Naturich Labs is known for its innovative approach to product development, utilizing cutting-edge research to blend traditional herbal remedies with modern science. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction has earned us a loyal customer base and a reputation as a trusted name in the natural personal care industry.

Name: The Goodkind Co, a Certified B-Corp
Description:
The Goodkind Co is a leading product and services partner to Clean Beauty brands and creators. That means we went “clean” before it was a thing. So we know how to formulate with a wide range of natural and clean active performance materials. Safer on skin and safer for the planet. 

We specialize in personal care (we humbly think we make the best natural deodorants on the planet), facial, and body care. So there’s a good chance we can help you with your creation, but we’ll let you know if we’re not a good match. We support scaled manufacturing, as well as small-run production for select emerging brands. We’re here because we want to do our part to bring safer and more sustainable products to the world.

Name: Nutriessential.com
Description: Since 2005, Nutriessential.com is a leading provider of professional brands supplements and is run by healthcare practitioners with a common goal of providing a variety of health and wellness consultations as well as herbal supplements, homeopathy, and professional skin care products, nutritional supplements that are GMP certified and recommended by doctors.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Berg+Schmidt - Care Ingredients
Description:
Combining natural ingredients with broad application know-how and sound science:

Berg+Schmidt is part of the Stern-Wywiol Gruppe, a group of companies with over 1,700 employees worldwide that has been operating successfully in the world of Food and Feed Ingredients for nearly 40 years.

As an independent, owner-managed group the specialist firms produce additives for food and animal nutrition and also oleochemical specialities. 

Based in Hamburg, Germany, Berg+Schmidt looks back on over 60 years of competence in the development, production and worldwide distribution of lipids. We operate in three fields of business: animal nutrition, oleochemicals and cosmetics. We have affiliates in Europe, Asia and the USA and production facilities of our own in Poland, Malaysia, Singapore and India. Products are available from our various warehouses. Our strong presence in the procurement markets ensures a reliable supply of raw materials. As an owner-managed family business we follow a sustainable business development policy focussed firmly on our customers’ needs. We are proud of our short routes, quick decisions and entrepreneurial confidence. 

Today's consumers are seeking smart cosmetic products that not only offer immediate results but are also natural, which is a major challenge for formulators and R&D specialists. Therefore, we have focused our efforts and activities on healthy skin and sustainable raw material solutions and continually reinforce our scientific research.

Name: Agarta Bitkisel Kozmetik

Modern tesisinde, son teknolojiyi kullanarak, doğal bitki özleri ve bitkisel yağlar ile ürünlerini tasarlar, hijyenik ortamlarda prosedür ve standartlara uygun şekilde üretim yapar.

Name: indu
Description:
Teens deserve a beauty brand that’s made entirely for them, with products that meet their needs, powered by formulas that are gentle, effective and friendly to their microbiome. So, we made one!

Smart, gentle, balanced formulas that adapt to your skin’s needs. The only brand that’s specifically formulated for teen skin.

Respecting your skin’s microbiome is one of the most important ways to maintain healthy, happy skin. Our unique Tri-biotic Complex and pH balanced formulas are all designed to help it stay that way. Our products are also non-comedogenic – so they won’t clog your pores or cause spots.Across our whole range, we only use ingredients that keep your skin balanced and happy. No stripping or drying, no added extras.

We’re teen approved and parent trusted. Our gentle yet effective skincare is vegan, cruelty free and dermatologically tested.  Every product is safe and suitable for all teen skin types, with no unsuitable ingredients.

Driven by teen trends, lifestyles and habits, we’re shaped by a committee of 250+ global teenage beauty enthusiasts, aged 13-17.

Available at www.weareindu.com and in-store and online at Sephora UK

Estamos empenhados em levar todos os canais de venda possíveis onde atenda a todas as pessoas e nações, com produtos de qualidade e custos acessíveis, para que tenhamos reconhecimento das marcas permanente.

Name: Medavita
Description: Medavita, founded in 1963 and with its headquarters in Milan, is a family joint-stock company and the leading Italian brand for haircare treatments. The Company’s mission is to develop, manufacture and commercialise top-quality professional cosmetics for the beauty of hair. With more than 50 years’ experience in this industry, Medavita maintains its steadfast vocation of providing the best service by offering a wide range of products that meet the most demanding needs created by the far-reaching cosmetics world of today.

Name: Dr. Hauschka Skincare
Description:
WALA UK Ltd. is the UK subsidiary of WALA Heilmittel GmbH in Germany, where in 1967 the 100% natural and / or organic beauty brand Dr. Hauschka was born out of a medical background. The products were inspired by a unique proposition: addressing the skin as a holistic organ and stimulating its natural functions to encourage the skin to exercise its powers of self-regeneration. All products are certified by BDIH and NaTrue, are free from synthetic fragrances, dyes and preservatives, mineral oils, parabens, silicones and PEGs and have never been tested on animals.

Dr. Hauschka Skin Care and Make-up are manufactured at WALA Heilmittel GmbH. WALA Heilmittel’s experience of using natural substances to provide natural care through the biodynamic cultivation of medicinal plants extends back to 1935. The responsible and sustainable development of our products is something that has been at the core of Dr. Hauschka ever since the beginning.

From everyday essentials to trend-forward formulas, our mission is to put beauty in your hands — literally and emotionally.

Nos comprometemos a romper esse padrão e produzir a fragrância perfeita, em cheiro e durabilidade, por um preço justo. Nossa oferta é pioneira, não nas tecnologias familiares que usamos, mas em nossa honestidade e integridade. 

A Perfumistta surge para revolucionar o mercado de cosméticos por meio de excelentes produtos de origem ética, de longa duração e de alta qualidade. Somos a melhor escolha para perfumes de luxo.

Together, let’s paint a future in the vibrant palette of cosmetics.

Name: Plisson 1808
Description:
Plisson 1808 is the oldest shaving house in the world, a French Maison where craft, precision and heritage shape the art of ritual.

Founded in Paris in 1808 and now crafted in Brittany, Plisson has carried the same conviction for over two centuries:
an exceptional object is born from the hand, the gesture, and the time given to do things well.

Our artisans work with noble materials — woods, metals, natural fibres — to create grooming objects designed to last, to be repaired, and to be transmitted.
This culture of the hand is our signature.
It guides everything we do, from shaving brushes and razors to skincare and fragrance.

Today, Plisson opens a new chapter: extending the ritual from the visible to the invisible with the Fragrance Collection 1808, and reimagining the contemporary art of living for men around the world.

A Maison of craft.
A Maison of transmission.
A Maison where French savoir-faire meets modern elegance.

OptoCeutics specializes in advanced brain health solutions using light-based technology. Our primary product, EVY LIGHT, is designed specifically for individuals experiencing age-related cognitive decline, such as those diagnosed with mild cognitive impairment (MCI), Alzheimer’s, or dementia. EVY LIGHT provides a non-invasive method to stimulate brain activity, supporting better memory, sleep, and mental clarity.

Our focus is on delivering scientifically backed, practical tools that fit seamlessly into the daily lives of older adults and their caregivers. 

OptoCeutics is committed to improving cognitive health, helping individuals maintain their independence and quality of life.

As well as bringing innovative brands to market, BEAUTYPRO believes the key to a successful business is partnering with those that share the same interest and dedication as they do.

With offices in the UK, Europe and Australia, BEAUTYPRO was founded by Ibs Ansari and David Herdman supported by a team of uniquely talented individuals that have made us a multi-award winning business for product innovation and business.

Perché “Cactus”?
Il nome Cactus simboleggia la nostra resilienza: come il cactus prospera in condizioni difficili, anche noi ci adattiamo a un mercato in continua evoluzione, superando ogni sfida per continuare a offrire prodotti di alta qualità.

La nostra mission:
Offriamo prodotti innovativi e affidabili, con istruzioni chiare e dettagliate per un utilizzo ottimale da parte dei professionisti del settore.

Perché sceglierci?
I nostri prodotti all’avanguardia semplificano il lavoro dei professionisti, garantendo sicurezza e risultati ogni volta eccellenti.

Description:
Integra Fragrances designs exclusive scent identities for the world's leading brands, making their customer journeys unique and unforgettable. Specialized in the scent diffusion for medium and large environments, Integra Fragrances designs a tailor-made ambient scenting project for each environment. Thanks to the most advanced remote-controlled technology, more than 15 years of expertise and an exceptional level of service, Integra Fragrances scents the biggest retail networks worldwide. Among its clients are Bulgari, Fendi, MaxMara, Intesa Sanpaolo, Emirates and many other brands among the best international luxury, fashion, hospitality, banking industry, and many others. Today Integra Fragrances is a 360 ° ambassador of perfume as a key must-have in branding and communication.

Integra Fragrances progetta identità olfattive esclusive per i migliori marchi al mondo, rendendo le loro esperienze uniche e indimenticabili. Specializzata nella diffusione olfattiva per medie e grandi volumetrie, Integra Fragrances progetta un sistema di diffusione personalizzato per ogni ambiente. Grazie alla più avanzata tecnologia a controllo remoto, oltre 15 anni di esperienza nel settore e un livello di servizio eccezionale, Integra Fragrances profuma le più grandi catene retail in tutto il mondo. Fra i suoi clienti vi sono Bulgari, Fendi, MaxMara, Intesa Sanpaolo, Emirates e molti altri fra i più grandi brand internazionali del lusso, moda, ospitalità, settore bancario e molti altri. Oggi Integra Fragrances è ambasciatrice a 360° del profumo come arma indispensabile nel branding e nella comunicazione.

Name: Gerrard International
Description: Creating a buzz in UK spas and salons for over 30 years, Jessica is part of an impressive portfolio offered by Gerrard International, alongside BeautyLab London, Spongellé, Happy Paul and its own brand Mii Cosmetics, which includes our four sub-brands for manicure and pedicure (Nails by Mii) makeup (Mii Cosmetics), tanning (Kissed by Mii) and brows (Brow by Mii).

Name: Air-Val International
Description: Air-Val International is a 40-year-old family company that creates, manufactures and distributes perfumery products under license of many prestigious and well-known international brands, as well as own brands and exclusive projects. We are leaders in the children’s perfumery market and we distribute our products in more than 90 countries. A success based on the effort of the entire team and our values of innovation, know-how, quality and commitment with the consumer.

Name: Auran Kozmetik
Description:
2022 yılında başladığımız maceramıza Türkiye'nin en çok tercih edilen koku markası olarak gururla devam ediyoruz.
Müşterilerimizin "Koku Denince AURAN" diyerek bizleri gururlandırması ve memnuniyet oranlarının %80 den fazla olması, bizi bu kadar kısa sürede e-ticaret platformlarında 1 numara haline getirdi.

Name: Groupe GM Cosmética Portugal
Description:
Specialists in solid cosmetics since 2003, we are focused on sustainable innovation and developing solutions for the hygiene and personal care market.

Intending to meet the needs of large hotel chains, we began the manufacturing of solid amenities, in a small production unit at Esposende.
Specialists in soap manufacturing for over a decade, we’ve kept our focus on amenities production - with a steadily growing brand portfolio. Our business stood side by side with the growth of the tourism industry, tracking the demand of hotel chains for customized products with recognized warranty of quality in the cosmetic sector.

Aware of the need to keep up with constantly improving markets and consumers, in 2015 we’ve broadened our service to a new customer segment — PRIVATE LABEL — with the offer of customizable products from formulation up to the packing. We develop your projects from the selection of raw materials, fragrances, product weight, shape and even the packaging materials and design.

We are a team of 30 specialized individuals, from the fields of chemistry, engineering, manufacturing, marketing & sales, that allow us a constant and steady product innovation.

Market diversification and expansion to other commercial sectors, reinforced the need to construct a new industrial unit - Groupe GM Cosmética Portugal, inaugurated in 2018, - able to match the norms and technical demands, current and forthcoming. Within the scope of Good Manufacturing Practices in the cosmetics Sector (ISO 22716), Quality and Environment Management Systems (ISO 9001 and 14001), Ecolabel, RSPO and Animal Hygiene Products certifications.

We investigate new ways to be part of daily personal hygiene routines: through our shampoos, conditioners, body and lip moisturizers, deodorants and specialized cleansing products.

Name: Soapworks Ltd
Description:
Soapworks produce award-winning soaps and cleansing bars for body, hair and face. Our award-winning team are at the cutting edge of personal care innovation, creating products that deliver for private label customers, beauty brands and retailers world-wide.

We specialise in bringing your brand to life with custom formulations and personal care solutions. In addition to our efficient soap bar production lines, our fully automated bottle filling operation manufactures oil and home fragrance products for major brands.

We have everything you need to bring your idea to life with our 360º concept to delivery contract manufacturing service.

Name: Cahaya Naturals
Description: We make gentle natural skin care products to help people with atopic dermatitis (eczema) take control of their skin health and regain their confidence. Our products are made with Indonesia's botanical ingredients that have been scientifically-proven to be beneficial for skin health.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Avon South Africa
Description:
The beauty of doing good.

We are committed to doing good with our people, purpose, and product. We will build a compelling, rewarding, and personalised experience that is open to all. We will provide a clear and simple way for everyone to earn and to learn. We will tailor your journey with us so you can grow in a way that works for you. Relationships are at the heart of everything we do, we will build our team around you.
 
We are Avon.

1. At Avon, we’re open to all
Irrespective of gender, race, sexuality, age or any other characteristic. We stand against any forms of prejudice and inequality and we want to ensure that all members of our global community – customers, Representatives, employees and supporters –feel valued, safe and respected.
2.
Life at Avon
We want our associates to fulfil their potential and set their own career path and place a huge emphasis on the learning experiences that enable this.
We also recognise that your career supports your lifestyle and your family, so we provide highly competitive compensation and benefits packages, and offer flexible work arrangements that allow you to balance work and personal commitments.

3. Natura &Co
We are also part of the Natura &Co family – a group of purpose-led businesses, committed to making a positive difference. We don’t just want to be the best company in the world, we want to be the best company for the world.

The Avon careers website can be found here which includes all the comms and value proposition that the company puts to the public - https://www.avonworldwide.com/careers

Name: Life Supplies
Description:
A lot has changed in the last 50 years, but not your toothpaste. For too long, the same old brands have filled the same ugly plastic tubes with harsh chemicals, nasty flavours and pointless coloured stripes. But not us. We’re on a mission to sophisticate your sink with the next generation of naturally effective, scientifically formulated smile care – starting with the world’s first zero-waste toothpaste.

Changing the status quo is never easy. It requires relentlessness and grit. Core to our mission is building a team of optimistic individuals determined to make a positive impact on the world. This means challenging ourselves constantly. Stretching beyond the bounds of conventional thinking. And operating comfortably in a space of uncertainty.

Do you like doing the impossible? We'd love to hear from you.

Name: Filmore Health
Description:
Filmore is a fast-growing women’s and children’s health ecosystem committed to redefining care in Indonesia and Southeast Asia. We integrate evidence-based clinical services, research-driven product development, and technology-enabled patient experience to close long-standing gaps in female health.

Across Filmore Medical’s clinics and Filmore Pharma’s consumer health products, our mission is to create a safe, stigma-free environment where every patient feels seen, heard, and genuinely cared for. From gynecology, maternity, pediatrics, mental health, and nutrition to OTC innovations developed through research and clinical insights, Filmore is building a future where comprehensive healthcare for women and families is accessible, empathetic, and world-class.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: fatty15
Description:
Who are we?

As a consortium of doctors, scientists, and innovators, we're dedicated to pioneering health at the cellular level. Fatty15 is the result of years of research and development — to isolate the good fat we need and put it back in our bodies to help protect against age-related breakdown. 

So from the bottom of our cardiovascular muscles (hearts), thank you. We couldn't be more excited to have you in the fatty15 family very soon.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Vitaminstore
Description: Jouw gezondheid is je meest kostbare bezit en verdient alleen het allerbeste. Daarom zijn onze vitamines en natuurlijke verzorgingsproducten van de hoogste kwaliteit, bevatten ze de best opneembare ingrediënten en worden ze ontwikkeld op basis van de laatste wetenschappelijke inzichten en met aandacht voor onze planeet. Ons team van betrokken health coaches zet positieve verandering in gang door altijd te beginnen met persoonlijk advies in onze 21 winkels en op vitaminstore.nl. Wij zijn er voor iedereen die van het leven houdt en er zo lang mogelijk van wil genieten. #LiveMore

Name: Advanced Cosmeceuticals
Description:
The Advanced Cosmeceuticals Skin Group is a provider of premium aesthetic devices and cosmeceutical skincare products, offering customised and integrated solutions to medical, skincare and aesthetic professionals, throughout Australia and New Zealand.

Since its inception, ACSG has carefully curated a selection of brands based on their high performance and proven results. ACSG is now the Pacific’s most wide-reaching supplier of cosmeceutical skincare and aesthetic devices, partnering with over 2,300 of Australia and New Zealand's best skin clinics. 

To complement the science-backed aesthetic offering, ACSG has offices, representatives, trainers, and educators strategically located across Australia and New Zealand to provide quality support and services to our partners. Whether it be products, treatments or equipment, ACSG’s full-service support model includes business, education, and marketing materials to elevate our client's professional growth.

Name: Dr. Grandel GmbH
Description:
Dear valued visitor,
Our company has been founded 1947 by Dr. Felix Grandel and is experienced over 60 years in the field of professional cosmetics. The graduated economist Michael Grandel has been leading the independent company in second generation. His nephew, Dr. Gabriel Duttler, and his daughter, Ariane Grandel, took over the management in 2019. 
The company headquarter as well as the in-house production are located in Augsburg, Germany. DR. GRANDEL currently employs 245 staff members.

The field of cosmetics at the DR. GRANDEL Group committed itself to the professional beauty markets all over the world. The represented brands of the company DR. GRANDEL Kosmetik, DR. GRANDEL Health Products, PHYRIS Skin Care Concept and ARABESQUE Make-up Collection are exported very successfully to more than 50 countries all over the world. 20 000 beauticians are working with our high-quality and first class branded products. 

The company DR. GRANDEL ensures highest premium quality for all its brands, products and services.

Legal info: https://www.grandel.com/international-business/legal-info
