Name: Pharmacie Paul Santy Lyon
Description:
La pharmacie Paul Santy est une officine mettant la relation patient-pharmacien au cœur de son fonctionnement.

Dans ses locaux, la place est faite à l'expérience sensorielle, l'information  et le conseil. 

Une approche de l'officine qui permet à chaque pharmacien de retrouver son cœur de métier et de se centrer sur l'essentiel : les patients.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Honeybee Wax
Description:
Honeybee has been India's preferred brand of salon grade depilatory waxes since 1992. 

We earned our reputation because we’re more than just waxing. We’re about smooth chemistry. Our clean and cruelty formulas are thoughtfully designed and packed with the best ingredients to soothe, hydrate, and nurture skin. We make sure every ingredient, and every source is tested, gentle and of high quality. None of our products have any harmful or even questionable ingredients. 

This is why our customers trust that they can use Honeybee products safely (and effectively), even on the most sensitive skin.

Name: Xpert Professional
Description:
Xpert Professional is Ireland’s leading distributor of professional hair care products, employing over 70 staff at our headquarters in Naas, Co. Kildare.
 
David Donnellan, Managing Director founded Xpert Professional in 1997 and partnered with the Italian brand of salon exclusive haircare, ALFAPARF Milano. ALFAPARF Milano has gone on to become the fastest growing brand in the history of the professional haircare industry in Ireland and is Ireland’s number one professional hair care brand today, used by more Irish hairdressers than any other professional brand. 

In 2005 we added more leading professional brands to our portfolio of salon exclusive products, including premium brands Joico and Moroccan Oil, and the organic brand Kemon. We also offer a leading edge salon software system, Shortcuts.
 
At Xpert Professional, education has always been central to our ethos. We have the country’s largest technical team and offer over 400 courses per year, including those at our state-of-the-art training facility, ACCADEMIA in the heart of Dublin. 

We also have an in-house marketing team who offer strategic and effective marketing for our leading brands. 

At Xpert Professional, we realise the importance of developing innovative, customised digital communications which will continue to be our focus in 2020

Name: DFD Dermafreedom
Description:
DermaFreeDom (DFD) specializes in crafting premium skincare products, catering to both B2B and B2C markets. Our offerings include a diverse range of innovative and high-quality solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Additionally, we provide third-party manufacturing services, enabling businesses to create customized skincare products under their own brand. 

With a commitment to excellence and a focus on customer satisfaction, DermaFreeDom is your trusted partner for all things skincare, from private labeling to cutting-edge product development. 

Our mission is to deliver skincare solutions that inspire confidence and promote healthy, glowing skin for everyone.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Instituto Español
Description:
Nacimos hace más de 122 años y seguimos cuidando, de familia a familia, a nuestros consumidores con la fabricación de productos de perfumería y cosmética.

Hoy somos una fuerte empresa española, que está presente en más de 50 países en todos los continentes y nos ha hecho posicionarnos entre las grandes marcas de cuidado personal.

Nos consideramos jóvenes con muchos años de experiencia, marcados por una constante innovación y flexibilidad, para adaptarnos a nuestros consumidores y ofrecerle un valor verdadero para ellos.
En nuestro día a día, trabajamos por hacer más con menos, para de esta forma ser sostenibles y proteger a nuestros clientes, consumidores, empleados, medio ambiente, y todo aquello en lo que tomemos parte.

Nuestros valores: 

Conciliación Familiar: 
Somos una empresa familiar y, como tal, cuidamos a las familias de nuestros empleados ofreciéndole un horario adaptado y condiciones flexibles.

Integración de la Mujer: 
No concebimos nuestro equipo sin las mujeres, por ello estamos formados por un 90% de ellas.

Trabajo Local: 
Creemos en nuestra tierra, y potenciamos el empleo en la zona, tanto en nuestra plantilla como en el resto de stakeholders.

Nuestro Entorno:
Estar rodeado por el Parque Nacional de Doñana hace que seamos más conscientes de la importancia de cuidar el medio ambiente.

Gracias por seguir a nuestra gran familia Instituto Español!

Name: Diphasac
Description:
Nos especializamos en la comercialización de productos farmacéuticos destinados a mejorar la calidad de vida. Nos guían la integridad y la innovación, asegurando que cada medicamento cumpla con los más altos estándares de calidad y seguridad.

Conéctate para explorar cómo, juntos, podemos fomentar un futuro más saludable.


FARMACOVIGILANCIA
"VIGILAR LA SEGURIDAD DE LOS MEDICAMENTOS, ES RESPONSABILIDAD DE TODOS"
La Farmacovigilancia consiste en la vigilancia de la seguridad de los medicamentos, parte de este proceso es reportar cualquier evento adverso que presente ante el uso de un producto farmacéutico.
Si presenta un evento por el uso de alguno de nuestros productos comuníquese a través del correo electrónico del área de farmacovigilancia:
ufarmacovigilancia@diphasac.com o al número de WhatsApp: +51 924 295 764
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Colleen Rothschild Beauty
Description:
Colleen Rothschild Beauty is built on the expertise of Colleen Rothschild, who brings over 30 years of experience in the beauty industry to her eponymous brand. With deep, hands-on expertise in sourcing the finest, most effective ingredients and mastering manufacturing and formulation technologies, she has created formulas that seamlessly blend time-tested ingredients with innovative advancements—ensuring every product delivers unparalleled results for your skin, hair, and body.

At the heart of Colleen Rothschild Beauty is the belief that beauty care should be effortless yet transformative—delivering visible results while elevating the ritual of self-care. Guided by the philosophy of "minimal effort, maximum results," the brand redefines modern beauty with products that help people feel confident and beautiful in their own skin—an ethos reflected in every offering.

 
FOLLOW US
Facebook: @ColleenRothschildBeauty
Instagram: @ColleenRothschild
TikTok: @ColleenRothschild

Name: Ultra Chemical, Inc.
Description:
Ultra Chemical is a supplier of customized ingredients and specialized services for the progressing personal care industry. We are a family owned business founded in 2007 that has maintained full focus on personal care, delivering science-based and proven ingredients and custom solutions to our customers.



Ultra Chemical is a family owned company founded in 1992 that serves as supplier and manufacturer of customized ingredients and specialized services for the progressing personal care industry. We understand what our customers and their consumers alike are looking for in their beauty regimens and offer science-based and proven ingredients that help meet these goals. Our technologies keep pace with the ever-changing beauty wellness space and stretch across skin, hair, scalp, and sun care categories as well as color cosmetics.

Actives & Biofunctionals that act via multiple pathways in order to help preserve the skin’s youth and balance. Products include natural, mineral-based UVA/UVB protection for sun and skin care as well as technologies that address wrinkle reduction and dry skin to combat premature aging, dark spot reduction and sebum control for even skin tone and prebiotic solutions for a balanced skin microbiota. Actives are also available for maintaining optimal conditions of the scalp, a critical step for healthy hair.   

Film Forming Polymers that are traditional or naturally derived that can be used in various applications. Offering excellent water resistance, we have polymers that allow your sun care product to not only have a beautiful aesthetic feel, but to protect your consumer while in water. Other chemistries make it possible for a mascara to dry fast and leave your consumer smudge-free.   

Specialty Naturals that lend themselves to the trends of the industry. Products include natural oils that can be used in skin, hair or scalp products for a luxurious after-feel as well as natural emulsifiers, emollients, starches, exfoliants and colorants.

Name: BEAUTICON VALLEY Holding
Description:
BEAUTICON VALLEY Holding, è il network di oltre 50 imprese che producono e distribuiscono prodotti cosmetici di eccellenza in più di 130 paesi del mondo. Un nome che raccoglie, rappresenta e promuove, con rinnovata energia, le attività del gruppo precedentemente rappresentato dalla sigla “NG Group”, fondato a Brescia nel 1959 dalla famiglia Negretti. 
BEAUTICON VALLEY Holding è riconosciuta oggi come “Capitale Italiana della Cosmetica” essendo divenuta negli anni punto di riferimento produttivo privilegiato delle beauty companies più importanti al mondo.

Oltre che riferimento istituzionale per le aziende controllate, BEAUTICON VALLEY Holding è anche Società Benefit. Per questo si è data il preciso compito di svolgere attività di carattere culturale e valenza benefica per favorire l’evoluzione e il benessere del contesto sociale collettivo.
 
Tra le oltre 50 realtà controllate dalla Holding tre sono i pilastri di riferimento, cui se ne aggiunge un quarto di carattere formativo.
 
PROFESSIONHAIR Milano
E' la divisione professional di BEAUTICON VALLEY holding, rivolta ai migliori saloni nel mondo. Una collezione di brand di eccellenza per la prima volta selezionati per intercettare i life styles delle persone.
 
 
COSMETIC TAILORS
E' la divisione “private label” di BEAUTICON VALLEY holding, rivolta alle aziende che desiderano produrre cosmetici di qualità impeccabile, a 360° nella cosmetica, con un approccio “sartoriale” su misura rigorosamente Made in Italy.
 
 
B2C - Benefit To Consumer
E' la divisione retail di BEAUTICON VALLEY holding. Costituisce un’importante innovazione nel mercato per il suo approccio umanistico prima che produttivo.
 
 
POLIESTETICO di Milano
E' la più prestigiosa realtà accademica italiana nel beauty. È un soggetto indipendente, scelto da BEAUTICON VALLEY Holding quale partner ufficiale per le proprie attività di ricerca scientifica, alta formazione ed education.

Name: Plant Therapy
Description:
In the rush of everyday life, finding time to pause, unwind, and smell the roses can be few and far between.

That's where Plant Therapy steps in – and not just with roses, but also with lavender, sage, and a variety of other plant-based ingredients and products made with them. Consider us your botanical ally, adding a sprinkle of delight, a breath of calm, and a touch of vitality to your everyday moments.

Our natural products, designed for the mind, body, and space, are here to revolutionize your daily routines by infusing them with the power of nature. Think of us as your shortcut to wellness, transforming ordinary rituals into mood-enhancing practices. This way, you can experience more of those blissful 'ahhhhh' moments from your everyday.

At Plant Therapy, we're committed to impacting lives and helping everyone extract more from life's little moments. Elevate the everyday with natural products from skin care to home care. With full transparency and no unnecessary ingredients, we deliver quality you can trust.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Emma S Skincare
Description:
Emma S is a Swedish skincare brand that combines the best from nature and science to create safe and effective products with proven results. The philosophy is built on a personal story and behind the brand are the two founders and entrepreneurs Emma S. Wiklund and Nora Larssen.

The brand was launched in Sweden in 2010 and is now one of the leading and fastest growing skincare brands in Sweden. Emma S. is available in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Finland, Germany and through emmas.com (Europe wide).

Emma Wiklund (maiden name Sjöberg) has a background as an international top model with a modelling career spanning over 20 year. She belonged to the era of the 90’s supermodels. Emma S. is based on her personal experiences and the type of skincare products that she herself has always used.

“In the 90’s Photoshop wasn’t an option, and therefore your skin had to look perfect. Working as a model, my skin quickly became one of my most important tools for work.” says Emma.

During periods Emma did experience some problems with her skin, and she got in contact with a French dermatologist that helped her to sort through the jungle of available skincare products. She recommended products you could find at the French pharmacies, products with safe and effective ingredients with well-documented results – and it worked.

“When we started Emma S., we wanted to develop a pharmacy-like skincare series based on the type of skincare I have always used myself. Products that really work and give you visible results”, says Emma.

Name: Cible Skin
Description:
Cible Skin is a shared vision and a medical family legacy.
Founded by Drs. Joël and Raphaël Aknin, Cible Skin pioneers the first true longevity science for the skin.

At the heart of our innovation is 1-LGVTY, a patented biotechnology born from years of medical expertise and clinical research.

It is the first technology in the world scientifically proven to reduce the skin’s biological age, not just improving appearance, but reversing aging at the cellular level.

By targeting the skin’s immune ecosystem, a master regulator of aging, Cible Skin activates the body’s own mechanisms of regeneration and resilience.

This breakthrough defines a new category at the intersection of medicine, longevity science, and dermatology.

We believe in a future where aging is no longer a decline, but a phase of renewal.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: POKONUT
Description:
POKONUT is on mission to provide best premium natural formulations that combines wisdom of age old ayurvedic traditions with modern touch of sciences which do not impact real ingredients but make them usable for modern era so that we can give best care to generations and nurture them with love.

We do not believe in damaging skin in pursuit of short-term results however our products are uniquely formulated to help maintain skin’s natural health and balance.

Each product Formulation has curated selection of premium quality luxurious, therapeutic ingredients, supported with rigorous scientific research and is manufactured in compliance with the highest standards, so that all you get is Pure Organic Kiss Of Nurture (POKONUT).
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Márcia Cosméticos
Description:
Tradição e produtos de qualidade marcam os 80 anos da Márcia Cosméticos. Empresa 100% nacional, com presença em mais de 80.000 pontos de venda.

Parque fabril com 20.000 m² no Rio de Janeiro, com várias células, responsáveis pela fabricação de diversas categorias cosméticas. Centro de produção de alta tecnologia, com capacidade produtiva para milhares de unidades.

Operando de forma verticalizada, o Grupo Márcia conta com um conglomerado de várias empresas fabricantes de insumos como frascos e tampas, produtos químicos e essências, caixas de embarque e materiais em papelão. Isso a torna bastante competitiva, uma vez que, se reporta a  otimização dos custos de seus produtos, o que lhe dá qualidade e padrão com preço final bastante justo para o consumidor.

Name: Sunstar Europe SA
Description:
SUNSTAR Group, a globally recognized leader in the oral care, health & beauty industry, has been providing research-based products and services in 90 countries for over 80 years. The company is committed to partnering with professionals and scientists to enhance the health and well-being of people everywhere. Among other brands, Sunstar markets, manufactures and sells an extensive line of preventive and therapeutic products under the brands GUM and BUTLER.

SUNSTAR’s mission is to ‘help people everywhere achieve better health and enhance their quality-of-life’. This motto – coined in 1962 by SUNSTAR’s chairman, Hiroo Kaneda – embodies the company’s commitment to innovation and creating products and services that build a better tomorrow. It also supports SUNSTAR’s investment in research, and its endless curiosity for the advancement of knowledge.

No matter the industry or the audience, SUNSTAR’s multiple products and services all share one common thread: supporting the well-being of consumers everywhere.

Learn more about the company, our philosophy and mission on www.sunstar.com.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Industrias Beter
Description:
Beter is a family business of beauty and personal care accessories based in Barcelona, run by the third generation of the family. Beter stands out for the quality and innovation of its products, which have managed to combine tradition with new market needs. After more than 80 years of experience, the company has more than 800 references of beauty accessories for hands, feet, face, hair, makeup and body.

Beter is a leader in the Spanish market, with a presence in the channels of selective perfumery, perfumery (Beter Elite), department stores (Beter Beauty Care) and pharmacy (Beter Pharmacy). Beter products are sold in 34 countries.

Name: Bio-Therapeutic
Description:
Bio-Therapeutic, the world leader in esthetic technology, was established in 1974, and is headquartered in Seattle, Washington.  With a firm belief in advancing skincare technology, Bio-Therapeutic has repeatedly revolutionized the skin care industry with their cutting edge, non-invasive, and age defying equipment and award winning products including the bt-PRO line, bt-accent line, bt-GEAR hand held technology, and the bt-ceuticals advanced product offering.

For more information on Bio-Therapeutic equipment and products call 800-971-6438 or visit www.bio-therapeutic.com.

Name: La French Beauty
Description:
La French Beauty, c’est la scène ouverte de la beauté française indépendante.
Un collectif vivant de plus de 60 marques engagées - toutes green, made in France et fondées par des entrepreneurs passionnés - réunies dans un concept-store unique au cœur de Paris.

Une boutique pas comme les autres
À deux pas de Montorgueil, notre flagship est un écrin chic et équitable où chaque marque a sa place, sa voix et son histoire. Ici, pas de têtes de gondole imposées : chaque détail est pensé pour révéler la richesse du collectif.
Notre équipe de vente connaît chaque marque sur le bout des doigts. Elle conseille, écoute, incarne.

Un label, un écosystème, un tremplin
En plus du flagship, La French Beauty déploie ses marques sur tous les formats pertinents :
* Boutique en ligne
* Box beauté et calendrier de l’Avent
* Shop-in-shop à Lyon
* Plus de 80 corners dans les parfumeries Passion Beauté
* Animations, rencontres, événements, influence, salons

Une mission commune
Mutualiser les moyens, croiser les énergies, donner de la force à celles et ceux qui réinventent la beauté française.
Nous défendons une beauté sincère, désirable, respectueuse et créative.

Et nous ne faisons que commencer.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sadaway Pvt. Ltd. (Formerly Indus Cosmeceuticals)
Description:
Sadaway Pvt. Ltd.(previously Indus Cosmeceuticals)  is an emerging powerhouse in the global personal care and wellness industry, built on the core principles of Integrity, Pure Formulations, Organic Ingredients, and Gentle Care. Through a digital-first approach, Sadaway is shaping the future of consumer products, combining innovation, consumer-driven insights, and e-commerce excellence to create an ecosystem that not only benefits consumers but also uplifts the wider community.
   
Our brand portfolio includes trusted names like Indus Valley Cosmetics, Bio Organic, Mina Eyebrow, and O4U — each carefully crafted to offer natural, organic, and chemical-free products for skincare, haircare, and wellness needs. We prioritize safety and effectiveness, ensuring that every product is scientifically backed and developed with the utmost care and expertise.

Serving customers across over 30 countries, Sadaway Pvt. Ltd. is on a path to becoming a leading FMCG conglomerate that seamlessly blends digital engagement, innovation, and sustainability. Led by visionary founders with a scientific background, we are committed to redefining industry standards by blending nature and science. Supported by a team of experts, we create safe, effective products driven by innovation. With a strong focus on e-commerce and direct-to-consumer marketing, we deliver scientifically-backed solutions to consumers worldwide.

Name: Gale & Cosm S.r.l.
Description:
Gale & Cosm S.r.l. is a dynamic commercial company based in Italy with experienced in the cosmetic and make up ingredients market. 

A team made up of 15-year-experience professionals and young qualified techical employees, two warehouses and two laboratories for trials and quality tests.

Gale & Cosm offers its own range of ingredients to the personal care and beauty international manufacturers.

Name: Beauty on TApp
Description:
We are a 100% woman owned beauty e-tailer based in South Africa. We've created an easy to use platform that retails niche and well known local and international beauty and selfcare brands. We launched our e-commerce platform when we realised there is a demand for an e-tailer thats purely focused on beauty distribution and that can provide an end to end beauty shopping experience. 

We started  off as a find a beauty service app and later evolved to an e-tailer given the demand for such a platform. We have become a preferred platform for beauty brands due our brand ethos, reliability, efficiency, and vast range of products. We have built a community that trusts our brand and that we remain highly engaged with. 

We recently launched a skincare brand, Pastry Skincare, under the Beauty on TApp umbrella that is exclusively available online via Beauty on TApp.  

We are currently only available online and ship nationwide in South Africa, Swaziland and Botswana.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Te-Ha Group
Description:
Founded in 1983 in Istanbul, Te-Ha Group is one of the leading companies in import and distribution of cosmetic products in Turkey. The company increases its market share with an upward trend by representing world-famous and prestigious brands since the day it was founded.


Its working philosophy, young and lively team spirit and financial strength has been the key success factors of the company in achieving and maintaining its position and strength in the market.


Te-Ha Group imports and distributes cosmetics products in three different categories: Luxury brands, niche perfume brands and dermo cosmetics brands.

Name: City Beauty
Description: A luxury skincare brand passionate about developing products that use clean, research-driven ingredients to target specific aging concerns. Our goal is to help our customers feel empowered, confident, and youthful — so their best selves can shine through.

Name: Coco Curls
Description: We are on a mission to create the best products for curly, wavy and textured hair, while providing transparent and scientific information about our ingredients and processes. Our products are for all curl types and textures: wavy, curly, coily, kinky, fine, dense, thin, thick and everything in-between. Cultural bias forces many people to conform to non-inclusive hair standards. We're committed to eliminating all such biases, creating a supportive community and kindling social change to ensure inclusive and transformative hair experiences for everyone.

Name: HYGR
Description:
What is HYGR?
HYGR (pronounced as 'hai-grr', a sustainable personal care brand, was born in Malaysia in 2020 and has since established its headquarters in Shah Alam. With a strong digital presence driven by engaging online content, HYGR stands out in the personal care industry. The brand takes pride in manufacturing its own line of natural  derived personal care products, all produced in-house at their GMP-certified factory. In addition to this, HYGR maintains a robust on-site fulfillment operation, ensuring a seamless experience for their customers. This commitment to sustainability and quality truly sets HYGR apart as a local brand with the aim of expanding international both online & retail one day.

What does HYGR want?
At HYGR, our vision is to become synonymous with sustainable personal skincare. We aspire to be the first brand that comes to mind when people think of natural deodorants or lip balms - that’s HYGR. Our mission extends beyond simply selling products; we aim to transform consumer habits, encouraging the use of less plastic and promoting sustainable paper and refillable packaging. We are committed to providing personal care solutions that harness the best naturally derived ingredients available. Our promise is to deliver unparalleled quality in our products and services, benefiting both our customers and the environment. 

With HYGR, you’re choosing a future where natural skincare and sustainable environment coexist harmoniously. 


Who is HYGR looking for?
We are in search of an individual who not only possesses a high level of skill but also a strong drive to excel. The ideal candidate would exhibit both exceptional abilities and an unwavering commitment to their work. This combination of high skill and high will is what we believe leads to true success.

shoot your shot to hygr.my@gmail.com

Name: Kinship
Description: Kinship Skincare offers delightful solutions for sensitive skin, using science-backed, sensorial formulas. Our products feature bioactive ingredients, skin-soothing plant extracts, and uplifting botanical scents, along with our clinically proven pre-probiotic technology that supports the skin barrier. We believe sensitivity is a superpower, and a joyful skincare routine can uplift and empower you.

Name: Kolmar Labs
Description: Kolmar Laboratories provides total service, from trend direction, product development, package design, and manufacturing to logistics management based upon global, industry-leading technology and quality control in the beauty industry. Kolmar Laboratories connect the visions and the needs of our clients to create a better future.

Name: BASTILLE Parfums
Description: BASTILLE is a French niche perfumes brand with a unique positioning, aiming to revolutionize perfumes with an ultra-natural / ultra-transparent / ultra-respectful collection of scents.

Name: Gapianne
Description:
Réinventons l'intimité des femmes. Gapianne est la première plateforme française de bien-être intime pensée par des femmes pour les femmes.  Libido, hormones, postpartum, ménopause, règles ... Une nouvelle approche holistique et bienveillante de ces sujets qui nous concernent tou.te.s via un eshop, des masterclass d'experts et des conseils éducatifs. 

Il est grand temps d'envisager l'intimité et la sexualité comme un acte de bien être et de self-care.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beneva (antiga Classy Brands)
Description:
Beneva é uma plataforma de marcas do setor de Higiene Pessoal, Perfumaria e Cosméticos, com o propósito de promover o bem-estar como parte essencial da vida.

Com mais de 15 anos de atuação no mercado brasileiro, nossa história começou como Classy Brands e evoluiu para Beneva — uma marca que reflete com mais clareza nosso compromisso com o cuidado acessível, eficaz e consciente.

Acreditamos que o bem-estar está nos pequenos gestos e escolhas do dia a dia. Nosso portfólio reúne marcas com identidades próprias, mas unidas por um mesmo propósito: cuidar das pessoas de forma real, responsável e contínua.

Beneva. Para viver bem. Para seguir adiante.


Comprometida com a sustentabilidade possui um portfólio diversificado de produtos veganos, naturais e ecologicamente corretos.

Nossa equipe atinge varejistas e distribuidores em mais de 65.000 pontos de venda nos canais alimentar, de farmácias e perfumarias. Com sede na cidade de São Paulo, tem seu armazém localizado em Vitória-ES.

A Classy Brands possui conhecimento sobre as principais características do varejo brasileiro, possibilitando também estabelecer parceiras estratégicas com importantes grupos no setor. Tem capacidade logística, com completa operação, instalações certificadas, sistemas integrados e entregas para todo o Brasil. Desenvolvemos também soluções especiais de distribuição, passando pela produção dos produtos até o completo desenvolvimento da marca.

Name: OROGOLD Cosmetics
Description:
Founded in 2008 in the United States and across the world, OROGOLD Cosmetics is a successful global skincare and beauty brand that has made its mark on the beauty industry as so much more than a trend. After the Success of orogold in the US, outlets were opened in every continent around the world.
OROGOLD Cosmetics is not only a product but an Experience and a lifestyle. 
Every visitor in one of the OROGOLD Cosmetics stores has been mesmerized by the experience, the pampering And delightful time. With trained beauty specialists and professional staff, every person who enters an OROGOLD Store is given personal attention, advice and products that match their specific skincare needs. This is one of the founding statements of OROGOLD; that each visitor should have the opportunity to try the products and see the Results themselves before making a purchase. This unique method and the products themselves are the Foundation for the continued success of OROGOLD Cosmetics.
The R&D team and scientists at OROGOLD Cosmetics realize that there is not one product that will miraculously Improve the skin. For this reason, all products have been developed as a series of products that can be used in Combination to get the best results and effects that will last for a lifetime. Each series has a specific purpose, but it Is the addition of 24K gold to the products that ensures that you will see stunning results, almost immediately.

Name: Smile Studio
Description:
Smile Studio can be a start to your journey towards an improved smile and self-confidence.

Whether you have misaligned teeth, teeth gap, irregular gum lines, or any other dental problem affecting your smile hence by submitting your smile photo into our platform, you will receive a simulated version of your after treatment smile. You can then select your desired doctor from our directory of professional and experienced doctors in your local area and make your treatment plan appointments. 
You can also use Smile Studio through your treatment procedure in order to get in touch with your doctor online and keep track of your smile progress.

Name: Valerie
Description:
We are Valerie, building the next generation of healthcare for the 1 billion women navigating physical change during peri/menopause. 

Our vision is to liberate women to live fully and freely at every age. 

Don't whisper for relief. Shout for change. 
We give women the tools to reclaim their health, take back control of their bodies, and make midlife maxlife.

We developed Daily Essential, a pioneering liposomal nanotechnology supplement with 90 health benefits. Give your symptoms something to rage about.

And we're just getting started....
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: nailmatic
Description:
nailmatic imagine une cosmétique ludique pour croquer la vie ensemble : espiègle, créative et réfléchie.
 
Quand Boris et Lilian lancent la marque en 2012, ils ont dans l’idée d’insuffler un esprit joueur dans un monde de la beauté souvent trop convenu. Pionniers sur le vernis à ongles éco-responsable, ils proposent une alternative efficace à la pétrochimie. Chez nailmatic, l’innovation est un moteur, un jeu, un art de vivre. 
 
Côté enfant : une gamme dédiée pour égayer les moments du quotidien : vernis à l'eau, produits pour le bain, feutres de tatouage pour le corps et des coffrets DIY créatifs. Des propositions de parenthèses joyeuses et créatives, sans prise de tête, loin des écrans.
 
Côté adulte : des petits plaisirs mode pour twister un look en trois coups de pinceau ! Une beauté sans compromis avec une formule biosourcée jusqu'à 84% et des vernis vegan fabriqués en France. Une gamme complétée par des produits de soins malins pour les ongles. 
 
La nailmaTeam se retrouve sur des valeurs de partage et de légèreté, avec une imagination sans limite. Nous sommes perfectionnistes, soudés et investis à 3000%. 
Portés par cette curiosité qui nous est chère, nous rêvons de lendemains plus doux, plus fous. Créons de nouvelles étincelles ensemble !

Name: BOHO GREEN MAKE-UP
Description: Boho Green Make-Up, a committed brand of natural and organic makeup, develops eco-designed products, with respect for people and the environment. We offer sensory and pigmented formulas, for ethical and responsible beauty at reasonable prices.

Name: Beauty Disrupted I Certified B Corp
Description:
Meet Beauty Disrupted: Conscious beauty for all genders, designed in Stockholm and carefully crafted in the South of France. B Corp certified. All our products, from shampoo to body wash and shaving, come as luxuriously lathering solid bars that smoothly follow the contours of the human body. Our bars contain a careful selection of gentle ingredients, including the finest 100% organic fragrances from Grasse and deeply moisturizing and nourishing natural oils.

Our French and Swedish founders were in the midst of their tech business careers when they learnt that some 80 billion plastic shampoo and conditioner bottles get trashed every year, with many ending up in the oceans. Determined to craft better and cleaner beauty that is more in tune with both people and planet, they quit their careers and embarked on a long and wild journey into everything beauty. After two years of research and development, and unforgettable encounters with artisans, botanists, perfumers and beauty experts along the way, Beauty Disrupted was born.

Our haircare and beauty bars are certified vegan and completely free of harsh ingredients. The bars come in beautiful packaging made of recycled paper. Each of Beauty Disrupted’s haircare and beauty bars avoid at least 2 plastic bottles.
We donate 20% of our profits to organizations that protect the planet and combat climate change.

We look for amazing people who share our passion for clean beauty. Global citizens who think big and far outside the box. People who are obsessed with doing something big about the plastic and climate crisis. Visionaries who want to help us change the beauty industry into something that really lives up to the word “beauty”. People who know how to move mountains and get things done.
If that sounds like you, please get in touch!

For more information about Beauty Disrupted, please visit beautydisrupted.com or visit us on Instagram.

Name: Delta Hygiène
Description: Découvrez notre gamme complète de produits Doussy, conçus pour répondre à tous vos besoins d'entretien domestique avec efficacité et respect de l'environnement.

Name: June Skin
Description:
Welcome to June, where we're pioneering a new standard in women's beauty and wellness making high-end holistic care accessible from the comfort of your home (or wherever you desire treatment). We believe that exceptional care should be convenient and accessible to all, transcending traditional boundaries to meet our clients where they feel most comfortable and secure. 

Every June provider is a licensed medical professional who shares our dedication to clinical excellence. June offers nurses the opportunity to shape a career that's as rewarding as it is flexible, all while being part of a movement that values and uplifts the confidence and autonomy of both our clients and providers.

June is more than just a brand; it's a commitment to transforming the way women's personal care is delivered. We're creating a space where high-quality care meets convenience, where professionals can thrive, and where clients can enjoy an individualized experience that supports their wellbeing — inside, and out.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NAQUA Scientific Dermatology Laboratory
Description:
La Regeneración de la piel es nuestra excelencia y nuestra filosofía de empresa. Nuestra misión es compartir sus beneficios a través de nuestros productos, logrando que el aspecto y la calidad de la piel sea natural y sana.
Por ello, NAQUA ha asumido el compromiso de ofrecer productos avanzados para el cuidado de la piel, productos que aporten valor al cliente de NAQUA, con concentraciones de ingredientes activos que estén respaldados por la ciencia y con un precio honesto para el cliente.

Name: Wynie Holdings
Description: Wynie is a supply and technology company specialized in beauty products, fashion accesories & personal care. Wynie supplies in over 9000 retailers and it's a multi-channel brand with wide distribution networks operating around Europe. We are steadfast in our commitment to cruelty-free beauty. At the heart of our brand is the belief that excepcional beauty should not be an unattainable luxury.

Name: The Lekker Company
Description: We sell wonderful deodorants and sunscreen. They are vegan, fully recyclable, and make you smell so lekker. We now sell in 3000+ stores across Europe and hope to make many more armpits happy in the coming years.

Name: Swiss Image International AG
Description: Swiss Image is a range of effective and gentle skin care products made with Alpine Glacier Water and select natural ingredients from one of the most ecologically pure environments of the world.

Name: SACHAJUAN HAIRCARE
Description: SACHAJUAN’s products were born from the founders’ experience in session and in salon, fused with their perspective on how hair should look, feel and move.  SACHAJUAN’s products deliver professional performance – products that give the stylist control of their craft. The vision was to create products for the toughest days of the trade. To help them to excel in their skills, not to complicate life. To make haircare easy and understandable for both stylists and their customers. The SACHAJUAN range cuts complexity. The products: Straight forward and honest. SACHAJUAN tells you why they made a product, how they made it, how it works. Clear and easy to understand benefits, named precisely for what they do, or what they are. That’s it.

Name: Stomf Ltd
Description: State of Mind Formula

Name: Bloomi
Description: Bloomi is a sexologist-led wellness company that offers inclusive content and clean intimate care essentials that help people get in the mood.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: LAFCO New York
Description:
Discover exemplary fragrances crafted in the spirit of artistry, integrity, and luxury.
Rooted in authentic European perfumery and botanical practices, our collections evoke powerful sensory journeys inspired by the depth of human expression. Our products embody our belief that quality, craftsmanship, and conscience are essential ingredients of luxury.

ARTISTRY.
Old world influence with a modern aesthetic
We balance tradition and innovation to inspire new possibilities in artistic perfumery and botanical skincare
INTEGRITY.
Considered choices for the greater good
We seek sustainably cultivated, ethically sourced, cruelty-free materials, working with partners whose standards reflect ours.
LUXURY
A trifecta of quality, craftsmanship & conscience
We pursue excellence from vision to detail, crafting immersive fragrance experiences that engage and captivate the senses.

Name: Noid Group
Description: SERVICIOS

Name: Feelgood Health
Description:
Welcome to Feelgood Health! We offer the largest and most trusted range of effective natural medicines, with herbal and homeopathic remedies for babies, children, adults and pets! We offer fast delivery as well as FREE delivery for orders above R399.

If you have any questions, please contact our support team via WhatsApp, telephone or email. Our team is available from 08:00 to 17:00, Monday to Friday (South African time).

Here's to your best health - naturally!
Our promise to you:

1. All products are 100% natural, cruelty-free AND earth-friendly! 

2. Quality is guaranteed! We offer a 90 day money back guarantee if you are not satisfied

3. We are committed to helping you and offer a dedicated email support service for all your questions!

4. We deliver to your door throughout South Africa and internationally, with FREE delivery on SA orders over R399!

We've got something for everyone, including adults, children, babies and even your family pet! We're dedicated to helping you and your family to feel good! It's as simple as that!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NUCO Creative Color Solutions
Description:
NUCO is a Polish contract manufacturer of color cosmetics with 30 years of experience.
With our extensive expertise and knowledge, we provide cosmetics brands and private label owners from around the globe with innovative products of the best price-quality relationship.
We offer a range of services: 
-	production of a wide array of existing formulas
-	assistance and expertise of our committed team in developing new formulas 
-	reliable and cost-effective filling services for those who lack technical capacities to fill their own bulk
We provide endless color, effect and packaging possibilities for products that are precisely tailored to our clients' needs.

Our great expertise has been proven by ISO 9001:2015, ISO 22716: 2007, BRC CP, IFS HPC, RSPO and SEDEX/SMETA certificates.

Name: Blumoon Universal Private Limited
Description:
Blumoon Universal Pvt. Ltd. – Your Trusted Partner in Herbal & Ayurvedic Wellness
Blumoon Universal Pvt. Ltd. is a leading exporter of premium herbal, Ayurvedic, and personal care products, committed to delivering authentic, high-quality, and effective wellness solutions worldwide. Based in Mumbai, India, we specialize in natural healthcare, dietary supplements, and personal care formulations, ensuring that every product upholds the rich legacy of Ayurveda with a modern, scientific approach.

What We Offer:
 Herbal & Ayurvedic Supplements – Pure and potent formulations like Shilajit, Ashwagandha, Moringa, Shatavari, Triphala, Turmeric, and many more.
 Therapeutic Herbal Remedies – Solutions for immunity, digestion, stress relief, joint health, and detoxification.
 Personal Care & Wellness – Ayurvedic oils, skincare, and haircare products made with traditional herbs.
 OEM & Private Labeling Services – Custom product development, branding, and white-label solutions for global businesses.
 Global Export & Bulk Supply – Trusted supplier to Europe, the USA, the Middle East, and Asia.
 Quality & Compliance – All products are manufactured under strict quality control, GMP, ISO, and FSSAI standards, ensuring international compliance and safety.

At Blumoon Universal, we believe in promoting holistic wellness through nature’s best ingredients, combining traditional wisdom with modern innovation. Whether you're a distributor, retailer, or looking for custom manufacturing, we provide tailor-made solutions to help your business grow.

Name: Inter-African Marketing
Description:
Inter-African Marketing is the leading distributor of luxury beauty brands in Sub-Saharan Africa. As Africa’s largest distributor we have the pleasure of representing brands from companies such as L’Oréal, Coty, LVMH, Puig and many more.

Inter-African Marketing are the perfectly placed partner to build loyalty, increase visibility and develop brands in Africa. As Africa matures, individual markets and retailers require localised distribution strategies in-line with global brand guidelines. Each of our offices across Africa provides sales, marketing and distribution services to the retailers locally in their individual regions.

Name: MIRATO MEA
Description: We are the leading aerosol and liquid shower gel manufacturer in the Middle East. Providing customers with a highly professional service while using the latest Italian technologies and packaging that not only meets rigorous industry requirements, but most importantly, the everyday needs and expectations of consumers worldwide

Name: Belong Be
Description:
A BE é uma plataforma de beleza inovadora e interativa que tem como missão vender, impulsionar e reunir de forma inédita marcas que estão despontando no mercado nacional.

A ideia central do marketplace é fomentar, enaltecer e dar vitrine para marcas com DNA digital do mercado nacional de beleza e bem estar, ampliando sua voz e espaço, além de promover novas oportunidades dentro de um setor de negócios que está em plena ascensão.

As marcas que estão na BE carregam características muito bem definidas. São marcas que já possuem grande influência digital dentro dos seus nichos, ocupam gaps de mercado e oferecem alternativas para os consumidores. 

Outro diferencial da plataforma é o Mural da Comunidade, que é construído pelo consumidor por meio de imagens que ele posta e que são conectadas ás paginas das marcas.

A plataforma BELONG BE promove um espaço de pertencimento para todos os entusiastas e apaixonados por beleza, interligando empreendedores, influenciadores e consumidores.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Homecourt
Description:
Founded by Courteney Cox, Homecourt is a category-defining D2C CPG brand on a mission to inspire transformation from house to home. Homecourt infuses luxury into the everyday, approaching cleaning and home care from a distinctly beauty-industry perspective. 

Our award-winning collection of premium, non-toxic “Beauty Products for the Home” include surface spray, room deodorant, dish soap, hand wash, hand cream, and candles available in four fine fragrances and in 100% post-consumer recycled packaging.

Name: WellPal
Description:
We're on a mission to make the health and wellness accesable to everyone,We provide customers with unprecedented access to international brands for health and wellness products and the local Brands too under
one stop tech shop, easy transaction experience supported by local payment options, secure delivery and competitive pricing and deliver
it to the customer’s doorstep.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Alta Natura
Description:
Alta Natura, marchio di Inalme srl, è stata fondata da Fabio Impellizzeri con l’obiettivo di coadiuvare il benessere psicofisico delle persone, valorizzando la Natura.

I prodotti Alta Natura coniugano gli insegnamenti della tradizione erboristica con il rigore e la precisione del metodo scientifico traducendoli in elevati standard di qualità e di sicurezza.

L’attenzione per le nostre produzioni nasce da una grande fiducia nell’utilizzo delle proprietà terapeutiche delle piante officinali e da un profondo attaccamento ai valori della tradizione erboristica che guidano da anni il percorso dell’azienda ponendo tecnologia e innovazione al servizio dell’eccellenza.

Il marchio, nato dalla profonda passione per la fitoterapia, si sviluppa in questo contesto e in breve tempo si afferma sul mercato, dove viene riconosciuto come una tra le realtà più importanti del settore.

Risultati raggiunti grazie alla professionalità e alle competenze tecniche che permettono di seguire attentamente le seguenti filiere produttive:

- scelta delle materie prime
- tecnologie innovative
- processi di produzioni sempre più automatizzati
- test e controlli di laboratorio su ogni lotto di materia prima e prodotto finito.

Name: Salad Code
Description:
Salad Code es cosmética natural, vegana y sostenible. Inspirada en las ensaladas más saludables del mundo. 

Formulada con superalimentos como kale, mango, aguacate, espinaca, cúrcuma, quinoa, espirulina...

Sonia Bernal, su fundadora, crea la marca ante la necesidad de una cosmética natural que no irrite una piel sensible como la suya y con la convicción de que los productos Salad Code no son sólo productos, sino que utilizarlos marcan todo un estilo de vida saludable, ya que además de cuidar la piel, cuidan de nuestro entorno.

Envases y packaging reciclados y reciclables. Bueno para ti y bueno para el medio ambiente.

Name: Noid Group
Description:
Desarrollo y fabricación de productos cosmeticos para marcas posicionadas.

Somos un laboratorio de manufactura de cosméticos que hace parte de un grupo farmacéutico con más de 50 años de experiencia. Hace 2 años abrimos nuestras puertas para ofrecerle nuestra experiencia de desarrollo y fabricación a marcas reconocidas.

Name: Kolmar USA
Description: Kolmar USA joins the Kolmar global family as part of its network of companies worldwide in its continuance to be a leader in the industry.  Kolmar USA is a contract manufacturer is centrally located in Scott Township PA that provides beauty and personal care brands with innovative quality formulas, expertise in manufacturing and filling/packaging, and the ability to provide customers with a full turnkey solution.

Name: VOESH
Description:
ABOUT US
At VOESH, we help create daily rituals that feel like spa retreats—whether it’s a quick rinse or a full unwind.

Your shower. Your sink. Your 5-minute reset. They all matter. That’s why every VOESH product is designed to turn the everyday into a moment of intention and indulgence.
Founded in 2013 by spa lovers Vera and Joseph, VOESH began by providing clean, effective, ethical hand and foot care to salon professionals worldwide.

Rooted in K-Beauty and inspired to balance the pace of modern life with the serenity of the spa, we now bring that same spa-quality care to your daily routine.

Make your home the new spa — self-care awaits.

Clean Commitment
VOESH is committed to the highest health and safety standards. Our dermatologist-tested formulas meet the most stringent global regulations with a banned list of 2,000+ ingredients. Certified by PETA and registered with both the EU CPNP and UK SCPN — you can feel good about what goes on your skin.

Awards & Press
VOESH is proud to be recognized for innovation and excellence in clean beauty. Our Vitamin C Shower Filter has received multiple honors, including 2025 Oprah Daily Bath O-Ward, 2024 Retailers’ Choice Award,  and the 2022 Cosmoprof Award. In 2023, our Pedi Moments kit won Best Pedicure Kit from Bustle, our Moisturizing Heel Socks earned a SELF Healthy Beauty Award, and our Solemate Heel Repair Balm was named Best Relief for Pregnant Feet by Parents. We've also been featured in top media outlets like Allure, CNN, Forbes, Glamour UK, and Good Morning America.

Name: Ikeda Group
Description:
We believe that happiness should be a source of beauty and not anxiety. And we are on the mission to create a world where happiness and beauty go hand in hand, where people can be happy and confident about the way they feel and look.

These terms completely describe the company’s DNA.
The license agreement with Mercedes Benz, the 8th most recognized and powerful iconic brand in the world (Interbrand ranking), has been a key milestone in the development of INCC and will continue to be. Indeed, we just renewed the license contract and include two new brands in our portfolio (AMG, Maybach).  

Close collaboration with the Brand has been possible thanks to our common values. We, together with the Mercedes Brand, want to bring the it to the next level and make the whole Mercedes-Benz Parfums Master Brand, a destination for the consumer in the industry.

The INCC team has the ambition to pursue this road to success integrating, incubating and nurturing other brands, and importantly, relying on our key strengths; creation and collaboration.

INCUBATE Success
NURTURE Unique Brands values & visions
CREATE The Unexpected 
COLLABORATE Continuously

We will continue to make sure that INCC will allocate the means to succeed in terms of strategy, organization, communication and finance.
Our long term vision is to become a recognized worldwide key player in the perfume industry.

We partner with cosmetic, food, and fragrance & flavor (F&F) industries to provide certified, responsibly produced oils, meeting the highest industry standards. From farm support to final processing, our commitment to sustainability, fair partnerships, and innovation sets us apart.

 What We Offer:

At Fairoils, we believe great products start at the source.

Name: Hapsatousy La Maison
Description:
Bien plus qu'une marque : un style de vie !

HapsatouSy c'est une marque de cosmétique efficace qui apporte de la bonne humeur et créer de l'ambition. La beauté d'une personne réside avant tout dans ses actes. LIBRE, AMBITIEUSE et INDEPENDANTE, c'est LA définition de la femme HapsatouSy. 

A l'origine, une femme entrepreneure : Hapsatou Sy. 

Sa mission et son envie : faire naître des vocations et développer l'entrepreneuriat en aidant les femmes de tout horizon à créer leur business dans le secteur de la beauté, du lifestyle, (et très prochainement) de la mode.

Mais alors, Beautypreneur HapsatouSy, qu'est-ce que c'est ? 

Etre Lifepreneur, c'est avant tout un état d'esprit : l'envie d'exercer librement une activité qui vous plaît, où vous voulez et quand vous voulez. C'est animer des Beautyshows : coaching beauté à domicile entre copines, partager des conseils et astuces, faire découvrir les produits HapsatouSy.... Le tout dans une ambiance fun et conviviale !

Vous rêvez de découvrir l'entreprenariat au féminin ?  Vous êtes attirée par le secteur de la beauté, du lifestyle et de la mode ? Vous êtes digital addict et aimez remplir votre compte Intagram de jolies photos ? Alors vous êtes prévenue, cette activité est faite pour vous !

Rejoignez l'aventure et construisons ensemble l'histoire Lifepreneur HapsatouSy.

Name: Loton Cosmetics sp. z o.o.
Description:
Loton Cosmetics to nowoczesna, dynamicznie rozwijającą się firma, rozpoznawalna na rynkach europejskich, która w swoim portfolio ma ponad 80 produktów tworzonych z najwyższej jakości surowców. Idea przyświecająca naszej działalności od ponad 65 lat, to połączenie tradycji z nowoczesnością, w oparciu o szacunek do natury.

Jesteśmy pierwszą firmą w powojennej Polsce, która powstała by specjalizować się w kosmetyce do stylizacji i pielęgnacji włosów. Idee przyświecające naszej działalności od ponad 60 lat pozostają niezmienne: łączenie tradycji z nowoczesnością.

Korzystając z wieloletnich doświadczeń specjalistów w dziedzinie technologii kosmetycznej, tworzymy dla Państwa wyjątkowe formulacje, bazujące na naturalnych składnikach, których skuteczność działania potwierdzają liczne badania laboratoryjne oraz certyfikaty jakości.

Loton Cosmetics to także szacunek do tradycji, do mądrości przekazywanej z pokolenia na pokolenie. Dlatego w ofercie naszego sklepu internetowego znajdziecie Państwo kosmetyki do stylizacji włosów oparte na wyjątkowej, niezmienionej w swym składzie od ponad pół wieku, opatentowanej formule naturalnych wyciągów proteinowych. Ta unikatowa receptura zapewniła firmie Loton pozycję trend-lansera lat siedemdziesiątych.

Produkty flagowe

Loton 2 i Loton 4 – kultowe produkty lat 60. Pierwsze polskie naturalne kosmetyki do stylizacji włosów. Hit sprzedażowy powojennej Polski. Doceniane z uwagi na wyjątkowe wartości użytkowe, uznawane za jedyne w swoim rodzaju. Kochały je nasze babcie, mamy i ku naszej dumie, po dziś dzień cieszą się Państwa niesłabnącym zainteresowaniem. Dlatego nic w nich nie zmieniamy. Stara sprawdzona receptura, bazująca na naturalnych wyciągach białkowych, stosowanych w miejsce powszechnie używanych polimerów chemicznych po dziś dzień stanowi sekret naszej firmy. Dzielimy się nim z Państwem, co roku dostarczając na polski rynek około miliona sztuk każdego z tych wyjątkowych produktów.

Name: Ecosmetics
Description:
Ecosmetics International Salon is a Brazilian brand of professional cosmetics that was born with the objective of develop and manufacture cosmetic products that attend salon professionals, so that their work will meet the highest quality standards.

Founded in 2002, in Teixeira de Freitas, Bahia, Brazil, within an industrial area of 10,000 square meters, Ecosmetics keeps a modern production system with manufacturing capacity of 24 tons/hour. We also have our own researching labs of microbiology and quality control and assurance besides that, we keep a long term partnership with laboratories from France, United States, Germany, Korea and Japan. That makes E-Cosmetics one of the biggest industries of cosmetics in Latin America. Our specialized crew develops new products throughly, so that every detail of the productive process will match our clients' needs. 

Ecosmetics offers a wide portfolio of products targeting professionals, with distribution throughout Brazil and overseas by specialized consultants. There are over 300 items at the disposal of hairdressers. Our products follow rigorous quality standards and meet international norms of Good Manufacturing Practices.

After 15 years of hard work to consolidate itself in the market, Ecosmetics has matured and decided to become global. Currently, Ecosmetics has a Distribution Center on Freezone Airport in Dubai to attend the Middle East, and in Portugal, at the International Business Center of Madeira, to attend Europe and countries from Africa, as well as having at its headquarters highly qualified and trained professionals, ready to act in the international market.

Name: Paramount Beauty Distributors
Description:

With an outstanding reputation built on developing and cultivating strong relationships, Paramount Beauty Distributors offers superb service and unsurpassed education for Stylists, Salons and Spas from Maine to Florida covering the entire east coast.

For more information, visit our website at www.paramountbeauty.com or contact us at (631) 242-3737 or (800) 755-7475.

Name: NIRA
Description:
Our mission is to help people everywhere look and feel their best by providing the same laser technology as dermatologists in the comfort of their homes and at a fraction of the cost.

NIRA's revolutionary at-home laser technology has helped thousands look and feel more beautiful. Our patented, non-fractional laser devices are clinically shown to tighten skin and reduce the look of wrinkles, providing a smoother and more vibrant complexion.

NIRA was founded by serial entrepreneur and laser industry expert, David Bean. His pioneer company, Seminex, has provided laser diodes for in-office professional dermatology laser treatment systems for over two decades. Since most of these treatments are expensive, painful, and cause significant downtime, Bean invented the NIRA technology - an easy and painless alternative that can be used in the comfort of home.

NIRA is an omni-channel business with its products distributed across retail, home shopping, direct-to-consumer, eCommerce and international channels – approved sellers of NIRA include CurrentBody US & UK, Amazon USA, QVC USA, 40 Boxes, & FabFitFun.

With our patented technology, deep rooted knowledge in laser skincare, and clinically proven results, NIRA is loved among beauty influencers and over 25,000 loyal customers, in addition to winning CurrentBody's Customer Choice Awards in 2021 to celebrate their customers' best loved devices.

Laser Focused Beauty.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Oriflame Nederland
Description:
Oriflame is gestart in 1967 in Zweden en sinds 1972 in Nederland actief. Inmiddels zijn wij vertegenwoordigd in meer dan 60 landen over de gehele wereld. Wij hebben nooit ons unieke business concept laten varen: een Zweedse beauty company waar persoonlijk contact van vriendin tot vriendin erg belangrijk is maar waar je ook je bestelling online kunt plaatsen.

Onze producten zijn van een fantastische hoogwaardige kwaliteit en worden niet op dieren getest. Oriflame producten zijn niet in de winkel te koop. Wij geloven in persoonlijke aandacht en goede adviezen.

Name: banu
Description:
banu was built around one promise: acne-safe isn’t a bonus - it’s the baseline.

After 15+ years of struggling with chronic acne and realizing that most skincare made things worse, our founder Roz Samimi set out to create something different: skincare that didn’t just treat acne, but supported long-term skin health without compromise. That meant leaving out pore-clogging and fungal acne-triggering ingredients, clinically testing on real people with acne-prone skin, and using actives with intention - never as a default.

Every formula is dermatologist-tested, vegan, cruelty-free, and follows the European Cosmetic Directive for ingredient safety. We test across all six Fitzpatrick skin types to ensure every product is safe for every skin tone.

At banu, our goal is to invite those with acne-prone skin into the world of beauty, not just to clear our skin, but for any other skincare goals we may have. One that’s clinically tested, uncompromisingly acne-safe, and infused with joy.

banu is exclusively available on sephora.com and banuskin.com

Name: Oriflame Cosmetics Pakistan Pvt Ltd
Description:
We want our people to act and fulfil their dreams through their employment with us. Every day, we aim to deliver excitement, a sense of connection, a challenge and the acknowledgment of being truly needed.

Working at Oriflame means being in a global company defined by a dynamic culture, meaningful work and professional growth. As an employer we demand a lot of our people, but we also empower them to live up to their challenges, to use and foster an entrepreneurial spirit of Togetherness, Spirit and Passion to deliver Beauty by Sweden.

Founded in Sweden 1967, we are a social selling beauty company present in over 60 countries around the world. We have a different and holistic view on beauty – Beauty by Sweden. For us beauty is a way of life; to be healthy, enjoy beautiful skin and to find your personal expression. Our portfolio of nature-inspired beauty products powered by science are marketed through approximately 3 million Independent Oriflame Brand Partners.

We are a community of people, passionate about beauty and fulfilling dreams. Enabling people around the world to fulfil their dreams is our mission and purpose. We do it by offering a comprehensive range of skincare, make-up, personal and hair care, fragrance, accessories and nutritional products. All ingredients undergo eco-ethical screening to ensure sustainable sourcing and safety while we strive to have minimal impact on the environment. We give people a unique opportunity to build their own business through selling our products and helping others to build their business too.

Quick facts:
• A product range of approximately 1,000 beauty products across categories: Skin Care, Wellness, Colour Cosmetics, Fragrance, Accessories, Personal & Hair Care
• Market operations in over 60 markets, across 11 regions
• Global Research & Development centre with more than 100
• Global IT development centre with more than 200 developers
• Production units in Poland, China, Russia and Indiasee less

Name: colibri skincare
Description:
colibri skincare. natürlich wirksam.

Aus Liebe zu deiner Haut.
Wir möchten nicht, dass du dich zwischen Naturkosmetik und 
aktiven Formulierungen entscheiden musst. 
colibri skincare ist für alle, die effektive und natürliche Hautpflege suchen. 
Wir wollen dich und deine Haut auf ganz natürliche Weise strahlen lassen. 
Denn wir glauben, dass deine Haut nur die besten Produkte verdient. 

Balance zwischen Forschung und Natur.
colibri skincare vereint natürliche Wirkstoffe mit den neuesten wissenschaftlichen Erkenntnissen. Indem wir als Basis natürliche Rohstoffe verwenden, bildet die Natur das Herzstück unserer Rezepturen. Dadurch sind unsere Produkte höchst wirksam und optimal verträglich. Auf umstrittene Inhaltsstoffe wie Parabene, Paraffine, Silikone, PEGs, tierische Inhalts- und Duftstoffe sowie Mineralöle verzichten wir komplett.
Hautpflege für alle.
Wir möchten das Konzept von Hautpflege neu definieren. Unser Ziel ist es, dass sich jeder in seiner Haut wohlfühlt, unabhängig von Alter, Geschlecht, Hautfarbe oder kulturellen Hintergrund. Selbstliebe und Selbstakzeptanz sind der Schlüssel zum Glück und das wollen wir unterstützen. Deswegen sind unsere Produkte für jeden geeignet.

colibri skincare – natürlich wirksam.

Name: HealthPost Ltd.
Description:
Delivering wellness since 1988.
 
HealthPost is an online store with a healthy difference. We’re here to support you, and nature too. Ever since 1988, when our founder, Linley Butler, began posting natural health and wellness products to family and friends from beautiful Mohua Golden Bay, we’ve been a socially responsible business that puts people first.
 
Today, we’re a little bigger, delivering natural health, clean beauty, healthy food & drink, and eco living products to doorsteps everywhere, what remains stronger than ever is the ethical values at the heart of our business.
 
Now, like then, we’re here to help people live naturally healthy lives – and to have a lasting, positive impact on the wellbeing of people and planet. And we aim to deliver on that, every day.

http://www.healthpost.co.nz/

Name: Columbia Cosmetics Manufacturing Inc.
Description:
From humble beginnings as a three-person operation to becoming one of North America's leading contract manufacturers in beauty and personal care, Columbia Cosmetics has spent over four decades turning beauty innovations into reality.

Founded by Rachel Rendel, a beauty entrepreneur who began her beauty industry journey as a door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman before earning her Aesthetician and Cosmetician licenses, Columbia Cosmetics was built on a simple vision: providing custom-formulated products that meet each brand's unique specifications.

Today, our two facilities in San Leandro, CA and Northridge, CA house state-of-the-art manufacturing operations, R&D laboratories, QC/QA facilities, corporate offices, art department, and product showrooms. With a dedicated team of 100 professionals, we serve an impressive roster of established beauty brands and innovative startups, with strong distribution networks in both domestic and international markets. We offer comprehensive turnkey services across color cosmetics, skincare, hair care, and body care categories.

Specialties:
• Custom formula development
• OTC, Organic, CBD formulations
• Full-service contract manufacturing
• Private label
• Quality control and testing
• Regulatory compliance
• Packaging and design support

Certifications:
• FDA Registered Facility
• FDA/CDPH Drug Manufacturing License
• FDA/CDPH Cosmetic Manufacturing Registration
• FDA/CDPH Organic Processed Product Registration
• COSMOS/ECOCERT Certified

Name: Dominique
Description:
Dominique Cosmetics is a thoughtfully curated line where products are created to be
multipurpose for the entire face. The larger pan size and color selections allow for all users
to create any look imaginable and fills the void that Christen noticed the industry was lacking.
During her freelance makeup artist career, Christen realized that her higher-end palettes
would consistently have small pan sizes, with colors that were not multipurpose and did not
cohesively work well together. It has always been important to Christen to get the most out
of her higher-end products, as she understands the work that it takes to save for quality
makeup. From there she had a strong urge to create products that filled this gap.
A year after launching the first product, The Latte Palette, Dominique Cosmetics has grown
to a 5-star rated brand. Dominique Cosmetics is now focusing on increasing core products
and full-color lines for all to enjoy.

Name: MedSPA Laboratoires
Description:
ABOUT MEDSPA LABORATOIRES
The concept of MedSPA was developed by a consortium of experts specialized in biotechnology. Since the 1980’s, MedSPA Laboratoires innovates in terms of dermocosmetic solutions.

MEDSPA LABORATOIRES EXPERTISE
MedSPA Laboratoires combines cellular biology and leading-edge technologies to create an innovative concept : the microcosmetic.
MedSPA Laboratoires has elaborated its formulas using nanoparticles and microencapsulated molecules. Thus the brand's formulas act with efficiency on skin issues.
The MedSPA Laboratoires anti-age solutions are the combination of this biotechnology and new regenerating active ingredients (new generation of hyaluronic acids, innovative peptides, a powerful complex of vitamins and trace elements).
 
FROM A MEDICAL USE TO A COSMETIC ROUTINE
From the brand creation in 1965 to the 2000’s, MedSPA Laboratoires has opted for a confidential distribution in renowned pre- and post-operative cares clinics. This strategy has encouraged collaboration between MedSPA Laboratoires’ experts and professors of partner clinics. These synergies have resulted in innovative care formulas.
In the 2000’s, a great focus was placed by the brand on the Asian market in order to meet the strong market demand in terms of dermocosmetics.
Driven by a new management team designated during the course of 2018, the brand has come to a decision to be redeployed on the domestic market through a selective network of community parapharmacies.

Name: CHOLLEY SUISSE
Description:
CHOLLEY SA is a Swiss manufacturer specializing in the production of high-quality phyto dermocosmetics. The company headquarters is located in Lugano, while its research and manufacturing laboratory is located in Locarno.

In 1972, Dr. Masset de Vallefort founded his own laboratory to concentrate on his research in the field of phytocosmetics. His hard work paid off and today he is considered one of the pioneers in this field.

His laboratory, “Laboratoire Dr. Masset de Vallefort”, was purchased by CHOLLEY SA in 1990. Its mission then became to produce top-quality professional cosmetics exclusively for CHOLLEY. CHOLLEY SA was founded by Mr. Dante Morresi and Mme Cholley Paydar Bavandpour, and built based on its great synergy and complementary nature of the research performed by Dr. Masset de Vallefort.

The decision to open this organization in Switzerland was made to ensure easy access to superior raw materials and compliance with the high quality standards set by the Swiss pharmaceutical and chemical industries.

As a result of their respective training and specializations, Mme Cholley Paydar Bavandpour, cosmetologist, and her brother, Mr. Rick Paydar Bavandpour, chemical engineer  and Technical Director of the laboratory, have created a dynamic organization responsible for producing some of the most innovative, fascinating, and effective products in the Swiss cosmetic industry.

Name: NissActive SAS
Description:
La cosmétique est un savant mélange de science, de recherche et de créativité. Trois maîtres-mots pour Nissactive, société naissante aux ambitions décuplées, spécialisée dans le développement d’actifs naturels afin de promouvoir et valoriser la biodiversité.

Véritable source d’inspiration, la nature constitue une manne exploitable, permettant de fournir aux clients et partenaires des ingrédients cosmétiques innovants. Afin de valoriser la richesse locale, différentes études sont réalisées à partir de plantes méditerranéennes ainsi que des co-produits de l’agriculture par le développement d’ingrédients cosmétiques.

L’équipe NissActive, en collaboration avec l’Institut de Chimie de Nice, a développé une méthodologie de recherche de nouveaux actifs naturels en associant sourcing local, techniques d’éco-extraction et bioguidage à l’aide de nombreux tests d’activité biologique (anti-inflammatoire, anti-oxydant, anti-élastase, anti-collagéne, anti-hyaluronidase et blanchissant). Des compétences que cette société, jeune, dynamique et orientée vers l'avenir, a à cœur de développer.

Name: SKINIUS
Description:
SKINIUS (Skinius, from the English word skin and the Latin word ius for right) is an Italian company founded by Dr. Mariagrazia Boniardi, expert biologist with 30 years experience in glicobiology, dermatology and cosmetology.

The scientific innovation used by Skinius is the Fospidina complex. It is made from phospholipids extracted from soya and glucosamine for direct action on the skin cells to slow the aging process and improve skin blemishes.

Skinius formulations are suitable for even the most sensitive skin because they act in harmony with the physiological rhythms of the cutaneous tissue, thanks to biocompatible active ingredients. What does this mean? This means that if you suffer from allergies or frequent skin rashes, our products will respect and pamper your skin, helping to soothe the pain and reduce any blemishes caused by extreme sensitivity or simply the natural aging of your skin.

Even the choice of materials for our packaging demonstrates our dedication to your skin and the environment: we use bottles that are easy to recycle and provide the optimum conditions to preserve the active ingredients contained in the product over time.

All Skinius ranges are 100% made in Italy and are sold in pharmacies and online at www.skinius.it

مجموعة نزيه

باعتبارها شركة رائدة في صناعة الجمال في الشرق الاوسط، لدى مجموعة نزيه صالات عرض خاصة بها ومكاتب في كل المنطقة وتشمل: دبي، أبو ظبي، العين، الفجيرة ورأس الخيمة في الامارات العربية المتحدة، جدة، الرياض، الخبر وأبها في المملكة العربية السعودية، قطر، الكويت، البحرين، سلطنة عمان ولبنان.
الخدمات:
- توفير أفضل نوعية من المنتجات والماركات العالمية

Name: Fresh Test, LLC
Description:
The Fresh Test is an Organic, Non-GMO diagnostic glucose beverage available in 50g, 75g, and 100g formulations for use in oral glucose tolerance testing (OGTT).

Indicated for the screening and diagnosis of Diabetes Mellitus and Gestational Diabetes Mellitus, The Fresh Test is designed for use in alignment with your existing clinical protocols. Clear Instructions for Use are printed on each product. 

Unlike traditional brands, The Fresh Test is void of artificial dyes, flavors, preservatives, GMOs, and BPA. It validated and audited as a Class II Medical Device (MRV diagnostic glucose beverage), manufactured in FDA-certified, ISO-compliant facilities according to American Diabetes Association (ADA) standards.

Every production lot includes Medical Device Manufacturing Certificates of Analysis (COAs) and Third-Party ISO 17025 Laboratory Reports.  These are provided for full transparency and traceability.

Designed with both clinical excellence and patient experience in mind, The Fresh Test patented diagnostic line improves compliance by offering a cleaner, better-tasting option—without compromising diagnostic accuracy.

We proudly serve OB/GYN clinics, hospitals, laboratories, and health systems nationwide seeking a modern, organic solution for diagnostic glucose testing.

To learn more or request samples, visit www.thefreshtest.com or email info@thefreshtest.com.

Name: MD GLAM
Description:
From the creator of MD GLAM, Dr. Cat Begovic

As a woman, plastic surgeon, and scientist, I am very particular about anything I put on my skin and only want the best. I’ve used skin care products my whole life but it’s been frustrating finding one that was effective and had all the ingredients I wanted. I also had a hard time finding products that smelled fresh and light and were non-greasy.

Like many women, I always felt confused about which products to use and in what combination and I’ve always been skeptical of marketing claims.
In 2005 I started my journey and started researching the science behind anti-aging skin care products. Being a published scientist with a degree in Molecular Biology from Harvard – I wanted to investigate what ingredients and compounds had real scientific data. In 2007, I published my research in the Aesthetic Surgery Journal entitled “The truth about over-the-counter topical anti-aging products: a comprehensive review.” From that research and through continued scientific investigation, I developed my skin care line MD GLAM.

MD GLAM is an extension of myself – based on science but with the luxury all women desire. MD GLAM products combine the most effective, scientifically proven anti-aging and hydrating ingredients to improve the way skin looks and feels. MD GLAM products are simple to use. The products are clean, safe, and gentle that I feel comfortable even using them on my own daughter. They are paraben-free, sulfate-free, and cruelty-free. To make it more affordable to my patients and consumers, I have skipped distribution, retail, and any other middle man completely to sell it directly to customers. MD GLAM is sold strictly and exclusively through MDGLAM.COM. I am super excited to share my exclusive skin care line with all of you – Enjoy!!
