Description: A França é mundialmente reconhecida por suas fragrâncias icônicas. Foi lá, mais precisamente em Paris, que nasceu O.U.i. E em colaboração com um time perfumistas e designers renomados, criamos um universo repleto de beleza e inspirações.

Name: BewOnd Cosméticos
Description:
BEWOND PROFESSIONAL HAIR CARE
Breve lançamento ! Nossa missão é resignificar a relação entre produtos e cabelos. Somos focados em alta performance e máximo desempenho. E fazemos isso juntos! Existimos para os cabeleireiros .
Criar parcerias profissionais sólidas, próximas e duradouras, está no centro do que fazemos. É nosso manifesto. Somos uma marca que vai se relacionar ativamente com suas interfaces de mercado. Nosso objetivo é nos conectar com nosso público de maneira dinâmica, inovadora e surpreendente. Gerar valor, fortalecendo vínculos e reinventando a experiência da beleza, todos os dias.
Isso é legítimo e nos norteia pois temos em nossos valores a EXCELÊNCIA como prerrogativa máxima de todas as nossas ações!

Name: Plein Sud Beauté
Description:
Depuis son lancement en 2007, Plein Sud Distribution SARL est un partenaire de choix dans la distribution cosmétique dans le milieu de la pharmacie et de la parapharmacie. Plein Sud Distribution est une agence promotion et de distribution de référence en Côte d’Ivoire pour les laboratoires, et est en partenariat avec les différents grossistes pharmaceutiques présents sur le territoire Ivoirien.
Nous intervenons sur deux pôles d’activités :
La distribution directe aux clients ou indirecte via les grossistes 
La promotion de laboratoires de renommée internationale .

Name: Butternutt
Description: BUTTERNUTT Products are completely free from Harmful Sulphates, Silicones & Parabens. Our Products are safe, nature inspired & dermatologically tested for your safety. Try Today & Fall in love with the complete range of Skin Care, Hair Care and Bath & Body Products.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Fabron
Description:
Welcome to our page! Since 2016 Fabron has been growing rapidly to become a leading retail brand specializing in men's grooming products, with a strong focus on beard care, hair care, and men's fragrance. 

At our core, we believe that grooming is not just a routine but a form of self-expression. We strive to offer an extensive range of high-quality products that enable men to look and feel their best, expressing their unique style and personality. In addition, we understand the significance of scent in a man's grooming routine. Our carefully curated range of men's fragrances offers a variety of captivating scents, from charming and mass pleasing to bold and adventurous. We believe that finding the perfect fragrance is an essential part of self-care and personal style.

What sets us apart is our dynamic and energetic team. We foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment where every team member's voice is heard and valued. Our team is comprised of fun, engaging, and creative individuals who are passionate about what they do, and we are always on the lookout for excellent candidates who want to contribute to our company's success. Together, let's create exceptional grooming experiences and empower men to confidently express themselves through our products.

Follow us on Instagram dan Tiktok to stay updated on our latest products and exciting career opportunities. 
Instagram: @fabron.id & @fabronfrags
Tiktok: @fabron.official & @fabronfrags
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Boé Dominicana SRL
Description:
Amamos lo que hacemos y lo que somos...
Boé Dominicana S.R.L. fundada el 28 de julio de 2005 como una empresa dedicada a la fabricación y distribución de todo tipo de productos cosméticos, cuidado personal y del hogar. La excelente calidad nos ha llevado a convertirnos en una de las compañías cosméticas de mayor preferencia en la República Dominicana. Nuestros productos evidencian la efectividad que ejercen sus componentes en cada una de las áreas para las que se elaboran, entregando resultados favorables. Trabajamos bajo el slogan “Belleza Natural” con el cual comunicamos nuestro compromiso: ser cómplices de la belleza y la salud de todos aquellos que utilizan nuestros productos generando resultados que impresionan.

Name: Nahrin Swisscare
Description:
We were born in 1990 with a vocation for holistic beauty and the aim of offering a choice that respects both health and the environment.

We combine advanced research and traditional Swiss recipes with the demands of contemporary life. We support uncompromising purity by offering only products with 100% natural extracts, raw materials, and essential oils.
Both Nahrin products, including supplements and herbal extracts, and Swisscare products, including cosmetics and phytocosmetics, are certified and dermatologically tested.

We were the first in Italy to create a 'red list' that highlights substances that should not be present in a quality supplement and cosmetic, and which we have ethically excluded from our production.
We promote a culture of transparency by sharing this list with all consumers to guide them in making informed choices.

Taking care of you is in our nature.

Name: Makeup Artist
Description: Freelance Makeup Artist

Name: Elexir Pharma
Description:
Vi hyllar livets alla brister, för livet behöver inte alltid vara perfekt för att du ska må bra. För ingen människa är perfekt. Och perfektionism i sig skapar inte välbefinnande, god hälsa eller lycka från måndag till söndag. För sånt är livet. Det är därför vi alltid strävar efter att göra livet lite lättare, smidigare och mer balanserat. Och det kommer vi aldrig att ge upp på.

Elexir Pharma är ett svenskt företag som grundades år 2000 av Jimmy Månsson. Vi tillverkar kosttillskott för alla de tillfällen då livet kommer emellan, ja för livets alla brister. Både för dig och för alla du tycker om. Vi tar fram våra produkter för livets alla faser och cykler, alltifrån vitaminer och mineraler till andra typer av kosttillskott för att ge en mer positiv effekt på hälsan.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Nose on the road
Description:
Je suis Théo Zerbib, ancien étudiant de l'ISIPCA, passionné par la parfumerie et le voyage. De ces deux passions est né Nose on the road, mon projet de tour du monde olfactif !  

Après 6 mois en Asie et une pandémie qui m'a obligé à rentrer en France, je suis reparti en septembre 2021 en Amérique Latine, à la découverte de nouvelles odeurs et matières premières naturelles. 

Mon objectif principal est d'aller à la rencontre des producteurs dans le but de mieux appréhender leur métier, leur quotidien et visiter les usines d’extraction. Ce projet enrichissant me permets d’aller à la source de notre industrie pour mieux comprendre l’origine de ces matières et leurs histoires, m’apportant ainsi une connaissance intime des filières de ces ingrédients.

Name: Witt Italia Group
Description:
In WITT ITALIA GROUP con i marchi Witt, Erboristeria Magentina, Armonia di Bellezza, iAiAoH! creiamo prodotti di ispirazione naturale, a basso impatto ambientale per il benessere e la cura della persona, ricercando il giusto equilibrio tra bellezza esteriore e benessere interiore nel totale rispetto dell’ambiente.

Seguiamo una filosofia produttiva rigorosa che si fonda su 4 principi cardine: Efficacia, Sicurezza, Garanzia di Qualità, Tradizione & Innovazione esplorando nuove vie che connettono le scienze naturali con le discipline bioenergetiche.

MISSION La mission di WITT ITALIA GROUP, fin dalla nascita nel 1873, è vivere, pensare e lavorare in armonia con la natura. La natura è la nostra ispirazione, la nostra fonte di approvvigionamento e il punto di partenza di ogni nostro progetto di ricerca.

COSA CI CONTRADDISTINGUE

Made in Italy. Ogni singolo prodotto nasce nel nostro moderno stabilimento di Poirino (Torino), a basso impatto
ambientale.

Filiera completa. Siamo una delle pochissime realtà italiane che può vantare una filiera completa. Formuliamo,
produciamo, confezioniamo e distribuiamo direttamente. 
Ogni processo è posto sotto il diretto controllo aziendale, unendo le conoscenze e la cura dei dettagli tipicamente artigianale, agli elevati standard della produzione industriale e la più innovativa ricerca scientifica.

Produzione energetica. In produzione carichiamo di energia positiva tutte le nostre formulazioni: il reparto
è stato attrezzato con luci, musica e colori. Utilizziamo un approccio olistico che spazia in ogni campo delle bioscienze: Aromaterapia, Fitoterapia, Cromoterapia, Cristalloterapia,
Fiori di Bach, Radionica, Ayurveda, medicina Cinese.

VISION. Diventare il riferimento in Italia e all’estero nel settore della cosmesi naturale e del benessere della persona ricercando soluzioni innovative, efficaci, affidabili nel rispetto della natura e delle persone.

Name: Four Reasons | Miraculos Oy
Description:
Four Reasons is a community of passionate hair stylists whose mission is to make everyone feel gorgeous as themselves. 

100 % vegan, sustainably produced professional hair products, made with love 
for people’s individual beauty.

Name: FAM-NATI
Description: FAM-NATI (Famasi Natirèl) se distingue en tant qu'entreprise locale engagée dans l'apiculture, la production et la vente de miel de qualité en Haïti. De plus, notre savoir-faire transforme ingénieusement les cires d'abeilles en produits cosmétiques tels que savon et baumes à lèvres. Notre assortiment inclut le miel pur ainsi que des délices comme la tablette d'arachide et le beurre d'arachide, subtilement imprégnés de la douceur naturelle de nos abeilles. Enregistrés au Ministère du Commerce et de l'Industrie (MCI) sous le numéro 010 Reg. 107, notre engagement envers la qualité et l'authenticité est inébranlable.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: L'Occitane Perú
Description: Desde 1976, L'Occitane en Provence ha estado imaginando, produciendo y vendiendo productos de belleza, cuidado de la piel y bienestar con la intención de compartir las maravillas de la naturaleza con el mundo. Nuestra ambición es no solo sustentar la tierra, sino también regenerar los ecosistemas. Creemos que la belleza va más allá de lo que el ojo puede ver. Desde la semilla hasta la piel, somos holísticos en nuestro enfoque. Hacemos todo lo posible para crear un cambio positivo para el mundo y siempre tratamos de inspirar a todos los que nos rodean a hacer lo mismo.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Holimer İlaç ve Sağlık Hizmetleri
Description: Geleneksel ve tamamlayıcı tıp alanlarında, yenilikçi yaklaşımlar sunan Holimer, 2016'dan bu yana yatırımları ile hizmet veriyor.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beauty Insights
Description:
Insights is the new currency and we love beauty so we've decided to create Beauty Insights. 

Pourquoi l’inclusion, la clean beauty ou encore l’IA façonnent-elles aujourd’hui les tendances du secteur cosmétique ? Comment ces mouvements sont-ils nés ? Quels enjeux sociaux ou technologiques les ont propulsés au cœur de la beauté ? 

Dans chaque épisode, on analyse et on croise les données, pour comprendre non seulement ce qui se passe, mais pourquoi ça se passe… et ce que ça dit de demain.

On ne parle pas que de beauté. On parle de culture, de consommation, de société, d'économie. 

Une plongée analytique dans une industrie en (r)évolution permanente. 

 Pour les pros, les passionnés, celles et ceux qui veulent comprendre en profondeur. 

#cosmétique #beauté #podcast #tendances #insights
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BM cosmetics for men
Description: The official page of BM Cosmetics for men, the UK, Europe and Australia's #1 male cosmetics & skincare company. Worldwide shipping available www.bmcosmetics.com.au

Name: Raya Cosmetics
Description:
Raya Cosmetics is a skin care manufacturing unit. we specialize in contract manufacturing for private labels.
creams , soaps, lotions, shampoo, serums , essential oils , makeup

Name: Skinstitut
Description: Since making our debut in 2008, Skinstitut has been ahead of the curve. And not just because we create high-performance cosmeceuticals that actually work, but because we do it without fuss and fanfare, and without attaching wild price tags to our clinically proven products. We stand out because we don’t try to. Instead, we focus on the science – we always have, no matter what flash-in-a-pan trends come cartwheeling through the cosmeceutiverse. We stick to what we’re great at: creating products that deliver transformative results for all skin types, and all budgets.

Name: Wholesome Story
Description:
In 2016 when we had our first child, Leon, it felt like it was a metaphorical rebirth for us. The raw intensity of parenthood – both the joys and the challenges – made us realize the indescribable power of a parent’s love. The experience was (and still is) so profound that it inspired us to pursue a tangible way to give hope and to help others who struggle to start their own family.

Our nearest and dearest cause is to support women with infertility and hormonal imbalances, particularly PCOS (Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome).

We want to empower them to experience the same joys of parenthood while taking back control of their bodies.

“Change the world through nourishing families” is our mantra and mission because we believe a nourished mother is the first step for a wholesome family. Almost 5 years and 450,000 happy customers later, hearing your success stories continue to fuel our passion. We want to keep being a part of that story. And to grow with that story.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: El Rezeiky Pharmacies
Description:
El Rezeiky pharmacies is a leading provider of health care and personal care products in Egypt. It started in 2004and it has grown significantly to be the benchmark at the short time with the best quality for everything related with its field.
Today, El Rezeiky Pharmacies spearheads the provision of quality health and personal care products via a nationwide network spanning 10 branches – and counting, multiple warehouses.
El Rezeiky investments always on its people focused to develop them by giving them a perfect courses instructed to enable there be to be more professionals in all fields.

Name: NULASTIN
Description:
Founded in 2016 by lifelong athlete and adventure seeker, Leah Garcia, NULASTIN pioneers innovative hair & skincare solutions using proprietary elastin replenishment and naturally-derived, ethically sourced ingredients.

We believe looking and feeling your best is based on proven science that encourages living life thoughtfully & well. Our purpose is to combine science and passion for a more vibrant and enriched personal care journey, providing clinically proven, performance-based products that accentuate natural beauty, health and vitality.

NULASTIN supports your body’s natural ability to stimulate the replenishment of elastin. Our formulas are Vegan, Cruelty-free (Leaping Bunny Certified), and 100% locally made near our HQ in Boulder, Colorado to ensure professional strength quality & freshness.

Name: Morea
Description:
Morea is a leading Korea cosmetic company in Cambodia. We believe everyone can uncage their beauty with good quality Korea products at affordable price. 

All products from Morea has been certified and guaranteed on quality by SAMSUNG. 

Morea | Everyday young

Name: Sadatan Ayurveda Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Private Label manufacturer of high quality natural skin & hair care products. Inspired by ancient wisdom to create modern applications....


Sadātan Ayurveda Pvt.Ltd. is a R&D and Manufacturing concern based in Nagpur, India.
We build on the ancient wisdom of Ayurveda and the rich variety of plant-life in India to develop Beauty and Wellness innovations for modern consumers.

Our product portfolio comprises a wide range of applications for Skin & Hair care, Wellness & Spa products, Specific Healthcare, Natural Cosmetics and Botanical Extracts.

Description: Desenvolvemos formulações únicas e de alta tecnologia de acordo com as necessidades dos clientes

Name: Omnibeauty
Description:
We are passionate about beauty and our expertise is to accelerate cosmetic brands in Brazil with omnichannel approach and business intelligence. 

With a team of experts - from marketing to sales & finances -, our diferential is the deep knowledge around the beauty category and the unique complexity of the country, its channels and its market. 

From strategy to operation we offer the complete solution for beauty business development in Brazil.

Name: New Directions Australia
Description:
Our journey began in 1991 with a single bottle of Citronella Oil, paving the way for our expansion into the vast field of essential oils. Since then, New Directions Australia has evolved into one of the leading wholesalers and manufacturers in skincare and cosmetics in Australia. We proudly serve as a comprehensive resource for industries and individuals, offering a wide range of products, including essential and carrier oils, cosmetic ingredients, and skincare bases.

Our extensive selection features essential oils such as lavender, peppermint, tea tree, eucalyptus, orange, and lemongrass, alongside vegetable oils including coconut, rosehip, jojoba, and argan. Our product range also encompasses organic oils, emulsifiers, surfactants, specialised hair care ingredients like shampoo bases and anti-dandruff solutions, and a variety of antioxidants, vitamins, and unique extracts such as kakadu plum, mountain pepper berry, desert lime, wattle seed, kangaroo paw, lilly pilly, and quandong powder.

We are dedicated to providing our clients with expert guidance and technical support, ensuring the selection of the most appropriate cosmetic ingredients and materials. To uphold the highest quality standards, we conduct rigorous testing of our products upon arrival. Our committed warehouse team ensures prompt and efficient delivery to both Australian and international markets.

For bulk orders, OEM contract manufacturing opportunities, or customised labelling and packaging services, our ISO/GMP certified facility is fully equipped to meet your requirements. Our focus on quality, sustainability, and customer satisfaction drives our commitment to personal skincare and holistic wellbeing. Connect with us to explore our innovative, high-quality, and sustainable solutions.

 nda@newdirections.com.au
 +61 2 8577 5999
 9am – 4pm, Mon – Fri

Name: CSI Clínica Salud Integral
Description:
We are an aesthetic medical center that began work in 2009 with the firm intention of being a center specialized in aesthetic medicine, always updated and focused on personalized and high-quality attention to our patients.

We work with international safety standards, and we have state-of-the-art equipment.

Dr. Carolina Pérez, our medical director, has dedicated her entire career to strengthening her knowledge and being at the forefront of minimally invasive procedures in aesthetic medicine.

Physician and Surgeon, Costa Rica.
Board Certified, American Academy of Aesthetic Medicine, USA.
Master in Liposculpture, Italian Society of Liposculpture, Rome.
Postgraduate University Aesthetic Medicine, University of Buenos Aires, Argentina (class 2017).

Name: Liya S. Paris
Description:
Pour une approche holistique du cosmétique naturelle.
Des soins mixtes issus du terroir du Maroc associés au savoir-faire cosmétique Français.
Une marque porteuse de valeurs nobles et Eco-Responsable.
Des contenants en verre violet réutilisables à vie.

"La nature offre à la fois ce qui nourrit le corps et le guérit, émerveille l’âme, le cœur et l’esprit." 
Pierre Rabhi

Name: YUMI Beauty
Description:
En 1989, Laurence Roullier ouvre son premier institut de prothésiste ongulaire au coeur de Saint Etienne. Quelques années plus tard, un second institut voit le jour en centre-ville. Suite à l’évolution de son concept, Laurence accompagnée de son binôme de toujours, Richard Roullier, décident de créer leur propre marque en déposant Griffe d’Or. Ils se lancent dans la distribution de produits innovants et de qualité.
Mais les Roullier voient plus loin. En 2009, ils découvrent un tout nouveau soin : YUMI Lashes. Il était évident pour eux de se lancer sur ce marché de niche. En 2012, la famille Roullier fonde la marque ombrelle YUMI Beauty. À travers les années, de nombreux projets voient le jour. C’est en 2017 que YUMI Feet fait son apparition, l’année suivante c’est au tour de YUMI Nails.
Le dernier bébé Yumi : YUMI Brows est disponible depuis décembre 2019. 30 ans après, Griffe d’Or créé avec succès son réseau de distribution en France à travers la distribution exclusive de sa propre marque Griffe d’Or et de la marque YUMI Beauty.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: SOUL4SKIN
Description:
"Give your skin a soul".
This is how the Soul4Skin concept brand was born. Let's try to think about how much the skin tells about us, our emotions, the connection with others: joy, love, happiness. Emotions are born within us and move through a special path, reaching the surface where everything becomes concrete, physical, real and visible. The skin gives life to its soul. Soul4Skin tells all this, tries to share with people a new vision of beauty made of trust and willingness to open up to the news that Korean skincare can offer. Give your skin a soul and she will thank you!

Name: SkinLab Cosméticos
Description:
Fundada em 2004 a Skinlab atua no mercado na área de criação, desenvolvimento, produção, e envase de cosméticos para terceiros.
Através do desenvolvimento de diversas fórmulas já realizadas, a Skinlab traz as principais tendências do mercado mundial, inovando e garantindo qualidade em seus produtos seguindo as normas e legislações exigidas.
Devido a diversificação de equipamentos e nossa infraestrutura, podemos atender pequenas e grandes quantidades, serviços de fracionamento e elaboração total do produto como private label.

Name: KaramMD Skin
Description: KaramMD Skin is a game-changing skincare range from elite facial plastic surgeon Dr. Amir Karam. It cuts through the clutter of overcomplicated, ineffective routines with an easy, efficient, clinically-proven system for great skin made simple.

Name: 蜜瑟(广州）化妆品有限公司
Description: 舒霏是英文“SHOFIEE”的音译，创立于2013年，是MEEOSUR蜜瑟公司旗下一个专业研发、生产、销售个人护理产品的中高档品牌，核心功能体现“绿色健康”。销售覆盖全网络平台，深受广大消费者喜爱的国内著名个护领域领导品牌之一

Name: CandorVision
Description:
At CandorVision (division of CandorPharm Inc.), we provide treatments with cutting-edge technology to health professionals across Canada. Already a leader in preservative-free eye treatments, we’re one of Canada’s fastest growing healthcare companies.

CandorVision's treatments are developed with the protection of our environment in mind and implementing environmentally compliant techniques, where possible.

Quality “Made in Germany”: Adhering strictly to the most stringent national and international quality standards, our reputable partners manufacture our products in strictly controlled factories on modern production lines.

CandorVision – Your eyes are everything!

Name: Grupo Mansilla
Description:
Somos una empresa líder en Uruguay con 25 años en el mercado, que representa y distribuye marcas premium y prestige mundialmente reconocidas de cosmética y fragancia.

Nuestras marcas, Azzaro, Burberry, Calvin Klein, Cartier, Chanel, Chloe, Clarins, Diésel, Dior, Dolce&Gabbana, Gucci, Guerlain, Hermès, Hugo Boss, Lacoste, Loewe, Marc Jacobs, Max Factor, Mugler, Nike, Revlon, Sally Hansen, Sisley Paris, Tommy Hilfiger.

Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Binzomah Cosmetics
Description:
Binzomah Cosmetics is a company dedicated in Dermo Cosmetics. It is one company from RMZ holding group. Owned by Binzomah Family who are having large business activities across Saudi Arabia over 60 years of experience.
 Binzomah Cosmetics officially named Al-Jeel Al-Thany Co. Ltd. established under the law of Saudi Arabia started on 2010 with key peoples having great experience in Dermo cosmetics market in Middle East.

Name: Frizty
Description:
Frizty was born from a simple truth—most of us have big gaps in how we care for our health and wellness every day. Whether you’re 18, 25, or even 55, those small daily routines that should make us feel better often get skipped or ignored.

Our founders saw this and asked: Why not make wellness easier, smarter, and part of everyday life?

That’s how Frizty came to life. From our first few products to what we’ve built today, every solution is designed to truly fill those gaps—so self-care feels natural, effective, and something you actually look forward to.

And this is just the beginning. As the Frizty family, we promise to keep listening, keep innovating, and keep creating solutions that fit seamlessly into your lifestyle—because your wellness deserves more than quick fixes, it deserves real care.

Name: Herbs Magic official
Description:
Herbs Magic was conceptualised because of a genuine concern about the number of synthetic chemicals in commercial skin care products and the possible adverse effects these chemicals were having on us, our children and our planet.

Herbs Magic is a natural and ayurvedic beauty productsbrand that provides its consumers with the best ofnature's natural, plant-based, most nourishing, andaffordable beauty products. Our mission is to provide chemical-free, cruelty-free, natural, and ayurvedicbeauty products handcrafted using ethically sourcedingredients from different parts of India.

Our beauty products are focused on Skin, Hair, Body andFace related concerns by keeping natural beauty careand Ayurvedic formulation in focus. All of our productsare suitable for all skin types, can be used at all agelevels and by any gender. Everything needed forbeautiful and youthful skin is available here. We believe
in bringing natural beauty consistently through ourproducts

Name: TEO CABANEL
Description: Our mission? To put perfumes back at the heart of your lives. To prove that one does not have to choose between a #beauparfum and a good perfume, that it is possible to own a beautiful, noble perfume, well made at a fair price, whilst all the while reducing our impact on the planet.

Name: Dr. Akhavi Laboratory Co. | شرکت لابراتوار دکتر اخوی
Description: Formulating and manufacturing unique skin care, hair care and oral care products under the brand name’s of Seagull, Prime, Pharmed, Frice, BabyFirst and Deep Sense.

Name: biotrade cosmeceuticals
Description: Founded in 1994 biotrade company has always been dedicated to deep dermatology knowledge, innovations and new ideas - which leads to superb results in the generation of new promising compounds and formulas for the treatment of different dermatological conditions. Our researches bind together the highest scientific approaches of our time and the knowledge of classic Dermatology, resulting in cosmetics products which are praised by customers but also highly appreciated and recommended by the dermatologists around the world. Their efficacy and tolerance have been proven in clinical trials.

Name: JUNOCO
Description:
Founded in 2018, JUNOCO is a California-based sustainable and minimal skincare brand on a mission to change how the beauty industry is operated. We are leading the change towards a more earth-conscious future in beauty while raising awareness about how true beauty is boundless. 

Join us to celebrate real skin!
Follow us on Instagram: @thejunoco
Follow us on TikTok: @junoco
Follow us on Twitter: @thejunoco

Name: Tuon Cosméticos
Description:
A Tuon Cosméticos é uma Indústria com mais 25 anos de experiência na área da beleza, autocuidado e bem-estar. 

Atuamos no mercado com marca própria e com projetos de Terceirização, focados em Alta performance e Sustentabilidade.

Na Tuon Profissional, você encontra produtos capilares e de autocuidado com alto padrão de qualidade e valores acessíveis para varejo e distribuição.

Na Terceirização, oferecemos soluções personalizadas de alto valor agregado para clientes exigentes que desejam materializar projetos exclusivos, inovadores e de impacto socioambiental positivo.

Name: About You Indústria de Cosméticos
Description:
Somos uma empresa focada nos benefícios do universo capilar que, através da tecnologia de nano encapsulados, cria produtos para  proteger e dar vida aos cabelos.
Pessoas modernas buscam aliar facilidade com bons resultados.
E essa é nossa proposta: cuidado diário com produtos de alta tecnologia para realçar ainda mais beleza que existe em você!

Name: Alfaparf Milano Brasil
Description:
Uma bela história de empreendedorismo made in Italy

A Alfaparf Milano nasceu em 1980 na Itália a partir de uma ideia de seu fundador, Roberto Franchina. Nos anos 90 ampliou seus horizontes além das fronteiras nacionais, tornando-se a primeira empresa italiana de cosméticos do mundo no canal profissional. 

Este ano a empresa celebra 45 anos de experiência e 25 anos de presença no mercado brasileiro. Além disso, é referência em inovação, tecnologia, alta performance e qualidade no desenvolvimento de seus produtos. 

Presente em mais de 120 países no mundo, com 7 fábricas (sendo uma delas no Rio de Janeiro) e 27 filiais (5 no Brasil), o grupo detém de mais de 15 marcas nas divisões de: hair care, skin care, tech, pet e private label, prezando sempre pela ética, sustentabilidade e responsabilidade em todo seu processo de produção e com todos os seus públicos de interesse, desde funcionários aos consumidores finais. 

As nossas divisões de negócios interagem constantemente entre si, fazendo circular as competências e transformando-as nas melhores respostas às evoluções do setor; desta forma continuamos a melhorar a qualidade do serviço oferecido pelos operadores profissionais, deixando um mundo melhor para as gerações futuras.

Name: KT Professional - KT Kids
Description:
India's 1st salon approved keratin home care
Sulphate & Paraben Free  100% Vegan 
Get gorgeous, guilt-free hair with KT Professional

Name: Mezzo Dermocosméticos
Description:
A Mezzo Dermocosméticos nasceu em 2009, é uma empresa 100% brasileira, presente em todo o território brasileiro, através dos seus distribuidores autorizados. 
Especializada no desenvolvimento de produtos de alta qualidade, tecnologia e eficiência para a saúde, beleza e bem-estar da pele. 
Pioneira no desenvolvimento de mesclas 100% estéreis e multi procedimentos, é premiada em diferentes categorias, como: melhor lançamento do ano de 2018 e 2019 com a linha “Concept Skin fill e liporedutor” e única empresa do setor com publicações científicas de nível internacional.
Um portfólio com mais de 250 produtos para uso profissional e home care, distribuídos em categorias: facial, corporal, capilar, proteção solar, nutricosméticos e make-up. Todos testados e aprovados conforme exigência máxima. 

Mezzo Pharmaceutical - Uma empresa que acredita que suas formulações dermocosméticas devem ter garantia de absorção e eficiência. Por isso, aposta em pesquisas e estudos que comprovem a qualidade e entregabilidade dos resultados.
A linha Mezzotherapy e a Booster Mesoglow possuem uma fórmula inovadora, tecnologia internacional, que teve as mãos dos maiores profissionais de desenvolvimento de produtos para entregar a melhor e mais segura mescla para a luminosidade da pele.
Nosso objetivo é sonhar, buscar, desenvolver e entregar à vocês, o poder da transformação! 

Mezzo Nutrition - Nutrição + cosmetologia, uma linha de suplementos alimentares com benefícios multifuncionais, alternativas para complementar o aporte de vitaminas e nutrientes essenciais para o dia a dia.
A linha INNUTRI oferece uma combinação inteligente entre nutrição e cosmetologia, com formulações elaboradas com vitaminas, minerais essenciais e bioativos concentrados, favorecendo e estimulando os mecanismos para obtenção de resultados “Beauty In”, de dentro para fora.

Conheça a linha completa através do site: www.mezzonutrition.com.br

Name: Narins Beauty
Description: Meet Narins Beauty — a brand born from connection, made for self-expression, and driven by a new kind of beauty ethos: one that reveals rather than conceals. Founded by digital creator and Gen Z icon Narin Ammara, Narins Beauty launches as a love letter to her global community and her own dual heritage. It’s a brand where play meets possibility and where beauty is about emotion—not perfection.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DARLING
Description:
Introducing DARLING: Italian premium Beauty brand crafting skin-loving, high- performance products made to revolutionize how people experience and wear SPF.

Founded in 2018 by two forward-thinking Italian entrepreneurs, DARLING is a brand that bridges the gap between luxury and inclusivity.

DARLING's philosophy is rooted in inclusivity, catering to all skin types and shades. Committed to elevate SPF to a whole new level of desirability and coolness thanks to its remarkably innovative and disruptive product design, DARLING's vegan and sustainable range of products wants make sun protection an enjoyable part of daily life, even for your eyes.

Enriched with skin-nourishing ingredients, their meticulously designed formulations and textures are nothing short of divine, transforming your suncare routine into a sensorial delight that redefines luxury.

DARLING mantra is: Wear SPF, Stay Pretty Forever. Of all the anti-aging products available on the market, sunscreen is the single most important one, and using it on a daily basis will be like knowing the secret of eternal youth. It's not just a shield; it's your key to timeless beauty. This is why DARLING is not just a brand; It’s ambassador of skin protection.

Name: Sarmance
Description:
Sarmance est la marque de cosmétiques bio puisant ses actifs de vignes dans des parcelles cultivées en biodynamie.

Symbole de son engagement en faveur d’un plus grand respect des hommes et de leur environnement, Sarmance propose une ligne de soins certifiés biologiques alliant efficacité des formules et respect d’une éthique d’entreprise.

Sarmance apporte de l’innovation par la valorisation des bienfaits du végétal de la vigne biologique et notamment par la fabrication d’eaux florales issues de cépages et d’extraits riches en polyphénols reconnus pour leur pouvoir antioxydant. 

Le laboratoire Sarmance se positionne comme un révélateur des bienfaits des terroirs pour des soins certifiés bio et fabriqués en France.

Les soins visage et corps sont classés en cinq grandes catégories : hygiène, hydratation, booster d’éclat, détox et protection solaire.

Name: Grupo HNV - Hanova
Description:
Fundada em 2011, a Hanova é uma marca do Grupo HNV, indústria cearense localizada no município do Eusébio/CE. Desde o início, a Hanova se destacou pela qualidade dos produtos e, como consequência, pelos resultados obtidos de suas aplicações, fato que possibilitou a empresa aumentar sua área de distribuição ano após ano, abrangendo as regiões Norte e Nordeste.

Inicialmente voltada para os segmentos de varejo especializado, a empresa sempre se propõe a buscar novas formas de atender e ouvir seu consumidor. Atualmente a marca possui seu próprio e-commerce, além de televendas estruturado através de whatsapp e está presente nos principais marketplaces, passando assim a distribuir produtos em todo o território nacional.

As marcas do grupo são: Hanova, Bad Rock, SPA Stetic, Lavie e Electa

Name: The Skin Diary
Description:
At The Skin Diary, we are elevating skin ageing science & empowering dermatologists to advocate for the reversal of photoaging through knowledge & collaboration.

With a commitment to transparency and accuracy, we will simplify the complex world of anti-ageing skincare science.

Our customer-centric approach demystifies jargon, making science accessible to all.

Our mission is to empower women and men by embracing the natural ageing process and cultivating a sense of confidence in their own skin. We aim to inspire a shift in society’s perception of beauty, encouraging everyone to feel beautiful and confident within. 

As a skincare clinic, we are dedicated to providing routines that not only enhance skin health but also instill a positive mindset about ageing.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NATIVE EXTRACTS Pty Ltd
Description:
We are experienced leaders in delivering natural phyto-compound profiles from unique botanical sources. The evolution of the botanical extract is CELLULAR EXTRACTION, delivering water-soluble phyto-compounds and their derivatives - the entourage. Moving beyond inferior past methods and synthetic standardisation towards True to Nature solutions to power your products naturally.

EXPERIENCED & PUSHING THE ENVELOPE
Our proven track record, with an extensive library of research and analysis of unique Australian species, as well as our advances in harnessing highly unstable molecules like natural Vit C in an aqueous format, are all testimony to our process and commitment to unlocking the forces of nature on a cellular level.

Backed by new science and an experienced team with years of extraction innovation allows us to continually optimise and pioneer ground-breaking ways to access the natural abundance of activity from the cells of unique botanical species. We redefine what is known and achievable with popular traditional botanicals too.

SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY & ECO-SUSTAINABILITY
We work with Indigenous communities, supporting community development and promoting self-determination, delivering the species without tokenism. We source Organic Certified and Wild Harvested raw materials. We do not support practices that negatively impact the sustainability of a species and do support fair trade.

COLLABORATE TO CREATE NEW TRENDS
Watch out for new delivery formats and species discovered to redefine new directions in natural ingredients driving formulation trends across industry sectors.

We can help you create market differentiation in Cosmetics, Pharmaceuticals, with Nutraceuticals and Food & Beverage coming soon.

Contact us for a custom extract, blend or send us your product brief and we’ll identify CELLULAR EXTRACTS to meet your objectives.

Name: SOSHE Beauty
Description: Thoughtfully designed makeup — crafted to complement your natural features with skincare-infused formulas, harmonious shades, and a patented refill system that fits effortlessly into your routine.

Name: Davines North America
Description:
Davines is a Parma, Italy-based high-end haircare brand distinguished by their innovative approach to beauty through pioneering products and projects. With its Italian heritage the company is now one of the most respected in the industry supplying salons and distributors in over 85 countries, while maintaining a boutique sensibility. 

Founded in 1983 by the Bollati family, the group has branches in Parma, Paris, London, Mexico City, Deventer, Lummen and Dusseldorf, and an international team of more than 350 employees worldwide.

Name: L'Isola Verde Erboristerie
Description:
Nata dall’intuizione e la passione per il mondo della medicina naturale del fondatore, Franco Fontanelli, L’Isola Verde Erboristerie, da oltre venti anni seleziona e propone solo il meglio del mondo erboristico presente sul mercato italiano, selezionando soluzioni e prodotti specialistici del settore erboristico, integrativo alimentare, cosmetico naturale, alimentare biologico, e sanitario, fino all’oggettistica.

Una scelta che vanta collaborazioni lunghe e collaudate con i brand storici del mondo bio, votata sempre alla ricerca dei nuovi che portano innovazione. L’Isola Verde Erboristerie, è sinonimo di standard elevati di qualità e affidabilità, sia grazie a partnership con le più importanti aziende sul mercato che per i brand di produzione propria.

Non solo vendita. Quello da sempre contraddistingue L'Isola Verde Erboristerie è il rapporto con la propria clientela. E' un privilegio, frutto di professionalità e dedizione, il legame di fiducia tra clienti e il nostro personale. I nostri consulenti di benessere, nutrizionisti, naturopati, esperti del settore e consulenti di benessere saranno a tua disposizione nella ricerca e nella scelta dei prodotti migliori per il tuo benessere e per la tua salute. 

L’Isola Verde ha propri prodotti distribuiti in esclusiva solo ai propri negozi benessere. Nel 2006 abbiamo lanciato sul mercato l’esclusiva linea cosmetica doBrasil, realizzata con i bioattivi della Foresta Amazzonica Brasiliana, che ha subito conquistato i clinenti dei nostri negozi benessere. Ha puntato su una eccezionale qualità dei prodotti e su principi attivi ancora sconosciuti nel mercato italiano.

Nel 2011 nasce Centro Medico Galileo s.r.l. , un'azienda impegnata nella ricerca e nella migliore formulazione di prodotti fitoterapici.

Il progetto integratori poggia su fondamenta costruite in vent'anni di passione e lavoro nel campo dell'alimentazione funzionale e, specificamente, nel settore erboristico.

Name: AROCA (Aromes des Caraïbes)
Description: Arômes des Caraïbes S.A. (AROCA) est une Entreprise spécialisée dans la conception et la production de produits cosmétiques adaptés aux besoins variés des consommateurs tout en respectant les normes les plus strictes en matière de sécurité, de qualité et de durabilité.

Name: L'ALPAGE Cosmetics SA
Description:
L'ALPAGE is a Swiss Natural and High-Tech cosmetic brand of skin and body care products: we mix Alpine Natural Ingredients with High-Tech actives. All our products are designed and produced in Switzerland. We offer +50 formulas in 10 collections, entirely produced in Switzerland. All our products are paraben-free, non-tested on animals and at affordable price. We are distributed in our Exclusive Boutique in Lausanne (Petit-Chêne 1), on our E-Shop 24H and in +120 sales points in Switzerland.

In case of interest for distributing our brand and products to international markets please send us all inquiries to sales@l-alpage.ch

Name: Sahajan
Description:
The first Clinically Proven Ayurvedic Skin and Hair Care Collection. Award winning products that deliver results.

Name: Anne Semonin Paris
Description:
Anne Semonin is a premium international skincare company, symbolizing luxury, beauty and well-being. Founded by renowned Parisian facialist Anne Semonin in the early Eighties, the company is widely recognised as one of the pioneers in made to measure skincare and treatments, using essential oils, trace elements, marine ingredients and plant extracts to deliver visible results, restore skin youthfullness and boost radiance.

The Company is offering a complete range of Spa services such as Product and Treatment training and can also offer Spa Design and Operational consultancy in association with a network of carefully selected associates.

It specializes in Professional products for spa treatments, focusing primarily on highly effective anti-ageing therapies. It also offers a Retail cosmetics range for spas and selective retail distribution and a collection for hotel room amenities.

Name: NIANCE
Description:
DEEPER THAN BEAUTY

We are driven by a passion to support a healthy lifestyle to improve beauty, well-being and self-esteem for people of all ages, genders and colors. 

Based on our fundamental understanding of the aging process we develop groundbreaking holistic health and beauty solutions that activate the body’s capability to self-regenerate and rejuvenate – from the outside and the inside. 

Our highly effective, synergistic and clean formulas combine only the best carefully chosen natural and active ingredients from the Swiss Alpine region and the rest of the world with the latest in Swiss clinical research and cutting-edge bio-technology.

We value our Swiss heritage as a commitment to quality and preservation of nature.

Name: Maison Hädenn
Description:
Maison Hädenn révolutionne le soin capillaire naturel haute performance avec des formules saines, efficaces et sensorielles. 

Véritables experts du cheveu et du cuir chevelu, nous garantissons une efficacité prouvée et des résultats visibles rapidement. 

Notre innovation multi-primée (la poudre à diluer) réduit l’impact carbone des produits cosmétiques de 80%, sans compromis pour ses utilisateurs.

[parfum coup de coeur, et ça mooouuuusssseeee]

Name: Perfumes N Scents
Description:
Our brand specializes in offering luxury perfumes that capture the essence of original designer scents. 
We offer a wide range of timeless fragrances for men and women, carefully crafted with the finest ingredients. Our collection features classic floral scents to modern and daring fragrances. 
Follow us to stay updated on our latest perfumes, ingredients and more. Experience luxury at a fraction of the cost with our brand. 

#luxuryperfumes #designerscents #perfumecollection #Fragrance

Name: BC Brands
Description:
BlueChip Brands (AKA BC) is a team committed to going above and beyond. We value deep consumer understanding, data-driven decision-making, innovative product development, relatable branding, sustainable growth, and continuous improvement.

Since 2012, we’ve built a strong, profitable portfolio by thinking outside the box (does the box even exist?), showing up, and doing the work—all while having fun.

Our portfolio includes JoySpring and Fifth & Fido, two fast-growing brands focused on making life healthier for families and their pets.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ghori Holding Ltd.
Description:
Ghori Holding Limited, based in Dubai, UAE, drives global growth with diverse product segments, own brands, & top-tier partnerships with major brands. This holding company oversees several subsidiaries which deal with the manufacturing, sourcing and distribution of multiple products in addition to partnering with top global brands to bring their products to the UAE and regional markets. As a dynamic holding company, we invest in and develop promising brands across diverse sectors, from personal care to footwear. 

Our portfolio includes leading brands like Green Wealth, N+ Professional, Trekiva, Kunstico, Ghori Home, Falcon Med, and Elina. With 67 SKUs spanning 48 products, we have a strong global presence, reaching 40 plus markets worldwide. Ghori Holding actively oversees the daily operations of these subsidiary companies and provides them with long-term vision and strategic direction.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Nails Factory
Description:
Nails Factory es la franquicia líder en el cuidado de manos y pies. En sus diferentes espacios se pueden encontrar todos los servicios y productos para tener unas uñas perfectas. 

	Perfil actual de la franquicia:
Empresa joven y dinámica. Está en proceso de ampliación, se están añadiendo nuevos departamentos y empleados

	Servicios:
Centrados en el cuidado de manos y pies: manicura, pedicura, uñas de gel, uñas de acrílico y nail art. También se venden productos para las manos y los pies: aceites y lociones. 
Nails Factory centra su trabajo diario en prestar el mejor servicio a sus clientes. Para ello tiene presente estos valores: 
•	Seguridad
•	Calidad
•	Rapidez
•	Vanguardista
•	Especialización 

NF es la franquicia número uno en el tratamiento de manos y pies, los valores de esta franquicia se recogen en frases como estas: 
•	“Creamos moda, creamos tendencia”
•	“Franquicia líder en el cuidado de manos y pies”
•	“Trabajamos con personas para personas”
•	A la última en tecnología
•	Formación especializada
•	Consecuentes con la sociedad
•	Todo para tus uñas, todo para tu belleza
•	Especialistas en uñas, especialistas en belleza

La visión de NF es consolidarse como referente nacional en belleza de manos y pies. Para que nos hagamos una idea, NF pretende ser el “No más vello” de las uñas. Y para lograrlo cuenta con estos recursos:
•	Gran equipo humano
•	Desarrollo e innovación en productos
•	Excelente departamento comercial
•	Excelencia en la formación de técnicos de manicura y pedicura
•	Genial departamento de distribución de productos

Name: Brazilian Professionals - The Exclusive Distributor of Brazilian Blowout & b3 Brazilian Bond Builder
Description:
Brazilian Professionals, LLC. is the exclusive distributor of the one and only original Brazilian Blowout, and b3 Brazilian Bond Builder.

Brazilian Professionals has focused itself solely in the business of hair, specifically hair treatments. The mission is two-fold:

Provide the best in hair treatment innovation to women and men around the world to help them discover hair that fits their lifestyle

- Provide salons and stylists with new service revenue to build their business.
- Our ambition is to continue to educate stylists and salons on how they can immediately impact the success of their business while giving their clients the hair of their dreams.

Visit www.brazilianprofessionals.com to learn more about the "world's most popular professional smoothing treatment in the world", and the next generation in hair bonding: b3 Brazilian Bond Builder.

Brazilian Blowout Awards and Recognitions:
- Considered the “world’s most popular professional smoothing treatment.”
- American Salon's Professional’s Choice in Smoothing: 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014
- National Brazilian Blowout Day: annually on August 21st (as proclaimed by the National Day Calendar in 2014).

b3 Brazilian Bond Builder Awards and Recognitions:
- Essence Magazine: 2015 August Issue - Best new favorite hair product!

Name: Cityfarma
Description:
Nosso lema: comprar bem, vender melhor e lucrar mais.
A Rede Cityfarma entrega os melhores serviços para a sua farmácia e drogaria.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: OJB Herbals Private Limited
Description:
Oshea Herbals believe in the principle of taking back people closer to nature and in this endeavour we have developed our formulations with botanical extracts. Our primary goal & objective is to give our consumers a comprehensive range of herbal active cosmetics of world-class quality with the touch of Vedic science.

We use modern cosmetology with bioactive ingredients based on our traditional Vedic system of Ayurveda. We offer an array of products ranging from Skincare, Sun Care, Body care to Color cosmetics, Lip care and Advance care.

Our products are true herbal formulations. Inspired by the ancient science of life - Ayurveda,  each formulation consists of active bioactive ingredients. The various use of botanical extracts have dual functions as they serve as cosmetics for care of body and its parts, and the botanicals ingredients present influence biological functions of skin and provide nutrients necessary for healthy skin or hair.

We lay a lot of emphasis on scientific extraction, isolation and purification of all the herbal extracts. The extracts used in our formulations are sourced from reputable suppliers from India and other parts of the world. By creating a unique combination of world-class technology and our very own ancient Ayurvedic system, we produce herbals cosmetics of unique quality.

Our primary aim and goal is to provide maximum care, solution, benefit and satisfaction to every part of skin ,hair and body to all our consumers with a full range of products around 75 SKU and at a very reasonable price range. Most of our products are dermatologically tested by world-renowned labs to ensure the best quality to our consumers. Also, our R&D team is always active to deliver a unique and new products, each time to our consumer.

Name: RAZE
Description:
RAZE embraces the belief that true vitality stems from nurturing a strong body and cultivating a positive mind. Our core is to curate exceptional products that integrate into your daily life, elevating your overall well-being in both physical and mental realms. By fusing the dynamic force of state-of-the-art science with the sleek essence of nature, we artfully engineer exquisite remedies that propel your quest for a healthier, more refined way of life.

Go beyond the ordinary. Crafted with meticulous care using the finest ingredients inspired by the study and principles of aromachology, they are designed to deliver specific functional benefits and elevate your senses, going stylishly beyond the concept of simply smelling good. By exploring three distinct scent types: Awakening, Grounding, and Balancing, you have the power to curate your desired emotional responses and strategically enhance your daily experiences.

With utmost care, our products are crafted using 100% vegan ingredients. They offer a gentle yet effective experience, meticulously formulated with a blend of nourishing botanical extracts, essential oils, and antioxidant-rich plant oils. Free from harsh ingredients, our formulations are carefully selected to elevate your skin and senses. Embrace the philosophy that quality triumphs over quantity as you indulge in a meticulously curated self-care experience that prioritizes your well-being.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: ROFERSAM, S.A.
Description: Fabricante de cosméticos para terceros. Rofersam dispone de su propio laboratorio de I+D+i para el desarrollo de todo tipo de formulaciones cosméticas de tratamiento tanto para skincare como para haircare. Dispone también de certificación Ecocert / Cosmos para el desarrollo de fórmulas de certificación ecológicas.

Name: Inaura Professional
Description: Inaura berkomitmen untuk melayani setiap salon dan mendukung para hairdresser untuk menciptakan perubahan positif, baik untuk klien maupun sekitar mereka.

Name: Shakeup Cosmetics | B Corp
Description:
Shakeup exists to enhance men’s self-being through self-care, with solution-driven face care products specifically designed to meet the unique needs of men’s skin, empowering them to look and feel their best.

Find out more, check out our website shakeupcosmetics.com

Name: O.TWO.O Indonesia - PT Tirta Kumala Sari
Description:
About TIRTA GROUP
TIRTA is multi PT group owned by childhood friends with the vision of creating a multi-brand corporation that provides exceptional service and quality merchandise to the Indonesian market.

Our humble beginning started in 1960s as one of the first OEM spare parts distribution company for trucks and motorcycles in Indonesia, which soon became one of the largest.

The founding of TIRTA began in 2016 as we established our 3rd PT. Currently, TIRTA consists of 4 different establishments with multiple partner companies that shares resources and expertise to maximize the performance of each brands.

We aspire to become the most respectable multi-brand corporation. With our connections and experience, we believe we are able to provide our partners with exceptional services to market and sell their brands in Indonesia.

Our vision is to develop each brand in our assets into a marketing success, hence, paving our goal in making TIRTA a leader among distribution and co-branding establishments.

Name: Postquam Cosmetic, S.L.
Description: Postquam Cosmetic is an e-shop that offers cosmetics, hairdressing, makeup, electrical, and nutritional supplements.

Name: IDC DERMO
Description:
IDC Dermo | Des résultats transformateurs, zéro compromis

Nous croyons que votre peau mérite plus : plus d’efficacité, plus de science, plus de résultats visibles.

Née au Québec et forte de 25 ans de recherche, notre marque combine innovation scientifique et formules multifonctionnelles pour cibler les 16 mécanismes clés du vieillissement cutané grâce à notre protocole breveté ReGen16.

Cliniquement prouvés et testés par des dermatologues, nos soins allient performance, efficacité mesurable et résultats visibles.

-

IDC Dermo | Transformative results, zero compromise

We believe your skin deserves more: more efficacy, more science, more visible results.

Born in Canada and backed by 25 years of research, our brand combines scientific innovation with multifunctional formulas to target the 16 key mechanisms of skin aging through our patented ReGen16 protocol.

Clinically proven and dermatologist-tested, our skincare delivers performance, measurable efficacy, and visible results.

Name: Innovative Medical Technology (IMTG)
Description: A dedicated medical group of companies providing a high quality & comprehensive medical, lab supplies and testing services with best cutting-edge after-sales-support. Partnering exclusively with selective, well-reputed suppliers from all around the globe.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Euracom S.r.l.
Groupe GM Península Ibérica - Amenities Exclusivos
Description:
Somos os agentes para Portugal de um dos lideres mundiais no mercado de amenities, o "Groupe GM".

Fabricamos na Europa e distribuímos em exclusividade as marcas: After the Rain, Algotherm, Amimo, Anne Semonin, Azzaro, Bienvenue, Blaise Mautain, Carven, Castelbel, Clarins, Damana, Damana Nerol, Damana Organic Line, Get Fresh, Keiji, N-Ki, Occean, Omnisens, Pascal Morabito, Raíz, Saboaria Portugueza, Sampar, Sundari, Thémaé, Thierry Mugler, Yes For Lov Yves Rocher.

O nosso gabinete criativo, desenvolve linhas cosméticas exclusivas para os nossos clientes, obedecendo a todos os requisitos legais, nacionais e europeus.

Somos ainda fornecedores de outros artigos, “standard” ou personalizados como: vários tipos de doseadores, secadores de cabelo e mãos, bases para copos, chinelos de quarto, sacos vários, cabides, porta malas calçadeiras, ferros de engomar, “ironing kits”, chaleiras eléctricas, canetas, lápis, varetas de cocktail, fósforos, directórios, capas para ementas, etc…

A nossa equipa é constituída por profissionais de hotelaria. Temos o conhecimento das tendências e preocupações do mercado e percebemos a importância crescente do serviço de amenities para o cliente do hotel. Assim, a nossa postura no mercado é sobretudo vocacionada para a qualidade do serviço e qualidade do produto cosmético que oferecemos. 

Somos especialistas em cosmética para hotelaria.

Name: Laboratoire Native Portugal
Description:
Pioneiros na inovação há mais de 40 anos, com a convicção que as plantas são uma fonte inesgotável de princípios ativos que atuam em simbiose com as nossas fórmulas dermocosméticas e capilares.
Laboratoire Native, formula, fabrica e comercializa cosméticos e produtos capilares em todo o mundo, com as marcas LIERAC, PHYTO, JOWAÉ e ROGER & GALLET

Name: Yunova Pharma
Description:
Yunova Laboratory
Yunova is a laboratory based in Monaco, specialized in micro-nutrition applied to the nervous system, in a unique concept: Nutrineural Science. Our products are developed by a team of doctors and pharmacists, with proven efficacy. Yunova offers a range of natural food supplements, acting on the brain, nerves and microbiota.
Discover the world of Neuro-nutrition to:
Reduce stress and anxiety,
Find muscle relaxation and joint comfort,
Reduce intellectual fatigue,
Improve memory and concentration.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: De Sírius Cosmetics
Description:
De Sírius Cosmetics was founded in 1998, born from the dream of entrepreneurs Flávio and Sabrina Rosa, to provide high-quality products to the professional beauty market. The company began in a 60m² space, with only 2 items in its product mix, the Restorer Cream and the Wet Shine Gel. The first of these, the Restorer Cream, continues to be the best-selling product to this day, which proves the brand's quality.

As time went on, the company gained recognition among professionals and established a presence in the market. This led to the gradual development of new products to meet consumer needs.

In order to maintain its high-quality standards, the brand holds ISO 9001 certification. Through constant research, development, and technological innovation, De Sírius Cosmetics has become one of the most comprehensive brands in Brazil. It offers a range of over 200 hair care products, effectively meeting all the needs of professionals.

The choice of the name, De Sírius, was inspired by the star Sirius, which is the closest star to Earth and emits 20 times more light than the sun. It is a tribute to beauty professionals, who are the stars to us!

MISSION
To develop innovative and eco-sustainable products for the professional cosmetics market that contribute in a useful and important way to the well-being of our customers. Our aim is not only to benefit the company but also to enhance the quality of life for future generations.

VISION
To be a global reference as a brand that embodies innovation, trust, and quality.

VALUES
Ethics in relationships;
Courage to take action;
Commitment to truth;
Constant research and innovation;
Respect for humans and nature.

Retro Barbershop in North Austin | Safe Space for LGBTQ+ & Neurodivergent Community | Sensory-Friendly Haircuts

Reunion Barbershop is North Austin’s inclusive, retro-inspired destination for precision haircuts and classic grooming. We are more than a barbershop—we are a committed safe space for the LGBTQ+ community, neurodiverse individuals, and all our rad neighbors.

Our mission is to provide a look you love in an environment where you can truly be yourself. Whether you're here for a fresh cut, a relaxing shave, or our specialized sensory services, you are welcome here.

 Visit us in North Austin and experience the difference.

Services: Haircuts for All Genders | Beard Trims | Skin Fades | Long Scissor Cuts | Mini Facials | Straight Razor Shaves | Sensory-Friendly Appointments

North Austin Barbershop, Austin Barber, LGBTQ+ Friendly Barbershop, Neurodiverse Haircuts, Sensory-Friendly Haircuts, Retro Barbershop, Safe Space Barber, Beard Trim Austin, Skin Fade Austin, Inclusive Grooming

Description:
ægte
HAIR AND SKIN LUXURY

Aegte is a young company, brought up in Delhi India by Rupali Sharma and Dhiren sharma, the husband wife duo, Aegte offers a myriad range of skin, and hair care essentials. Name: CACI INTERNATIONAL
Description:
CACI International, pioneers in non-surgical solutions, is the UK’s largest manufacturer and supplier of non- invasive aesthetic treatment systems. CACI International is also the developer of the CACI Microlift at-home personal facial system and Skinbreeze Skin rejuvenation systems.

Since 1992 when CACI International launched in the UK as a cosmetic treatment, CACI has been synonymous with championing the “Non-Surgical Face-Lift”. The successful combination of cutting edge technology and innovative, results driven treatments have enabled CACI to bring to market some of the most influential non-surgical systems the beauty industry has ever seen. 

In 2012 CACI International launched their first at home device The CACI Microlift to the personal homecare market and in 2013 CACI International launched Skinbreeze Skin rejuvenation systems a division of CACI International. The Skinbreeze system has been described as ‘the greatest advancement in microdermabrasion treatments in over a decade.’

CACI International are proud to supply their systems to over 6,000 of the world’s leading beauty salons, spas, hotels and aesthetic medical clinics including: Four Seasons, Mandarin Oriental, Calcot Manor, Stoke Park, Champneys day spas, Harrods, Harvey Nichols, Selfridges, Destination Skin Clinics, Regis salons and SAKS salons. 

As market leaders the CACI Company is constantly working to develop new technologies to meet the demands of the beauty industry and continues to champion non-surgical aesthetic treatments.

To find out more about our brands please visit:

http://www.caci-international.co.uk

http://caci-microlift.co.uk/

http://www.skinbreeze.co.uk/

Name: BRK LABORATÓRIOS
Description:
Somos a BRK, e há 22 anos empenhamos em favor da beleza, da inovação, do otimismo e sobretudo do bem-estar e autoestima das mulheres. O grupo desenvolve, cria e distribui produtos que são vendidos no Brasil inteiro.
 
Desenvolvemos produtos com o intuito de aumentar a autoestima, autoconfiança e melhorar a qualidade de vida dos nossos clientes, que são o nosso principal foco!

Todas linhas que produzimos, conectam um complexo de aminoácidos, que nutrem a fibra capilar, com vitaminas que possuem funções múltiplas ações e que aceleram o desenvolvimento dos fios. Sua fórmula possui componentes inteligentes que penetram na cutícula e agem diretamente sobre a parte mais interna da fibra, promovendo resistência e maciez nos cabelos.

É diferente da maioria dos produtos capilares que você já viu, os nossos produtos tratam de dentro para fora, proporcionando aos seus fios a nutrição necessária para que eles estejam cada vez mais saudáveis. Nossa fórmula exclusiva vem produzindo resultados satisfatórios para as pessoas que o utilizam. Os benefícios que você adquire junto com nossos produtos são: crescimento acelerado, hidratação, mais volume, menos queda, fortalecimento das unhas e pele firme além de servir para todos os tipos de cabelo.

Description:
Estelle & Thild is a company seeking to improve and influence beauty. The Swedish skincare brand combines the highest quality organic ingredients with real effects and results. The company was founded in 2007 by Pernilla Rönnberg and is named for her daughters, Estelle and Mathilde, who also inspired her to develop the next generation of skincare.

The entire philosophy is based on pure ingredients, using nature’s most exclusive oils and extracts to boost skin with vitamins, antioxidants and essential fatty acids to create optimal results. In addition to offering excellent skincare, the company wants to protect the next generation, and each product is certified organic in accordance with strict Ecocert regulations.

Name: Advantice Health
Description:
Advantice Health is a dynamic consumer health company that is committed to advancing skin health with science-backed, expert-loved solutions for all.  We believe that everyone should have the opportunity to experience skin wellness and bring out their best selves every day.

We are trailblazers guided by science and entrepreneurial passion, progressing the science of skin care and increasing accessibility to therapeutic skin health solutions.  

Our work is measured in good days delivered.  In lives made better by a sense of good skin health and well-being.

Name: Dododots
Description:
We don’t want you to be confident. Yes, you read that right. Instead, we want you to be comfortable in your own skin. You see, we strongly believe that only when you’re comfortable in your own skin, can you start to project confidence in your daily interactions.

While others out there are trying to find the miraculous cure to acne and providing solutions to perfect clear skin, that’s not what we’re here for. WE WANT TO BE HERE FOR YOU WHEN YOU FEEL LIKE YOU CAN’T LEAVE THE HOUSE TODAY. Sooo, think of dododots like a hug, but for your skin.

For you lovelies with acne-prone skin, wearing your (hearts) on your cheeks is the first step to building self-love. We're proud to introduce fully-coloured creative beauty patches made from clinical-grade wound dressing material, hydrocolloid (FDA-approved btw). The best part? Our patches help cover, protect and heal your spots while you're wearing it throughout the day or overnight. Trust us when we say our dododots are going to change your everyday routine!

This brand is really close to our hearts because we’ve been there, we’ve cried and we’re just like you. We struggle with flaws too. Healing takes time and we want to be there with you, every step of the way. So, guys and girls, just dot and go, put on your best pair of Sunday shoes and get out of the house!

“LIFE ISN’T ABOUT WAITING FOR THE STORM TO PASS, IT’S LEARNING TO DANCE IN THE RAIN.”

Love,
E&E.

Description:

Choose responsible beauty with Nohèm, a brand that combines ethics, performance and commitment.

Name: 4ever Skin Naturals (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
The “4REVER”brand is a unique example of how the knowledge and practices of the ancient world can work in perfect synergy together with modern state of the art research and production facilities, culminating in the production of a world class product. 4rever uses only 100% natural herbal ingredients, making it one of the healthiest, safest cosmetic herbal brands around. 4rever is committed to using only the best natural ingredients. The company sources all its natural ingredients locally and only from certified spice gardens and out growers.
Founded, back in the year 2006 by Ms Chandhani Bandara, one of Sri Lanka's leading hair and beauty experts, 4rever is now one of Sri Lanka's largest herbal based cosmetics manufacturers. Backed by a strong and dedicated management team of professionals, 4rever was able to grow exponentially within a span of only six years. Currently, 4rever covers island wide distribution working seamlessly with its sales team with a product portfolio of over 70 products; 4rever has now entered the international markets in Asia and Europe by introducing its own brand “4rever Skin Naturals". With its state of the art production facility, it now offers OEM facilities to any persons or companies looking to get their cosmetics requirements manufactured under their own brand name. 4rever hopes to expand its product range even further, bringing about its new range of color based cosmetics products in the future.
4rever has now grown into a group of companies consisting of its own Salon Chains across the island, SPASs and its own slimming tea brand “Dioli”. Also, The Hair and Beauty Institute offers recognized local, UK (City & Guilds) and Australian (Reach for Australia) qualifications with courses tailor made to suit students or beauty enthusiasts alike.
4rEver Skin Naturals (Pvt.) Ltd, the fastest growing herbal skin care organization, is constantly in the lookout to increase its global presence.

milk_shake: A full range of professional hair products that includes color, care, and styling. Through an array of delightful scents and textures, milk_shake marries the best in hair and self-care for a uniquely indulgent experience. 

DEPOT: Offering complete care for the discerning man, this robust portfolio of products includes hair, skin, and fragrances. DEPOT elevates male grooming through luxurious scents and superior ingredients.

Name: Laboratoire Sintyl - Physiodermie - Physiocoiffeur
Description:
Installé à Genève en Suisse depuis 1974, le Laboratoire Sintyl se consacre à la recherche de pointe sur le soin de la peau et les technologies d’avant-garde en cosmétologie.

Tous nos produits sont conçus, développés et fabriqués en Suisse au cœur de notre laboratoire avec les meilleurs actifs, et sont soumis à de stricts contrôles qualité, selon les normes exigeantes de la Confédération Helvétique en matière d’industrie cosmétique. Ce label « Made in Switzerland » en fait le garant de la qualité et de l’efficacité de nos produits.

Animé par le fervent désir de faire avancer la recherche sur les spécificités de la peau de chaque individu, tant physiques que physiologiques, le Laboratoire Sintyl a déployé un vaste programme de recherche, donnant lieu à la découverte d’une innovation majeure : la micro-encapsulation des actifs.

La gamme Méthode Physiodermie du Laboratoire Sintyl est le fruit de ces 40 années de recherche & développement et de mise au point de technologies d’avant-garde. 

Located in Geneva since 1974, Switzerland, Laboratoire Sintyl is devoted its research to skincare and evolutionary “avant garde” techniques in cosmetology.

All our products are developed, designed and manufactured with the finest ingredients in Switzerland , and are subject to strict quality control in accordance with Switzerland’s stringent cosmetic industry standards, which guarantee optimal quality and efficacy.

Driven by the desire to develop a stronger understanding of the origins and diversities of the skin of every individual, both physically and physiologically, Laboratoire Sintyl conducted a vast research program, enabling the discovery of a major breakthrough: micro-encapsulation of ingredients.

The results of 40 years of research, advanced beauty concepts, and cutting-edge technologies are featured into Laboratoire Sintyl’s premium skincare Methode Physiodermie.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Mexico
Description:
Si llevamos 70 años dándolo todo es porque tenemos una buena razón... En Expanscience somos una empresa con una misión, y nuestra razón de ser es ayudar a todos a moldear su bienestar, desde la infancia hasta la vejez. Esto es lo que hace que nuestros 1300 empleados avancen, investiguen e innoven día tras día. Somos una empresa francesa, 100 % familiar y de espíritu independiente, con productos presentes en más de 90 países. Nuestro impacto positivo en la sociedad y el medio ambiente ha sido reconocido por la certificación B Corp y nos comprometemos a convertirnos en una empresa mejor para el mundo…también mejor para nuestros empleados, ya que prometemos desarrollar el potencial de cada uno!

Nuestra misión es ante todo para nuestros equipos. En el día a día esto se traduce en reforzar la calidad de vida en el trabajo y la igualdad profesional, acompañar a las personas vulnerables y favorecer la inclusión de las más frágiles, proponer una estrategia ambiciosa de talentos y competencias y favorecer el equilibrio de la vida personal y la eficacia colectiva. Esto implica medidas ambiciosas que abordan los grandes retos sociales de las empresas del siglo XXI. Y está dando sus frutos: estamos orgullosos de haber sido certificados como Great Place to Work en el 100 % de nuestras filiales por segundo año consecutivo!
