Name: Hegron Cosmetics BV
Description:
As a leading cosmetics manufacturer of private labels and A-brands, our company has a rich history. Our company history starts in the 1950s, with a barbershop in Zaanstad that makes cosmetic products for its own use. The good reactions to these hairdressing products, mainly hair strengtheners and brillantine, led to the strategic decision in the 1960s to enter the market as a provider of cosmetics under private label.

By continuously investing in people, machines and processes, our expertise, technology and production processes remain up to date. This allows us to distinguish ourselves now and in the future as an innovative and reliable full-service partner in the development and realization of quality products with competitive pricing.

Product innovation, the driving force for sustainable growth in the cosmetics market, is essential within our company. As your partner in cosmetics, we continuously look for improvements and innovations in raw materials, product properties, claims, perfumes and packaging. Our cosmetics marketing specialists analyze and translate all relevant trends to optimize your concepts. With that knowledge as a basis, we create added value for you. We attach importance to intensive contact between you as a client and our company. Mutual trust and exchange of knowledge and experience strongly contribute to the success of the tailor-made concepts that we offer.

Name: Purearth Limited
Description:
PUREARTH is an iconic, award-winning wild harvested, artisanal skincare and wellness brand, which offers ancient Ayurvedic wisdom for a modern lifestyle. 

ETHOS

We equally value the ingredients, maker and you. Each Purearth creation you buy makes you a co creator, supporting fair trade, income generation for grassroots producers and marginalized women, and reducing gender bias. Born from a desire to reconnect with the Earth, we seek to foster a culture of conscious consumption,  working with micro credit women self-help groups in the soaring altitudes of the pristine Himalayas, reducing societal inequities and gender inequality. 

Established as a Section 8A tax exempt charitable company in Pune, India, the Pure Purpose Foundation is an affiliate of Purearth that works on social impact initiatives. Our environmental initiatives support biodynamic and organic farming methods, carbon offsets through reforestation projects, sanitation, eco toilets and women’s health and wellness programs by partnering with NGOs, CBOs, women micro-credit and self-help groups in the remotest villages of the Himalayas.

ORIGINS & CURATION

Hand harvested from Himalayan glacier-fed terrains and mineral rich uncontaminated forest soil, the artisanal element is intentional and powerful. We travel far to forage, gathering only the purest nutrient rich botanicals and flower essences. Natural rhythm and ritual inform how we create our line. Organic, vedic, bio dynamic farming; respecting seasonality and the sacred ceremony of harvesting in cadence with nature’s rhythms.

BOTTLING CARE & CRAFT

We believe in micro-batches, hand blended and filled at our studio so that a little bit of love spills into every apothecary jar. Our French violetglass is refined to only allow the violet rays that preserve the bio-active energy of our precious ingredients.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Kiri Cosmetics LLP
Description:
Kiri Cosmetics is a full-service OEM/ODM manufacturer specializing in high-quality makeup, skincare, and personal care products. Based in Ahmedabad, we provide end-to-end solutions including formulation, testing, filling, packaging, white-label production, and export support.

With deep roots in chemistry and manufacturing from the Kiri Group, we combine scientific expertise with modern beauty market understanding. Our capabilities span colour cosmetics, skincare, haircare, and men’s grooming, serving both emerging and established brands across India and international markets.

At Kiri Cosmetics, we focus on consistency, compliance, innovation, and long-term partnerships. Our mission is to be the trusted manufacturing backbone behind fast-growing beauty brands—helping them scale with confidence, quality, and speed.

Name: Golonya Cosmetics
Description:
Alescia perfume was founded in İstanbul in 2011. Alescia facilities moved to Çorum in 2013 and has manufacturing of perfume and cosmetics products.
The key factor in the success of Alescia Perfume is its fundamental policy and commitment to offering original and valuable products, ensuring quality and standard continuity, and customer satisfaction.
WHY GOLONYA ?
We produce our colognes International Fragrance Association (I.F.R.A.) standards. We are using high quality materials totally natural flower and spicy extracts. The whole process is carried out with the automation system. Thus Golonya are produce by untouched by hand. Our products are produced under the control of our chemist  and undergo quality control in our laboratory before being offred to our costumers.

Name: Holistic Sweden AB
Description: Holistic is a fast-growing knowledge-based organization, selling industry leading, self-developed, high-quality supplements. We offer our customers efficient products, and with our knowledge and motivation, we help people take charge of their lives, contributing to a healthier and happier world, and a better society. The company operates in Stockholm and Norrköping and has been given the award of "Gasellföretag" 4 times, as well as "Superföretag" twice. We are rapidly growing! We care about our distributors and offer excellent service. Today all our distributions are within Sweden but have started our journey of expanding further.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Beautimport s.r.l.
Description:
IMPORTER AND DISTRIBUTOR OF LUXURY COSMETICS 

HISTORY AND BRANDS
1974 Piersandro Catelli founded Beautimport that has been ever since a major player in the Italian Market of the distribution of luxury cosmetic brands such as Chanel, Barbara Gould, Ungaro, Rochas, Jean Patou, Lacoste, Glycell, Alfred Sung, Tiffany.
1996-2008 International Licence of Terme di Saturnia skin care involving manufacturing, marketing and distributing the line worldwide.
2008 launching its own natural-bio products Vegederma Bio. Beginning of distribution of Peter Thomas Roth, and Beauty by Clinica Ivo Pitanguy.
2011 Kosé Corp. engaged with Beautimport to launch in Italy their premium line Cosme Decorte.
2013 Artdeco Group partners with Beautimport to develop Beyu and Anny at Douglas and Artdeco in the selective perfumeries.
2014 Troll Cosmetics entrusts Beautimport - four years long - the exclusive distribution of Juvena, Marlies Moeller and Declaré. 
2019 Lubin Paris, perfume maker for more than 220 years, appoints Beautimport as legal representative & logistic partner in Italy.  


THE FUTURE
Nicola Catelli joined the company in the late ‘90s. After 4 years in the US in  2013 he took over Beautimport from his father to perpetuate the expertise acquired in four decades.

KEY FACTS
In-house specialist in EU legislation and importation, warehouse granting on-time logistic service, sales force specialized in prestige cosmetics. 

MISSION
Providing the best service from the import duties to the best placement/sell-in/sell-out of the products through A&P activities.

DIGITALIZATION
Digitalization and interconnection of business processes serving the distribution of high-end cosmetic products.
The project consisted of the digitalization of all those parts of the company that had not yet been digitalized: the accounting and finance area, warehouse management, order and product management. 
Project created thanks to European funds from the Emilia-Romagna Region.

Name: Beauty Elements Ventures Manufacturing Inc.
Description:
Beauty Elements Ventures Manufacturing Inc. (BEVMi) is a health and wellness manufacturing company that produces wide range of products and services for men and women. This manufacturing company is based at Brgy. San Jose Malamig, San Pablo City, and was established on August 8, 2008. It is first in the Philippine market that produced Kojic acid soap which is highly proven to be effective in skin lightening effect.

Our commitment to quality is reflected in the recognition given us for nine consecutive years as "Bath Soap Brand of the Year" at the Watson's Health and Beauty Awards and Consumer "SM Top Choice" Awardee.

We will continue to innovate products and expand our distribution to bring the highest level of consumer experience to a greater number of people. We want to be known as the company who delivers quality and effective products.

Currently, we are the first and only brand in Indonesia for skin treatment that contains Kojic Acid and high grade Virgin Coconut oil.

From a single bar soap, we will continuously improve and develop our line of products focusing on natural base ingredients to bring forth revolutionary products that will make our consumers beautifully flawless skin.

Name: Dudley Beauty Corp, LLC
Description:
Dudley Beauty Corp, LLC (DBC) is an international hair care and beauty products company responsible for the sales, marketing and distribution of Dudley's entire catalog of professional and retail hair care products and cosmetics.

The Dudley brand of retail hair care products and cosmetics are not sold in stores, but are available only through licensed professionals, salons, independent distributors and Dudley's website.

Name: Awkward Essentials
Description: Awkward Essentials is a brand that creates thoughtful, behind-the-bathroom-door solutions, best-known for their marquee product—the dripstick—that makes post-sex cleanup a piece of cake.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ecotyl - Elevating Health and Wellness
Description:
Ecotyl is a lifestyle brand that aims to elevate health and wellness in the most sustainable way possible. We firmly believe that the food we consume and the products we use daily leave a long-lasting impression on our health and the environment. We're redefining your life experience and believe in the power of fresh, natural and organic ingredients that are carefully sourced.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to consistent innovation, creating products that are not just flavourful but also highly functional to elevate your lifestyles in a convenient and sustainable way.

Our product range of over 50 products is organized into six categories: Superfoods, Ethical Beauty, Beverages, Eco-conscious Lifestyles, Daily Essentials, and Personal Care. All our offerings adhere to a vegan, pesticide-free, unadulterated, GMO-free standard, devoid of added food colors or artificial flavors.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Botanycl Ltd
Description:
Botanycl is a supplement brand with a difference. We target the root cause, we are 100% plant-based, and we are completely free from synthetic vitamins and fillers.

SkinClear Elixir, our hero supplement works from the inside-out to address the hormonal root cause of blemishes, rather than just suppressing the symptoms externally. 

As seen on BBC Dragons' Den, Botanycl has the backing of Steven Bartlett and Peter Jones, and we are on a mission to help people everywhere to feel confident and shine.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Amós Cosméticos
Description:
A Amós Cosméticos foi fundada em 2006 e a partir de 2010 iniciou suas atividades na área de terceirização de produtos cosméticos com o compromisso de desenvolver produtos personalizados, com qualidade e resultados comprovados. Nossa filosofia é entender as necessidades deste mercado e levar soluções através dos produtos, informações e novas tecnologias.

Somos especializados em Terceirização de produtos de Skin Care e Hair Care, e oferecemos uma ampla gama de soluções para os nossos clientes.

Nosso portfólio inclui shampoos, condicionadores, máscaras, máscaras matizantes, máscaras coloridas, finalizadores/styling para cabelo, além de cremes e loções corporais e faciais, séruns hidratantes/anti-age e muito mais.

Name: Formulae21
Description:
Formulae 21 is a Custom Innovation house where we create Products with a Highly Personalised approach. We create bespoke beauty and personal care formulations to meet your needs. From ideation and innovation to problem-solving, regulatory compliance and help with manufacturing, we support you every step of the way!

Our mission is dedicated to offering the best in Beauty innovation, developing and providing a diverse portfolio of safe and effective scientific solutions that enrich the lives of our consumers.

At Formulae 21, we work with manufacturers, distributors, and professionals in the sector who want to launch new products to the market with innovative benefits. We adapt to the needs of our Clients by offering the required quality/price combination: from the most basic products to more sophisticated ones featuring some of the most innovative ingredients in the market. We use the latest insights and trends to create products that consumer demands and bring them to market at speed.

We have also become the go-to for INDIE BEAUTY STARTUPS and with leading INDEPENDENT FOUNDERS and BRANDS because of our Flexibility, Modern approach and End- to End hassle free services

We want to help bring your dream creation into a real, on-the-shelf winner!

Name: ENZYM Cosmetics
Description: ENZYM Cosmetics, sağlık ve güzellik sektöründe öncü bir firma olarak bilinir. Yenilikçi ürünleriyle dikkat çeken şirket, müşterilere etkili ve kaliteli kozmetik çözümleri sunar. ENZYM Cosmetics, bilim ve doğanın uyumunu yakalayarak her ürününü özenle formüle eder. Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımıyla, kişisel güzellik hedeflerine ulaşmak isteyenlere en iyi çözümleri sunmayı amaçlar. ENZYM Cosmetics ile sağlıklı güzelliği keşfedin!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Natural Beauty Care
Description:
The Natural Beauty Care group is one of Australia’s most versatile contract manufacturers of high quality, innovative personal care products.

We have been manufacturing and developing personal care products for international & local customers for over 20 years.

We have formulating and manufacturing capabilities in Skin Care, Hair Care, Body Care, Tanning, Spa Treatments, Baby, selected Cosmetic items, Pet Care and specialized Household products. We can draw on quality tried & tested formulations from our database, or create something unique for our customers.

We work closely with our customers from concept and formulating through to production and delivery. Our customers cover the full spectrum of brands from grocery, private label, mass market and prestige brands, premium direct selling brands and export, so it’s no surprise that NBC manufactured products have a presence in all major distribution channels in Australia (grocery, pharmacy, salon, spas and skin clinics).

Currently with a team of over 90 dedicated staff members, the mixture of experience, skill and ingenuity has created a highly effective resource that makes NBC the ideal partner for the manufacturing and development requirements of your brands.

Name: FP Labs at Federal Package
Description:
Federal Package is the preferred contract manufacturer for many of the leading personal care companies. With our extensive capabilities and dedication to quality products and services, Federal Package is the go-to source for companies in the health, beauty, and cosmetic industries searching for all aspects of contract manufacturing including research and development; formulation; blending and filling; decorating and packaging; and health and beauty containers.

Nobody delivers complete services and solutions like Federal Package. From formula development, compounding, and filling to decorating and retail-ready packaging, together we make it yours.

Name: Knesko Skin
Description:
Loved by celebrities and carried in the top spas of the world, KNESKO Skin revolutionizes skincare by bridging science and spirituality. 

Developed by a team of doctors, and founder, celebrity esthetician, and Reiki Master, Lejla Cas, each collection features a proprietary complex of ethically sourced minerals,  gemstones, clean ingredients, and GEMCLINICAL skincare technology.

Charged with healing Reiki Energy, each product invites positive intentions and promotes self-love. This creates a state of total relaxation and well-being through a holistic lifestyle approach. 

Here at KNESKO Skin, we take a unique approach to skincare, and self-care inspired by the fundamental truth that beauty begins with. We carefully designed each collection to promote deep relaxation allowing the skin, body, and mind to glow naturally.

Name: KOZMOTEK
Description:
KOZMOTEK PAZARLAMA Kozmotik ithalat İhracat San. Tic. Ltd. Şti. 2011 yılında kurulmuştur. Kozmotek Pazarlama Agiss ve Agiva markaları ile kişisel bakım ürünleri Türkiye'de Cossta Cosmetic Station,Gratis, Tshop, Eve, A101 ve Şok Marketler olmak üzere birçok farklı kuruluşlarda müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir.  
Firma 120 kişilik tecrübeli kadrosu ile en iyi şekilde hizmet vererek sizin yanınızda.

Name: Lush Nederland
Description:
Sinds Lush in 1995 werd opgericht, wordt het campagnevoerend cosmeticabedrijf gedreven door innovatie en ethiek. Lush is de bedenker en uitvinder van revolutionaire producten als de bath bombs, shower jelly’s en verpakkingsvrije shampoo bars. We leggen de nadruk op verse ingrediënten als biologisch fruit en biologische groenten, strijden tegen dierproeven en proberen het overmatig gebruik van verpakkingen terug te brengen, door producten te maken die klanten ‘naakt’ kunnen kopen.

Momenteel opereren we met 928 winkels in 52 landen wereldwijd. Sinds 2001 heeft Lush zich gevestigd in Nederland en beschikken we over tien winkels.

Lush is voor 10% eigendom van haar werknemers, en de mensen zijn het hart en de ziel van ons bedrijf.

Name: Brand Architekts
Description:
Brand Architekts offers a portfolio of problem-solving challenger beauty brands, sold throughout the UK and internationally.

Our company mission is to provide problem-solving solutions for everyday beauty. Brand Architekts has separated its brand portfolio into three categories: Invest, Nurture and Harvest.

Each category has a specific investment and resource profile, in line with the business objective of driving higher profitability. We will be focusing on brands and products that engender high levels of consumer loyalty and reflect the redefined company purpose of focusing on high-performance problem-solving solution-led brands.

Our brands are available on the high street in leading pharmacy and drugstore chains; in national grocery stores; on the platforms of global e-tailers; and through our own e-commerce websites.

On February 12, 2025, Brand Architekts was acquired by Warpaint plc.

Name: CÎME Skincare
Description:
CÎME is a Belgian skincare brand, offering 100% natural products in collaboration with farmers in the Himalayas. 

Mission: 
CÎME markets a range of high quality products with valuable ingredients that occur in the Himalayan area. 

We work in collaboration with local communities, offering a fair price for quality products that correspond to international standards. 

We do not delude our clients with miraculous results, but we are committed to using a maximum of high value natural and certified organic ingredients in our prescriptions. This commitment translates in genuine and high quality products. This is why we call our products honestly beautiful.

Out of our total sales, a minimum of 2% is reattributed to non profit initiatives aimed at improving the livelihoods of people living in remote parts of the Himalayas. 

We want our products to be carbon neutral: they are made from renewable resources, and we take great care in minimizing carbon emissions in taking these to international markets.

MEET OUR TEAM
Isabel & Anke – the youngsters
Anke and Isabel are two friends with a passion for beauty. After their studies, they both started a career as a lawyer in an international law firm. But they both weren't completely satisfied so mid 2012 they decided to finally make their dream come true: their own skincare line.

Walter – the experience
Walter De Boeck started his career in Nepal, in a project of the United Nations for the development of medicinal plants. After four years in Nepal, the idea grew to start his own company. In cooperation with our specialized bio-laboratory in the south of France, Walter is responsible for the development of our products. 

Points of sale in Belgium and The Netherlands:
- Over 200 organic stores and concept stores
- Online at:http://www.cime-skincare.com/en/shop

Want to work with us? Or interested in distributing CÎME in your home country?
Send an email to: info@cime-skincare.com

Name: Mio Capelli
Description:
A Mio Capelli nasceu com o objetivo de ajudar milhares de mulheres a ter mais autonomia e praticidade. 

Por isso, desenvolvemos diversos produtos de fácil aplicação com resultados de salão. Hoje, estamos presentes na vida de muitas consumidoras que escolheram a nossa marca para se sentir ainda mais bonitas.

Nosso foco está no ramo de cosméticos de alta qualidade, oferecendo uma ampla variedade de produtos para cabelo, sempre buscando entregar o melhor para nossos consumidores.
Nosso propósito é: “Seu cabelo como você gosta!”
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: CannaAid
Description:
CannaAid carries top shelf USA made hemp products at the lowest prices guaranteed. See a price lower somewhere else? Let us know and we will match or beat the price.

Our goal has always been to bring top shelf hemp products, like Delta 8 gummies, Delta 8 carts, CBD, CBG, THCO, THCV. HHC, CBN and more to our customers for the lowest price on the market, and we do that by cutting out the middle man and bringing the savings directly to you, our valued customer.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: SkinConsult
Description:
SkinConsult is a young company dedicated to cosmetic safety. 

Our goal is for cosmetic products on the European market to be safe. To achieve this goal, we assist manufacturers and distributors of cosmetic products in meeting EU safety standards and legal requirements. 

SkinConsult offers the following services:
- Conducting cosmetic Safety Assessments (CPSR)
- Composing of cosmetic Product Information Files
- Notification of cosmetic products
- Cosmetic adverse events handling
- Tailored advice on anything related to cosmetics, skin and EU Cosmetics legislation

At SkinConsult, we have in-house knowledge on dermatology, allergology, chemistry, toxicology and European legislation on cosmetics. Want to find out more about us? Visit our website or contact us directly through e-mail or phone.

Name: OKOKO Cosmétiques – Maison OKOKO
Description: We design urban defence skincare for the modern lifestyle. Explore our award-winning, clean beauty products for radiant skin and well-being efficacy.

Name: Creation Alexandre Miya Paris LTD
Description: Création Alexandre Miya Paris Ltd is one of the leading and renowned international distributor of fragrances and cosmetics in the Middle East region since 1981 with its main office based in Dubai.

Name: EMA Aesthetics Ltd
Description:
At EMA Aesthetics we believe that life is an art and everything we do embraces that art. Our approach is avant-garde designed to challenge the status quo. We focus on combination therapy that enhances aesthetic procedures. Results over sentiment.

At EMA Aesthetics we regard customers as our partners. Working together, we provide best-in-class aesthetic solutions that yield beautiful returns and stunning aesthetic results.

EMA Aesthetics is proud to introduce the Préime DermaFacial - the latest innovation in aesthetics.

We are in 39 countries worldwide and operate in Ireland, Belgium, UAE and Singapore. 

EMA commits to sustainable growth, product development and skincare innovation globally.

Name: Concept 4 Group | Certified B Corp
Description:
𝗖𝗼𝘀𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀 & 𝗙𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 | 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗔𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗲𝘀 & 𝗣𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗮𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴

At Concept4 Ltd, we are a leading provider of cosmetics and beauty accessories, offering a comprehensive one-stop solution for sourcing, designing, and developing high-quality gifts with purchase (GWPs), packaging, and lifestyle products. . Since 2003, we've been dedicated to helping brands thrive in the ever-evolving fashion and beauty landscape.

𝗗𝗶𝗴𝗶𝘁𝗮𝗹 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗖𝗼𝘀𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘀 & 𝗙𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗼𝗻

Our in-house digital department focuses on creating cutting-edge digital tools that streamline our operations and enhance our clients' experiences. By leveraging technology, we deliver rapid prototyping, efficient production, and seamless communication, ensuring our partners can stay ahead in a competitive market.

𝗦𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 & 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗣𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗲𝘀

As a member of B Beauty, we are committed to being a reliable partner for companies seeking to source from Asia without the hassle. Our transparent and traceable processes guarantee quality and competitive services. We prioritize environmentally sustainable, socially responsible, and economically ethical products that align with the growing demand for eco-friendly solutions.

𝗙𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗧𝗿𝗲𝗻𝗱𝘀 & 𝗕𝗲𝗮𝘂𝘁𝘆 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀

Our commitment to delivering innovative cosmetics and fashion solutions enables us to meet the evolving needs of our clients. With expertise in beauty products, fashion accessories, and lifestyle goods, we provide comprehensive support to help bring our clients' brand visions to life.

𝗚𝗹𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗹 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗵, 𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲

With headquarters in Hong Kong and offices in China, India, France, and the USA, we offer seamless support that combines global reach with local expertise, ensuring exceptional service delivery tailored to our clients' needs.

Name: cosnova Brasil
Description:
Quem nós somos: 

O Grupo cosnova nasceu em 2001, fundado por Christina, uma mulher empresária com o forte desejo de criar cosméticos que pudessem oferecer a mais alta qualidade a preços extremamente competitivos. Em 2002, o lançamento da essence cosmetics no mercado alemão. Excelentes resultados foram imediatamente alcançados, entre eles, em 2007 a essence foi a marca número 1 na Alemanha e em 2013 foi a marca mais vendida na Europa no segmento de cosméticos decorativos.* Em 2004, porém, o lançamento dos cosméticos Catrice em mercado alemão e desde então a presença da Catrice, bem como a sua atuação global, tem vindo a expandir-se continuamente. O Brasil sempre foi um mercado chave no mundo da cosmética, e é precisamente por esta razão que em 2018 o Grupo cosnova decidiu acompanhar de perto o desenvolvimento integral da essence e Catrice ao abrir a subsidiária brasileira: cosnova Brasil. A nossa missão é fazer com que cada uma de nós se sinta mais bonita! **em volume, no segmento de preço de entrada.

Name: LUMINESS
Description:
With over 5 million Airbrush Makeup Kits sold, Luminess Breeze is the #1 Global Leader in Airbrush & Airbrush Foundation. Originally used in the fashion, print, television and film industries and not found in stores, the Breeze Airbrush has simplified the everyday makeup routine with its easy to use, handheld, rechargeable, best selling Luminess Breeze.

Our Award winning Get Breeze Makeup and Breeze foundation is 100% cruelty free, vegan and made in the USA. Luminess is backed by 60,000+ glowing 5 stars reviews online and also loved by leading Hollywood makeup artists, celebrities and millions of women all over the world. To shop the Getbreeze Airbrush Makeup System, just click on the link in our profile.

Name: CPAPS - Terapia do Sono
Description:
Tragam seus cobertores e travesseiros e embarquem no mundo dos sonhos CPAPS. 

Quem somos nós?
Acreditamos que noites bem dormidas transformam vidas: e somos especialistas nesse assunto. A CPAPS é a maior e mais completa loja especializada em apneia do sono e terapia respiratória do Brasil, com mais de 16 anos de história dedicada a transformar noites mal dormidas em jornadas de bem-estar e saúde.

Nossa missão:
Fazer com que cuidar da apneia do sono seja possível, descomplicado e uma experiência positiva para todos.

Nosso time:
Por trás de cada solução oferecida está uma equipe apaixonada, os Cpapianos — que une inovação, empatia, conhecimento técnico e dedicação para criar uma experiência única para cada cliente.

Nossa visão:
Ser a escolha número um em soluções para apneia do sono, liderando com inovação e tocando mentes e corações em nosso caminho.

O que valorizamos:
 Atendimento humanizado e especializado
 Soluções que priorizam saúde e qualidade de vida
 Mérito, dedicação e trabalho em equipe
 Crescimento sustentável e clima organizacional leve
 Compromisso com resultados e excelência

Onde estamos:
Com sede em Vila Velha, no Espírito Santo, e presença física em diversos estados, oferecemos uma experiência completa no ambiente online para todo o Brasil: com agilidade logística, suporte técnico e acompanhamento clínico gratuito com fisioterapeutas.

Quer conhecer mais?
 Site: www.cpaps.com.br
 Blog: cpaps.com.br/blog
 SAC: 0800 601 9922
 Instagram: @cpapsapneia
 Facebook: fb.com/CpapsApneia
 YouTube: CPAPS Apneia
 Pinterest: @cpapsapneia

#OrgulhoDeSerCpapiano
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: TrulyKomal
Description:
Komal Rizvi along with top notch chemist in Canada has developed some awesome skincare formulas which are all made in SPAIN!

We offer these superb international standard products at very reasonable prices and we TRULY hope you love and enjoy TRULYKOMAL!

Name: B. Hulmann
Description:
QUEM SOMOS?

A marca nasceu em 2022 com a proposta de oferecer produtos profissionais para cabelos com curvaturas - cacheados, ondulados e crespos - desenvolvidos com a orientação da especialista em cachos, Bianca Hulmann. Os cabelos com curvatura possuem características únicas e demandam cuidados específicos para mantê-los saudáveis, hidratados e definidos. Com formulação europeia e tecnologia avançada, os produtos B.Hulmann são acessíveis e permitem que os consumidores obtenham resultados de tratamento de salão de beleza no conforto de suas casas. Toda a linha foi cuidadosamente desenvolvida com uma alta concentração de ativos nutritivos.

SEU CABELO, NOSSO CUIDADO!

Nossos produtos são veganos, cruelty-free e liberados para a técnica low poo, reforçando o compromisso da marca com a sustentabilidade, responsabilidade social e o bem-estar dos consumidores. Além disso, oferecem proteção térmica e solar e são livres de silicones insolúveis, petrolatos, óleo mineral, parafina, parabenos e corantes.

QUEM É BIANCA HULMANN?

Cabeleireira desde os 13 anos de idade e proprietária de salão desde os 16, Bianca iniciou alisando seu próprio cabelo aos 11 anos para se integrar socialmente e continuou até os 20 anos. Com o tempo, passou pela transição capilar e assumiu seu cabelo natural, apaixonando-se por cabelos cacheados. Essa experiência a levou a desenvolver técnicas específicas para esse tipo de cabelo, tornando-se uma referência mundial. Bianca criou o Método Bianca Hulmann, um curso online certificado pelo MEC, que já formou mais de 8.000 profissionais em diversos países. Em 2022, ela lançou a B.Hulmann, sua marca própria focada em produtos para cabelos naturais e com curvaturas.

Name: Opulix Romania
Description:
Totul a început în Marea Britanie, unde am pus bazele Opulix și ne-am bucurat de un feedback excelent, atât online, prin website, eBay și Amazon, cât și din vânzările directe către oamenii care ne-au descoperit produsele. Pentru noi a fost mai mult decât un simplu business, a fost confirmarea că ceea ce facem are sens și valoare.

Întorși în România, ne-am dorit să aducem cu noi aceeași calitate și aceeași atenție la detalii. Opulix este o afacere de familie construită cu răbdare, muncă și pasiune. Fiecare lumânare este turnată manual în atelierul nostru din Argeș, folosind ceară de soia naturală, vegană și biodegradabilă, fitil din lemn și uleiuri parfumate premium. Ne dorim ca fiecare produs să ofere nu doar un miros plăcut, ci o stare, un moment de liniște și confort.

Povestea noastră a început în 2020, când am descoperit diferențele dintre lumânările clasice și cele din ceară naturală. Primele încercări nu au fost perfecte, dar procesul ne-a prins complet. Am testat zeci de combinații până când am ajuns la ceea ce considerăm azi o lumânare premium, minimalistă și elegantă, exact genul de produs pe care îl folosim zilnic acasă.

În 2021 am lansat primele arome Opulix. Nu ne-am dorit o gamă foarte mare, ci câteva arome atent selectate, echilibrate și plăcute pentru cât mai mulți oameni. Pentru noi contează mai mult calitatea și experiența pe care o oferă fiecare lumânare decât numărul de variante.

Opulix înseamnă lumânări parfumate artizanale, create în Argeș de familia noastră, cu grijă pentru detalii și pentru oamenii care le folosesc. Folosim doar ceară de soia naturală, fitil din lemn și uleiuri parfumate premium, pentru o ardere curată, o flacără frumoasă și un parfum echilibrat.

Preferăm să avem o gamă restrânsă de arome, dar bine lucrate, în locul unei liste uriașe în care nimic nu rămâne memorabil. Fiecare aromă este testată și ajustată până când suntem siguri că ne-am dori să o avem aprinsă în propria noastră casă, zi de zi. Astăzi realizăm lumânările

Name: Somnee
Description:
"Sleep is the most important thing we can do to reset our brain and body health each day."

~ Dr. Matthew Walker (Somnee Co-Founder, UC Berkeley Prof. of Neuroscience, author of bestseller, "Why We Sleep")
 
𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗼𝗳 𝗦𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗶𝗻 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱
1 in 3 adults gets poor quality sleep. 51% are frustrated with their sleep quality. The implications are far-reaching, affecting focus, mood, performance, health, and your ability to be the parent, leader, athlete, artist, and person you want to be.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
Somnee’s on a mission to make peak performance sleep the new normal, to fundamentally transform the human experience, cognitive health, and longevity. 

Somnee's 5x award-winning Smart Sleep Headband combines decades of clinically validated neuroscience and cutting-edge AI technology with a first-of-its-kind approach to dynamic closed-loop neurostimulation. 

The result: a personalized AI sleep coach that tracks your sleep with lab-grade accuracy, while actively improving your rest. 

On average, Somnee helps sleepers 𝗳𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗮𝘀𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝟱𝟬% 𝗳𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿, 𝗱𝗲𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝘄𝗮𝗸𝗲-𝘂𝗽𝘀 𝗯𝘆 𝟯𝟯%, and 𝗯𝗼𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝘀𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗯𝘆 ~𝟯𝟬 𝗺𝗶𝗻. Phone-free use. All-night comfort. Lab-grade sleep reports featuring 40x the data of top trackers.

𝗧𝗲𝗮𝗺 + 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵
Somnee was developed over 7 years by world-renowned UC Berkeley neuroscientists including Dr. Matthew Walker, Dr. Robert Knight, Dr. Rich Ivry, and Dr. Ram Gurumoorthy. Our approach is clinically validated & published in the peer-reviewed journal Frontiers in Human Neuroscience. Our team includes proven leaders from Fitbit, Google, Apple, and Samsung.

𝗔𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘀 + 𝗥𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗴𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
In 2024, Somnee won Fast Company’s “Next Big Things in Tech” and GQ’s Fitness Award for “Best Sleep Technology." We’ve partnered with NBA Launchpad and Equinox Hotels, and have been featured in Forbes, WSJ, CNET, Men's Journal, and more.

Description:
Com 17 anos de trajetória, somos uma marca 100% VEGANA, 100% brasileira, com produtos cosméticos de performance profissional. Nosso desenvolvimento e filosofia traduzem um novo conceito de beleza, no qual saúde e autenticidade, em ser naturalmente você, são nosso norte e nosso maior objetivo! 
Durante esta trajetória, como resultado de todo nosso trabalho, dedicação, seriedade e comprometimento, assinam nossos produtos, atestando nosso conceito, os princípios de respeito à natureza, aos animais e à saúde de nossos consumidores!

Nossa história começou com uma paixão por um estilo de vida mais natural, pela busca de alternativas saudáveis diante da frenética procura por técnicas e produtos cada vez mais artificiais e distantes da verdadeira essência da beleza que é a simplicidade. Simplicidade que torna a vida mais pura e feliz. Simplicidade que torna mente e corpo mais saudáveis.

Nascemos fazendo escolhas conscientes no desenvolvimento de seus produtos; nas definições por tecnologias de produção mais limpa; na implantação de uma área física de forma funcional, portanto não desarmonizando o meio ambiente. Descobrimos que é possível cuidar da beleza e, ao mesmo tempo, da saúde, desenvolvendo produtos com funcionalidade, "verdes" e cheios de vida.

Assim é a ARVENSIS, uma empresa simplesmente natural.

AWvi combines the ethos of ‘Act Well’ with the notion of living well, with vi—the Roman numeral for six—symbolising the six interconnected elements of health and wellbeing at the heart of the brand:

Sleep, Nutrition, Movement, Nature, Passions, and Relationships.

Name: MedSalus Sağlık Hizmetleri
Description:
2011 yılında kurulan, ilk olarak evde bakım alanında faaliyet gösteren MedSalus, kısa zamanda birçok sağlık kuruluşuna ve bireye hizmet sağlayan bir şirket haline geldi.
Sürekli gelişimin getirmiş olduğu geri bildirimler ve talepler doğrultusunda, kronik hastalıkların tedavi ve önleyici faaliyetlerinin daha etkin olarak sağlanması adına medikal cihazların tedarikçisi olma kararı aldı. Bu doğrultuda kullanıcılara en yüksek faydayı sağlayacak ürünlerin araştırmasını yaparak, Türkiye’ ye getirilmesi için ekibini daha güçlü hale getirdi ve altyapı çalışmalarını tamamladı. Evde bakım alanında edindiği saha tecrübesini diyabet teknolojileri alanına taşıyabilme kabiliyeti, kullanıcıların en iyi hizmeti alabilmesi temelini sağlamlaştırdı. 2013 yılının başından itibaren sektörün önde gelen Avrupa ve Amerikan menşeili ürünlerin ulusal distribütörlüğünü sürdürmektedir.
MedSalus, rekabetçi bir ortamda, takım çalışmasına ve çalışanların memnuniyetine önem vererek birçok ilde hizmet sağlama olanağına sahiptir. Ulusal ekonomiye katkı sağlama ve milli kaynakların verimli kullanılması temeli üzerine inşa edilen şirketimizin öncelikli hedefi en kaliteli hizmetin, isteyen her bireye ve kuruma ulaştırılabilmesini sağlamaktır.
Hizmet sağladığımız tüm değerli bireylerin ve kurumların memnuniyeti ise en büyük motivasyon kaynağımızdır.

Name: RaazMD
Description:
1 in 4 men suffer from some kind of sexual dysfunction or reproductive health issue but if they happen to live in a small town or rural India and speak a vernacular language, they don’t have any access to quality information or solution. They then turn to quacks and spend their hard earned money on snake oil treatments. Raaz aims to tap into their familiar user interface to offer them discreet doctor consultation and scientifically proven medication.

Julian Simon’s words that individuals are the ultimate resource with potential to make any other resource more plentiful have never rang truer than they do today. The rapid decline in fertility rates across the world is a cause of deep disarray to those of us who believe in abundance and human flourishing. It’s even more concerning for India as it risks becoming old before it becomes rich. Building Raaz is our small attempt at reversing that and helping couples have children through innovative reproductive health solutions while upholding individual choice.

Name: PharmacyDiscount.gr
Description:
The pharmacy was founded in 1993 by Mr. Aris Paschalidis. After a long and notably successful journey in the field, he decided to embrace modern trends by creating one of the first e-pharmacies in Greece. In 2014, they launched the first e-commerce platform, pharmacydiscount.gr, located in Anixi Square, at 2 Anixos Stamatas Street, Anixi, Attiki.

Soon, the need for a larger space arose, and in 2021, the e-pharmacy was relocated to 39 Chelmou Street in Agios Stefanos, where the company offices are now housed, along with the Marketing, Sales, Accounting, Customer Service, and Logistics teams. The facilities expanded with a new ERP system and a 3,000 sqm logistics center, equipped with smart technologies such as automated picking and packing systems, autonomous vehicles (AGVs), and a warehouse management system (WMS).

Today, PharmacyDiscount.gr operates 24/7 nationwide, and also serves customers in Europe and Cyprus, offering over 22,000 products to more than 400,000 registered customers and attracting over 300,000 visitors per month. Our product range covers up to 90% of consumer pharmaceutical, cosmetic, and lifestyle categories. With a strong presence on social media and digital channels, PharmacyDiscount.gr stands as one of the largest online pharmacies in the country, equipped with the most modern facilities and advanced systems in the industry. 

We welcome you warmly to visit one of our two physical stores—at 2 Anixos Stamatas Street, Agios Stefanos 14569 in Northern Attica, or at 40 Akti Kondyli, Piraeus 185 45 in the South—or browse our e-shop to meet your needs!

Name: Kinvara Skincare
Description:
Kinvara Skincare is an Irish success story, starting out in 2012 from humble beginnings we now serve customers in over 800 retail outlets and online through our website and Amazon platforms.

Kinvara champions Clean beauty on the high street through our range of high performing everyday skincare essentials.  These high performing, award winning products offer our customers more than results with plant-powered formulas that make looking after their skin something our customers look forward to everyday. 

Kinvara is their Feel Good skincare brand.

Kinvara was founded by Dr. Joanne Reilly in 2012 after she struggled to find skincare products for her own tricky skin that didn’t cost a fortune, make things worse or include some suspect ingredients. Frustrated with the products on offer she decided to take things into her own hands and started making simple skincare products to look after her own and her families skin.  Not everyone with tricky skin decides that the best thing to do is make their own products but Joanne drew on her strong research abilities gained through her doctoral work in conservation ecology in Indonesia. Her experiences there demonstrated that plants were the answer to just about everything and secondly, that poor environmental management could have devastating consequences for people, animals and the environment.  So when Kinvara skincare was born it was inevitable that it would be a natural skincare brand, rooted in plants and with a strong commitment to sustainability and its customers. Product, People and Planet are in Kinvara's DNA.  

To this end we’re working all the time to make improvements such that a Kinvara skincare purchase is a positive purchase. 
-We use sustainable packaging options like sugarcane bioplastic in our tubes, plastic bottles made from recycled plastic and amber glass jars. 
-We are certified Cruelty Free and Vegan. 
-We are verified by Provenance.
-Our formulas used responsibly sourced palm oil (RSPO).

Name: Oriflame Poland
Description:
Jesteśmy międzynarodową firmą sprzedaży bezpośredniej stworzoną w Szwecji, ale przede wszystkim jesteśmy społecznością, w której spełnianie marzeń i rozwój osobisty stawiamy na pierwszym miejscu. W naszym Klubie liczymy już ponad 3,6 miliona członków, a w samej Polsce ponad 100 tys. Prowadzimy sprzedaż w ponad 60 krajach na całym świecie, generując rocznie ponad 1,5 mln obrotu.

Oriflame, założone w 1967 roku przez dwóch braci – Roberta i Jonasa af Jochnicków, działa na rynku od ponad 50 lat. Oferujemy szerokie portfolio produktów do makijażu, pielęgnacji cery, ciała i włosów, zapachy, akcesoria oraz produkty wellness. Łącznie mamy w ofercie około 1 000 kosmetyków, które cechują się wysoką szwedzką jakością. Dodatkowo:

Posiadamy własne Centrum Badań i Rozwoju.
Nad naszymi kosmetykami pracuje ponad 100 naukowców.
Podczas procesu tworzenia produktów korzystamy z najwyższej jakości unikalnych patentów i technologii.
Nasze kosmetyki produkujemy we własnych fabrykach – m.in. w Polsce i Szwecji.
Nieustannie szukamy innowacyjnych rozwiązań, tak by nasze produkty spełniały potrzeby naszych klientów.  

Naszą misją jest spełnianie marzeń i realizacja poniższych wartości:
Bycie razem – zależy nam na ludziach, którzy motywują się wzajemnie oraz wiedzą, że podejmowanie działań wspólnie jest bardziej efektywne niż dążenie do celu solo. 
Duch – uważamy, że pozytywne nastawienie prowadzi do sukcesu.
Pasja – zmieniamy świat osób, dla których praca stają się pasją.

Odzwierciedleniem naszych działań jest hasło Piękna Tak Jak Chcę. Każda z nas ma prawo podążać swoją drogą. W Oriflame oferujemy dwie ścieżki kariery – praca w biurze Oriflame lub dołączenie do Klubu Oriflame. Jednak niezależnie, w jakim charakterze chciałbyś z nami pracować, gwarantujemy też naukę kompetencji miękkich, niezbędnych dla każdego, kto porusza się po rynku pracy.

Więcej o możliwościach, jakie daje dołączenie do Klubu Oriflame znajdziesz tu: https://pl.oriflame.com/business-opportunity

Name: Atomy Türkiye
Description:
Founded by Han Gill Park in South Korea in 2009, Atomy is a network marketing company that sells directly in 26 countries. As a company that strictly adheres to its principles and appeals to the world with its ethical rules, it has managed to reach 2.2 trillion won (1.8 billion USD) in global sales in 2022, and the number of global members has reached 15 million. As a global brand, it continues to grow by applying a consumer-oriented strategy that adheres to the principles of 'Absolute Quality, Absolute Price'. Taking customer satisfaction forward, Atomy considers giving priority to customer success and striving for it among its primary goals. 

Atomy sees customer satisfaction as one of its primary goals, prioritizing customer success and striving for it. The economic power of Atomy, which offers quality products for sale at affordable prices, is hidden in its development by making innovations in its distribution network. The philosophy of Absolute Quality and Absolute Price, which it tries to maintain until today, is maintained in all Atomy products such as health products, beauty, life, food, fashion and household goods. 

Atomy started is journey with America in 2010; Japan, Canada, Taiwan, Singapore, Cambodia, Philippines, Malaysia, Mexico, Thailand, Australia, Indonesia, Russia, China, Colombia, Hong Kong, Turkey, England, New Zealand, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan, India, Brazil, Mongolia and Germany its activities in 26 countries, including. In addition to the importance it attaches to continuity and rapid growth, it also tries to maintain the principle of balance. 

Atomy values, which consider honesty and kindness as the best strategy and are shaped around these two important principles; helped the company to spread all over the world. Atomy; has a company motto that values the soul, creates a vision, advocates humility and emphasizes the importance of being faithful. 

Atomy Korea was ranked 1st in the Best Place to Work ranking by Great Place to Work in 2022.

Name: Euro Cosmetic S.p.A.
Description:
Euro Cosmetic is a company specializing in Research & Development, Production and Sale of Beauty Products.
Euro Cosmetic began its business in Trenzano (BS) in May 2007. Since the beginning, the company has had a significant growth, establishing itself among the leaders in the field of cosmetics production on behalf of third parties. The factory area, blending plants, packaging lines and laboratories have grown at the same pace, until the current configuration: a modern factory that covers an area of 22,300 square metres, of which 16,600 square metres are covered.

In 2021 was acquired by Fine Foods & Pharmaceuticals NTM S.p.A.
Fine Foods is a Benefit Company listed on Euronext STAR Milan, is an Italian independent Contract Development & Manufacturing Organisation (CDMO).  It develops and manufactures contract products for the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industries.
The Cosmetic Customer Portfolio consists of prestigious companies in the cosmetics and pharmaceutical industry, which operate in the large-scale retail trade and specialty channels such as pharmacies and perfumeries, both mono and multi-brand, nationally and internationally.
Holistic Sustainability for us is not just an environmental commitment, but a positive contribution to the well-being of our employees and of the community where we operate.
The main success driver has been a relentless quest for innovation and customer satisfaction, combined with special attention to ethics and human capital.
Euro Cosmetic develops and produces cosmetics on behalf of third parties in the following areas:
•ORAL HYGIENE
•SKIN CARE 
•PERSONAL DEODORANTS 
•BODY CLEANSING
•HAIR TREATMENTS
•PERFUMERY

Name: Perfumes Europeos
Description:
Con más de 30 años de experiencia y más de 780 tiendas en México y América Latina, Perfumes Europeos es el líder en el mercado de perfumería de alta calidad asequible, llevando la excelencia de las fragancias europeas a cada rincón. Nos especializamos en democratizar el lujo a través de modelos de negocio flexibles e innovadores, que incluyen tiendas propias, franquicias, e-commerce y vending machines, adaptándonos a las necesidades cambiantes de nuestros clientes y franquiciados.

¿Qué nos hace únicos?
•Cobertura y Escala: Con más de 780 ubicaciones en México y LATAM (Perú, Panamá, Bolivia, Nicaragua, Ecuador), llegamos a nuestros clientes donde y cuando lo necesiten.
•Innovación en Canales de Venta: Somos pioneros en el uso de tecnologías de distribución únicas como vending machines de perfumes, integrando además un modelo de e-commerce que conecta cada venta con el franquiciado más cercano, optimizando tiempos y experiencias de entrega.
•Modelo de Franquicia sin Royalties: En Perfumes Europeos, creemos en la colaboración y el crecimiento mutuo, lo que nos permite ofrecer un modelo de franquicia competitivo y libre de royalties, respaldado por un sistema avanzado de gestión y una sólida red de soporte.
•Aliados Estratégicos: Colaboramos con gigantes del retail como Walmart y Soriana, llevando nuestros perfumes directamente al corazón del consumidor mexicano y latinoamericano.
•Experiencia única de compra: Redefinimos la personalización en el mundo de las fragancias, ofreciendo la posibilidad de seleccionar y preparar cada perfume al momento, eligiendo entre una amplia gama de aromas inspirados en fragancias de diseñador, de nicho y de lujo.

Nuestra misión es llevar fragancias de calidad excepcional a cada hogar, con una experiencia de compra accesible, moderna e innovadora. En Perfumes Europeos, estamos comprometidos con la excelencia, la accesibilidad y el crecimiento, siempre enfocados en ser el referente de la perfumería en América Latina y más allá.

optiphi offers a professional facial treatment ranges, and a range of active products formulated with optimal active concentrations to promote cellular skin rejuvenation. optiphi treats the signs of aging: dehydration, impaired skin barrier function, pigmentation, loss of elasticity, wrinkles, enlarged pores & redness.

Name: THE LOVE CO
Description:
The Love Co started with a simple thought LOVE ISN'T LOUD.
It lives in routines, in small moments, and in how we care for ourselves every day.

We create fragrance-led body care that feels gentle, familiar, and comforting. Our products are designed to be part of your everyday rituals—morning showers, slow evenings, moments of pause without trying to overpower or perform.

For us, scent is memory. It’s personal, emotional, and deeply human.
That’s why we focus on thoughtful formulations, balanced fragrances, and products you can reach for daily, without a second thought.

The Love Co is about choosing care, intention, and love quietly, consistently, and honestly.

 Our Commitment:
We believe in creating beauty products that are as kind to the planet as they are to your skin. Sustainability isn't an afterthought; it's at the heart of everything we do. From sourcing natural ingredients to embracing ethical practices, we're dedicated to making beauty a force for good.

 Our Community:
"The Love Co. is more than a brand; it's a movement. A movement toward love-infused beauty that celebrates every individual's unique journey. We're building a community where authenticity is celebrated, diversity is cherished, and self-care is revered.

 Join Us:
We invite you to be part of this journey. Whether you're a beauty enthusiast, a sustainability advocate, or someone who believes in the power of genuine connections, there's a place for you at The Love Co. Let's redefine beauty standards together, making every moment and every routine an act of love beyond beauty.

Name: Bamboo India
Description:
BambooIndia, a Pune-based first-generation startup founded on August 15th, 2016, is on a mission to change the perception of bamboo from "The Poor Man's Timber" to "Wise Man's Timber." The company is achieving this by offering innovative bamboo products that can replace plastic products. This approach not only helps in reducing plastic pollution but also promotes the use of sustainable materials.

BambooIndia's commitment to sustainability has gained recognition from various organizations, including the United Nations, who have acknowledged their contribution to this important cause. Additionally, the company's innovative approach and dedication to making a positive impact on the environment has led to their feature in Shark Tank India Season 1, a testament to their potential and promising future.

Name: NUORI
Description:
NUORI is an innovative, high-end cosmetics company founded in Copenhagen. We are ambitiously building an international brand with cult-status and large growth potential. Our approach combines the latest science with cutting-edge design - and a Nordic love for simplicity and purity with a passion for beauty.

All NUORI formulas are developed to deliver visible results using only the best natural ingredients and the latest generation of bioengineered actives. Our products are freshly blended in small batches every 10 to 12 weeks at our professional production facilities and promptly delivered to our stores across the world.

As an all-natural beauty brand, NUORI has had sustainability built into its DNA from day one. Our stringent natural ingredient policy and small batch production have earned us the reputation of a true industry challenger. But to us, the journey towards true sustainability is a never-ending one - ‘better’ is always on the horizon. We have defined the following areas as central to our constant betterment as a company and a brand: ingredients, sourcing & production, and packaging & materials, and office policies.

Aujourd'hui, KOS PARIS signe un large choix de produits pour le visage, le corps et les cheveux aux parfums voluptueux, invitations à vivre des moments précieux dans l'intimité de votre salle de bain, en boutique et dans les spas de luxe en France et aux 4 coins du monde. 

Nous signons, également, pour les plus beaux spas, des soins signature d'exception !

Name: LOGOCOS Naturkosmetik GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
LOGOCOS – Made in Kräuterwiese.

Seit 1978 steht LOGOCOS für echte, zertifizierte Naturkosmetik – gegründet aus der Überzeugung, dass wahre Schönheit im Einklang mit der Natur entsteht.
Heute sind wir wieder ein unabhängiges Unternehmen und gestalten die Zukunft aus eigener Kraft – mit klarer Haltung, nachhaltiger Forschung und authentischen Marken.

An unserem Standort in Salzhemmendorf, der „Kräuterwiese“, vereinen wir Forschung, Entwicklung und Produktion unter einem Dach. Viele unserer pflanzlichen Inhaltsstoffe – wie Bio-Brennnessel oder Kamille – wachsen direkt vor unserer Tür. Hier verbinden wir Handwerk, Wissenschaft und Verantwortung zu einer modernen, zukunftsfähigen Naturkosmetik.

Mit unseren Marken LOGONA, SANTE und HELIOTROP entwickeln wir Produkte, die Wirksamkeit, Natürlichkeit und Ästhetik verbinden – für Menschen, die bewusst leben und sich selbst treu bleiben.

Ehrlich. Nachhaltig. Made in Kräuterwiese.

Name: New Penta Official
Description:
Qualcuno crede che per recuperare la forma fisica sia sufficiente dimagrire: sbagliato. Bisogna perdere il grasso in eccesso mantenendo però intatti il tono muscolare e la massa magra.
Il metodo SAIP si basa essenzialmente sul principio che una riduzione dei glucidi e dei lipidi, associata al consumo quasi esclusivo di proteine di alto

valore biologico, con un apporto di aminoacidi essenziali perfettamente equilibrati, permette di ridurre la massa del tessuto adiposo grazie al nuovo bilanciamento Insulina – Glucagone che si viene ad instaurare nell’organismo.

Grazie al metodo SAIP (Sistema Alimentare Integrato Penta), che riprende l’idea sviluppata su quanto proposto già nel 1973 negli Stati Uniti dal Prof. Blackburn G.L., professore alla scuola di medicina dell’Università di Harvard e ricercatore al M.I.T., si può perdere peso facilmente, salvaguardando la massa muscolare.
Questa metodica, già ampiamente diffusa in Francia dalla metà degli anni ’80 e consigliata da migliaia di medici, è stata usata quasi esclusivamente per il trattamento dell’obesità, ma oggi i campi di applicazione sono molteplici: può essere usata per l’adiposità localizzata come la cellulite, per il trattamento di dislipidemie e della sindrome metabolica, ha un’utile applicazione nel ritorno al peso forma post gravidanza e nel pre e post intervento di chirurgia bariatrica.

La letteratura scientifica internazionale ha prodotto studi che dimostrano la sicurezza ed efficacia di questo trattamento trovando un largo riscontro e diffusione presso la Comunità Scientifica. New Penta si pone come riferimento primo per prescrittori e pazienti, con un protocollo dietoterapico sicuro ed efficace sotto guida del referente sanitario ed esclusivamente con prescrizione medica.

Name: Nederlandse Cosmetica Vereniging
Description:
The NCV is the association of manufacturers and importers of cosmetics (products for personal care). This includes not only products for daily care, such as deodorant, shampoo and toothpaste, but also products that can change appearance, like make-up and hair dyes. The NCV was founded in 1950.

The NCV represents the common interests of Dutch cosmetic industry (it is the voice of the industry), both at national and international level and provides a variety of services for its members.

Approximately 100 companies are member. They cover almost all sectors of cosmetics, such as mass and selective brands, professional hair care, and nail care. Members are manufacturers (full members), ingredient suppliers and suppliers of services (associate members).

The NCV Board is composed entirely of representatives of member companies. The Board and members of NCV fulfil a crucial role in the work of the organisation. They determine the association’s policy and play an important role in the provision of information.

Most of the work of representation and services is carried out by a secretariat of 6 staff members. The focus of our work centres on scientific, regulatory and legislative issues. We have a constant dialogue with the Dutch and European (via Cosmetics Europe) Government and receive advance notice of many changes which will affect the composition, labelling, advertising claims, legal status, manufacturing and distribution of the industry's products. This information is passed on to members who in turn have an opportunity through the NCV to suggest ways in which proposals can be modified to accommodate both the regulators and industry.

That’s why we select only the finest natural and organic ingredients from around the world that are grown ethically, sustainably and in harmony with the environment. Name: Arval Cosmetici
Description:
Arval è il risultato di un binomio unico, ampiamente testimoniato a livello internazionale. La ricerca e lo sviluppo delle nostre specialità avvengono nei laboratori svizzeri, mentre la fase commerciale, di marketing e di concezione del prodotto ha radici in Italia.

Il fondatore, il dottor Virgilio Vitali, medico dermatologo, ha dato vita a Arval nel 1955. Dopo la sua scomparsa nel 2000, la famiglia ha proseguito l'opera iniziata, trasformando Arval in una piacevole "anomalia" nel mercato cosmetico italiano.

La missione distintiva di Arval è dedicata al perfezionamento e al sostegno della bellezza, nonché alle varie esigenze della pelle, attraverso una ricerca e uno sviluppo scrupoloso di prodotti e trattamenti cosmetici di qualità superiore, efficacia comprovata e sicurezza certificata dai nostri esclusivi Laboratori.

Ci differenziamo per la nostra originale filosofia skincare, che si basa sulla biocosmesi restitutiva, un approccio unico finalizzato a restituire in profondità alla pelle selezionati principi attivi naturali e biotecnologici nella loro forma di eccellenza formulativa, non per coprire gli inestetismi della pelle ma per trattarli in profondità.

Unisciti a noi nel nostro viaggio senza fine verso l'eccellenza cosmetica.

Name: MorePlex Company Limited
Description:

Through our organic fertilizers, potash, cosmetics, and household products, we support sustainable farming, improve soil health, and boost crop yields, all while reducing the environmental footprint of cocoa farming.

With a focus on the circular economy, we not only create solutions for waste management but also provide income-generating opportunities for local farmers. MorePlex is at the forefront of green innovation in West Africa, setting new standards in sustainable development, economic empowerment, and environmental stewardship. Together, we’re shaping a greener, more prosperous future for Africa.

Name: Fit Cosmetics
Description:
A Fit Cosméticos nasceu em 2010 para atender à crescente procura por itens de beleza com qualidade superior no mercado. Sabemos que transformações acontecem em todas as esferas e etapas da vida e, cada vez mais, as pessoas procuram por produtos que sejam capazes de realçar a sua beleza natural. Em se tratando de cabelos, a Fit Cosméticos sabe como agradar o universo feminino oferecendo produtos eficientes, inovadores, sofisticados e acessíveis.
Nosso compromisso com a excelência e a inovação contínua nos fez crescer e conquistar a confiança dos nossos clientes. Atualmente, a Fit Cosméticos, sediada no interior de São Paulo, possui mais de 120 itens distribuídos em todo seguimento capilar. Nossa diversidade de produtos confere tratamentos personalizados para cada tipo de cabelo e resultados visíveis a partir das primeiras aplicações. Todos os nossos produtos possuem alta performance e eficiência para reconstruir e proteger a estrutura dos fios, além de fornecer hidratação de efeito duradouro. A Fit Cosméticos consegue, assim, transformar e facilitar a vida das mulheres, trazendo-lhes bem-estar e autoestima. Nós garantimos satisfação absoluta por traduzir as tendências da moda e as necessidades do público feminino em beleza real. Afinal, para a Fit Cosméticos, a beleza é um direito de todas.
A Fit Cosméticos preza, também, pela parceria contínua, respeito, apoio e assistência aos seus colaboradores, distribuidores e cabeleireiros. A missão de servir bem todos os nossos parceiros, sempre com ética, qualidade e bom gosto nos consolida cada vez mais no seguimento de cosméticos. Hoje, a Fit Cosméticos já comercializa seus produtos em todos os estados do Brasil: contamos com diversos distribuidores localizados em todo o território nacional que nos ajudam não apenas no abastecimento das prateleiras com nossos produtos, mas também na realização de sonhos de beleza.

Name: The Untamed
Description:
Untamed by name. Untamed by nature.
Our way is the Nordic way. Just like the winds that serenade the falling leaves, we take inspiration from the wild beauty that surrounds us. Untouched, mysterious and tied inextricably to the elements, our character has been moulded by our wondrous environments. The sun’s fading light tells only part of the day’s story. The light enriches our mood while the darkness mystifies us.

Respect for nature is of paramount importance to us, because our wellbeing is allied to our nature being well. Without hurry, we’ve learnt from nature, and like a stream that carries a feather to another place, our journey of discovery is a constant progression.
 
We are a product of our environment, and our products reflect 
our surroundings. 

We don’t follow trends, we are guided by time. We are untainted by the rapid pace of modern life; rather, we adopt rituals and traditions that have stood the test of time. Enticing scents, seductive colours make for moments of unfiltered beauty.

Once exclusive to the people of the North, our job is now to spread 
these beauty rituals to the world.

At o2o Beauty, our mission is to revolutionize the beauty sector by seamlessly integrating online strategies with offline market dynamics, ensuring our brands stand out in an ever-evolving landscape."

Cela signifie qu’elles sont virucides et bactéricides et garantit leur efficacité contre les virus nus ou enveloppés, comme le COVID-19, PRV, BVDV, Herpes virus, Rotavirus, Coronavirus, Influenza virus A HxNy, Vaccinia virus, HIV-1, Norovirus.

ProNails is the trusted partner for top quality hand, nail and foot care. We offer superior support to beauty professionals. We inspire our partners and consumers with trendy high-end products that bring you radiant self-confidence and total satisfaction.

A COMPANY WITH A VISION

•	Inspiring
•	Joyful

A COMPANY THAT OFFERS OPPORTUNITIES

Our community is made up of different types of individuals, both thinkers and doers : marketers and sales (wo)men, product developers & lab technicians, stylists & trainers,… We aim for a strong team with lots of crazy and innovative ideas.  

So if you want to be part of this joyful and creative bunch of people and you are passionate about colours, a career with ProNails might be your dream job. Make it an outstanding dream.

Name: Cámara de la Industria Cosmética de Chile A.G.
Description:
La Cámara de la Industria Cosmética de Chile es una asociación gremial, sin fines de lucro, que reúne a empresas del rubro cosmético tanto nacionales (pequeñas y medianas) como multinacionales, productoras, importadoras y exportadoras, así como también a proveedores de esta industria.

Agrupa actualmente a 36 empresas del rubro cosmético, lo que en el mercado total cosmético representa  aproximadamente el 80%, en términos de facturación. 

MISIÓN
Promover el desarrollo de todos los actores que confluyen en la producción y comercialización de productos de perfumería y cosmética mediante el impulso a la libre competencia, bajo un marco ético y de transparencia en donde se resguarden los legítimos intereses gremiales. 

VISIÓN
Ser una organización gremial de reconocido prestigio nacional e internacional y un referente en todo lo relacionado con cosmética, perfumería y belleza en el país, dando un ejemplo de buenas prácticas empresariales, de cooperación y entendimiento entre quienes conforman la industria, los entes gubernamentales y los consumidores, entregando credibilidad y confianza a la sociedad en su conjunto.

Name: SFA ARGE ve ÖZEL SAĞLIK HİZMETLERİ TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description:
Birimimiz 1992 yılından beri özel sağlık hizmetleri faaliyette olan SFA bünyesinde tıbbi cihaz,  kozmetik ve temizlik kimyasalları ( Krem, Şampuan, Masaj Yağları, Temizlik Malzemeleri vb.) üretimi yapan ve yeni ürünlerin araştırılıp geliştirilmesi, firmalara danışmanlık hizmetleri ( Formül, Dermatolojik ve Etkinlik Test Çalışmaları ) ve üretim destekleri konularında doktor, eczacı, uzman kozmetolog ve kimyagerlerden oluşan 5 bilim insanıyla beraber 2016 yılında faaliyet göstermeye devam etmeye karar vermiştir.

Amacımız ürün ve hizmetlerimizin kalitesi, müşterilerimizin istek ve beklentilerini tam anlamıyla karşılayan düzeyde olmasını ve kesin bir güvenle kullanımını sağlamaktır. SFA bu politika doğrultusunda, Kalite, Çevre Yönetimi ile  İş Sağlığı ve Güvenliği Yönetim Sistemleri şartlarına eksiksiz uymaktadır.

Bünyesinde görev yapan 5 bilim insanıyla birlikte, ÇEYREK ASRI aşkın süredir sahip olduğu sağlık hizmetleri tecrübesini, 2016 yılında  akademik tecrübeyle harmanlayarak insan sağlığına zarar vermeyen, ekolojik olarak çevreyle dost, gereksiz kimyasal kullanımından kaçınan 150’ye yakın profesyonel ürün yelpazesi oluşturmuştur.

Birimimiz, bünyesinde kozmetik ve temizlik ürün analizleri de yapılmaktadır. Laboratuvarlarımızda kozmetik ürünlerin hammaddesi, ara ürün ve son ürünlerin mikrobiyolojik analizleri, stabilite testleri, Koruyucu Etkinlik Testleri (Challenge Test), fiziksel, kimyasal analizler gibi birçok analiz yapılmaktadır.

Name: PROBIONAT PROVENCE
Description:
Entreprise  familiale située à la Fare des oliviers, au cœur de la Provence .  
Probionat provence  experte en cosmétique naturelle et végétale œuvre depuis 27 années  pour proposer  à nos partenaires  des produits cosmétiques naturels. 
L'entreprise propose un service de sous traitance pour développer, fabriquer et conditionner de nouveaux produits cosmétiques.

Fort de son savoir faire, Probionat élabore de nombreuses galéniques (émulsions, gel, huiles gélifiées, lotions, baumes, produits capillaires ...) pour créer des gammes de produits sur-mesures et innovantes en conjuguant connaissance des actifs naturels et maîtrise des nouvelles technologies. 

Probionat vous accompagne lors du développement de votre produit jusqu'à son conditionnement, mais également tout au long de l'obtention des certifications cosmétiques écologiques et biologiques ( Ecocert, cosmos, qualité France, natrue..)  et  vous assiste dans la constitution des dossiers techniques et réglementaires.

Name: FERNDALE PHARMA
Description:
At Ferndale Pharma, we’re passionate about skin health, beauty, and wellbeing. Established in the UK in 2003, we are a member of the Ferndale Pharma Group, a family of healthcare companies, and the exclusive UK partner for Cantabria Labs.

We love what we do and share that love to enhance skin health, beauty and wellbeing. We ensure that science and clinical evidence are central to our work, so the communities we serve receive expertly researched and developed products that deliver proven results.

Ferndale Pharma focuses on three business areas, allowing us to support our customers across the UK and Ireland to the highest possible level:

Medical: Niche, topical medicine with a focus on treating skin pain. We partner with the NHS, private healthcare, and medical aesthetics clinics to improve patient health and quality of life.

Health & Beauty: Dermatological skincare expertly researched and developed to deliver proven results for dermatology specialists, their patients, skin enthusiasts, dermatological skincare retailers and skin-savvy consumers.

Aesthetics: Professional dermatological skincare expertly researched and developed to deliver proven results and enhance treatment outcomes, exclusively for aesthetic clinics and their patients.

Our vision is to be a leading and trusted partner in niche topical medical and dermatological skincare. Recognised by dermatology specialists, skin clinics, their patients, skin enthusiasts, dermatological skincare retailers and savvy consumers for providing effective, evidence-based solutions that enhance skin health, wellbeing, and quality of life.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: DCL Products
Description:
DCL Products, LLC is a vertically integrated beauty and personal care brand owner, incubator and manufacturer specializing in the formulation, development, and production of high-performance skincare, haircare, and suncare products.

Headquartered in East Haven, Connecticut, DCL Products operates a fully FDA-registered, cGMP-compliant manufacturing and fulfillment facility that serves as the innovation and production hub for its wholly owned brands:
	•	Dermatologic Cosmetic Laboratories (DCL Skincare) — dermatologist-developed, science-backed skincare sold worldwide through physicians, spas, and premium retailers.
	•	Milbar Labs — a premier contract manufacturing and development partner helping brands bring their ideas to life—from smart formulas to great packaging and solid manufacturing. Milbar Labs operates an FDA-registered facility and maintains a large library of proprietary formulations and intellectual property, covering OTC products including organic and inorganic sunscreens, dandruff, psoriasis, eczema, and acne treatments, as well as pet care, household, and toy industry applications. We care about our partners’ businesses and push the industry forward with clean-label formulas, planet-friendly packaging, and sustainable practices.
	•	WearSPF — a performance-driven suncare brand founded by Justin Thomas dedicated to making daily sun protection effortless, stylish, and effective.
	•	CalmOn — a next-generation wellness brand focused on skin-calming and mood-balancing topical solutions.

As a vertically integrated organization, DCL Products unites R&D innovation, manufacturing excellence, and operational scalability under one roof—ensuring consistent quality, speed-to-market, and cost efficiency for both proprietary and partner brands.

Specialties: Skincare & OTC Formulation • FDA/cGMP Manufacturing • Product Development • Stability & Micro Testing • Sunscreen Expertise • Packaging & Filling • Quality Assurance • Sustainable Operations

Name: GIZ COSMETICS
Description:
GIZ COSMETICS, headquartered in the Trakya Free Zone in Istanbul, Turkey, has been a prominent player in the decorative cosmetics industry since its establishment in 2006.
With its state-of-the-art facilities spanning 4,500 sqm, GIZ boasts a dedicated team of professionals and an impressive annual production capacity of 45 million items.

Driven by a commitment to excellence, GIZ proudly exports its premium brands to over 56 countries, steadfastly expanding its global presence while upholding its core principle of offering "Beauty & Quality products at an accessible price point".

Name: THÉMAÉ Paris
Description:
THÉMAÉ is an independent French brand and a tea beauty expert. Born in April 2007, the brand draws its inspiration from the art and culture of tea.

Its name "THÉMAÉ" comes from the  Japanese, meaning "the various phases in preparing and presenting the tea ceremony."

The beneficial virtues of tea influence the body and mind as well as inner beauty... THÉMAÉ's philosophy relies on this original double approach, which combines treatment efficacy with deep wellness.

THÉMAÉ symbolizes a world of refinement, beauty and wellness, which is brought to life in a Spa situated between the Place des Victoires and the Louvre in Paris. It is reflected across a range of expert body and face treatments, as well as a line of natural cosmetics with the Complexe des 4 Thés (4 Teas Elixir) offering all the virtues of this millennia-old plant.

THÉMAÉ founder Guillaume Lefèvre draws on the experience of his travels and takes inspiration from the art and culture of tea and the refinement and delicate nature of its ceremony, reinterpreting them in totally unique treatment protocols and offering a line of natural cosmetic products imbued with all the benefits of tea.

Name: BALMID
Description:
We deliver a one stop shop private label 2.0 solution within beauty and accessories; from sourcing, product development and warehousing, to brand development and communications.

Our unique setup enable us to adapt to our partner’s specific needs, ranging from delivering one single unbranded product to developing a full scale beauty brand.

PRIVATE LABEL 2.0
Private label should not be ”cheap products with loveless design". We believe its ambition always should be to take on the market leading brands, a brand strong enough to stand on its own legs. This applies no matter the price point and category, if you solely rely on the packaging design as the brand builder or have the full on branding and communication ambition. We should compete with all aspects of the product and brand, not just the price which is a short term solution to win people over.

We believe that the  beauty and accessories industry very much is signified by “wear and tear” and is in need of great change to become smarter and more sustainable. However, we can’t do this on our own over night, but through incremental steps we promise to, step-by-step, push all our stakeholders (resellers, producers & consumers, creatives, logistical partners) to take steps into a more sustainable behavior, including production methods, logistics, strategies, design, packaging, material and more.

The brand founder, an enthusiast of flowers, herbs and traditional culture, wanted to create a cosmetic brand that inherits Chinese traditional arts and culture, with makeup products as the carrier of stories and inspirations of Eastern beauty.

After working in the beauty industry for years, the founding team was inspired by the long-standing Chinese beauty culture after researching on historical documents and books - as early as thousands of years ago, Chinese people used various natural ingredients including flowers and herbs to decorate their faces in traditional formulas.

Connecting the ancient and the modern, the team adopts innovative technology to rejuvenate traditional beauty formulas, and brings modern take on beauty traditions and aesthetics.

SkinPhD also boasts a full beauty compliment that includes hair and nails.

SkinPhD believes in natural beauty from the inside out, with less time consuming routines, overpriced products, and retail gimmicks.

Laboratoire Français fondé par un dermatologue spécialisé dans l'hyperpigmentation et le vieillissement cutané, DermEden propose des traitements médicaux  à usage professionnel, mais aussi des Soins Medi-esthétiques destinés à un usage quotidien à domicile. Name: ouate-paris
Description:
« Enfant déjà, ma mère m’initiait aux secrets des soins pour une peau saine, nettoyée, nourrie et protégée. Devenue maman à mon tour, je me suis demandée comment protéger la peau des enfants aujourd’hui, dans un environnement devenu agressif et pollué ? Plusieurs dermatologues et pharmaciens m’ont appris que, entre 4 et 11 ans, la peau est particulièrement vulnérable car elle est encore en développement. Confrontée au refus de mes enfants de continuer à utiliser des produits pour bébés qui ne leur correspondaient plus, j’hésitais à leur appliquer les formules pour adolescents, ou pire encore, celles pour adultes, trop concentrées.
Pour me convaincre, les produits que je recherchais devaient avoir des formules naturelles, hypoallergéniques et testées dermatologiquement, en un mot, rassurantes. Ils devaient surtout plaire à mes enfants, toujours en recherche d’expériences ludiques, et avoir une ergonomie d’usage adaptée à leurs différents âges. Enfin, ils devaient obtenir la caution du corps médical. Bizarrement, aucun produit sur le marché ne semblait correspondre à mes attentes. J’ai finalement décidé de réunir autour de moi une équipe de spécialistes pour mettre au point ce que je considère comme la seule gamme de produits de soins spécifiquement conçue pour les enfants de 4 à 11 ans.
C’est ainsi qu’est née OUATE. »


Astrid Mauduit, Fondatrice de OUATE
