This unique blend in our DNA allows us to create skin and hair care products that embrace the best of both worlds: the relentless innovation of the West and the timeless wisdom of the East.

Our brands embody the spirit of the twin cities New York and Seoul: bold, innovative, and unapologetically honest. We craft only high quality skin and hair care formulations using widely researched ingredients from US & EU combined with time-honored ingredients from Korean rituals to give you only the most effective ingredients at the effective concentrations.

From New York, where stories unfold and dreams are realized, we find inspiration to push boundaries and set new standards. Simultaneously, we draw from the serene wisdom of Seoul, a city where the future seamlessly melds with a deep respect for the past.

Our belief is simple: your skin and hair deserve the truth, nothing less. Our commitment to honesty and quality means that our products are free from harmful chemicals and our formulations are not only clinically tested and dermatologist-approved but we also disclose every detail about our ingredients and their concentrations, ensuring you make informed choices.

This philosophy values transparency, integrity, and authenticity and at the core of our brand DNA, fuels our mission for the pursuit of truth and authenticity everything we do as a company. 

We're more than just a skin & hair brand—we're a movement. Join us on our journey to redefine science with integrity. Together, we can make a real difference, one clean label product at a time.

Stawiamy na rozwój

Indigo Nails to nie tylko produkty wysokiej jakości – tworzymy niezwykłą społeczność, która zrzesza miłośników profesjonalnej stylizacji paznokci. Prowadzimy szkolenia w Polsce i na świecie, kursy online, zwiększamy konsumencką świadomość oraz kształcimy najlepszą kadrę stylistek oraz instruktorek.

Dzielimy się również wieloletnim doświadczeniem – w każdy czwartek na kanale YouTube Indigo Nails Polska publikujemy nowy odcinek VLOG-a z potężną dawką merytorycznej wiedzy i inspiracji.  We wtorki z kolei można nas usłyszeć w podcaście o tematyce biznesowej. Oprócz tego cyklicznie organizujemy darmowe Konferencje Indigo.

Instruktorki Indigo ustanowiły oficjalny rekord Polski, ponieważ otrzymały najwięcej nagród na Mistrzostwach Świata, Europy i Polski w branży kosmetycznej.

Aktualnie współpracujemy z ponad siedemdziesięcioma salonami firmowymi, a nasza sieć dystrybucji nieustannie się rozrasta. Indigo gości w przeszło czterdziestu krajach – między innymi w Niemczech, Hiszpanii, Francji czy Wielkiej Brytanii.

Name: SeventyOne Percent
Description: SeventyOne Percent was born from two surfer friends, who in order to meet sun and ocean lover's expectations decided to develop sun care formulations respecting marine ecosystems and protecting the coral; this by favoring mineral filters and creating products without nanoparticles, alcohol, silicones, sulfates, paraben, phenoxyethanol or petrochemical derivates. We also use recycled packaging and don't test in animals. 100% made in France.

Name: Institut Dermed Clinical Skincare
Description:
Founded in 1989 by Master Esthetician Lyn Ross, L.M.E., Institut’ DERMed is a pioneer in clinical skincare, renowned for combining innovation, education, and results-driven solutions. Headquartered in Atlanta, the company encompasses a premier MediClinical Spa, a professional-grade cosmeceutical product line, and the nationally accredited Institut’ DERMed College of Advanced Aesthetics.

Institut’ DERMed Professional Skincare, launched in 1994, is formulated for licensed skincare professionals and is available exclusively at the Institut’ DERMed Spa and through select spa partners worldwide. Since 1995, the College of Advanced Aesthetics has trained hundreds of estheticians, nurses, and physicians in advanced clinical techniques. Its flagship Five-Day MediClinical Spa Intensive course equips professionals with expertise in product selection, treatment protocols, and spa business growth strategies.

With a mission to deliver exceptional skincare results through clinical innovation and education, Institut’ DERMed empowers professionals to elevate their practice and achieve long-term success in the medical aesthetics industry.

Name: SWISS PERFECTION
Description:
The first brand to apply vegetal cellular extraction technology to cosmetics, Swiss Perfection with signature complex Cellular Active IRISA enjoys an unrivalled reputation for excellence, prestige and performance. Based on Cellular Active IRISA, all products are formulated and produced in Switzerland with only first quality ingredients and under the highest quality standards. They benefit from the internationally recognized “Made in Switzerland” label.
By applying cellular technology to its products, the company carries on the legacy of a pioneering Swiss family, with the goal to continuously provide the most advanced solutions in anti-aging skincare. With its unique and rich heritage, Swiss Perfection is at the forefront of cutting-edge skincare with high-end formulas offering visible results.

A Father
A Swiss philanthropist and owner of the best-known anti-aging clinic in the world, the father achieved international recognition with cellular research and developed the first cellular cosmetic line based on animal cells. 

A Son 
He worked relentlessly to build on the father’s findings by turning his quest to the kingdom of plants. By applying cellular technology to its products, the company carries on the legacy of a pioneering Swiss family, with the goal to continuously provide the most advanced solutions in anti-aging skincare. 

A strong promise
Behind the company, there is a strong promise of “Swissessence”, a value kept in all the selected ingredients, manufacture process and components that represent the heart of the brand.

Marca Barber hair scissors made of forged special steel, offer optimal ergonomics and long-lasting sharpness. The offset design of these hair scissors plus angled thumb eye relieves the arm, neck and shoulder muscles and ensures relaxed work. To cut perfect transitions or thin out hair fullness, choose one of our modeling scissors. Good to know: By regularly cleaning the cutting edges, adjusting the screw system and maintaining them with the right care oil, your Marca Barber hair scissors will keep their smooth operation, stay sharp and last longer.

Today, Parley Cosmetics by Khyber Chemical (Pvt) Ltd. is firmly established as a market leader with an extensive product portfolio that not only enhances the personality of its consumers but also integrates seamlessly into their daily beauty routines.

Name: JiViSa Wellness
Description:
We were done with surface-level solutions. Skin troubles, low energy, restless nights - too many quick fixes, not enough real results.  So, we created JiViSa - a clean skincare and wellness product brand with 360° solutions for real life’s real issues.

Our mission? Simple.

We blend ancient Ayurvedic wisdom with modern science, offering daily rituals - from what you consume to what you apply. Skincare & Wellness that works from the inside out, because real solutions stick.

Name: Mylène
Description:
Sinds 1965 is Mylène een prominente speler in de Belgische beauty- en lifestylemarkt. Het merk onderscheidt zich door hoogwaardige lokale productie in België, populaire Mylène-party's en persoonlijk advies van gepassioneerde Mylène consulenten. Mylène werkt met een omnichannel model, waarbij producten via homeparty's en persoonlijke webshops van consulenten worden verkocht. Het merk is opgebouwd door vrouwen, voor vrouwen, die weten wat goed werkt en belangrijk is. Mylène staat voor dagelijks genieten, zowel in huis als op de huid, en brengt mensen samen met een verhaal dat de zintuigen prikkelt. Samen stralen we met Mylène!
---
Depuis 1965, Mylène est un acteur majeur sur le marché belge de la beauté et du style de vie. La marque se distingue par sa production locale de haute qualité en Belgique, ses populaires Mylène-ateliers et les conseils personnalisés de conseillères Mylène passionnées. Mylène fonctionne selon un modèle omnicanal, où les produits sont vendus lors des ateliers à domicile et via les boutiques en ligne personnelles des conseillères. La marque a été créée par des femmes, pour les femmes, qui savent ce qui fonctionne et ce qui est important. Mylène représente le plaisir quotidien, que ce soit dans la maison ou sur la peau, et rassemble les gens autour d'une histoire qui éveille les sens. Ensemble, nous rayonnons avec Mylène !

Name: The Beauty Sleuth
Description:
My name is Kelley Quan and I am a beauty junkie / maven / artist / writer and generally obsessed with all things beauty related. My CV is long and winding, but the essence of my experience comes from working 20+ years in the beauty trenches, as a freelance makeup artist. I specialize in fashion and beauty advertising and editorial. Back in 2000, I co-founded and was Editor in Chief of a fashion and beauty magazine called ZOOZOOM.com, which garnered tons of awards and accolades during its 11 years online. I am Mom to Rhys and Logan, and wife to David, all of whom have been called upon to be beauty product testers for many a test trail I have conducted over the years! ( and without complaint, I might add!) .

The objective of this site is to supply other beauty mavens or those who are just plain beauty obsessed, with news, info and real world beauty experience. No fancy beauty speak, just authentic, striped down information that is really useful, to offer objective reviews that will help to make informed choices when buying that new must have product. Learn from other beauty and style professionals— how they got started and what keeps them loving the business. Check out runway trends and celebrity beauty focus to see what looks are coming your way each season, and a lot more!

Name: Pharma Cosmetics Laboratories Ltd.
Description:
Pharma Cosmetics Laboratories was founded in the 1980's and is since spearheading professional international cosmetics and skincare as a renowned innovator. Thriving on novel and visionary research, robust development processes, advanced manufacturing methods, and reliable marketing of top-notch brands and products, the company constantly explores new and exciting ways to take professional cosmetics and skincare to the next level.

Pharma Cosmetics believes in business collaborations, as we foster our relationships with business partners of different kinds – physicians and dermatologists, international aesthetics experts, beauty salons, spas, distributors, leading cosmetic companies, and see each of them as an essential partner for success.

Among Pharma Cosmetics' leading brands:
HL - is a cosmetics brand that predominantly focuses on facial and body skin solutions, while offering professional products for cosmetics and aesthetics experts alongside home products for home use.

Jean d’Estrées – A famous French historical Beauty company purchased in 2014, which represents the fusion of a rich tradition of know-how and an innovative aesthetic vision. A subtle alchemy of a sophisticated sensoriality, efficient formulas and exclusive massages, as well as expert makeup technics.

Neova – The first American cosmetics brand to connect between beauty and science, forever changing the way women and men cared for their skin, while offering groundbreaking formulas.


Enjoying a firm global presence isn’t enough. Pharma Cosmetics goes to extreme lengths to retain its unique position in the international market by driving ingenuity and innovation and providing its worldwide clientele with the best solutions. 

Pharma Cosmetics holds ISO 9001:2008 and ISO 22716:2007 certifications.

Name: Peter Greven Physioderm GmbH

𝗣𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗚𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗣𝗵𝘆𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗺: Your Experts in Professional Skin Care Solutions

Peter Greven Physioderm (PGP) is a leading provider of high-quality skin protection, skin cleansing, skincare, and hand hygiene products for professional use. Our mission is clear: to protect and care for the health and safety of workers' skin in industries, trades, construction, and other demanding environments.

Thanks to our intensive research and development, we offer innovative and sustainable solutions tailored specifically to the needs of the workforce. Whether handling hazardous substances, dealing with intense contamination, or facing high levels of skin stress, our products ensure optimal protection, contributing to safety and well-being in the workplace.

In addition to our high product quality, our customers appreciate our comprehensive range of services: from professional consultation to individualized skin care planning.

Peter Greven Physioderm – Protection and care for hard-working skin in challenging environments.

Description:
A Classy Brands é uma empresa brasileira, que atua na gestão de marcas do segmento de Higiene Pessoal, Perfumaria e Cosméticos.

Name: DSG International (Thailand) PLC
Description:
DSG International (Thailand) PLC was established on 20 May 1994, and has now become a subsidiary of Unicharm Corporation Japan. The Company specializes in the manufacture of disposable diapers for both babies and adult incontinence, aiming to provide babies and senior citizens with products which gently support their body and mind so they can fulfill their dreams.

The baby disposable diapers are branded under the brand name of “BabyLove”, whilst the adult disposable diapers are under the brand name of “Certainty”.

To commemorate DSG’s 30th anniversary, we introduced the DSG Ring as our new corporate symbol. This design features two interconnected forms within a ring, symbolizing the dynamic and nurturing bond between a caregiver and a care-receiver, such as a parent and child or a caregiver and the person they care for.

The DSG Ring embodies our corporate mission within the Unicharm family: to realize a cohesive society where people coexist peacefully with the global environment. This symbol reflects our commitment to a world where the strength found in tenderness is appreciated by everyone, regardless of generation or gender.

The three colors of the DSG Ring also have important meanings:
- Blue represents the technology and trust to offer science for daily life
- Gray represents the balance and practicality of daily life
- Yellow represents the energy and brightness of daily life
- White represents solving social issues through business and succeed the wealthy life to the next generation

Through the DSG Ring, we express all these values and aspirations.

Name: BeautyScale
Description:
BeautyScale is the international sales engine behind high-potential beauty brands.

Founded in 2023 by the co-founders of Lili Margo (distributed in over 40 countries), BeautyScale operates globally from the U.S. and supports 20 brands in  skincare, fragrance, makeup, and beauty-related food across 50+ markets.

We specialize in turning brand potential into export performance by connecting strong, structured brands with the right distributors and retailers.

With over 15 years of experience in global beauty distribution, we now manage a portfolio generating over €50M in combined annual revenue. 

These are complementary brands with clear international ambitions and solid operational capacity. Many have already entered key markets, signed with leading retail groups, and built local presence and credibility. 

Our role is to accelerate that momentum by securing the right partners in the right countries, with a method that delivers.

For distribution and retail partners, we offer a clear, professional, and efficient process. Each brand comes with full commercial documentation: pricing, product details, regulatory files, and marketing assets. Our team manages all exchanges quickly and smoothly, from offer to onboarding.

We handle offers, samples, negotiations, and launch planning, so you can focus on commercial growth not operational complexity.

If you’re looking to expand your portfolio with credible, scalable brands that are ready to launch, we’d be happy to connect. We’re always looking to build strong partnerships in the right markets.

Name: Nurederm
Description:
Nurederm Kozmetik, konularında sektörün başarılı ekip liderlerinin bir araya gelmesiyle 2011 yılında kurulmuştur. Tüm dünyadan seçkin markaların Türkiye tek yetkili distiribütörlüğünü yapmaktadır. Deneyimlerini ve bilgilerini paylaşmayı seven sinerjik ekibiyle, kozmesötik ve minimal invaziv ürünlerin ithalatı alanında faaliyet göstermektedir. Yurtdışından ithal ettiği geniş ürün yelpazesi ile hastane, hekim, muayenehane, güzellik salonu kanalında çalışmaktadır. Bilimsel kökenli yeni yaklaşımları yakından takip ederek, Türkiye’yi yeniliklerle buluşturmuş, kaliteli hizmet ve istikrar anlayışını benimsemiş, eğitim odaklı bir şirket olarak hizmet vermektedir. Yurtiçi ve yurtdışı eğitimler, lansmanlar, workshoplar ve kongrelerle desteklediği iş ortaklarına ürün bilgisi konusunda üst düzey hizmet anlayışı ile ilerlemeyi sürdürmektedir.

-

Nurederm Kozmetik was founded in 2011 by a team of successful industry leaders and serves as the exclusive authorized distributor of globally renowned premium brands in Turkey. Specializing in the import of cosmeceutical and minimally invasive products, the company operates with a harmonious team that values sharing knowledge and experience.

With a diverse portfolio of product lines, Nurederm continues its operations across hospitals, physicians, private clinics, and beauty salons. By closely following science-based innovations, the company aims to introduce Turkey to the latest technologies while distinguishing itself in the industry through its commitment to quality service, consistency, and education-focused approach. Through domestic and international training programs, promotions, workshops, and congresses, Nurederm supports its business partners by providing top-level expertise in product knowledge and application processes.

Name: Lofta
Description:
Living with sleep-disordered breathing is challenging. Treating it shouldn’t be. That’s why we created Lofta. 

Driven by a desire to streamline a needlessly complex experience, we set out to un-complicate the process. Gone are the obstacles to relief: the frustrating maze of insurance, the arduous overnights at the sleep lab, the lack of support, and the clinical complexity that compounds an already exhausting problem. 
 
Lofta clears the path to breathing easier with expert guidance at every step, from diagnosis to treatment. Our personalized support includes the necessary screening tools, testing kits, and supplies, all accessible in one place—home.

Better sleep can change your life. And it’s never been easier.

Name: Intelcare
Description:
Depuis sa création, IntelCare est dédiée à la cosmétique bio exclusivement à base d'actifs naturels. Consciente des besoins de ses consommateurs, trop souvent soumis au stress et à ses contraintes quotidiennes, IntelCare a conçu des cosmétiques plus authentiques, source de plaisir et de bien-être pour se détendre et retrouver une vie saine. Chez Intelcare, nous sommes convaincus des bienfaits du bio et du naturel pour notre santé et notre environnement et nous nous acharnons de le rendre accessible au plus grand nombre des consommateurs.

Notre mission réside dans notre passion et notre engagement à ne développer que des produits cosmétiques sains et naturels. Nos produits ne contiennent pas de parabènes, de silicone, de sulfites ni aucun produit nocif pour la peau. Nos produits ne sont pas testés sur les animaux.

Notre stratégie de développement est axée sur le principe du développement durable et de la protection de la nature. Consciente de la fragilité de ce trésor inestimable, l'entreprise utilise des ingrédients issus de sources renouvelables, suit les procédures de production biologique pour offrir à ses clients des lignes de produits biologiques naturels certifiés Ecocert.

Utilisée depuis des siècles par les femmes berbères du sud du Maroc, l’huile d’argan est un véritable trésor pour la peau, les cheveux et les ongles. Notre huile d’argan dont nous assurons l’extraction nous même est pure, bio et équitable et nos produits en contiennent une dose maximale ainsi que des ingrédients actifs les plus bénéfiques pour la peau. Alors que l'arganier est aujourd'hui très menacé par le phénomène de la désertification qui touche l'Afrique, la réhabilitation de la forêt d'Argan et la récupération de ses produits peuvent lutter contre son extinction. IntelCare contribue ainsi à la préservation de l'arganier de la vallée du Souss au Maroc tout en vous offrant une huile exceptionnelle, obtenue par broyage des graines d'Argan et extraction par première pression à froid.

Name: Marezo
Description:
Marezo nace de la necesidad personal de cuidar el cabello con productos orgánicos libres de químicos, es por ello que estudiando y aprendiendo de los productos orgánicos y naturales se creo la primera formula de shampoo extra crecimiento en Agosto del 2020 , usando por más de un año la formula personalizada  con ingredientes de la mejor calidad, se toma la decisión de sacarlo al mercado en Octubre 2021, siendo bien recibido tanto por hombres y mujeres, que compartían la misma necesidad de cuidar cabellera.



Ya en este mundo tan maravilloso de la cosmética natural, crece la curiosidad por crear nuevas formulas para hacer crecer la línea del cuidado del cabello y realizar una nueva línea para el cuidado de la piel, contando por el momento con 20 productos Marezo ya en el mercado y mas de 15 productos nuevos en formulación y laboratorio.

Nuestras fórmulas son libres de conservantes cancerígenos, sulfatos, parabenos, perfumes sintéticos y derivados del plástico y petróleo. 

Ahora somos una empresa 100% mexicana enfocada en el desarrollo de la marca y nos esforzamos encarecidamente en el bienestar de nuestros clientes, queremos ver sus cabelleras y caritas hermosas!

Este proyecto empezó a darse a conocer principalmente en nuevo León México,  ahora estamos en toda la republica Mexicana, Estados Unidos y es liderado por mujeres emprendedoras

DEJATE QUERER 
 Tu belleza exterior salta a la vista: permite que  en Marezo nos encarguemos de sacar tu belleza interior . 

¿Por qué consumir Marezo? 
Por que todos nuestros productos son hechos  con mucho amor y cariño especialmente para ti.

Name: A-Frame Brands

A-Frame was founded to create great brands that meet the needs of today and tomorrow's most valuable customers. We thrive when we can work closely with our partners to deliver best in class branded products that allow them to better serve their fans, customers, passengers, or guests. As a team we put our hearts into everything we do, and we strive to prove everyday that we can do well and do good at the same time.

Description:
PLANTAS came into existence to fulfill Mrs. Madhumeeta Dhar & Mr. Gautam Dhar’s dream of bringing in this world truly pure and world-class certified organic personal care products for making a meaningful difference in the lives of millions globally by redefining the concept of eternal beauty and bliss. This journey began way back in 2015 and has now finally blossomed into an attractive flower with invaluable contributions from all the core team members who joined hands at various stages believing in the same philosophy and working towards a common goal.

Mr. Gautam Dhar, the founder of PLANTAS INNOVATIONS (P) LTD is innovative and envisioned thinker with broad-based expertise in Sales, Marketing, Operations, Finance, Manufacturing & Business Development with global exposure. A University of Liverpool, U.K. qualified “Thought Leader” with proven ability to quickly analyze key business drivers and develop strategies to grow and accomplish targeted Top & Bottom line objectives, create new business dimensions, desired net worth, wealth, and shareholders' value.

Name: Rojukiss International PLC. [KISS]
Description: The company is currently active in the new development, contract manufacturing, and distribution of all three product categories: skincare, color cosmetics, and hair color, which are sold in Thailand and many other countries in ASEAN such as Indonesia, Philippines, Vietnam, Laos, Cambodia, etc. And the company has invested in a company engaged in the production and packaging of medicines, medical supplies, and medical equipment to enter the health business in full accordance with the mission and vision of the company, aiming to be Asia’s future beauty and wellness leader.

Name: Attn: Grace
Description: Attn: Grace is a Certified B Corp. creating a new standard of care for urinary incontinence. We design higher-performing, more sustainable products that support better health and well-being for the 1-in-2 women navigating life with bladder leaks.

Name: Provendi Laboratoire
Description:
Provendi Laboratoire was created in Haute-Savoie in 1950 by a Franco-Swiss industrialist. For several decades, the company only produced one kind of soap, familiar to all French schoolchildren: the rotating yellow soap dispenser. 

Over the past 20 years, Provendi has developed exceptional know-how in the production of traditional liquid soaps (Marseille, Aleppo, Black Soap, etc.). The plant oils are still prepared in cauldrons under the watchful eye of the Master Soapmaker...

The company has unique expertise in saponification and dilution operations, as well as in laboratory research. Monitoring the saponification process is a complex affair requiring a great deal of experience – controlling the temperature, observing the aspect of the soap paste being formed, recording the odours, tasting the paste, etc.

Name: Skinnovation
Description:
We at Skinnovation combine 10 years of experience in the medical aesthetic industry with new technologies and insights to bring Innovative Aesthetic Solutions. 

With the guidance of our advisory board, we select products and devices that offer clinically proven efficacy, patients' safety with the best possible investment for plastic surgeons, dermatologists and aesthetic practitioners in the United Arab Emirates. 

Our success is predicated upon the satisfaction of our suppliers, clients and their customers.

Name: Laboratoire Natiyé
Description:
Laboratoire Natiyé créé et développe des produits de soin bien-être naturels et éco-responsables pour le bien être au quotidien, spécialisé dans la prise en charge des douleurs musculaires et articulaires, à base de plantes de la Caraïbe.

Découvrir l'essence du Laboratoire Natiyé et ses soins bien-être naturels sur : 
laboratoire-natiye.fr

Name: mySmilist
Description:
'mySmilist' is on a mission to help India Smile Better and Smile More. 

We're a consumer-focused cosmetic dentistry brand that helps its consumers enhance their smile with smilist invisible aligners. 

Founded in 2021, 'mySmilist' provides Smile Cosmetics, produced using advanced German technology & 3D dental printers to achieve high level of precision under the supervision of expert orthodontics. Led by a team of expert dentists, we brings the highest level of care and guidance to our customers providing superior quality invisible aligner treatment service. 

When you choose us, you choose convenience of dentist-at-home and video consultation; latest technology that tracks your progress and ensures better assessment; best-in-class innovations for smile 
enhancements; and expert ‘smilist’ dentists with over 30 years of experience.
It’s why we’re India’s 1st Smile Enhancement brand. 

'mySmilist' operates currently in Mumbai and Pune only, shall soon expand with PAN India presence.

Name: Parentex
Description:
A Parentex Indústria e Comércio Ltda, fundada em 1998,  localizada em Tijucas/SC. Com mais de 22 anos de experiência, produzimos produtos de higiene pessoal oferecendo uma linha completa de fraldas descartáveis infantis e geriátricas, toalhas e lenços umedecidos, talcos, e cosméticos. Nas marcas Anjinho, Mundo Mágico, linha infantil. E as marcas EU SOU e Seven, linha adulta. 

Inovamos constantemente em novas tecnologias. Aprimorando o processo produtivo e o  desenvolvimento de produtos de qualidade , utilizando as melhores matérias primas, com valores justos. 

A Parentex se consolida no mercado pela qualidade dos seus produtos, com a sétima premiação consecutiva na categoria fornecedores mais admirados pela ACATS ( Associação Catarinense de Supermercados).

Com larga experiência em terceirização de produtos, criamos, registramos  e desenvolvemos produtos com sua marca. 

Parentex, uma empresa que acompanha todas as fases da suas vida.

Name: Frosini Cosméticos
Description:
Desde de 2002 a Frosini vem se fortalecendo no mercado de cosméticos com produtos e serviços de terceirização no segmento da beleza.

A Frosini se consolidou e hoje conta com 11 marcas em seu portfólio, sempre valorizando a sua missão de fabricar cosméticos de qualidade, que superem as expectativas do consumidor sem agredir a Natureza, ou afetar os animais.

Reunimos em nosso catalogo produtos desenvolvidos com matéria-prima natural de altíssima qualidade, entregando não apenas resultados que saltam aos olhos, como também rendimento para profissionais da beleza que buscam economia e resultado para suas clientes.

Name: Mediderma Professional Care
Description:
Mediderma manufactures, distributes and sells health and aesthetic products for professional use with the highest standards.

Mediderma was founded 30 years ago by Dr Gabriel Serrano, who also founded Sesderma Laboratories, one of the most renowned international skin care laboratories dedicated to develop high quality, effective and safe skin care products and present in more than 90 countries. 

Mediderma was the first company in the world to introduce a complete line of chemical peels (GlicoPeel, MelasPeel) into the medical and professional market almost three decades ago. Today Mediderma products are recognized as very effective and indicated for almost any skin type, genders, age or problem. The efficacy of Mediderma products and peel treatment protocols are supported by extensive clinical trials, and the company’s collaboration with industry leading practitioners from around the globe.

Because of the association between Mediderma and Sesderma laboratories, both companies share the exercise of keeping continuously “listening to your skin”. Mediderma vision is to improve people’s lives and health by promoting a healthy and beauty skin. Our values are related to our wisdom (know how), humanity (people above all) and generosity.

Mediderma treatments and products are available exclusively through licensed skin health professionals.

Name: Advanced Dispersed Particles
Description:
ADParticles is a technology-based company established in 2011, spin-off of the Spanish National Research Council (CSIC, the main public institution dedicated to research in Spain and the third largest in Europe). 

ADParticles Technology consists of a revolutionary method, based on the dry dispersion of nanoparticles, designed to obtain products (composites with hierarchical structures) with applications in several areas (cosmetic, magnets, polymer & cement additives, catalysis, etc). ADParticles Technology maximizes the effectiveness of the nanoparticles by means of its disaggregation, promoting and enhancing surface interactions and effects.

ADParticles & Sun Care: ADPCosmetics
ADParticles has developed EnhanceU, a range of non-nanometric mineral UV filters. EnhanceU innovative cosmetic ingredients are aimed at premium, pharma and natural channels.

 ADVANTAGES:
• NANO-FREE: EnhanceU particles’ size is above 100 nm.  NO “nano” labelling required, after the ingredient name on the packaging. 
• SAFETY: when compared to potential effects of nanoparticles (nanometric UV filters) on health and environment, related to toxicity, inhalation risks and stability. 
• QUALITY: EnhanceU filters exhibit a very good balanced protection in the UVB and UVA region and are advised to achieve SPF30 and SPF50 formulations.
• PHOTOSTABILITY: It´s formula make it very stable avoiding the degradation of the formula. 
• ECOCERT LABELLING: The use of EnhanceU allows to obtain ECOCERT formulas, a very valuable characteristic and fashionable tendency in the market.
• COLOR: EnhanceU-T Light, Medium and Warm UV filters combine 2 functionalities, protection and color, in an only ingredient. 

ADPCosmetics launches EffectiveU-T: an extra non-nanometric mineral UV filter, designed to provide an important protection in UVA region.
This new ingredient provides an excellent UVA/UVB balance and may be used in combination or with boosters for higher SPF formulas.

W ORGANIQUE produkujemy kosmetyki do pielęgnacji twarzy i ciała

 Niepowtarzalne na rynku zapachy, konsystencje, a także działanie naszych kosmetyków sprawiają, że zwykłe czynności zamieniają się w piękne chwile 

 W ORGANIQUE wierzymy, że naturalne piękno....jest w TOBIE

Description:
ECLAE est une marque de soins anti-âge à effet bonne mine à base d’Algue Rose Bio de Camargue. C'est l'Anti-âge dans tout son éclat.

Name: BIOLOGIQUE RECHERCHE AMBASSADE
Description:
We are pleased to introduce Biologique Recherches very first U.S. Flagship store,
The Ambassade de la Beauté.
Located in West Palm Beach, FL.
Our full-service spa will offer our full range of face, body and hair products as well as customized treatments.

A GLOBAL APPROACH TO SKINCARE

The Biologique Recherche Methology has a reputation for astounding effectiveness based on a clinical approach to beauty care using pure, concentrated and raw ingredients, as well as innovative protocols and procedures.

The success obtained through our targeted personalized treatments, even on especially unbalanced SKIN INSTANTS, is attributable to this unique methodology based on three stages: each treatment starts with an assessment stage followed by an initialization stage which will prepare the skin for the treatment stage.

THE ART
BEHIND OUR PRODUCTS

An introduction to Biologique Recherche

Authenticity and harmony is the spirit and essence behind Biologique Recherche skin care products which all boast the following specific characteristics:

︎ High concentrations (over 20% in most products) of botanical, marine and biological extracts.

︎ No artificial fragrances to preserve the integrity of the formulas and lower the chance of allergic reactions.

︎ Cold made formulations to preserve the structure of active ingredients.

︎ Highest quality of active ingredients available.

Name: Aimtru Ltd.
Description: At Aimtru we create truly authentic consumer goods that are performance focused and science led, using the power of design, data, formulation innovation and highly dynamic marketing to enrich brand appeal and to drive sustainable growth. As the company behind ManCave, we've established expertise in developing premium personal care products with natural ingredients that resonate with conscious consumers. Our strategic approach combines market insights, brand development, and multi-channel distribution to build lasting consumer connections.

Name: Uppeel
Description: Uppeel Consumer Care Pvt. Ltd. is launching a new Beauty & Wellness brand, ‘Uppeel’. The brand has secured its pre-seed funding in March 2024, and has formulations backed by one of India’s largest fragrances & flavours manufacturers. The brand is work in progress, and is slated to launch in July 2024.

Name: Sienna Naturals
Description:
Wash day makes up H.A.P.I. 

H = Hydrating
A = Alimentary (nourishing)
P = pH-balanced
I = Ingredients 

Sienna Naturals uses hydrating, plant-based ingredients that nourish from the root to tip, because a H.A.P.I scalp makes for happy hair. Rooted in nature, proven by science.

Name: Cadence OTC
Description: Cadence OTC is on a mission to increase over-the-counter (OTC) access to safe, effective, affordable contraceptives for everyone everywhere. We own the rights to three of the most popular oral contraceptive formulations, and we’re in the process of moving the birth control pill over-the-counter, so everyone can buy it with without a prescription or insurance.  We are also bringing OTC emergency contraceptives to convenience stores nationwide, especially in healthcare deserts. The company was founded by renowned reproductive health experts and experienced healthcare entrepreneurs, and supported by a remarkable group of investors who care deeply about making birth control equally accessible to all people.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BLK/OPL
Description: For over 25 years, Black Opal has been dedicated to offering high-quality, high-performance beauty and skincare products specifically designed for women of color. Proudly keeping all products under $20, we ensure that beauty is accessible to everyone. In 2019, Black Opal was acquired by Desiree Rogers and Cheryl Mayberry McKissack, becoming Black-owned and reinforcing our commitment to inclusivity and excellence. At Black Opal, we believe beauty should be real, smart, fun, and easy. Our mission is to make beauty accessible to all by providing top-tier products that are both affordable and effective. Join us on our journey to redefine beauty standards and celebrate diversity.

Name: Verona Products Professional
Description:
Verona Products Professional, established in 2003, is a Polish company in the beauty sector. We are 
a leading manufacturer of make-up cosmetics, face, skincare, hair colour and styling products as well as perfumes. Our portfolio includes, among others, such brands as Ingrid Cosmetics, Butterfly Collection, Vollare, Revia, Skin Up and Vittorio Bellucci.

Our brands have gained trust of customers not only on the Polish market but also in more than 60 countries around the world.

Thanks to our expertise, educational programmes and stable margins, we provide business partners 
with long-term development and profit, and enable consumers to create an individual image meeting their diverse needs.

Name: Reuzel
Description:
Reuzel. Spelled with a Z. Pronounced with a middle finger.

Like every good story, this one starts in an alley. With two men in love with barbering. Sotted in style. And drowning under the influences of rock ‘n roll, kustom culture and the working class ethic of Rotterdam.
Men on a mission

Leen and Bertus wanted to cut every man the perfect hairstyle, proper porkchop. And to provide a haven. A barbershop. A place men could trust the products and enjoy the company. Those classic styles and hot-towel shaves are still around. And the traditions that created them have kickstarted a bit of a riot.
Flash forward

Cut to the present day. Leen and Bertus have their name on a school, spreading the greasy gospel to people who need to perfect their craft. And they have their own line of products, too. Reuzel is here to make sure that as styles change, the attitude remains the same.
If you get it, you get it


And if you don’t, you never will. Doesn’t bother us. But for those people who are ready to sculpt a style, write a story, and be part of a legacy… Well, welcome to the family.

Name: Urban Veda Natural Skincare
Description: Urban Veda is a multi-award-winning Ayurvedic skincare brand, designed and created for tackling 21st century skin complaints. The four Urban Veda ranges (Purifying, Soothing, Reviving and Radiance) are naturally formulated to pollution-proof skin, leaving it less vulnerable to dehydration, dullness and stress. All products are made with Ayurvedic herbs, flowers and fruits along with clinically proven actives and antioxidants to help maintain skin’s natural balance. We believe what’s on the outside counts too, so we ensure that all of our packaging is recycled and/or recyclable, and all products are free from GM ingredients, parabens, SLS, animal-derived ingredients, microbeads and mineral oil.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratorios Magriña
Description:
Based in Barcelona, Laboratorios Magriña is a world-renowned family company founded in 1972 with great experience in the Development and Manufacturing of Private Label and Custom Skincare Products, from concept to market.

Experts in creating formulas and manufacturing high-quality and innovative cosmetic products.
We provide solutions to customers giving them support in all phases of the life cycle. This means innovative concepts and formulations with the aim of creating competitive, efficient and safe cosmetic products to meet the changing needs of our society. 

Our manufacturing facility uses the most advanced technology and state-of-the-art equipment. We are ISO 22.716 (GMP), ISO 9001 Certified, and we employ strict quality control procedures during the formulation, production and packaging process to ensure that all products meet the required quality standards.

Name: Alpha Labs Private Limited
Description:
Alpha Labs is a contract manufacturer for Aerosol, perfumer, personal and home care products. We offer formulation, manufacturing, filling & packaging services for full-range cosmetic products exclusively for third parties. Our expertise in the field of cosmetic chemistry and production allow us to provide unparalleled opportunities for contract manufacturing and private label branding.

Our mission has always been to develop and manufacture premium, innovative, and superior skincare and cosmetic products. We have accumulated an extensive offering of 500+ preformulated products, and can also offer high quality custom formulations. We offer skin, face, hair, and body care products and also offer EDT and aerosol products. Our extensive product offering range can cater to any business in the cosmetic, household and personal care industry. 

Alpha Labs has been at the forefront in undertaking our customers projects and turning their vision into strong brands. Our turnkey solutions guide clients through an intensive product to development journey from concept to implementation.

Our head office and IS 9001 certified production facility is located in Karachi, Pakistan. Our facilities are regularly audited for quality and efficiency, and we continually invest in new technology and people to achieve a market leading status.

Name: AirParfum
Description:
AirParfum offers a revolutionary solution to one of the biggest challenges faced by perfume consumers: olfactory fatigue, which makes it difficult to distinguish the nuances of different perfumes.

Using cutting-edge technology, AirParfum allows consumers to trial as many fragrances as they desire without saturating their nose. Our device faithfully reproduces the sillage of each scent and provides a “dry” olfactive experience that does not impregnate the skin or contaminate the air.

Description:

We always aim to come up with such revolutionizing products that can help you in becoming everything you want to be, reflecting your true potential and at the same time keep your skin healthy naturally.

With a focus to make all make-up products from the professional world easily available and accessible to common women around the world, we put our best efforts in manufacturing the best ever cosmetics to cater all make-up requirements and fulfil all purposes.

Name: Playhouse MD

We make children’s healthcare moments calmer, more cooperative, and playful.

For too long, “pediatric” has meant smaller versions of cold, clinical tools—designed for adults, not for children.

Playhouse MD believes care should be designed for who children are, emotionally and physically, from the very beginning.

By combining pediatric insight with thoughtful, playful design, we create beautifully engineered health tools that help reduce fear, build trust, and make everyday care routines easier for families.

This is children’s healthcare, reimagined.

Name: ALL GOOD SCENTS ADVISORY LLP
Description:
All Good Scents Advisory LLP is fragrance pioneer focused on transforming India’s emerging fragrance culture through specialized training, advisory services, and innovative fragrance solutions for brands. 

Leveraging upon the expertise of Rajiv Sheth : India’s first certified master perfumer, and fragrance pioneer, AGS offers small cohort certification courses that progressively expand your expertise with perfumes. 

The courses which are in partnership with the leading perfume training organization : Cinquieme Sens Paris, train you in the fine arts of 

- Fragrance Appreciation
- Fragrance Creation
- Fragrance Personalization

Leveraging over 20 years of experience as India’s first Master Perfumer, we aim to educate, guide, and collaborate with both emerging and established brands to bring fragrance to the forefront of lifestyle experiences.

In partnership with Cinquième Sens Paris, we offer exclusive perfumery training programs that span fragrance appreciation, creation, and personalization. Our tailored consulting services help brands develop distinctive fragrance identities, create bespoke product lines, and integrate scents into their branding strategy.
At All Good Scents Advisory LLP, we believe fragrance is not just an accessory, but an essential part of storytelling for brands. We work with companies looking to elevate their product offerings and provide individuals the tools to master the art of perfumery.

XanderGlasses are lightweight, comfortable smart glasses that accurately translate speech to text in real-time, displaying captions of in-person conversations.

Name: neoflo
Description:
Imaginez un monde où le stress n'est plus un obstacle, mais une opportunité. 

Un monde où vous pouvez débloquer facilement les pouvoirs de votre respiration. Bienvenue dans le monde de Neoflo!

Neoflo est une start-up à impact en santé qui a développé et breveté la première ceinture de respiration abdominale et de cohérence cardiaque pour retrouver sa sérénité, son énergie et un sommeil de qualité. 

Notre innovation guide la respiration en douceur par le sens du toucher, favorisant ainsi les pratiques de gestion du stress recommandées par 100% des thérapeutes : la cohérence cardiaque et la respiration abdominale. 

Notre solution intuitive, silencieuse et déconnectée offre aux utilisateurs le plaisir et les bénéfices de ces techniques de respiration sans effort de concentration.

Notre mission est claire:
Donner un nouveau souffle aux millions de stressés, d'anxieux et d'insomniaques.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ampko Enterprises Private Limited
Description:
At Ampko Enterprises, we’re building a men’s personal care company focused on clarity, quality and purpose. Every product is crafted with care, designed to work, built to last, and free from unnecessary complexity.

We’re currently gearing up to launch our first range of grooming products. The brand name and details will be shared soon, and we’re excited to finally bring this vision to life.

This is just the beginning of something built to stand the test of time.

Name: ARCAMED SERVICE
Description:
QUI SOMMES-NOUS ?
PROPOSE A SES CLIENTS UNE GAMME TRÈS LARGE, CONSTITUÉE DE PRODUITS CERTIFIES APPORTANT TOUTES LES GARANTIES DE QUALITÉ ET DE FIABILITÉ, UNE NOTION DE SERVICE (DISPONIBILITÉ, RÉACTIVITÉ, RAPIDITÉ), UNE GRANDE CONNAISSANCE DES ACTEURS DE FABRICATION ET UNE FORTE COMPÉTENCE TECHNIQUE AINSI QUE LE RESPECT DE LA RÉGLEMENTATION ET DES NORMES MAROCAINES ET INTERNATIONALES EN VIGUEUR.

Name: FARMEN International Cosmetics Distribution S.p.A.
Description:
La storia di Farmen è cominciata nel 1964.
Farmen è un’azienda moderna che crede nell’innovazione, investe nella ricerca e sa ascoltare i propri clienti. Una realtà all’avanguardia  con valori attuali, conosciuta ed apprezzata in tutto il mondo.
Uno dei nostri punti di forza è la capacità di gestire all’interno dell’azienda tutte le fasi della filiera: dall’idea iniziale alla selezione delle materie prime e dei principi attivi, fino alla produzione, spedizione e alla formazione dell’utilizzatore finale.
Soltanto così, controllando ogni passaggio in modo scrupoloso, possiamo davvero garantire la qualità e l’affidabilità di ciò che produciamo. Ogni nostro nuovo prodotto, insomma, costituisce il punto di arrivo di un percorso che ha una sola meta: LA SODDISFAZIONE DEL CLIENTE.
Noi, però, ogni volta che raggiungiamo un obiettivo, siamo già pronti a muoverci verso quello successivo. La ricerca, il continuo confronto con il mercato e con gli operatori, l’investimento nell’innovazione di tutte le fasi della produzione e il costante dialogo con i nostri clienti sono il segno della nostra volontà di spostare sempre un po’ più in là, sempre un po’ più in alto i nostri traguardi.
Da quando è nata, Farmen ha sempre perseguito un solo obiettivo: offrire ai professionisti dell’estetica e dello stile prodotti efficaci, affidabili e innovativi per ogni esigenza del loro lavoro.
Il risultato di questo impegno, si può apprezzare oggi nelle nostre tre linee di prodotto: Vitality’s, NEA-SPA e Fascinelle.

Bünyesinde 500'den fazla kişisel bakım markası ve 15.000'den fazla ürün bulunmaktadır. Fiyatlarımız, çalışanlarımızın bilgi birikimi, sunduğumuz hizmet kalitesi, hızlı aksiyon alabilmemiz, hızlı sorun çözebilmemiz ile sektörde yer alan rakiplerimizden ayrışmaktayız. Dünyaca ünlü markalar ile direkt olarak ya da Türkiye distribütörleri ile direkt olarak çalışmakta olduğumuzdan, satmakta olduğumuz ürünlerin orjinalliği ve güvenli satın alım bizim için en temel esaslardandır.

Name: Dehesia Cosmética Natural Ecológica
Description:
Ya hace casi 10 años que comenzamos a elaborar cosméticos naturales y hoy en día ya se ha convertido en una forma de vida que nos hace muy felices y que conjuga la alimentación sana con un cuidado saludable de la piel.
Logotipo de Dehesia Cosmética EcoNatural - Marca extremeña

Dehesia Cosmética Econatural surge de la necesidad de sacar a la luz todo el potencial terapéutico de las plantas de uno de los ecosistemas más importantes de la península ibérica, la DEHESA.

En este peculiar ecosistema que ocupa gran parte de España y Portugal, que deriva del bosque mediterráneo, crecen encinas, robles, castaños y una gran variedad de plantas medicinales y aromáticas excelentes para la producción sostenible de aceites esenciales y aceites vegetales de calidad que luego serán los ingredientes base de nuestros productos de salud y belleza ecológica.

Ingredientes naturales como el Aceite de Oliva Virgen Extra, el Aceite de emprendedora rural cosmetica natural ecologica extremaduraAlmendras Dulces, el Aceite de Semilla de Granada y plantas como el romero, el la caléndula, la manzanilla y el cantueso, entre otras muchas, nos abren una abanico de posibilidades terapéuticas que investigamos para poder ofrecer las mejores fórmulas cosméticas.

Dehesia se propone crear diferentes líneas de productos certificados ecológicos eficaces y cómodos para el uso diario para toda la familia basados en la cercanía de las materias primas. Pretendemos con esto promover la economía circular y el crecimiento rural sostenible favoreciendo el cuidado de nuestra piel de forma saludable sin ninguno de los tóxicos invisibles que fácilmente nos encontramos en los productos cosméticos.

La certificación ecológica de ACENE y bases que nos marcan desde el Estándar COSMOS Internacional suponen un plus de calidad que hemos querido aportar como valor de confianza hacia el consumidor y porque apostamos por procesos productivos sostenibles y honestos con el medio ambiente y con las personas.

Name: AUTEUR
Description:
AUTEUR is a German-engineered luxury skincare brand combining advanced biotechnology, potent actives, and sustainable design to deliver high-performance, anti-aging results and support long-term skin health and longevity.

Every formula is conceived as a masterpiece of active skincare- uniting biotechnology, medical-grade actives, and sustainably sourced natural extracts to help skin repair, renew, and thrive. Each product is created with a clear purpose: to deeply hydrate, reinforce the skin barrier, and renew at a cellular level, supporting lasting health, resilience, and radiance.

More than 100 high-active ingredients are employed across the collection, delivered through advanced systems such as encapsulated peptides, growth factors, bioavailable antioxidants, and skin-identical lipids. This precision engineering ensures visible, measurable results in skin longevity and anti-aging performance.

With an emphasis on sustainability, ECOCERT- and COSMOS-certified actives, carbon-neutral production, and a precision-crafted refill system reduce environmental impact without compromising on luxury. The signature borosilicate glass bottle features airless technology to preserve ingredient integrity, maintain optimal potency, and minimize waste.

The philosophy is ageless, timeless, and non-prescriptive, celebrating individuality over ideals. From advanced anti-aging serums to next-generation moisturizers, each formula is aesthetician-approved and engineered to deliver transformative results that endure.

Name: Coslab Tecnologia Cosmetica
Description:
COSLAB srl è un’azienda giovane e dinamica, fondata a Brescia nel 2002.
Gestita e diretta da cosmetologi di esperienza pluriennale a livello italiano ed internazionale.
COSLAB è In grado di formulare, sviluppare produrre e confezionare per conto terzi, prodotti cosmetici e dispositivi medici. Coslab è partner di prestigiose Aziende leader nei propri settori di appartenenza.
Professionalità, innovazione, qualità, affidabilità e tecnologia, sono le parole chiave che fanno di COSLAB un vero e proprio punto di riferimento nei settori cosmetico e dermofarmaceutico. 
Innovazione e Ricerca & Sviluppo rappresentano i cardini dell’attività aziendale e costituiscono una preziosa fonte di vantaggio competitivo. La gestione del prodotto è completata dall’ assistenza tecnico legislativa regolatoria e dalla collaborazione con riconosciuti Istituti di Ricerca e Università, per la valutazione del prodotto in materia di funzionalità, innocuità e biocompatibilità. 
COSLAB rappresenta un partner affidabile per la gestione di nuovi prodotti, in linea con la nuova Direttiva sui cosmetici 1223/2009.
COSLAB fornisce prodotti “su misura”, realizzati secondo precise tendenze di mercato ed in piena sintonia con le esigenze dei consumatori. Le tipologie di prodotti a disposizione sono emulsioni A/O, O/A, dispersioni, idroliti in base acquosa e idroalcolica, oleoliti, tensioliti, idrogel, lipogel, fanghi e prodotti termali. 
COSLAB è in grado di sviluppare e realizzare prodotti cosmetici naturali e biologici certificati secondo gli standard italiani ed europei.
COSLAB sviluppa e realizza Dispositivi Medici di classe I e II, per il trattamento della pelle e degli annessi cutanei.
Molteplici sono le possibilità di collaborazione che COSLAB offre, dalla lavorazione e/o confezionamento con materiali in conto lavoro, fino ad arrivare ad un servizio in “full service”.

Name: gh Gema Herrerías
Description:
Nuestra historia nace en la consulta de Gema Herrerías en A5 Farmacia, en Sevilla, donde su enfoque en la Dermofarmacia y su experiencia profesional la llevaron a detectar necesidades no cubiertas en el cuidado de la piel. Inspirada por estos retos, en 2017 desarrolló su primer producto: un aceite limpiador que marcó el inicio de una marca comprometida con la excelencia y la innovación.

Hoy, nuestra línea cuenta con más de 30 productos disponibles en 1.800 puntos de venta en toda España, exclusivamente en el canal farmacia. Nos hemos consolidado como un referente gracias a creaciones icónicas como gh Función Barrera cremagel, líder en ventas y pionero en establecer nuevas tendencias, nuestro galardonado gh 25 PÉPTIDOS-TH sérum, reconocido por su eficacia, o innovaciones como gh 2000 RETINAL-R, que introduce por primera vez los exosomas en un producto cosmético en el canal farmacia.

En gh Gema Herrerías aplicamos el exclusivo Método gh, una metodología que combina ciencia y personalización para ofrecer rutinas adaptadas al Código Piel único de cada persona. Y para quienes buscan rutinas avanzadas y resultados excepcionales, presentamos el enfoque Doble o Nada, diseñado para llevar el cuidado de la piel al siguiente nivel.

La calidad y la eficacia son pilares fundamentales en todo lo que hacemos. Por eso, contamos con laboratorio propio en Sevilla y apostamos firmemente por la innovación constante, invirtiendo en I+D+i y en estudios clínicos que avalan la eficacia de nuestras fórmulas. Este compromiso nos permite ofrecer soluciones avanzadas, científicamente respaldadas.

Name: BELLAME Beauty
Description:
BELLAME is a luxury beauty and wellness brand powered by science and built on community.

We create high-performance skincare, skincare-infused makeup, smart haircare, and nutritional beauty designed to deliver real results while elevating everyday rituals. Every formula is thoughtfully developed to support skin health, inner wellbeing, and a glow lived from the inside out.

At the heart of BELLAME is choice.

Some come simply to love exceptional, science-backed products.
Some choose to share what they love through flexible, link-based earning.
Some step forward to lead, mentor, and build long-term income through community.

All paths are honored. All belong.

Our philosophy is simple and intentional:
Luxury powered by science.
Income powered by choice.
Beauty powered by you.

BELLAME exists to empower through connection, confidence, and purpose-driven opportunity. This is not about hype or pressure. It is about building something meaningful, aligned, and lasting.

This is beauty that fits real life.
Growth that unfolds naturally.
A glow that is entirely your own.

This is BELLAME.

Name: Shaeri
Description:
Shaeri is a hair & scalp care brand. Since its launch in 2018, Shaeri has established itself as a key player in the French haircare industry, winning multiple prestigious beauty awards from leading French cosmetic institutions. Our formulations are recognized for their efficiency and ingredients, earning the trust of consumers and industry experts alike.

1. Super ingredient:  The Opuntia fruits, commonly known as cactus pears or prickly pear, have been suggested by the Food and Agriculture Organization to be a promising and strategic crop in regions suffering from lack of water.
2. Inclusivity: Shaeri products are more than just a beauty ritual—they embody the fusion of Mediterranean cultures, from Europe to Africa and the Middle East, blending traditions, expertise, and nature.
3. Creativity: We have created signature and niche fragrance for our products, designed in Grasse, world capital of perfume. Our packaging and art direction are unique bringing some chic "joie de vivre" in the consumer bathroom.
4. Holistic approach: We create unique consumer experience at the point of sale and online through diagnosis, scalp massage, workshops & talks with famous hairdressers and dermatologists or intellectuals

Awards:

Best brand in haircare category from the leading French magazine, Cosmetique Mag in 2019, 2021 & 2022

Name: Enzym Kosmetyki
Description:
Enzym Kosmetyki Sp. z o. o. to działająca od ponad trzydziestu lat firma zajmująca się dystrybucją surowców kosmetycznych.
Na przestrzeni lat portfolio oferowanych surowców zostało znacznie rozszerzone, w szczególności o azjatyckie pigmenty i wypełniacze do kosmetyki kolorowej, filtry UV oraz mikrokapsułkowane surowce aktywne z USA. W portfolio firmy znajdują się także surowce podstawowe, stosowane w produkcji praktycznie każdego kosmetyku m.in. witaminy, ekstrakty, oleje naturalne, masła i woski oraz biofermenty.

Naszym głównym dostawcą jest firma Sharon Personal Care by Eternis, która w swoim portfolio posiada szeroką gamę składników aktywnych, łagodnych surfaktantów, emulgatorów oraz gotowych baz.

W 2024 nawiązaliśmy współpracę z firmą Vogele z Niemiec, która w swojej ofercie posiada olejki eteryczne i kompozycje zapachowe oraz z firmą Green Bio Tech, która oferuje mieszanki ekstraktów roślinnych, o udowodnionym badaniami działaniu.
Obecnie rozpoczynamy współpracę z producentem Kale Care z Turcji, dzięki któremu nasze portfolio zostanie poszerzone o mieszaniny surfaktantów, polimery oraz mieszanki filtrów UV.

W celu zadbania o dobre relacje biznesowe i partnerstwo we współpracy z naszymi klientami, w styczniu 2025 uruchomiliśmy laboratorium badawczo – rozwojowe, w którym przygotowujemy receptury ramowe z wykorzystaniem oferowanych przez nas surowców oraz wspomagamy naszych klientów w procesie wdrażania nowych surowców.

Firma Enzym wspiera innowacyjność i rozwój produktów swoich klientów poprzez aktywne pozyskiwanie nowych producentów z całego świata. Dzięki nowym kierunkom ekspansji jesteśmy w stanie zaspokoić potrzeby rynku na nowatorskie i bezpieczne produkty.

Description:

In addition to supplying wound care products as part of the Utermöhlen professional brand, we also supply wound care and over-the-counter products for minor skin ailments via the HeltiQ brand. We are Royal Utermöhlen.
Self-care provider, now and in the future.

Guided by the belief that true transformation begins beneath the surface, our formulations go beyond surface-level fixes to create lasting change. We blend time-honored botanical wisdom with next-gen skincare technology, sourcing patented bioactives and clinically proven ingredients from the world’s leading labs, including Mibelle, Silab, Jakobtek, and others. Each Kass formulation is crafted with care to target skin concerns at their foundation, restoring balance and vitality for long-term skin health. By combining potent extracts, high-performance actives, and clean formulations, we create skincare that is as effective as it is luxurious.

Kass vies to be more than just a skincare brand—it is a movement towards intelligent beauty. Every product is a testament to our philosophy: that confidence comes from skin that thrives, not just survives.

Name: Nutrasynthia
Description:
Nutrasynthia provides you with high quality, difficult to make advanced nutritional ingredients. 

A specialised area is cutting-edge liposomal technology, where Nutrasynthia offers under its Trademark lipoNIQ a variety of raw material and semi-finished products such as powder, granules, liquids, chewable tablets, beadlets, on-the-go sticks with water-dispersable powder or drinkable liquids and special range of gummies, suitable for kids or in other segments such as sports nutrition where high bioavailability of ingredients is extremely important . 

lipoNIQ is an advanced liposomal technology which is capable to develop dry liposomes with stability beyond their liquid alternatives. The superior quality of lipoNIQ is proven by various tests and certificates. 

In specific we monitor the following important parameters:

1. Particle Size: we ensure that the particle size is in the range between 80-400nm, depending on the relevant ingredient for best efficacy.

2. Zeta Potential: we conduct analyses for Zeta Potential to ensure lipoNIQ superior stability. The value of Zeta Potential lies between 20-40 mV. 

3. Gastric Stability: lipoNIQ is tested in different PH environments, since only Liposomes that reach the small intestine are suitable for lymphatic uptake and thus can provide superior bioavailability.

lipoNIQ products are supported with scientific background. Nutrasynthia provides you with scientific rationale behind the superior benefit for Liposomal dietary supplements and helps you to develop the scientific Marketing Strategy.

Nutrasynthia also offers custom-made solutions for you to make the difference in your market and be ahead of competition. Our products are manufactured in EU GMP certified facilities.

Name: DAĞLAR KOZMETİK
Description:
Dağlar Kozmetik 1997 yılında kurulmuş, güzellik ve kişisel bakım sektöründe ki fason üretimde öncü bir şirkettir. Yüksek kaliteli hammadde ile müşterilerimize sağlıklı ve güvenilir çözümler sunmaktayız. 

Vizyonumuz, tüm kıtalarda çok sayıda ülkeye ihraç edilen geniş bir yelpazede yüksek kaliteli ürünler sunan lider bir küresel kozmetik şirketi olmaktır. 

30 farklı ülkeye ihracat yapıyoruz. Küresel bir şirket olma yolunda dünyanın dört bir yanındaki müşterilerin farklı ihtiyaç ve tercihlerine hitap eden çeşitli ürünler üretme becerimizle kendimizle gurur duyuyoruz.

Firma olarak, araştırma ve geliştirme faaliyetlerine büyük önem veriyoruz. En son teknolojileri ve yenilikçi bileşenleri kullanarak, müşterilerimize benzersiz ve etkili ürünler sunuyoruz. Ürünlerimiz, sıkı kalite kontrol süreçlerinden geçerek en yüksek standartlara uygun şekilde üretilmektedir. Tüm ürün çeşitlerinde dünya standartlarının üzerinde hammaddeler kullanıyoruz.

Çevreye duyarlılık da şirketimizin temel değerlerinden biridir. Sürdürülebilirlik ilkelerine bağlı kalarak, doğal kaynakları korumak ve çevresel etkimizi en aza indirmek için çalışıyoruz. Bu nedenle, ambalajlarımızı geri dönüştürülebilir malzemelerden üretiyor ve üretim sürecinde enerji tasarrufu sağlayan yöntemleri tercih ediyoruz.

Müşteri memnuniyeti, Dağlar Kozmetik’in başarısının temel taşıdır. Müşterilerimize değer veriyor ve ihtiyaçlarını anlamak için aktif olarak iletişim kuruyoruz. Kapsamlı bir ürün yelpazesi sunarak, farklı cilt tipleri ve kişisel tercihlere uygun çözümler sunmaktayız. Ayrıca, müşterilerimize uzman ekiplerimiz tarafından sağlanan kişisel danışmanlık hizmetleriyle destek oluyoruz.

Dağlar Kozmetik olarak, sektörde liderlik yapmaya devam edeceğimize inanıyoruz. Yenilikçi ürünlerimiz, güvenilirliğimiz ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla sektördeki başarıyı sürdürmek için çalışıyoruz.

Name: DefenAge
Description: Comprehensive Multicenter Clinical Study shows that DefenAge’s core skin care regimen addressed visible signs of skin aging on a global scale (randomized, placebo/vehicle-controlled, double-blinded study; 44 participants). Description:
SAFEQUIM es una empresa de reciente creación que busca la continua mejora e innovación en la aplicación de ingredientes naturales para el cuidado capilar, facial y corporal. Somos una startup con una misión y visión muy claras: Apostar por ingredientes de origen natural que puedan revolucionar la cosmética actual y futura. 
Es por ello que dedicamos mucho tiempo y esfuerzo en encontrar nuevas soluciones en nuestro laboratorio cerca de Barcelona. Nuestro equipo humano posee un amplio conocimiento del sector cosmético y tienen una clara vocación hacia el cliente. 
A día de hoy podemos ofrecer una amplia gama de ingredientes activos y extractos naturales que pueden resultar de gran interés para los fabricantes de producto acabado, pues nuestros tres pilares más importantes son: El compromiso hacia nuestros proveedores y clientes, la búsqueda de la calidad a través de nuestro I+D y una gran asistencia post venta con un equipo técnico capacitado. 
Si desea conocer más sobre nosotros y contactarnos, no dude en entrar en nuestra página web. 
---
SAFEQUIM is a new company that seeks continuous improvement and innovation in the application of natural ingredients for hair, face and body care. We are a startup with a very clear mission and vision: To increase our value through ingredients of natural origin that can revolutionize current and future cosmetics. 
That is why we dedicate a lot of time and effort in finding new solutions in our laboratory near Barcelona. Our team has a wide knowledge of the cosmetic sector and has a clear vocation towards the customer. 
Today we can offer a huge range of active ingredients and natural extracts that may be of great interest to manufacturers of finished products, as our three most important pillars are: The commitment to our suppliers and customers, the search for quality through our R & D and a great after sales support with a trained technical team. 
If you want to know more about us, do not hesitate to visit our website.

Name: VILASA World
Description:
We are proud to be the largest spa network in India with over 80+ spas across the country. Our Tattva Spa’s have been nourishing lives since we first opened a quaint Spa in the rolling Himalayan hills of Manali in 2013. Since then, we have made it our mission for wellbeing to be considered a priority rather than a treat.

We bring to you VILASA, mindfully & lovingly crafted skin care, personal care and hair care products for men & women. VILASA champions a long-awaited and much needed reconnection to self; an antidote to the fast-paced world of the beauty industry.

It all started when we realized that we were not the only ones disappointed with the promise of miracles and quick fixes from our skincare products. Products that never seemed to last beyond the initial 5-minute chemical based dewy skin after application. We seemed always to be chasing our next spa day to feel a true sense of stress-free wellbeing. Chasing an inherent slow-paced improvement in our skin because we were unable to achieve that glow from within at home.

Thus, we started emulating that feeling with just a few simple ingredients and a vision for a brand that focused on “long-term beauty” and an elevated experience. From there, we grew from moisturizers to candles, from oils to roll-ons therapies, from face cleaners to experiental bathing scrubs, and a growing range of beauty, self care & wellness products. We have now created a steadily growing community of individuals that connect on more than just this way of life. A community that connects on the belief of the perfection of imperfections, and cherishes the beauty that stems from deep within.

Vilasa is not simply a spa skin care brand.

Vilasa is a lifestyle choice.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Delhicious
Description:
Born in Delhi, Made in the UK. 
Delhicious is an award-winning Ayurvedic inspired beauty brand with a focus on bringing natural skin and hair solutions. We strive to create high quality, plant-powered products which really work.  
Since 2019 we have strived to create all natural solutions for your body, face & hair. Creating award winning skin care that is also dermatologically approved & clinically tested.
Available at Beauty Bay, Debenhams & Beauty Base.

What are we…
Delhicious is an Ayurvedic inspired brand rooted with powerful Indian heritage providing natural and effective skin solutions for a range of skin concerns. Formulated with a range of ingredients that are traditionally used in Ayurvedic remedies, our products are made to help hydrate & nourish your body in an all natural way. 

Our community...
Here at Delhicious our success is measured through the love & support of our community! We adore seeing the difference our products can made to their skin & confidence.

Name: Dr.Water
Description:
The Discovery That Changed How We Understand Wellness.

Research from around the world began confirming what scientists first suspected: hydrogen does more than hydrate. It helps the body balance oxidative stress, supports recovery, and enhances energy metabolism.


Dr Water Turned That Science Into Something You Can Hold.

Hydrogen is fragile. It escapes easily. So we built a system that protects it.
Every bottle of Dr Water is crafted to keep hydrogen stable and active until the moment you open it.


From the Lab to Your Lifestyle, This Is Hydration, Reinvented.

You don’t have to change your routine. Just your water. With every sip, you’re not only hydrating, you’re fueling your body with what it’s naturally designed to use: pure, free hydrogen.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Italia
Description:
Non diamo il massimo da oltre 70 anni senza un buon motivo. Noi di Expanscience siamo una “Société à mission” e la nostra ragion d’essere è di aiutare ogni persona a plasmare il proprio benessere, dall’infanzia alla terza età. È questo che fa avanzare, ricercare e innovare i nostri 1.000 collaboratori, ogni giorno! Indipendenti nell’animo, siamo un’azienda francese, al 100% familiare, con prodotti (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) presenti in oltre 90 paesi. Per noi è chiaro: il benessere delle donne e degli uomini è indissociabile dalla salute del pianeta ed è nelle nostre mani, nelle mani di tutti noi. Perché i genitori non debbano più dover scegliere per i loro bambini tra un trattamento di qualità e una soluzione buona per il mondo nel quale crescono, offriamo loro prodotti naturali, efficaci e sani. Per permettere a tutti di invecchiare bene, aiutiamo le persone a preservare il prima possibile il loro comfort articolare, la loro agilità fisica e mentale. Mettiamo a punto principi attivi cosmetici e ingredienti sensoriali al 100% di origine naturale che contribuiscono al benessere del corpo e della mente. Il nostro impatto positivo sulla società e sull'ambiente è riconosciuto dalla certificazione B Corp e, attraverso il nostro programma RSI "impACT", ci impegniamo a diventare un'azienda a impatto positivo e rigenerativa. 
La nostra missione vale in primo luogo per i nostri team. Ciò si traduce nel rafforzare la qualità della vita nel posto di lavoro e l’eguaglianza professionale, accompagnare le vulnerabilità e favorire l’inclusione dei più fragili, proporre una strategia talenti e competenze ambiziosa e favorire l’equilibrio tra vita personale ed efficacia collettiva. Ciò passa per misure ambiziose che affrontano le grandi sfide sociali delle aziende del XXI secolo. E ciò porta dei frutti: siamo orgogliosi di essere certificati "Great Place to Work" nel 100% delle nostre filiali per il 2° anno consecutivo!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Grupo Petra
Description:
O Grupo Petra surgiu em 1980, iniciando sua trajetória na cidade de São Paulo através de uma promissora e longeva parceria com a marca O Boticário.

Hoje essa parceria se estende não só à Capital, mas também à cidade de Guarulhos e cresceu ainda mais com a expansão do Grupo Boticário, nos permitindo a atuação em outras marcas como Quem Disse, Berenice?, Eudora e O.U.i e Au.migos.  Atualmente, somos um grupo de franquias que opera estas marcas nos canais de lojas e venda direta com: 35 lojas O Boticário, 2 lojas Quem disse, Berenice? e 5 centrais multimarcas de venda direta. 

O Grupo Petra acredita que as pessoas são o centro de tudo. É na proximidade e na transparência que encontramos o poder de fortalecer relacionamentos que perduram e criam a cultura que buscamos com pessoas íntegras, comprometidas, fazendo o certo, da maneira certa.

Nos atualizamos e buscamos estar sempre entre os melhores. Para isso promovemos o compartilhamento de experiências e valorizamos a diversidade de pensamentos. Desta forma que perseguimos os nossos objetivos com foco, planejamos e executamos nossos planos e desenvolvemos nossas pessoas e nossa empresa.

Assim, o Grupo Petra não é apenas um nome; é a promessa de uma marca, onde respeito, responsabilidade, resultados crescentes e atualização constante são os comportamentos 
interdependentes e que nos sustentam. Isso não é apenas o que fazemos; é quem somos, e o que está escrito pedra fundamental da nossa empresa.

No Grupo Petra, construímos relações fortes e duradouras para que todos prosperem.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Golden Rose
Description:
Golden Rose bir Erkul Kozmetik markasıdır. Erkul Kozmetik kurulduğu 1983 yılından beri kaliteli üretim ve uygun fiyat ilkesiyle dünya kozmetik sektörünün önemli kuruluşları arasındadır. 38 yıllık deneyimi ile sektörün öncü kuruluşu olan Erkul Kozmetik; oje, ruj, maskara, far, allık, fondöten ve lipgloss gibi renkli kozmetik ürünlerinin üretimi konusunda faaliyet gösteren yüzde yüz Türk sermayeli bir şirkettir.

Oje üretiminde dünyanın 5 büyük üreticisinden biri olan Erkul Kozmetik, Avrupa, BDT ülkeleri, Balkanlar, Ortadoğu, Kuzey Afrika ve Amerika olmak üzere 5 Kıtada 90'dan fazla ülkeye ihracat yaparak başarısını sınır ötesine taşımıştır.

Dokuz yıldır Türkiye'de kozmetik ihracatında birinci sırada yer alarak büyük başarıya imza atan Erkul Kozmetik bu başarısı ile ülke ekonomisine de destek sağlamaktadır.

Erkul Kozmetik Türkiye genelinde GR ve Emily markalarıyla parfümeri, eczane ve zincir marketlerden oluşan 7500'ü aşkın satış noktasıyla ve Golden Rose markasıyla 74 seçkin AVM'de yer alan kendi mağazalarıyla yaygın bir satış ağına sahiptir.

Kozmetik üretimi, İstanbul'da 36.000 m2'lik kapalı alanda sahip olduğu ISO 22716:2007 Cosmetic-GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices - İyi Üretim Uygulamaları), HELAL/HALAL (MS 1500:2009), ISO 45001:2018 İş Sağlığı Ve Güvenliği Yönetim Sistemleri, ISO 14001:2015 Çevre Yönetim Sistemi , TSE Covid-19 Güvenli Üretim ve ISO 9001–2015 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi doğrultusunda, hijyen koşulları altında, üretim teknolojisine çağdaş yaklaşımla ileri teknoloji kullanılarak yapılmaktadır.

Erkul Kozmetik konusunda uzman ve deneyimli bir ekiple sürdürdüğü AR-GE çalışmalarını tüketiciye sunmadan önce EU Direktifleri doğrultusunda akredite laboratuarlarda test ettirmektedir ve satışa sunulan her bir ürünün Ürün Güvenlik dosyasına sahiptir. Erkul Kozmetik 38 yıllık deneyiminin gücüyle kaliteyi hedefleyerek sürekli gelişmekte ve güzellikler dünyasındaki yolculuğuna devam etmektedir.

Name: PT Geut Pesona Indonesia
Description:
GEUT BY DR. T dilahirkan sebagai hasil dari idealisme dan profesionalisme dari dr. Teuku Adifitrian Sp.BP-RE (Tompi) yang telah berkecimpung selama 10 tahun sebagai dokter spesialis bedah rekonstruksi dan estetik, bersama sang istri yang merupakan seorang dokter spesialis gizi terkemuka dr. Arti Indira M.Gizi, Sp.GK, FINEM.

Terinspirasi dari gabungan bahasa Aceh ‘Get’ dan bahasa Inggris ‘Good’, nama GEUT (baca: gyut) merefleksikan harapan dari kedua penggagasnya untuk senantiasa mempersembahkan manfaat yang baik atau bagus sesuai dengan definisinya.

Memulai debutnya dengan meluncurkan serial produk perdana “Antioksidan Series”, GEUT BY DR. T memperkenalkan 5 jenis produk andalan yang dipercaya dapat menjadi jawaban untuk kebutuhan masyarakat Indonesia akan sebuah produk perawatan kulit yang dapat dipercaya, kaya manfaat, terjamin keamanan pemakaiannya dan tentu saja dengan harga yang dapat dijangkau oleh kebanyakan masyarakat Indonesia.
Seperti yang dikatakan oleh dr. Teuku Adifitrian Sp.SB-RE (Tompi), “Bertemu dengan begitu banyak pasien yang telah dianggap sebagai teman, sahabat dan saudara selama beberapa tahun belakangan ini, menyadarkan saya bahwa kebutuhan akan produk perawatan kulit yang mudah dijangkau oleh masyarakat dan dapat dipercaya mutu, keamanan serta kenyamanan penggunaannya sangat penting. Hal ini menguatkan saya dan istri untuk dapat menyalurkan amanat kami melalui beragam rangkaian produk yang telah dan akan diluncurkan oleh GEUT BY DR. T. Diharapkan kehadiran produk ini akan ikut menyemarakkan ramainya produk perawatan kulit yang telah hadir di Indonesia selama ini dan dapat memberikan kesan dan nilai tersendiri di hati masyarakat.”
Hal tersebut diperkuat dengan pernyataan dari dr. Arti Indira M.Gizi, Sp.GK, FINEM, “Kulit sehat merupakan perpaduan dari perawatan yang mumpuni dan konsumsi nutrisi yang seimbang. produk yang layak untuk dipersembahkan ke masyarakat dan menjadi jawaban dari kebutuhan akan kulit yang indah, sehat dan seimbang

The Perfume House is a company founded with a passion for creating Quality with Affordability.

The operations started with a humble beginning of manufacturing perfume oils in the corner of an apartment and selling them in flea markets. The mission to innovate has lead TPH to create a wide range of products for personal and home care.
