This is accomplished by providing a virtual ordering experience that allows patients to manage their prescriptions via our mobile application or online website.  Patients can choose how, when, & where they want their medications delivered.    Providing a more convenient and turnkey prescription service, we will simplify our patients lives and provide them with more time to focus on other daily duties.  

Scripx’s concept of intelligent pharmacy services is meant to provide all patients with the quickest, easiest, and safest settlements as possible.   In addition to our pharmacy backend, we make securing a prescription as easy 1,2,3 via our AI powered telehealth platform. 

By adding a strong virtual care platform, we are able to mitigate those long trips to the doctor offering a super convenient mobile platform.  We specialize in all types of medicine: functional medicine, peptide and longevity, Men’s & Women’s health, the list goes on….

Name: Ashes To Life
Description:
Ashes to Life es una firma española que ha nacido para cuidar la piel de las personas y la del planeta. Aunando naturaleza e innovación, creamos una lujosa gama de productos de ceniza que tienen cualidades profundamente sensoriales y generan un impacto positivo.


Nuestra historia comenzó cuando uno de los co-fundadores de Ashes to Life presenció como un bosque que frecuentaba de la zona de Málaga quedaba reducido a ceniza tras un incendio. Aquella imagen desoladora le llevó, junto a un grupo de amantes de la naturaleza, a buscar una solución que ayudase a devolver la vida a esos bosques calcinados.


Tras un largo periodo de documentación y estudio junto a profesionales de distintos ámbitos, entendieron que la propia ceniza podía ser la solución si lograban transformarla en productos tal y como se hacía en civilizaciones antiguas.


Actualmente, estamos desarrollando nuestro Proyecto de Investigación Medioambiental ASHES TO LIFE Project, con el que queremos devolver la vida a los bosques incendiados a partir de sus propias cenizas. Para su financiación, destinamos el 10% de los beneficios de los productos que creamos con distintas cenizas vegetales certificadas. 


Crear productos de lujo de origen natural aplicando la última tecnología y de una forma respetuosa con el medio ambiente. Es así como entendemos que debe ser la cosmética del futuro. Pero también, la cosmética del presente. 


A través del I+D+i y bajo un enfoque sostenible, desarrollamos cosméticos ecológicos y tratamientos extremadamente eficaces. Para ello, seleccionamos activos vegetales bajo estos criterios: propiedades de la planta origen, concentración de activos, proceso productivo sostenible y eficiente, trazabilidad y la complementariedad de acción entre los distintos activos.


Siguiendo estrictamente estos criterios, creamos fórmulas exquisitas que nos permiten trasladar a la piel la belleza atemporal de la naturaleza.

ASHES TO LIFE #CuidaTuPielYlaDelPlaneta

#KimChoseTeviant (a collection of curated Eyebrow bundles with Kim Chiu)
#TeviantArtistCollection (a collection of blush, highlighter and contour palettes in collaboration with fellow make-up artists Jelly Eugenio and Mark Qua).

Ariella Arida (Host, actress and Miss Universe 2013 3rd Runner-up)
Kruz Uy (Fashion, Beauty and Lifestyle Blogger)
Kat Cruz (Fashion Stylist and Fashion Editor)
Kimmy and Boop Yap (Fashion Stylist)

Today the Davines group is present in 95 countries and employs a multicultural team spanning 34 different nationalities and in 2016 had become a member of the group of so-called B Corps, whose purpose, in addition to profit, is maximizing their positive impact by providing innovative solutions to environmental and social issues whilst respecting the highest standards of performance, transparency and accountability.

Besides the Parma headquarters, we have branches in New York, Paris, London, Mexico, Netherland and Hong Kong.

Davines Group is now a recognized leader in the formulation and manufacturing of high end skin and hair care products.

Davines style is a reflection of curiosity and openness to the world and of the Italian heritage of history, art, design and good taste.

Name: OJB HERBALS PVT LTD
Description:
Oshea Herbals believe in the principle of taking back people closer to nature and in this endeavour we have developed our formulations with botanical extracts. Our primary goal & objective is to give our consumers a comprehensive range of herbal active cosmetics of world-class quality with the touch of Vedic science.

We use modern cosmetology with bioactive ingredients based on our traditional Vedic system of Ayurveda. We offer an array of products ranging from Skincare, Sun Care, Body care to Color cosmetics, Lip care and Advance care.

Our products are true herbal formulations. Inspired by the ancient science of life - Ayurveda,  each formulation consists of active bioactive ingredients. The various use of botanical extracts have dual functions as they serve as cosmetics for care of body and its parts, and the botanicals ingredients present influence biological functions of skin and provide nutrients necessary for healthy skin or hair.

We lay a lot of emphasis on scientific extraction, isolation and purification of all the herbal extracts. The extracts used in our formulations are sourced from reputable suppliers from India and other parts of the world. By creating a unique combination of world-class technology and our very own ancient Ayurvedic system, we produce herbals cosmetics of unique quality.

Our primary aim and goal is to provide maximum care, solution, benefit and satisfaction to every part of skin ,hair and body to all our consumers with a full range of products around 75 SKU and at a very reasonable price range. Most of our products are dermatologically tested by world-renowned labs to ensure the best quality to our consumers. Also, our R&D team is always active to deliver a unique and new products, each time to our consumer.

Name: HORMETA Switzerland
Description:
Nés d'une passion commune pour la recherche au service de la beauté, les Laboratoires HORMETA poursuivent toujours avec la même ardeur les travaux entrepris par Maurice Chaponnier, son fondateur. Un herboriste et chercheur hors du commun que rien ne fascinait davantage que l'éternelle jeunesse.

Mais Maurice Chaponnier ne détenait pas seulement la palme de la créativité la plus opiniâtre, c'était aussi un pionnier puisque c'est lui qui mit en évidence, dès 1950, l'incroyable pouvoir régénérateur cellulaire que possèdent les oligoéléments sur l'organisme. De cette fantastique trouvaille, il crée la ligne HORMETA que l'on connaît : une gamme de produits aux effets superbement rajeunissants.

Aujourd'hui, la destinée des Laboratoires Suisses HORMETA est assurée par les enfants du fondateur, Christine Chaponnier, Docteur en Chimie-Biologie, et Jean-Francois Chaponnier, Directeur Général de la Société.

Tout acquis au progrès et à la créativité, ces nouveaux gestionnaires de la beauté cultivent avec vocation le sens de la cohérence, élaborent des projets innovateurs et font le choix des meilleures orientations pour, ensemble, se lancer résolument à l'assaut de ce créneau. Ils font ainsi la part belle aux découvertes de pointe.

Label qualité-précision-efficacité oblige!
Au cours de ces dix dernières années, la cosmétologie a fait plus de progrès que lors des 40 années précédentes.
Aujourd'hui, la recherche, associée aux nouvelles techniques d'extraction, nous offrent des ingrédients toujours plus variés et actifs, des extraits végétaux toujours plus purs et concentrés. Cette formidable évolution scientifique permet d'élaborer des produits de beauté plus performants, dotés d'une meilleure innocuité et à l'efficacité désormais mesurable. Les Laboratoires Suisses HORMETA participent à cette progression par une caractéristique qui leur est propre: l'utilisation des Oligoéléments en cosmétique.

Vagheggi is 100% made in Italy. Research, development, production, packaging and testing are all stages carried out in our plant in Italy.  The company has constant, uninterrupted, direct control of all production chain.
Creativity and innovation, which are typical values of ‘made in Italy’, are Vagheggi drivers for formulation and communication.

Name: Exo Hair Oficial
Description:
Seja um Distribuidor https://bityli.com/SFXzho

A Exo Hair é uma empresa pertencente ao Grupo Koosmetics. 
Possui uma linha de produtos capilares criados pelo médico, professor e cientista, Dr. José Kacowicz.

Formado em Medicina pela UFRJ, o professor Dr. José Kacowicz é considerado a maior autoridade mundial em peelings de fenol de alta performance, tendo criado diversas técnicas consagradas internacionalmente pela área de medicina estética, como o o Reset Basal, o Lifting Vetorial, entre outros. Em 2002, foi condecorado junto ao professor Ivo Pitanguy, membro de honra da Sociedade Francesa de Cirurgia Plástica.

Suas técnicas são conhecidas por levarem rejuvenescimento às pessoas, o que influenciou na criação da Exoplastia: o alisamento que rejuvenesce o cabelo sem o uso do formol e de maneira completamente saudável. Há décadas, pessoas de todo o mundo alisam o cabelo utilizando o formol e prejudicam sua saúde, assim como a dos profissionais que realizam os procedimentos. Inconformado, o Dr. José Kacowicz resolveu mudar essa história.

Utilizando a ciência e a tecnologia como base, a Exo Hair nasceu com a missão de tornar o mundo mais bonito e saudável, buscando com a mais avançada ciência, conceber produtos de tecnologia cosmética com composições exclusivas que aliam beleza e saúde. Sem formol, sem testes em animais, oferecendo o máximo de qualidade e segurança para seus clientes, a ExoHair é um novo marco na história do mercado de beleza. É criada por cientistas.

Name: DirectCare AI
Description:
DirectCareAI is an AI-native digital front door that turns health questions into care.
Millions search for symptoms every day. We turn that intent into action: instant guidance in-app, then clinical triage, e-prescribing, and reimbursed Remote Patient Monitoring when indicated—typically within 24 hours.

Why it matters
The status quo is slow, expensive, and disconnected. By meeting people at the moment of intent and guiding them into compliant clinical workflows, we expand access while reducing friction for patients, clinicians, and partners.

What we do
• AI triage & guidance: clear next steps within seconds.
• Same-day care: licensed clinicians for evaluation and eRx.
• Ongoing monitoring: RPM/CCM/RTM programs with proactive outreach.
• Care orchestration: HIPAA-compliant infrastructure, BAAs, and integrations.

Built for trust
HIPAA-compliant on Azure, eRx support, payer-aligned programs, and human-in-the-loop quality assurance.

Who we work with
• Consumers looking for fast, affordable answers and treatment.
• Clinics & health systems extending virtual capacity and monitoring.
• Employers seeking scalable, measurable care benefits.
• Creators & affiliates educating audiences and routing them to care.

Vision
From the first question to lasting outcomes—DirectCareAI connects people to treatment and monitoring with speed, safety, and empathy.

Specialties: Virtual Care, Remote Patient Monitoring, AI Triage, eRx, Patient Engagement, Care Coordination, Health Data Integrations

En 2022, nous avons étendu notre empreinte en lançant notre industrie de la savonnerie, et en 2023, nous avons inauguré deux agences, AGENCE CONSTANTINE et AGENCE ORAN, renforçant ainsi notre présence sur le territoire. 
Chez ARVEA, nous sommes fiers de notre engagement envers la qualité. Notre label, ARVEA, est le fruit de l'association de deux ingrédients naturels prestigieux : l'Aloe Vera et l'huile d'Argan, garantissant des produits uniques et authentiques. 
Aujourd'hui, nous proposons à nos clients une gamme variée de produits répartis sur quatre gammes : Cosmétique naturelle, Maquillage, Parfums et Compléments alimentaires. 
ARVEA trace son chemin au-delà des frontières nationales, s'engageant dans une réhabilitation permanente pour être toujours en adéquation avec le marché international.  
Nous sommes fiers d'annoncer que depuis janvier 2024, ARVEA est certifiée ISO 9001, témoignant de notre engagement envers l'excellence opérationnelle et la satisfaction client.

Name: P.Happi
Description:
P.Happi is a UK-based women’s health startup redefining intimate care through microbiome science. Our daily serum features B.Y.M. 1405 Bdellovibrio — a breakthrough natural bacterium proven to target and break down >99% of harmful gram-negative bacteria (such as E. coli) while preserving beneficial lactobacilli of the female intimate flora.

Unlike probiotics, Bdellovibrio works topically to help the intimate area stay balanced, moisturised, and protected — especially during common trigger moments such as hormonal changes, antibiotics, sex, and high stress.

Since launching in 2024, P.Happi has supported thousands of women across the UK, and is trusted by clinicians across multiple specialties — including menopause specialists, vulval dermatologists, pelvic health physiotherapists, urologists, urogynecologists, gynaecologists, sexual health clinicians, and OB-GYNs.

We exist to improve the standard of care for women — through innovation, education, and science that puts women's everyday wellbeing first.

Available at p.happi.com, Boots, Amazon and selected clinical partners. Get in touch if you want to find out more.

Name: DERMAFLASH
Description:
DERMAFLASH, A Revolution In Skincare. 

Dara Levy, our inventor and founder, believes that when you look good, you feel good, and when you feel good, there is absolutely nothing you can’t accomplish. Dara witnessed just how empowering DERMAFLASH was firsthand every day in her Med Spa, where her signature service was dermaplaning. After selling  6,000 of these treatments in 5 years, she realized that an at-home solution did not exist. It was that “aha” moment that led to the creation of DERMAFLASH.

DERMAFLASH is a first-in-class at-home device that both exfoliates and removes peach fuzz, while instantly transforming the skin on a woman's face. This, in turn, creates a flawless canvas for both skincare and make-up.  
In clinical testing, 96% of women raved that their skin was more “soft and supple” immediately after using DERMAFLASH. 

Our handy little device has won awards like Allure's Best of Beauty Award, New Beauty's Beauty Choice Award, Martha Stewart's Best of Beauty VOW List, ESSENCE Best in Black Beauty Award and Spanish People's Top 50 Beauty Products! We were also a finalist in the 2017 CEW Beauty Awards!

You can find DERMAFLASH at DERMAFLASH.com; Nordstrom, Neiman Marcus, Sephora, and day spas that include destinations such as Canyon Ranch, Ritz Carlton, Woodhouse, and more!

Name: Reliable Respiratory
Description:
Who We Are 

Competency and compassion are our priorities. Not only do we offer top-of-the-line airway management devices and replacement parts, our highly trained and competent staff connects with our customers through professional, attentive service. And, we make it our business to reach out to the health care professionals who care for them, too, ensuring that communication about patient needs and education about our products provide a total package of relief for our customers. This commitment truly sets us apart.

What We Do

At Reliable Respiratory we offer several types of breathing supplies.

Many of our customers have sleep apnea. We help ensure they receive the best and most appropriate breathing devices for safe sleep through the night. But we know it’s also important to learn how to correctly use the CPAP device. That’s why we teach each sleep apnea patient how to use his or hers by sending trained medical staff directly to the patient’s home. Replacement products like masks are very important so that patients can receive full benefit from the machines. We make sure our customers get the right fit for the most relief their CPAP device can offer. 

There are a number of excellent devices on the market now that really help people with respiratory conditions to breathe better. We carry the best and most current options in these airway management products.

Name: La Chênaie
Description:
Nous explorons les secrets de beauté inspirés par le chêne, arbre roi de la forêt, symbole de force et de résilience. 

La Chênaie est née d’une intuition. 
Depuis plus de 350 ans, le Groupe Charlois, est spécialisé dans la fabrication de tonneaux pour les vins et spiritueux les plus prestigieux du monde. Et, si le chêne est bon antioxydant pour le vin, pourquoi ne le serait-il pas pour la peau ? 

 L’innovation au service de la peau
Nos scientifiques ont découvert et breveté des extraits uniques issus du chêne aux propriétés anti-âge puissantes. Chaque soin est conçu avec exigence, associant performance et sensorialité, pour une peau sublimée jour après jour.

 Un engagement fort pour une beauté responsable
Nos formules sont vegan, naturelles et respectueuses de la peau. Nos packagings sont conçus pour être recyclables et durables. Parce que prendre soin de sa peau, c’est aussi préserver ce qui nous entoure.

 Un ancrage unique, une approche différente
À l’image du chêne qui atteint sa maturité après 150 ans, nous célébrons une beauté qui se sublime avec le temps. Une beauté authentique, libre, qui ne suit pas les sentiers tout tracés.

La Chênaie, hors des sentiers beauté.

Qualità, performance eccellenti e prezzi contenuti hanno consentito a questo brand di ottenere una crescita esponenziale.

Name: joni 21st-Century Period Care
Description:
At joni, we’re on a mission to redefine how we support people who menstruate—at home, at work, and in schools—by making sustainable period care accessible to everyone. Need commercial solutions? Call us toll-free 1-833-987-5664 or reach out to sales@getjoni.com for a custom quote.

Did you know that 87% of menstruators are caught off guard and need to leave work or school to find period products? joni’s award-winning, turn-key solutions are designed for organizations of all sizes, making it easy to build and maintain a menstrual equity program. Whether you're a workplace, university, or public space, our commercial dispensers provide access to essential period care when it’s needed most.

We’re more than just products. For every purchase, we donate 5% of our revenues to non-profits across Canada, creating a ripple effect of positive impact in the community. By supporting joni, you're helping build an ecosystem of accessible period care, while empowering people who menstruate.

Find joni in over 600 retailers across Canada, or partner with us to bring our innovative solutions to your organization. We also offer risk-free subscriptions for home delivery, so sustainable period care is always within reach. As a certified B Corp, we’re committed to the triple bottom line: people, planet, and prosperity. Our products are designed to benefit the environment, our bodies, and the communities we serve.

Whether we’re working with non-profits or disrupting the US$26 billion period care industry with our innovative, sustainable products, joni is here to empower everyone who menstruates. Join us as we push period care into the 21st century with smart, accessible solutions that put people first.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Hobby Cosmetics, A Dabur Enterprise
Description:
1974 yılında aile şirketi olarak kurulan Hobby Kozmetik kişisel bakım pazarına krem ve losyon üretimiyle başladı. Daha sonra başta saç şekillendiriciler, sıvı sabun ve şampuan olmak üzere birçok kişisel bakım kategorisinde faaliyet göstermeye başladı. Kurulduğu günden bugüne yerel pazarda marka bilinirliğini oluşturan Hobby, bugün geldiği noktada yurtdışı pazarlarına da açılarak 40‘a yakın ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır.

2010 yılında Hindistan merkezli FMCG şirketi olan Dabur International tarafından satın alınmıştır.


Hobby Cosmetics was founded as a family corporation in 1974 and initially entered the Personal Care market with production of cream and lotions. Then it began to operate at other major personal care categories such as hair care, hair styling, shower gel, liquid soap and wet wipes. Hobby has created brand awareness in the local market since its foundation. In addition to this, Hobby Cosmetics exports to 40 countries. 

In 2010, Hobby Cosmetics was purchased by Dabur International, an India-based FMCG company.

Name: Element Apothec
Description:
We imagine a world in which the synergy of nature and science empowers people to thrive. Our mission is to develop functional, ethical plant-based consumer health products, supported by research, services, and education, to bridge the gap between ancient wisdom and modern science.

Our journey began from a personal struggle against inadequate health solutions, inspiring us to create a platform where every product is a promise of safety, efficacy, and integrity.

Driven by the legacy of our founder’s great aunt Lola, who transformed her life through natural remedies, we’re dedicated to crafting products that are as ethical as they are effective. Our commitment to transparency and sustainability is unwavering, ensuring that every item we offer meets the highest standards of social and environmental responsibility.

Element Apothec sprang from a profound need for remedies that respect both tradition and scientific advancements. Lola’s pioneering use of botanicals to address her health challenges laid the foundation for our innovative approach, combining centuries-old wisdom with modern medical research.

We are more than a company; we are a community of innovators and healers. From cutting-edge research to sustainable sourcing, each step in our process is designed to bring the most effective and trustworthy wellness products to the market.

Join us as we redefine wellness, bringing healthier, plant-based solutions to people around the world, continuing Lola’s legacy of natural healing and pioneering spirit.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: El Balcón
Description:
El Balcón es una marca líder a nivel nacional en la comercialización de productos de belleza de renombre mundial. Desde nuestras raíces en la pintoresca ciudad de Córdoba en 1981, hemos sido impulsados por el espíritu emprendedor y la búsqueda constante de la excelencia en la industria de la belleza.

Nos enorgullece ofrecer una exclusiva selección de productos de belleza, desde las marcas clásicas y de tendencia hasta las mundialmente reconocidas. Nos destacamos en maquillaje, cuidado de la piel y fragancias, y nuestro compromiso con la excelencia se refleja en cada aspecto de nuestro negocio.

Operamos a través de 11 sucursales minoristas estratégicamente ubicadas en Córdoba, Salta y San Juan, con una visión constante de expansión hacia el futuro. Además, abrazamos el mundo digital con nuestra plataforma de e-commerce, donde somos pioneros a nivel nacional en llevar la belleza directamente a tu puerta.

En Perfumería El Balcón, entendemos que somos más que una simple tienda de belleza. Somos una comunidad, que abarca desde la familia fundadora de la empresa hasta nuestros apreciados colaboradores y los clientes que han depositado su confianza en nosotros año tras año. Nuestros cimientos se basan en valores de profesionalismo, calidez y un compromiso inquebrantable con la prestación de un servicio excepcional.

Name: Caroline Hirons Limited

Name: CICLO COSMÉTICOS
Description:
Somos especialistas em traduzir emoções em fragrâncias.

Movida pelo propósito de despertar sensações através de fragrâncias, a Ciclo é uma marca de perfumaria brasileira, fundada no estado de Santa Catarina no ano de 2007, com a missão de desenvolver colônias autorais para todos os ciclos da vida.

Temos como missão valorizar a liberdade criativa de renomados perfumistas das mais conceituadas casas de essências do mundo e nos concentramos em extrair o que há de mais fascinante em cada família olfativa.

Nosso comprometimento com o meio ambiente é inegociável, por isso adotamos fórmulas veganas, cruelty-free e clean beauty, que garantem produtos sem componentes como parabenos, triclosan e corantes.  Além de estarmos sempre em busca de recursos inovadores para diminuir impactos ambientais no planeta, desenvolvemos embalagens com alto potencial de reciclagem e apoiamos o projeto Eureciclo, que garante um mundo mais justo e sustentável.   

Com o crescimento constante há mais de 20 anos e reconhecida como uma das 3 marcas de perfumaria massiva mais consumidas do Brasil, atualmente estamos presentes em mais de 10.000 pontos de venda, entre lojas de departamento, varejo e farmácias, além de facilitarmos o acesso aos nossos produtos através de uma loja online completa. 

Em 2023, duas das nossas criações, Kiss e Hello Hello, figuraram entre as 10 fragrâncias massivas femininas mais vendidas do Brasil, segundo o ranking Circana, reforçando ainda mais nosso compromisso em entregar produtos de qualidade, sustentáveis e com ótimo custo-benefício.

Conheça mais sobre a Ciclo e o nosso propósito na perfumaria acessando o site www.ciclocosmeticos.com.br

Name: Macaúba Brasil
Description:
A Macaúba Brasil é uma empresa de cosméticos profissionais, focada em salões de beleza, eleita na Europa a primeira e única marca de cosméticos brasileira como tendência mundial para os próximos 15 anos. 
O nosso produto é um produto único da flora brasileira reconhecida internacionalmente como o melhor. Então consulte nossas clientes para você ver os resultados. 

Macaúba Brasil pesquisa, desenvolve, produz e comercializa cosméticos inovadores, com base em princípios da natureza brasileira, para tornar a mulher e o homem mais satisfeitos com sua auto-imagem. 

A história da empresa inicia-se em 1937, já com mais de 80 anos de tradição em capital intelectual, quando a herdeira levou os manuscritos de fármacos do avô boticário, para universidade federal desvendar os segredos: saiba mais sobre a história logo mais abaixo e conheça a família por trás da Macaúba Brasil. 

Temos compromisso com a brasilidade e a sustentabilidade, utilizando uma matéria prima 100% nacional: o óleo de macaúba, com resultados imediatos. Parte dele colhido nas próprias fazendas. A empresa possui pesquisadores de ponta como médicos, farmacêuticos, químicos e antropóloga. 

O resultado é satisfazer os desejos de uma nova consumidora e um novo consumidor a procura de produtos super premiums funcionais, que, muito bem informados, sabem escolher. 
Exatamente a altura do consumidor árabe, que, sendo altamente criterioso, entenderá a energia da Macaúba Brasil em seus cabelos.

Name: Filmore Women
Description:
Filmore: Bridging Innovation to Women’s Healthcare

Our Vision: We envision a world where women’s health is no longer overlooked. By integrating innovation with medical expertise, we aim to create a future where women have access to the comprehensive care they deserve.

At Filmore Women, we are revolutionizing women’s health by building an ecosystem that combines cutting-edge innovation with compassionate care through Filmore Pharma and Filmore Medical (clinics and services). Our mission is to address overlooked challenges in women’s healthcare through innovative products, services, and research that benefit patients and the broader medical community.

Filmore Pharma: We develop products designed to solve issues that are often underestimated in women’s health. By focusing on unmet needs, our solutions aim to improve the quality of life for women everywhere. To share our advancements, we publish research and journals with the scientific community, enabling other healthcare professionals, hospitals, and clinics to adopt our findings and amplify the impact.

Filmore Medical: Our services are thoughtfully designed and developed in collaboration with experienced doctors and specialists. One of our standout offerings is the Vaginal Spritz, an innovative treatment proven to alleviate recurring vaginal infections. With 100% of our patients reporting decreased symptoms and infections after just one session, this service exemplifies our commitment to delivering effective, evidence-based care.

Join Us in Transforming Women’s Health-

Filmore Medical Center is more than a clinic—it’s a movement. Together, we are setting new standards for women’s healthcare and driving meaningful change for patients and professionals alike.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: RoC Skincare France
Description:
Fondée en 1957 dans une pharmacie française, RoC Skincare s’est fixée depuis ses débuts une mission : collaborer avec des dermatologues pour faire du soin de la peau une véritable science qui dépasse les frontières des cosmétiques classiques.

Aujourd’hui, après des années de recherche aux États-Unis, RoC Skincare se redéploie en France à la pointe de la technologie avec plus de 35 brevets sur le rétinol, le RoC rétinol stabilisé, la vitamine C, l’acide hyaluronique et les peptides pro-collagène, pour apporter le meilleur de l’anti-âge en officine.

Recommandées par les dermatologues, évaluées dans plus de 150 études cliniques, couronnées par plus 180 prix, les formules RoC ne font aucun compromis, alliant efficacité, sécurité et éthique.

RoC marque patrimoniale française, née en pharmacie, est disponible en pharmacies.

Name: Soleil Collective
Description:
Soleil Collective is a premier group of high-growth beauty brands specializing in sunless tan, suncare and bodycare products, backed by Gauge Capital, a preeminent middle-market investment firm. We partner with passionate founders and innovative global brands to step-change growth and expand presence, bringing top talent and resources to propel them to the next level. 

With decades of combined industry knowledge and innovation expertise, Soleil Collective brands—including Loving Tan, Coco & Eve and more to come—offer consumers around the world premium products with the highest quality experiences. We continue to be on the lookout for brands to partner with and for new venture opportunities within beauty.

About Gauge Capital
Gauge Capital is a leading middle-market private equity firm based in Southlake, TX. Gauge invests in five key sectors: business services, food & consumer, government & industrial services, healthcare and technology. The firm has been named multiple times in recent years as one of the top private equity firms for founders by Inc. Magazine. Gauge has also been added to the Top 50 PE Firms in the Middle Market by Grady Campbell on several occasions, and recently ranked in the top 5 out of 517 private equity firms in the HEC Paris – DowJones Small-Cap Buyout Performance Ranking.

Name: Special Chemicals
Description:
SPECIAL CHEMICALS, S.L. es una empresa de distribución de materia prima para el sector de la cosmética y la perfumería.

La compañía empezó en Barcelona en el año 1994 con dos representadas, Jos. H. Lowenstein & Sons y Huwell, ambas centradas en la cosmética capilar.
Años más tarde, con la incorporación de otras representadas como Payan Bertrand, Biogrundl y Proalan, ampliamos nuestro catálogo con fragancias, extractos, complejos, aguas florales, aceites esenciales, hidrolidazos de proteinas etc.

25 años después de su fundación, SPECIAL CHEMICALS, S.L. emprende un nuevo reto: la exportación de los productos de Biogrundl y Proalan. Actualmente contamos ya con distribuidores en Francia, Alemania, Reino Unido, Holanda, Bélgica, Luxemburgo, China, Corea del sur, Bulgaria, Polonia y  Portugal.

SPECIAL CHEMICALS, S.L. is a cosmetic raw materials distribution company founded in 1994 in Barcelona.
We started with two represented companies, Jos. H. Lowenstein & Sons and Huwell, both centered in haircare.

Some years later, anothers companies as Payan Bertrand, Biogrundl and Proalan had been incorporated as a suppliers and make wider our catalog with Fragrances, extracts, floral waters, essential oils, protein hydrolyzates, etc.

25 years after its creation, SPECIAL CHEMICALS, S.L. embarks on a new challenge: the export of  Biogrundl and Proalan products. Currently we have distributors in France, Germany, UK, Netherlands, Belgium, Luxembourg, China, South Korea, Bulgaria, Poland and Portugal.

Name: Bromatech Suisse
Description:
*This is the Swiss LinkedIn page of Bromatech group. For questions, event information, or requests related to Italy, please contact Bromatech Italia*

Since 1995, BROMATECH has been active in the nutritional fi eld as a specialized laboratory for research and development of targeted dietary supplements based on strain-specific lactic acid bacteria, vitamins, and fatty acids capable of interacting in a targeted manner with the valuable asset of the human microbiome.

   Hair Care

Name: Minasolve Personal Care
Description:
Rooted in green chemistry, driven by process innovation - we deliver sustainable solutions for cosmetic applications that perform.
For more than 15 years, MINASOLVE has been committed to creating bio-based ingredients for a better future. Based in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, we are proud to manufacture innovative, bio-based solutions that support the beauty industry's shift towards sustainability.
Our dedicated R&D, regulatory, and formulation teams work at the intersection of nature and science developing certified ingredients using Green Chemistry principles and advanced extraction technologies.
Together with our partners across Europe and the U. S., we are helping to shape a more conscious value chain, from the biomass stage to the final cosmetic formulation.

Name: EQ Love
Description:
Founded by an avid world-traveler and life-long surfer, EQ (EQUILIBRIUM) offers certified organic cosmetics and eco-friendly accessories which work in balance with the environment and your lifestyle.
 
The first ever sunscreen to be validated non eco-toxic to marine life, EQ contains no chemical filters to seep into the ocean – or into your skin. EQ only uses natural mineral pigments to block the sun’s harmful UVA and UVB rays, Absolutely no parabens, petroleum, pesticides or synthetic fragrances. Only pure, powerful, eco-friendly ingredients.
While EQ is inspired by surfing, its products follow you beyond the waves. EQ goes with you anywhere – helping you create your balance, anytime and anyplace.  That’s why the organic sports care, hair care, eco-designed sport accessories and natural products for the home were born, because adventure is a lifestyle, not just a vacation.

LIVE . LOVE . CARE

Name: Nerium International is Breaking Records & Going Global — Indepedent Brand Partner — greatskin.guru
Description:
MARKET
The anti-aging market is an $80 billion-dollar industry in the US alone, & is expected to grow to $114 billion within the next three years. In three years' time, the anti-aging market in the US alone will be almost as big as the direct sales industry worldwide ($125 billion). Nine of the top ten billion-dollar direct sales companies are in the beauty category. Over 50% of the wealth generated in the direct sales industry comes from the beauty category, which is bigger than all other categories combined. Nerium International is in the highest-selling category within beauty, which is dermal. Within dermal, Nerium International is in the fastest-growing subcategory — anti-aging. Skincare products are the "stickiest" products in the industry. Consumer loyalty to skincare, specifically anti-aging, is very high. This leads to a very high retention rate in customers.

PRODUCT
NeriumAD is a breakthrough product in the dominant category in the industry. The unprecedented results & clinical testing of NeriumAD provide a huge differential to other skincare products. Our relationship with Nerium Skincare, a division of Nerium Biotechnology, creates a huge barrier of entry that includes patents, sourcing, and lengthy biotechnology research. This ensures that our products will never be replicated. We have the exclusive global rights to Nerium Skincare's product line for both present & future products. When you combine a breakthrough product in the dominant category in this industry with the high customer retention due breakthrough results, that provides you a foundation for a real opportunity.

COMPENSATION
The unilevel compensation plan has proven over decades to be the most honest and sustainable for long-term wealth creation. Nerium International has built the ultimate unilevel compensation plan that provides a path to success for both immediate and long-term income. The high retention of customers also provides for a long-term sustainable residual income.

Name: Kate McLeod
Description:
Kate McLeod creates safe, effective products that bring intentioned moments of self care and everyday magic to people's lives.

A former pastry chef, Kate understands the beauty of simple, homemade recipes made from whole, good-for-you ingredients. In her kitchen, synthetics are forbidden and quality reigns without compromise. Our innovative Body Stone solid moisturizers are waterless concentrates designed to intensely nourish the skin—a little goes a long way. By removing water from our formulas, we are able to create sustainable, plastic-free packaging and avoid some of the biggest culprits of waste in the beauty industry.

Our Hudson Valley workshop produces Kate’s recipes with integrity, care, and love. We keep our people and our process close to home, employing local chefs, bakers, and makers to create products that are handmade just for you.

Name: Capitaine Cosmétiques
Description:
Depuis 2018, Capitaine vous propose des cosmétiques naturels et certifiés Bio, imaginés et fabriqués artisanalement dans notre atelier en Bretagne.

Nous avons choisi de développer des produits sains, sans superflu, qui répondent aux différents besoins de la peau et composés d’ingrédients d’origine naturelle, tout en guidant nos recherches vers la protection de nos écosystèmes.

Savons saponifiés à froid*, shampoings solides, baumes nourrissants, huiles hydratantes, déodorants solides, accessoires… Une large gamme de produits éco-sourcés dans lesquels nous avons à cœur d’intégrer les trésors de notre terroir français et du milieu marin.

*Nous utilisons la méthode de la saponification à froid qui garantit la préservation des propriétés naturelles bienfaitrices de nos huiles et beurres végétaux.

Name: RevitaLash Cosmetics
Description:
Established in 2006, our story began with just one product – our original lash conditioning serum – inspired by the immense love between our founder and his beloved wife Gayle, as a solution to help her feel beautiful during her courageous fight against breast cancer. From that single, original product comes an entire collection of beauty-enhancing, solution-oriented cosmetics that revitalize the natural beauty and inner spirit of all women, while giving back to the cause that started it all.

Lash Serums now available in California.

Let's get social:
Facebook - www.facebook.com/revitalash.official
Instagram - www.instagram.com/revitalashcosmetics
YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCadUy-4qz4q6u_kr2r8rwCw
Pinterest - www.pinterest.com/Revitalashcosmetics
Twitter - https://twitter.com/RevitaLash
TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@revitalashcosmetics?lang=en 
Blog - www.revitalash.com/blogs/news

Name: Cent Pur Cent
Description:
Cent Pur Cent is de Belgische, minerale make-uplijn van RiGorgeous die bestaat uit gezonde, gemakkelijke en duurzame producten die je een instant mooi, goed en happy gevoel geven. Je vindt dit merk bij de apotheek. 

Cent Pur Cent staat voor 100% transparantie wat betreft de ingrediënten en samenstelling van haar producten.
Dit wil zeggen dat elk product bestaat uit zo puur en zuiver mogelijke grondstoffen die nodig zijn om haar doel te bereiken. En dat doel is : gezonde, gemakkelijke en mooie make-up voor elke dag, voor elke vrouw.  Zo kan iedereen zich goed voelen in haar vel en helemaal zichzelf zijn, zonder daarom perfect te moeten zijn. 

Founder en beauty-entrepreneur Caroline Rigo heeft Cent Pur Cent in het leven geroepen omdat ze van mening is dat geen enkele vrouw zou moeten kiezen tussen wat goed en wat mooi voor ze is. Omdat ook iemand met een moeilijke huid recht heeft op mooie en gezonde make-up steekt ze pure, zuivere, minerale en de meeste natuurlijke grondstoffen in een luxueus jasje. En het is dat beste van beide werelden dat zorgt voor een extra laagje zelfvertrouwen voor elke vrouw die Cent Pur Cent gebruikt. 
Clean 
Onze impact op de wereld, op het milieu is van ontzettend groot belang. Daarom is het voor ons belangrijk om producten te maken die door iedereen verdraagbaar zijn.  Onze missie is onszelf constant te verbeteren, te evolueren en evalueren.  Cent Pur Cent is een make-upmerk dat in volle ontwikkeling is en constant aanpassingen doet, zichzelf uitdaagt om tot de beste formule en visie te komen. 
Meet Caroline, the founder
Caroline Rigo groeide de afgelopen jaren van topvisagiste uit tot een échte onderneemster in de wereld van cosmetica. Door haar gedrevenheid, duidelijke visie en creatieve ideeën ziet de make-upwereld in België er vandaag heel anders uit dan pakweg 10 jaar geleden. Want samen met haar team ontwikkelde deze duizendpoot de afgelopen 6 jaar, 2 verschillende minerale make-upmerken.
Cent Pur Cent en i.am.klean.

Name: Luxe Port
Description:
Luxe Port Trading is a distribution service resource in the field of luxurious fragrance and cosmetics industry in the United Arab Emirates and expanding its scope across GCC.
Luxe Port Trading is moving fast to increase its impeccable portfolio of bespoke and internationally- renowned brands bringing luxury experience at the fingertips of the UAE and GCC customers.

Name: S&J International Enterprises PCL
Description:
S&J International (SJI) and its eight subsidiaries are providing customers within beauty and personal care with a customized service portfolio and a one stop solution spanning the entire value chain – from sourcing of quality and safe raw materials, research & development of formulas and solutions, product development, design & packaging concepts, cost effective manufacturing in own cutting edge facilities, trade marketing and efficient logistics solutions

Headquartered in Bangkok with more than 2,000 employees in Thailand and offices in Europe and Asia, SJI is supplying local and global customers, retailers and brand-owners in over 50 countries worldwide. 

SJI is listed on the Thai stock exchange with the majority of the shares being held by the SAHA Group with more than 100,000 employees.

Name: Purity Perfumes Manufacturing LLC
Description: The Purity Factory seeks to draw a new map of the world of perfumes by providing integrated services to its customers according to international standards and according to the best scientific studies, a laboratory for aromatic research

Name: Harkoi
Description:
Harkoi is a Clean beauty brand that solves problems and creates products for people with deeper skin tones.

Clean - products made without any known endocrine disruptors, carcinogens, or irritants. 


Fighting Colorism - We believe we’re at the start of our fight against colorism in India and have a long road ahead of us.
Normalizing our true skin color will bring us one step closer to a world where people are more accepting of their natural skin tones. While the world is striving for equality amongst all races, we’ve yet to accept our own skin color and complexion. Harkoi stands strong with these beliefs and aims to make you fall in love with your skin tone.

We do this by - 
By marketing our formulations and not a false sense of beauty.
By defining our target audience based on an individual’s passion for beauty & and wellness.
By representing this target audience truly through our digital and print platforms.
By researching and developing products for an Indian audience, based on their tones and skin conditions.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: GATINEAU
Description:
Gatineau’s Story began in Paris 89 years ago with a visionary Beauty Therapist, Madame Jeanne Gatineau. A woman with a true passion for Beauty, she set out to provide revolutionary skincare solutions for women. 

She opened her first salon in 1932 and immediately began to develop her own skincare products to accompany her avant-garde treatment techniques. Through her collaboration with experienced dermatologists and biochemists she quickly became renowned with in the world of skin care. The Jeanne Gatineau School of Beauty opened in Paris in 1950 and provided expert training to thousands of students. The demand for Gatineau’s unique and innovative expertise led to the manufacture of products for home use and Gatineau, as we know it today, was born.

Gatineau was the first beauty house in the world to develop an exfoliator and alcohol-free cleansers and toners, quickly establishing themselves as a skincare brand that anticipates the needs and expectations of women.

Today, the brand is renowned as a leading specialist in anti-ageing skincare. Gatineau's powerful formulations combine natural ingredients with cutting-edge biotechnology to create an advanced range of professional-quality skincare that deliver immediate and long-lasting results.

Name: S.M.S & Sons (Pvt) Ltd.
Description:
We are a premium personal care manufacturer, specializing in the development and production of high-quality skincare, haircare, and hygiene products. 

With a commitment to excellence, innovation, and integrity, we partner with brands to deliver bespoke formulations and turnkey manufacturing solutions. 

From concept to shelf, our focus is on creating products that inspire trust and elevate everyday care.

Name: Grupo Barrominas
Description:
Com o mix ampliado, a Barrominas distribui em todos Estados brasileiros, cosméticos de fabricação própria conquistando e fidelizando consumidores por toda parte. Com uma estratégia inovadora de multiplicação da linha pelo país, a empresa aumenta seu potencial de distribuição a cada dia. Os distribuidores Barrominas são parceiros preciosos que não medem esforços para que os produtos que apaixonam o Brasil, possam ser encontrados em todos os lugares.

Os excelentes resultados alcançados pela Barrominas são frutos de constantes aprimoramentos nos processos industriais, tecnologia de ponta e excelentes práticas de produção. Investimentos em profissionais especializados, infraestrutura e equipamentos que asseguram a precisão dos testes realizados, são prioridade para o grupo de gestão. Cuidados ao selecionar, adquirir e armazenar a matéria-prima são ações decisivas para a garantia da qualidade que fazem toda a diferença dentro da Barrominas.


Quase duas décadas após o início de suas atividades, a marca vem desenvolvendo uma linha do tamanho do Brasil.
A constante introdução dos produtos Barrominas no mercado brasileiro, confere à direção da empresa, seu pessoal e seus processos, méritos que consolidam cada vez mais os valores corporativos cultivados desde a sua criação. Pessoas que buscam excelência em tudo que fazem para criar produtos que revelam a beleza natural dos cabelos.

Name: Siyate
Description:
Step into the world of Siyate, where luxury meets inclusivity in every drop. Siyate, represents the essence of journey or pathway in Arabic. It signifies the journey of self-discovery and personal expression that our brand aims to inspire in each individual who experiences our products.

Our gender-neutral fragrances and personal care essentials are crafted with care, inviting you on a journey of self-expression and fulfillment.

Embracing the rich cultural heritage of the Middle East, we offer a modern and progressive approach to fragrance, ensuring that every scent experience is as unique as the individual wearing it.

Elevate your senses and indulge in the art of scent and care with Siyate – because every moment deserves a touch of extraordinary.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Sana Jardin
Description:
Former social worker Amy Christiansen founded Sana Jardin as a way to empower women through the Beyond Sustainability movement - it provides fair wages and teaches business skills to the Moroccan workers who harvest the flowers used in her fragrances. Formulated in collaboration with renowned master perfumer Carlos Benaim, this collection of eau de parfums and candles features a blend of essential oils and hand-picked plants presented in recycled packaging.

We take pride in what’s on the inside; the parts you can’t see. Our scents are clean to the core; vegan friendly and adhering to the highest clean beauty standards possible, with no chemical nasties. All products are free of artificial colorants, parabens, phthalates and formaldehydes. The soul of our scents is born in the flower fields of Morocco, where the flower harvesters chant as they pick the orange blossom, rose and jasmine used in our fragrances, a ritual thought to purify the soul of the flower. Our alternative business model, The Beyond Sustainability Movement, seeks to prove circularity, social impact and collaboration is entirely possible in luxury business.

Name: ICC srl
Description:
ICC stands out in the International market as a contract manufacturer that formulates and produces entirely in Italy, starting from raw materials up to the finished product.
Our portfolio includes nail polish, gel polish, nail care, makeup, skincare and haircare.
ICC is a young and dynamic company with Passion, Creativity, Technology in its DNA.
Our mission is to formulate and manufacture the best quality products with a low environmental impact, dedicated to the 4Rs: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle & Recover. 
Our company is in constant evolution and is always looking for new solutions that can satisfy the market's needs with innovative and high performing "beauty clean products".
ICC collections are born in Italy and export the Italian style all over the world!

Name: Cowboy Colostrum
Description:
In a world where health is the highest form of currency, investing in your well-being is non-negotiable. Meet Cowboy Colostrum: your ultimate source of grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine colostrum. Experience the extraordinary benefits of this golden elixir, meticulously crafted to honor our ancestral roots and guide you towards a life lived in harmony with nature.

Colostrum, the dairy superfood produced by all mammals within the first 48-72 hours after giving birth, has gained a reputation as nature's precious gift. Often called "liquid gold," it holds immense value due to its unparalleled health benefits. This remarkable substance serves as the initial nourishment for infants, providing them with a powerhouse of essential nutrients crucial for their growth and overall well-being. For millions of years, colostrum has played a vital role in safeguarding and strengthening the delicate mucosal barriers of newborns until their own defense systems mature.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: The Transformation Factory
Description: The Transformation Factory is a black-owned and Florida-based business founded by entrepreneur and motivational speaker Alexiou Gibson. We offer natural and healthy sea moss products so you can become the best version of yourself. Our line of products include raw sea moss, sea moss capsules and our popular wildcrafted sea moss gels in raw and fruit flavors featuring all the essential minerals for the human body. Our promise is to provide support and resources to help you succeed in your transformation journey. Follow us on Instagram @seamosstransformation.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: HYDRAGUN
Description:
Hydragun creates simple, premium recovery essentials for everyone who wants to feel good, get better, and live their best life.

We believe that everyone deserves to be able to perform at their very best every day. Peak performance isn’t just for professional athletes or “biohackers”. It is for anyone who wants to live life to the fullest—healthy in mind and body.

Also featured in: Forbes, Business Insider, GQ, Esquire, Elle, Women's Weekly, TechRadar, TimeOut and many more.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dermalogica Australia
Description:
Whoever said beauty is only skin deep had the right idea, as far as Dermalogica is concerned. Founded by Jane Wurwand in 1986, Dermalogica continues to dominate the professional skin care industry with distribution in over 100 countries. 

From day one at Dermalogica, you’ll find a common purpose linking every employee: bringing respect and success to the professional skin therapist through top-quality education, innovative products and outstanding customer service. We focus on skin health and products that truly deliver, not false "beauty" claims or miracle cures.

As a company founded by a woman entrepreneur in an industry where more women own their own businesses than any other, we know firsthand the power of education and skills training to transform women from job seekers to job creators.  We see it daily in the 100,000+ skin therapists we've trained, and in the women we sponsor worldwide.

Dermalogica develops women's skills so they can unleash their potential.

Name: Pink Rabbit Lens
Description:
Pink Rabbit Lens is a local brand of contact lenses managed by PT. Pinkrabbit Beautylens Indonesia that has been established since 2018. Our contact lens manufacturing process is made in South Korea with modern technology so that it can produce very high quality contact lenses. The contact lenses we produce also have an official distribution permit from the Ministry of Health Indonesia so they are proven safe to use.
We believe that when it comes to choosing contact lenses, comfort should come first and beauty should attach to it. That's precisely why we cater to the needs of everyone, whether you are a student, an employee, an artist, someone who needs lenses for wedding, for daily use, or anything, anytime. Enjoy your comfortable and beauty eye

Name: SOON TRADING
Description:
SO-ON Trading est spécialisée dans l'import, l’export la vente d’équipements et de produits paramédicaux, d'hygiène et aseptisation pour les professionnels de la santé, les entreprises et les particuliers.
Nous proposons une large gamme de produits de haute qualité en conformité avec les normes internationales.
Pour les particuliers, nous sommes à vos côtés pour vous conseiller et vous proposer le produit le mieux adapté à vos besoins afin de vous assurer les meilleures conditions de confort, d'hygiène et de sécurité.
Dans un environnement très concurrentiel, SO-ON TRADING offre une prestation basée sur le savoir-faire, l'écoute et l'entière disponibilité.
Notre éthique est basée sur le souci constant de la satisfaction totale de notre clientèle.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: The Healing Rose
Description:
Founded in 2016, The Healing Rose handcrafts organic body care products using 100% USDA Certified Organic essential oils, carrier oils, butters, waxes, and herbs. We use full spectrum CBD hemp oil that is free of pesticides, residual solvents, heavy metals, microbiological contaminants, and harmful nutrients/elements. We use herbal infusions and essential oils in various products for their powerful healing properties. We currently offer 5 product lines, including salves, roll on oils, lip balms, massage oils, and bath salts.  

We are a woman-led company that believes in only using 100% natural ingredients that are cruelty free, paraben free, & GMO free. We are found on the shelves on over 150 unique company’s shelves across 22 states and counting. We have plans to one day be a B Corp and we make sure to pay our employees well and always give back to our community. Our ethics and morals are the fabric of our company and we believe in always using GMP standards when producing our products.

Name: BIVOUAK
Description:
Chez Bivouak, nous souhaitons vous proposer une nouvelle alternative aux grandes marques de cosmétique pour homme.

C'est pourquoi nous vous offrons une solution, pour prendre soin de vous, tout en respectant votre peau, l'environnement, et le savoir-faire français.

C'est avec cette idée en tête que, contrairement à la majorité des marques présentes sur le marché, nous avons élaboré pour vous des soins pour homme, naturels, bio, artisanaux, et fabriqués en France.

Car la peau est le plus grand organe de notre corps et aussi le plus exposé, il nous parait normal, chez Bivouak, de la protéger avec ce que la nature a de mieux à nous offrir.

Bivouak est un appel à l’aventure, à la (re)découverte de soi et de la nature. C’est un retour aux sources, à l’authentique, au naturel.

Nous voulons des cosmétiques qui nous ressemblent, respectueux de notre peau et de l’environnement. Nous refusons les solutions faciles, les soins homme au look tapageur et aux parfums de supermarché.

Nous sommes des hommes, biens dans  notre époque, et nous recherchons l’excellence dans la simplicité. Nous croyons en la vie simple et vraie, aux plaisirs du quotidien, aux rêves accessibles, à notre côté sauvage.

Vous aussi, adoptez des soins Naturellement Authentiques... comme vous !

Name: Master CPPS COSMETOLOGIE - Ingéniérie de la Santé Montpellier
Description: Formulation, contrôles, évaluation, règlementation européenne, internationale, marketing, gestion de projet, packaging. Apprentissage : cours/TD/TP, Apprentissage par projet, learningLab, séminaires industriel, visite entreprise, salon cosmétique, anglais

Name: Meau
Description: We celebrate diverse skin and empower self-expression through sustainable skincare methods.

Name: Salon De Belleza
Description:
We at Salon de Beleza Co. are collaborating with cosmetics firms and fashion stylists.

What do we do? 
We provide internationally recognized qualifications for proficiency in professional Beauty Salons application techniques. 

What makes our qualifications special? 
Our qualifications are aimed specifically at Beauty Salon application for Beauty Salons – they are not vague ‘beauty’ qualifications for therapists or beauticians. We have a modern approach with realistic and contemporary criteria that are relevant to today’s Beauty industry. 

Who do we serve? 
We provide an industry benchmark for Cosmetologists and those who want to employ them. To hold a qualification, you must first have achieved a high level of skill in your field, thereby a potential employer or agent can be assured of your talent and credentials. For the qualified Cosmetologists, we offer a referral resource – simply agree to have an email link from our site and potential employers can reach you and you can follow up jobs that are posted on the Jobs Board Who uses our qualifications? 

Most Cosmetic Salon houses who employ counter staff would require a recognized independent qualification to show that the employee has the basic level of understanding in hygiene, application and client care. Any professional who wishes to receive insurance for public liability or against loss or damage to equipment such as your Cosmetologist kit through BABTAC you must hold a recognized qualification through an independent awarding body.

Name: Kolmar Korea
Description:
Beyond cosmetics, we create the value of beauty and health.

Kolmar Korea produces most loved cosmetics for the customers. Kolmar Korea is the first ODM in Korea that provides comprehensive end-to-end services from trend identification, product planning, product development, product shipment and to product management.

Name: Al Siraj Perfumes and Cosmetics Industries
Description:

Name: MARIEJEANNE
Description:
Founded by Georges Maubert in 2014, MarieJeanne is involved in every step of the process from the planting to the final fragrance. To offer the best perfume, the House collaborates with Robertet (1850), world’s leading supplier of sustainable raw materials.
Elaborated with natural essential oils that are carefully sourced, each one has its own originality.
The entire production is conditioned by hand in limited series in Grasse.

-

Créé par Georges Maubert en 2014, MarieJeanne s’implique dans toutes les étapes de fabrication, de l’origine des matières premières naturelles au parfum final. Pour offrir la meilleure fragrance, la Maison collabore avec Robertet (1850), leader mondial des matières premières naturelles.
Formulées avec des huiles essentielles naturelles soigneusement sélectionnées, chacune a son propre caractère.
L’ensemble de la production est conditionné à la main en petite série à Grasse.

Name: Karuna Skin
Description:
Karuna Skin has been pioneering skincare breakthroughs since 2009, when founder Linda Wang introduced the sheet mask to the US market.

At the time, the mission was a simple one; to provide simple and easy-to-use, effective skincare products. Linda’s interest in skincare was shaped by her childhood struggle with various skin issues such as allergies, rashes, and eczema. In 2007 after discovering the revolutionary sheet masks while on a trip to Taiwan, Linda decided to create her own. Two years later, Karuna Skin was born in Southern California.

In 2022, Karuna Skin launched the Balancing Collection, a 12-sku, simple to use, full of beneficial ingredients line of daily skincare products to address everyone’s skin challenges, all-the-while striving toward balanced skin.

Karuna’s mission remains true and more significant today. Our approach in achieving this mission is bringing you skincare by blending the four principles of Ayurveda practices; Traditional Chinese Medicine, Adaptogens, and Clinical Science together for effective formulations.

 We are constantly working to bring you innovative skincare without compromising any of the benefits. We continue to do this by leaving out ingredients that don’t provide a direct benefit to the skin. After all, compassion inspires everything we do, from how we source ingredients through ethical and sustainable practices, to making skincare an essential part of your self-care.

Available at Whole Foods stores nationwide, karunaskin.com, Amazon and other retailers.

Name: BISEKA
Description: Biseka manufactures all our products hygienically and carefully by hand in small batches with natural organic skincare & hair care ingredients. These ingredients are safer, non-toxic; harmless to your skin, than synthetic (chemical) counterparts used in large scale industries for cost efficiency purposes. We guarantee that all our Biseka products contain almost 60-100% herbal extracts. Therefore, we ensure the quality of the final product that you buy is purely natural; healthy as it can be. Generally, well marketed so-called; HERBAL; products in the market certify that their products are HERBAL; NATURAL, however, lacks the proper proof related to its authenticity. It is bit of a controversy within the beauty care field, which it is unrealistic for a mass-produced product to be entirely natural. But with BISEKA we do not only certify the quality of our product but also do possess the legal registry under the Ministry of Indigenous medicine (Reg.no. 6/2/1/01/95)

Name: Veronica Hair Replacement Solution
Description: Veronica Hair Replacement Solution is committed to providing non-surgical hair treatment services like hair wigs, hair bonding, hair weaving, hair clipping, etc. We are located in Delhi at three locations, Rajouri Garden, Pitampura, and Dwarka. We have more than 20000 clients. We are able to establish ourselves as a trusted brand for Hair wig fixing services in Delhi.

Name: CONFALONIERI MATITE SRL
Description:
Confalonieri matite, an Italian SME placed in Valchiavenna, has a centuries old history: founded as a chalks and pencils industry, it produces only cosmetic pencils under private label since 1969. Specialized in the development of cosmetic pencils and crayons, starting from that date, the company has become an important reality in Italy and all over the world. 
The production process, characterized by performing and sophisticated machineries, allows to reach the Confalonieri Matite’s first aim: propose a wide range of textures, colours, shapes and accessories in order to offer to the costumers exclusive finished pencils made upon his special requirements.
The company, having always researched a view to finding innovative solutions and formulae which produce quality results and ensure the protection and safety of any user’s skin, has its heart in the R&D division.

Name: Juman Pharmaceutical & Cosmetics Factory
Description: a pharmaceutical & cosmetics manufacturing and product development facility based in Jordan

Name: Avon Beauty Arabia
Description:
Avon Beauty Arabia a joint venture between Avon and Binzagr Family with both companies having been in existence for more than a century, the chemistry they have has resulted in excellent service in Saudi Arabia for 39 years.

With over 130 years of industry expertise, Avon is well-positioned to be the no.2 	direct beauty selling company in the world. 
We are the original social seller with 90% brand recognition in most major markets around the world.

Avon currently empowers over six million beauty entrepreneurs across the world to own their own business and advise customers on our quality beauty products at accessible prices.
Our concept of beauty is more than skin deep. We have 24,000+ Associates across 55 countries working together toward this higher purpose.
Our world-class team of 200+ scientists, engineers and specialists are constantly developing new, innovative technologies and high-quality products. 
We also support issues that matter to women, and to date have donated $1 billion to fighting breast cancer and domestic violence. 
 5th largest beauty product selling company while 2nd largest direct selling company in the world.

Name: Radical Skincare
Description:
RADICAL SKINCARE was founded by Liz and Rachel Edlich, the daughters of one of America's most famous plastic surgeons and skin wound healing specialists, Dr. Richard  F. Edlich MD, PHD.

RADICAL SKINCARE is a short, confident anti-aging skincare line delivering quick and visible results thanks to Trylacel, a proprietary technology capable of delivering high levels of antioxidants to the skin cells without breaking down and losing their potency.
 
RADICAL launched at Barney's in the US in September 2011, and rolled out in Europe, Middle East and Asia since then. Radical is distributed in selective department stores and perfumeries (Harrod's, Gum, SpaceNK, Harvey Nichols Dubai, Lane Crawford Hong Kong, Mecca Australia). Currently available in 4 countries, Radical is expanding and has a plan to enter 18 new markets in 2013.

In 2020, the Radical Sisters decided to focus on empowering women to achieve financial freedom. Instead of investing time and money in the retail stores, they decided their money was better spent invest in the women that want to have flexibility & financial freedom in running their own business. The Brand Partner program gives women a turn-key opportunity to build their own Radical Business utilizing a Prestige skincare line scientifically tested with PR and global presence to sell to customers at the best price available. Radical has invested in robust backend infrastructure for Brand Partners to grow their business with ease and offering favorable commission model. 
 
World Headquarters of Gratitude Beauty Malibu, Ca.

Name: My Derma Dream
Description:
My Derma Dream is fast-growth, 8-figure DTC skincare and beauty brand, founded in 2021 by Wouter Akika with a vision of helping everyone fall in love with their skin again and experience the confidence boost that comes with feeling BEAUTIFUL... by making skincare the most FUN, EASY, and POWERFUL part of your day.  

Our mission is to help people live their life of their dreams.

My Derma Dream values are:

#1 - Customer Obsession
#2 - Always Accountable

Name: LXMI
Description:
LXMI, pronounced /luxe-me/, is committed to three distinct brand tenets:

• Rare ingredients from unique terroir
• Going beyond charity to #givework to women
• Potent organic botanicals with rare #PlantPower

Named after the Hindu goddess of beauty, Lakshmi, whose four hands represent prosperity, liberation, morality and love – our seal shows two hands giving, and two hands receiving.

Leila Janah founded LXMI after a chance discovery of Nilotica, LXMI’s signature ingredient, at a market in Uganda. She was astounded by the rare butter’s ability to transform her moisture-deprived, overly traveled skin from lackluster to luminous. Once she learned that she could help marginalized East African women find dignified work through the wild harvesting, production and exportation of Nilotica, she knew she had to change her life to share her new skincare secret with the world.

But she didn’t stop there. She went the extra mile(s) to source Nilotica Reserve, now LXMI’s exclusive form of the butter, from the highest grade nuts in the most pristine areas of the Nile River Valley. Nilotica Reserve’s characteristics are skyhigh essential fatty acids (+25% that of traditional Shea Butter), natural vitamin crystals that dissolve on skin, and impact sourcing techniques to ensure that LXMI producers are always paid living wages for their efforts.

Our primary ingredient harvests enable our producers to earn at least 3x local wages. We’ve built our supply chain carefully via non-profit collectives. We believe that fair wage, dignified work elevates our end product, creating a higher level of luxury for discerning consumers. 

In fact, we promise that for each of our primary ingredient harvests, our producers earn at least 3x the local average wage. These living wages will help chip away at some of the world’s most serious problems, from childhood malnutrition to human trafficking. Let’s transform our skin, our planet, and people for the better.

Name: Johnson Publishing Company, LLC
Description:
FASHION FAIR is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Johnson Publishing Company, LLC and was created for women of color by the late Eunice W. Johnson, the creator of the Ebony Fashion Fair show.  As pioneering businesswomen, Johnson took the risk that most major cosmetic companies refused to take by entering the untapped market of makeup for women of color.

The journey to becoming the largest Black-owned cosmetics company in the world began when Johnson noticed models, in the Ebony Fashion Fair Show were mixing foundations to create the right blend to match their hues. Initially she approached existing cosmetics companies and urged them to create a line to meet the specific needs of women of color. Unfortunately, this request was met with great resistance. 

Mrs. Johnson and her late husband John H. Johnson, publisher of Ebony and Jet magazine, went to a private lab that developed formulas out of the mixtures the models created. After successfully applying this makeup on the models in the fashion show, the Johnsons produced The Capsule Collection, a mail-order package in 1969. Based on the overwhelming response, it was clear there was a demand for a Black cosmetics line. 

Fashion Fair Cosmetics was born in 1973, named after the fashion show that inspired it. With its feminine pink packaging and a wide range of shades, Fashion Fair Cosmetics was strategically marketed in high-end department stores. The line continued to expand by introducing skin care, fragrance and hair care products that addressed Black women's needs. 

A trusted brand by many, Fashion Fair Cosmetics remains deeply rooted in the African-American experience. The line can be found in fine stores across the United States as well as in Canada, UK, France, Africa and the Caribbean. 

Almost 40 years after the first counter opened, Fashion Fair Cosmetics continues to pursue it’s vision to become the preeminent global company that women of color trust to help them look and feel beautiful.

Para ello, seleccionan los ingredientes naturales más puros y los combinan con potentes extractos biotecnológicos de elaboración propia y agua termal para conseguir fórmulas magistrales únicas que combatan el envejecimiento celular y mejoren los problemas de la piel.

El resultado es una gama de productos efectivos (cremas, aceites, exfoliantes,…), con texturas maravillosas y aromas únicos así como auténticos “Best Sellers” que enamoran para siempre.

LA CIENCIA DE LA NATURALEZA EN TU PIEL
Todos nuestros productos están elaborados con altas concentraciones de ingredientes y principios activos naturales para una piel más protegida, cuidada y joven cada día.
Fórmulas maestras testadas, suaves y de alta tolerancia para la piel, especialmente para pieles sensibles. Productos libres de ingredientes artificiales o irritantes, parabenos, aceites minerales, siliconas, alcohol o sulfatos.
Cuidado de la piel avalado por más de 30 años de experiencia en investigación y dermocosmética aplicada a la creación de productos efectivos y únicos para mejorar la piel y corregir los signos de envejecimiento.

Name: Avon Garwolin
Description:
There are two Avon companies in Garwolin – Avon Operations Polska (AOP) and Avon Distribution Polska (ADP), which together form a backbone of Avon supply chain operations in the EMEA region.

Avon Operations Polska manages the largest and the most technologically advanced Avon factory worldwide. The innovative production plant employs approximately 1,000 people. Cosmetics manufactured here are distributed to approximately 50 countries on three continents. In 2022, the Avon factory in Garwolin produced over 48.8 million kg of the cosmetic pulp, 48 million bottles of perfume and 5.4 million lipsticks in 57 shades.

Avon Distribution Polska manages a distribution center responsible for packing and shipping orders to Avon Consultants in eight countries – Poland, Germany, the Czech Republic, Ukraine, Finland Estonia, Lithuania, Latvia, Spain and Portugal. Avon Distribution Polska employs approximately 300 people. In 2022, the Garwolin distribution center delivered over 109.3 million products in more than 4.2 million cartons to Avon Consultants.

**********************************************************************************

W Garwolinie działają dwie spółki Avon – Avon Operations Polska (AOP) i Avon Distribution Polska (ADP), które wspólnie stanowią rdzeń łańcucha dostaw firmy dla obszaru EMEA.

Avon Operations Polska zarządza największą i jednocześnie najbardziej zaawansowaną technologicznie fabryką Avon na świecie. Innowacyjny kompleks produkcyjny zatrudnia ok. 1000 pracowników. Co roku powstają tu kosmetyki, które trafiają do ok. 50 krajów na 3 kontynentach. W 2022 roku w fabryce Avon w Garwolinie wyprodukowano ponad 48,8 mln kg masy kosmetycznej, 48 mln sztuk perfum i 5,4 mln sztuk szminek w 57 odcieniach.

Avon Distribution Polska zarządza centrum dystrybucyjnym, które odpowiada za pakowanie i wysyłkę zamówień.

Name: KARETHIC
Description:

De la production du karité au Bénin au cœur de l’Atacora, zone reconnue réserve de Biosphère par l’Unesco, à la fabrication des produits en France, nous avons à cœur de préserver tout un écosystème pour maximiser notre impact social et environnemental positif. 

Nous faisons le choix d’un mode de production artisanal et durable qui valorise et préserve le savoir-faire de millions de femmes et les ressources de l’arbre de karité. Notre karité « Grand Cru », frais, pur, non traité (non raffiné) nous permet de créer des cosmétiques simples, d’efficacité supérieure avec une démarche minimaliste, zéro déchet et zéro pollution.

Name: Farmácias de Moçambique, S.A.
Description:
A Farmácias de Moçambique, S.A. constitui uma referência histórica e institucional no sector farmacêutico nacional, com quarenta e oito anos de serviço público dedicado à promoção do acesso equitativo a medicamentos e produtos de saúde. Integralmente detida pelo Estado Moçambicano, através do Instituto de Gestão das Participações do Estado, a  Farmácias de Moçambique materializa, desde 1977, o compromisso soberano com a protecção da saúde e o bem estar das comunidades.

Criada num período determinante da história nacional, então como Empresa Estatal de Farmácias, a Farmácias de Moçambique assumiu desde a sua génese a missão de edificar e expandir uma rede pública de farmácias capaz de garantir a disponibilidade de medicamentos essenciais em todo o território nacional. Ao longo das décadas, soube adaptar se às dinâmicas sociais, económicas e institucionais do País, consolidando se como um actor estratégico da saúde pública e um parceiro incontornável do Sistema Nacional de Saúde.

No âmbito da Reforma do Sector Empresarial do Estado, consagrada pela Lei n.º 3 de 2018, a Farmácias de Moçambique foi transformada em sociedade anónima, inaugurando uma nova etapa orientada para a modernização da gestão, o reforço da governação corporativa, a sustentabilidade financeira e a inovação operacional, sem nunca perder de vista a sua vocação pública e social.

Actualmente, a Farmácias de Moçambique ultrapassa o conceito tradicional de rede de farmácias. Com 32 unidades distribuídas de forma estratégica a nível nacional, com uma equipa de 144 profissionais qualificados, conjuga ciência, integridade e dedicação ao serviço público, promovendo confiança, proximidade e credibilidade junto dos cidadãos. 

Hoje, a Farmácias de Moçambique posiciona-se como muito mais do que uma farmácia. É um instrumento estratégico do Estado, um pilar da saúde pública e um elo de confiança ao serviço de todos os moçambicanos.

Hoje somos + do que uma Farmácia.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products
