Name: TopHill Wellness
Description:
Welcome to TopHill Wellness; Best of Nature!
Discover the essence of nature with TopHill Wellness, your premier destination for the finest quality herbal cosmetics, beauty and personal care, general wellness, nutraceuticals, Ayurvedic, and general medicine products. 
We, the founders of TopHill hail from the foothills of the majestic Himalayan range. Born and brought up in the lap of the Himalayas, we developed a profound love for nature and its incredible healing properties. Surrounded by the pristine beauty and rich biodiversity of the Himalayas, we were inspired to share the best of nature with the world. Our deep connection to these towering peaks, which represent the pinnacle of natural beauty and purity, is why we chose the name TopHill for our company. This name reflects our commitment to providing the highest quality Herbal Cosmetics, Ayurvedic, Nutritional Supplements and General Wellness products.
At TopHill, we believe in the power of natural ingredients. Our products are meticulously crafted using the finest quality herbs and botanicals, ensuring that you receive the best nature has to offer. We are committed to providing you with products that are free from harsh chemicals, so you can experience the benefits of nature without compromising on safety and effectiveness.
Explore our range of herbal cosmetics designed to enhance your beauty naturally. Our personal care products, made with love and care, cater to your daily wellness needs, while our nutraceutical products support your overall health and vitality. Dive into the ancient wisdom of Ayurveda with our specially formulated Ayurvedic products, and trust our general medicine products to support your health journey.
We offer a range of beauty and personal care products for men, women, and babies. Our range of products includes Herbal Cosmetics, Ayurvedic, Nutraceuticals, Medicinal products, and personal care products for all ages. We pride ourselves on offering exceptional baby care products.

Name: Conforto Industria E Comercio De Cosmeticos
Raaz App
Description:
1 in 4 men suffer from some kind of sexual dysfunction or reproductive health issue but if they happen to live in a small town or rural India and speak a vernacular language, they don’t have any access to quality information or solution. They then turn to quacks and spend their hard earned money on snake oil treatments. Raaz aims to tap into their familiar user interface to offer them discreet doctor consultation and scientifically proven medication.

Julian Simon’s words that individuals are the ultimate resource with potential to make any other resource more plentiful have never rang truer than they do today. The rapid decline in fertility rates across the world is a cause of deep disarray to those of us who believe in abundance and human flourishing. It’s even more concerning for India as it risks becoming old before it becomes rich. Building Raaz is our small attempt at reversing that and helping couples have children through innovative reproductive health solutions while upholding individual choice.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Why? Because it's about treating the whole self, not just things at the surface level—so that it becomes a lifestyle versus a temporary solution.

We aren’t here to sell you an endless cycle of products, our goal is help you look and feel back to your original self again. So that you feel present and reconnected to the environment, your mind, and your body. Welcome to beauty at ease, the Traditional Chinese Medicine way. 

Featured in Vogue, Elle, Vanity Fair, Allure and more.

Comme tous les parents, je voulais le meilleur pour la peau de mon bébé : il me fallait une alternative 100% naturelle, ultra douce et efficace pour prendre soin de sa peau fragilisée.

Trop d’eau, trop de pétrochimie, trop d’ingrédients irritants dans les cosmétiques... Et si la solution était de réduire le superflu et de revenir à l'essentiel?

Grâce à notre science de la peau atopique et en étroite collaboration avec les experts de la santé (dermatologues, toxicologues, médecins, pharmaciens) nous développons les soins les plus doux spécialement adaptés aux peaux les plus fragiles et à leurs exigences.

Ultra-concentrés en actifs naturels, nos soins agissent en synergie avec la peau pour la renforcer, la rééquilibrer et pour prévenir l’inflammation chronique. Tous nos soins sont élaborés et fabriqués en France. 

Vous avez à cœur de recommander à vos patients des produits conçus pour respecter et protéger les peaux les plus fragiles, grâce à des formules d’une pureté inégalée ? Rejoignez-nous dans cette mission et contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui !

Name: Biosme Paris
Description:
Toute l'aventure BIOSME a démarré sur un drôle de défi, formuler un déodorant naturel qui fonctionne vraiment ! Nous étions alors loin de nous imaginer ce que ce projet allait nous révéler : l'importance du Microbiome humain, son extraordinaire fonctionnement et tout ce que la cosmétique pouvait faire pour le préserver.

En 2015, nous avons breveté un complexe associant des ferments de saccharomyces et de lactobacilles offrant une protection remarquable contre les odeurs corporelles, le complexe Pro-active deo. Ce complexe d'actifs a donné naissance à la première gamme de la société : les déodorants aux actifs probiotiques daydry, aujourd'hui certifié COSMOS. 

En lançant daydry probiotics et en créant BIOSME, nous avons cassé (sans le chercher vraiment) les codes de la cosmétique. Nous avons imaginé des formules pionnières efficaces, simples et courtes, qui respectent au mieux le microbiome cutané encore si mal connu. Nous nous sommes engagés pour une cosmétique naturelle et bio, vegan et fabriquée en France. Ces valeurs nous poussent chaque jour à imaginer de nouveaux soins pour tous les types de peaux et toute la famille. 

L'aventure ne fait que commencer. De la diversité de notre microbiote dépend notre santé, BIOSME s’engage à le protéger.

Name: SISTERWOULD
Description:
High-performing skincare ingredients for your hair and scalp. Empowering and embracing inclusivity.

Globally there are over 2.2 billion people living with blindness or visual impairments. This number is due to rise 50% by 2050.

We believe everyone deserves to bask in the pleasure of washing their hair and scalp. For some, this seemingly simple ritual is taken for granted. SISTERWOULD haircare exists to help everyone turn washing their hair into an enjoyable moment of selfcare.

With a passion and drive for creating a beauty brand with purpose, Rina and Flo saw a gap in the market for an inclusive, scientifically formulated, haircare brand. At a time when people were fed up with the stereotypes and typical representations of women in beauty, the two friends set the goal to break down the hierarchy of A-typical beauty and challenge the status quo. This drove the innovation behind their formulations, which ensures every hair concern (from dandruff to psoriasis), and type (thick to brittle) was catered to. Even minority or often forgotten groups of women, such as those experiencing postpartum hair loss, alopecia or those undergoing chemotherapy have been considered.

With visually impaired family members, they also discovered the daily plight and frustrations felt by this self-care routine. Working with Vision Australia, they had universal brail included on their packaging and placed an emphasis on the sensory experience, including tactile ingredients to help with the differentiation between products. They also created a tactile imprinting system horizontal line = for shampoo and dots ::: for conditioner for those who can’t read braille.

SISTERWOULD haircare products are designed to support women in their scalp health and hair growth journey. Infused with nourishing Native Australian plant extracts, our formulas target the root causes of hair concerns like postpartum hair loss and scalp sensitivity.

Loved by A- list celebrities and featured on Forbes.

Description:
who says well rounded regimens and good-for-you ingredients have to be confined to the face? at TINGE, we’re reimagining beauty inclusive of the body.

in the summer of 2021, we debuted the TINGE tint, a lightweight, long-lasting body makeup that is proudly vegan, cruelty-free and made in the USA. each of our water-resistant + transfer-resistant shades were thoughtfully designed with buildable coverage to be worn in every season and for every occasion. the TINGE tint is available for purchase in twelve undertone-oriented shades, the most expansive range in the body complexion category to date. the formula's medium coverage and undetectable finish work in perfect harmony to keep you looking and (most importantly!) feeling like yourself— evening out the complexion below the neck, while easing the appearance of redness, veins, discoloration and blemishes where you wish.

in the future, you can find us launching innovative body-centric products packed with the finest ingredients that are sure to leave a lasting impact, as you make yours.

TINGE was one of ten brands selected for Target’s 2022 Takeoff Beauty cohort. TINGE has been featured in Forbes, Byrdie, Thingtesting, Global Cosmetic Industry, Glossy, and more.

Name: DUOLAB
Description:
Duolab, is an innovative start-up based in Switzerland.
The Duolab system, developed in collaboration with L’OCCITANE Group,  offers on-demand personalisation of this freshly blended, preservative-free skincare solution, which is both natural and results-driven. The patented innovation comprises a device, a range of capsules – including three moisturising bases and five targeted concentrates – and a skin diagnostic tool. The tool assesses the customer’s skin requirements and generates a personalised care protocol. Cycle after cycle, the protocol recommends different combinations of capsules for morning and evening, taking into account each customer’s specific needs. A patented emulsification process delivers a freshly blended monodose in 90 seconds. Duolab’s thermo-cosmetic technology warms the cream to the skin’s natural temperature, thereby boosting its penetration and efficacy. Customers can either buy their capsules on the go or have a set delivered to their door monthly through a subscription.

Name: Bamboo Balance Perú
Description:
Alternativas sostenibles a los desechables de uso diario hechos en Perú de la mano de comunidades nativas, productores locales y poblaciones vulnerables. 

Somos tus aliados para vivir en balance en un mundo lleno de plástico… Tú eliges!  o
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PROCOLUIDE
Description:
PROCOLUIDE is a designer and manufacturer of haircare and skincare cosmetics collaborating with referent international brands.

Our mission: for more than 30 years, PROCOLUIDE has been dedicated to offer the most reliable and flexible full service from concept to finish products: formulation, supply, packaging, manufacturing and delivery. 

Our vision: delivering innovating global solutions enabling our customers to differentiate themselves beyond their products, and then succeed on the market. 

We want to push the boundaries of traditional subcontracting by integrating a strong culture of innovation at every level.

Furthermore, we are committed to providing the highest quality to our customers while respecting international regulatory and safety standards at all stages of production.

Our accreditations about quality:
ISO 9001: Quality Management Systems
ISO 22716: Good Manufacturing Practice
ISO 26000: Corporate Social Responsibility Management

Our accreditations about social and environmental responsibility:
ISO 14001: Environmental Management System
ISO 26000: Corporate Social Responsibility Management
Ecovadis independant audit and accreditation  / Ecocert: Organic certification 

Create, Defy, Go ahead with PROCOLUIDE.

For more information, visit our website at www.procoluide.com or send an e-mail at contact@procoluide.fr

Name: Look Fabulous Forever
Description: Look Fabulous Forever is an award-winning, fast growth e-commerce business which over the past five years has established itself as a disruptive force within the beauty industry.  Our range of colour cosmetics and skincare (launching in October 2018) has been created specifically with the needs of older women in mind.  We only use real women in all our advertising and imagery, and we have a strong belief in a pro-age approach to beauty where older women are celebrated.  We aren’t about trying to make women look younger, just more fabulous!

Name: Wild Oak
Description:
We are creating a wellness company focused on the power of nature and sustainability. We realize that in the world of social media and e-commerce, information and options are abundant. What is lacking is a solid way for customers to make a decision about what is best for them and trust a brand. Greenwashing and misleading are rampant and at Wild Oak, we aim to change that with our offerings.

We are building a community and offering a range of products for a holistic lifestyle. 

- AI and health professionals driven community: A Quora-like space for all to discuss, ask, and share their health journey. Our AI tool would answer most questions related to skincare and our health professionals will fact-check it.  

- Skin Care Range: Absolutely natural products backed by research and inspired by ancient knowledge of the different cultures of the world. With no added color or fragrance (either natural or synthetic), no sulfates or parabens, all packaged in aluminum packaging which is one of the most recycled materials in the world. 

We would be adding different categories to our brand with time and constantly researching natural ways to keep the earth and you healthy.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: mixsoon (Parket Inc.)
Description:
Mixsoon is a minimalist K-beauty skincare brand rooted in the philosophy of “less is more.” We believe in delivering powerful results through clean, ingredient-focused formulas - without unnecessary fillers or overcomplicated routines.

Our products are designed to let each ingredient shine, from our hero Bean Essence to our ultra-calming Centella line. Backed by simplicity, efficacy, and transparency, Mixsoon empowers all skin types to achieve balance and health - naturally.

With growing global demand, Mixsoon has expanded across Asia, Europe, and North America, building trusted B2B partnerships and gaining recognition at leading beauty exhibitions including Cosmoprof, InterCHARM, and Beautyworld Middle East.

Why Mixsoon?
	•	Ingredient-first formulas, developed with precision
	•	Cruelty-free and EWG-safe formulations
	•	Transparent, sustainable packaging
	•	A full routine that simplifies skincare without compromising results

We’re proud to be a part of the next generation of K-beauty: clean, conscious, and globally connected.

Let’s connect.
We partner with retailers, distributors, and beauty professionals who believe in meaningful skincare.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: PhytoDerm (G.M. COLLIN - Yon-Ka Canada)
Description:
Phytoderm Skin Care Inc. was founded in 1976. The company was distributing skin care products to professionals in Canada.

In 1980, Phytoderm Skin Care Inc. started to import and distribute Yonka products from Laboratoires Multaler, an European company. The company has maintained its relationship with Laboratoires Multaler for over 35 years and is the second-biggest distributor of Yonka products in the world.

In 1990, Laboratoires Dermo-Cosmetik Inc. was created and acquired the G.M. Collin brand for exclusive use in the North American market. From now on, it would develop and manufacture the G.M. Collin products. The products have been adapted to enhance their dermo-corrective capacity to suit the North American climate and way of life. Over the years, the company has become known for using the latest technology to develop innovative skin care products.

Laboratoires Dermo-Cosmetik Inc. designs, creates, manufactures and promotes its own variety of skin care products (G.M. Collin and GMC Medical). G.M. Collin Canada Inc. and GMC Skin Care USA Inc. distributes both lines in Canada and in the United States respectively to professional aestheticians and dermatologists.

Over the years, we have evolved, but the objectives have remained the same. We are still committed to provide women and men of all ages with high quality and high performance skin care products and support skin care professionals who partnered with us. The well-being and self-confidence of our clients and their customers have always been and will always be our top priority!

_________________________________________________________________

Soins Esthétiques Phytoderm Inc. a été fondée en 1976. La compagnie distribuait des produits de soins de la peau à des professionnels au Canada.

En 1980, elle a commencé à importer et à distribuer les produits Yonka des Laboratoires Multaler, une compagnie européenne. Soins Esthétiques Phytoderm Inc. maintient sa relation avec les Laboratoires Multaler depuis plus de 35 ans et est le deuxième plus grand distributeur de produits Yonka au monde.

En 1990, Laboratoires Dermo-Cosmetik Inc. a été créé et a acquis la marque G.M. Collin pour une distribution exclusive sur le marché nord-américain. Depuis, la compagnie développe et fabrique les produits G.M. Collin. Ceux-ci ont été adaptés pour améliorer leur capacité dermo-corrective en fonction du climat et du mode de vie nord-américain. À ce jour, la compagnie est reconnue pour l’utilisation des dernières technologies pour développer des produits innovateurs de soins de la peau.

Laboratoires Dermo-Cosmetik Inc. conçoit, crée, fabrique et assure la promotion de sa propre variété de produits de soins de la peau : G.M. Collin et GMC Médical. G.M. Collin Canada Inc. et GMC Skin Care USA Inc. distribuent les deux gammes respectivement au Canada et aux États-Unis aux professionnels de soins de la peau et aux dermatologues.

Au fil des ans, la compagnie a évolué, mais les objectifs sont restés les mêmes. Nous sommes toujours déterminés à fournir aux femmes et aux hommes de tous âges des produits de soins de la peau de haute qualité et de haute performance et à soutenir les professionnels de la peau qui collaborent avec nous. Le bien-être et la confiance en soi de nos clients et de leurs clients ont toujours été et seront toujours notre priorité!

Name: SKINLAB
Description:
SKINLAB was founded in 1991 in Sydney, Australia, and over the past two decades it has emerged as one of the leading names in the industry. Backed by extensive research facilities and leveraging its high expertise in industrial technology in the field of cosmetics; but what’s the secret?

SKINLAB, dermatologist-biotechnologist-chemist based, spearheaded by a LEAGUE of international dermatologists saw the gap in skin care beauty products where essential issues such as the genetics, climate and the cultural skin care habits of consumers were not taken into full account in development.

As the skin varies according to such factors, selecting the right synergy of active ingredients that would be effective yet safe, and would suit the regional climate conditions as well as the cultural behavior of consumers would prove the brand’s R&D team key to success...

Name: Nimue Skin International
Description:
Nimue Skin Technology is a derma-cosmeceutical brand that was developed in 1994 by leading skincare scientists aimed at the medical market for pre- and post-operative application.

Since then, Nimue has evolved into a recognised professional skincare brand distributed globally, renowned for an expert understanding of the skin, innovative formulations, cutting edge technology and effective combination, concentration and strength of active ingredients.

“At Nimue Skin Technology, we treat the cause and not the symptom of a skin condition through our innovative skin classification concept system. Our results orientated approach of professionally administered treatments, complemented by prescribed home care products, ensures clients see significant visible results that drive brand loyalty and keep them coming back”.

Nimue’s advanced and powerful formulations effectively treat the majority
of skin concerns including: fine lines, wrinkles, sagging, pigmentation, uneven skin tone, dryness, oiliness, acne, rosacea and eczema.

Name: REGUL BEAUTY
Description:
Elodie BUSSO created her own Agency of Consulting in Cosmetic Regulatory Affair to apply her experience and her knowledges for the benefit to the cosmetic brands according to her values: proximity, responsiveness and sympathetic consideration.
Armed with extensive professional experience acquired over years in the European and International Cosmetic Regulation, she wishes with REGUL BEAUTY helping the cosmetic brands in the development of their products in various desired countries.

Name: Smartway Wellness Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Smartway Wellness Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering healthcare enterprise dedicated to revolutionising cardiac and diabetic care. Established in June 2021, Smartway's comprehensive portfolio encompasses cardiac and diabetic medications, over-the-counter remedies, and a diverse range of more than 400+ innovative healthcare products.

Within a short span of time, Smartway Wellness has initiated a new era in the pharmaceutical industry, making significant contributions in the realm of generic medicines.

MISSION: To improve lives by delivering high-quality healthcare solutions that are accessible, affordable, and available to individuals across all walks of life.
Our mantra is 'Swastha Bharat'; we are committed to enhancing well-being and contributing to a healthier society.

VISION: To be a pioneering force in the pharmaceutical industry, recognised for our transformative impact on cardiac and diabetic care. We envision a future where our innovative healthcare solutions lead to improved patient outcomes, setting new standards of excellence.

INFRASTRUCTURE AND TEAM: Smartway Wellness thrives on a strong foundation, boasting 1000+ skilled employees and offering a portfolio of 350+ innovative products. With coverage spanning 1300+ stockists and 600,000+ retailers nationwide, our commitment to accessibility is unwavering. Anchored by a 6200+ sq. f.t corporate office and a vast 120000+ sq. f.t warehouse, we're poised to deliver quality healthcare solutions at every corner.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: WU Indústria e Comércio de Cosméticos
Description: Fundada na década de 90, a Wu teve suas atividades iniciadas no Brasil pelo Engenheiro Químico Pablo Neira, Fundador e Presidente da Wu, que com experiência de mais de trinta anos dedicados a estudar e formular produtos, baseado em antigos ensinamentos orientais, sempre buscou um "novo" conceito de beleza associando a estética corporal à harmonia espiritual.

Name: Profesional Cosmetics S.A.
Description:
We are a family business dedicated to manufacturing and selling professional hair products since 1932.

Profesional Cosmetics S.A. was founded in Barcelona with the aim to offer to the professional hairdresser high quality products at a competitive price. 

Now we are selling our products to more than 55 countries.
We are color specialists and our hair color cream Artecolor is recognized worldwide for its excellence.

Our technology and know-how allowed us to start producing private label and sell our products in bulk for local filling.

Our facilities have clean rooms and are equipped with latest-technology machinery. We have more than 6.000 m2 dedicated to the creation, developing and manufacturing of products for the beauty and care of the hair.

With the constant desire to improve and offer the highest quality of our products and services, we have UNE-EN ISO 9001: 2015 certification, which is the basis of the quality management system and UNE- EN ISO 22716: 2007 which sets out the Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) evaluated by the International Standard Organization (ISO) and which guarantees the highest quality in the field of cosmetics worldwide.

In Profesional Cosmetics we have a clear objective: hair beauty.
Location: Sant Andreu de la Barca, Barcelona

Name: Verso Skincare
Description:
Swedish skincare pioneering Vitamin A since 2013. 

From the unique Vitamin A complex Retinol 8 to the birth of NEAR 1 – Verso’s patented molecule – our science-first philosophy continues to manifest. Our mission is to lead a skincare revolution with easy-to-use, effective, and multifunctional products verified by science.

Verso Skincare is available from versoskincare.com and globally with premium retailers, spas, and skincare experts.

Follow us:                               
Instagram: versoskincare
Facebook: versoskincare

Name: Biopelle
Description:
Biopelle, Inc., the aesthetic subsidiary of Ferndale Pharma Group, Inc., is a worldwide leader in the development and distribution of clinically proven skincare products. Biopelle is committed to helping aesthetic professionals deliver evidence-based, patented technologies that target multiple metabolic pathways to address demanding skin and deliver visible results. Delivering high-quality, professional products through licensed Healthcare Providers, Biopelle's brands cover “a global spectrum of skin care” through its two main pillars: biopelle (including Retriderm, Tensage Growth Factor and Tensage Stem Cell with Cellpro Technology - a NEW pathway of rejuvenation) and PRESCRIBEDsolutions, the only multi-tasking customizable skincare line with boosters.  

About the Ferndale Pharma Group:
Founded in 1897, the J.F. Hartz Company provided surgical instruments, medical supplies, and equipment to the medical profession. Years later the name was changed to Ferndale Surgical and Laboratories. In 1975, the company, then called Ferndale Laboratories, Inc., embarked on a mission to grow from a local pharmaceutical manufacturer to a healthcare company with national recognition. In 2004, Ferndale Laboratories, Inc. reorganized to form the Ferndale Pharma Group, Inc., the holding company for a number of healthcare specialty companies, including: Biopelle, Inc., Ferndale Healthcare, Inc., Eloquest Healthcare, Inc., Ferndale Laboratories, Inc. and Ferndale Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Within this organizational structure, our subsidiaries are able to rapidly capitalize on opportunities to advance our businesses by providing stakeholders (healthcare professionals, patients, business partners, and associates) with medical solutions that enable patients to live healthier lives. We remain dedicated to taking a leadership role in providing information, brands, and services to facilitate patient care.

Name: Les Ateliers du Saupont
Description:
Bienvenue aux Ateliers du Saupont, un microcosm’éthique de toute beauté !
Depuis 50 ans, nous produisons des cosmétiques en sous-traitance et œuvrons pour une société plus inclusive et égalitaire.

Name: Natana Cosmetics - Conscious Beauty
Description:
Natana va más allá de la cosmética natural. Somos una marca consciente, comprometida con el desarrollo sostenible de nuestro Planeta y  que quiere tener impacto positivo en nuestra comunidad.

Natana apuesta por la innovación, la alta calidad y eficacia de sus productos a partir de la combinación de ingredientes naturales, algunos de ellos obtenidos por Economía Circular –Upcycling–, con otros principios activos.

Lees Concentrated es nuestro primer activo natural obtenido por Upcycling a partir de las lías del vino (subproducto de la primera fermentación de la uva). Tiene su origen exclusivo en el Empordà, zona que se caracteriza por su viento de Tramontana y por la esencia del Mediterráneo. Es un postbiótico antioxidante que protege nuestra piel.

Natana quiere contribuir a democratizar la cosmética porque entendemos que esta es también bienestar y salud, y lo hacemos a partir de ser una marca nativa digital. 

Queremos aportar nuestro grano de arena, no solo a la cosmética, sino a la forma de vivirla, entenderla y consumirla. 

Cuida tu piel con Natana y únete al movimiento Conscious Beauty.

Name: Loja do Shampoo
Description: Loja do Shampoo - Cosmética e Perfumes é líder de vendas online em Portugal na área dos Shampoos. É uma loja 100% portuguesa. Em 2018 e 2019 conquistou o Prémio “Gazela”, devido ao seu rápido e sustentado crescimento. Em 2023 foi eleita Escolha do Consumidor, na categorias de Loja de Coméstica.

Name: Parissa Laboratories Inc.
Description:
Parissa is a leader in all-natural waxing and skincare solutions. Our Canadian-made products exemplify our commitment to supporting local economies and sustainable practices. Formulated based on rigorous research, testing, and industry expertise, our products are designed to be safe and effective.

We prioritize natural and organic ingredients that are safe for our customers and the environment, advocating for clean beauty. We are dedicated to reducing our environmental impact through sustainable practices in our manufacturing, packaging, and delivery processes. Parissa products are USDA certified, and our product lines include organic and vegan options. Additionally, our waxes are cruelty-free, and we are proud members of The Leaping Bunny Program.

At Parissa, we are committed to making natural, high-quality, and safe self-care products accessible to everyone. Our mission is to empower individuals to elevate their grooming routines and feel confident in their own skin.

Join us in our pursuit of skin wellness and elegance, merging tradition, innovation, and a dedication to Smooth, Clean, Simple Skincare at Parissa.com.

Name: RIOBELO
Description:
RIOBELO is a Professional Brazilian Hair Cosmetic company.  We provide authentic premium Brazilian Hair Treatments using avant-garde innovative technology,  and the highest quality ingredients that are both safe to use and environmentally friendly,  
At RIOBELO we are committed to excellence in everything we do.  Our partner and client relationships are driven by trust, reliability, and professionalism. Our team of experts is constantly working on R&D to provide users with accessible solutions that are efficient and value-driven. We take particular pride in the  20 minutes only technology that combines practicality with outstanding results.  
Our product lines are carefully crafted to provide customers worldwide with quality Brazilian professional hair care products for both salon and home use with consistent beautiful results every time.

Name: Vitality CBD
Description:
Vitality CBD is a premium CBD oil company backed by a team with a strong history in the pharmaceutical industry. Our communal knowledge base means that we can provide clear, concise, and comprehensive marketing support in an ever-evolving industry. 

By utilising our expertise and rigorous scientific process, at Vitality CBD we’ve successfully realised our goal of harnessing the natural synergy of the hemp plant. Since we’re in tune with the biology behind our product portfolio, we curate better CBD experiences, and better client relationships.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: IFSCC Congress Barcelona 2023
Description:
The 33rd IFSCC Congress will take place in Barcelona, Spain, from 4th to 7th September 2023 and we would like to welcome you.

Under the theme «Rethinking Beauty Science» we will try to deal with the most current and relevant scientific topics in the sector divided into 3 large specific groups:

• Rethinking Skin Science: Skin, oral, sun, and hair care: breakthrough technologies for cosmetic developments promoted by recent scientific research. New substances, new functions, new efficacies, new evaluation techniques.
• Rethinking Beauty Science: Texture, odor and color, multi-sensoriality. A strong added value to cosmetics, its impact on uses, consumers and marketing. Cosmetic and beauty product experiences backed up by technology.
• Rethinking Nature: Responsible cosmetic development. What have we learned from nature? Towards the guarantee of safer cosmetic products.

For more information, please visit our web page: www.ifscc2023.com

Name: Univest Group
Description:
Univest Group, headquartered in Cairo, was founded in 1974 by Mr. Aboud Soliman and operates in the field of manufacturing, marketing and distribution of cosmetics, skin care products, fragrances and toiletries. 

The brand portfolio includes over 20 international brands extending from selective brands to mid-market brands as well as mass and FMCG. 

The company has also developed its own cosmetic brand, Cybele, addressing the large Egyptian mid-segment beauty market. The company owns a modern production facility constructed over 3000 m2 (extendable to 6000 m2). The facility is 9001 ISO certified.
The company operates 12 retail stores and employs over 400 full time employees.

Name: CareLine
Description:
Established in 1982 Sydney, Australia, CareLine emerged as one of the leading manufacturers in the field of cosmetics. Compelling their source research facilities and utilising high expertise in industrial technology, CareLine managed to expand rapidly over Australia and the Far East gaining the trust of its clients by ensuring a wide range of products, services, guidance, methodical information consultancy and support.

Owners of the universal skincare brand SKINLAB, StripWax, CareLine Naturals and Nose Strips.

Name: Dr.WELLNESSON
Description:
Welcome to Dr. WELLNESSON!

At Dr. WELLNESSON, we’re on a mission to redefine health and wellness through natural, high-quality products that fit seamlessly into everyday life. From nutritious snacks like roasted soya nuts to multigrain health mixes and ready-to-eat solutions, we offer a range of products crafted to support a healthier and happier lifestyle for all ages.

But we’re more than just a wellness brand—we’re a movement to empower individuals. Through our innovative Micro-Entrepreneur Program, we provide a platform for aspiring entrepreneurs to start their journey in the FMCG sector with low investment and high growth potential. Whether you’re a homemaker, student, or someone looking to generate extra income, Dr. WELLNESSON is here to support you with training, marketing tools, and a portfolio of trusted products.

Why Choose Dr. WELLNESSON?

100% natural, preservative-free, and chemical-free products.
Designed for health-conscious individuals and families.
A trusted platform to grow your entrepreneurial dreams.
Our Vision:
To transform lives by promoting healthier lifestyles and creating opportunities for financial independence.

Join Us!
Explore our products, partner with us as a distributor, or connect with us for collaborations. Together, let’s build a healthier, wealthier, and happier future.

#HealthierTomorrow #WellnessOn #Entrepreneurship #HealthyLiving
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: asap skin products
Description: Proudly Australian made and owned, asap is Australia’s number one cosmeceutical skincare range, providing fast acting, results driven skincare with visible results. Formulations contain optimum levels of the most innovative and technologically advanced ingredients. asap works hard to make beautiful skin easy.

Name: Uoga Uoga
Description: At “Uoga Uoga” we produce high-quality cosmetics from natural and fresh ingredients. We aim to take care of your health and beauty by using presents from nature. We choose unrefined cold-pressed oils of the highest quality, cosmetic clays, Lithuanian honey and herbs, fresh berries, precious amber – also called the gold of Baltic Sea, and pure organic essential oils. We do not use any synthetic colours or fragrances, mineral oils, aggressive artificial preservatives and other materials, which are thought to be harmful to people or environment.

Name: OJSC Concern "Kalina"
Description:
ООО Концерн «Калина» является косметической компанией, выпускающей и предлагающей своим потребителям в России, странах Европы и СНГ большое разнообразие косметической продукции и бытовой химии. 

Концерн «Калина» развивает сильные бренды во всех ключевых сегментах российского парфюмерно-косметического рынка. Благодаря таким брендам, как «Черный жемчуг», «Чистая линия», «Бархатные ручки», «100 рецептов красоты», «32», «Лесной бальзам», , «Dr.Scheller» обладающим высокими показателями узнаваемости и лояльности к ним со стороны потребителей в СНГ и Европе, Концерн «Калина» является лидером в сегменте средств по уходу за кожей и одним из лидеров в сегменте средств по уходу за полостью рта на российском рынке и рынках стран СНГ, а также находится среди лидеров в сегментах средств по уходу за кожей на рынке Германии. Компания также активно работает в сегментах средств по уходу за волосами и косметики для мужчин. 

Штаб-квартира и основные производственные мощности Концерна «Калина» расположены в Екатеринбурге (Россия). В состав Концерна, помимо головного предприятия в Екатеринбурге, входят предприятия «Паллада-Украина», «Главсказка Интернешнл», «Dr. Scheller Beauty Center», «Калина Финанс», Kalina International SA (Швейцария), Kalina Overseas Holding B.V. (Нидерланды) и DSN Cosmetics GmbH (Германия).

Name: Mateo Care
Description:
"Welcome to Mateo, a Care provider of high-quality and innovative baby care products. We are dedicated to nurturing happy and healthy babies, providing parents with the peace of mind they deserve.

At Mateo, we understand the unique needs of both babies and parents, and we are committed to developing safe, reliable, and dermatological-tested products that enhance the well-being of little ones. From gentle skincare essentials to practical baby gear, our extensive range of products is designed to support every stage of your baby's growth.

With a team of passionate experts, we meticulously craft each product with the utmost care and attention to detail. We prioritize safety, using only the finest natural ingredients and adhering to the highest industry standards. Our products are rigorously tested to ensure they meet and exceed expectations, giving parents the confidence they need to provide the best care for their precious bundles of joy.

We believe in the power of innovation and continuous improvement. Our dedicated research and development team constantly explores new technologies and trends to create cutting-edge solutions that make parenting a joyful and fulfilling experience. We also strive to minimize our environmental footprint, incorporating sustainable practices throughout our manufacturing and packaging processes.

Join us on our mission to create a world where every baby is cherished and nurtured. Connect with us to stay updated on the latest advancements in baby care, parenting tips, and exclusive offers. Together, we can provide the best possible start in life for your little one.

Visit our website www.mateocare.com to explore our range of products and discover why parents around the world trust Mateo for their baby care needs. Connect with us today!"
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dr. Vacina
Description: Você está diante de uma das redes que mais cresce no segmento de saúde e prevenção no Brasil. O Dr. Vacina é sinônimo de confiança, inovação e resultado! E isso se reflete em todos os nossos franqueados. Acesse: https://franqueado.drvacina.com/franqueado
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Pioneer Hygiene Sales Private Limited
Description:
Pioneer Hygiene Sales Pvt. Ltd. (PHSPL)
Established in 2003, Pioneer Hygiene Sales Pvt. Ltd. (PHSPL) is a leading manufacturer and marketer of disposable hygiene products in India. Promoted by seasoned entrepreneurs from a diversified business group, PHSPL combines strong business acumen with deep industry insight.

With manufacturing facilities strategically located in Central India, we are well-positioned to serve customers efficiently across the country. Our core product offerings include Sanitary Napkins and Underpads, manufactured under our flagship brands HUSH, TIDY, and MIRACLE.

In addition to our domestic manufacturing, we also import and market a wide range of personal hygiene products including Baby Diapers, Adult Diapers, and Maternity Pads—ensuring we cater to every hygiene need with quality and care.

At PHSPL, our focus is simple: deliver trusted hygiene solutions that improve everyday lives.

Name: Cavlamer Paris
Description:
In the depths of the ocean, where the most elegant and exquisite creatures swim, caviar is found, a marine gift reserved only for the most refined and demanding palates.

The founder of CAVLAMER, wanted to find with his cosmetics the formula for eternal youth and radiant beauty. Caviar was the ingredient he needed because of its regenerating power, enhancing the beauty and rejuvenation of the skin. For that reason, we dived from the depths of the ocean and created CAVLAMER a luxury cosmetics brand that uses caviar as its main base. 

Each CAVLAMER product is a work of art, made with the finest natural ingredients and a dose of the highest quality caviar capable of transforming the skin, restoring lost youth and natural radiance.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: MOB Beauty
Description:
MOB is pro-quality makeup without compromise and we’re here to build beauty for a better future. MOB is for anyone who digs deeper into what they buy, demands accountability and quality from their makeup, considers clean to be a necessity, and believes packaging needs to be re-thought. 

We are a team of ambitious beauty industry vets that have come together with a purpose. Join the MOB Nation.

Name: Promise Cosmetics
Description:
Welcome to the Promise Family!

Promise is the international cosmetics brand that was founded with today’s fast-paced beauty lovers in mind, transforming skincare routines from task to treat. Our products are optimized for modern young women on the go, with smart, innovative formulas that are so fun to use, you’ll want to try them over and over again.

Promise was established in 2015 by Asaf Dekel, who was looking to create a new kind of skincare that would be fun, easy to use, and effective too, without compromising on quality or results. Based on the cosmetics knowledge of three generations, Promise was born, offering transformative, affordable beauty care for women everywhere – with thousands of customers already testifying to its wonderful results.

We care about:

+ Formulas and scents that make you “ooh” and “ahh”
+ Powerful natural ingredients sourced from the toughest places on earth
+ Time-saving skincare routines that offer immediate results
+ Connecting with our community and bringing customers complete confidence
+ Vegan products that are never tested on animals

From our famous LIQUICK Mud Mask to our Ultimate Hyaluronic Moisturizer and Dreamy Mango Serum, our products are packed full of super-ingredients with proven results, including customized natural botanical blends to nourish every skin type.

Name: Content Beauty/Wellbeing
Description:
Opened in 2008, CONTENT is a boutique skincare store, naturopathic clinic, beauty salon and website at the forefront of the move towards natural and organic skincare and complementary therapies. 

Specialising in emerging results-driven organic and natural niche brands, CONTENT is regarded as London's leading organic and natural apothecary.

With the launch of some of the most advanced organic skincare brands into the UK market, CONTENT has launched Absolution, Amala, RMS Beauty, Ilia Beauty, May Lindstrom, One Love Organics, Strange Invisible Perfumes, Therapi Honey Skincare, Tsi-La, Vapour Organic Make-Up, W3LL People, Soapwalla and many more.  

The CONTENT concept was created by Imelda Burke, who became interested in using natural beauty products in the mid 90’s, as an alternative to the brands containing synthetic ingredients. 

Imelda’s interest lies in cultivating emerging brands and creating the market for showcasing the latest advances in natural and organic market sector.

Name: BONDI WASH
Description:
BONDI WASH launched in November 2013 with 3 products and 3 scents.  The range was developed drawing on expertise from chemists and using the latest technology in natural ingredients.  We now have over 50 different products and 11 natural scents for the HOME, BODY, BABY and DOG. We have offices in Sydney and Milan and export to over 32 countries.

The range combines the power and fragrance of unique Australian botanicals with a luxurious mix of other essential oils and natural ingredients that are at least 99% derived from nature, often 100%. Our hope is that the range will provide a little daily pleasure as you wash and breathe in the natural scents of Australia - and do no harm to your health, to your family or to our precious planet.

Inspiré par les éléments et guidé par la science, notre laboratoire de recherche et développement étudie l’équilibre entre l’océan et la terre, en particulier les salines. Cette étude des milieux océaniques se nomme la science thalassique, un savoir-faire unique qui nous permet de proposer des produits et soins biologiques aux actifs marins puissants, au service de votre bien-être.

Name: Teaology Skincare
Description:
ABOUT US
Teaology is a range of cosmetics infused by love. Love for tea. For beauty. For innovation. Our idea was to create something that didn’t exist bringing the extraordinary properties of tea to a further level. We designed a unique technology: Tea Infusion Skincare to create high-performance skincare infused with the most powerful antioxidant ingredients. A complete line of cosmetic specialties for face and body has been developed joining the well-known effectiveness of the tea plant (Camellia sinensis) and the most pleasant textures and fragrances.
From hydration to antiaging, from nourishment to slimming and anticellulite each product is formulated with care excluding those ingredients that we do not like such as parabens, paraffin, mineral oils, SLS, SLES, artificial colors, formaldehyde donors.

TEA INFUSION SKINCARE
Behind Teaology there’s a patented technology like no other, designed precisely to convey the concentrated polyphenols that certified organic tea is so full of in each speciality. Its name is Tea Infusion Skincare, a unique method extracting the active ingredients of different types of organic tea through a process of heat infusion using whole leaves of the plant (Camellia Sinensis). This infusion is a concentrate of antioxidant polyphenols and a genuine youth elixir for the skin.
Tea Infusion Skincare is at the heart of Teaology products.
0% Water 100% Organic Tea Infusion

100% Made in Italy

Vegan & cruelty-free skincare

Clean BeauTEA

Name: ETICHUB srl

Etichub srl è uno spin-off dell’Università degli Studi di Pavia specializzato nella valutazione di sicurezza, qualità ed efficacia di prodotti cosmetici, ingredienti e dispositivi medici. Dal 2013, grazie a strumentazioni d’avanguardia e protocolli validati supporta ogni tipologia di claim in campo cosmetico guidando il cliente nella scelta della migliore strategia di testing. Il background accademico permette di valorizzare i punti di forza di ogni prodotto e rendere accessibili all’industria brevetti, protocolli e ricerche avanzate.
Offre consulenza legislativa per la commercializzazione del prodotto su tutti i mercati e, nei laboratori formulativi, realizza e sviluppa prodotti cosmetici di carattere innovativo.

Certificazione UNI EN ISO 9001:2015
